metadata.name: WeChatDataAnalysis
metadata.description: 微信4.x数据解密并生成年度总结，高仿微信，支持实时更新，导出聊天记录，朋友圈等大量便捷功能

summary.zh: WeChatDataAnalysis 是一款专为微信4.x版本设计的数据库解密与分析工具，支持聊天记录实时更新、朋友圈导出及高仿微信界面的年度总结生成。基于 Python 后端与 Vue.js 前端，集成 SQLite 数据库解析，提供图形化操作界面与 EXE 桌面端安装包，适用于个人数据归档与可视化分析。
summary.en: WeChatDataAnalysis is a dedicated tool for decrypting and analyzing WeChat 4.x databases, supporting real-time chat updates, Moments export, and WeChat-style annual summaries. Built with Python backend and Vue.js frontend, it integrates SQLite parsing and offers a GUI with an Electron-based EXE installer for personal data archiving and visualization.

metadata.name: Document-illustrator-skill
metadata.description: 帮你从文档生成对应的多张配图，内置了歸藏精心探索的图片风格，支持 16:9 和 3:4 两种比例，方便发小红书以及推特。

summary.zh: Document Illustrator 是一款基于 AI 的文档配图生成工具，支持智能内容归纳与多风格图片生成（渐变玻璃、票据、矢量插画），兼容 16:9 和 3:4 比例，适配小红书、推特等社交平台，无需特定文档格式，通过 Gemini API 实现高质量配图自动化输出。
summary.en: Document Illustrator is an AI-powered tool that generates contextual illustrations from documents. It intelligently extracts key themes and creates high-quality images in three styles—gradient glass, ticket, and vector illustration—supporting 16:9 and 3:4 aspect ratios for social media platforms like Xiaohongshu and Twitter, using the Gemini API for seamless automation.

metadata.name: nanobot
metadata.description: "🐈 nanobot: The Ultra-Lightweight OpenClaw"

summary.zh: nanobot 是一款超轻量级个人 AI 助手，仅约 4000 行代码实现核心智能体功能，体积比同类项目小 99%。支持多平台通信（Slack、Discord、飞书等）、MCP 协议、多模态输入与记忆系统，具备高可靠性与模块化设计，适合快速部署与二次开发。
summary.en: nanobot is an ultra-lightweight personal AI assistant with only ~4,000 lines of code, delivering 99% smaller footprint than comparable agents. It supports multi-platform messaging (Slack, Discord, Feishu), MCP protocol, multimodal inputs, and a robust memory system, emphasizing reliability, modularity, and ease of extension.

metadata.name: memU
metadata.description: Memory for 24/7 proactive agents like openclaw (moltbot, clawdbot).

summary.zh: memU 是一个专为 24/7 持续运行的 AI 代理（如 OpenClaw）设计的记忆框架。它通过将记忆建模为类文件系统结构，实现高效组织、跨会话意图捕捉与主动行为触发，显著降低长期运行中的 LLM Token 成本，使常驻智能体在生产环境中具备实用性与可扩展性。
summary.en: memU is a memory framework for 24/7 proactive AI agents like OpenClaw. It models memory as a file system—hierarchical, cross-linked, and instantly accessible—enabling continuous user intent capture, cost-efficient long-term operation by reducing LLM token usage, and autonomous action based on learned context.

metadata.name: prompt-optimizer
metadata.description: An AI prompt optimizer for writing better prompts and getting better AI results.

summary.zh: Prompt Optimizer 是一款专注于提升AI提示词质量的智能优化工具，支持多模型集成（OpenAI、Gemini、DeepSeek等）、双模式优化、对比测试及图像生成功能。提供Web、桌面、Chrome插件和Docker四种部署方式，采用纯客户端架构保障数据安全，适用于角色扮演、知识图谱提取、创意写作等场景，助力开发者降本增效。
summary.en: Prompt Optimizer is an intelligent tool designed to enhance the quality of AI prompts. It supports multi-model integration (OpenAI, Gemini, DeepSeek, etc.), dual-mode optimization, real-time comparison testing, and image generation (T2I/I2I). Available as Web app, desktop app, Chrome extension, and Docker deployment, it ensures data security via client-side processing and is ideal for roleplay, knowledge extraction, and creative tasks.

metadata.name: free-n8n-workflows
metadata.description: 🚀 8000+ Verified n8n Workflows. Free to download. Includes a self-hostable frontend to browse and search automation templates.

summary.zh: 该项目提供8000多个经过验证的n8n自动化工作流，涵盖营销、DevOps、销售与AI场景，支持一键下载JSON或自托管前端搜索平台。采用Next.js 14、Tailwind CSS与Supabase构建，包含完整数据库结构与源码，助力用户快速复用高质量自动化模板。
summary.en: This project offers 8,000+ verified n8n automation workflows across marketing, DevOps, sales, and AI use cases. It includes downloadable JSON files and a self-hostable Next.js-based search frontend built with Tailwind CSS and Supabase, enabling users to quickly discover, import, and deploy ready-to-use automation templates.

metadata.name: cc-switch
metadata.description: A cross-platform desktop All-in-One assistant tool for Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, openclaw & Gemini CLI.

summary.zh: cc-switch 是一款跨平台桌面工具，集成 Claude Code、Codex 和 Gemini CLI 的 AI 编程助手功能，支持多模型切换与统一管理。基于 Tauri 2 构建，提供轻量、安全、高效的本地运行环境，适用于开发者提升编码效率。
summary.en: cc-switch is a cross-platform desktop tool that integrates AI coding assistants including Claude Code, Codex, and Gemini CLI, enabling unified management and model switching. Built with Tauri 2, it offers a lightweight, secure, and efficient local runtime for developers to boost coding productivity.

metadata.name: everything-claude-code
metadata.description: Complete Claude Code configuration collection - agents, skills, hooks, commands, rules, MCPs. Battle-tested configs from an Anthropic hackathon winner.

summary.zh: 这是一个由 Anthropic 黑客马拉松获奖者整理的 Claude Code 完整配置集合，包含生产级代理、技能、钩子、命令、规则和 MCP 配置，经过 10 个月高强度实战验证，支持多语言与持续学习优化。
summary.en: A battle-tested, production-ready collection of Claude Code configurations—including agents, skills, hooks, commands, rules, and MCPs—curated by an Anthropic hackathon winner, with 10+ months of real-world usage and continuous learning optimizations.

metadata.name: RedInk
metadata.description: Red Ink - A one-stop Xiaohongshu image-and-text generator based on the 🍌Nano Banana Pro🍌, "One Sentence, One Image: Generate Xiaohongshu Text and Images."

summary.zh: 红墨（RedInk）是一款基于 Nano Banana Pro 的小红书图文生成工具，支持‘一句话生成一张图’，自动完成大纲设计、封面与内容页批量生成。采用 Flask + Vue 3 全栈架构，集成 Gemini 与 OpenAI 多模态 API，提供 Docker 一键部署和可视化配置，专为高效创作小红书风格内容而设计。
summary.en: RedInk is a one-stop Xiaohongshu content generator powered by Nano Banana Pro, enabling 'one sentence, one image' creation. It auto-generates outlines, covers, and content pages using Gemini and OpenAI APIs. Built with Flask and Vue 3, it supports Docker deployment and visual configuration for streamlined social media content production.

summary.zh: beautiful-mermaid 是一款专为 AI 时代设计的高性能 Mermaid 图表渲染库，支持生成美观的 SVG 和终端 ASCII 图。具备 6 种图表类型、15 种内置主题、Shiki 兼容、零 DOM 依赖及同步渲染能力，适用于 CLI、React 和富 UI 场景。
summary.en: beautiful-mermaid is a high-performance Mermaid diagram renderer built for the AI era, supporting beautiful SVG and terminal ASCII output. It features 6 diagram types, 15 built-in themes, Shiki compatibility, zero DOM dependencies, and synchronous rendering—ideal for CLI, React, and rich UIs.

metadata.name: BMAD-METHOD
metadata.description: Breakthrough Method for Agile Ai Driven Development

summary.zh: BMad Method 是一个开源的 AI 驱动敏捷开发框架，专为从 Bug 修复到企业级系统的全生命周期设计。它通过 12+ 专业代理（如架构师、PM、开发者）和结构化工作流，实现规模自适应的智能协作，支持跨域规划、Party Mode 多代理会话及 Dev Loop 自动化，助力开发者高效构建复杂系统。
summary.en: BMad Method is an open-source, AI-driven agile development framework designed for the full software lifecycle—from bug fixes to enterprise systems. It features 12+ specialized agents (e.g., Architect, PM, Developer), scale-adaptive intelligence, structured workflows grounded in agile practices, Party Mode for multi-agent collaboration, and Dev Loop automation to enhance developer productivity.

metadata.name: Antigravity-Manager
metadata.description: Professional Antigravity Account Manager & Switcher. One-click seamless account switching for Antigravity Tools. Built with Tauri v2 + React (Rust).专业的 Antigravity 账号管理与切换工具。为 Antigravity 提供一键无缝账号切换功能。

summary.zh: Antigravity Manager 是一款基于 Tauri v2 和 React 构建的专业级 AI 账号管理与协议代理工具，支持多平台账号（如 Gemini、Claude）的一键切换、配额监控及智能路由。其核心能力包括 OAuth 2.0 授权、多格式 API 代理（OpenAI/Anthropic/Gemini）、自动重试与静默降级机制，并集成 Imagen 3 多模态支持，为开发者提供高性能本地 AI 调度网关。
summary.en: Antigravity Manager is a professional AI account management and protocol proxy tool built with Tauri v2 and React. It enables seamless one-click switching across accounts (e.g., Gemini, Claude), real-time quota monitoring, and intelligent model routing. Key features include OAuth 2.0 auth, multi-format API proxying (OpenAI/Anthropic/Gemini), auto-retry with silent failover, and Imagen 3 multimodal support, serving as a high-performance local AI gateway.

metadata.name: openmozi
metadata.description: 轻量级的clawdbot/openclaw，支持飞书，钉钉，QQ和企业微信

summary.zh: OpenMozi 是一个轻量级 AI 助手框架，专为国产生态设计，支持 DeepSeek、豆包、Qwen 等国产大模型及飞书、钉钉、QQ、企业微信等通讯平台。提供统一接口、Function Calling、25+ 内置工具、技能系统与记忆管理，代码简洁（约1.6万行），适合企业内部机器人开发与 Agent 原理学习。
summary.en: OpenMozi is a lightweight AI assistant framework focused on China's ecosystem, supporting domestic LLMs like DeepSeek, Doubao, and Qwen, as well as communication platforms including Feishu, DingTalk, QQ, and WeCom. It offers unified APIs, Function Calling, 25+ built-in tools, a skill system, and memory management, with clean code (~16k lines), ideal for enterprise bots and learning Agent architecture.

metadata.name: toMic
metadata.description: ToMic - Turn Your Phone into a PC Microphone

summary.zh: ToMic 是一款基于 Web 技术的局域网虚拟麦克风工具，允许用户通过手机浏览器将手机变为电脑的高质量麦克风输入源。它利用 WebSocket 和 Opus 编码实现低延迟音频传输，并通过虚拟声卡（如 BlackHole 或 VB-CABLE）将音频注入系统，适用于 Zoom、Teams、Discord 等场景，支持 macOS 和 Windows 平台。
summary.en: ToMic is a LAN-based virtual microphone tool that turns your phone into a PC microphone via a web browser. It uses WebSocket and Opus encoding for low-latency audio streaming, injecting audio into the system through virtual sound cards like BlackHole or VB-CABLE. Ideal for Zoom, Teams, and Discord on macOS and Windows.

metadata.name: creative_tools
metadata.description: 使用 Gemini (Nano Banano 和 Veo) 的短视频和漫画创作工具

summary.zh: 基于 Gemini（Nano Banano 和 Veo）的短视频与漫画创作工具，支持分镜生成、角色一致性管理、剧本导入及多版本历史回溯。后端采用 Rust + Actix-web，前端为 Next.js 15 + TypeScript，集成 Cloudflare R2 存储，适用于 AI 驱动的内容创作场景。
summary.en: A short video and comic creation tool powered by Gemini (Nano Banano & Veo), featuring shot segmentation, character consistency, script import, and version history. Built with Rust + Actix-web backend and Next.js 15 frontend, integrated with Cloudflare R2 for AI-driven content generation.

metadata.name: Infographic
metadata.description: 🦋 An Infographic Generation and Rendering Framework, bring words to life with AI!

summary.zh: AntV Infographic 是蚂蚁集团 AntV 团队推出的下一代声明式信息图可视化引擎，专为 AI 生成优化。它提供约 200 个内置模板与组件，支持高质量 SVG 输出、多主题系统和内置编辑器，可快速构建专业信息图，实现高效数据叙事。
summary.en: AntV Infographic is a next-gen declarative infographic visualization engine by AntV, optimized for AI generation. It offers ~200 built-in templates and components, supports high-quality SVG output, multiple themes, and an integrated editor, enabling rapid creation of professional infographics for effective data storytelling.

metadata.name: MateBot
metadata.description: claudeclaw

summary.zh: MateCode 是一个基于 Telegram 的 Claude Code 远程代理工具，支持通过 Telegram 与 Claude 实时交互，具备长期记忆、会话管理、代码高亮等功能。采用纯轮询模式，无需公网暴露，数据本地存储，安全可靠。
summary.en: MateCode is a Telegram-based remote agent for Claude Code, enabling real-time interaction via Telegram with features like long-term memory, session management, and code highlighting. It uses polling mode without exposing public endpoints, ensuring secure local data storage.

metadata.name: workany
metadata.description: Desktop Agent for Any Task

summary.zh: WorkAny 是一款桌面 AI 代理应用，支持通过自然语言执行各类任务，包括文件整理、网站生成、文档创建等。基于 Claude Agent SDK 和 Tauri 构建，提供沙箱代码执行、实时预览、多模型提供商支持及 MCP 协议集成，适用于高效自动化办公场景。
summary.en: WorkAny is a desktop AI agent that executes tasks via natural language, featuring real-time code generation, sandboxed execution, and live previews. Built with Tauri, React, and Claude Agent SDK, it supports multiple AI providers and MCP integration for versatile automation.

metadata.name: ThinkFlowAI
metadata.description: ThinkFlow AI 是一个轻量级“从想法到结构化图谱”的工作台：输入一个核心想法，应用会把它扩展为可浏览的知识图谱（模块/子模块）。每个节点支持继续追问扩展、深挖详情，以及可选的配图生成。

summary.zh: ThinkFlow AI 是一个基于 Vue 3 和 TypeScript 的轻量级知识图谱工作台，支持从核心想法自动生成可交互的结构化图谱。用户可逐层追问扩展节点、生成深度解析与配图，并具备本地优先、多模式思考与沉浸式演示等特性，适用于灵感整理与知识内化。
summary.en: ThinkFlow AI is a lightweight, Vue 3-based knowledge graph workspace that transforms core ideas into interactive, structured graphs. It supports iterative node expansion, deep-dive content generation, AI-powered image creation, and offers local-first storage, multi-mode thinking, and immersive presentation features for idea organization and cognitive enhancement.

metadata.name: next-ai-draw-io
metadata.description: A next.js web application that integrates AI capabilities with draw.io diagrams. This app allows you to create, modify, and enhance diagrams through natural language commands and AI-assisted visualization.

summary.zh: 这是一个基于 Next.js 的 AI 驱动绘图工具，集成 draw.io 功能，支持通过自然语言指令创建、修改和增强图表。用户可快速生成架构图、流程图等可视化内容，支持多云平台图标（如 AWS、GCP、Azure），并提供在线演示与多部署选项。
summary.en: A Next.js-based AI-powered diagramming tool integrating draw.io, enabling users to create, edit, and enhance diagrams via natural language commands. It supports cloud platform icons (AWS, GCP, Azure), generates visualizations like architecture and flowcharts, and offers live demo and multiple deployment options.

metadata.name: call-me
metadata.description: Minimal plugin that lets Claude Code call you on the phone.

summary.zh: CallMe 是一款极简插件，允许 Claude Code 在任务完成、卡住或需要决策时通过电话呼叫用户。支持多轮自然对话，兼容智能手机、智能手表及座机，并可与工具调用（如网页搜索）无缝组合。需配合 Telnyx/Twilio、OpenAI API 和 ngrok 实现语音通信与 webhook 转发。
summary.en: CallMe is a minimal plugin enabling Claude Code to call users via phone when tasks are done, stuck, or require input. It supports multi-turn conversations, works on smartphones, smartwatches, or landlines, and integrates with tool use (e.g., web search). Requires Telnyx/Twilio, OpenAI API, and ngrok for voice and webhook handling.

metadata.name: webnovel-writer
metadata.description: AI驱动的长篇网文辅助创作工具 - 基于Claude Code，支持200万字连载管理，内置防幻觉机制和5维质量审查

summary.zh: 基于Claude Code的AI网文创作辅助系统，专为长篇连载设计，支持200万字级内容管理。通过双Agent架构与RAG检索解决AI‘遗忘’与‘幻觉’问题，内置防幻觉三定律、六维质量审查及Strand Weave节奏控制，确保剧情连贯、角色一致与追读体验。
summary.en: An AI-powered web novel writing assistant built on Claude Code, designed for long-form serials up to 2 million words. It combats AI 'forgetting' and 'hallucination' via a dual-agent architecture and RAG retrieval, featuring anti-hallucination rules, six-dimensional quality review, and Strand Weave pacing control for narrative consistency and reader engagement.

metadata.name: XMSLEEP
metadata.description: 一款白噪音应用送给你，祝您牛掰，有的是钱

summary.zh: XMSLEEP 是一款基于 Kotlin 和 Jetpack Compose 开发的 Android 白噪音应用，支持雨声、篝火等自然音效播放，具备无缝循环、音量独立调节、倒计时、预设收藏、动态主题及蓝牙耳机智能控制等功能，采用 Material Design 3 设计，提供沉浸式助眠与专注体验。
summary.en: XMSLEEP is an Android white noise app built with Kotlin and Jetpack Compose, offering natural sounds like rain and campfire with seamless looping, individual volume control, timer, presets, favorites, dynamic theming, and Bluetooth-aware playback, designed with Material Design 3 for relaxation and focus.

metadata.name: Handy
metadata.description: A free, open source, and extensible speech-to-text application that works completely offline.

summary.zh: Handy 是一款免费、开源且可扩展的离线语音转文本桌面应用，支持跨平台使用。通过本地 Whisper 或 Parakeet 模型实现隐私优先的实时转录，结合 VAD 技术过滤静音，用户可通过快捷键快速将语音输入到任意文本框，无需依赖云服务。
summary.en: Handy is a free, open-source, cross-platform desktop app for offline speech-to-text transcription. It uses local Whisper or Parakeet models with VAD for privacy-focused, real-time dictation via keyboard shortcuts, outputting text directly into any application without cloud processing.

metadata.name: ui-ux-pro-max-skill
metadata.description: An AI SKILL that provide design intelligence for building professional UI/UX multiple platforms

summary.zh: UI UX Pro Max 是一款 AI 驱动的设计智能工具，专为多平台专业 UI/UX 设计而生。v2.0 推出智能设计系统生成器，基于 100 条推理规则与 67 种 UI 风格，可快速生成定制化设计系统，支持跨平台框架，提升设计效率与一致性。
summary.en: UI UX Pro Max is an AI-powered design intelligence tool for building professional UI/UX across multiple platforms. Version 2.0 introduces an intelligent Design System Generator that creates tailored design systems in seconds using 100 reasoning rules and 67 UI styles, enhancing design consistency and efficiency.

metadata.name: vibe-kanban
metadata.description: Get 10X more out of Claude Code, Codex or any coding agent

summary.zh: Vibe Kanban 是一款专为 AI 编程代理（如 Claude Code、Codex、Gemini CLI）设计的任务编排与可视化看板工具，支持多代理并行/串行执行、远程 SSH 项目访问、MCP 配置集中管理及开发环境快速启动，显著提升人类工程师在 AI 辅助编程中的协作效率与任务管控能力。
summary.en: Vibe Kanban is a task orchestration and visual kanban board designed for AI coding agents like Claude Code, Codex, and Gemini CLI. It enables parallel/sequential agent execution, centralized MCP configuration, remote SSH project access, and quick dev server launches—boosting human-AI collaboration efficiency in software development.

metadata.name: easytype
metadata.description: A Flask-based tool that types or copies text from mobile devices directly to Windows computers.

summary.zh: EasyType 是一款基于 Flask 的跨平台输入工具，支持手机通过浏览器实时向 Windows 电脑发送文本，提供直接键盘输入或剪贴板复制两种模式，具备低延迟、移动端优化界面，适用于远程输入场景。
summary.en: EasyType is a Flask-based cross-platform input tool that enables real-time text transfer from mobile devices to Windows computers via browser, offering direct keyboard input or clipboard copy modes with low latency and a mobile-optimized interface.

metadata.name: proxycast
metadata.description: 把灵感、写作、出图、改稿、沉淀放进同一个工作台，让创作从“想到”直接走到“可发布”

summary.zh: ProxyCast 是一款面向普通创作者的 AI Agent 平台，集成灵感激发、内容生成、图文创作、迭代修改与成果沉淀于一体，支持社媒、短视频、小说、歌词等多元创作场景，实现从创意到发布的端到端工作流，提升创作效率与资产复用性。
summary.en: ProxyCast is an AI Agent platform for everyday creators, unifying idea generation, writing, image creation, editing, and knowledge沉淀 in one workspace. It supports diverse creative scenarios like social media,短视频, novels, and lyrics, enabling end-to-end workflows from concept to publishable output.

metadata.name: cose
metadata.description: 😃 md 编辑器使用的浏览器扩展，支持一键将文章同步到多个内容平台。

summary.zh: COSE 是一款配合 doocs/md Markdown 编辑器使用的浏览器扩展，支持一键将文章同步至微信公众号、知乎、CSDN、掘金等 30+ 内容平台，具备自动登录检测、标签页分组管理及样式保留等特性，完全本地运行，保障用户隐私。
summary.en: COSE is a browser extension for the doocs/md Markdown editor, enabling one-click syncing of articles to 30+ platforms like WeChat, Zhihu, CSDN, and Juejin. It features auto-login detection, tab grouping, style preservation, and runs entirely locally for privacy.

metadata.name: kiss-translator
metadata.description: A simple, open source bilingual translation extension & Greasemonkey script (一个简约、开源的 双语对照翻译扩展 & 油猴脚本)

summary.zh: KISS Translator 是一款简约开源的双语对照翻译工具，支持浏览器扩展与油猴脚本双形态。兼容 Chrome、Firefox、Safari 等主流浏览器，集成 Google、DeepL、OpenAI 等十余种翻译服务，提供网页翻译、划词翻译、输入框翻译、YouTube 字幕翻译等全场景功能，支持自定义规则、AI 上下文记忆与数据同步。
summary.en: KISS Translator is a minimalist, open-source bilingual translation tool available as both a browser extension and Greasemonkey script. It supports major browsers like Chrome, Firefox, and Safari, integrates 10+ translation services (Google, DeepL, OpenAI, etc.), and offers full-scenario features including webpage translation, text selection translation, input box translation, and YouTube subtitle translation with AI context memory and custom rules.

metadata.name: go-wxpush
metadata.description: 极简且免费的微信消息推送服务 (基于golang)

summary.zh: Go-WXPush 是一款基于 Golang 开发的极简微信消息推送服务，支持通过 HTTP API 向微信用户发送原生弹窗消息。具备 Docker 一键部署、每日10万次免费额度、多用户支持及自定义皮肤等功能，适用于个人通知、服务监控等场景。
summary.en: Go-WXPush is a lightweight WeChat message push service built with Golang, enabling users to send native pop-up notifications via HTTP API. It supports Docker deployment, offers 100k daily free pushes, multi-user delivery, and customizable UI skins—ideal for personal alerts and system monitoring.

metadata.name: browserwing
metadata.description: BrowserWing turns your browser actions into MCP commands Or Claude Skill, allowing AI agents to control browsers efficiently and reliably. Say goodbye to slow, token-heavy LLM interactions — let agents call commands directly for faster automation. Perfect for AI-driven tasks, browser automation, and boosting productivity.

summary.zh: BrowserWing 是一个原生浏览器自动化平台，支持将浏览器操作转化为 MCP 命令或 Claude Skill，实现 AI 代理对浏览器的高效控制。提供 26+ 个 HTTP API 端点、可视化脚本录制、智能数据提取及多 AI 模型兼容，显著提升自动化效率与稳定性。
summary.en: BrowserWing is a native browser automation platform that converts browser actions into MCP commands or Claude Skills, enabling AI agents to control browsers efficiently. It offers 26+ HTTP API endpoints, visual script recording, LLM-powered data extraction, and multi-AI model support for reliable automation.

metadata.name: clipsketch-ai
metadata.description: 将视频瞬间转化为手绘故事 Turn Video Moments into Hand-Drawn Stories

summary.zh: ClipSketch AI 是一款 AI 驱动的视频内容创作工具，支持解析 Bilibili 和小红书视频链接，实现帧级标记精彩瞬间，并通过 Google Gemini 多模态模型将标记帧转化为手绘风格故事板，同时自动生成适配社交媒体的爆款文案与封面，助力创作者高效产出优质内容。
summary.en: ClipSketch AI is an AI-powered content creation tool that parses Bilibili and Xiaohongshu video links, enables frame-level tagging of key moments, and transforms them into hand-drawn storyboards using Google Gemini's multimodal models. It also auto-generates viral social media copy and covers, streamlining content production for creators.

metadata.name: serena
metadata.description: A powerful coding agent toolkit providing semantic retrieval and editing capabilities (MCP server & other integrations)

summary.zh: Serena 是一款强大的开源编码代理工具包，通过语义级代码检索与编辑能力（如符号查找、引用分析、精准插入），将 LLM 转化为可直接操作代码库的智能代理。支持 MCP 协议，无缝集成 Claude、VSCode、JetBrains 等主流开发环境，显著提升大模型在大型项目中的效率与准确性。
summary.en: Serena is a powerful open-source coding agent toolkit that enables LLMs to act as full-featured agents operating directly on codebases. It provides semantic code retrieval and editing tools—such as symbol-based查找 and relational-aware modifications—via MCP server integration, boosting efficiency and accuracy in large-scale development workflows across IDEs and LLM clients.

metadata.name: article-writer
metadata.description: 使用Claude Code，Cursor, codex, gemini 写微信公众号文章工具。

summary.zh: Article Writer 是一款专为微信公众号和自媒体设计的 AI 驱动写作工具，支持在 Claude、Cursor、Gemini 等 13 个 AI 平台中使用斜杠命令。其核心理念是“AI 是写作伙伴而非代笔”，通过教练、快速、混合、框架约束四种模式平衡真实性与效率，并集成素材库、文档爬虫、三遍审校及微信格式化功能，帮助用户创作低 AI 味、高真实性的内容。
summary.en: Article Writer is an AI-powered writing tool designed for WeChat public accounts and content creators. It integrates with 13 AI assistants like Claude and Cursor via slash commands, offering four writing modes—Coach, Fast, Hybrid, and Outline-Constrained—to balance authenticity and efficiency. Features include personal素材库, document crawling, triple-proofreading, and WeChat formatting to produce low-AI-tone, high-authenticity articles.

metadata.name: novel-writer
metadata.description: 参考Spec-kit 实现小说撰写工具

summary.zh: Novel Writer 是一款基于规格驱动开发（SDD）的 AI 中文小说创作工具，支持在 Claude、Cursor、Gemini 等 13 个 AI 平台使用斜杠命令，提供七步系统化创作流程、情节追踪、角色一致性验证及跨平台插件扩展，专为高质量中文小说创作优化。
summary.en: Novel Writer is an AI-powered Chinese novel creation tool based on Specification-Driven Development (SDD). It supports slash commands across 13 AI platforms like Claude and Cursor, offering a seven-step workflow, plot tracking, character consistency checks, and extensible plugins for high-quality Chinese fiction writing.

metadata.name: openscreen
metadata.description: Create stunning screen recordings for free. Open-source, no subscriptions, no watermarks, and free for commercial use. An alternative to Screen Studio.

summary.zh: OpenScreen 是一款免费开源的屏幕录制工具，专为制作高质量产品演示和教程视频而设计。支持全屏或应用窗口录制、手动缩放、背景自定义、运动模糊、注释添加及多比例导出，无订阅、无水印，可免费用于商业用途，是 Screen Studio 的轻量替代方案。
summary.en: OpenScreen is a free, open-source screen recording tool for creating polished product demos and walkthroughs. It supports full or app-specific recording, manual zooms, customizable backgrounds, motion blur, annotations, trimming, and multi-aspect-ratio exports—no subscriptions, watermarks, or fees, even for commercial use.

metadata.name: ClashMac
metadata.description: Native Proxy Experience Built for macOS

summary.zh: ClashMac 是一款专为 macOS 打造的原生代理工具，基于 SwiftUI 构建，深度集成系统 API。提供可视化路由地图、连接拓扑图与流量统计，支持系统代理与 TUN 模式，具备隐私保护、实时测速与全局快捷键等功能，带来直观流畅的代理体验。
summary.en: ClashMac is a native proxy client built for macOS using SwiftUI and system APIs. It features visual route mapping, connection topology, and traffic analytics, supporting both system proxy and TUN modes. With privacy protection, real-time stats, and global hotkeys, it delivers a seamless and intuitive proxy experience.

metadata.name: vget
metadata.description: Versatile downloader for audio, video, podcasts, PDFs and more. Available as CLI and Docker | 多功能下载工具，支持音视频、播客、PDF等，提供 CLI 和 Docker 两种方式

summary.zh: vget 是一款多功能下载工具，支持从 Twitter、小红书、小宇宙等平台下载音视频、播客、PDF 等内容。提供跨平台 CLI 和 Docker 部署方式，内置 WebDAV 支持、多语言界面及配置管理功能，适合自动化与服务器场景使用。
summary.en: vget is a versatile downloader supporting audio, video, podcasts, PDFs, and more from platforms like Twitter, Xiaohongshu, and Xiaoyuzhou. It offers CLI and Docker deployment, WebDAV integration, multi-language support, and dynamic configuration, ideal for automation and server environments.

metadata.name: auo
metadata.description: 让 Claude Code 更易用，支持多配置切换。

summary.zh: auo 是一个用于简化 Claude Code 使用的工具，支持多配置切换和环境变量管理，适用于多账号或代理中转场景。主要特性包括多配置切换、环境变量管理、自动升级和向后兼容。
summary.en: auo is a tool to simplify using Claude Code, supporting multi-configuration switching and environment variable management, ideal for multi-account or proxy scenarios. Key features include config switching, env management, auto-upgrade, and backward compatibility.

metadata.name: anyrouter-check-in
metadata.description: 支持 AnyRouter、AgentRouter 的多平台多账号签到，理论兼容所有基于 NewAPI、OneAPI 的平台。

summary.zh: AnyRouter多账号自动签到工具，支持AnyRouter与AgentRouter平台，兼容NewAPI/OneAPI架构。通过GitHub Actions实现定时签到，支持多账号配置、机器人通知及WAF绕过，适用于Claude Code中转站等平台的日常积分获取。
summary.en: An automated check-in tool for multiple accounts on AnyRouter and AgentRouter platforms, compatible with NewAPI/OneAPI. It leverages GitHub Actions for scheduled execution, supports multi-account configuration, bot notifications, and WAF bypass, ideal for daily point collection on Claude Code proxy platforms.

metadata.name: Mole
metadata.description: 🐹 Deep clean and optimize your Mac.

summary.zh: Mole 是一款专为 macOS 设计的深度清理与系统优化工具，集 CleanMyMac、AppCleaner 等功能于一体。支持智能卸载应用及残留文件、可视化磁盘分析、实时系统监控，并提供缓存重建、Touch ID 配置等高级功能，帮助用户高效释放存储空间并提升系统性能。
summary.en: Mole is a macOS-focused deep cleaning and system optimization tool that integrates features like CleanMyMac and AppCleaner. It offers smart app uninstallation, visual disk analysis, real-time system monitoring, cache rebuilding, and Touch ID configuration, helping users reclaim storage and enhance performance efficiently.

metadata.name: skills
metadata.description: Public repository for Agent Skills

summary.zh: 该仓库是 Anthropic 为 Claude 提供的 Agent Skills 公开实现，包含用于提升 Claude 在专业任务中表现的技能示例，涵盖创意设计、技术开发、企业流程和文档处理等领域。每个技能独立成文件夹，含指令与资源，支持动态加载。部分技能为开源（Apache 2.0），文档类技能为源码可见，供开发者参考复杂技能实现。
summary.en: This repository hosts Anthropic's public implementation of Agent Skills for Claude, featuring modular skill examples that enhance performance in specialized tasks like design, development, enterprise workflows, and document processing. Each skill is self-contained with instructions and resources, dynamically loaded by Claude. Some are open source (Apache 2.0), while document skills are source-available for reference.

metadata.name: WeSpy
metadata.description: WeSpy 是一个用于获取wx公众号文章并转换为 Markdown 格式的 Python 工具

summary.zh: WeSpy 是一款专为微信公众号设计的 Python 工具，支持从公众号文章或专辑链接中提取内容并转换为 Markdown 格式，具备智能正文识别、图片防盗链处理、批量下载专辑文章及多格式输出（HTML/JSON/Markdown）等功能，同时兼容通用网页文章抓取，提供命令行与 API 两种使用方式。
summary.en: WeSpy is a Python tool designed for extracting WeChat Official Account articles and converting them into Markdown format. It features intelligent content extraction, anti-hotlinking image handling, batch downloading of article albums, multi-format output (HTML/JSON/Markdown), and supports both CLI and Python API usage, with compatibility for general web articles.

metadata.name: spec-kit
metadata.description: 💫 Toolkit to help you get started with Spec-Driven Development

summary.zh: Spec Kit 是一个开源工具包，旨在推动规范驱动开发（Spec-Driven Development），通过将规范转化为可执行代码，帮助开发者专注于产品场景与可预测结果，而非从零开始编写每一段代码，从而提升软件质量与开发效率。
summary.en: Spec Kit is an open-source toolkit that enables Spec-Driven Development by transforming specifications into executable code, allowing developers to focus on product scenarios and predictable outcomes instead of coding everything from scratch, thereby improving software quality and development speed.

metadata.name: Image_matting
metadata.description: 一键批量抠图。两种方法。一.使用remove.bg网站账号免费api额度，二.使用rembg和onnxruntime训练模型本地抠图

summary.zh: 该仓库提供一键批量图像抠图功能，支持两种模式：调用 remove.bg 免费 API（精度高但依赖网络）或使用本地 onnxruntime 模型（速度快、清晰度高）。具备自动切换 API 密钥、批量处理、背景替换及规范命名等实用特性，适用于无 GUI 需求的自动化场景。
summary.en: This repo offers one-click batch image matting with two modes: using remove.bg's free API (higher accuracy, requires internet) or local onnxruntime model inference (faster, higher resolution). Features include auto API key rotation, batch processing, background replacement, and standardized file naming, ideal for automated workflows without GUI.

metadata.name: awesome-claude-code-subagents
metadata.description: A collection of 100+ specialized Claude Code subagents covering a wide range of development use cases

summary.zh: 该仓库是专为 Claude Code 设计的 100+ 个细分领域 AI 子代理（subagents）的精选集合，覆盖 API 设计、前后端开发、DevOps、测试等全栈场景。支持插件化安装、交互式部署及元代理编排，显著提升开发效率与任务专业化程度。
summary.en: A curated collection of 100+ specialized AI subagents for Claude Code, spanning full-stack development, DevOps, testing, and more. Features plugin-based installation, interactive setup, and meta-orchestration agents to enhance coding productivity and task specialization.

metadata.name: zcf
metadata.description: Zero-Config Code Flow for Claude code & Codex

summary.zh: ZCF 是一款零配置代码流工具，专为 Claude Code 和 Codex 设计，支持一键部署、双语界面、智能代理系统和个性化 AI 助手。集成 MCP 与 API 路由，兼容多种 AI 模型服务，提供开箱即用的开发体验。
summary.en: ZCF is a zero-config code flow tool for Claude Code and Codex, enabling one-click setup with bilingual support, intelligent agent system, and personalized AI assistant. It integrates MCP and API routing, supporting multiple AI model providers for seamless development.

summary.zh: 基于 Claude Sonnet 4.5 的多平台自动化写作助手，通过‘首要原则’流程（如选题讨论、三遍审校、个人素材库调用）降低 AI 味，保留作者风格。支持微信公众号、Twitter 等平台，实现从调研到发布的完整创作闭环，提升内容质量与效率。
summary.en: A multi-platform AI writing agent powered by Claude Sonnet 4.5, featuring a 'First Principles' workflow (e.g., topic discussion, triple proofreading, personal素材库 integration) to reduce AI-like tone and preserve author style. Supports platforms like WeChat, Twitter, enabling end-to-end content creation from research to publishing.

metadata.name: gemini-cli
metadata.description: An open-source AI agent that brings the power of Gemini directly into your terminal.

summary.zh: Gemini CLI 是一个开源 AI 代理工具，将谷歌 Gemini 模型能力直接集成到终端中。支持免费调用（60次/分钟）、1M 上下文窗口、内置搜索与文件操作工具，并通过 MCP 协议实现可扩展集成，专为开发者打造终端优先的高效交互体验。
summary.en: Gemini CLI is an open-source AI agent that brings Google's Gemini models directly into the terminal. It offers free-tier access (60 req/min), a 1M-token context window, built-in tools like Google Search and file operations, and extensibility via the Model Context Protocol (MCP), designed for developers who work primarily in the command line.

metadata.name: docutranslate
metadata.description: 文档（小说、论文、字幕）翻译工具（支持 pdf/word/excel/json/epub/srt...）Document (Novel, Thesis, Subtitle) Translation Tool (Supports pdf/word/excel/json/epub/srt...)

summary.zh: DocuTranslate 是一款基于大语言模型的轻量级本地文档翻译工具，支持 PDF、Word、Excel、JSON、EPUB、SRT 等十余种格式。具备自动术语表生成、表格公式识别、多AI平台并发翻译、异步处理及局域网多用户支持，提供 Web 界面与 RESTful API，适用于小说、论文、字幕等场景。
summary.en: DocuTranslate is a lightweight local document translation tool powered by large language models, supporting formats like PDF, DOCX, XLSX, JSON, EPUB, and SRT. It features auto-glossary generation, table/formula recognition via docling/minerU, multi-AI platform concurrency, async processing, LAN multi-user access, and offers both Web UI and RESTful API for novels, theses, and subtitles.

metadata.name: SQLBot
metadata.description: 🔥 基于大模型和 RAG 的智能问数系统，对话式数据分析神器。Text-to-SQL Generation via LLMs using RAG.

summary.zh: SQLBot 是由 DataEase 团队开发的基于大模型与 RAG 技术的智能问数系统，支持自然语言转 SQL（Text-to-SQL），实现对话式数据分析。具备开箱即用、安全可控、易于集成和持续优化等优势，可快速嵌入各类应用平台，助力企业实现智能 BI 分析。
summary.en: SQLBot is an intelligent data querying system powered by large language models and RAG, enabling natural language to SQL conversion for conversational data analysis. It offers out-of-the-box deployment, secure access control, easy integration via Web/MCP, and continuous optimization through user feedback, ideal for embedding ChatBI capabilities into enterprise applications.

metadata.name: jta
metadata.description: AI-powered JSON translation tool with agentic reflection using OpenAI, Anthropic, and Gemini APIs

summary.zh: Jta 是一款基于 AI 的 JSON 国际化文件翻译工具，支持 OpenAI、Anthropic 和 Gemini 多平台 API。其核心特性是具备自主反思机制的代理式翻译流程：AI 先翻译，再自我评估并优化结果，确保准确性、流畅性、风格适配与术语一致性。支持增量翻译、格式保护及术语管理，适用于生产环境，并可集成至 AI 代理技能中实现自动化多语言翻译。
summary.en: Jta is an AI-powered JSON internationalization translation tool supporting OpenAI, Anthropic, and Gemini APIs. It features an agentic reflection mechanism where the AI translates, then self-evaluates and refines outputs across accuracy, fluency, style, and terminology. With incremental translation, format preservation, and terminology management, it's production-ready and usable as an AI agent skill for automated multilingual workflows.

metadata.name: zensical
metadata.description: A modern static site generator by the Material for MkDocs team

summary.zh: Zensical 是由 Material for MkDocs 团队开发的现代化静态站点生成器，支持 Markdown 编写文档，快速构建专业、可搜索、多语言且跨设备的静态网站，适用于开源或商业项目，并提供企业级支持服务 Zensical Spark。
summary.en: Zensical is a modern static site generator created by the Material for MkDocs team, enabling users to build professional, searchable, multilingual, and responsive documentation sites from Markdown in minutes, with enterprise support via Zensical Spark.

metadata.name: BettaFish
metadata.description: 微舆：人人可用的多Agent舆情分析助手，打破信息茧房，还原舆情原貌，预测未来走向，辅助决策！从0实现，不依赖任何框架。

summary.zh: 微舆（BettaFish）是一个从零构建的多智能体舆情分析系统，支持全自动采集国内外30+社媒平台数据，融合微调模型与统计模型，通过Agent“论坛”协作机制实现深度舆情还原与趋势预测。具备多模态解析、公私域数据融合及轻量化部署能力，助力打破信息茧房，辅助智能决策。
summary.en: BettaFish is a zero-dependency, multi-agent public opinion analysis system that autonomously collects data from 30+ global social media platforms. It integrates fine-tuned and statistical models via an Agent 'forum' collaboration mechanism to还原舆情真相 and predict trends. Features multimodal parsing, public-private data fusion, and lightweight deployment for informed decision-making.

metadata.name: smart-excalidraw-next
metadata.description: A smart, powerful, and beautiful excalidraw drawing tool.Draw Professional Charts with Natural Language

summary.zh: Smart Excalidraw 是一款基于自然语言生成专业图表的智能绘图工具，集成 Excalidraw 画布与 AI 大模型（如 Claude Sonnet 4.5），支持流程图、架构图、ER 图等 20+ 种类型。独创智能连接算法优化布局，提供本地/服务端双配置模式，开箱即用且保障隐私安全。
summary.en: Smart Excalidraw is an AI-powered drawing tool that generates professional diagrams from natural language descriptions. Built on Excalidraw with advanced LLMs like Claude Sonnet 4.5, it supports 20+ chart types including flowcharts and ER diagrams. Features intelligent connection algorithms, dual config modes, and local data storage for privacy.

metadata.name: ezbookkeeping
metadata.description: A lightweight, self-hosted personal finance app with a user-friendly interface and powerful bookkeeping features.

summary.zh: ezBookkeeping 是一款轻量级、自托管的个人财务管理应用，具备友好的用户界面和强大的记账功能。支持多平台部署（Docker、ARM/x86）、多种数据库（SQLite/MySQL/PostgreSQL），提供交易记录、数据导入导出、图表分析、AI收据识别、双因素认证等功能，并适配移动端 PWA，适合在树莓派等资源受限设备上运行。
summary.en: ezBookkeeping is a lightweight, self-hosted personal finance app with a user-friendly interface and powerful bookkeeping capabilities. It supports multi-platform deployment via Docker, works with SQLite/MySQL/PostgreSQL, offers transaction tracking, data import/export, chart analytics, AI-powered receipt recognition, 2FA, and PWA support—ideal for low-resource devices like Raspberry Pi.

metadata.name: agtok
metadata.description: A CLI/TUI tool to manage and switch tokens & base URLs for AI agents like Claude, Gemini, and Codex.

summary.zh: agtok 是一款用于集中管理并快速切换 Claude、Gemini 和 Codex 等 AI 代理的 API Token 与 Base URL 的命令行/TUI 工具。支持预设分组、原子化配置写入、备份机制及跨平台使用，提供交互式界面与 CLI 两种操作方式，提升多环境开发效率。
summary.en: agtok is a CLI/TUI tool for centrally managing and switching tokens and base URLs across AI agents like Claude, Gemini, and Codex. It supports preset grouping, atomic config writes with backups, cross-platform compatibility, and offers both interactive TUI and command-line interfaces for efficient multi-environment development.

metadata.name: iflow-cli
metadata.description: iFlow cli is a comprehensive command-line intelligence that embeds in your terminal, analyzes your repositories, does coding tasks, interprets your needs across contexts, and boosts efficiency by performing tasks from simple file operations to complex workflow automation.

summary.zh: iFlow CLI 是一款终端内嵌的AI命令行助手，支持代码分析、任务自动化与多模态交互，集成免费AI模型（如Kimi K2、DeepSeek v3），提供计划模式、子代理扩展、上下文压缩及开放市场插件生态，显著提升开发效率。
summary.en: iFlow CLI is a terminal-embedded AI assistant that analyzes codebases, automates tasks, and supports multimodal input. It integrates free AI models (e.g., Kimi K2, DeepSeek v3), offers plan mode, SubAgents, context compression, and an open marketplace for plugins, boosting developer productivity.

metadata.name: stock-open-api
metadata.description: 股票数据接口

summary.zh: 该项目是一个开源的股票数据接口库，提供来自上海证券交易所、东方财富等公开渠道的股票数据获取功能，支持A股、港股、科创板、新三板及中国概念股的公司概况、证券资料等信息查询，适用于量化研究、数据分析等场景。
summary.en: This is an open-source stock data API library that provides access to stock information from public sources like the Shanghai Stock Exchange and East Money. It supports querying company profiles, security details for A-shares, HK stocks, STAR Market, New Third Board, and Chinese concept stocks, ideal for quantitative research and data analysis.

summary.zh: 该项目通过可视化方式展示全球ISBN编码空间，将图书按出版国家、出版社及稀有度映射为交互式地图。基于真实元数据生成瓦片图像与层级JSON，支持缩放浏览，揭示了出版业分布与书籍稀缺性模式。
summary.en: This project visualizes the global ISBN code space as an interactive map, mapping books by country, publisher, and rarity using real metadata. It generates tiled images and hierarchical JSON for zoomable exploration, revealing patterns in publishing distribution and book scarcity.

metadata.name: Cent
metadata.description: 完全免费、开源的多人协作记账 Web App | Completely free, open-source, collaborative accounting Web App

summary.zh: Cent 是一款完全免费、开源的多人协作记账 Web 应用，基于 GitHub 仓库实现数据同步与版本控制，无需服务器即可跨平台实时同步。支持 AI 语音记账、多币种管理、周期记账、地图消费可视化及预算分析，数据完全自持，采用增量同步机制提升协作效率，是注重隐私与协同的记账解决方案。
summary.en: Cent is a completely free, open-source collaborative accounting web app that uses GitHub repositories for data sync and version control, enabling cross-platform real-time synchronization without a server. It features AI-powered voice input, multi-currency support, recurring transactions, map-based spending visualization, and budget analytics, with fully self-hosted data and efficient incremental sync for seamless collaboration.

metadata.name: auto-cursor-releases
metadata.description: 源代码(开源版本到0.8)，后续版本会继续更新但不会开源

summary.zh: Auto Cursor 是一款专业的 Cursor IDE 管理工具，支持一键备份与恢复设备ID、无感切换账户及自动轮换订阅，实现多账户无缝使用。适用于 macOS 和 Windows，操作安全，全程本地处理，不收集用户数据。
summary.en: Auto Cursor is a professional management tool for Cursor IDE, enabling one-click backup/restore of device IDs, seamless account switching, and automatic subscription rotation. It supports macOS and Windows, operates locally with no data collection, ensuring secure and efficient multi-account usage.

metadata.name: happy
metadata.description: Mobile and Web client for Codex and Claude Code, with realtime voice, encryption and fully featured

summary.zh: Happy Coder 是一个支持移动端和网页端的 Claude Code 与 Codex 客户端，提供端到端加密、实时语音交互及完整功能。用户可通过手机随时查看 AI 编码进度，接收推送通知，并实现设备间无缝切换。项目包含 CLI、Web/移动应用、远程代理控制及加密同步服务，完全开源无追踪。
summary.en: Happy Coder is a mobile and web client for Claude Code and Codex, featuring end-to-end encryption, real-time voice, and full functionality. It enables remote monitoring of AI coding sessions via mobile devices, instant device switching, push notifications, and secure session syncing—all built as open-source, telemetry-free tools.

metadata.name: bytebot
metadata.description: Bytebot is a self-hosted AI desktop agent that automates computer tasks through natural language commands, operating within a containerized Linux desktop environment.

summary.zh: Bytebot 是一款开源的 AI 桌面代理，运行于容器化 Linux 桌面环境，可通过自然语言指令自主完成复杂任务。它拥有完整的虚拟桌面，能操作浏览器、办公软件、IDE 等应用，处理 PDF、登录系统、组织文件，实现跨程序自动化工作流，具备类人操作能力。
summary.en: Bytebot is an open-source AI desktop agent that runs in a containerized Linux desktop environment, enabling autonomous task execution via natural language commands. It operates a full virtual desktop, interacting with browsers, office tools, IDEs, and file systems to automate complex, multi-step workflows like document processing and application navigation.

metadata.name: n8n-workflows
metadata.description: all of the workflows of n8n i could find (also from the site itself)

summary.zh: 该仓库汇集了4343+个n8n自动化工作流，涵盖365+种集成，是n8n生态中最全面的公开工作流集合。同时引入AI-BOM工具，首次实现对n8n工作流中AI安全风险（如硬编码密钥、未认证AI代理、MCP客户端等）的自动化扫描，支持生成合规报告，助力满足欧盟AI法案要求。
summary.en: This repo aggregates 4,343+ n8n automation workflows with 365+ integrations, forming the most comprehensive public collection. It introduces AI-BOM, the first tool to scan n8n workflows for AI security risks—including hardcoded keys, unauthenticated agents, and MCP clients—generating compliance-ready reports for EU AI Act readiness.

metadata.name: WeKnora
metadata.description: Open-source LLM knowledge platform: turn raw documents into a queryable RAG, an autonomous reasoning agent, and a self-maintaining Wiki.

summary.zh: WeKnora 是腾讯推出的基于大语言模型的文档理解与检索框架，采用 RAG 范式实现深度语义检索和上下文感知问答。支持多模态预处理、智能向量索引、自定义 Agent 及工具调用，内置数据分析师、Web 搜索等能力，适用于复杂异构文档场景，提供企业级安全与多语言支持。
summary.en: WeKnora is Tencent's LLM-powered framework for deep document understanding and semantic retrieval using the RAG paradigm. It features modular architecture with multimodal preprocessing, vector indexing, intelligent retrieval, and context-aware generation. Supports custom agents, built-in tools like data analysis and web search, tenant isolation, and enterprise-grade security for complex document scenarios.

metadata.name: Cap
metadata.description: Open source Loom alternative. Beautiful, shareable screen recordings.

summary.zh: Cap 是一款开源的 Loom 替代工具，支持快速录制、编辑和分享屏幕视频。基于 Tauri（Rust）和 Next.js 构建，提供桌面端与 Web 端应用，支持 Docker 一键部署，适用于团队协作与远程沟通场景。
summary.en: Cap is an open-source alternative to Loom for fast screen recording, editing, and sharing. Built with Tauri (Rust) and Next.js, it offers desktop and web apps, supports one-click Docker deployment, and is ideal for team collaboration and remote communication.

metadata.name: MagicMirror
metadata.description: MagicMirror² is an open source modular smart mirror platform. With a growing list of installable modules, the MagicMirror² allows you to convert your hallway or bathroom mirror into your personal assistant.

summary.zh: MagicMirror² 是一个开源的模块化智能镜子平台，基于 Electron 构建，无需额外配置服务器或浏览器。用户可通过安装各类插件模块，将普通镜子升级为集天气、日程、新闻等功能于一体的个性化助手，适用于家庭或办公场景。
summary.en: MagicMirror² is an open-source, modular smart mirror platform built with Electron, eliminating the need for a web server or browser. It enables users to transform ordinary mirrors into personal assistants with customizable modules for weather, calendars, news, and more, ideal for home or office use.

metadata.name: ququ
metadata.description: 开源免费的 Wispr Flow 替代方案 | 集成FunASR本地模型和可配置大语言模型的下一代中文桌面语音工作流

summary.zh: 蛐蛐（QuQu）是一款开源免费的中文桌面语音工作流工具，作为 Wispr Flow 的替代方案，集成 FunASR 本地语音识别模型与可配置大语言模型，实现高精度中文转录与智能文本优化。支持本地处理保障隐私，适配通义千问等国产 AI 模型，适用于写作、编程、邮件等场景。
summary.en: QuQu is an open-source, free desktop voice workflow tool designed for Chinese users as an alternative to Wispr Flow. It integrates the local FunASR speech recognition model with configurable large language models to deliver high-accuracy Chinese transcription and intelligent text optimization. With local processing for privacy and support for domestic AI models like Tongyi Qianwen, it's ideal for writing, coding, and email tasks.

metadata.name: aser
metadata.description: Aser is a lightweight, self-assembling AI Agent frame.

summary.zh: Aser 是一个轻量级、自组装的 AI 智能体框架，支持模块化配置与多场景集成。通过极简代码即可构建具备记忆、工具调用、RAG、多智能体协作等能力的代理，兼容主流 LLM 与协议（如 MCP、A2A、ERC8004），适用于从基础对话到复杂工作流的 AI 应用开发。
summary.en: Aser is a lightweight, self-assembling AI agent framework enabling modular, minimal-code agent construction. It supports memory, tools, RAG, multi-agent systems, and integrates with protocols like MCP, A2A, and ERC8004, ideal for building scalable AI applications from simple chatbots to complex workflows.

metadata.name: chrome-devtools-mcp
metadata.description: Chrome DevTools for coding agents

summary.zh: Chrome DevTools MCP 是一个基于 Model Context Protocol (MCP) 的服务端工具，允许 AI 编程助手（如 Claude、Gemini）通过 Chrome DevTools 协议控制真实浏览器实例，实现性能分析、网络调试、自动化操作与截图等功能，适用于 AI 驱动的可靠浏览器自动化与深度调试场景。
summary.en: Chrome DevTools MCP is an MCP server enabling AI coding agents (e.g., Claude, Gemini) to control and inspect live Chrome browsers via the DevTools Protocol. It supports performance tracing, network analysis, screenshots, and reliable automation using Puppeteer, ideal for AI-powered debugging and browser automation.

metadata.name: core
metadata.description: An out-of-the-box, lightweight JavaScript i18n auto-translation solution

summary.zh: i18n-pro/core 是一个开箱即用的轻量级 JavaScript 国际化自动翻译解决方案，支持文本作为键（text-as-key）和自定义键，提供变量插值、类型标签、增量翻译及多平台翻译集成，简化多语言应用开发流程。
summary.en: i18n-pro/core is an out-of-the-box, lightweight JavaScript i18n solution featuring automatic translation, text-as-key support, variable interpolation, type tags, incremental updates, and integration with multiple translation platforms for streamlined multilingual development.

metadata.name: Kode-cli
metadata.description: Kode CLI — Design for post-human workflows. One unit agent for every human & computer task.

summary.zh: Kode CLI 是一款面向后人类工作流的终端 AI 编程助手，支持 AGENTS.md 标准，可自动理解代码库、编辑文件、执行命令并协调多智能体任务。原生优先分发，兼容 20+ AI 模型，内置权限控制与隐私保护，适用于自主编码代理场景。
summary.en: Kode CLI is a terminal-based AI coding assistant designed for post-human workflows, supporting the AGENTS.md standard to autonomously understand codebases, edit files, run commands, and orchestrate subagents. It features native-first distribution, compatibility with 20+ AI models, built-in security controls, and privacy-focused network behavior.

metadata.name: claude-init
metadata.description: Claude Code 中文开发套件 - 为中国开发者定制的零门槛 AI 编程环境。一键安装完整中文化体验，集成 MCP 服务器、智能上下文管理、安全扫描，支持免翻墙访问。让 AI 编程更简单。

summary.zh: Claude Code 中文开发套件为中国开发者提供零门槛 AI 编程环境，集成 MCP 服务器、智能上下文管理与安全扫描，支持免翻墙访问。v1.3.0 融合 Anthropic 黑客松冠军配置，包含 9 个专用智能体、10 个快捷指令及完整中文本地化，显著提升开发效率与代码质量。
summary.en: Claude Code Chinese Development Kit offers a zero-barrier AI programming environment for Chinese developers, integrating MCP servers, intelligent context management, and security scanning with no need for VPN. v1.3.0 integrates Anthropic Hackathon-winning configurations, featuring 9 specialized agents, 10 slash commands, and full Chinese localization to boost productivity and code quality.

summary.zh: 该仓库是一个基于 FastMCP 框架的 VSCode 扩展，将 VSCode 转换为 MCP 服务器，支持通过 HTTP Streaming 和 SSE 协议远程执行内部命令。提供命令执行、工作区信息查询、异步后台任务、安全白名单及实时状态监控等功能，兼容标准 MCP 协议，适用于 AI 助手与编辑器深度集成场景。
summary.en: This repo is a VSCode extension built on FastMCP that turns VSCode into an MCP server, enabling remote execution of internal commands via HTTP Streaming and SSE. It supports command execution, workspace info retrieval, async background tasks, command allowlisting, and real-time status monitoring, fully compliant with the Model Context Protocol for AI-editor integration.

metadata.name: file-transfer-go
metadata.description: Go/React开发的端到端webrtc的文件传输/文字传输/桌面共享，安全，隐私，数据不经过服务器。

summary.zh: 基于 Go 和 React 开发的端到端 WebRTC P2P 文件传输工具，支持文件、文本和桌面共享，数据不经过服务器，保障隐私安全。采用 Next.js + TypeScript 前端与 Go 后端，支持 Docker 一键部署，具备响应式设计和多平台兼容性。
summary.en: A secure, serverless P2P file transfer tool built with Go and React using WebRTC for end-to-end encrypted file, text, and desktop sharing. Features Next.js frontend, Go backend, responsive design, and Docker support for cross-platform deployment.

metadata.name: next-money
metadata.description: Flux AI Image generator

summary.zh: 这是一个基于 Next.js 14 的 SaaS 全栈启动模板，集成 Clerk 身份认证、Prisma ORM、Supabase 数据库、Stripe 支付、Resend 邮件服务及 Shadcn/ui 组件库，专为快速构建 AI 图像生成类 SaaS 应用设计，支持动态邮件、动画交互与边缘部署。
summary.en: A Next.js 14-based SaaS starter template integrating Clerk Auth, Prisma, Supabase, Stripe, Resend, and Shadcn/ui, optimized for rapidly building AI image generation SaaS apps with dynamic emails, animations, and edge deployment.

metadata.name: Open-Aiartools
metadata.description: AI 图像编辑 Web 应用，使用 **FLUX.1 Kontext [pro]** 前沿模型提供强大的图像编辑功能，支持Stripe支付，注册登录，积分系统等，代码100%开源。

summary.zh: 基于 Next.js 15 和 FLUX.1 Kontext [pro] 模型的 AI 图像编辑 Web 应用，支持智能编辑、背景移除、多格式输出及 Stripe 支付系统，提供中英文界面与响应式设计，代码完全开源。
summary.en: An AI-powered image editing web app built with Next.js 15 and FLUX.1 Kontext [pro], featuring smart editing, background removal, multi-format support, Stripe payments, bilingual UI, and fully open-source code.

metadata.name: gpt-load
metadata.description: Multi-channel AI proxy with intelligent key rotation. 智能密钥轮询的多渠道 AI 代理。

summary.zh: GPT-Load 是一款高性能企业级 AI API 透明代理服务，支持 OpenAI、Gemini、Claude 等多平台原生格式。具备智能密钥轮询、负载均衡、故障自动恢复、动态配置热加载及分布式高可用架构，专为高并发生产环境设计，提供 Vue 3 管理界面与全面监控能力。
summary.en: GPT-Load is a high-performance, enterprise-grade transparent proxy for AI APIs, supporting OpenAI, Google Gemini, and Anthropic Claude with native format preservation. It features intelligent key rotation, load balancing, failure recovery, hot-reload configuration, distributed HA deployment, and a Vue 3-based management dashboard with full monitoring.

metadata.name: AionUi
metadata.description: Free, local, open-source 24/7 Cowork app and OpenClaw for Gemini CLI, Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Qwen Code, Goose CLI, Auggie, and more | 🌟 Star if you like it!

summary.zh: AionUi 是一款免费、开源、跨平台的 AI 协同办公应用，内置智能体引擎，支持零配置启动。它可让 Claude Code、Codex、Qwen Code 等 12+ 种 AI 代理在本地或远程执行文件操作、代码编写、网页浏览及定时自动化任务，用户全程可见可控，适用于 24/7 无人值守场景。
summary.en: AionUi is a free, open-source, cross-platform coworking app with a built-in AI agent engine. It enables 12+ AI agents like Claude Code, Codex, and Qwen Code to autonomously read files, write code, browse the web, and automate tasks—locally or remotely—with full user visibility and control, supporting 24/7 unattended operation.

metadata.name: typix
metadata.description: 开源AI生图工具，免登录畅玩 FLUX2、SDXL，支持 cloudflare workers 一键部署自托管，并集成各大主流AI提供商，提供一站式的创作体验。

summary.zh: Typix 是一款开源、隐私优先的 AI 图像生成工具，支持 FLUX、SDXL 等主流模型，集成 Google、OpenAI、Cloudflare 等提供商。提供免登录体验、本地数据存储、一键部署至 Cloudflare Workers 或 Docker，兼顾免费使用与自托管灵活性，为创作者打造安全高效的一站式生图平台。
summary.en: Typix is an open-source, privacy-first AI image generation tool supporting models like FLUX and SDXL, integrated with providers such as Google, OpenAI, and Cloudflare. It offers login-free access, local data storage via WASM SQLite, and one-click deployment to Cloudflare Workers or Docker, enabling secure, self-hosted, and cost-free creative workflows.

metadata.name: claude-code-router
metadata.description: Use Claude Code as the foundation for coding infrastructure, allowing you to decide how to interact with the model while enjoying updates from Anthropic.

summary.zh: 该项目基于 Claude Code 构建代码基础设施，支持将请求路由至不同 AI 模型（如 DeepSeek、Gemini、Ollama 等），提供多供应商支持、动态模型切换、请求/响应自定义转换及 CLI 管理功能，并可集成 GitHub Actions 实现自动化编码任务。
summary.en: This project builds coding infrastructure on top of Claude Code, enabling intelligent routing of requests to various AI models (e.g., DeepSeek, Gemini, Ollama), with multi-provider support, dynamic model switching, customizable request/response transformation, CLI management, and GitHub Actions integration for automated workflows.

metadata.name: claude-worker-proxy
metadata.description: Cloudflare Worker; Claude Code; Proxy; Easy to deploy; Claude Code Router; claude-code-router; ccr; alternate

summary.zh: 该项目是一个基于 Cloudflare Worker 的代理工具，将 Gemini、OpenAI 等模型的 API 转换为兼容 Claude Code 的格式，支持流式响应、工具调用和一键部署，实现低成本、零配置使用 Claude Code。
summary.en: A Cloudflare Worker-based proxy that converts APIs from Gemini, OpenAI, and others into Claude-compatible format, enabling seamless integration with Claude Code. Features include streaming, tool calls, and one-click deployment for cost-efficient usage.

metadata.name: xiaohongshu-mcp
metadata.description: MCP for xiaohongshu.com

summary.zh: 小红书 MCP 工具，支持登录、发布图文/视频内容、搜索、获取推荐列表、查看帖子详情与评论、发表评论及获取用户主页信息。提供本地文件上传、自动格式转换等功能，适用于内容运营与自动化发布场景。
summary.en: A MCP tool for Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book), enabling login, publishing image/video posts, content search, fetching recommendations, retrieving post details with comments, commenting, and accessing user profiles. Supports local file uploads and automated format conversion for content operations.

metadata.name: LiYing
metadata.description: LiYing is an automated photo processing program designed for automating the post-processing workflow of ID photos in general photo studios. | LiYing 是一套适用于自动化 完成一般照相馆后期证件照处理流程的照片自动处理的程序。

summary.zh: LiYing 是一款专为照相馆设计的证件照自动化处理程序，支持人体/人脸检测、角度校正、背景替换、多尺寸裁切及自动排版，完全离线运行，保障隐私安全，适用于 Windows 系统，可通过整合包或源码部署，并支持 GPU 加速推理。
summary.en: LiYing is an automated photo processing tool tailored for photo studios, enabling ID photo post-processing with features like human/face detection, angle correction, background replacement, multi-size cropping, and auto-layout. It runs fully offline on Windows, supports GPU acceleration, and can be deployed via prebuilt package or source code.

metadata.name: MonkeyCode
metadata.description: AI 开发平台，内置云端开发环境，并支持业内最全的顶尖大模型。无论是开发项目、做调研、写文档，还是分析数据、处理任务，打开浏览器就能随时开始，让 AI 持续帮你推进工作

summary.zh: MonkeyCode 是一款专为企业级研发协作与管理设计的 AI 编程助手，支持私有化部署与本地大模型接入，提供 IDE 插件、Git 机器人及研发管理面板三大核心能力，涵盖对话式编程、智能补全、代码安全扫描、PR 评审、任务拆分与行为审计等功能，保障代码隐私与团队协作安全。
summary.en: MonkeyCode is an enterprise-grade AI coding assistant designed for R&D collaboration and management. It supports private deployment, local LLM integration, and fully offline usage. Key features include conversational coding, intelligent code completion, security scanning, Git bot automation, and an enterprise dashboard for auditing and controlling AI-assisted development activities.

metadata.name: Excel-Plugin-Template
metadata.description: ⚡ Excel Plugin Framework | Excel插件框架 - C# .NET hot-reload template for VSTO add-ins. Features: WPF/WinForms UI, auto-update, COM safety, MVVM pattern. Perfect for Office automation & Excel/WPS plugins

summary.zh: BasePlugin 是一个基于 C# .NET Framework 的 Excel 插件开发模板，专为 VSTO 和 COM 插件设计。支持 WPF/WinForms UI、MVVM 模式、热重载、自动更新及 COM 安全机制，适用于 Excel 和 WPS 自动化扩展开发，提供完整的项目结构和最佳实践。
summary.en: BasePlugin is a C# .NET-based Excel add-in development template for VSTO and COM plugins. It supports WPF/WinForms UI, MVVM pattern, hot-reload, auto-update, and safe COM interop, enabling robust automation and extension development for both Excel and WPS Office with modern best practices.

metadata.name: WePush
metadata.description: 专注批量推送的小而美的工具，目前支持：模板消息-公众号、模板消息-小程序、微信客服消息、微信企业号/企业微信消息、阿里云短信、阿里大于模板短信 、腾讯云短信、云片网短信、E-Mail、HTTP请求、钉钉、华为云短信、百度云短信、又拍云短信、七牛云短信

summary.zh: WePush 是一款专注于多平台批量消息推送的轻量级桌面工具，支持微信生态（公众号、小程序、企业微信）、钉钉、主流云短信及邮件等20余种消息类型，具备变量消息、定时推送、失败重试、用户导入导出及可视化界面等核心功能，基于 Java Swing 开发，跨平台运行。
summary.en: WePush is a lightweight desktop tool focused on batch message delivery across multiple platforms, supporting over 20 message types including WeChat ecosystem (official accounts, mini-programs, Work WeChat), DingTalk, major cloud SMS services, and email. It features variable messaging, scheduled delivery, retry on failure, user import/export, and a polished Swing-based cross-platform GUI.

metadata.name: MoonCakeTV
metadata.description: 月饼TV

summary.zh: MoonCakeTV 是一个基于 Next.js 和 TypeScript 构建的轻量级影视聚合搜索平台，支持多源（苹果CMS v10协议）视频检索与在线播放（HLS.js），具备收藏、观看历史、深色模式、密码保护等功能。采用文件存储设计，无需数据库，支持一键 Docker 部署及 NAS 环境运行，适合个人或内网使用。
summary.en: MoonCakeTV is a lightweight movie and TV aggregation search platform built with Next.js and TypeScript. It supports multi-source video search (AppleCMS v10 protocol), online playback via HLS.js, favorites, watch history, dark mode, and optional password protection. With file-based storage and no database required, it offers one-click Docker deployment and NAS compatibility for personal or intranet use.

metadata.name: aggregator
metadata.description: One-stop Proxies Crawling and Aggregation Platform

summary.zh: 一个功能强大的免费代理池构建工具，支持从 Telegram、GitHub、Google 等多平台爬取代理资源，自动验证活性并转换为 Clash、V2Ray、SingBox 等主流格式。提供 process.py 完整处理与 collect.py 快速收集两种模式，支持 GitHub Gist 等多种存储后端，适用于搭建个人或共享代理订阅服务。
summary.en: A powerful free proxy pool builder that crawls proxies from multiple platforms like Telegram, GitHub, and Google, automatically validates their availability, and converts them into formats such as Clash, V2Ray, and SingBox. It offers both full-featured (process.py) and simplified (collect.py) modes, with support for multiple storage backends including GitHub Gist, ideal for personal or shared proxy subscriptions.

metadata.name: opcode
metadata.description: A powerful GUI app and Toolkit for Claude Code - Create custom agents, manage interactive Claude Code sessions, run secure background agents, and more.

summary.zh: opcode 是一款基于 Tauri 2 构建的桌面 GUI 应用，专为增强 Claude Code 体验而设计。它提供项目管理、自定义 AI 代理创建、会话历史追踪、使用量分析仪表盘及 MCP 服务器管理等功能，将命令行工具转化为直观的图形化操作界面，提升 AI 辅助开发的效率与可控性。
summary.en: opcode is a Tauri 2-based desktop GUI application that enhances interaction with Claude Code. It offers project/session management, custom AI agent creation, usage analytics, MCP server control, and secure background execution—transforming the CLI tool into an intuitive visual platform for productive AI-assisted development.

metadata.name: OmniParser
metadata.description: A simple screen parsing tool towards pure vision based GUI agent

summary.zh: OmniParser 是微软开发的屏幕解析工具，专为纯视觉驱动的 GUI 智能体设计，能将界面截图转化为结构化元素，显著提升大模型对界面区域的精准操作能力。支持多模态 LLM（如 GPT-4V、DeepSeek R1、Qwen-VL 等），并集成 OmniTool 实现 Windows 11 虚拟机控制，适用于自动化测试、智能助手等场景。
summary.en: OmniParser is a screen parsing tool by Microsoft for pure vision-based GUI agents, converting UI screenshots into structured elements to enhance grounding accuracy of vision-language models like GPT-4V. It supports multiple LLMs (e.g., DeepSeek R1, Qwen-VL) and integrates with OmniTool for controlling Windows 11 VMs, enabling applications in automation and intelligent assistants.

metadata.name: TrendRadar
metadata.description: ⭐AI-driven public opinion & trend monitor with multi-platform aggregation, RSS, and smart alerts.🎯 告别信息过载，你的 AI 舆情监控助手与热点筛选工具！聚合多平台热点 +  RSS 订阅，支持关键词精准筛选。AI 智能筛选新闻 + AI 翻译 +  AI 分析简报直推手机，也支持接入 MCP 架构，赋能 AI 自然语言对话分析、情感洞察与趋势预测等。支持 Docker ，数据本地/云端自持。集成微信/飞书/钉钉/Telegram/邮件/ntfy/bark/slack 等渠道智能推送。

summary.zh: TrendRadar 是一款 AI 驱动的舆情监控与热点筛选工具，支持多平台热点聚合与 RSS 订阅，具备关键词筛选、AI 翻译、智能分析简报推送等功能。集成 MCP 架构实现自然语言对话分析与趋势预测，支持 Docker 部署及微信/飞书/钉钉/Telegram 等多渠道推送，助力用户高效应对信息过载。
summary.en: TrendRadar is an AI-powered public opinion monitoring and trend filtering tool that aggregates hotspots from multiple platforms and RSS feeds. It features keyword filtering, AI translation, smart analysis reports, and integrates with MCP for NLP-based sentiment analysis and trend prediction. Supports Docker deployment and multi-channel notifications including WeChat, Feishu, DingTalk, and Telegram.

metadata.name: liquid-glass-react
metadata.description: Apple's Liquid Glass effect for React

summary.zh: Liquid Glass React 是一个 React 组件库，实现了苹果风格的液态玻璃视觉效果。支持折射、色散、弹性形变等高级特效，可配置模糊度、饱和度与鼠标响应区域，适用于按钮、卡片等 UI 元素，提供沉浸式动态交互体验。
summary.en: Liquid Glass React is a React component library that replicates Apple's Liquid Glass visual effect. It features realistic refraction, chromatic aberration, elasticity, and mouse-responsive distortion, with customizable blur, saturation, and hover interactions for buttons, cards, and other UI elements.

metadata.name: MultiAgentPPT
metadata.description: MultiAgentPPT 是一个集成了 A2A（Agent2Agent）+ MCP（Model Context Protocol）+ ADK（Agent Development Kit） 架构的智能化演示文稿生成系统，支持通过多智能体协作和流式并发机制

summary.zh: MultiAgentPPT 是一个基于 A2A、MCP 和 ADK 架构的多智能体系统，支持流式并发生成高质量可编辑 PPT。系统通过大纲生成、主题拆分、并行调研与内容汇总等智能体协作流程，实现从输入主题到完整演示文稿的自动化生成，具备实时流式返回、质量检查与可扩展性等优势。
summary.en: MultiAgentPPT is a multi-agent system built on A2A, MCP, and ADK architectures that enables streaming, concurrent generation of high-quality, editable PowerPoint presentations. It automates the process from topic input to full PPT creation through collaborative agents including outline generation, topic splitting, parallel research, and content summarization, featuring real-time streaming, quality checks, and extensibility.

metadata.name: AIClient-2-API
metadata.description: Simulates Gemini CLI, Antigravity, Codex, Grok, and Kiro client requests, compatible with the OpenAI API. It supports thousands of Gemini model requests per day and offers free use of the built-in Claude model in Kiro. Easily connect to any client via the API, making AI development more efficient!

summary.zh: AIClient-2-API 是一个强大的 API 代理工具，将仅限客户端使用的免费大模型（如 Gemini、Antigravity、Qwen Code、Kiro）转换为兼容 OpenAI 标准的接口，支持每日数千次请求，内置 Claude 模型免费调用，并通过模块化架构实现高可用性与智能故障转移，极大提升 AI 开发效率。
summary.en: AIClient-2-API is a powerful proxy that converts client-only free large models (e.g., Gemini, Antigravity, Qwen Code, Kiro) into OpenAI-compatible APIs, supporting thousands of daily requests, offering free access to built-in Claude models, and ensuring high availability through modular design with intelligent failover and health checks.

metadata.name: cloudflare_temp_email
metadata.description: CloudFlare free temp domain email 免费收发 临时域名邮箱 支持附件 IMAP SMTP TelegramBot

summary.zh: 基于 Cloudflare 免费服务构建的临时邮箱系统，支持免费收发邮件、附件处理、IMAP/SMTP 协议及 Telegram Bot 集成。采用 Rust WASM 实现高性能邮件解析，提供现代化响应式界面，支持多语言和地址密码保护，零成本部署于 Cloudflare Workers。
summary.en: A free temporary email service built on Cloudflare, supporting email sending/receiving, attachments, IMAP/SMTP, and Telegram Bot integration. Features high-performance Rust WASM email parsing, a modern responsive UI, multi-language support, address password protection, and zero-cost deployment via Cloudflare Workers.

summary.zh: Augment2Api 是一个中间件服务，用于连接 Augment API，提供与 OpenAI 兼容的接口，支持 Claude 3.7 和 Claude 4 模型调用。具备流式/非流式输出、Redis 存储、多令牌管理及批量操作功能，但存在账号封禁风险，需谨慎使用。
summary.en: Augment2Api is a middleware service that connects to the Augment API, offering OpenAI-compatible interfaces with support for Claude 3.7 and Claude 4 models. It features streaming/non-streaming output, Redis-based token storage, multi-token management, and batch operations, though it carries account ban risks.

summary.zh: 这是一个专为 Windows 系统设计的 Claude Code 原生聊天界面扩展，无需 WSL 即可运行。基于 VS Code 构建，支持官方账号与第三方 API 接入，提供直观的配置界面和快捷键操作，显著提升 Claude Code 在 Windows 环境下的使用体验。
summary.en: A native Windows UI extension for Claude Code that eliminates the need for WSL. Built on VS Code, it supports both official accounts and third-party APIs with an intuitive configuration interface, enhancing the Claude Code experience on Windows through streamlined setup and hotkey access.

metadata.name: OpenCut
metadata.description: The open-source CapCut alternative

summary.zh: OpenCut 是一款开源的视频编辑器，支持网页、桌面和移动端，主打隐私保护、无水印和免费使用。提供时间线编辑、多轨道支持、实时预览等功能，采用 Next.js 构建，支持 Docker 部署，是 CapCut 的开源替代方案。
summary.en: OpenCut is an open-source video editor for web, desktop, and mobile, emphasizing privacy, no watermarks, and free access. It offers timeline editing, multi-track support, real-time preview, and is built with Next.js, deployable via Docker, serving as a free alternative to CapCut.

metadata.name: illa-helper
metadata.description: 浸入式学语言助手 (Immersive Language Learning Assistant)

summary.zh: 基于‘可理解输入’理论的浏览器扩展，通过智能翻译网页内容帮助用户沉浸式学习语言。支持自动语言检测、AI词汇筛选、音标标注、双TTS发音及交互式提示，打造从翻译到发音的完整学习闭环。
summary.en: A browser extension based on the 'comprehensible input' theory that enables immersive language learning by intelligently translating web content. Features include auto language detection, AI-powered vocabulary selection, phonetic notation, dual TTS support, and interactive tooltips for a seamless learning experience.

metadata.name: go-augment-cleaner
metadata.description: 清理Augment缓存和生成设备SessionId/解决 VSCode、Cursor、JetBrains 系列 IDE 中 Augment 插件无法登录的问题（Sign in failed. If you have a firewall, please add）/将所有 d1-d20.api.augmentcode.com 域名统一指向延迟最低的服务器IP

summary.zh: 一款专为 Augment 插件设计的跨平台清理与优化工具，支持彻底清除 JetBrains、VSCode、Cursor 等 IDE 中的插件缓存与配置，并智能测速 d1-d20.api.augmentcode.com 域名，自动优化 hosts 文件以解决登录失败问题。提供交互式菜单与命令行双模式，支持代理配置与安全干运行。
summary.en: A cross-platform tool for cleaning Augment plugin data across JetBrains, VSCode, and Cursor IDEs, and optimizing API domain resolution by testing latency of d1-d20.api.augmentcode.com. It fixes login issues via hosts optimization, supports interactive and CLI modes, proxies, and dry-run safety checks.

metadata.name: AlgerMusicPlayer
metadata.description: 一个第三方音乐播放器、本地服务、桌面歌词、音乐下载、远程控制

summary.zh: Alger Music Player 是一款功能丰富的第三方音乐播放器，支持网易云账号登录、本地服务、桌面歌词、音乐下载与远程控制。具备沉浸式歌词、EQ均衡器、多平台适配及高品质音源解析，基于 netease-cloud-music-api 实现本地化运行，提供完整音乐生态体验。
summary.en: Alger Music Player is a feature-rich third-party music player supporting NetEase Cloud login, local services, desktop lyrics, music download, and remote control. It offers immersive lyrics, EQ equalizer, multi-platform compatibility, and high-quality audio parsing via netease-cloud-music-api, delivering a complete localized music experience.

metadata.name: Scraperr
metadata.description: Self-hosted webscraper.

summary.zh: Scraperr 是一款自托管的无代码网页抓取工具，基于 FastAPI、Next.js 和 MongoDB 构建。支持 XPath 精准提取、队列管理、域名爬取、媒体下载及结果可视化导出，提供 Docker 和 Helm 部署方式，适用于合法合规的数据采集场景。
summary.en: Scraperr is a self-hosted, no-code web scraping solution built with FastAPI, Next.js, and MongoDB. It supports XPath-based extraction, job queuing, domain spidering, media downloads, and structured data export, deployable via Docker or Helm for ethical data collection.

metadata.name: claude_proxy
metadata.description: 这是一个部署在 Cloudflare Workers 上的 TypeScript 项目，它充当一个代理服务器，能够将 Claude API 格式的请求无缝转换为 OpenAI API 格式。这使得任何与 Claude API 兼容的客户端（例如官方的 @anthropic-ai/claude-code CLI）都能够与任何支持 OpenAI API 格式的服务进行通信，如 Google Gemini, Groq, Ollama 等。

summary.zh: 该项目是一个基于 Cloudflare Workers 的 TypeScript 代理，实现 Claude API 到 OpenAI API 格式的无缝转换，支持动态路由、流式响应、函数调用兼容及 Haiku 模型快捷配置，使 Claude 客户端可调用 Gemini、Groq、Ollama 等服务。
summary.en: A Cloudflare Workers-based TypeScript proxy that seamlessly converts Claude API requests to OpenAI API format, enabling Claude-compatible clients to interact with OpenAI-compatible services like Gemini, Groq, and Ollama via dynamic routing, streaming, and tool calling support.

metadata.name: mindsdb
metadata.description: Query Engine for AI Analytics: Build self-reasoning agents across all your live data

summary.zh: MindsDB 是一个开源的联邦查询引擎，专为 AI 应用设计，内置 MCP 服务器，支持连接数百种数据源（数据库、数据仓库、SaaS），通过 SQL 实现数据统一与知识库构建，并提供智能代理（Agents）实现自然语言问答，助力 AI 与大规模异构数据高效交互。
summary.en: MindsDB is an open-source federated query engine for AI, featuring a built-in MCP server that connects to hundreds of data sources, unifies structured and unstructured data via SQL-based knowledge bases and views, and enables natural language responses through intelligent agents for seamless AI-data interaction.

metadata.name: Ghost
metadata.description: Independent technology for modern publishing, memberships, subscriptions and newsletters.

summary.zh: Ghost 是一个基于 Node.js 的开源无头 CMS，专为现代出版、会员订阅和新闻通讯设计。支持独立部署或托管服务 Ghost(Pro)，提供 CLI 快速安装、自动 SSL、CDN 和 API 驱动的内容管理，适合专业创作者与开发者构建高性能内容平台。
summary.en: Ghost is an open-source, headless Node.js CMS built for modern publishing, memberships, and newsletters. It offers CLI-based deployment, automatic SSL, CDN support, and a robust API, enabling creators and developers to build scalable, professional content platforms with ease.

metadata.name: afilmory
metadata.description: Modern photo gallery for photographers, with S3/GitHub sync, EXIF details, maps, and a WebGL viewer.

summary.zh: Afilmory 是一款面向摄影师的现代高性能图库平台，支持 S3/GitHub 自动同步、EXIF 元数据展示、地图定位及 WebGL 图像查看器。基于 React + TypeScript 构建，提供响应式瀑布流布局、HDR 支持、富士胶片模拟显示及多语言功能，兼顾 SaaS 托管与自部署方案。
summary.en: Afilmory is a modern, high-performance photo gallery platform for photographers, featuring S3/GitHub sync, EXIF metadata display, interactive maps, and a WebGL-based viewer. Built with React + TypeScript, it offers responsive masonry layouts, HDR support, Fujifilm recipe rendering, and both SaaS and self-hosting options.

metadata.name: enableAppleAI
metadata.description: Enable Apple Intelligence on Macs sold in Mainland China with SIP enabled, tested on MacOS 15.4.1+ and 26+

summary.zh: 该工具通过修改系统配置文件和注入进程，绕过Apple对中国大陆销售Mac设备的Apple Intelligence功能限制，支持macOS 15.4.1及以上版本。无需长期禁用SIP或运行后台服务，可永久启用Siri整合ChatGPT、Apple News等AI功能，并提供地区伪装为美国的选项以解锁更多服务。
summary.en: This tool enables Apple Intelligence on Macs sold in Mainland China by bypassing regional restrictions via system file modifications and process injection. It supports macOS 15.4.1+, requires no persistent SIP disablement or background services, and allows permanent activation of AI features like Siri-ChatGPT integration, with optional US region spoofing for broader access.

metadata.name: awesome-mcp-servers
metadata.description: A collection of MCP servers.

summary.zh: 这是一个精选的 Model Context Protocol (MCP) 服务器集合，涵盖文件访问、数据库连接、API 集成等功能，支持本地与云端服务，提供多语言实现和跨平台支持，助力 AI 模型扩展上下文能力。
summary.en: A curated list of Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers enabling AI models to securely interact with local and remote resources via standardized implementations, covering file access, databases, APIs, and more across multiple languages and platforms.

metadata.name: ProxyFilter
metadata.description: 节点过滤器

summary.zh: ProxyFilter 是一款基于 Cloudflare Workers 的 Clash 代理配置过滤工具，支持多格式输入（YAML、Base64、URI 列表），可智能按名称、类型过滤节点，兼容 VMess、Trojan 等主流协议，支持多源合并、去重与重命名，适用于动态定制代理订阅。
summary.en: ProxyFilter is a Cloudflare Workers-based tool for filtering Clash proxy configurations. It supports multiple input formats (YAML, Base64, URI lists), intelligently filters nodes by name and type, merges multiple sources, removes duplicates, and works with major protocols like VMess and Trojan.

metadata.name: input-leap
metadata.description: Open-source KVM software

summary.zh: Input Leap 是一款开源 KVM 软件，通过软件方式实现多设备间的键鼠共享，支持跨 Windows、macOS、Linux 和 FreeBSD 系统。用户可通过鼠标移至屏幕边缘或快捷键切换控制目标设备，支持剪贴板同步（Linux/Wayland 除外）。项目强调简洁性、跨平台兼容性与社区透明协作，旨在解决 Synergy 的遗留问题。
summary.en: Input Leap is an open-source KVM software that enables keyboard and mouse sharing across multiple computers via software, mimicking hardware KVM switches. It supports Windows, macOS, Linux, and FreeBSD, allowing control switching by moving the mouse to screen edges or using hotkeys. Clipboard sharing is supported (except on Linux/Wayland). The project prioritizes simplicity, cross-platform compatibility, and open communication.

summary.zh: 这是一个基于 Next.js、TypeScript 和 Tailwind CSS 构建的个人作品集与博客网站，采用 Turborepo 管理，支持 MDX 内容、RSS 订阅、评论系统和阅读统计。集成 Motion 动画库实现流畅交互，具备高性能、SEO 优化及无障碍访问特性，Lighthouse 评分接近满分。
summary.en: A personal portfolio and blog built with Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS, managed via Turborepo. Features MDX support, RSS, comments, view counters, and smooth animations with Motion. Delivers near-perfect Lighthouse scores in performance, SEO, and accessibility.

metadata.name: mcp-chrome
metadata.description: Chrome MCP Server is a Chrome extension-based Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that exposes your Chrome browser functionality to AI assistants like Claude, enabling complex browser automation, content analysis, and semantic search.

summary.zh: Chrome MCP Server 是一款基于 Chrome 扩展的 Model Context Protocol (MCP) 服务器，将浏览器功能开放给 Claude 等 AI 助手，实现浏览器自动化、内容分析与语义搜索。支持本地运行、跨标签页操作、20+ 工具集成，并利用 SIMD 加速 AI 向量计算，提升效率。
summary.en: Chrome MCP Server is a Chrome extension-based Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that exposes browser functionality to AI assistants like Claude, enabling automation, content analysis, and semantic search. It runs locally, supports cross-tab operations, integrates 20+ tools, and uses SIMD-accelerated AI for faster vector processing.

metadata.name: GPT-SoVITS
metadata.description: 1 min voice data can also be used to train a good TTS model! (few shot voice cloning)

summary.zh: GPT-SoVITS 是一款强大的少样本语音转换与文本转语音（TTS）工具，仅需1分钟语音数据即可训练高质量模型，支持零样本和少样本语音克隆。项目提供 WebUI 界面，集成语音分离、自动切分、ASR 等辅助工具，支持中英日韩粤等多语言跨语种合成，推理速度快（4090上RTF低至0.014），适合快速构建个性化语音应用。
summary.en: GPT-SoVITS is a powerful few-shot voice conversion and text-to-speech (TTS) system that enables high-quality voice cloning with just 1 minute of training data. It supports zero-shot and few-shot inference, cross-lingual synthesis (Chinese, English, Japanese, Korean, Cantonese), and includes a WebUI with tools for voice separation, dataset segmentation, and ASR. With fast inference (RTF as low as 0.014 on RTX 4090), it's ideal for personalized voice applications.

metadata.name: mcp-feedback-enhanced
metadata.description: Enhanced MCP server for interactive user feedback and command execution in AI-assisted development, featuring dual interface support (Web UI and Desktop Application) with intelligent environment detection and cross-platform compatibility.

summary.zh: MCP Feedback Enhanced 是一个增强型 MCP 服务器，专为 AI 辅助开发中的交互式用户反馈与命令执行设计。支持 Web UI 和桌面应用双界面，具备智能环境检测（SSH/WSL）、跨平台兼容性、会话追踪、自动命令执行及 Markdown 工作摘要等功能，显著提升开发效率与交互体验。
summary.en: MCP Feedback Enhanced is an advanced MCP server designed for interactive user feedback and command execution in AI-assisted development. It features dual interfaces (Web UI & Desktop App), intelligent environment detection (SSH/WSL), cross-platform support, session tracking, auto-command execution, and rich Markdown summaries to boost development efficiency.

metadata.name: gallery
metadata.description: A gallery that showcases on-device ML/GenAI use cases and allows people to try and use models locally.

summary.zh: Google AI Edge Gallery 是一款实验性应用，展示多种端侧生成式AI用例，支持在 Android 和 iOS 设备上完全离线运行模型。用户可本地体验图像理解、语音转录、提示词实验、小游戏及模型微调等功能，无需联网即可探索前沿AI能力。
summary.en: Google AI Edge Gallery is an experimental app showcasing on-device generative AI use cases, enabling fully offline model execution on Android and iOS. Users can explore image understanding, audio transcription, prompt engineering, mini-games, and fine-tuned models—all running locally without internet.

metadata.name: gemini-fullstack-langgraph-quickstart
metadata.description: Get started with building Fullstack Agents using Gemini 2.5 and LangGraph

summary.zh: 该项目展示了一个基于 React 前端和 LangGraph 后端代理的全栈应用，利用 Gemini 2.5 模型实现智能研究型对话 AI。代理能动态生成搜索词、调用 Google 搜索 API 获取信息，并通过反思机制识别知识缺口、迭代优化查询，最终生成带引用的完整答案，适用于构建研究增强型 AI 应用。
summary.en: This project demonstrates a fullstack app with a React frontend and a LangGraph-powered backend agent using Gemini 2.5. The agent dynamically generates search queries, performs web research via Google Search API, reflects on results to identify knowledge gaps, and iteratively refines searches to produce well-cited, comprehensive answers—ideal for research-augmented conversational AI.

metadata.name: deep-research
metadata.description: Use any LLMs (Large Language Models) for Deep Research. Support SSE API and MCP server.

summary.zh: Deep Research 是一款基于多模态大语言模型（LLM）的深度研究工具，支持 Gemini、OpenAI、Ollama 等主流模型，集成 SSE API 与 MCP 服务器。具备网页搜索、本地知识库、知识图谱生成、研究历史记录等功能，可在约2分钟内生成高质量研究报告，数据全程本地处理，保障隐私安全，支持 Vercel 与 Cloudflare 快速部署。
summary.en: Deep Research is a privacy-focused, AI-powered tool that generates in-depth research reports in minutes using various LLMs like Gemini, OpenAI, and Ollama. It supports web search, local knowledge bases, knowledge graphs, and research history, with full local data processing. Deployable on Vercel and Cloudflare, it integrates SSE API and MCP server for flexible, secure, and fast research workflows.

metadata.name: FakeHTTP
metadata.description: Obfuscate all your TCP connections into HTTP protocol.

summary.zh: FakeHTTP 是一款基于 Netfilter Queue（NFQUEUE）的工具，可将任意 TCP 连接伪装成 HTTP/HTTPS 协议流量，实现网络连接的协议混淆，适用于绕过深度包检测（DPI）或网络审查场景。支持 IPv4/IPv6、多网卡及守护进程模式。
summary.en: FakeHTTP is a network obfuscation tool that disguises all TCP connections as HTTP/HTTPS traffic using Netfilter Queue (NFQUEUE). It helps bypass deep packet inspection (DPI) and censorship by mimicking legitimate web traffic, supporting IPv4/IPv6, multiple interfaces, and daemon mode.

metadata.name: mcp-feedback-collector
metadata.description: 一个现代化的 Model Context Protocol (MCP) 服务器，为AI助手提供交互式用户反馈收集功能。

summary.zh: 这是一个基于 Model Context Protocol (MCP) 的现代化反馈收集服务器，专为AI助手设计，支持交互式文字与多图片反馈。提供美观的GUI界面、一键安装、智能超时配置，适用于AI任务完成后的用户评价、bug报告等场景，技术栈涵盖FastMCP、tkinter和Pillow。
summary.en: A modern MCP-based feedback collection server for AI assistants, enabling interactive text and multi-image user feedback via a sleek GUI. Features one-click installation, configurable timeouts, and support for screenshots or design reviews, built with FastMCP, tkinter, and Pillow.

metadata.name: Open-Sora
metadata.description: Open-Sora: Democratizing Efficient Video Production for All

summary.zh: Open-Sora 是一个致力于高效生成高质量视频的开源项目，旨在降低视频生成技术门槛。其最新版本 2.0 拥有 11B 参数，性能媲美主流商业模型，且训练成本仅 20 万美元，支持全流程开源，涵盖模型、工具与训练代码，推动视频创作的普惠化与社区协作创新。
summary.en: Open-Sora is an open-source initiative focused on efficient, high-quality video generation. The latest 2.0 version features an 11B-parameter model matching top-tier models in performance, with fully open training code and checkpoints, trained for only $200K, democratizing access to advanced video synthesis.

metadata.name: read-bridge
metadata.description: AI-enhanced reading tool for immersive language learning using the n+1 method. Learn languages by staying in the target language ecosystem, with a flow-state focused interface.

summary.zh: ReadBridge 是一款基于 n+1 可理解输入理论的 AI 增强阅读工具，支持 Web 与桌面端（Tauri），专为沉浸式语言学习设计。通过目标语言环境下的上下文理解，减少母语翻译依赖，结合 AI 解释与进度追踪，帮助用户实现自然习得。
summary.en: ReadBridge is an AI-powered reading assistant for immersive language learning, built on the n+1 comprehensible input theory. Available as a web app and desktop software via Tauri, it enables source-to-source learning by providing contextual explanations in the target language, minimizing native language reliance.

metadata.name: tts-server-android
metadata.description: 这是一个Android系统TTS应用，内置微软演示接口，可自定义HTTP请求，可导入其他本地TTS引擎，以及根据中文双引号的简单旁白/对话识别朗读 ，还有自动重试，备用配置，文本替换等更多功能。

summary.zh: 这是一个功能强大的Android TTS（文本转语音）应用，内置微软TTS演示接口，支持自定义HTTP请求、导入本地TTS引擎，具备中文双引号对话识别、自动重试、备用配置及文本替换等高级功能，适用于有声阅读、无障碍辅助等场景。
summary.en: A powerful Android TTS (Text-to-Speech) app with built-in Microsoft TTS demo API, supports custom HTTP requests, local TTS engine integration, Chinese dialogue detection via quotes, auto-retry, fallback configs, and text replacement, ideal for audiobooks and accessibility.

metadata.name: GPT_API_free
metadata.description: Free ChatGPT&DeepSeek API Key，免费ChatGPT&DeepSeek API。免费接入DeepSeek API和GPT4 API，支持 gpt | deepseek | claude | gemini | grok 等排名靠前的常用大模型。

summary.zh: 该项目提供免费且稳定的 GPT、DeepSeek、Claude、Gemini 等主流大模型 API 转发服务，支持国内直连无需代理，兼容 OpenAI 标准协议，接口一致、接入便捷。免费版每日限额调用，付费版支持更高性能与无限使用，适合个人开发、教育及非商用场景。
summary.en: This project offers free and stable API forwarding for top-tier LLMs like GPT, DeepSeek, Claude, and Gemini. It supports direct domestic access without proxies, fully compatible with OpenAI's standard protocol. Free tier has daily limits; paid version provides unlimited usage and better performance, ideal for personal, educational, and non-commercial use.

metadata.name: smart-mermaid
metadata.description: 一款基于 AI 技术的 Web 应用程序，可将文本内容智能转换为 Mermaid 格式的代码，并将其渲染成可视化图表。

summary.zh: Smart Mermaid 是一款基于 AI 的 Web 工具，可将自然语言文本智能转换为 Mermaid 代码并渲染为可视化图表，支持流程图、序列图等多种类型，提供标准与手绘风双渲染模式，具备代码修复、优化建议、文件导入及本地历史记录功能，适用于文档可视化与快速原型设计。
summary.en: Smart Mermaid is an AI-powered web app that converts natural language text into Mermaid code and renders it as visual diagrams.
