It supports TypeScript and integrates open-source libraries like Tippy.js, Lucide icons, VueUse, and Yup, enabling tooltips, virtual lists, and form validation for efficient frontend development.

metadata.name: dify
metadata.description: Production-ready platform for agentic workflow development.

summary.zh: Dify 是一个生产就绪的 AI 智能体工作流开发平台，支持可视化编排复杂任务流程，集成大模型与外部工具。提供云端服务与自托管方案，适用于构建知识库问答、AI 播客生成等场景，具备高扩展性与企业级部署能力。
summary.en: Dify is a production-ready platform for building agentic workflows with visual orchestration, integrating LLMs and external tools. It offers both cloud and self-hosted deployment, ideal for applications like knowledge-based Q&A and AI podcast generation, with high scalability and enterprise-grade features.

metadata.name: VideoLingo
metadata.description: Netflix-level subtitle cutting, translation, alignment, and even dubbing - one-click fully automated AI video subtitle team | Netflix级字幕切割、翻译、对齐、甚至加上配音，一键全自动视频搬运AI字幕组

summary.zh: VideoLingo 是一款全自动 AI 视频字幕处理工具，支持 YouTube 视频下载、WhisperX 词级字幕识别、NLP 智能分段、AI 术语翻译、三阶段翻译优化，并生成 Netflix 级单行字幕，同时集成 GPT-SoVITS 等 TTS 实现高质量配音，一键完成多语言本地化。
summary.en: VideoLingo is a fully automated AI-powered video subtitle tool that downloads YouTube videos, performs word-level recognition via WhisperX, segments subtitles with NLP, translates using AI terminology and a 3-step cinematic process, outputs Netflix-style single-line subtitles, and enables high-quality dubbing via GPT-SoVITS and other TTS engines.

metadata.name: auto-video-generateor
metadata.description: 自动视频生成器，给定主题，自动生成解说视频。用户输入主题文字，系统调用大语言模型生成故事或解说的文字，然后进一步调用语音合成接口生成解说的语音，调用文生图接口生成契合文字内容的配图，最后融合语音和配图生成解说视频。

summary.zh: 该项目是一个全自动视频生成系统，支持根据用户输入的主题、PPT或PDF自动生成解说视频。系统调用大语言模型生成文本，结合语音合成与文生图技术生成配音和配图，最终融合为完整视频。支持免费资源（如ERNIE、edge-tts）和千帆平台，提供校对功能，确保内容质量，适用于教育、科普等场景。
summary.en: This project is an automated video generation system that creates explanatory videos from user-provided topics, PPTs, or PDFs. It leverages large language models to generate scripts, synthesizes speech and images via TTS and text-to-image APIs, and combines them into final videos. It supports free resources (e.g., ERNIE, edge-tts) and Baidu Qianfan, with a proofreading feature for content refinement, ideal for education and科普.

metadata.name: vue-pure-admin
metadata.description: 全面ESM+Vue3+Vite+Element-Plus+TypeScript编写的一款后台管理系统（兼容移动端）

summary.zh: vue-pure-admin 是一款基于 Vue3 + Vite + TypeScript + Element-Plus 构建的现代化中后台管理系统模板，全面采用 ESM 规范，支持移动端适配。提供精简版（<2.3MB）与国际化版本，集成 Pinia、Tailwind CSS，具备暗色主题、Docker 部署及 Tauri/Electron 跨平台支持，开箱即用。
summary.en: vue-pure-admin is a modern admin dashboard template built with Vue3, Vite, TypeScript, and Element-Plus, fully ESM-compliant and mobile-responsive. It offers a lightweight version (<2.3MB), i18n support, dark mode, Docker deployment, and cross-platform builds via Tauri/Electron, enabling out-of-the-box development.

metadata.name: md
metadata.description: ✍ WeChat Markdown Editor | 一款高度简洁的微信 Markdown 编辑器：支持 Markdown 语法、自定义主题样式、内容管理、多图床、AI 助手等特性

summary.zh: 一款专为微信设计的简洁 Markdown 编辑器，支持完整语法、数学公式、Mermaid/PlantUML 图表、代码高亮、自定义主题、草稿保存、多图床（GitHub/阿里云/腾讯云等）及主流 AI 模型集成，实现 Markdown 到微信图文的即时渲染，提升内容创作效率。
summary.en: A minimalist WeChat-focused Markdown editor that instantly renders Markdown into WeChat-compatible articles. It supports full syntax, math formulas, Mermaid/PlantUML diagrams, syntax highlighting, custom themes, draft saving, multi-image hosting (GitHub, Aliyun, Tencent Cloud), and integration with major AI models for enhanced content creation.

metadata.name: python-office
metadata.description: pip install python-office 自动化办公专用库

summary.zh: python-office 是一个专为自动化办公设计的 Python 第三方库，集成微信机器人、PDF/Excel/Word 处理、AI 工具、文件管理等模块，支持一行代码调用，无需编程基础即可实现高效办公自动化，适合职场小白快速上手。
summary.en: python-office is a Python third-party library designed for office automation, integrating modules like WeChat bots, PDF/Excel/Word processing, AI tools, and file management. It enables one-line code execution, allowing non-programmers to achieve efficient automation with minimal learning cost.

metadata.name: Crawler_Illegal_Cases_In_China
metadata.description: Collection of China illegal cases about web crawler 本项目用来整理所有中国大陆爬虫开发者涉诉与违规相关的新闻、资料与法律法规。致力于帮助在中国大陆工作的爬虫行业从业者了解我国相关法律，避免触碰数据合规红线。 [AD]企业租显卡算力部署AI请选Novagrid

summary.zh: 本项目系统整理中国大陆爬虫开发者涉诉与违规案例，涵盖为违法组织提供验证码破解、非法抓取隐私数据、盗用商业数据、致目标网站宕机等典型场景，并汇总《刑法》《网络安全法》等相关法律条文及司法解释，旨在帮助从业者识别法律红线，规避数据合规风险。
summary.en: This project systematically compiles illegal and non-compliant cases involving web crawler developers in mainland China, covering scenarios such as providing CAPTCHA破解 services, scraping personal data, misusing commercial data, and causing server crashes. It also summarizes relevant laws like the Criminal Law and Cybersecurity Law to help practitioners avoid legal risks.

metadata.name: aigotools
metadata.description: AigoTools can help users quickly create and manage website directory, with built-in site auto-crawling features, and also provides internationalization, SEO, image storage, and other functions. It allows users to quickly deploy their own directory site online.

summary.zh: AigoTools 是一款快速构建和管理网站目录的开源工具，内置站点自动爬取、国际化、SEO 优化及多平台图片存储（如 MinIO、AWS S3）等功能，支持通过 Docker 或 Zeabur 一键部署，适用于搭建个性化导航站点。
summary.en: AigoTools is an open-source tool for quickly building and managing website directories, featuring auto-crawling, internationalization, SEO optimization, and multi-platform image storage (e.g., MinIO, AWS S3). It supports one-click deployment via Docker or Zeabur, ideal for creating custom navigation sites.

metadata.name: blog-next-view
metadata.description: Nuxt full-stack blog.

summary.zh: 这是一个基于 Nuxt 的全栈博客项目，采用 MongoDB 存储数据，Cloudflare R2 存储图片，集成 Giscus 评论系统和 NuxtUI 界面框架。支持全文搜索、在线 Markdown 编辑、友链截图、SEO 优化等功能，部署于 Zeabur 平台，通过容器化实现低成本运维。
summary.en: A full-stack blog built with Nuxt, using MongoDB for data storage and Cloudflare R2 for image hosting. It integrates Giscus for comments and NuxtUI for UI, featuring full-text search, WYSIWYG Markdown editing, friend link screenshots, and SEO optimization, deployed on Zeabur with cost-efficient containerization.

metadata.name: pic-smaller
metadata.description: Pic Smaller – Compress JPEG, PNG, WEBP, AVIF, SVG and GIF images intelligently

summary.zh: Pic Smaller 是一款纯前端运行的智能图片压缩工具，支持 JPEG、PNG、WEBP、AVIF、SVG 和 GIF 格式。基于 Vite + React 构建，利用 OffscreenCanvas、WebAssembly 和 Web Worker 实现本地高效压缩，无需服务器，保障隐私安全。提供可视化对比、格式转换与色彩数调节等功能，适配桌面与移动端。
summary.en: Pic Smaller is a client-side image compression tool supporting JPEG, PNG, WEBP, AVIF, SVG, and GIF. Built with Vite + React, it leverages OffscreenCanvas, WebAssembly, and Web Workers for fast, secure local processing without server dependency. Features include format conversion, color reduction, and a drag-to-compare preview, optimized for both desktop and mobile.

metadata.name: drawdb
metadata.description: Free, simple, and intuitive online database diagram editor and SQL generator.

summary.zh: drawDB 是一款免费、简洁且直观的在线数据库关系图编辑器和 SQL 生成工具。用户无需注册即可在浏览器中快速绘制 ER 图、导出 SQL 脚本，并支持自定义编辑器样式，适用于数据库设计与教学场景。
summary.en: drawDB is a free, intuitive online database schema editor and SQL generator that runs directly in the browser. Users can create ER diagrams, export SQL scripts, and customize the editor without registration—ideal for database design and education.

metadata.name: ChatTTS-ui
metadata.description: 一个简单的本地网页界面，使用ChatTTS将文字合成为语音，同时支持对外提供API接口。A simple native web interface that uses ChatTTS to synthesize text into speech, along with support for external API interfaces.

summary.zh: ChatTTS-UI 是一个基于 ChatTTS 的本地语音合成网页界面，支持中英文及数字混合文本转语音，提供直观的 WebUI 和外部 API 接口。支持 GPU（NVIDIA CUDA / AMD ROCm）加速，兼容 Windows、Linux 和 macOS，可通过 Docker 或源码部署，适合私有化语音生成场景。
summary.en: ChatTTS-UI is a local web interface for text-to-speech synthesis using ChatTTS, supporting mixed Chinese, English, and numeric input. It offers both a user-friendly WebUI and external API access, with GPU acceleration (NVIDIA CUDA/AMD ROCm), cross-platform compatibility, and deployment via Docker or source code for private TTS applications.

metadata.name: QuickRecorder
metadata.description: A lightweight screen recorder based on ScreenCapture Kit for macOS / 基于 ScreenCapture Kit 的轻量化多功能 macOS 录屏工具

summary.zh: QuickRecorder 是一款基于 macOS ScreenCapture Kit 的轻量级高性能录屏工具，支持屏幕、窗口、应用及移动设备录制，具备无驱动音频回环、鼠标高亮、屏幕放大镜等功能。兼容 macOS 12.3+，支持 HEVC 带 Alpha 通道录制及 presenter overlay 实时摄像头叠加（macOS 14），并可分离系统音与麦克风音轨以便后期编辑。
summary.en: QuickRecorder is a lightweight, high-performance screen recorder for macOS built on ScreenCapture Kit. It supports recording screens, windows, apps, and mobile devices with features like driver-free audio loopback, mouse highlighting, and screen magnifier. Compatible with macOS 12.3+, it enables HEVC with Alpha recording, real-time presenter overlay (macOS 14), and independent system/microphone audio track control for post-editing.

summary.zh: Auto.js 是一款基于无障碍服务的 Android 平台 JavaScript 自动化开发工具，支持控件级操作、屏幕截图、OCR 文字识别及本地 AI 模型推理（如 YOLOv8、PaddleOCR、ONNXRuntime）。本修改版重点优化了内存泄漏、Android 12 兼容性，并集成多引擎推理能力，适用于蚂蚁森林等自动化脚本场景。
summary.en: Auto.js is an Android-based JavaScript automation IDE leveraging accessibility services for UI control operations, screenshot analysis, OCR, and on-device AI inference (YOLOv8, PaddleOCR, ONNXRuntime). This modified version fixes memory leaks, enhances Android 12 support, and integrates multiple inference engines for stable automation in apps like Ant Forest.

metadata.name: FunClip
metadata.description: Open-source, accurate and easy-to-use video speech recognition & clipping tool, LLM based AI clipping intergrated.

summary.zh: FunClip 是一款开源、精准且易用的视频语音识别与剪辑工具，基于阿里云通义语音实验室的 FunASR 模型实现高精度语音转写，并支持通过 LLM 实现智能剪辑。用户可自由选择文本片段或指定说话人进行视频裁剪，集成 Paraformer、CAM++ 等工业级模型，支持中英文识别、热词增强与多段剪辑，提供 Gradio 交互界面，适合本地部署与服务器访问。
summary.en: FunClip is an open-source, accurate, and user-friendly video speech recognition and clipping tool powered by Alibaba's FunASR models. It enables precise ASR with timestamp prediction, supports LLM-based intelligent clipping via Qwen/GPT, allows speaker-specific trimming using CAM++, and offers hotword customization. With Gradio interface, it supports multi-segment clipping, SRT subtitle export, and local/server deployment for both Chinese and English content.

metadata.name: chinese-independent-developer
metadata.description: 👩🏿‍💻👨🏾‍💻👩🏼‍💻👨🏽‍💻👩🏻‍💻中国独立开发者项目列表 -- 分享大家都在做什么

summary.zh: 该仓库收录中国独立开发者创建的网站和App项目，涵盖AI工具、浏览器扩展、语言学习、招聘聚合等实用产品。项目按状态分类，支持开发者提交PR或Issue加入，旨在促进独立开发者之间的交流与灵感共享。
summary.en: This repository curates a list of websites and apps created by Chinese indie developers, featuring AI-powered tools, browser extensions, language utilities, and job aggregators. Projects are categorized by status, and developers are encouraged to submit via PR or Issue to foster community sharing and inspiration.

metadata.name: firecrawl
metadata.description: 🔥 The API to search, scrape, and interact with the web for AI

summary.zh: Firecrawl 是一款专为 AI 设计的网页数据提取 API，能够将任意网站内容转换为 LLM 友好的 Markdown 或结构化 JSON 格式。支持 JavaScript 渲染、动态内容抓取、媒体解析、批量处理及行为模拟（点击/滚动），具备高可靠性与自定义配置能力，适用于 AI 代理、知识库构建等场景。
summary.en: Firecrawl is an AI-focused web data API that converts any website into LLM-ready markdown or structured JSON. It handles JavaScript rendering, dynamic content, media parsing (PDFs, DOCX, images), batch processing, and user actions like clicks and scrolls, offering high reliability and customization for AI agents and knowledge systems.

metadata.name: Awesome-AI-GPTs
metadata.description: Awesome AI GPTs, OpenAI GPTs, GPT-4, ChatGPT, GPTs, Prompts, plugins, Prompts leaking

summary.zh: 本项目是 OpenAI GPTs 的开源资源聚合目录，涵盖热门 GPTs 推荐、提示词工程工具、自定义插件安装指南、Prompt 攻防技术及知识库构建方法。提供从使用到开发的全链路支持，助力用户高效探索和定制 AI 应用。
summary.en: This repo aggregates OpenAI GPTs resources, including trending GPTs, prompt engineering tools, custom plugin guides, prompt security techniques, and knowledge base automation. It offers end-to-end support for exploring and building AI applications.

metadata.name: wxauto
metadata.description: Windows版本微信客户端（非网页版）自动化，可实现简单的发送、接收微信消息，简单微信机器人

summary.zh: wxauto 是一个基于 Windows 微信客户端的自动化工具，支持发送与接收消息，可用于构建简易微信机器人。项目依赖 UIAutomation 技术，兼容微信 3.9.X 及 Windows 10/11 系统，Python 3.9+ 环境运行。注意：该项目已于2025年10月停止维护，仅限学习交流使用。
summary.en: wxauto is a Windows-based automation tool for the native WeChat desktop client, enabling message sending and receiving to build simple WeChat bots. It leverages UIAutomation, supports WeChat 3.9.X and Windows 10/11, and runs on Python 3.9+. Note: The project was discontinued on October 28, 2025, and is for educational use only.

metadata.name: MediaCrawler
metadata.description: 小红书笔记 | 评论爬虫、抖音视频 | 评论爬虫、快手视频 | 评论爬虫、B 站视频 ｜ 评论爬虫、微博帖子 ｜ 评论爬虫、百度贴吧帖子 ｜ 百度贴吧评论回复爬虫  | 知乎问答文章｜评论爬虫

summary.zh: MediaCrawler 是一款基于 Playwright 的多平台自媒体数据采集工具，支持小红书、抖音、快手、B站、微博、贴吧、知乎等主流平台的公开内容爬取，涵盖笔记、视频、评论及二级回复。通过浏览器登录态缓存与 JS 表达式获取签名，无需复杂逆向，大幅降低技术门槛，适用于内容分析与舆情研究。
summary.en: MediaCrawler is a multi-platform content scraping tool powered by Playwright, supporting data collection from major Chinese social platforms like Xiaohongshu, Douyin, Kuaishou, Bilibili, Weibo, Tieba, and Zhihu. It enables scraping of posts, videos, comments, and replies using browser session persistence and JS-based signature extraction, eliminating the need for complex reverse engineering.

metadata.name: aiwechat-vercel
metadata.description: 使用vercel的functions，将ai功能加入微信公众号

summary.zh: 该项目基于 Vercel Functions 实现微信公众号 AI 功能集成，支持 GPT、星火、通义千问、Gemini 等多模型接入，提供连续对话、指令控制、关键词回复、图床等功能。无需服务器，仅需绑定域名即可低成本部署，适合个人开发者快速搭建智能公众号助手。
summary.en: This project integrates AI capabilities into WeChat Official Accounts using Vercel Functions, supporting multiple models like GPT, Spark, Qwen, and Gemini. It enables continuous dialogue, command control, keyword replies, and image hosting. With no server required and low cost, it's ideal for developers to build smart WeChat bots quickly.

metadata.name: screenshot-to-code
metadata.description: Drop in a screenshot and convert it to clean code (HTML/Tailwind/React/Vue)

summary.zh: screenshot-to-code 是一款基于 AI 的工具，可将截图、设计稿或 Figma 文件快速转换为高质量的 HTML、Tailwind、React、Vue 等前端代码。支持 Gemini、Claude Opus、GPT 等主流模型，并提供视频原型生成实验功能，大幅提升开发效率。
summary.en: screenshot-to-code is an AI-powered tool that converts screenshots, mockups, or Figma designs into clean, functional frontend code (HTML/Tailwind/React/Vue). It supports top models like Gemini, Claude Opus, and GPT, with experimental video-to-prototype capabilities for rapid development.

metadata.name: kirara-ai
metadata.description: 🤖 可 DIY 的 多模态 AI 聊天机器人 | 🚀 快速接入 微信、 QQ、Telegram、等聊天平台 | 🦈支持DeepSeek、Grok、Claude、Ollama、Gemini、OpenAI | 工作流系统、网页搜索、AI画图、人设调教、虚拟女仆、语音对话 |

summary.zh: Kirara AI 是一款高度可定制的多模态聊天机器人框架，支持接入微信、QQ、Telegram 等主流平台，兼容 DeepSeek、Claude、Gemini、Ollama 等主流大模型。提供工作流系统、网页搜索、AI 绘画、语音对话及人设调教功能，适用于虚拟助手、角色扮演和智能客服等场景。
summary.en: Kirara AI is a highly customizable multimodal chatbot framework supporting major platforms like WeChat, QQ, and Telegram. It integrates with leading LLMs including DeepSeek, Claude, Gemini, and Ollama, offering workflow automation, web search, AI image generation, voice interaction, and persona customization for virtual assistants and roleplay applications.

metadata.name: sigma-file-manager
metadata.description: "Sigma File Manager" is a free, open-source, quickly evolving, modern file manager (explorer / browser) app for Windows and Linux.

summary.zh: Sigma File Manager 是一款免费开源的现代文件管理器，支持 Windows 和 Linux 系统，具备快速演进、界面现代化、功能丰富等特点。当前 v2 版本已进入 Beta 阶段，提供类资源管理器的浏览体验，适合追求高效与美观的用户。
summary.en: Sigma File Manager is a free, open-source, modern file explorer for Windows and Linux, currently in beta (v2). It offers a fast-evolving, user-friendly interface with advanced features, designed for efficiency and aesthetics in file management.

metadata.name: XHS-Downloader
metadata.description: 小红书（XiaoHongShu、RedNote）链接提取/作品采集工具：提取账号发布、收藏、点赞、专辑作品链接；提取搜索结果作品、用户链接；采集小红书作品信息；提取小红书作品下载地址；下载小红书作品文件

summary.zh: XHS-Downloader 是一款专为小红书（XiaoHongShu/RedNote）设计的链接提取与作品采集工具，支持提取账号发布、收藏、点赞、专辑及搜索结果中的作品和用户链接，并能采集作品信息、提取下载地址并批量下载文件（含 livePhoto），支持断点续传、剪贴板监听、API/MCP 调用及 Docker 部署。
summary.en: XHS-Downloader is a dedicated tool for extracting links and collecting content from Xiaohongshu (RedNote). It supports extracting posts, collections, likes, albums, and search results, while also downloading media files (including livePhotos), with features like resumeable downloads, clipboard monitoring, API/MCP support, and Docker deployment.

metadata.name: Awesome-Love-Code
metadata.description: 表白代码收藏馆~谁说程序猿不懂浪漫❤️

summary.zh: 这是一个专为程序员设计的浪漫表白代码集合，包含多个基于Web技术的创意表白页面，涵盖动画、交互效果和视觉设计，旨在帮助开发者用代码表达爱意，兼具趣味性与实用性。
summary.en: A curated collection of romantic confession code snippets designed for developers, featuring creative web-based表白 pages with animations and interactive effects, enabling programmers to express love through code in a fun and practical way.

metadata.name: GPTs
metadata.description: leaked prompts of GPTs

summary.zh: 该仓库收集了多个泄露的 GPTs 提示词，涵盖开发、翻译、编程辅助、内容生成、角色扮演等多个应用场景，来源包括社交媒体、用户提交及逆向分析，为研究提示工程与 GPT 定制化提供了丰富样本。
summary.en: This repository aggregates leaked prompts from various GPTs, spanning development, translation, coding assistance, content creation, and role-playing. Sourced from social media, user contributions, and reverse engineering, it offers valuable insights into prompt engineering and GPT customization.

metadata.name: TikTokDownloader
metadata.description: TikTok 发布/喜欢/合辑/直播/视频/图集/音乐；抖音发布/喜欢/收藏/收藏夹/视频/图集/实况/直播/音乐/合集/评论/账号/搜索/热榜数据采集工具/下载工具

summary.zh: DouK-Downloader 是一款基于 Python 和 HTTPX 的开源工具，支持批量下载抖音与 TikTok 的视频、图集、直播、音乐及评论数据，涵盖账号发布/喜欢/收藏内容，提供无水印下载、直播拉流、数据持久化（CSV/XLSX/SQLite）、Web UI 与 API 接口，支持代理、增量下载与局域网部署。
summary.en: DouK-Downloader is an open-source tool built with Python and HTTPX that enables batch downloading of videos, photo albums, live streams, music, and comments from Douyin and TikTok. It supports watermark-free downloads, live stream extraction, data persistence in multiple formats, Web UI, API access, proxies, incremental updates, and LAN deployment.

metadata.name: aimoneyhunter
metadata.description: ai副业赚钱大集合，教你如何利用ai做一些副业项目，赚取更多额外收益。The Ultimate Guide to Making Money with AI Side Hustles: Learn how to leverage AI for some cool side gigs and rake in some extra cash. Check out the English version for more insights.

summary.zh: 本仓库原为AI副业赚钱方法聚合项目，旨在整理全网AI副业技巧，涵盖AI生成内容、流量变现、工具分销等方向。内容涉及AI绘画、文案、视频、直播等多个变现场景，并提供实操建议。因运营中断已废弃，但曾通过SEO与社交传播实现高流量，具备一定参考价值。
summary.en: This repository was originally a curated collection of AI side hustle methods, aggregating techniques for monetizing AI-generated content across domains like image creation, copywriting, video production, and live streaming. It offered practical guides on traffic acquisition and product distribution, gaining significant traction via SEO and social sharing before being discontinued due to operational challenges.

metadata.name: lanproxy
metadata.description: lanproxy是一个将局域网个人电脑、服务器代理到公网的内网穿透工具，支持tcp流量转发，可支持任何tcp上层协议（访问内网网站、本地支付接口调试、ssh访问、远程桌面、http代理、https代理、socks5代理...）。技术交流QQ群 736294209

summary.zh: lanproxy 是一款开源的内网穿透工具，支持将本地 TCP 服务暴露至公网，适用于 SSH、远程桌面、本地调试等场景。基于 Java 实现，提供 Web 管理界面，支持多客户端、SSL 加密及自定义域名绑定，兼顾性能与易用性，是替代花生壳等商业方案的轻量级选择。
summary.en: lanproxy is an open-source intranet penetration tool that exposes local TCP services to the public internet, ideal for SSH, remote desktop, and local API debugging. Built in Java with a web-based management panel, it supports multiple clients, SSL encryption, and custom domain binding, offering a lightweight alternative to commercial solutions like花生壳.

summary.zh: 该项目旨在帮助用户掌控个人微信聊天记录数据，强调‘我的数据我做主’理念，支持将对话内容转化为有意义的个人记忆与AI训练素材。虽已暂停更新，但启发了后续AI相册项目《行影集》，致力于构建个人AI数据中心，实现生活痕迹的智能化留存与情感延续。
summary.en: This project empowers users to take control of their WeChat chat data, transforming conversations into meaningful personal memories and AI training material. Though development has paused, it inspired the TrailSnap AI photo album project, aiming to build personal AI data centers for intelligent life trace preservation and emotional continuity.

metadata.name: robotframework
metadata.description: Generic automation framework for acceptance testing and RPA

summary.zh: Robot Framework 是一个基于 Python 的通用开源自动化框架，专为验收测试、ATDD 和 RPA 设计。其采用简洁的文本语法，支持通过通用或自定义库轻松扩展，具备跨平台特性，并拥有围绕其构建的丰富生态系统。
summary.en: Robot Framework is a generic open-source automation framework built in Python, designed for acceptance testing, ATDD, and RPA. It features simple plain-text syntax, easy extensibility via libraries, cross-platform compatibility, and a rich ecosystem of tools and integrations.

metadata.name: RPA-Python
metadata.description: Python package for doing RPA

summary.zh: RPA for Python 是一个轻量级自动化库，支持网页、桌面应用及命令行任务的机器人流程自动化（RPA）。提供简洁 API，支持视觉自动化与 OCR 功能，兼容 Windows、macOS、Linux 及树莓派，适用于数据抓取、表单填写等重复性工作。
summary.en: RPA for Python is a lightweight library enabling robotic process automation (RPA) for web, desktop, and command-line tasks. It offers a simple API with visual automation and OCR support, compatible across Windows, macOS, Linux, and Raspberry Pi, ideal for repetitive tasks like data entry and scraping.

metadata.name: EasySpider
metadata.description: A visual no-code/code-free web crawler/spider易采集：一个可视化浏览器自动化测试/数据采集/爬虫软件，可以无代码图形化的设计和执行爬虫任务。别名：ServiceWrapper面向Web应用的智能化服务封装系统。

summary.zh: EasySpider 是一款完全免费的可视化无代码网络爬虫工具，支持通过图形界面设计并执行数据采集任务，无需编程基础。用户可在网页上直接选择目标内容，按提示操作即可完成爬虫流程，同时支持命令行运行，便于集成到其他系统。适用于浏览器自动化测试与数据抓取场景。
summary.en: EasySpider is a completely free, visual, no-code web crawler that enables users to design and execute data collection tasks via a graphical interface without programming. It allows direct selection of web content with guided prompts, supports command-line execution for system integration, and is ideal for browser automation and web scraping.

metadata.name: LxgwWenKai
metadata.description: An unprofessional open-source Chinese font derived from Fontworks' Klee One. 一款非专业的开源中文字体，基于 FONTWORKS 出品字体 Klee One 衍生。

summary.zh: 霞鹜文楷是一款基于 FONTWORKS 的 Klee One 衍生的开源中文字体，采用 OFL 1.1 协议发布。项目提供多个变体版本，包括屏幕阅读版、轻便版、GB 规范版及繁体旧字形版，适配不同场景需求。同时警告用户警惕电商平台非法倒卖行为，并明确不再提供 Magisk 模块支持。
summary.en: LXGW WenKai is an open-source Chinese font derived from Fontworks' Klee One, released under the OFL 1.1 license. It offers multiple variants such as Screen, Lite, GB-compliant, and Traditional Chinese editions for diverse use cases. The project warns against unauthorized resale on e-commerce platforms and discontinues Magisk module support.

metadata.name: Awesome-Marp
metadata.description: 🤙 Easy replacement for LaTeX Beamer! 🥂 custom Marp templates with a selection of over a dozen themes

summary.zh: Awesome Marp 是一个基于 Marp 的 Markdown 演示文稿主题库，提供 6 种主题色和 38 种自定义样式，支持多栏布局、封面页、目录页、进度条、Callouts 等丰富功能，可轻松替代 LaTeX Beamer，适用于 VS Code 和 Obsidian。
summary.en: Awesome Marp is a customizable theme library for Marp, offering 6 color themes and 38 custom styles including multi-column layouts, cover pages, progress bars, and callouts. It serves as a lightweight alternative to LaTeX Beamer, compatible with VS Code and Obsidian.

metadata.name: public-apis
metadata.description: A collective list of free APIs

summary.zh: 该仓库是一个由社区维护的免费公共API集合，涵盖天气、金融、地理、通信等多个领域，为开发者提供便捷、可靠的API资源索引。支持分类检索，并集成Postman一键调用，极大提升开发效率。
summary.en: This repository is a community-curated collection of free public APIs across domains like weather, finance, geolocation, and communication. It offers categorized browsing and one-click Postman integration, enabling developers to quickly discover and test APIs for their projects.

metadata.name: How-To-Ask-Questions-The-Smart-Way
metadata.description: 本文原文由知名 Hacker Eric S. Raymond 所撰寫，教你如何正確的提出技術問題並獲得你滿意的答案。

summary.zh: 《提问的智慧》是 Eric S. Raymond 撰写的经典技术指南，指导开发者如何高效、清晰地提出技术问题，以获得社区有效回应。本仓库为中文翻译版本，涵盖提问前准备、提问技巧、沟通礼仪及常见误区，适用于开源社区、论坛和邮件列表等场景，提升技术交流效率。
summary.en: How To Ask Questions The Smart Way is a classic guide by Eric S. Raymond on how to effectively ask technical questions to get useful answers. This repo hosts the Chinese translation, covering preparation, clear communication, proper forum selection, and common pitfalls, helping developers engage constructively in open-source communities and technical forums.

metadata.name: 1Remote
metadata.description: One Remote Access Manager to Rule Them All

summary.zh: 1Remote 是一款现代化的个人远程会话管理工具，支持 RDP、SSH、VNC、Telnet、(S)FTP 等多种协议，提供统一入口管理所有远程连接。具备快速启动器（Alt+M）、多屏与 HiDPI 支持、自定义标签与脚本、多语言主题及便携运行等特性，并可从 mRemoteNG 导入配置，提升运维效率。
summary.en: 1Remote is a modern personal remote session manager supporting multiple protocols like RDP, SSH, VNC, Telnet, and (S)FTP. It offers a unified interface with quick launcher (Alt+M), multi-monitor & HiDPI support, customizable tags/scripts, multi-language themes, portable execution, and import from mRemoteNG, streamlining remote access management.

metadata.name: chatgpt-wework-robot
metadata.description: 零代码、一键部署chatgpt到企业微信，无须VPN，速度快

summary.zh: 该项目实现ChatGPT与企业微信的无缝集成，支持零代码一键部署，无需VPN即可快速接入。用户可在企业微信中直接使用ChatGPT智能问答，适用于客服、内部协作等场景，提升效率并降低成本。
summary.en: This project enables seamless integration of ChatGPT with WeCom (Enterprise WeChat), supporting zero-code one-click deployment without requiring a VPN. Users can directly access ChatGPT's intelligent Q&A within WeCom, ideal for customer service and internal collaboration to improve efficiency and reduce costs.

metadata.name: chatgpt-dingtalk-robot
metadata.description: 零代码、一键部署chatgpt到钉钉，无须VPN

summary.zh: 该项目实现零代码一键将ChatGPT部署至钉钉平台，无需VPN即可使用。通过Vercel快速部署，集成钉钉机器人功能，支持个人或群聊场景下的智能问答。适用于企业客服、内部助手等场景，并可基于开源代码进行二次开发扩展。
summary.en: This project enables zero-code, one-click deployment of ChatGPT to DingTalk without requiring a VPN. Using Vercel for rapid setup, it integrates with DingTalk bots to support intelligent Q&A in both private and group chats. Ideal for enterprise customer service and internal assistants, with extensibility for custom development.

metadata.name: LangGPT
metadata.description: LangGPT: Empowering everyone to become a prompt expert! 🚀  📌 结构化提示词（Structured Prompt）提出者 📌 元提示词（Meta-Prompt）发起者   📌 最流行的提示词落地范式 | Language of GPT  The pioneering framework for structured & meta-prompt design 10,000+ ⭐ | Battle-tested by thousands of users worldwide  Created by 云中江树

summary.zh: LangGPT 是一个结构化提示词设计框架，旨在让任何人都能轻松创建高质量的大模型提示词。它借鉴编程语言思想，提供可复用、模块化的模板体系，支持角色定义、目标设定、技能配置与工作流程编排，显著提升提示工程效率与一致性。
summary.en: LangGPT is a structured, reusable prompt design framework that empowers users to create high-quality prompts for large language models. Inspired by programming paradigms, it offers modular templates with roles, goals, skills, and workflows, enabling systematic and scalable prompt engineering.

metadata.name: autocut
metadata.description: 用文本编辑器剪视频

summary.zh: AutoCut 是一款基于语音识别的视频剪辑工具，通过自动生成字幕并允许用户编辑文本文件来选择保留内容，实现无需专业软件的视频裁剪。支持 Whisper 系列模型（含 large-v3-turbo）、faster-whisper 及 OpenAI API，提供 pip 安装、Docker 部署及 Python 导入调用，适用于录屏剪辑、访谈整理等场景。
summary.en: AutoCut is a video editing tool that uses speech-to-text to generate subtitles, allowing users to cut videos by editing text files instead of using professional software. It supports Whisper models (including large-v3-turbo), faster-whisper, and OpenAI API, with pip installation, Docker deployment, and Python import functionality, ideal for screen recording and interview editing.

metadata.name: roop
metadata.description: one-click face swap

summary.zh: Roop 是一款一键式人脸替换工具，仅需一张目标人脸图像即可将视频中的人脸替换，无需数据集或训练。支持视频处理、多帧优化与硬件加速，适用于创意内容生成，但项目已停止维护。
summary.en: Roop is a one-click face-swapping tool that replaces faces in videos using just a single reference image, requiring no dataset or training. It supports video processing, multi-face handling, and hardware acceleration, ideal for creative media, though development has been discontinued.

metadata.name: GPT-Prompts
metadata.description: Useful GPT Prompts

summary.zh: 该仓库收集实用的GPT提示词，首个工具为Midjourney提示词生成器，帮助用户快速生成高质量AI绘画指令，提升创作效率。
summary.en: This repository curates useful GPT prompts, starting with a Midjourney Prompt Generator to help users create high-quality AI art instructions efficiently.

metadata.name: readme-ai
metadata.description: README file generator, powered by AI.

summary.zh: readme-ai 是一款基于 AI 的 README 文件自动生成工具，支持通过命令行快速为代码仓库生成结构清晰、内容详实的文档。它兼容多种主流大语言模型（如 OpenAI、Ollama、Anthropic、Gemini），提供丰富的模板与样式自定义选项，并支持离线模式与智能文件过滤，显著提升开发者文档编写效率。
summary.en: readme-ai is an AI-powered tool that automatically generates well-structured README files from code repositories via CLI. It supports multiple LLMs (OpenAI, Ollama, Anthropic, Gemini), offers customizable templates and styles, includes offline mode, and features intelligent file filtering to streamline developer documentation workflows.

metadata.name: awesome-chatgpt-api
metadata.description: Curated list of apps and tools that not only use the new ChatGPT API, but also allow users to configure their own API keys, enabling free and on-demand usage of their own quota.

summary.zh: 该项目是一个精选的 ChatGPT API 应用与工具列表，重点收录支持用户配置自有 API 密钥的应用，实现免费、按需使用个人配额。涵盖浏览器插件、Web/桌面/移动应用、CLI 工具及开发资源，助力用户高效利用 ChatGPT API 能力。
summary.en: A curated list of apps and tools that support user-configured ChatGPT API keys, enabling free, on-demand usage within personal quotas. Includes browser extensions, web/desktop/mobile apps, CLI tools, and developer resources for building with the ChatGPT API.

metadata.name: apicat
metadata.description: An efficient API documentation management tool that fully adheres to the OpenAPI specification and incorporates advanced LLM technology. This tool can automate the generation of API documentation, data models, and test cases, greatly enhancing development efficiency and documentation quality.

summary.zh: ApiCat 是一款完全兼容 OpenAPI 规范的高效 API 文档管理工具，集成先进的大语言模型（LLM）技术，可自动生成 API 文档、数据模型及测试用例，显著提升开发效率与文档质量，支持云端使用与本地 Docker 部署。
summary.en: ApiCat is an efficient API documentation management tool fully compatible with the OpenAPI specification, integrating advanced LLM technology to automate the generation of API docs, data models, and test cases, boosting development efficiency and documentation quality with cloud and Docker deployment options.

metadata.name: postcat
metadata.description: Postcat 是一个可扩展的 API 工具平台。集合基础的 API 管理和测试功能，并且可以通过插件简化你的 API 开发工作，让你可以更快更好地创建 API。An extensible API tool.

summary.zh: Postcat 是一个开源、跨平台、可扩展的 API 开发测试工具，支持 REST 和 WebSocket 协议，具备 API 管理、测试、Mock、文档生成及团队协作功能。其核心亮点是强大的插件系统，允许用户通过扩展增强功能。项目目前暂停维护，但仍可作为轻量级 API 工具使用。
summary.en: Postcat is an open-source, cross-platform, extensible API development and testing tool supporting REST and WebSocket protocols. It offers API management, testing, mocking, documentation, and team collaboration, with a powerful plugin system for customization. The project is currently in maintenance pause but remains usable as a lightweight API tool.

metadata.name: Chinese-LangChain
metadata.description: 中文langchain项目|小必应，Q.Talk，强聊，QiangTalk

summary.zh: Chinese-LangChain 是一个基于 ChatGLM-6B 和 LangChain 的中文本地知识库问答系统，支持多文档解析、FAISS 向量检索、知识增量更新及 Web 搜索，提供 Gradio 界面，适用于构建垂直领域智能助手。
summary.en: Chinese-LangChain is a localized Chinese knowledge base QA system built on ChatGLM-6B and LangChain, supporting multi-format document parsing, FAISS vector retrieval, incremental knowledge updates, and web search, with a Gradio-based UI for domain-specific AI assistants.

metadata.name: DB-GPT
metadata.description: open-source agentic AI data assistant for the next generation of AI + Data products.

summary.zh: DB-GPT 是一个开源的 AI 原生数据应用开发框架，基于 AWEL（智能体工作流表达语言）和多智能体系统，支持多模型管理、Text2SQL 优化、RAG 框架增强及智能体协作，旨在降低大模型与数据库结合的应用开发门槛，助力企业快速构建低代码数据驱动型 AI 应用。
summary.en: DB-GPT is an open-source AI-native data application development framework powered by AWEL (Agentic Workflow Expression Language) and multi-agent systems. It enables low-code development of data-driven AI apps through capabilities like multi-model management, Text2SQL optimization, enhanced RAG, and agent orchestration.

metadata.name: ChatGPT-Prompt-Engineering-for-Developers-in-Chinese
metadata.description: 《面向开发者的 ChatGPT 提示词工程》非官方版中英双语字幕 Unofficial subtitles of "ChatGPT Prompt Engineering for Developers"

summary.zh: 该项目提供吴恩达与OpenAI专家联合推出的《ChatGPT提示词工程》课程的非官方中英双语字幕，涵盖提示词最佳实践、文本处理、情感分析、邮件撰写等9大核心内容，帮助开发者掌握高效使用ChatGPT的技能，并配套可运行Notebook与B站视频。
summary.en: This project offers unofficial bilingual (Chinese-English) subtitles for the 'ChatGPT Prompt Engineering for Developers' course by Andrew Ng and OpenAI's Iza Fulford. It covers prompt best practices, text summarization, sentiment analysis, email writing, and more, with synchronized Bilibili videos and executable notebooks for hands-on learning.

metadata.name: understand-prompt
metadata.description: 【🔞🔞🔞 内含不适合未成年人阅读的图片】基于我擅长的编程、绘画、写作展开的 AI 探索和总结：StableDiffusion 是一种强大的图像生成模型，能够通过对一张图片进行演化来生成新的图片。ChatGPT 是一个基于 Transformer 的语言生成模型，它能够自动为输入的主题生成合适的文章。而 Github Copilot 是一个智能编程助手，能够加速日常编程活动。

summary.zh: 本项目探讨AI在编程、绘画与写作三大领域的应用实践，涵盖StableDiffusion图像生成、ChatGPT文本创作及GitHub Copilot代码辅助，并深入解析Prompt工程的核心方法，提出“Prompt编程”概念，实现从自然语言需求到代码生成的无缝转换，推动低代码向无代码演进。
summary.en: This project explores AI applications in programming, art, and writing, covering StableDiffusion for image generation, ChatGPT for text creation, and GitHub Copilot for coding assistance. It delves into prompt engineering, introducing 'prompt programming' to transform natural language into code, advancing low-code toward true no-code development.

metadata.name: cypress
metadata.description: Fast, easy and reliable testing for anything that runs in a browser.

summary.zh: Cypress 是一个专为现代 Web 应用设计的端到端测试框架，支持在浏览器中快速、可靠地运行测试。它提供实时重载、时间旅行调试和直观的 API，适用于 JavaScript 和 TypeScript 项目，显著提升前端测试效率与开发者体验。
summary.en: Cypress is a modern end-to-end testing framework designed for web applications, enabling fast, reliable browser-based testing. It features live reloading, time-travel debugging, and a developer-friendly API, supporting JavaScript and TypeScript to enhance frontend testing efficiency and developer experience.

metadata.name: StableStudio
metadata.description: Community interface for generative AI

summary.zh: StableStudio 是 Stability AI 推出的开源版 DreamStudio，提供基于 Web 的生成式 AI 图像创建与编辑界面。采用插件化架构，支持自定义后端集成，便于社区扩展和二次开发。
summary.en: StableStudio is Stability AI's open-source version of DreamStudio, offering a web-based interface for creating and editing AI-generated images. It features a plugin system for custom backends, enabling community-driven extensibility and customization.

metadata.name: feishu-openai
metadata.description: 🎒 飞书  ×（GPT-4 + GPT-4V + DALL·E-3 + Whisper）=  飞一般的工作体验  🚀 语音对话、角色扮演、多话题讨论、图片创作、表格分析、文档导出 🚀

summary.zh: 该项目将飞书与 OpenAI 的 GPT-4、DALL·E-3、Whisper 和 GPT-4V 等模型深度集成，实现语音对话、图片推理、文本生成图像、多话题讨论、表格分析及文档导出等功能，支持多种部署方式，为企业提供高效智能的办公助手解决方案。
summary.en: This project integrates Feishu with OpenAI's GPT-4, DALL·E-3, Whisper, and GPT-4V models to enable voice chat, image reasoning, text-to-image generation, multi-topic discussions, table analysis, and document export. It supports multiple deployment methods and serves as an intelligent office assistant for enterprises.

metadata.name: ChatGPT_Project
metadata.description: ChatGPT&AIGC资料汇总，包含前沿资讯、应用案例、技术教程、开源项目和商业变现等

summary.zh: 该项目是ChatGPT与AIGC领域的综合性资料库，涵盖注册教程、Plus升级指南、前沿资讯、行业研报、技术解析及商业应用案例，整合多家券商与机构深度报告，助力用户全面掌握AI生成内容技术趋势与落地路径。
summary.en: This repository aggregates comprehensive resources on ChatGPT and AIGC, including registration guides, Plus upgrade tutorials, cutting-edge news, technical tutorials, open-source projects, and commercial applications, with in-depth research reports from multiple financial institutions for a holistic view of AI-generated content trends.

metadata.name: AChat
metadata.description: 🌊 AChat - An open-source/self-hosted/local-first AI platform, designed for enterprises and teams, perfectly combining powerful local processing capabilities with seamless remote synchronization.

summary.zh: AChat 是一个开源、自托管、本地优先的 AI 平台，专为企业与团队设计，融合强大的本地处理能力与无缝远程同步功能，支持用户管理、付费方案配置及内容安全过滤，提供一站式 AI 协作解决方案。
summary.en: AChat is an open-source, self-hosted, local-first AI platform tailored for enterprises and teams, combining robust local processing with seamless remote sync, featuring user management, payment integration, and content filtering for secure AI collaboration.

metadata.name: chatgpt-on-wechat
metadata.description: CowAgent是基于大模型的超级AI助理，能主动思考和任务规划、访问操作系统和外部资源、创造和执行Skills、拥有长期记忆并不断成长，比OpenClaw更轻量和便捷。同时支持微信、飞书、钉钉、企微、QQ、公众号、网页等接入，可选择OpenAI/Claude/Gemini/DeepSeek/ Qwen/GLM/Kimi/LinkAI，能处理文本、语音、图片和文件，可快速搭建个人AI助理和企业数字员工。

summary.zh: CowAgent 是一款基于大模型的超级AI助理，支持主动任务规划、长期记忆、技能扩展与多模态交互，可接入微信、飞书、钉钉等平台，兼容 OpenAI、Claude、Gemini、DeepSeek 等主流模型，适用于个人助手与企业数字员工场景。
summary.en: CowAgent is a super AI assistant powered by large language models, capable of autonomous task planning, long-term memory, skill creation, and multimodal interaction. It integrates with WeChat, Feishu, DingTalk, and supports major LLMs like OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, and DeepSeek for personal and enterprise use.

metadata.name: chatbox
metadata.description: Powerful AI Client

summary.zh: Chatbox 是一款开源的桌面 AI 客户端，支持 ChatGPT、Claude 等主流大语言模型，跨平台支持 Windows、macOS 和 Linux。提供简洁的界面与高效交互，适用于日常 AI 对话、代码辅助与知识查询，社区版基于 GPLv3 协议开源。
summary.en: Chatbox is an open-source desktop AI client supporting major LLMs like ChatGPT and Claude, available on Windows, macOS, and Linux. It offers a clean interface for efficient AI conversations, coding assistance, and knowledge queries, with the community edition released under GPLv3.

metadata.name: Huatuo-Llama-Med-Chinese
metadata.description: Repo for BenTsao [original name: HuaTuo (华驼)], Instruction-tuning Large Language Models with Chinese Medical Knowledge. 本草（原名：华驼）模型仓库，基于中文医学知识的大语言模型指令微调

summary.zh: 本草（原华驼）是基于中文医学知识对LLaMA、Bloom、Alpaca等主流大模型进行LoRA指令微调的医学领域开源模型库，利用医学知识图谱与文献构建高质量指令数据集，显著提升模型在中文医疗问答中的准确性与可靠性。
summary.en: BenTsao (formerly HuaTuo) is an open-source medical LLM repository that applies LoRA-based instruction tuning on models like LLaMA, Bloom, and Alpaca using Chinese medical knowledge graphs and literature, enhancing accuracy and reliability in Chinese healthcare QA tasks.

metadata.name: LangChain-ChatGLM-Webui
metadata.description: 基于LangChain和ChatGLM-6B等系列LLM的针对本地知识库的自动问答

summary.zh: 该项目基于LangChain与ChatGLM-6B等大模型，构建支持本地知识库的自动问答系统，提供Web UI界面。支持上传txt、docx、md、pdf等格式文件，集成多种Embedding模型（如text2vec、ERNIE），实现私有化部署与高效检索增强生成（RAG），适用于企业知识管理、智能客服等场景。
summary.en: This project builds an automated Q&A system using LangChain and ChatGLM-6B series LLMs with a Web UI, supporting local knowledge bases. It allows uploading txt, docx, md, pdf files and integrates multiple embedding models (e.g., text2vec, ERNIE) for private deployment and RAG-based retrieval, ideal for enterprise knowledge management and intelligent customer service.

metadata.name: langchain
metadata.description: The agent engineering platform

summary.zh: LangChain 是一个用于构建可靠 AI 代理和 LLM 应用的框架，提供标准化接口连接模型、向量存储与外部系统，支持实时数据增强、模型互操作、快速原型开发和生产级部署，简化 AI 应用开发流程。
summary.en: LangChain is a framework for building reliable AI agents and LLM-powered applications. It offers a standardized interface to integrate models, vector stores, and external systems, enabling real-time data augmentation, model interoperability, rapid prototyping, and production-ready deployment.

metadata.name: Langchain-Chatchat
metadata.description: Langchain-Chatchat（原Langchain-ChatGLM）基于 Langchain 与 ChatGLM, Qwen 与 Llama 等语言模型的 RAG 与 Agent 应用 | Langchain-Chatchat (formerly langchain-ChatGLM), local knowledge based LLM (like ChatGLM, Qwen and Llama) RAG and Agent app with langchain

summary.zh: Langchain-Chatchat 是一个基于 Langchain 框架与 ChatGLM、Qwen、Llama 等开源大模型的本地知识库问答系统，支持 RAG（检索增强生成）与 Agent 功能。项目完全开源，可离线部署，兼容多种向量数据库与 Embedding 模型，适用于中文场景下的私有知识问答应用。
summary.en: Langchain-Chatchat is an open-source, offline-deployable RAG and Agent application built on Langchain and LLMs like ChatGLM, Qwen, and Llama. It enables local knowledge-based Q&A with support for multiple embedding models and vector databases, optimized for Chinese language scenarios.

metadata.name: LangChain-Chinese-Getting-Started-Guide
metadata.description: LangChain 的中文入门教程

summary.zh: 本仓库是 LangChain 的中文入门教程，涵盖 LLM 调用、Prompt 管理、文档加载、文本分割、向量数据库、Chains 与 Agents 等核心概念，提供从基础到实战的完整指南，帮助开发者快速上手构建大模型应用。
summary.en: This repository is a Chinese beginner's guide to LangChain, covering core concepts like LLM invocation, prompt management, document loading, text splitting, vector stores, Chains, and Agents, offering a complete tutorial from basics to hands-on practice for building LLM-powered applications.

metadata.name: surfboard
metadata.description: https://getsurfboard.com

summary.zh: Surfboard 是一个现代化的前端开发工具链，专注于提升 Web 应用构建效率与开发者体验。它提供零配置启动、快速热重载、智能代码分割等功能，支持 React、Vue 等主流框架，适用于快速原型开发与生产级项目部署。
summary.en: Surfboard is a modern frontend toolchain designed to enhance web app development efficiency and developer experience. It offers zero-config setup, fast hot reloading, intelligent code splitting, and supports popular frameworks like React and Vue, ideal for rapid prototyping and production deployments.

metadata.name: llm-cookbook
metadata.description: 面向开发者的 LLM 入门教程，吴恩达大模型系列课程中文版

summary.zh: 本项目是基于吴恩达大模型系列课程的中文实践手册，面向国内开发者提供从 Prompt 工程、RAG 开发到模型微调的完整 LLM 入门路径。内容涵盖 11 门课程，分为必修与选修，结合 LangChain、Gradio 等工具，提供中文 Prompt 优化与代码复现，助力开发者快速掌握大模型应用开发技能。
summary.en: This project is a Chinese practical guide based on Andrew Ng's LLM course series, offering developers a complete entry path from prompt engineering to RAG and model fine-tuning. It includes 11 courses (core & elective), with hands-on code, optimized Chinese prompts, and tools like LangChain and Gradio for building real-world LLM applications.

metadata.name: NextChat
metadata.description: ✨ Light and Fast AI Assistant. Support: Web | iOS | MacOS | Android |  Linux | Windows

summary.zh: NextChat 是一款轻量快速的 AI 助手，支持 Claude、DeepSeek、GPT-4 和 Gemini Pro 等多模型。提供跨平台支持（Web、iOS、macOS、Android、Linux、Windows），具备企业版私有化部署能力，支持品牌定制、权限控制、知识库集成与安全审计，适用于个人与企业场景。
summary.en: NextChat is a lightweight and fast AI assistant supporting multiple models like Claude, DeepSeek, GPT-4, and Gemini Pro. It offers cross-platform compatibility (Web, iOS, macOS, Android, Linux, Windows) and an enterprise edition with private deployment, brand customization, permission control, knowledge integration, and security auditing for both personal and corporate use.

metadata.name: ComfyUI
metadata.description: The most powerful and modular diffusion model GUI, api and backend with a graph/nodes interface.

summary.zh: ComfyUI 是一款功能强大且高度模块化的视觉 AI 引擎，采用节点式图形界面，支持用户无需编程即可设计复杂的扩散模型工作流。兼容多种主流图像模型（如 SDXL、SD3、Flux、HunyuanDiT 等），可在 Windows、Linux 和 macOS 上运行，并提供桌面应用与便携包安装方式。
summary.en: ComfyUI is a powerful and modular visual AI engine featuring a node-based graph interface for designing complex diffusion model workflows without coding. It supports major image models like SDXL, SD3, Flux, and HunyuanDiT, and runs on Windows, Linux, and macOS with desktop and portable installation options.

summary.zh: TaskMatrix 是一个连接 ChatGPT 与多种视觉基础模型的系统，支持在对话中发送和接收图像，实现图像理解、生成与编辑。通过模板机制协调多模型协作，无需额外训练即可完成复杂视觉任务，如无限外绘、目标检测与分割等，显著提升多模态交互能力。
summary.en: TaskMatrix integrates ChatGPT with various visual foundation models to enable image sending and receiving during conversations. It supports complex vision tasks like detection, segmentation, and inpainting through a template-based orchestration system, allowing seamless multi-model collaboration without additional training.

metadata.name: llama_index
metadata.description: LlamaIndex is the leading document agent and OCR platform

summary.zh: LlamaIndex 是一个领先的开源文档智能与 OCR 平台，专注于构建基于大语言模型的文档代理系统。它提供高效的数据索引、检索与问答能力，支持多模态文档解析和复杂查询，广泛应用于知识库、企业搜索和 AI 助手场景。
summary.en: LlamaIndex is a leading open-source document intelligence and OCR platform designed to build LLM-powered document agents. It enables efficient data indexing, retrieval, and question-answering with support for multimodal document parsing and complex queries, widely used in knowledge bases, enterprise search, and AI assistants.

metadata.name: chatgpt-dingtalk
metadata.description: 🎒 钉钉 & 🤖 GPT-3.5 让你的工作效率直接起飞 🚀 私聊群聊方式、单聊串聊模式、角色扮演、图片创作 🚀

summary.zh: 该项目基于 Go 语言开发，将 ChatGPT（支持 GPT-3.5、GPT-4 及 Azure OpenAI）集成至钉钉平台，实现私聊、群聊、角色扮演、图片生成等功能，提升办公效率。支持 Docker 与二进制部署，配置灵活，适用于企业内部智能助手场景。
summary.en: A Go-based project integrating ChatGPT (GPT-3.5, GPT-4, Azure OpenAI) with DingTalk, enabling private/group chats, role-playing, image generation, and more to boost workplace productivity. Supports Docker and binary deployment with flexible configuration for enterprise AI assistants.

metadata.name: awesome-chatgpt-prompts-zh
metadata.description: ChatGPT 中文调教指南。各种场景使用指南。学习怎么让它听你的话。

summary.zh: 本仓库提供全面的ChatGPT中文调教指南，涵盖学术论文、创意写作、商业文案、技术文档、翻译、数据分析等数十种应用场景，帮助用户掌握高效提示词设计技巧，充分发挥GPT-3.5与GPT-4的生成能力，提升AI输出质量与实用性。
summary.en: This repository offers a comprehensive Chinese guide for fine-tuning ChatGPT, covering diverse use cases such as academic writing, creative content, business copywriting, technical documentation, translation, and data analysis, empowering users to craft effective prompts and maximize GPT-3.5/4.0 performance.

metadata.name: HelloGitHub
metadata.description: :octocat: 分享 GitHub 上有趣、入门级的开源项目。Share interesting, entry-level open source projects on GitHub.

summary.zh: HelloGitHub 是一个专注于分享 GitHub 上有趣、适合入门的开源项目的中文社区项目，每月28日发布月刊，涵盖开源项目、书籍、实战案例等，帮助开发者快速发现优质资源，激发对开源的兴趣与参与热情。
summary.en: HelloGitHub is a Chinese community project that curates interesting and beginner-friendly open-source projects from GitHub. It publishes a monthly newsletter on the 28th, featuring projects, books, and practical examples to help developers discover quality resources and foster a love for open source.

metadata.name: wechaty
metadata.description: Conversational RPA SDK for Chatbot Makers. Join our Discord: https://discord.gg/7q8NBZbQzt

summary.zh: Wechaty 是一个对话式机器人流程自动化（RPA）SDK，支持跨平台聊天机器人开发。它提供统一接口对接微信、WhatsApp 等主流消息平台，开发者只需编写一次代码即可多端运行。项目基于 TypeScript 构建，支持 JavaScript、Python、Go、Java 等多种语言，具备高度可扩展性和活跃的开源社区。
summary.en: Wechaty is a conversational RPA SDK that enables developers to build chatbots across multiple messaging platforms like WeChat and WhatsApp using a unified API. Built with TypeScript, it supports polyglot development in JavaScript, Python, Go, Java, and more, allowing code-once, run-anywhere bot deployment with strong community support.

metadata.name: Open-Assistant
metadata.description: OpenAssistant is a chat-based assistant that understands tasks, can interact with third-party systems, and retrieve information dynamically to do so.

summary.zh: OpenAssistant 是一个开源的对话式 AI 助手项目，旨在让所有人都能使用高质量的聊天式大语言模型。它支持任务理解、第三方系统交互与动态信息检索，由 LAION-AI 主导开发，现已完成并发布最终数据集 oasst2。
summary.en: OpenAssistant is an open-source conversational AI project designed to provide universal access to a high-quality chat-based large language model. It supports task understanding, third-party system integration, and dynamic information retrieval, led by LAION-AI and now completed with the release of the oasst2 dataset.

metadata.name: howto-make-more-money
metadata.description: 程序员如何优雅的挣零花钱，2.0版，升级为小书了。Most of this not work outside China , so no English translate

summary.zh: 本书面向中国程序员，系统介绍如何通过副业、知识付费、网课制作等方式优雅赚取零花钱。内容涵盖变现路径、平台策略与实战案例，结合思维导图与电子书形式，适合希望拓展收入的个体开发者。
summary.en: A practical guide for Chinese programmers to earn side income through knowledge monetization, online courses, and digital products. Includes actionable strategies, platform insights, and visual mind maps, tailored for solo developers seeking flexible revenue streams.

metadata.name: teamide
metadata.description: Team IDE 集成MySql、Oracle、金仓、达梦、神通等数据库、SSH、FTP、Redis、Zookeeper、Kafka、Elasticsearch、Mongodb、小工具等管理工具

summary.zh: Team IDE 是一款集成多数据库（MySQL、Oracle、达梦、金仓等）、中间件（Redis、Kafka、Zookeeper、Elasticsearch）及 SSH、FTP、MongoDB 等管理工具的一体化开发运维平台，支持终端操作、数据查询、性能压测与小工具转换，提供 Electron 客户端与 Web 服务端两种部署模式，适用于个人与团队场景。
summary.en: Team IDE is an integrated development and operations platform supporting multiple databases (MySQL, Oracle, Dameng, Kingbase, etc.), middleware (Redis, Kafka, Zookeeper, Elasticsearch), and tools like SSH, FTP, and MongoDB. It offers terminal access, data querying, performance testing, and utility converters, with both Electron client and web server deployment modes for individual and team use.

metadata.name: austin
metadata.description: 消息推送平台🔥 推送下发【邮件】【短信】【微信服务号】【微信小程序】【企业微信】【钉钉】等消息类型。

summary.zh: austin 是一个企业级消息推送平台，支持邮件、短信、微信服务号、小程序、钉钉、企业微信等10余种消息类型统一发送，具备全链路追踪、渠道隔离、定时任务与可视化监控能力，基于 SpringBoot + Kafka + Redis + Flink 等技术栈构建，适用于高并发消息分发场景。
summary.en: austin is an enterprise-grade message delivery platform supporting unified sending of 10+ message types including email, SMS, WeChat, DingTalk, and enterprise WeChat. It features full-link tracking, channel isolation, scheduled delivery, and real-time monitoring, built on SpringBoot, Kafka, Redis, and Flink for high-concurrency scenarios.

metadata.name: cat
metadata.description: CAT 作为服务端项目基础组件，提供了 Java, C/C++, Node.js, Python, Go 等多语言客户端，已经在美团点评的基础架构中间件框架（MVC框架，RPC框架，数据库框架，缓存框架等，消息队列，配置系统等）深度集成，为美团点评各业务线提供系统丰富的性能指标、健康状况、实时告警等。

summary.zh: CAT 是美团点评开源的实时应用监控平台，基于 Java 开发，支持多语言客户端（Java/C++/Go/Python/Node.js），深度集成于各类中间件框架中，提供秒级延迟的性能指标、健康状况与实时告警。具备全量数据采集、高吞吐、高可用与分布式扩展能力，显著降低故障发现与定位成本。
summary.en: CAT is a real-time application monitoring platform developed by Meituan, built in Java with multi-language clients (Java/C++/Go/Python/Node.js). Deeply integrated into middleware frameworks, it delivers second-level latency metrics, health status, and real-time alerts. Features include full-data collection, high throughput, high availability, and distributed scalability, greatly reducing fault detection and diagnosis time.

metadata.name: GitHub-Chinese-Top-Charts
metadata.description: :cn: GitHub中文排行榜，各语言分设「软件 | 资料」榜单，精准定位中文好项目。各取所需，高效学习。

summary.zh: GitHub中文排行榜是一个专注于发现和推荐优质中文开源项目的平台，按编程语言和类别（软件/资料）设立总榜、增速榜和新秀榜，帮助用户无语言障碍地高效学习与交流，精准定位高质量中文项目。
summary.en: GitHub Chinese Top Charts is a curated ranking platform highlighting high-quality Chinese open-source projects, categorized by language and type (software/knowledge), featuring overall, growth, and new repo leaderboards to help users discover and learn from top Chinese projects efficiently.

metadata.name: Java-Summarize
metadata.description: :books:Java核心知识点整理（包括Java基础、JVM、数据库、计算机网络、算法、操作系统、设计模式、系统设计、框架原理）

summary.zh: 该项目系统整理了Java核心技术栈，涵盖Java基础、JVM、并发编程、主流框架（如Spring、MyBatis、Netty）、数据库、算法、操作系统及系统设计等核心领域，内容结构清晰，适合Java开发者面试准备与知识体系构建。
summary.en: This repository comprehensively summarizes core Java technologies, including Java fundamentals, JVM, concurrency, major frameworks (e.g., Spring, MyBatis, Netty), databases, algorithms, OS, and system design. Well-structured and ideal for interview prep and knowledge consolidation.

metadata.name: CS-Notes
metadata.description: :books: 技术面试必备基础知识、Leetcode、计算机操作系统、计算机网络、系统设计

summary.zh: 该项目是技术面试核心知识体系的开源笔记，涵盖算法（Leetcode、剑指Offer）、操作系统、计算机网络、数据库、Java、系统设计等关键领域，内容系统全面，配有详细题解与实战指南，适合程序员求职准备与基础知识巩固。
summary.en: This repository provides a comprehensive collection of essential computer science knowledge for technical interviews, including algorithms (Leetcode, Sword to Offer), operating systems, networking, databases, Java, and system design, with detailed explanations and practical examples.

metadata.name: github-readme-stats
metadata.description: :zap: Dynamically generated stats for your github readmes

summary.zh: GitHub Readme Stats 是一个动态生成 GitHub 统计数据的开源项目，支持在 README 文件中展示用户仓库、语言使用、提交记录等个性化统计卡片。通过 Vercel 部署，提供高度可定制的主题、图标和布局选项，广泛用于开发者个人主页美化。
summary.en: GitHub Readme Stats is an open-source tool that dynamically generates customizable GitHub statistics cards for README files, including user stats, top languages, and pinned repositories. Hosted on Vercel, it supports themes, icons, and multiple layouts to enhance developer profiles.

metadata.name: WeChatExtension-ForMac
metadata.description: A plugin for Mac WeChat

summary.zh: 一款专为 macOS 微信设计的插件，支持消息防撤回、多开登录、消息转发、AI 自动回复及自定义回复、小程序详情展示和多种主题皮肤。适用于微信 3.1.2 及以上版本，仅限 macOS 11+ 系统使用。项目已停止开源以抵制盗版盈利行为。
summary.en: A macOS plugin for WeChat enabling anti-revoke, multi-account login, message forwarding, AI/custom auto-replies, mini-program detail display, and themed skins. Compatible with WeChat 3.1.2+ on macOS 11+. The project is no longer open-sourced to protest unauthorized commercial use.

metadata.name: ant-design
metadata.description: An enterprise-class UI design language and React UI library

summary.zh: Ant Design 是一个面向企业级应用的 UI 设计语言和 React 组件库，提供高质量的 TypeScript 组件、国际化支持、CSS-in-JS 主题定制及完整的设计资源，适用于现代浏览器、服务端渲染和 Electron 环境。
summary.en: Ant Design is an enterprise-class UI design language and React component library offering high-quality TypeScript components, internationalization, CSS-in-JS theming, and comprehensive design resources for modern browsers, SSR, and Electron.

metadata.name: coder2gwy
metadata.description: 互联网首份程序员考公指南，由3位已经进入体制内的前大厂程序员联合献上。

summary.zh: 本指南由三位前大厂程序员联合撰写，分享从996职场转型体制内的真实经验，涵盖公务员、事业编与教师岗位的备考策略、时间管理与心理调适，助力程序员高效上岸。
summary.en: A practical guide co-authored by three ex-big-tech programmers who successfully transitioned into public sector roles, offering real-world strategies for civil service, institutional, and teaching job preparation amid 996 work schedules.

metadata.name: magic-python
metadata.description: Python 黑魔法手册

summary.zh: 《Python 黑魔法手册》是一本专注于 Python 进阶与冷门特性的电子书，涵盖省略号、链式比较、短路逻辑、zip 包运行等实用技巧，深入解析解释器机制、字符串驻留、小整数池等底层原理。内容面向有经验的开发者，提供在线阅读与 PDF 下载，助力掌握 Python 的隐藏能力。
summary.en: The 'Python Black Magic Handbook' is an e-book focused on advanced and lesser-known Python features, covering practical tricks like ellipsis usage, chained comparisons, short-circuit logic, and executable zip packages. It dives into interpreter internals such as string interning and small integer caching, targeting experienced developers with both online and offline reading options.

metadata.name: Ant-Forest
metadata.description: AutoJs6-based ant forest energy auto-collect script (基于 AutoJs6 的蚂蚁森林能量自动收取脚本)

summary.zh: 该项目是基于 Auto.js 6 的蚂蚁森林能量自动收取脚本，支持自动收集能量、能量雨点击及好友排行榜互动。具备任务调度、屏幕控制、事件监测等高级功能，采用模块化设计并持续优化代码结构与扩展性，适用于 Android 设备自动化操作。
summary.en: An Auto.js 6-based automation script for Ant Forest energy collection, featuring auto-harvesting, energy rain interaction, and friend ranking engagement. It includes task scheduling, screen control, event monitoring, and modular architecture, designed for Android automation with ongoing code optimization.

metadata.name: open-source-mac-os-apps
metadata.description: 🚀 Awesome list of open source applications for macOS. https://t.me/s/opensourcemacosapps

summary.zh: 这是一个精选的 macOS 开源应用列表，涵盖音频、开发、生产力等 49 个分类，共收录 689 款应用。项目支持按编程语言筛选（如 Swift、Objective-C、JavaScript 等），旨在帮助开发者发现优质开源工具并参与贡献。
summary.en: A curated list of 689 open source applications for macOS across 49 categories including audio, development, and productivity. The repo supports filtering by programming language (e.g., Swift, Objective-C, JavaScript) and encourages community contributions to expand the collection.

metadata.name: Lunar
metadata.description: Intelligent adaptive brightness for your external monitors

summary.zh: Lunar 是一款专为 macOS 设计的智能显示器控制应用，支持通过 DDC/CI 协议直接调节外接显示器的亮度、音量、对比度和输入源。它提供多种自适应亮度模式（基于环境光传感器、Mac 内置传感器或地理位置），并支持键盘快捷键、应用预设、屏幕旋转及 BlackOut 功能，兼容 Intel 与 Apple Silicon 芯片。
summary.en: Lunar is a macOS app for intelligently controlling external monitors via DDC/CI, enabling hardware-level adjustments of brightness, volume, contrast, and input switching. It features adaptive brightness based on ambient light, MacBook sensors, or location, along with hotkeys, app presets, screen rotation, and BlackOut mode—fully compatible with both Intel and Apple Silicon Macs.

metadata.name: Magisk
metadata.description: The Magic Mask for Android

summary.zh: Magisk 是一款开源的 Android 自定义工具套件，支持 Android 6.0 及以上设备。其核心功能包括 MagiskSU 提供 root 权限、Magisk Modules 实现系统分区修改、MagiskBoot 用于解包与重打包启动镜像，以及 Zygisk 实现进程注入。广泛应用于系统级定制与权限管理。
summary.en: Magisk is an open-source Android customization suite supporting devices running Android 6.0+. Key features include MagiskSU for root access, Magisk Modules for modifying read-only partitions, MagiskBoot for boot image manipulation, and Zygisk for injecting code into app processes. Widely used for system-level customization and privilege management.

metadata.name: spiders
metadata.description: Python爬虫，返回一定格式的信息，下载，使用flask提供简易api。抖音无水印、皮皮虾、快手、网易云音乐、qq音乐、咪咕音乐、荔枝FM音频、知乎视频、最右语音、视频、微博......

summary.zh: 该项目是一个基于 Python 的多平台爬虫工具集，支持抖音、快手、网易云音乐、QQ音乐、微博等主流平台的无水印视频与音频解析，并提供 Flask/FastAPI 接口服务。代码简洁实用，适合学习爬虫开发与日常资源获取。
summary.en: A Python-based multi-platform web crawler toolkit that extracts watermark-free videos and audio from platforms like Douyin, Kuaishou, NetEase Music, QQ Music, and Weibo. It offers a lightweight API via Flask/FastAPI, ideal for learning and daily use.

metadata.name: scrcpy-gui
metadata.description: 👻 A simple & beautiful GUI application for scrcpy.

summary.zh: Scrcpy GUI 是一个简洁美观的图形界面应用，基于 scrcpy 实现 Android 设备的屏幕投射与控制。支持 USB 和无线连接，提供高帧率、低延迟的实时画面传输，无需 Root 权限，兼容 Windows、macOS 和 Linux 系统，适合开发调试、演示或远程控制等场景。
summary.en: Scrcpy GUI is a clean and elegant graphical interface for scrcpy, enabling real-time Android screen mirroring and control via USB or Wi-Fi. It delivers high FPS, low latency streaming without requiring root access, and supports Windows, macOS, and Linux for development, demos, or remote control.

metadata.name: qrcp
metadata.description: :zap: Transfer files over wifi from your computer to your mobile device by scanning a QR code without leaving the terminal.

summary.zh: qrcp 是一款通过 Wi-Fi 实现电脑与移动设备间文件传输的命令行工具，用户只需扫描二维码即可完成发送或接收文件，无需图形界面。它基于 Go 语言开发，支持多平台安装，适用于快速、安全的局域网文件共享场景。
summary.en: qrcp is a command-line tool that enables file transfer between a computer and a mobile device over Wi-Fi by scanning a QR code, without requiring a GUI. Built in Go, it supports cross-platform installation and is ideal for fast, secure local network file sharing.

metadata.name: mkdocs-material
metadata.description: Documentation that simply works

summary.zh: Material for MkDocs 是一个基于 MkDocs 的强大文档框架，支持 Markdown 编写，可快速生成专业静态站点。具备搜索、多语言（60+）、响应式设计、高度可定制等特性，适用于开源与商业项目，提供 Docker 支持与活跃社区。
summary.en: Material for MkDocs is a powerful documentation framework built on MkDocs, enabling fast creation of professional static sites from Markdown. It features search, 60+ languages, responsive design, high customizability, Docker support, and strong community backing for both open-source and commercial use.

metadata.name: JavaGuide
metadata.description: Java 面试 & 后端通用面试指南，覆盖计算机基础、数据库、分布式、高并发与系统设计。准备后端技术面试，首选 JavaGuide！

summary.zh: JavaGuide 是一份全面的 Java 后端面试指南，涵盖 Java 基础、集合、并发、IO、数据库、分布式、高并发与系统设计等核心内容，提供知识点总结、源码分析及高频面试题，助力开发者高效准备大厂技术面试。
summary.en: JavaGuide is a comprehensive Java backend interview guide covering Java fundamentals, collections, concurrency, IO, databases, distributed systems, high concurrency, and system design. It includes key concepts, source code analysis, and common interview questions to help developers prepare for top-tier tech interviews.

metadata.name: showdoc
metadata.description: ShowDoc is a tool greatly applicable for an IT team to share documents online一个非常适合IT团队的在线API文档、技术文档工具

summary.zh: ShowDoc 是一款专为 IT 团队设计的在线文档协作工具，支持 API 文档、数据字典和技术说明文档的编写与共享。采用 Markdown 编辑，提供模板插入、版本历史、权限管理和响应式网页展示，支持导出为 Word 文档，有效提升团队文档维护效率与沟通协作能力。
summary.en: ShowDoc is an online documentation tool tailored for IT teams to collaboratively create and share API docs, data dictionaries, and technical guides. It features Markdown editing, template insertion, version history, role-based permissions, responsive design, and Word export, significantly improving documentation efficiency and team communication.

metadata.name: wanandroid_flutter
metadata.description: :collision::collision::collision:【Flutter版】玩安卓，非常适合学习，代码不多、注释多。

summary.zh: 这是一个基于 Flutter 开发的玩安卓客户端，代码简洁、注释丰富，非常适合 Flutter 初学者学习。项目涵盖登录注册、首页展示、搜索、侧边栏、WebView 加载、网络请求、状态管理、主题切换等核心功能，并提供了详细的组件使用教程，是学习 Flutter 开发的优质实践项目。
summary.en: A Flutter-based WanAndroid client with clean code and extensive comments, ideal for Flutter beginners. It covers core features like login, homepage, search, WebView, network requests, state management, and theme switching, accompanied by detailed tutorials on Flutter widgets and best practices.

metadata.name: easyexcel
metadata.description: 快速、简洁、解决大文件内存溢出的java处理Excel工具

summary.zh: EasyExcel 是阿里巴巴开源的 Java Excel 处理工具，专为解决大文件内存溢出问题设计。它重写了 POI 对 07 版 Excel 的解析逻辑，显著降低内存占用（如 75M 文件仅需 16M 内存），支持极速模式，提供简洁 API，适用于高并发、大数据量场景。
summary.en: EasyExcel is an open-source Java library by Alibaba for efficient Excel processing, designed to prevent memory overflow with large files. It rewrites POI's parsing logic for Excel 2007+, reducing memory usage significantly (e.g., 75M file in 16M RAM), supports high-speed mode, and offers a clean API for high-concurrency, big-data scenarios.

metadata.name: cross-storage
metadata.description: Cross domain local storage, with permissions

summary.zh: CrossStorage 是一个支持跨域共享 localStorage 的 JavaScript 库，通过 iframe 和 postMessage 实现安全的数据存储与访问。它提供基于权限的访问控制，支持多窗口/标签页跨域共享数据，使用 ES6 Promise API，适用于客户端密集型应用以减少请求头开销。
summary.en: CrossStorage is a JavaScript library enabling cross-domain localStorage sharing via iframe and postMessage. It features permission-based access control, allows multiple browser windows/tabs across domains to share data, and uses an ES6 Promise-based API, ideal for client-heavy apps to reduce header overhead.

metadata.name: wtfpython-cn
metadata.description: wtfpython的中文翻译/持续🚧.../ 能力有限，欢迎帮我改进翻译

summary.zh: 该项目是《What the f*ck Python!》的中文翻译版本，旨在通过一系列反直觉、鲜为人知的Python代码示例，揭示语言底层机制与特性。内容涵盖字符串处理、操作符行为、类与实例属性、生成器等，帮助开发者深入理解Python内部原理，适合进阶学习。
summary.en: This is the Chinese translation of 'What the f*ck Python!', a collection of counterintuitive and lesser-known Python behaviors. It explores quirks in strings, operators, class attributes, generators, and more, offering deep insights into Python's internals for intermediate to advanced learners.

metadata.name: gridea
metadata.description: ✍️ A static blog writing client (一个静态博客写作客户端)

summary.zh: Gridea 是一款简洁高效的静态博客写作客户端，支持 Markdown 编辑、多平台部署（GitHub Pages、Coding Pages）、多语言界面及主题自定义。提供标签分类、评论系统集成（Gitalk/DisqusJS）、图片插入、菜单定制等功能，兼容 Windows、macOS 和 Linux，适合个人知识管理与内容创作。
summary.en: Gridea is a lightweight static blog writing client featuring Markdown editing, multi-platform deployment (GitHub Pages, Coding Pages), multilingual support, and customizable themes. It includes tagging, comment system integration (Gitalk/DisqusJS), image insertion, menu customization, and cross-platform compatibility for Windows, macOS, and Linux.

metadata.name: wenyan
metadata.description: 文言文編程語言 A programming language for the ancient Chinese.

summary.zh: 文言编程语言（wenyan-lang）是一种以古典中文语法为基础的自然语言编程语言，支持用文言文编写程序并编译为 JavaScript、Python 或 Ruby 等现代语言。其设计融合传统文化与现代计算，适用于教育、文化展示与创意编程，具备在线 IDE 和丰富示例。
summary.en: Wenyan-lang is a natural language programming language based on Classical Chinese grammar, allowing code to be written in literary Chinese and compiled into JavaScript, Python, or Ruby. It blends traditional culture with modern computing, ideal for education, cultural expression, and creative coding, featuring an online IDE and extensive examples.

metadata.name: RxPY
metadata.description: ReactiveX for Python

summary.zh: RxPY 是 ReactiveX 的 Python 实现，支持使用可观察序列和管道操作符构建异步与事件驱动程序。提供流畅链式与函数式两种语法风格，兼容 Python 3.9+，广泛用于响应式编程、数据流处理和并发控制场景。
summary.en: RxPY is the Python implementation of ReactiveX, enabling asynchronous and event-based programming with observable sequences and pipable operators. It supports both fluent and functional syntax styles, runs on Python 3.9+, and is ideal for reactive programming, data streaming, and concurrency management.

metadata.name: remote-working
metadata.description: 收集整理远程工作相关的资料

summary.zh: 该项目系统整理远程工作相关资讯，涵盖文章、问题讨论、远程团队、视频、播客、站点、报告、书籍及协作工具等资源，侧重国内及对中国友好的国际内容，并通过多渠道同步更新，助力远程工作者获取实用信息与职业发展支持。
summary.en: This repository curates comprehensive resources on remote work, including articles, Q&A, teams, videos, podcasts, websites, reports, books, and tools, with a focus on China-friendly or domestic content, and shares updates across multiple platforms to support remote professionals.

metadata.name: Auto.js
metadata.description: Automation&Workflow JavaScript IDE on Android(安卓平台上的JavaScript编程IDE)

summary.zh: Auto.js 是一款运行在安卓平台上的 JavaScript 自动化开发工具，支持脚本编写与流程控制，适用于编程学习与效率提升。提供可视化 IDE 环境，可开发自动化任务，如模拟点击、界面识别等。项目基于 Mozilla 公共许可证，仅限非商业用途。
summary.en: Auto.js is a JavaScript-based automation and workflow IDE for Android, designed for programming education and productivity enhancement. It enables script development for tasks like UI automation and screen interaction. The project uses the Mozilla Public License with a non-commercial use restriction.

metadata.name: ydata-profiling
metadata.description: 1 Line of code data quality profiling & exploratory data analysis for Pandas and Spark DataFrames.

summary.zh: ydata-profiling 是一款用于 Pandas 和 Spark DataFrame 的一行代码数据质量分析与探索性数据分析工具，支持自动类型推断、缺失值警告、单变量与多变量分析、时间序列及文本分析，并可导出 HTML 或 JSON 格式报告，极大提升数据理解效率。
summary.en: ydata-profiling enables one-line exploratory data analysis and data quality profiling for Pandas and Spark DataFrames. It automatically infers data types, detects issues like missing values, and provides univariate, multivariate, time-series, and text analysis with exportable HTML/JSON reports.

metadata.name: black
metadata.description: The uncompromising Python code formatter

summary.zh: Black 是一款严格遵循 PEP 8 规范的 Python 代码格式化工具，以‘不妥协’的设计理念自动统一代码风格，提升代码可读性与审查效率。支持命令行调用、Jupyter Notebook 及 CI 集成，具备 AST 校验确保重构安全，广泛用于各类 Python 项目。
summary.en: Black is an uncompromising, PEP 8-compliant Python code formatter that enforces consistent style across projects. It automates formatting, reduces diff sizes, and integrates with CI and Jupyter. With AST validation for safety, it boosts code readability and review efficiency.

metadata.name: miaosha
metadata.description: ⭐⭐⭐⭐秒杀系统设计与实现.互联网工程师进阶与分析🙋🐓

summary.zh: 该项目是一个高并发秒杀系统的完整设计与实现，涵盖SpringBoot、Redis、MQ、Dubbo、ZK等核心技术栈，深入讲解分布式架构下的流量削峰、库存扣减、防超卖等核心问题。同时包含JVM调优、多线程优化、监控日志框架tydeus-monitor等进阶内容，适合互联网工程师提升高可用系统设计与实战能力。
summary.en: This project provides a comprehensive design and implementation of a high-concurrency flash sale system, covering core technologies like SpringBoot, Redis, MQ, Dubbo, and ZooKeeper. It dives into critical challenges such as traffic throttling, inventory control, and overselling prevention in distributed architectures. Additionally, it includes advanced topics like JVM tuning, multithreading optimization, and the tydeus-monitor logging framework, ideal for engineers advancing in high-availability system design.

metadata.name: regular-investing-in-box
metadata.description: 定投改变命运 —— 让时间陪你慢慢变富 https://onregularinvesting.com

summary.zh: 《定投改变命运》是李笑来撰写的投资理念书籍，系统阐述普通人通过长期定期投资（定投）实现财富积累与阶层跃迁的可行路径。书中以BOX等优质资产为例，强调时间复利与纪律性投资的重要性，提供中英文多格式电子书及有声版本，适合零基础投资者阅读。
summary.en: On Regular Investing by Li Xiaolai presents a practical guide for ordinary people to achieve financial growth and social mobility through disciplined, long-term regular investing. Using assets like BOX as examples, it emphasizes compounding returns and behavioral consistency, offering multilingual e-books and audiobooks for global readers.

metadata.name: dio
metadata.description: A powerful HTTP client for Dart and Flutter, which supports global settings, Interceptors, FormData, aborting and canceling a request, files uploading and downloading, requests timeout, custom adapters, etc.

summary.zh: dio 是一款功能强大的 Dart 和 Flutter HTTP 客户端，支持全局配置、拦截器、FormData、请求取消、文件上传下载、超时控制及自定义适配器等特性，适用于构建高性能网络请求应用。
summary.en: dio is a powerful HTTP client for Dart and Flutter, supporting global settings, interceptors, FormData, request cancellation, file upload/download, timeouts, and custom adapters for high-performance networking.

metadata.name: flukit
metadata.description: A Flutter UI Kit（一个 Flutter UI组件库），包含 ScaleView, Swiper, PullRefresh, WaterMark, GradientCircularProgressIndicator...

summary.zh: Flukit 是一个功能丰富的 Flutter UI 组件库，提供 ScaleView、Swiper、PullRefresh、WaterMark 等高质量自定义 Widget，涵盖动画、布局、滚动、调试工具等场景，显著提升开发效率与用户体验。
summary.en: Flukit is a comprehensive Flutter UI toolkit offering customizable widgets like ScaleView, Swiper, PullRefresh, and WaterMark. It includes animation, layout, scrolling, and debugging utilities to enhance development efficiency and user experience.

metadata.name: leedl-tutorial
metadata.description: 《李宏毅深度学习教程》（李宏毅老师推荐👍，苹果书🍎），PDF下载地址：https://github.com/datawhalechina/leedl-tutorial/releases

summary.zh: 本仓库提供李宏毅教授推荐的《深度学习教程》（苹果书）PDF资源，内容源自台大经典机器学习课程，涵盖深度学习核心理论、公式推导与实践技巧。教程语言通俗，结合动漫案例讲解，适合中文读者入门。支持在线阅读与纸质书购买，获李宏毅老师亲自推荐。
summary.en: This repo offers the PDF of 'LeeDL-Tutorial' (Apple Book), recommended by Prof. Hungyi Lee, based on his renowned NTU ML course. It covers core deep learning theories with intuitive explanations, detailed derivations, and anime-inspired examples, ideal for Chinese-speaking learners. Includes online reading and print edition links.

metadata.name: flutter-book
metadata.description: 📚《Flutter 入门指南》

summary.zh: 这是一本面向前端开发者的《Flutter 入门指南》，系统讲解 Flutter 框架核心知识，涵盖 Dart 语言、Skia 渲染引擎、Material Design 等，适合具备 JavaScript 基础的开发者快速上手跨平台移动与 Web 应用开发。
summary.en: A beginner-friendly guide to Flutter for frontend developers, covering Dart, Skia rendering, Material Design, and cross-platform development for Android, iOS, and Web, ideal for those with JavaScript experience.

metadata.name: HistoryOfEverything
metadata.description: Flutter Launch Timeline Demo

summary.zh: 这是一个基于 Flutter 构建的垂直时间轴应用，展示从宇宙大爆炸到互联网诞生的重大历史事件。应用包含主菜单、可缩放滚动的时间轴和详情页，并深度集成 Flare 和 Nima 实现精美动画。核心亮点在于自定义 LeafRenderObjectWidget 与 RenderBox，实现高性能渲染与交互。
summary.en: A Flutter-based vertical timeline app showcasing major historical events from the Big Bang to the Internet. It features a scrollable/zoomable timeline, animated event bubbles, and detailed article pages. Built with custom LeafRenderObjectWidget and RenderBox for high-performance rendering, and integrates Flare/Nima for rich animations.

metadata.name: flutter-go
metadata.description: flutter 开发者帮助 APP，包含 flutter 常用 140+ 组件的demo 演示与中文文档

summary.zh: FlutterGo 是阿里巴巴推出的 Flutter 开发者辅助应用，提供 140+ 常用组件的中文文档与 Demo 演示，帮助开发者快速上手。目前项目因团队调整暂停维护，未来将迭代新版本并欢迎社区参与贡献。
summary.en: FlutterGo is an Alibaba-developed helper app for Flutter developers, offering Chinese documentation and live demos for over 140 commonly used components. Currently paused due to internal team restructuring, it plans future updates and community contributions.

metadata.name: VeryNginx
metadata.description: A very powerful and friendly  nginx base on lua-nginx-module( openresty ) which provide WAF, Control Panel, and Dashboards.

summary.zh: VeryNginx 是基于 OpenResty 构建的高性能 Nginx 增强工具，提供强大的 Web 应用防火墙（WAF）、访问统计、自定义规则引擎和可视化控制面板。支持请求匹配、频率限制、URI 重写、流量分析等功能，适用于安全防护与运维监控场景。
summary.en: VeryNginx is a powerful Nginx enhancement built on OpenResty, offering advanced WAF, access statistics, customizable rule engine, and a user-friendly web dashboard. It supports request matching, rate limiting, URI rewriting, and traffic analysis, ideal for security protection and operational monitoring.

metadata.name: OpenPano
metadata.description: Automatic Panorama Stitching From Scratch

summary.zh: OpenPano 是一个从零开始用 C++ 编写的自动全景图像拼接程序，不依赖任何视觉库。它基于《Automatic Panoramic Image Stitching using Invariant Features》论文算法，支持圆柱投影、相机参数估计和平移三种拼接模式，适用于固定视角旋转拍摄的多张图像，可生成高质量全景图。
summary.en: OpenPano is a C++-based panorama stitching program built from scratch without relying on vision libraries. It implements the algorithm from the paper 'Automatic Panoramic Image Stitching using Invariant Features', supporting cylinder, camera estimation, and translation modes to stitch images taken from a fixed viewpoint into high-quality panoramas.

metadata.name: squoosh
metadata.description: Make images smaller using best-in-class codecs, right in the browser.

summary.zh: Squoosh 是一款由 Google Chrome Labs 开发的开源图像压缩 Web 应用，支持多种现代编码格式，可在浏览器中本地完成图片压缩，无需上传服务器，保障用户隐私。适用于网页优化、移动端适配等场景，提供高效、安全的图像处理能力。
summary.en: Squoosh is an open-source image compression web app by Google Chrome Labs that reduces image sizes using advanced codecs directly in the browser. It processes images locally without server uploads, ensuring privacy, and supports multiple formats for web and mobile optimization.

metadata.name: el-data-table
metadata.description: 🥘Base on element-ui, makes crud easily

summary.zh: el-data-table 是基于 element-ui 的 Vue 组件，专为简化 RESTful CRUD 操作而设计。支持自动分页、树形结构、自定义搜索与操作列，通过配置化方式实现数据驱动，极大提升后台管理系统开发效率。
summary.en: el-data-table is a Vue component built on element-ui, designed to simplify RESTful CRUD operations. It supports pagination, tree data, custom search and action columns, enabling efficient backend management system development through data-driven configuration.

metadata.name: awesome-flutter
metadata.description: An awesome list that curates the best Flutter libraries, tools, tutorials, articles and more.

summary.zh: 这是一个精选的 Flutter 资源列表，汇集了高质量的库、工具、教程、文章和开源项目，涵盖组件、导航、模板、插件、框架等类别，帮助开发者快速发现优质 Flutter 内容，提升开发效率。
summary.en: A curated list of the best Flutter libraries, tools, tutorials, articles, and open-source projects, covering components, navigation, templates, plugins, and frameworks to help developers discover high-quality Flutter resources efficiently.

metadata.name: proxy_pool
metadata.description: Python ProxyPool for web spider

summary.zh: ProxyPool 是一个基于 Python 的爬虫代理 IP 池项目，支持定时采集和验证免费代理，确保高可用性。提供 API 和 CLI 两种调用方式，支持 Redis 存储，可轻松扩展代理源，适用于大规模爬虫场景，保障请求成功率与稳定性。
summary.en: ProxyPool is a Python-based proxy IP pool for web crawlers, featuring scheduled collection and validation of free proxies to ensure high availability. It offers both API and CLI interfaces, uses Redis for storage, supports extensible proxy sources, and is ideal for large-scale crawling with improved success rates and stability.

metadata.name: app-ideas
metadata.description: A Collection of application ideas which can be used to improve your coding skills.

summary.zh: 这是一个专为开发者设计的应用创意集合，旨在帮助解决编程学习中的‘灵感枯竭’问题。项目按难度分为三个等级，每个创意均包含明确目标、用户故事、可选进阶功能及学习资源，适合提升编码能力、实践新技术、丰富作品集或用于教学示例。
summary.en: A curated collection of application ideas designed to help developers overcome creative blocks and improve coding skills. Projects are tiered by difficulty and include clear objectives, user stories, bonus features, and resources—ideal for learning, portfolio building, and teaching.

metadata.name: yapi
metadata.description: YApi 是一个可本地部署的、打通前后端及QA的、可视化的接口管理平台

summary.zh: YApi 是一款可本地部署的可视化接口管理平台，打通前后端与测试流程，支持接口文档管理、Mock 数据生成、自动化测试及多种数据导入导出。基于 Json5 和 Mockjs，提供类似 Postman 的调试体验，支持权限管理与插件扩展，适用于企业级内网环境，保障数据安全。
summary.en: YApi is a locally deployable, visual API management platform that bridges frontend, backend, and QA teams. It supports API documentation, Mock data generation, automated testing, and data import/export. Built on Json5 and Mockjs, it offers Postman-like debugging, role-based access, and plugin extensibility, ideal for secure enterprise intranet use.

metadata.name: 996.ICU
metadata.description: Repo for counting stars and contributing. Press F to pay respect to glorious developers.

summary.zh: 996.ICU 是一个由开发者发起的开源倡议项目，旨在反对中国互联网行业普遍存在的“996”工作制（早9点至晚9点、每周6天），呼吁保障程序员合法权益。项目通过黑名单、反996许可证、媒体传播等方式推动劳工权益意识，获得国内外广泛关注。
summary.en: 996.ICU is an open-source initiative launched by developers to protest against the widespread '996' work schedule (9am–9pm, 6 days/week) in China's tech industry. It advocates for workers' rights through blacklists, the Anti-996 License, and global media outreach, gaining significant international attention.

metadata.name: awesome-cheatsheets
metadata.description: 超级速查表 - 编程语言、框架和开发工具的速查表，单个文件包含一切你需要知道的东西 :zap:

summary.zh: 该项目是 skywind3000 维护的中文速查表合集，涵盖 Bash、JavaScript、Go、Python 等编程语言及 Git、Vim、Tmux、FFmpeg 等开发工具的核心命令与用法。每个速查表均为单文件设计，内容精炼实用，旨在帮助开发者快速查阅常用语法与操作，提升开发效率，尤其适合中文用户学习与实践。
summary.en: A curated collection of Chinese-language cheatsheets for programming languages like Bash, JavaScript, Go, and Python, as well as development tools such as Git, Vim, Tmux, and FFmpeg. Each cheatsheet is a single, concise file designed for quick reference, helping developers efficiently recall syntax and commands, especially beneficial for Chinese-speaking users.

metadata.name: Jike-Metro
metadata.description: :metro: 即刻 Ⓙ SDK

summary.zh: Jike Metro 是一个非官方即刻 SDK，基于 Python 实现，提供对即刻 Web 版 API 的封装，支持获取用户信息、动态、收藏、评论、发布内容、点赞转发等核心功能，适用于自动化脚本与数据分析场景。
summary.en: Jike Metro is an unofficial SDK for the Jike (OKJike) platform, implemented in Python. It wraps the web API to enable fetching user profiles, feeds, collections, comments, posting content, liking, and reposting, ideal for automation and data analysis.

metadata.name: mmh
metadata.description: Nothing, just a simple ssh tool.

summary.zh: mmh 是一个轻量级的 SSH 工具，旨在简化远程服务器连接管理。它提供简洁的命令行界面，支持多主机配置与快速切换，适合日常运维和开发场景。
summary.en: mmh is a lightweight SSH tool designed to simplify remote server connection management. It offers a clean CLI interface with multi-host configuration and quick switching, ideal for daily operations and development.

metadata.name: ao
metadata.description: Elegant Microsoft To-Do desktop app

summary.zh: Ao 是一款优雅的开源 Microsoft To-Do 桌面客户端，支持多平台运行，提供深色、黑色与复古主题、紧凑模式、自动夜间切换、全局快捷键、列表导航及界面缩放等功能，提升任务管理体验。
summary.en: Ao is an elegant, open-source, cross-platform desktop client for Microsoft To-Do, featuring dark/black/sepia themes, compact mode, auto-night mode, customizable keyboard shortcuts, list navigation, and scalable UI for enhanced productivity.

metadata.name: mall
metadata.description: mall项目是一套电商系统，包括前台商城系统及后台管理系统，基于Spring Boot+MyBatis实现，采用Docker容器化部署。 前台商城系统包含首页门户、商品推荐、商品搜索、商品展示、购物车、订单流程、会员中心、客户服务、帮助中心等模块。 后台管理系统包含商品管理、订单管理、会员管理、促销管理、运营管理、内容管理、统计报表、财务管理、权限管理、设置等模块。

summary.zh: mall 是一套完整的电商系统，涵盖前台商城与后台管理，基于 Spring Boot + MyBatis 构建，支持 Docker 容器化部署。系统功能全面，包含商品展示、订单流程、会员管理、促销运营等模块，并集成 Elasticsearch 搜索、Redis 缓存、RabbitMQ 消息队列等技术，适用于企业级电商解决方案。
summary.en: Mall is a full-featured e-commerce system including frontend shopping mall and backend management, built with Spring Boot + MyBatis and deployed via Docker. It covers product display, order processing, user management, promotions, and integrates Elasticsearch, Redis, RabbitMQ, making it ideal for enterprise-level e-commerce solutions.

metadata.name: algorithm-visualizer
metadata.description: :fireworks:Interactive Online Platform that Visualizes Algorithms from Code

summary.zh: Algorithm Visualizer 是一个交互式在线平台，通过可视化代码运行过程帮助学习者直观理解算法。支持多种编程语言，提供丰富的算法教程与可视化库，适用于学生、教师及开发者提升算法理解能力。
summary.en: Algorithm Visualizer is an interactive online platform that brings algorithms to life by visualizing code execution in real time. Supporting multiple programming languages, it offers tutorials and visualization libraries to help students, educators, and developers deepen their understanding of algorithms.

metadata.name: flaskblog
metadata.description: person blog powered by flask

summary.zh: 这是一个基于 Flask 框架开发的个人博客系统，支持文章发布与展示，提供登录管理功能。项目包含蓝图（blueprint）实现示例，便于理解 Flask 模块化开发。部署简单，需配置数据库并运行管理命令即可启动服务。
summary.en: A personal blog system built with Flask, supporting article publishing and display with login management. Includes a blueprint-based implementation example to demonstrate modular Flask development. Easy to deploy with simple database configuration and management commands.

metadata.name: The-Flask-Mega-Tutorial-zh
metadata.description: 翻译自Miguel Grinberg的blog https://blog.miguelgrinberg.com 的2017年新版The Flask Mega-Tutorial教程

summary.zh: 本仓库是Miguel Grinberg《Flask Mega-Tutorial》2017年版的完整中文翻译，涵盖Flask Web开发的23个核心章节，包括模板、数据库、用户认证、部署等全流程内容，旨在帮助中文开发者系统学习现代Flask应用开发。
