metadata.name: Awesome-MaterialDesign
metadata.description: Collection of material design libs and res.

summary.zh: 这是一个精选的 Android Material Design 资源与开源库集合，涵盖官方文档、设计资源、Google 示例项目、第三方库（如 FAB、SnackBar、Transition 动画等）及实战案例，帮助开发者快速实现现代化 Material Design 界面。
summary.en: A curated collection of Android Material Design resources and libraries, including official docs, Google samples, UI components (FAB, SnackBar, transitions), and third-party libraries to help developers implement modern Material Design interfaces efficiently.

metadata.name: essay
metadata.description: Python项目自动化多服务器部署的工具

summary.zh: essay 是一个基于 Fabric 的 Python 项目自动化部署工具，核心功能包括源码打包、多服务器部署与虚拟环境管理。它依赖 Git 仓库和私有 PyPI 服务，支持通过 fab 命令快速构建、上传包并部署到指定角色的服务器，内置 supervisord 进程管理，提供 pre/post-deploy 钩子，显著简化 Python 应用的持续交付流程。
summary.en: essay is a Fabric-based automation tool for Python project deployment, featuring source packaging, multi-server deployment, and virtual environment management. It relies on Git repositories and private PyPI servers, enabling rapid build, upload, and deployment via fab commands to role-defined servers, with built-in supervisord process control and pre/post-deploy hooks for streamlined CI/CD.

metadata.name: android-dev-com
metadata.description: Some Famous Android Developers Information, 微信公众号:codekk, 网站:

summary.zh: 该项目整理并展示了国外知名 Android 开发者及其公司的 GitHub、博客和代表作信息，涵盖 Google、Square、Jake Wharton 等核心贡献者，是了解 Android 生态技术领袖与开源项目的重要参考资源。
summary.en: This repository compiles information on renowned Android developers and companies, including their GitHub profiles, blogs, and key projects like ButterKnife, OkHttp, and greenDAO, serving as a valuable resource for exploring the Android open-source ecosystem.

metadata.name: android-dev-cn
metadata.description: Some Chinese Android Developers Information, 微信公众号:codekk, 网站:

summary.zh: 该项目整理了国内知名 Android 开发者的 GitHub、博客及个人简介，涵盖源码分析、性能优化、开源项目等领域，是了解国内 Android 技术圈的重要资源，支持社区补充与推荐。
summary.en: This repository curates information on prominent Chinese Android developers, including their GitHub profiles, blogs, and expertise areas such as source code analysis, performance optimization, and open-source projects, serving as a valuable resource for the Android community.

metadata.name: Photo-Sphere-Viewer
metadata.description: A JavaScript library to display Photo Sphere panoramas.

summary.zh: Photo Sphere Viewer 是一个基于 Three.js 的 JavaScript 库，用于在网页上展示 360×180 度的等距柱状全景图。支持用户交互、自动旋转、缩放控制和导航栏定制，兼容 WebGL 和 Canvas，适用于 Android Photo Sphere 拍摄的全景图像展示。
summary.en: Photo Sphere Viewer is a JavaScript library built on Three.js for displaying 360×180 equirectangular panoramas on web pages. It supports user interaction, auto-rotation, zoom controls, and customizable navigation bars, compatible with WebGL and Canvas, ideal for showcasing Android Photo Sphere images.

metadata.name: blog
metadata.description: 没事写写文章，喜欢的话请点star，想订阅点watch，千万别fork！

summary.zh: 该仓库是作者记录前端工程化实践与思考的个人博客，涵盖前端构建、性能优化、模块化开发、自动化测试等核心议题，并分享大厂实践案例与经典技术资料，旨在推动前端工程体系化发展。
summary.en: This is a personal blog repository documenting insights and practices in frontend engineering, covering topics like build tools, performance optimization, modular development, and automation testing, with references to industry best practices and foundational resources.

metadata.name: qiandao
metadata.description: 签到

summary.zh: qiandao 是一个基于 HAR 编辑器的自动签到框架，支持通过模板实现多站点自动化签到。项目提供 Web 管理界面与命令行工具，支持 Docker 部署，依赖 Python 3.11，可选 Redis 与 MySQL 存储。用户可上传自定义签到模板，管理员可审批发布，适用于需要批量维护网站签到的场景。
summary.en: qiandao is an automated check-in framework based on HAR editor, enabling multi-site auto-check-in via templates. It offers a web interface and CLI tool, supports Docker deployment, requires Python 3.11, and optionally uses Redis or MySQL. Users can upload custom templates, with admin approval for public sharing, ideal for batch website check-in management.

metadata.name: GetCookies
metadata.description: Assistant for get HTTP ONLY Cookies.

summary.zh: GetCookies 是一款 Chrome 浏览器插件，用于突破 HTTP ONLY 限制获取指定站点的 Cookies。通过页面中带有特定 data 属性的按钮触发，支持按域名、Cookie 名称筛选，并通过 message 事件回调返回 JSON 格式的 Cookie 数据，适用于自动化签到等场景。
summary.en: GetCookies is a Chrome extension that bypasses HTTP ONLY restrictions to retrieve cookies from specified domains. It triggers via buttons with custom data attributes, supports filtering by domain and cookie name, and returns cookie data in JSON format through message event callbacks, ideal for automation tasks like daily check-ins.

metadata.name: hexo
metadata.description: A fast, simple & powerful blog framework, powered by Node.js.

summary.zh: Hexo 是一个基于 Node.js 的快速、简洁且强大的博客框架，支持 GitHub Flavored Markdown 和丰富的插件生态。提供一键部署到 GitHub Pages 等功能，拥有数百种主题与插件，适合快速搭建静态博客网站。
summary.en: Hexo is a fast, simple, and powerful blog framework powered by Node.js. It supports GitHub Flavored Markdown, offers one-command deployment to platforms like GitHub Pages, and features a rich ecosystem of themes and plugins for building static blogs efficiently.

metadata.name: django
metadata.description: The Web framework for perfectionists with deadlines.

summary.zh: Django 是一个高级 Python Web 框架，专为追求高效开发的完美主义者设计。它强调快速开发、简洁设计和安全部署，内置 ORM、认证、管理后台等强大功能，广泛用于构建可扩展的企业级 Web 应用。
summary.en: Django is a high-level Python web framework designed for perfectionists with deadlines. It promotes rapid development, clean architecture, and secure deployment, featuring built-in ORM, authentication, and admin interface for scalable enterprise applications.

metadata.name: GeekBlog
metadata.description: A full blog system based on Django

summary.zh: GeekBlog 是一个基于 Django 1.6.5 构建的全功能博客系统，支持 MySQL 与 MongoDB 双数据库存储，集成 UEditor 富文本编辑器、多说评论系统，并优化了 Django Admin 后台管理界面。具备响应式设计、静态资源压缩、RSS feed 和站点地图等特性，适合搭建个人或技术博客。
summary.en: GeekBlog is a full-featured blog system built on Django 1.6.5, supporting dual database storage with MySQL and MongoDB. It integrates UEditor for rich text editing, Duoshuo for comments, and enhances Django Admin with django-admin-tools. Features include responsive design, static asset optimization via Django Pipeline, RSS feeds, and sitemap generation.

metadata.name: django-guardian
metadata.description: Per object permissions for Django

summary.zh: django-guardian 是一个为 Django 提供对象级权限控制的扩展库，基于 Django 原生认证后端实现细粒度权限管理。支持用户和组对具体对象的操作权限分配，集成 Admin 后台并提供 GuardedModelAdmin，适用于需要精确权限控制的复杂应用场景。
summary.en: django-guardian is a Django extension that implements per-object permissions on top of Django's built-in authentication system. It enables fine-grained access control by allowing permissions to be assigned to users or groups for specific model instances, with seamless integration into Django Admin via GuardedModelAdmin.

metadata.name: mayblog
metadata.description: Yet another django based blog created in May 2015

summary.zh: MayBlog 是一个基于 Django 和 Bootstrap 构建的博客系统，支持多用户、多角色、Markdown 编辑、SEO 优化及 RESTful API 开发。项目提供 Docker 部署方案，包含多种环境配置，适合快速搭建个人或团队博客。
summary.en: MayBlog is a Django and Bootstrap-powered blog system featuring multi-user roles, Markdown support, SEO optimization, and RESTful API development. It offers Docker-based deployment with multiple configuration files, ideal for quickly setting up personal or team blogs.

metadata.name: django-pagination
metadata.description: A set of utilities for creating robust pagination tools throughout a django application.

summary.zh: 该项目提供了一套用于在 Django 应用中创建强大分页功能的工具集，支持灵活的分页逻辑与模板集成。原项目已停止维护，推荐使用其维护分支 dj-pagination。
summary.en: This project offers a set of utilities for implementing robust pagination in Django applications, enabling flexible pagination logic and template integration. The original project is no longer maintained; a maintained fork is available as dj-pagination.

metadata.name: django-bootstrap-pagination
metadata.description: Django template tag for rendering Page objects as Bootstrap pagination HTML

summary.zh: 该项目为 Django 提供 Bootstrap 风格的分页模板标签，支持将 Django Page 对象渲染为兼容 Bootstrap 2.x/3.x/4.x 的分页组件。支持自定义页码范围、首尾页链接、索引范围显示等功能，需配合 request 上下文处理器使用。项目已停止维护。
summary.en: This Django template tag library renders Django Page objects as Bootstrap-compatible pagination HTML, supporting Bootstrap 2.x to 4.x. It offers customizable page ranges, first/last links, index-based labels, and named URL resolution. Requires request context processor. The project is no longer maintained.

metadata.name: python_sdk
metadata.description: python_sdk for TencentYoutuyun-person-face-service

summary.zh: 腾讯云智能优图Python SDK，提供人脸检测、比对、识别、验证及个体管理等完整人脸识别服务接口，支持本地图片与URL输入，适用于身份认证、安防监控等场景，集成简便，依赖Requests库。
summary.en: Tencent YouTu Python SDK offers comprehensive facial recognition services including face detection, comparison, identification, verification, and person management. It supports both local images and URLs, ideal for identity authentication and security monitoring, with easy integration via the Requests library.

metadata.name: django-socketio
metadata.description: WebSockets for Django

summary.zh: django-socketio 是一个为 Django 框架提供 WebSocket 支持的 BSD 许可应用，基于 gevent-socketio 实现，支持 Socket.IO 协议。它集成了自动重载的 gevent pywsgi 服务器、频道订阅广播系统、类 signals 事件机制及客户端模板标签，简化了实时通信功能的开发。目前项目正升级以支持新版 socket.io 0.8。
summary.en: django-socketio is a BSD-licensed Django application enabling seamless WebSocket integration via Socket.IO and gevent. It provides a gevent-based WSGI server with auto-reload, channel-based pub/sub, signal-like event handling, out-of-band broadcasts, and built-in templates. Currently being updated to support socket.io 0.8.

metadata.name: DroidPlugin
metadata.description: A plugin framework on android,Run any third-party apk without installation, modification or repackage

summary.zh: DroidPlugin 是一个 Android 插件化框架，允许宿主应用无需安装、修改或重打包即可运行第三方 APK。支持 Android 2.3 及以上版本，实现插件与宿主的完全代码隔离，自动管理资源与进程，仅需一行代码即可集成，适用于多团队协作与动态模块加载场景。
summary.en: DroidPlugin is an Android plugin framework that enables running third-party APKs without installation, modification, or repackaging. It supports Android 2.3+, offers full code isolation, automatic resource and process management, and requires only one line of code to integrate, ideal for collaborative development and dynamic module loading.

metadata.name: weixin_sogou
metadata.description: 爬取微信公众号文章

summary.zh: 该项目用于爬取微信公众号文章，基于搜狗微信搜索接口实现账号信息、文章列表及内容的抓取。支持通过openid或链接获取数据，依赖requests、BeautifulSoup和Selenium处理反爬机制。目前因搜狗接口调整，服务稳定性受影响。
summary.en: This project crawls WeChat public account articles via Sogou's WeChat search API. It retrieves account info, article lists, and content using openid or URLs, with anti-scraping handled by requests, BeautifulSoup, and Selenium. Currently unstable due to Sogou API changes.

metadata.name: leanote
metadata.description: Not Just A Notepad! (golang + mongodb) http://leanote.org

summary.zh: Leanote 是一款开源的笔记与知识管理工具，基于 Golang 和 MongoDB 构建，支持富文本、Markdown 编辑及 Vim/Emacs 模式。提供笔记组织、标签管理、协作共享、博客发布等功能，并拥有跨平台客户端（Web、桌面、iOS、Android），支持自托管，兼顾隐私与灵活性。
summary.en: Leanote is an open-source note-taking and knowledge management platform built with Golang and MongoDB. It features rich-text and Markdown editing, Vim/Emacs modes, tagging, collaboration, blogging, and cross-platform clients. Self-hosting is supported, ensuring data privacy and flexibility.

metadata.name: hug
metadata.description: Embrace the APIs of the future. Hug aims to make developing APIs as simple as possible, but no simpler.

summary.zh: Hug 是一个专注于简化 Python API 开发的轻量级框架，基于高性能的 Falcon HTTP 库构建。它强调代码自文档化、极致简洁的语法和快速开发体验，支持类型注解、自动文档生成和内置测试工具，适用于构建现代 RESTful API。
summary.en: Hug is a lightweight Python framework designed to simplify API development by emphasizing clarity, self-documenting code, and performance. Built on Falcon, it enables rapid creation of RESTful APIs with minimal boilerplate, automatic documentation, and intuitive testing.

metadata.name: uliweb
metadata.description: Simple and easy use python web framework

summary.zh: Uliweb 是一个基于 Python 的全栈 Web 框架，强调可重用性、可配置性和可替换性。它采用 MVT 架构，支持模块化应用开发，集成了 Werkzeug、SQLAlchemy 等组件，并内置表单处理、I18n、缓存与会话管理功能，提供灵活的 URL 路由和模板系统，适合构建可维护的 Web 应用。
summary.en: Uliweb is a full-stack Python web framework focused on reusability, configurability, and replaceability. Built on Werkzeug and SQLAlchemy, it follows the MVT pattern, supports modular app development, and includes built-in features like form handling, I18n, caching, session management, flexible URL routing, and a powerful template engine for maintainable web applications.

metadata.name: splinter
metadata.description: splinter - python test framework for web applications

summary.zh: Splinter 是一个用于 Web 应用自动化的 Python 测试框架，提供简洁一致的 API，支持 Selenium、Django、Flask 等多种驱动。其设计直观易用，能快速实现浏览器交互自动化，同时允许随时调用底层工具（如 Selenium），适用于真实场景的端到端测试。
summary.en: Splinter is a Python testing framework for web application automation, offering a simple and consistent API. It supports multiple drivers like Selenium, Django, and Flask, enabling fast and reliable browser automation with intuitive syntax while allowing access to low-level tools when needed.

metadata.name: markyun
metadata.description: 在Github的学习片段

summary.zh: 该仓库是 markyun 的个人博客项目，托管于 GitHub Pages，主要记录前端开发学习笔记与技术见解。包含前端面试题合集、WebCIA 周刊及语雀知识库链接，内容聚焦 Web 开发实践与行业动态，适合开发者持续学习与知识沉淀。
summary.en: This repository hosts markyun's personal blog on GitHub Pages, documenting front-end development insights and learning notes. It includes a curated collection of front-end interview questions, WebCIA Weekly, and links to a Yuque knowledge base, aimed at helping developers stay updated with web technologies.

metadata.name: scrapy-redis
metadata.description: Redis-based components for Scrapy.

summary.zh: Scrapy-Redis 是一个基于 Redis 的 Scrapy 分布式扩展组件，支持多爬虫实例共享任务队列，实现分布式爬取与数据处理。提供调度器、去重过滤器、数据管道等即插即用模块，适用于大规模多域名爬虫场景。该分支版本新增对 JSON 格式数据的支持，可从 Redis 中提取 URL、meta 及表单数据并自动发起 FormRequest。
summary.en: Scrapy-Redis is a Redis-based distributed extension for Scrapy, enabling multiple spider instances to share a single Redis queue for distributed crawling and post-processing. It offers plug-and-play components like scheduler, duplication filter, and item pipeline, ideal for large-scale multi-domain scraping. This fork adds JSON data support in Redis, allowing extraction of URL, meta, and form data to generate FormRequests automatically.

metadata.name: casecode
metadata.description: DCloud开源项目集锦

summary.zh: DCloud开源项目集锦，涵盖资讯、电商、社交、工具、能力展示、常用模板及脚手架等多个类别，基于uni-app和MUI框架开发，提供新闻阅读、电商系统、社交应用、登录模板、图片App等完整案例，助力开发者快速构建跨平台移动应用。
summary.en: DCloud's collection of open-source projects spans categories like news, e-commerce, social, tools, demos, templates, and scaffolds, built with uni-app and MUI. It includes full-featured apps such as news readers, e-commerce systems, social platforms, login templates, and image apps, enabling rapid cross-platform mobile development.

metadata.name: django-simple-avatar
metadata.description: A reusable django application for handling Avatars.

summary.zh: django-simple-avatar 是一个可复用的 Django 应用，用于管理用户头像。支持在用户未上传头像时自动回退至 Gravatar，并能自动生成缩略图并存储于默认文件存储后端，便于后续调用。
summary.en: django-simple-avatar is a reusable Django app for managing user avatars. It falls back to Gravatar when no local avatar exists, automatically generates thumbnails, and stores them using the default file storage backend for efficient retrieval.

metadata.name: django-avatar
metadata.description: MOVED TO https://github.com/jezdez/django-avatar

summary.zh: 该项目原为 Django 头像管理应用，现已迁移至新仓库。原仓库已不再维护，建议用户访问新地址获取最新代码与文档。
summary.en: This repository was a Django avatar management application, now moved to a new location. The original repo is outdated; users should visit the new repository for up-to-date code and documentation.

metadata.name: django-userena
metadata.description: Accounts for Django made beautifully simple

summary.zh: Django Userena 是一个为 Django 项目提供完整账户管理功能的应用，支持用户注册、激活、消息通知等，界面简洁美观，高度可定制，采用 BSD 许可，可免费用于商业项目。
summary.en: Django Userena is a Django app offering full account management including signup, activation, and messaging. It features a clean interface, high customizability, and is BSD-licensed for free commercial use.

metadata.name: materialize
metadata.description: Materialize, a CSS Framework based on Material Design

summary.zh: MaterializeCSS 是一个基于 Google Material Design 规范的前端 CSS 框架，提供响应式布局、组件库和动画效果，帮助开发者快速构建现代化网页界面。支持主流浏览器，可通过 npm、CDN 或源码集成使用。
summary.en: MaterializeCSS is a front-end CSS framework based on Google's Material Design guidelines, offering responsive layouts, UI components, and animations to streamline modern web development. It supports major browsers and can be integrated via npm, CDN, or source code.

metadata.name: mui
metadata.description: Lightweight CSS framework

summary.zh: MUI 是一个轻量级 CSS 框架，严格遵循 Google Material Design 规范。其核心优势在于极小的体积（CSS 仅 6.6K，JS 5.4K，gzip 后），无外部依赖，支持响应式网格、自定义主题色，并包含用于 HTML 邮件样式的专用库，适合快速构建现代、移动友好的 Web 界面。
summary.en: MUI is a lightweight CSS framework adhering to Google's Material Design guidelines. It features a tiny footprint (6.6K CSS, 5.4K JS gzipped), zero external dependencies, responsive grid system, customizable color themes, and includes an email styling library for HTML emails, ideal for fast, modern web development.

metadata.name: python3-cookbook
metadata.description: 《Python Cookbook》 3rd Edition Translation

summary.zh: 《Python Cookbook》第3版中文翻译项目，完整基于Python 3.6，涵盖高级编程技巧与实用解决方案。使用reStructuredText编写，托管于Read the Docs，提供在线阅读与PDF下载。由David Beazley原著，译者历时两年完成，助力Python 3普及。
summary.en: Chinese translation of 'Python Cookbook' 3rd Edition, fully based on Python 3.6, covering advanced programming techniques and practical solutions. Written in reStructuredText, hosted on Read the Docs with online reading and PDF downloads. Translated over two years to promote Python 3 adoption.

metadata.name: rsted
metadata.description: [UNMAINTAINED] Online reStructuredText editor

summary.zh: rsted 是一个基于 Flask 的在线 reStructuredText 编辑器，可将 reStructuredText 实时转换为 HTML。项目依赖 Docutils 的 rst2html 工具，支持本地运行和 Docker 部署，适合需要轻量级文档编辑与预览的场景。
summary.en: rsted is a Flask-based online editor for reStructuredText that converts RST to HTML in real time. It relies on Docutils' rst2html, supports local execution and Docker deployment, ideal for lightweight document editing and previewing.

metadata.name: django-celery
metadata.description: Old Celery integration project for Django

summary.zh: django-celery 是 Celery 与 Django 的旧版集成项目，支持 Celery v3.x 至 v4.x，提供 Django ORM 结果后端、Admin 界面集成及任务模块自动发现功能。需通过 manage.py 调用 Celery 命令，配置存储于 settings.py。注意：仅在使用 Django 结果后端和 Admin 集成时需要，新项目建议参考官方最新 Django 集成文档。
summary.en: django-celery is a legacy integration of Celery with Django, supporting Celery v3.x to v4.x. It enables Django ORM as result backend, Admin integration, and auto-discovery of task modules. Commands are invoked via manage.py, with configuration in settings.py. Note: Only required for Django result backend and Admin integration; new projects should follow the official Celery Django guide.

summary.zh: 这是一个关于 Android Design Support Library 的完整教程项目，提供60分钟分步教学，帮助开发者掌握 Material Design 组件的使用。项目包含示例代码与目标效果演示，适合 Android 开发者学习现代 UI 设计实践。
summary.en: This is a comprehensive tutorial project on Android Design Support Library, offering a 60-minute step-by-step guide to help developers master Material Design components. It includes sample code and target UI demonstrations, ideal for Android developers learning modern UI design practices.

metadata.name: SwiftGuide
metadata.description: Swift Featured Projects in brain Mapping

summary.zh: 该项目是 Swift 开源项目的精选集合，专注于整理和分类高质量的 Swift 开源项目，涵盖应用架构、开发工具及核心库。内容以思维导图形式呈现，帮助开发者快速掌握 Swift 生态中的关键技术资源，适用于进阶学习与项目选型。
summary.en: This repository curates high-quality Swift open-source projects, focusing on application architecture, development tools, and core libraries. Presented primarily through mind maps, it helps developers efficiently explore the Swift ecosystem and select suitable resources for advanced development.

metadata.name: echarts
metadata.description: Apache ECharts is a powerful, interactive charting and data visualization library for browser

summary.zh: Apache ECharts 是一个免费、强大的交互式图表与数据可视化库，基于纯 JavaScript 和轻量级 Canvas 库 zrender 构建，支持高度定制化图表，适用于商业产品。提供丰富的图表类型、流畅的交互体验和完善的文档，广泛应用于 Web 数据展示场景。
summary.en: Apache ECharts is a free, powerful, and interactive charting and data visualization library built with pure JavaScript and the lightweight zrender canvas engine. It enables developers to create highly customizable, intuitive charts for commercial web applications with rich interactivity and comprehensive documentation.

metadata.name: django-brake
metadata.description: Django Brake - a versatile ratelimiting app for Django.

summary.zh: Django Brake 是一个用于 Django 框架的灵活限流应用，支持基于 IP 或请求字段（GET/POST）进行访问频率控制。提供装饰器方式集成，可设置多时间阈值、多端点独立限流，并支持请求标记或 403 拦截。适用于登录防护、API 防刷等场景，兼容 Django Ratelimit API。
summary.en: Django Brake is a flexible rate-limiting app for Django that supports throttling based on IP or request fields (GET/POST). It offers a decorator-based integration with configurable time thresholds, multiple buckets, and options to block or annotate requests. Ideal for login protection and API abuse prevention, while maintaining API compatibility with Django Ratelimit.

metadata.name: django-ratelimit
metadata.description: Cache-based rate-limiting for Django

summary.zh: Django Ratelimit 是一个基于缓存的 Django 视图限流工具，通过装饰器实现对请求频率的控制。支持按 IP 地址或请求中的 GET/POST 字段进行限流，适用于防止滥用和保护 API 接口，配置简单且与 Django 深度集成。
summary.en: Django Ratelimit is a cache-based rate-limiting tool for Django views using a decorator. It supports limiting by IP address or request fields (GET/POST), ideal for preventing abuse and protecting APIs, with simple configuration and deep Django integration.

metadata.name: typo.css
metadata.description: 中文网页重设与排版：一致化浏览器排版效果，构建最适合中文阅读的网页排版

summary.zh: typo.css 是一个专为中文网页设计的排版重置与优化样式库，旨在统一浏览器默认样式，提升中文阅读体验。它提供干净的 reset 基础，并通过 .typo 类实现优雅的段落、列表、表格等排版效果，支持专名号、着重号等中文特有样式，适配桌面与移动端。
summary.en: typo.css is a CSS library designed for Chinese web typography, aiming to normalize browser rendering and enhance readability. It offers a clean reset and elegant styling via the .typo class, supporting Chinese-specific features like proper nouns and emphasis marks, with responsive support for desktop and mobile.

metadata.name: github-cheat-sheet
metadata.description: A list of cool features of Git and GitHub.

summary.zh: 该项目整理了 Git 和 GitHub 的实用隐藏功能与技巧，涵盖代码管理、协作流程、Markdown 增强、快捷键、CI 集成等场景，源自知名技术演讲，适合开发者提升效率。
summary.en: This repo compiles hidden and powerful features of Git and GitHub, including shortcuts, diff tricks, issue automation, and Markdown enhancements, inspired by Zach Holman's talks to boost developer productivity.

metadata.name: DeerResume
metadata.description: MarkDown在线简历工具，可在线预览、编辑和生成PDF。[此项目已不再维护，建议使用 cv.ftqq.com 替代 ]

summary.zh: DeerResume 是一款基于 Markdown 的在线简历工具，支持实时编辑、预览、密码保护和一键生成 PDF。用户可自由定制样式并部署于静态服务器或 GitHub Pages，适合技术求职者快速创建专业简历。项目已停止维护，推荐使用 cv.ftqq.com 替代。
summary.en: DeerResume is a Markdown-based online resume tool enabling real-time editing, preview, password protection, and PDF export. It allows custom styling and deployment on static servers or GitHub Pages, ideal for developers to create professional resumes quickly. The project is no longer maintained; cv.ftqq.com is recommended as an alternative.

metadata.name: ResumeSample
metadata.description: Resume template for Chinese programmers . 程序员简历模板系列。包括PHP程序员简历模板、iOS程序员简历模板、Android程序员简历模板、Web前端程序员简历模板、Java程序员简历模板、C/C++程序员简历模板、NodeJS程序员简历模板、架构师简历模板以及通用程序员简历模板

summary.zh: 该项目为中文程序员提供多技术栈简历模板，涵盖PHP、iOS、Android、Web前端、Java、C/C++、Node.js及架构师等方向，并配套在线Markdown编辑工具与写作教程，助力技术人才高效打造专业简历。
summary.en: This repository offers resume templates tailored for Chinese programmers across multiple tech stacks including PHP, iOS, Android, Web frontend, Java, C/C++, Node.js, and architect roles, complemented by an online Markdown editor and resume writing guide.

metadata.name: free-programming-books-zh_CN
metadata.description: :books: 免费的计算机编程类中文书籍，欢迎投稿

summary.zh: 该项目是一个免费的中文编程书籍索引，涵盖操作系统、编程语言、算法、Web开发等多个领域，提供高质量的开源电子书和教程链接。内容由社区维护，支持用户通过PR贡献资源，是中文开发者学习计算机技术的宝贵资料库。
summary.en: This repository is a curated index of free Chinese programming books, covering topics like operating systems, programming languages, algorithms, and web development. It offers open-source e-books and tutorials, maintained by the community with PR contributions, serving as a valuable resource for Chinese-speaking developers.

metadata.name: jquery-mobile-flat-ui-theme
metadata.description: jQuery Mobile Flat UI Theme

summary.zh: 该项目是为 jQuery Mobile 开发的扁平化 UI 主题，基于 Flat-UI 设计规范，提供现代化的视觉样式。支持 jQuery Mobile 1.3.x 和 1.4 版本，可通过 Stylus 和 Grunt 自定义主题配色与样式，适用于移动端 Web 应用界面美化。
summary.en: A flat UI theme for jQuery Mobile based on Flat-UI design, offering modern visual styles. Supports jQuery Mobile 1.3.x and 1.4, with customizable swatches via Stylus and Grunt, ideal for enhancing mobile web app interfaces.

metadata.name: Jndroid.js
metadata.description: Building WebApp in Android way.

summary.zh: Jndroid.js 是一款让开发者以 Android 原生开发方式构建 WebApp 的 JavaScript 框架，提供类似 Android 的 UI 组件（如 TextView）和视图管理机制（如 setContentView），简化跨平台 Web 应用开发流程，适合熟悉 Android 开发的前端工程师快速上手。
summary.en: Jndroid.js is a JavaScript framework that enables developers to build WebApps using an Android-like development approach, offering familiar UI components such as TextView and view management methods like setContentView, streamlining cross-platform web development for Android developers.

metadata.name: jQuery-rwdImageMaps
metadata.description: Responsive Image Maps jQuery Plugin

summary.zh: jQuery RWD Image Maps 是一个轻量级 jQuery 插件，用于在响应式网页中自动调整图像映射（image map）的坐标区域，使其适配不同屏幕尺寸。通过在加载和窗口缩放时重新计算坐标，确保点击区域始终与图像实际大小匹配，提升移动端用户体验。
summary.en: jQuery RWD Image Maps is a lightweight plugin that enables responsive image maps by dynamically recalculating area coordinates on load and window resize. It ensures clickable regions align with the actual image dimensions across devices, enhancing usability in responsive web designs.

metadata.name: gollum
metadata.description: A simple, Git-powered wiki with a local frontend and support for many kinds of markup and content.

summary.zh: Gollum 是一个基于 Git 的轻量级 Wiki 系统，支持多种标记语言（如 Markdown、AsciiDoc）和本地或 Web 界面编辑。它兼容 GitHub/GitLab Wiki，提供版本控制、数学公式、图表（Mermaid/PlantUML）、引用管理等功能，适合技术文档协作与知识管理。
summary.en: Gollum is a Git-based wiki system supporting multiple markup languages and local or web-based editing. It integrates with GitHub/GitLab wikis, offers version control, math rendering, diagrams via Mermaid/PlantUML, citations, and more—ideal for technical documentation and collaborative knowledge management.

metadata.name: jieba
metadata.description: 结巴中文分词

summary.zh: 结巴分词（jieba）是Python中最流行的中文分词库，支持精确、全、搜索引擎及Paddle四种分词模式，具备新词识别、自定义词典、繁体分词等功能。基于前缀词典与动态规划实现高效分词，结合HMM模型处理未登录词，适用于文本分析、搜索引擎等场景。
summary.en: Jieba is the most popular Chinese text segmentation library in Python, supporting four modes: precise, full, search engine, and Paddle. It features new word recognition, custom dictionaries, and traditional Chinese support. Built on prefix dictionaries and dynamic programming with HMM for unknown words, it's ideal for NLP and search applications.

metadata.name: python-qrcode
metadata.description: Python QR Code image generator

summary.zh: 这是一个纯 Python 编写的二维码生成库，支持生成 PNG、SVG 等多种格式的二维码图像。提供命令行工具和简洁的 API 接口，可自定义尺寸、颜色、纠错等级等参数，适用于需要程序化生成二维码的各类应用场景。
summary.en: A pure Python QR code generator that supports creating QR codes in PNG and SVG formats. It offers both a command-line tool and a simple API, allowing customization of size, colors, error correction levels, and more for programmatic QR code generation.

metadata.name: cow
metadata.description: HTTP proxy written in Go. COW can automatically identify blocked sites and use parent proxies to access.

summary.zh: COW 是一款用 Go 编写的智能 HTTP 代理工具，能自动识别被封锁网站并仅对这些站点通过二级代理（如 SOCKS5、HTTP、Shadowsocks 或 COW 自身）访问，直连网站则本地访问以提升速度。支持生成 PAC 文件优化性能，适用于桌面与移动设备，部署灵活，广泛用于突破网络限制。
summary.en: COW is a Go-based HTTP proxy that automatically detects blocked websites and routes only those through parent proxies (e.g., SOCKS5, HTTP, Shadowsocks), while allowing direct access to unblocked sites for better speed. It generates PAC files for performance optimization and supports multiple proxy types, making it ideal for bypassing censorship on desktops and mobile devices.

metadata.name: MPAndroidChart
metadata.description: A powerful 🚀 Android chart view / graph view library, supporting line- bar- pie- radar- bubble- and candlestick charts as well as scaling, panning and animations.

summary.zh: MPAndroidChart 是一款功能强大且易于使用的 Android 图表库，支持折线图、柱状图、饼图、雷达图、气泡图和蜡烛图等多种类型，提供缩放、平移和动画等交互功能，适用于数据可视化场景。
summary.en: MPAndroidChart is a powerful and easy-to-use charting library for Android, supporting line, bar, pie, radar, bubble, and candlestick charts with features like scaling, panning, and animations for rich data visualization.

metadata.name: bootstrap-star-rating
metadata.description: A simple yet powerful JQuery star rating plugin with fractional rating support.

summary.zh: 这是一个基于 jQuery 和 Bootstrap 的星级评分插件，支持分数评分、RTL 布局及纯 CSS3 渲染。无需图片即可实现矢量星级显示，兼容 Bootstrap 3-5，支持 FontAwesome 图标和 Unicode 符号，适用于表单评分场景。
summary.en: A jQuery-based star rating plugin for Bootstrap with fractional rating, RTL support, and pure CSS3 rendering. It uses scalable vector icons without images, supports FontAwesome and Unicode symbols, and is compatible with Bootstrap 3–5 for form-based rating inputs.

metadata.name: v2ex-android
metadata.description: 爱V2EX（原掌上V2EX）

summary.zh: V2EX-android 是一款非官方的 V2EX 社区 Android 客户端，支持话题浏览、节点搜索、用户资料查看、话题创建与回复、未读提醒及分页加载等功能，提供流畅的滑动手势操作体验，适用于 Android 平台日常社区互动。
summary.en: V2EX-android is an unofficial Android client for the V2EX community, featuring topic browsing, node search, user profiles, topic creation and replies, unread notifications, pagination, and swipe navigation, offering a smooth mobile interaction experience.

metadata.name: AndroidAssetStudio
metadata.description: A set of web-based tools for generating graphics and other assets that would eventually be in an Android application's res/ directory.

summary.zh: Android Asset Studio 是一款基于网页的工具集，用于生成 Android 应用 res/ 目录所需的图形资源，包括启动图标、操作栏图标、通知图标等。项目已不再维护，建议使用 icon.kitchen 或 Android Studio 内置工具替代。
summary.en: Android Asset Studio is a web-based toolset for generating graphics and assets for Android app res/ directories, including launcher, action bar, and notification icons. It is no longer maintained; users are advised to switch to icon.kitchen or Android Studio's built-in tools.

metadata.name: PyTime
metadata.description: PyTime is an easy-use Python module which aims to operate date/time/datetime by string.

summary.zh: PyTime 是一个简洁易用的 Python 时间处理模块，支持通过自然语言字符串操作日期与时间。它提供灵活的日期解析、时间计算（如前后偏移）、周月区间获取、节日查询及日期范围生成等功能，兼容非标准格式输入，适用于日志分析、脚本调度等场景。
summary.en: PyTime is a user-friendly Python module for date/time manipulation using natural language strings. It supports parsing irregular datetime formats, calculating time deltas, retrieving week/month ranges, querying holidays, and generating date sequences, making it ideal for log analysis and automation scripts.

metadata.name: layer
metadata.description: 丰富多样的 Web 弹出层组件，可轻松实现 Alert/Confirm/Prompt/ 普通提示/页面区块/iframe/tips等等几乎所有的弹出交互。目前已成为最多人使用的弹层解决方案

summary.zh: layer 是一款功能强大的 Web 弹出层组件，支持 Alert、Confirm、Prompt、iframe、提示框等多种交互形式，兼容 IE6 及以上浏览器，以轻量、高性能和易用性著称，曾是国内最流行的弹层解决方案，现已集成至 Layui 框架中。
summary.en: layer is a versatile web popup layer component supporting Alert, Confirm, Prompt, iframe, tooltips, and more. Known for its lightweight, high performance, and compatibility with IE6+, it was once the most popular modal solution in China and is now integrated into the Layui framework.

metadata.name: lUpload
metadata.description: :zap: :rocket:This is a upload plug-ins

summary.zh: lUpload 是一款基于 jQuery 开发的轻量级文件上传插件，支持拖拽、粘贴、选择三种上传方式，提供实时上传进度、速度显示及自定义文件类型缩略图功能，支持同步队列与异步并发上传模式，适用于需多样化上传交互的前端场景。
summary.en: lUpload is a lightweight jQuery-based file upload plugin supporting drag-and-drop, paste, and file selection uploads. It features real-time progress tracking, upload speed display, custom thumbnails by file type, and both synchronous (queued) and asynchronous upload modes, ideal for rich front-end upload interactions.

summary.zh: 该仓库为 Django 项目提供基于 Bootstrap 3 的日期时间选择器组件，集成 Eonasdan 的 datetimepicker 和 moment.js，支持灵活配置日期时间格式与本地化。通过自定义 Widget 实现与 Django 表单无缝对接，简化前端时间输入交互。
summary.en: This repository provides a Bootstrap 3-based datetime picker widget for Django, integrating Eonasdan's datetimepicker and moment.js. It supports flexible date/time formatting and localization, seamlessly integrating with Django forms via a custom widget to enhance user input experience.

metadata.name: django-taggit
metadata.description: Simple tagging for django

summary.zh: django-taggit 是一个为 Django 框架设计的轻量级标签管理库，通过简单的 TaggableManager 字段即可为模型添加灵活的标签功能，支持标签的增删查改，并自动集成到 Django 表单与后台管理界面，适用于内容分类、资源标记等场景。
summary.en: django-taggit is a lightweight tagging library for Django that enables easy tagging of models via TaggableManager. It supports adding, removing, and querying tags, with automatic integration into Django forms and admin interface, ideal for content categorization and resource labeling.

metadata.name: python-user-agents
metadata.description: A Python library that provides an easy way to identify devices like mobile phones, tablets and their capabilities by parsing (browser) user agent strings.

summary.zh: Python User Agents 是一个用于解析浏览器 User Agent 字符串的轻量级库，可准确识别设备类型（手机、平板、PC）、操作系统、浏览器及触控能力。基于 ua-parser 实现高效解析，支持检测移动设备、平板、桌面系统及爬虫，适用于用户行为分析、响应式适配等场景。
summary.en: Python User Agents is a lightweight library for parsing browser user agent strings to reliably identify device types (mobile, tablet, PC), operating systems, browsers, and touch capabilities. Built on ua-parser, it supports detection of mobile devices, tablets, desktops, and bots, ideal for analytics and responsive design.

metadata.name: Startup-Game
metadata.description: 创业者的游戏： 中关村启示录

summary.zh: 《创业者的游戏：中关村启示录》是一款基于 Ruby 开发的 CLI 模拟经营游戏，玩家扮演创业者，在中关村环境中管理团队、推进项目、应对随机事件。支持自定义程序员角色（Coder/ProductManager），通过编写 Ruby 类实现个性化行为逻辑，具备单元测试、作弊指令与动态员工展示功能，鼓励社区协作开发。
summary.en: Startup-Game is a Ruby-based CLI simulation where players manage a startup in Zhongguancun, hiring coders, handling projects, and responding to random events. It supports custom Coder/ProductManager roles via Ruby classes, includes unit tests, cheat mode, and dynamic staff display, fostering open community contributions through PRs.

metadata.name: useragent.js
metadata.description: A User-agent analyze project.

summary.zh: useragent.js 是一个轻量级的 User-Agent 解析库，支持 Node.js、浏览器、ASP 等多种环境。可精准识别浏览器、操作系统、设备品牌与型号，并提供结构化输出和图标映射，适用于访问统计、设备适配等场景。
summary.en: useragent.js is a lightweight User-Agent parsing library compatible with Node.js, browsers, ASP, and more. It accurately identifies browsers, OS, device brands, and models, returning structured data with icon mappings for analytics and device adaptation.

metadata.name: xadmin
metadata.description: Drop-in replacement of Django admin comes with lots of goodies, fully extensible with plugin support, pretty UI based on Twitter Bootstrap.

summary.zh: Xadmin 是 Django 管理后台的即插即用替代方案，基于 Twitter Bootstrap 提供美观的 UI，支持插件扩展、数据导出（xls/csv/xml/json）、仪表盘小部件、内联编辑及高级筛选功能，兼容 Django 1.9+，适用于快速构建功能丰富的后台管理系统。
summary.en: Xadmin is a drop-in replacement for Django admin with a modern UI based on Twitter Bootstrap. It offers plugin extensibility, advanced filtering, data export in multiple formats (xls/csv/xml/json), dashboard widgets, inline editing, and full CRUD support, ideal for building powerful admin interfaces on Django 1.9+.

metadata.name: django_selfblog
metadata.description: Another opensource blog system  based on Django1.6

summary.zh: 基于Django 1.6开发的开源博客系统，支持Markdown与reStructuredText写作，集成xadmin后台、多说评论、RSS及微信自动回复，提供Ansible一键部署脚本，适合个人技术博客搭建与实践Django Class-Based View。
summary.en: An open-source blog system built on Django 1.6, supporting Markdown and reStructuredText content creation, with xadmin backend, Duoshuo comments, RSS, WeChat auto-reply, and Ansible-based one-click deployment—ideal for personal blogs and Django CBV practice.

metadata.name: wechat-bot
metadata.description: A robot of wechat based on python (Not maintained)

summary.zh: 这是一个基于 Python 开发的微信机器人项目，支持通过配置文件自定义端口、Token 和用户名等参数，并集成了 SimSimi 对话接口。项目提供简单的启动脚本，适用于构建自动化微信消息回复服务，但目前已停止维护。
summary.en: A Python-based WeChat robot that supports automated messaging through configurable settings like port, token, and username. It integrates with SimSimi for chat responses and includes a simple startup script. Suitable for building auto-reply services, though the project is no longer maintained.

metadata.name: WeRoBot
metadata.description: WeRoBot 是一个微信公众号开发框架

summary.zh: WeRoBot 是一个基于 Python 的微信公众号开发框架，采用 MIT 协议开源。它简化了微信消息处理流程，支持快速搭建自动回复、事件响应等公众号功能，提供清晰的装饰器语法和完整的文档支持，适合开发者快速实现微信服务号与订阅号的业务逻辑。
summary.en: WeRoBot is a Python-based framework for developing WeChat Official Accounts, released under the MIT license. It simplifies message handling with clean decorator syntax, enabling rapid implementation of auto-replies and event responses, ideal for building service and subscription account functionalities efficiently.

metadata.name: v2ex-material-theme
metadata.description: v2ex 的 Material design 风格 CSS

summary.zh: 该项目为 V2EX 论坛提供 Material Design 风格的 CSS 主题，通过自定义 CSS 注入实现界面美化，提升视觉体验与现代感。适用于 Chrome 浏览器用户，支持一键导入使用。
summary.en: This project provides a Material Design-styled CSS theme for V2EX, enhancing the forum's visual experience with modern UI aesthetics. It supports easy integration via custom CSS in Chrome and offers a clean, refreshed interface.

metadata.name: django-mobile
metadata.description: Detect mobile browsers and serve different template flavours to them.

summary.zh: django-mobile 是一个 Django 扩展，用于自动检测移动设备浏览器，并根据设备类型动态切换模板版本（如 mobile/ 或 full/）。通过中间件识别用户偏好，模板加载器透明选择对应模板，支持多终端适配，同时保持视图逻辑不变，提升移动端用户体验。
summary.en: django-mobile is a Django extension that detects mobile browsers and dynamically switches template versions (e.g., mobile/ or full/) based on device type. It uses middleware to identify user preferences and a template loader to transparently select appropriate templates, enabling multi-device adaptation while keeping view logic unchanged.

metadata.name: bootstrap-table
metadata.description: An extended table for integration with some of the most widely used CSS frameworks. (Supports Bootstrap, Semantic UI, Bulma, Material Design, Foundation, Vue.js)

summary.zh: Bootstrap Table 是一个功能强大的可扩展表格插件，专为 Twitter Bootstrap 设计，支持响应式布局、列排序、分页、复选框/单选、AJAX 数据加载、固定表头、卡片视图等特性，并可集成 Semantic UI、Bulma、Material Design 等主流 CSS 框架，适用于复杂数据展示场景。
summary.en: Bootstrap Table is a powerful, extensible table plugin designed for Twitter Bootstrap, featuring responsive design, column sorting, pagination, row selection, AJAX data loading, fixed headers, card view, and compatibility with Semantic UI, Bulma, Material Design, and other major CSS frameworks for rich data presentation.

metadata.name: django-emoji
metadata.description: A simple django app to use emojis on your website ⛺

summary.zh: django-emoji 是一个简单的 Django 应用，用于在网站中自动将文本中的表情符号标记（如 :dog:）和 Unicode 字符（如 ✌️）转换为对应的表情图片。它基于 GitHub 的 gemoji 项目，支持模板过滤器、自动转义和 JSON 接口，适用于 Django 1.5-1.9，提供高度可配置的图片标签生成与 XSS 防护。
summary.en: django-emoji is a lightweight Django app that converts emoji shortcodes (e.g., :dog:) and Unicode characters (e.g., ✌️) into emoji images. Built on GitHub's gemoji, it offers template filters, auto-escaping for XSS protection, a JSON API, and customizable image rendering, supporting Django 1.5–1.9.

metadata.name: react-markplus
metadata.description: A React markdown editor and previewer.

summary.zh: MarkPlus 是一个功能丰富的 React Markdown 编辑器与预览组件，支持实时编辑、双向预览、主题切换（亮色/暗色/自动）、可定制工具栏及多种语法扩展（如数学公式、流程图、FontAwesome 图标等）。适用于内容创作、文档编辑和开发者集成场景。
summary.en: MarkPlus is a feature-rich React Markdown editor and previewer with real-time editing, dual-pane preview, theme switching (light/dark/auto), customizable toolbar, and extended syntax support including math formulas, flowcharts, and FontAwesome icons. Ideal for content creation and developer integration.

metadata.name: dannysite.com
metadata.description: Source code to dannysite.com

summary.zh: DannySite 是一个基于 Django 框架开发的个人网站项目，包含博客、图片展示、用户账户管理等功能，支持标签分类、RSS 订阅、富文本编辑（UEditor）等特性。项目采用第三方模块如 django-simple-captcha 和定制版 DjangoUeditor，目前部分功能如邮件邀请注册和模板尚未完善。
summary.en: DannySite is a personal website built with Django, featuring blog posts, image galleries, and user account management. It supports tagging, RSS feeds, and rich text editing via UEditor. Third-party packages like django-simple-captcha are used, though some features such as email invitations and templates remain incomplete.

metadata.name: v2ex.k
metadata.description: Get a better UI of V2EX.

summary.zh: v2ex.k 是一款 V2EX 网站界面增强插件，提供全新配色、左侧导航栏优化与快速阅读模式，支持主题切换、URL 同步、免刷新回复提醒及全键盘操作，显著提升浏览效率与视觉体验。
summary.en: v2ex.k is a UI enhancement plugin for V2EX, featuring a refreshed color scheme, enhanced sidebar navigation, and a quick-read mode. It supports theme switching, URL synchronization, real-time reply notifications, and full keyboard navigation for improved browsing efficiency.

metadata.name: hexo-qiniu-sync
metadata.description: Hexo七牛同步插件

summary.zh: hexo-qiniu-sync 是一个 Hexo 静态博客插件，用于自动将本地静态资源（图片、JS、CSS）同步至七牛云存储，支持离线模式、文件更新检测、自定义路径及图片处理（如缩略图、水印）。通过配置 _config.yml 实现无缝集成，提升博客部署效率与资源管理能力。
summary.en: hexo-qiniu-sync is a Hexo plugin that automatically syncs local static assets (images, JS, CSS) to Qiniu Cloud Storage. It supports offline mode, file change detection, custom paths, and image processing (e.g., thumbnails, watermarks). Seamlessly integrated via _config.yml, it enhances blog deployment and asset management efficiency.

metadata.name: v2ex-daily-android
metadata.description: A v2ex client on android platform.(deprecated)

summary.zh: 这是一个已停止维护的 Android 平台 V2EX 客户端，支持浏览主题、搜索节点和查看用户信息，界面遵循 Android 设计规范。提供 APK 下载及 Google Play 链接，包含多个功能截图展示。
summary.en: A deprecated Android client for V2EX, supporting topic browsing, node search, and user profiles with Android Design guidelines. Includes APK download, Google Play link, and multiple UI screenshots.

metadata.name: gitbook
metadata.description: The open source frontend for GitBook doc sites

summary.zh: GitBook 是一个开源的前端渲染引擎，用于构建和展示技术文档网站。基于 Next.js 构建，支持本地开发、自定义主题与多语言翻译，适用于团队协作的知识管理。项目采用 GNU GPLv3 许可，鼓励社区贡献与二次开发。
summary.en: GitBook is an open-source frontend rendering engine for technical documentation sites, built on Next.js. It supports local development, custom theming, and multilingual UI, enabling teams to manage and publish knowledge efficiently under GNU GPLv3 license.

metadata.name: android-open-project
metadata.description: A categorized collection of Android Open Source Projects,  More powerful web version:

summary.zh: 该项目是 Android 开源项目的分类汇总，收录超过250个优质开源项目，涵盖个性化控件、工具库、优秀项目、开发测试工具等类别。提供网页版 timeshining.com 支持项目搜索与推送，并配套开发助手 App 实现反编译、布局查看、屏幕取色等实用功能，助力 Android 开发者高效学习与开发。
summary.en: This project is a categorized collection of over 250 high-quality Android open-source projects, including custom UI components, utility libraries, and development tools. It features a web platform (timeshining.com) for searching and tracking new projects, along with a companion 'Developer Assistant' app offering APK decompilation, layout inspection, color picker, and more.

metadata.name: android-training-course-in-chinese
metadata.description: Android官方培训课程中文版

summary.zh: 该项目是Google官方Android培训课程的开源中文翻译版本，涵盖Android应用开发的核心知识体系，由社区协作完成。内容权威、结构清晰，适合初学者与进阶开发者系统学习，提供在线阅读与GitHub协作纠错机制，持续更新至v0.9.7。
summary.en: This project is a community-translated Chinese version of Google's official Android Training courses, providing authoritative, well-structured learning materials for Android app development. It supports online reading and collaborative editing via GitHub, with updates up to v0.9.7, ideal for both beginners and intermediate developers.

metadata.name: django-address
metadata.description: A Django address model and field. Addresses may be specified by address components or by performing an automatic Google Maps lookup.

summary.zh: Django Address 是一个用于存储和检索邮政地址的 Django 模型库，支持通过地址组件或 Google Maps API 自动补全地址。它包含 Country、State、Locality 和 Address 四个模型，并提供 AddressField 简化地址字段的使用，适用于需要灵活处理不完整地址的应用场景。
summary.en: Django Address is a Django model library for storing and retrieving postal addresses, supporting input via address components or Google Maps API auto-completion. It includes Country, State, Locality, and Address models, with an AddressField to simplify usage, ideal for handling incomplete or ambiguous addresses.

metadata.name: djangoBaidusitemap
metadata.description: django动态生成百度地图。

summary.zh: 该项目是基于Django的百度站点地图动态生成工具，兼容Django原生sitemap机制，支持自定义内容模型、更新频率与优先级，并可生成HTML5、WML、XHTML多版本链接，适用于提升百度搜索引擎对动态内容的抓取效率。
summary.en: This project is a Django-based dynamic Baidu sitemap generator, compatible with Django's native sitemap framework. It supports custom content models, update frequency, priority settings, and generates multi-format URLs (HTML5, WML, XHTML), enhancing Baidu's crawling efficiency for dynamic content.

metadata.name: wechat
metadata.description: 微信公共平台消息接口服务中间件

summary.zh: 这是一个用于微信公众平台的 Node.js 消息接口中间件，支持自动回复文本、图片、语音、视频、音乐及图文消息，提供会话管理和等待回复功能，适用于问卷调查、智能客服等场景，兼容 Express/Koa 框架。
summary.en: A Node.js middleware for WeChat public platform message interface, supporting auto-reply with text, image, voice, video, music, and rich media messages. It includes session support and waiting reply features, ideal for surveys and intelligent customer service, compatible with Express/Koa.

metadata.name: foundation-sites
metadata.description: The most advanced responsive front-end framework in the world. Quickly create prototypes and production code for sites that work on any kind of device.

summary.zh: Foundation 是全球最先进的响应式前端框架，支持快速构建适配任何设备的网站和应用。提供高度可定制的响应式网格、丰富的 Sass 混合库、常用 JavaScript 插件及完整的无障碍访问支持，适用于从原型设计到生产环境的开发流程。
summary.en: Foundation is the world's most advanced responsive front-end framework, enabling rapid development of sites and apps that work seamlessly across all devices. It features a customizable responsive grid, extensive Sass mixins, JavaScript plugins, and full accessibility support for prototyping to production.

metadata.name: clockpicker
metadata.description: A clock-style timepicker for Bootstrap (or jQuery). Sorry but no longer maintained.

summary.zh: ClockPicker 是一个基于 Bootstrap 或 jQuery 的时钟风格时间选择器插件，支持桌面与移动设备，兼容 IE9+ 及主流浏览器。提供 12/24 小时制切换、自动关闭、触摸优化等特性，适用于表单时间输入场景。项目已不再维护。
summary.en: ClockPicker is a clock-style timepicker plugin for Bootstrap or jQuery, supporting both desktop and mobile devices with IE9+ compatibility. It features 12/24-hour modes, autoclose, touch support, and customizable callbacks, ideal for time input forms. Note: no longer maintained.

metadata.name: metismenu
metadata.description: A collapsible jQuery menu plugin

summary.zh: MetisMenu 是一个轻量级的 jQuery 插件，用于创建可折叠的导航菜单，支持多级子菜单、无障碍访问（ARIA）和箭头指示器。适用于后台管理系统和响应式网站侧边栏，提供简洁的 API 和事件控制，不兼容 IE 浏览器。
summary.en: MetisMenu is a lightweight jQuery plugin for creating collapsible navigation menus with multi-level support, ARIA accessibility, and arrow indicators. Ideal for admin dashboards and responsive sidebars, it offers a clean API and event control, but does not support Internet Explorer.

metadata.name: easy-tree
metadata.description: A jquery and bootstrap basic tree view plugin, easily use.

summary.zh: Easy-Tree 是一个基于 jQuery 和 Bootstrap 3 的轻量级树形视图插件，可将无序列表快速转换为可交互的树结构，支持节点选择、添加、编辑和删除功能，适用于需要树形数据展示的前端场景。
summary.en: Easy-Tree is a lightweight tree view plugin based on jQuery and Bootstrap 3, converting unordered lists into interactive trees with selectable, addable, editable, and deletable nodes, ideal for hierarchical data display in web applications.

metadata.name: bootstrap-tour
metadata.description: Quick and easy product tours with Twitter Bootstrap Popovers

summary.zh: Bootstrap Tour 是一个基于 Twitter Bootstrap Popovers 的轻量级产品引导库，帮助开发者快速构建用户操作指引流程。支持 Bootstrap 2.3.0 及以上版本，提供简洁 API 和灵活配置，适用于 Web 应用的新手引导、功能介绍等场景。
summary.en: Bootstrap Tour is a lightweight library for creating interactive product tours using Twitter Bootstrap Popovers. It offers a simple API and flexible configuration to guide users through web applications, ideal for onboarding and feature introductions. Compatible with Bootstrap 2.3.0+.

metadata.name: daterangepicker
metadata.description: JavaScript Date Range, Date and Time Picker Component

summary.zh: 这是一个功能强大的 JavaScript 日期范围选择器组件，支持日期范围、单日期及时间选择，具备本地化、预设范围、日期限制等特性，适用于报表系统等需要灵活时间筛选的场景。
summary.en: A versatile JavaScript date range picker component supporting date ranges, single dates, and time selection, with features like localization, predefined ranges, and selectable limits, ideal for analytics dashboards and reporting tools.

metadata.name: bootbox
metadata.description: Wrappers for JavaScript alert(), confirm() and other flexible dialogs using Twitter's bootstrap framework

summary.zh: Bootbox 是一个基于 Bootstrap 框架的 JavaScript 库，提供 alert、confirm 及可定制对话框的封装，替代原生弹窗，支持 Bootstrap 3 至 5 版本，具备良好的兼容性与灵活的 API 设计。
summary.en: Bootbox is a JavaScript library that wraps native alert(), confirm(), and other dialogs using Bootstrap, offering customizable, styled modal dialogs with support for Bootstrap 3 through 5, ensuring consistent UI and enhanced user experience.

metadata.name: jqBootstrapValidation
metadata.description: A JQuery validation framework for bootstrap forms.

summary.zh: jqBootstrapValidation 是一个基于 jQuery 的表单验证框架，专为 Bootstrap 表单设计。它能在用户输入时实时显示验证错误信息，并通过 `help-block` 元素展示提示，提升表单交互体验。
summary.en: jqBootstrapValidation is a jQuery-based validation framework tailored for Bootstrap forms. It provides real-time validation feedback by displaying errors in `help-block` elements as users type, enhancing form usability.

metadata.name: bootmetro
metadata.description: Simple and complete web UI framework to create web apps with Windows 8 Metro user interface, based on Bootstrap 2.

summary.zh: BootMetro 是一个基于 Bootstrap 2 和 HTML5 Boilerplate 的 Web UI 框架，旨在为 Web 应用提供 Windows 8 Metro 风格界面。它支持 Metro 风格的导航、磁贴、通知、列表视图等组件，适用于现代内联网应用，无需依赖 Windows 8 系统。项目已停止维护，但代码仍具参考价值。
summary.en: BootMetro is a web UI framework built on Bootstrap 2 and HTML5 Boilerplate, designed to bring the Windows 8 Metro interface style to web applications. It includes Metro-styled components like tiles, navigation, toasts, and list views, ideal for modern intranet apps without requiring Windows 8. The project is no longer maintained.

metadata.name: jquery-ui-bootstrap
metadata.description: A jQuery UI theme based on Twitter Bootstrap

summary.zh: jQuery UI Bootstrap 是一个基于 Twitter Bootstrap 设计的 jQuery UI 主题，旨在将 Bootstrap 的现代化视觉风格与 jQuery UI 组件无缝结合。该项目解决了两者共存时的样式冲突问题，并提供兼容 Bootstrap 3.x 的 LESS 支持，适用于希望统一前端 UI 风格的项目。
summary.en: jQuery UI Bootstrap is a theme that brings Twitter Bootstrap's modern design to jQuery UI widgets, enabling seamless visual integration between the two frameworks. It resolves styling conflicts and offers LESS-based customization, targeting developers seeking consistent UI aesthetics across Bootstrap and jQuery UI components.

metadata.name: bootstrap-notify
metadata.description: Bootstrap alert system made better, builds off of bootstrap-alert.js

summary.zh: 基于 Bootstrap 的增强型通知系统，扩展了 bootstrap-alert.js 功能，提供更灵活、美观的提示消息解决方案，适用于 Web 应用中的用户反馈场景。
summary.en: An enhanced notification system built on Bootstrap, extending bootstrap-alert.js to deliver more flexible and visually appealing alert messages for web applications.

metadata.name: eldarion-ajax
metadata.description: a library for adding declarative ajax functionality to your website

summary.zh: eldarion-ajax 是一个轻量级 jQuery 插件，用于为网站添加声明式 AJAX 功能。它通过简单的 HTML 类标记（如 `ajax`）自动处理链接点击和表单提交，无需重复编写 `$.ajax` 代码。支持服务器返回包含 `html` 字段的 JSON 响应，实现服务端模板渲染的 HTML 片段更新，提升前后端协作效率。
summary.en: eldarion-ajax is a lightweight jQuery plugin that enables declarative AJAX functionality on websites. It automates link clicks and form submissions via simple HTML class markers (e.g., `ajax`), eliminating repetitive `$.ajax` code. It leverages server-rendered HTML fragments returned in JSON responses under the `html` key, promoting efficient server-side templating integration.

metadata.name: bootstro.js
metadata.description: Tiny JS library using bootstrap's popovers to help guide your users around your website

summary.zh: Bootstro.js 是一个轻量级 JavaScript 库，利用 Bootstrap 的 Popover 组件实现网站用户引导功能。支持 Bootstrap 2 和 3，可通过 HTML 属性或 JS 变量配置引导步骤，适用于单页应用的用户操作指引。
summary.en: Bootstro.js is a lightweight JavaScript library that leverages Bootstrap's popover to create interactive user tours on websites. It supports both Bootstrap 2 and 3, allowing tour configuration via HTML attributes or JavaScript variables for seamless onboarding experiences.

metadata.name: bootstrap-tags
metadata.description: Bootstrap-themed jquery tag interface

summary.zh: Bootstrap Tags 是一个基于 jQuery 的插件，为 Twitter Bootstrap 提供标签输入功能，支持 Bootstrap 2.3.2 及 3+ 版本。具备自动建议、标签排除、过滤、占位提示及 Popover 扩展信息等功能，样式与 Bootstrap 按钮类一致，可高度定制，适用于表单标签管理场景。
summary.en: Bootstrap Tags is a jQuery plugin that adds tagging functionality to Twitter Bootstrap, supporting versions 2.3.2 and 3+. It features autosuggest, tag exclusion/filtering, placeholder prompts, Bootstrap Popovers for tag details, and customizable styling via Bootstrap button classes, ideal for form-based tag input interfaces.

metadata.name: angular-bootstrap-colorpicker
metadata.description: Native AngularJS colorpicker directive. No dependency on jQuery or jQuery plugin is required.

summary.zh: 这是一个基于 Bootstrap 的原生 AngularJS 颜色选择器指令，无需依赖 jQuery 或 jQuery 插件。支持多种颜色格式（hex、rgb、rgba），可灵活配置位置、大小、可见性及事件回调，适用于表单输入或独立元素，兼容 Bootstrap v3 及 UI Bootstrap 模态框。
summary.en: A native AngularJS color picker directive based on Bootstrap, with no jQuery or jQuery plugin dependencies. Supports hex, rgb, and rgba color formats, offers flexible positioning, sizing, visibility binding, and event callbacks. Works with input fields or standalone elements, and integrates with Bootstrap v3 and UI Bootstrap modals.

metadata.name: bootstrap-colorpicker
metadata.description: Bootstrap Colorpicker is a modular color picker plugin for Bootstrap.

summary.zh: Bootstrap Colorpicker 是一个为 Bootstrap 4 设计的模块化颜色选择器插件，支持 jQuery 和 Bootstrap 的 Popover 组件，提供灵活的配色方案选择功能。该项目已不再维护，建议转向现代替代方案如 React Color。
summary.en: Bootstrap Colorpicker is a modular color picker plugin for Bootstrap 4, built with jQuery and leveraging Bootstrap's Popover for UI integration. It allows users to select colors via an intuitive interface. The project is now deprecated, with modern alternatives like React Color recommended.

metadata.name: Semantic-UI
metadata.description: Semantic is a UI component framework based around useful principles from natural language.

summary.zh: Semantic UI 是一个基于自然语言原则设计的 UI 组件框架，提供 50+ 组件和 3000+ CSS 变量，支持三级变量继承与响应式 EM 单位。其简洁的 HTML 结构、直观的 JavaScript 集成及 Flexbox 兼容性，可快速构建美观网站，并原生支持 React、Angular、Ember 等主流框架。
summary.en: Semantic UI is a UI component framework built on natural language principles, offering 50+ components and 3,000+ CSS variables with three-level variable inheritance. It enables rapid development of responsive, visually appealing websites using concise HTML and intuitive JavaScript, with built-in compatibility for React, Angular, Ember, and other frameworks.

metadata.name: pjax
metadata.description: ajax + history.pushState = pjax

summary.zh: 该项目是一个基于 history.pushState 和 AJAX 的前端页面无刷新跳转库（pjax），支持 jQuery、QWrap 和 KISSY 框架。提供内容缓存、本地存储、动画切换及回调机制，适用于提升单页体验。目前项目已停止维护。
summary.en: This project is a pjax library combining AJAX and history.pushState for seamless page navigation without full reloads. It supports jQuery, QWrap, and KISSY, with features like caching, localStorage, animations, and callbacks. The project is currently unmaintained.

metadata.name: jquery-pjax
metadata.description: pushState + ajax = pjax

summary.zh: pjax 是一个 jQuery 插件，结合 pushState 与 AJAX 技术，实现快速页面导航。它通过 AJAX 加载内容并替换指定容器，同时利用 pushState 更新 URL，避免资源重复加载，提升浏览体验。支持真实链接、页面标题和后退按钮功能，适用于需优化加载速度的 Web 应用。
summary.en: pjax is a jQuery plugin that combines pushState and AJAX to enable fast page navigation. It loads content via AJAX, replaces a designated container, and updates the URL using pushState, avoiding reloading JS/CSS. This provides real permalinks, page titles, and working back button functionality, ideal for performance-optimized web apps.

metadata.name: hardseed
metadata.description: SEX IS ZERO (0), so, who wanna be the ONE (1), aha?

summary.zh: hardseed 是一款从草榴论坛和爱城论坛批量下载种子与图片的工具，支持代理配置、自动更新入口地址、反机器人机制应对及文件名非法字符处理，适用于资源采集场景，具备高效下载与错误重试机制。
summary.en: hardseed is a batch download utility for seeds and images from CaoLiu and AiCheng forums, featuring proxy support, anti-bot evasion, dynamic portal updates, and robust error handling for efficient media acquisition.

metadata.name: django-bootstrap3
metadata.description: Bootstrap 3 integration with Django.

summary.zh: django-bootstrap3 是一个将 Bootstrap 3 与 Django 框架无缝集成的工具包，提供模板标签和表单渲染支持，简化前端开发。目前项目处于维护模式，仅修复漏洞和安全问题，建议新项目使用 Bootstrap 5 版本。
summary.en: django-bootstrap3 seamlessly integrates Bootstrap 3 with Django, offering template tags and form rendering utilities to streamline frontend development. The project is now in maintenance mode, receiving only bug fixes and security updates, with new projects recommended to use Bootstrap 5 instead.

metadata.name: berserkJS
metadata.description: berserkJS 是新形态的前端测试自动化工具 + 页面性能分析工具 ，同时也是个使用 JS 语法控制的命令行浏览器。可用 JS 编写前端自动测试用例 + 页面性能分析用例。 想了解更多？看看连接中的文档吧~~

summary.zh: berserkJS 是一款基于 Qt 和 WebKit 的跨平台前端自动化测试与性能分析工具，支持用 JavaScript 编写测试用例，具备无界面浏览器测试、DOM 操作、屏幕截图、网络监控及页面性能数据采集（如首屏渲染时间）等能力。相比 PhantomJS，其 API 更简洁、标准化，且提供 GUI 调试模式，已被新浪微博、Cisco 等企业用于生产环境。
summary.en: berserkJS is a cross-platform frontend automation and performance analysis tool built on Qt and WebKit, enabling JavaScript-based test scripting. It supports headless browser testing, DOM manipulation, screenshot capture, network monitoring, and performance metrics like first-screen render time. With simpler, standardized APIs and GUI debugging support, it's used by companies like Sina Weibo and Cisco.

metadata.name: weixin-simulator
metadata.description: 微信客户端模拟器，方便在本地进行微信公众平台API的开发和调试

summary.zh: weixin-simulator 是一个基于 tkinter 开发的微信客户端模拟器，用于在本地模拟微信公众平台与后端服务的交互，支持关注、取消关注及自定义菜单点击等事件，便于开发者调试微信公众平台 API，无需依赖线上环境。
summary.en: weixin-simulator is a WeChat client simulator built with tkinter, enabling local simulation of interactions between WeChat Official Account and backend services. It supports events like subscribe, unsubscribe, and custom menu clicks, facilitating API debugging without relying on live environments.

metadata.name: wecheat
metadata.description: 开箱即用的微信公众平台API模拟服务器，帮助你开发与调试微信公众平台应用

summary.zh: Wecheat 是一个基于 Sinatra 的微信公众平台 API 模拟器，支持多应用管理、消息收发、事件通知、扫码模拟及群发功能，提供仿真数据与 Bootstrap 界面，便于开发与调试微信应用，支持 Docker 快速部署。
summary.en: Wecheat is a Sinatra-based WeChat Public Platform API simulator that supports multi-app management, message sending/receiving, event notifications, QR code scanning simulation, and mass messaging. It offers mock data and a Bootstrap UI for easy development and debugging, with Docker support for quick deployment.

metadata.name: webot-cli
metadata.description: command line interface for weixin-robot

summary.zh: webot-cli 是微信机器人（weixin-robot）的命令行工具，支持发送文本、图片、位置等测试消息，以及创建、删除和获取微信自定义菜单。通过配置文件管理 access_token，便于本地开发与调试，提升微信机器人开发效率。
summary.en: webot-cli is a command-line tool for weixin-robot, enabling sending test messages (text, image, location, etc.) and managing WeChat custom menus (create, delete, get). It uses a config file for access_token, ideal for local development and debugging of WeChat bots.

metadata.name: weixin_pay
metadata.description: 微信支付的python接口

summary.zh: 该项目是一个基于Python实现的微信支付接口，旨在简化开发者对接微信支付流程。作者因实际工作需求开发，已完成功能测试并移除敏感信息，适合需要快速集成微信支付功能的Python项目使用。
summary.en: This project provides a Python-based interface for WeChat Pay, developed to streamline integration for developers. Created for real-world use, it has been tested and sanitized by removing sensitive data, making it suitable for Python applications requiring quick WeChat Pay integration.

metadata.name: wechatpy
metadata.description: WeChat SDK for Python

summary.zh: wechatpy 是一个功能全面的微信 Python SDK，支持微信公众号、企业微信、微信支付、第三方平台及小程序云开发等 API。提供被动响应与主动调用能力，适用于各类微信生态开发场景，具备良好的文档与社区支持。
summary.en: wechatpy is a comprehensive WeChat SDK for Python, supporting APIs for Official Accounts, Work WeChat, WeChat Pay, third-party platforms, and Mini Program Cloud Development. It enables both passive response and active API calls, ideal for building within the WeChat ecosystem with strong documentation and community support.

metadata.name: wechat-python-sdk
metadata.description: 微信公众平台 Python 开发包 [DEPRECATED]

summary.zh: 这是一个已停止维护的微信公众平台 Python 开发包，旨在简化订阅号与服务号的接口调用，支持消息处理、菜单创建、模板消息、JS-SDK 签名等功能。项目强调轻量集成，不依赖特定框架，适用于快速开发微信后台逻辑。
summary.en: A deprecated Python SDK for WeChat Official Accounts, designed to simplify interactions with subscription and service accounts. It supports message handling, menu creation, template messages, JS-SDK signatures, and emphasizes lightweight integration without framework dependencies.

metadata.name: hexo-qiniu-sync
metadata.description: hexo插件 - 七牛资源同步. 可以在本地存放好静态资源（图片、JS、CSS），然后在md文章中直接使用标签引用，在发布时会自动将静态资源上传到你的七牛空间中，并在hexo生成的静态页面中自动引用这些静态资源在千牛的url。

summary.zh: hexo-qiniu-sync 是一个 Hexo 插件，支持将本地静态资源（图片、JS、CSS）自动同步至七牛云存储，并在生成页面时替换为七牛外链。通过自定义标签（如 qnimg）引用资源，支持离线模式、文件更新检测及图片处理（缩略图、水印等），简化博客部署流程。
summary.en: hexo-qiniu-sync is a Hexo plugin that automatically syncs local static assets (images, JS, CSS) to Qiniu Cloud Storage and replaces them with CDN URLs in generated pages. It supports custom tags (e.g., qnimg), offline mode, file change detection, and image processing (thumbnails, watermarks), streamlining blog deployment.

metadata.name: material-ui
metadata.description: Material UI: Comprehensive React component library that implements Google's Material Design. Free forever.

summary.zh: Material UI 是一个基于 React 的全面组件库，完整实现了 Google 的 Material Design 设计系统。经过十余年社区贡献和实战检验，被全球顶级产品团队广泛采用，提供高质量、可定制的前端 UI 组件，永久免费。
summary.en: Material UI is a comprehensive React component library that fully implements Google's Material Design system. Trusted by leading product teams worldwide, it offers high-quality, customizable UI components with over a decade of open-source development and battle-tested reliability—free forever.

metadata.name: mdb-ui-kit
metadata.description: Bootstrap 5 & Material Design UI KIT

summary.zh: MDB UI Kit 是一个基于 Bootstrap 5 和 Material Design 的免费前端组件库，提供 700+ 精美组件与模板，支持纯 JavaScript、MIT 开源协议，安装简单，适用于快速构建现代化响应式网页，被 NASA、Amazon 等全球知名企业广泛使用。
summary.en: MDB UI Kit is a free, open-source frontend framework based on Bootstrap 5 and Material Design, offering 700+ components and templates with vanilla JavaScript support. It features MIT licensing, easy installation, and is trusted by millions of developers and major companies like NASA and Amazon.

metadata.name: bootswatch
metadata.description: Themes for Bootstrap

summary.zh: Bootswatch 是一个为 Bootstrap 框架提供的开源主题集合，包含多种风格各异的预设计主题。支持通过 CDN、npm、Sass 导入、Ruby Gem 等多种方式集成，便于快速美化前端界面。每个主题由 _variables.scss 和 _bootswatch.scss 构成，支持深度自定义，适用于 React、Rails 等主流开发环境。
summary.en: Bootswatch is an open-source collection of themes for Bootstrap, offering a variety of pre-designed styles. It supports integration via CDN, npm, Sass imports, and Ruby Gem, enabling quick UI enhancement. Each theme consists of _variables.scss and _bootswatch.scss files, allowing deep customization and compatibility with frameworks like React and Rails.

metadata.name: metro-bootstrap
metadata.description: Twitter Bootstrap with Metro style

summary.zh: metro-bootstrap 是一个将 Twitter Bootstrap 框架与 Metro 设计风格结合的 CSS 主题库，提供扁平化、简洁现代的界面样式。支持通过 npm、Git 克隆或 CDN 快速集成，适用于构建具有 Windows Metro 风格的前端项目。目前项目寻求维护者。
summary.en: metro-bootstrap is a CSS theme that combines Twitter Bootstrap with Metro design aesthetics, offering flat, clean, and modern UI styles. It supports integration via npm, Git clone, or CDN, ideal for building front-end projects with a Windows Metro-inspired look. The project is currently seeking maintainers.

metadata.name: DjangoVerifyCode
metadata.description: django verify code

summary.zh: DjangoVerifyCode 是一个用于 Django 框架的验证码生成与验证工具，支持英文单词和数字两种模式，可自动生成验证码图片并验证用户输入。具备字体自适应、图片尺寸自定义等功能，适用于表单安全验证场景，依赖 PIL 库。
summary.en: DjangoVerifyCode is a Django-based CAPTCHA tool supporting both English word and numeric modes. It generates CAPTCHA images with adaptive font sizing and customizable dimensions, and validates user input. Ideal for form security, it depends on the PIL library.

metadata.name: bootstrap3-validation.js
metadata.description: bootstrap3 validation

summary.zh: 这是一个专为 Bootstrap 3 设计的 jQuery 表单验证插件，支持多种输入类型校验（如邮箱、数字、日期、中文等），提供自定义提示信息与异步后台验证功能，兼容 IE8，适用于水平与内联表单布局，简化前端验证逻辑。
summary.en: A jQuery form validation plugin tailored for Bootstrap 3, supporting multiple input validations (email, number, date, Chinese, etc.), custom error messages, and asynchronous backend checks. It is IE8-compatible and works with both horizontal and inline form layouts.

metadata.name: mui
metadata.description: 最接近原生APP体验的高性能框架

summary.zh: mui 是一个专注于解决 HTML5 在移动端性能与体验瓶颈的高性能前端框架，有效缓解页面白屏、动画卡顿、下拉刷新不流畅等问题，提供接近原生 App 的交互体验。支持快速开发美观控件，兼容 Android 低端设备，适用于混合 App 开发。
summary.en: mui is a high-performance frontend framework designed to bridge the gap between HTML5 and native mobile app experiences. It addresses common issues like page flickering, laggy animations, and poor pull-to-refresh performance, delivering near-native UI interactions especially on low-end Android devices.

metadata.name: Kode-Agent
metadata.description: Kode Agent — Design for post-human workflows. One unit agent for every human & computer task.

summary.zh: Kode 是一个终端 AI 助手，专为后人类工作流设计，支持 AGENTS.md 标准，可自动理解代码库、编辑文件、执行命令并管理完整工作流程。它兼容 Claude 的 .claude 格式，支持多模型（20+ 提供商），具备原生二进制分发能力，默认启用 YOLO 模式以提升效率，同时提供安全模式保障关键操作权限。
summary.en: Kode is a terminal-based AI assistant designed for post-human workflows, supporting the AGENTS.md standard to autonomously understand codebases, edit files, run commands, and manage full workflows. It supports multiple AI models (20+ providers), offers native binary distribution, and operates in YOLO mode by default for maximum productivity while providing a safe mode for secure environments.

metadata.name: waoowaoo
metadata.description: 首家工业级全流程 AI 影视生产平台。Industry-first professional AI Agent platform for controllable film & video production. From shorts to live-action with Hollywood-standard workflows.

summary.zh: waoowaoo AI 影视 Studio 是一款工业级全流程可控协作式专业AI agent影视生产平台，支持从小说文本自动生成分镜、角色、场景并合成完整视频，具备AI剧本分析、角色场景生成、分镜视频制作、AI配音及多语言界面等功能，采用好莱坞专业制作思路，提供虚拟制片场体验。
summary.en: waoowaoo AI Studio is an industrial-grade, end-to-end controllable AI agent platform for professional film and TV production, supporting automatic generation of storyboards, characters, and scenes from novel text into complete videos. It features AI script analysis, character/scene generation, storyboard video assembly, AI voice synthesis, and bilingual UI, built with Hollywood-level production workflows.

summary.zh: 该项目是一个基于 Next.js、Tailwind CSS 和 TypeScript 的个人作品集网站，采用严格模式开发，集成 Turborepo 进行高效管理。支持 Markdown/MDX 内容发布，提供 RSS 订阅、站点地图、评论系统和阅读时长统计，结合 Motion 实现流畅的滚动动画与视图过渡，性能优化至 Lighthouse 近乎满分水平，兼顾 SEO 与可访问性。
summary.en: This is a modern personal portfolio built with Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and TypeScript (strict mode), managed via Turborepo. It supports Markdown/MDX publishing, RSS feeds, sitemaps, comments, reading time, and view counters. Features smooth scroll-based animations and transitions using Motion, achieving near-perfect Lighthouse scores in performance, accessibility, and SEO.

metadata.name: Agent-Skills-for-Context-Engineering
metadata.description: A comprehensive collection of Agent Skills for context engineering, multi-agent architectures, and production agent systems. Use when building, optimizing, or debugging agent systems that require effective context management.

summary.zh: 该仓库提供了一套全面的代理技能，专注于上下文工程，适用于构建、优化和调试需要有效上下文管理的代理系统。项目涵盖了上下文的基本原理、架构设计和运营优化，帮助开发者在多代理架构中实现高效的上下文管理，提升代理系统的整体性能。
summary.en: This repository offers a comprehensive collection of agent skills focused on context engineering, suitable for building, optimizing, and debugging agent systems that require effective context management. The project covers foundational principles, architectural design, and operational optimization, aiding developers in achieving efficient context management within multi-agent architectures to enhance overall system performance.

metadata.name: HivisionIDPhotos
metadata.description: ⚡️HivisionIDPhotos: a lightweight and efficient AI ID photos tools. 一个轻量级的AI证件照制作算法。

summary.zh: HivisionIDPhotos是一个轻量级高效的AI证件照制作工具，旨在提供快速、系统化的证件照生成方案。该项目支持多种拍照场景的识别与抠图，能够生成符合不同规格的标准证件照，并具备美颜和智能换装功能。用户可选择纯离线或端云推理，适用于个人和商业场景，解决证件照制作的紧急需求。
summary.en: HivisionIDPhotos is a lightweight and efficient AI tool for generating ID photos, designed to provide a fast and systematic solution for photo creation. The project supports recognition and segmentation in various shooting scenarios, generating standard ID photos of different specifications, with features like beautification and smart outfit change. Users can opt for pure offline or edge-cloud inference, making it suitable for both personal and commercial use, addressing urgent ID photo needs.

metadata.name: geekgeekrun
metadata.description: 牛人快跑 - GeekGeekRun，求职找工作自动化工具，基于 Puppeteer、Electron。界面友好，简单易用！开源，免费！快速海投、自动开聊、已读不回提醒、职位信息抓取、不合适职位标记、僵尸职位清理；让你即刻变身成为一台冇得感情的求职机器🤖，找工作不内耗。宝宝不用动，妈妈全自动~祝你收获好Offer！

summary.zh: 牛人快跑 - GeekGeekRun 是一款基于 Puppeteer 和 Electron 的求职自动化工具，旨在简化求职流程。用户可以通过简单配置实现自动开聊、职位信息抓取及已读不回提醒等功能，快速投递简历并跟进沟通。开源且免费，适合各类求职者，助力高效求职，减少内耗。
summary.en: GeekGeekRun is an automation tool for job hunting based on Puppeteer and Electron, designed to simplify the job application process. Users can easily configure features like automatic chatting, job information scraping, and reminders for unread messages, enabling quick resume submissions and follow-ups. Open-source and free, it caters to job seekers of all levels, enhancing efficiency and reducing friction in job searching.

metadata.name: best-prompts
metadata.description: 通用高质量 Prompt 合集🔥

summary.zh: best-prompts 是一个高质量的通用提示词集合，旨在提升 AI 输出质量，特别适用于 Claude4.6、Gemini3、GPT5.2 等模型。项目通过细分场景和设计约束，提供可直接使用的 Prompt，涵盖学位论文撰写、开发流程、自媒体创作等多个领域，帮助用户快速找到所需提示，减少调试时间，具有良好的扩展性。
summary.en: best-prompts is a high-quality collection of universal prompts aimed at enhancing AI output quality, particularly for models like Claude4.6, Gemini3, and GPT5.2. The project offers directly usable prompts through scenario segmentation and constraint design, covering various fields such as thesis writing, development processes, and media creation, helping users quickly find the prompts they need while reducing debugging time, with good extensibility.

metadata.name: GithubStarsIndex
metadata.description: 自动抓取 GitHub Stars，生成 AI 摘要，便于检索。

summary.zh: GitHub Stars Index 是一个自动抓取 GitHub Stars 的工具，能够为每个仓库生成 AI 摘要和技术标签，便于用户快速检索。该项目支持并发调用 AI 接口，具备高效的数据处理能力，并可将生成的内容同步到 Obsidian Vault 和 GitHub Pages，适合开发者和技术爱好者使用。
summary.en: GitHub Stars Index is a tool that automatically fetches GitHub Stars and generates AI summaries and technical tags for each repository, facilitating quick retrieval. The project supports concurrent AI API calls, ensuring efficient data processing, and can sync generated content to Obsidian Vault and GitHub Pages, making it suitable for developers and tech enthusiasts.

metadata.name: Netease_url
metadata.description: 网易云无损解析

summary.zh: 网易云音乐无损解析工具，支持歌曲搜索、单曲、歌单及专辑解析，以及多种音质的音乐下载。该项目提供直观的Web界面和RESTful API，适用于音乐爱好者和开发者，能够高效获取网易云音乐的音频资源，满足用户对高质量音乐的需求。
summary.en: Netease Cloud Music lossless parsing tool supports song search, single, playlist, and album parsing, as well as music downloads in various quality formats. This project offers an intuitive web interface and RESTful API, catering to music enthusiasts and developers, efficiently accessing audio resources from Netease Cloud Music to meet users' demands for high-quality music.

metadata.name: rf-detr-detection
metadata.description: 基于 RF-DETR 的浏览器端实时目标检测应用

summary.zh: RF-DETR 是一款基于浏览器的实时目标检测应用，采用 Transformers.js 实现完全客户端运行，确保用户隐私。该应用利用 WebGPU 加速，支持 COCO 数据集的 80 个目标类别，具备高精度检测和零配置部署的特点，适用于需要实时图像处理的场景，如监控、智能家居等。
summary.en: RF-DETR is a browser-based real-time object detection application that runs entirely on the client side using Transformers.js, ensuring user privacy. It leverages WebGPU for acceleration and supports 80 object categories from the COCO dataset, featuring high-precision detection and zero-configuration deployment, making it suitable for real-time image processing scenarios like surveillance and smart home applications.

metadata.name: AIStudioToAPI
metadata.description: A wrapper that exposes Google AI Studio as OpenAI, Gemini, and Anthropic compatible APIs.（一个将 Google AI Studio 封装为兼容 OpenAI / Gemini / Anthropic 风格 API 的工具）

summary.zh: AIStudioToAPI 是一个将 Google AI Studio 封装为兼容 OpenAI、Gemini 和 Anthropic API 的工具。它通过浏览器自动化技术与 AI Studio 网页交互，支持多账号登录和工具调用，适用于需要集成多种 AI 模型的开发者。该项目提供了简单的部署方式，包括 Docker 和本地运行，方便用户快速上手。
summary.en: AIStudioToAPI is a tool that wraps Google AI Studio into APIs compatible with OpenAI, Gemini, and Anthropic. It utilizes browser automation to interact with the AI Studio web interface, supporting multi-account login and tool calls, making it ideal for developers needing to integrate various AI models. The project offers straightforward deployment options, including Docker and local execution, for quick user onboarding.

metadata.name: OpenSpec
metadata.description: Spec-driven development (SDD) for AI coding assistants.

summary.zh: OpenSpec 是一个基于规范驱动开发（SDD）的 AI 编码助手框架，旨在简化软件开发流程。它支持从个人项目到企业级应用的灵活扩展，采用迭代而非瀑布式的开发方式。用户可以通过简单的命令与 AI 交互，快速提出功能建议并自动生成相关文档和任务清单，提升开发效率。
summary.en: OpenSpec is a spec-driven development (SDD) framework for AI coding assistants, designed to streamline the software development process. It supports flexible scaling from personal projects to enterprise applications, adopting an iterative rather than waterfall approach. Users can interact with AI through simple commands to quickly propose features and automatically generate related documentation and task lists, enhancing development efficiency.

metadata.name: ai-daily-digest
metadata.description: 从 Andrej Karpathy 推荐的 90 顶级技术博客中抓取最新文章，AI 多维评分筛选，生成一份每日精选日报。更多可见公众号：懂点儿AI

summary.zh: AI Daily Digest 是一款从 Andrej Karpathy 推荐的 90 个顶级技术博客中抓取最新文章的工具，通过 AI 多维评分筛选，生成每日精选日报。该工具支持中英双语输出，具备零依赖、智能分类和趋势洞察等特点，适合技术爱好者和从业者快速获取行业动态和深度分析。
summary.en: AI Daily Digest is a tool that fetches the latest articles from 90 top tech blogs recommended by Andrej Karpathy, generating a daily curated report through AI multi-dimensional scoring. It features zero dependencies, intelligent categorization, and trend insights, making it suitable for tech enthusiasts and professionals to quickly grasp industry dynamics and in-depth analyses.

metadata.name: claude-code-hub
metadata.description: 一个现代化的 Claude Code & Codex API 代理服务，提供智能负载均衡、用户管理和使用统计功能。

summary.zh: Claude Code Hub 是一款现代化的 API 代理服务平台，专为团队提供智能负载均衡、用户管理和实时监控功能。通过 Next.js、PostgreSQL 和 Redis 的技术栈，该平台支持多家 AI 服务商的接入，确保请求的稳定性和安全性。其核心功能包括自动化文档生成、限流控制和丰富的统计分析，适合需要高效管理 AI 接口的开发团队。
summary.en: Claude Code Hub is a modern API proxy service platform designed for teams, offering intelligent load balancing, user management, and real-time monitoring. Built on a tech stack of Next.js, PostgreSQL, and Redis, it supports multiple AI service providers, ensuring request stability and security. Key features include automated documentation generation, rate limiting, and comprehensive analytics, making it ideal for development teams needing efficient management of AI interfaces.

metadata.name: Claude-Code-Workflow
metadata.description: JSON-driven multi-agent  cadence-team development framework with   intelligent CLI orchestration (Gemini/Qwen/Codex),   context-first architecture, and automated workflow   execution

summary.zh: Claude-Code-Workflow 是一个基于 JSON 的多代理开发框架，支持智能 CLI 编排，具备上下文优先架构和自动化工作流执行。该框架适用于团队协作，提供技能驱动的工作流和多 CLI 协同分析，帮助开发者高效管理项目生命周期和任务调度，提升开发效率和协作体验。
summary.en: Claude-Code-Workflow is a JSON-driven multi-agent development framework featuring intelligent CLI orchestration, context-first architecture, and automated workflow execution. It is designed for team collaboration, offering skill-based workflows and multi-CLI collaborative analysis, enabling developers to efficiently manage project lifecycles and task scheduling, enhancing productivity and collaboration.

metadata.name: poco-agent
metadata.description: A more beautiful and easier-to-use alternative to OpenClaw. It features a nicer Web UI, built-in IM support, and a sandboxed runtime for improved safety. Under the hood, it is powered by a Claude Code–based agent.

summary.zh: Poco Agent 是 OpenClaw 的美观且易用的替代方案，提供安全的沙盒运行环境和内置即时通讯支持。其美丽的 Web 界面支持移动设备，用户可随时随地操控代理。项目无需复杂配置，支持异步和定时任务，具备强大的扩展能力，适合需要安全、灵活和高效自动化的用户。
summary.en: Poco Agent is a beautiful and user-friendly alternative to OpenClaw, featuring a secure sandbox runtime and built-in instant messaging support. Its attractive web interface is mobile-friendly, allowing users to control their agent from anywhere. The project requires no complex setup, supports asynchronous and scheduled tasks, and offers robust extensibility, making it ideal for users seeking secure, flexible, and efficient automation.

metadata.name: ccg-workflow
metadata.description: 多模型协作开发系统 - Claude 编排 + Codex 后端 + Gemini 前端，28 个命令覆盖开发全流程，一键安装零配置

summary.zh: CCG是一个多模型协作开发工具集，基于Claude Code CLI，整合Codex和Gemini后端能力，提供智能路由、代码审查等17个命令。它支持前后端任务的高效管理与执行，适用于复杂项目的需求分析与实施，提升团队协作效率。
summary.en: CCG is a multi-model collaboration development toolkit based on Claude Code CLI, integrating Codex and Gemini backend capabilities. It offers intelligent routing, code review, and over 17 commands for efficient management and execution of frontend and backend tasks, enhancing team collaboration efficiency for complex projects.

metadata.name: oh-my-codex
metadata.description: OmX - Oh My codeX: Your codex is not alone. Add hooks, agent teams, HUDs, and so much more.

summary.zh: Oh My Codex（OMX）是一个为OpenAI Codex CLI提供的多代理编排层，旨在将Codex从单一会话代理转变为协调系统。它通过角色提示、工作流技能和团队编排等功能，支持更复杂的任务执行和持久状态管理，适用于需要结构化和长期运行的开发场景。OMX不仅增强了Codex的能力，还提供了便捷的命令行工具，助力开发者高效协作与管理。
summary.en: Oh My Codex (OMX) is a multi-agent orchestration layer for OpenAI Codex CLI, transforming Codex from a single-session agent into a coordinated system. It supports complex task execution and persistent state management through role prompts, workflow skills, and team orchestration, making it ideal for structured and long-running development scenarios. OMX enhances Codex's capabilities and provides convenient CLI tools for efficient collaboration and management.

metadata.name: llmfit
metadata.description: Hundreds of models & providers. One command to find what runs on your hardware.

summary.zh: llmfit 是一款终端工具，能够根据系统的 RAM、CPU 和 GPU 自动调整大型语言模型（LLM）。它支持 497 种模型和 133 个提供者，通过一条命令评估模型的质量、速度和适配性，帮助用户找到最适合其硬件的模型。该工具提供交互式终端用户界面（TUI）和经典命令行模式，支持多 GPU 设置和动态量化选择，适合需要高效模型部署的开发者和研究人员。
summary.en: llmfit is a terminal tool that right-sizes large language models (LLMs) to your system's RAM, CPU, and GPU. It supports 497 models and 133 providers, evaluating models across quality, speed, and fit dimensions to help users find the best-suited models for their hardware. The tool features an interactive terminal user interface (TUI) and classic CLI mode, supporting multi-GPU setups and dynamic quantization selection, making it ideal for developers and researchers needing efficient model deployment.

metadata.name: agent-zero
metadata.description: Agent Zero AI framework
