summary.zh: Agent Zero 是一个动态的个人智能框架，旨在随着用户的使用而不断成长和学习。它具备通用助手的能力，能够执行多种任务，并通过持久记忆提高效率。该框架支持开放的技能标准，允许用户自定义功能，并且与 Git 项目无缝集成，适合需要灵活智能助手的开发者和技术人员。
summary.en: Agent Zero is a dynamic personal AI framework designed to grow and learn with user interaction. It functions as a general-purpose assistant capable of executing various tasks while improving efficiency through persistent memory. The framework supports an open skills standard for customizable features and integrates seamlessly with Git projects, making it ideal for developers and tech enthusiasts in need of a flexible intelligent assistant.

metadata.name: make-prompt-seedance2
metadata.description: 一句话：试错成本越来越高，提示词的重要性从来没有像今天这样大。seedance2结构化提示语，整合了 Seedance 2.0（字节跳动 AI 视频生成模型）的结构化提示词使用方法，帮助用户快速上手并创作出高质量的视频内容。包含 16+ 个模板和 8+ 个示例 | 带货广告| TVC广告

summary.zh: 本仓库提供了 Seedance 2.0（字节跳动 AI 视频生成模型）的结构化提示语指南，旨在帮助内容创作者快速上手并制作高质量视频。包含16个模板和8个示例，适用于短视频、广告、教学等多种场景，强调智能编排和多模态参考，提升视频创作效率与质量。
summary.en: This repository offers a structured prompt guide for Seedance 2.0 (ByteDance AI video generation model), aimed at helping content creators quickly get started and produce high-quality videos. It includes 16 templates and 8 examples, suitable for various scenarios such as short videos, advertisements, and educational content, emphasizing intelligent arrangement and multimodal references to enhance video creation efficiency and quality.

metadata.name: flow2api
metadata.description: 无限次数的banana pro！逆向账号池，支持负载均衡、AT自动刷新、缓存策略、代理等。Q交流群1073237297

summary.zh: Flow2API 是一个功能全面的 OpenAI 兼容 API 服务，专为 Flow 提供统一接口，支持文生图、文生视频等多种生成任务。其核心亮点包括负载均衡、AT/ST 自动刷新、实时余额显示和代理支持，适合需要高并发和高可用性的应用场景。通过 Docker 部署简便，用户可快速搭建并管理服务。
summary.en: Flow2API is a comprehensive OpenAI-compatible API service that provides a unified interface for Flow, supporting various generation tasks like text-to-image and text-to-video. Key highlights include load balancing, automatic refresh for AT/ST tokens, real-time balance display, and proxy support, making it suitable for high-concurrency and high-availability applications. Easy deployment via Docker allows users to quickly set up and manage the service.

metadata.name: llmio
metadata.description: LLM API load-balancing gateway. LLM API 负载均衡网关.

summary.zh: LLMIO 是一个基于 Go 的 LLM 负载均衡网关，提供统一的 REST API，支持多种模型的智能调度与管理。其主要特点包括兼容 OpenAI、Anthropic 和 Gemini 的 API，具备权重调度、可视化管理界面及内建速率限制，适合需要整合多种 LLM 服务的开发者与企业。
summary.en: LLMIO is a Go-based LLM load-balancing gateway that offers a unified REST API for intelligent scheduling and management of various models. Key features include compatibility with OpenAI, Anthropic, and Gemini APIs, weight-based scheduling, a visual management interface, and built-in rate limiting, making it ideal for developers and enterprises needing to integrate multiple LLM services.

metadata.name: octopus
metadata.description: One Hub All LLMs For You | 为个人打造的 LLM API 聚合服务

summary.zh: Octopus 是一款为个人用户打造的 LLM API 聚合服务，提供多渠道聚合、负载均衡和智能选择等功能。它支持多种 API 密钥，具备协议转换和价格同步能力，确保请求的高效分发与管理。同时，Octopus 提供优雅的用户界面和全面的请求统计，适用于需要整合不同 LLM 服务的开发者与企业。
summary.en: Octopus is a personalized LLM API aggregation service designed for individual users, offering features like multi-channel aggregation, load balancing, and smart endpoint selection. It supports multiple API keys, protocol conversion, and price synchronization, ensuring efficient request distribution and management. With an elegant UI and comprehensive request analytics, Octopus is ideal for developers and businesses looking to integrate various LLM services.

summary.zh: 暂无描述。

metadata.name: ai-image-edit
metadata.description: AI图片生成编辑网站，可以框选图片局部区域进行编辑修改。

summary.zh: AI图片生成编辑网站，支持用户框选图片局部进行智能编辑，确保修改后的内容与原图风格一致。核心功能包括多图层系统、无限画布、AI抠图及多种选区工具，适用于需要细节调整的场景，如生成图片后的局部修正。该项目结合了先进的AI技术，提升了用户的编辑体验。
summary.en: An AI image generation and editing website that allows users to select and edit specific areas of images, ensuring modifications blend seamlessly with the original style. Key features include a multi-layer system, infinite canvas, AI background removal, and various selection tools, making it suitable for scenarios requiring detail adjustments, such as refining areas after image generation. The project leverages advanced AI technology to enhance user editing experience.

metadata.name: social-media-agent
metadata.description: 📲 An agent for sourcing, curating, and scheduling social media posts with human-in-the-loop.

summary.zh: 该项目是一个社交媒体代理，能够根据给定的URL生成Twitter和LinkedIn帖子。它采用人机协作流程，支持多平台认证，并允许用户对生成的内容进行修改或审核。适用于需要高效管理社交媒体内容的用户，提供了简单的设置和自定义选项，结合多种API实现内容抓取和发布。
summary.en: This project is a social media agent that generates Twitter and LinkedIn posts based on a given URL. It employs a human-in-the-loop flow for multi-platform authentication, allowing users to modify or approve the generated content. Ideal for users needing efficient social media content management, it offers simple setup and customization options, leveraging various APIs for content scraping and posting.

metadata.name: DingTalkRevokeMsgPatcher
metadata.description: 钉钉消息防撤回补丁PC版（原名：钉钉电脑版防撤回插件，也叫：钉钉防撤回补丁、钉钉消息防撤回补丁）由“吾乐吧软件站”开发制作，本程序用于钉钉电脑版6.0以上版本，主要功能如下：1、支持文字消息防撤回  2、支持图片消息防撤回，支持查看高清原图  3、支持文件识别、URL识别、卡片回复消息识别等  4、支持富文本消息防撤回  5、支持个人消息防撤回，以及群主或管理员消息防撤回  6、支持自己发送的消息防撤回  7、文字消息或富文本消息，允许重新编辑或查看 8、支持语音消息防撤回（复制到浏览器打开） 9、支持钉钉多开  10、支持撤回消息提醒 11、支持消息永不已读 12、支持钉钉去除水印 13、支持屏蔽钉钉升级

summary.zh: 钉钉消息防撤回补丁PC版是一款专为钉钉电脑版6.0及以上版本设计的插件，提供多种消息防撤回功能，包括文字、图片、文件及语音消息的保护，支持消息永不已读和去除水印等特性。该工具适合需要保留重要沟通内容的用户，特别是在工作和团队协作中，确保信息的完整性与可追溯性。
summary.en: The DingTalk Revoke Message Patcher for PC is a plugin designed for DingTalk desktop versions 6.0 and above, offering various message revocation prevention features, including protection for text, image, file, and voice messages. It supports features like never marking messages as read and watermark removal, making it ideal for users who need to retain important communication content, particularly in work and team collaboration scenarios, ensuring information integrity and traceability.

summary.zh: RAG From Scratch 项目旨在通过检索增强生成（RAG）技术，扩展大型语言模型（LLM）的知识库，克服其在处理私有或最新信息时的局限。该项目提供了一系列笔记本，配合视频教程，从索引、检索到生成的基础知识逐步深入，适合希望掌握 RAG 技术的开发者和研究者。
summary.en: The RAG From Scratch project aims to expand the knowledge base of large language models (LLMs) through Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) technology, addressing their limitations in handling private or recent information. It offers a series of notebooks alongside video tutorials that gradually delve into the fundamentals of indexing, retrieval, and generation, making it suitable for developers and researchers looking to master RAG techniques.

metadata.name: nanobanana-trending-prompts
metadata.description: 1,400+ curated trending AI image prompts from X, ranked by engagement. Works with NanoBanana, GPT Image 2, Midjourney

summary.zh: 该项目提供了1500多个来自X/Twitter的热门AI图像提示，按参与度进行排名，旨在帮助用户生成高质量的图像内容。与NanoBanana Pro、GPT Image和Midjourney等工具兼容，每周更新，确保用户获取最新的创意灵感和趋势。适合设计师、内容创作者和AI爱好者使用。
summary.en: This project offers over 1,500 curated trending AI image prompts sourced from X/Twitter, ranked by engagement to assist users in generating high-quality image content. Compatible with tools like NanoBanana Pro, GPT Image, and Midjourney, it is updated weekly to provide users with the latest creative inspiration and trends. Ideal for designers, content creators, and AI enthusiasts.

metadata.name: BigBanana-AI-Director
metadata.description: BigBanana AI Director是一个工业级一站式  AI 短剧，AI 漫剧,AI 导演平台，面向创作者，实现从灵感到成片的高效生产。  它摇弃了传统的“抽卡式”生成，采用 "Script-to-Asset-to-Keyframe" 的工业化工作流。实现 “一句话生成完整短剧，从剧本到成片全自动化”，同时精准控制角色一致性、场景连续性与镜头运动。

summary.zh: BigBanana AI Director是一个创新的AI短剧与漫剧生成平台，旨在为创作者提供从剧本到成片的全自动化生产流程。通过采用"Script-to-Asset-to-Keyframe"的工业化工作流，用户可以精准控制角色一致性与场景连续性，快速实现创意构思的可视化。该平台深度集成先进的AI模型，支持智能剧本拆解与视觉化翻译，极大提升创作效率。
summary.en: BigBanana AI Director is an innovative AI platform for generating short films and motion comics, designed to provide creators with an automated production workflow from script to final output. By adopting an industrial "Script-to-Asset-to-Keyframe" approach, users can precisely control character consistency and scene continuity, quickly visualizing their creative ideas. The platform integrates advanced AI models for intelligent script breakdown and visual translation, significantly enhancing creative efficiency.

metadata.name: voltagent
metadata.description: AI Agent Engineering Platform built on an Open Source TypeScript AI Agent Framework

summary.zh: VoltAgent 是一个端到端的 AI 代理工程平台，基于开源 TypeScript 框架构建。它提供了内存、工具、工作流等功能，支持与多种 AI 提供商连接，适用于构建智能代理和多代理系统。VoltOps 控制台提供可观察性、自动化和部署等功能，帮助开发者高效管理和运维代理。
summary.en: VoltAgent is an end-to-end AI Agent Engineering Platform built on an open-source TypeScript framework. It offers features like memory, tools, and workflows, allowing integration with various AI providers for building intelligent agents and multi-agent systems. The VoltOps console provides observability, automation, and deployment capabilities, aiding developers in efficiently managing and operating agents.

metadata.name: KoalaQA
metadata.description: KoalaQA 是一款 AI 大模型驱动的开源售后服务社区，提供 AI 回答、AI 搜索、AI 运营等能力，帮助你快速落地售后客服、社区问答、自助服务等场景，帮助团队显著降低人工运营成本、提升客户满意度与响应效率，助力实现 ZCR（Zero Contact Resolution）目标。

summary.zh: KoalaQA 是一款基于 AI 大模型的开源智能售后服务平台，提供 AI 客服、搜索和运营等功能，旨在帮助企业快速搭建问答社区和自助服务系统。通过智能化的客户服务，KoalaQA 能显著降低人工运营成本，提升客户满意度，实现零人工介入解决（ZCR）的目标，适用于企业内外部的多种服务场景。
summary.en: KoalaQA is an open-source intelligent after-sales service platform driven by AI large models, offering capabilities such as AI customer service, search, and operations. It helps enterprises quickly build Q&A communities and self-service systems. By automating customer service, KoalaQA significantly reduces operational costs and enhances customer satisfaction, aiming to achieve Zero Contact Resolution (ZCR) in various service scenarios.

metadata.name: videocut-skills
metadata.description: 用 Claude Code Skills 做的视频剪辑 Agent

summary.zh: Videocut Skills 是一个基于 Claude Code Skills 的视频剪辑 Agent，专为口播视频设计。它通过语义理解能力解决了传统剪辑工具无法识别口误和重复内容的问题，并利用自定义词典提升字幕质量。该工具能够自动检测静音、重复句和句内重复，提供高效的 AI 辅助剪辑体验，极大地简化了视频后期制作流程。
summary.en: Videocut Skills is a video editing agent built on Claude Code Skills, specifically designed for spoken videos. It addresses the limitations of traditional editing tools by leveraging semantic understanding to identify errors and repetitions, while a custom dictionary enhances subtitle quality. The tool automatically detects silence, repeated phrases, and in-sentence repetitions, offering an efficient AI-assisted editing experience that significantly simplifies the video post-production process.

metadata.name: awesome-openclaw-skills
metadata.description: The awesome collection of OpenClaw skills. 5,400+ skills filtered and categorized from the official OpenClaw Skills Registry.🦞

summary.zh: Awesome OpenClaw Skills 是一个集合，提供 2868 个社区构建的 OpenClaw 技能，旨在扩展本地 AI 助手的功能。这些技能可以与外部服务交互、自动化工作流程并执行特定任务。该列表从 ClawHub 公共技能注册表中筛选而来，确保用户能够轻松发现和安装所需的技能，同时强调了安全性和来源验证的重要性。
summary.en: Awesome OpenClaw Skills is a collection featuring 2868 community-built OpenClaw skills designed to extend the capabilities of a local AI assistant. These skills allow interaction with external services, automate workflows, and perform specialized tasks. The list is curated from ClawHub's public skills registry, ensuring users can easily discover and install the skills they need while emphasizing the importance of security and source validation.

metadata.name: Video-Wrapper-Skills
metadata.description: 为访谈视频添加综艺风格视觉特效的 Claude Skill。AI 分析字幕内容生成建议，用户审批后自动渲染。A Claude Skill for adding variety-show-style visual effects to interview videos. The AI analyzes subtitle content to generate suggestions

summary.zh: Video Wrapper 是一个基于 AI 的工具，旨在为访谈和播客视频添加综艺风格的视觉特效。通过分析字幕内容，AI 自动生成效果建议，用户确认后可一键渲染专业效果，提升视频的观赏性与信息传达效果。支持多种视觉组件和主题，适用于教育、商业及创意领域。
summary.en: Video Wrapper is an AI-powered tool designed to add variety-show-style visual effects to interview and podcast videos. By analyzing subtitle content, the AI automatically generates effect suggestions, which can be rendered with a single click after user approval, enhancing the viewing experience and information delivery. It supports various visual components and themes, suitable for education, business, and creative fields.

metadata.name: chatgpt-team-helper
metadata.description: 一站式Team账号管理

summary.zh: ChatGPT Team Helper 是一个多渠道的团队账号管理与兑换平台，支持自动发货、积分体系和权限管理。基于 Vue 3 和 Node.js 构建，提供全面的账号生命周期管理、订单管理和支付功能，适用于需要高效管理团队账号的用户。其技术亮点包括开放API、实时同步和灵活的权限控制。
summary.en: ChatGPT Team Helper is a multi-channel team account management and redemption platform that supports automated delivery, a points system, and permission management. Built with Vue 3 and Node.js, it offers comprehensive account lifecycle management, order management, and payment features, making it ideal for users needing efficient team account management. Key highlights include open APIs, real-time synchronization, and flexible permission controls.

metadata.name: lingbot-vla
metadata.description: A Pragmatic VLA Foundation Model

summary.zh: LingBot-VLA 是一个实用的视觉-语言-动作基础模型，专注于大规模预训练数据和高效训练。它利用来自九种流行双臂机器人配置的 20,000 小时真实世界数据，展现出在模拟和现实基准测试中的显著优势。该模型在训练效率上较现有 VLA 代码库实现了 1.5 至 2.8 倍的加速，适用于机器人控制和人机交互等应用场景。
summary.en: LingBot-VLA is a pragmatic Vision-Language-Action foundation model that focuses on large-scale pre-training data and efficient training. It leverages 20,000 hours of real-world data from nine popular dual-arm robot configurations, demonstrating significant superiority in simulation and real-world benchmarks. The model achieves a 1.5 to 2.8 times speedup in training efficiency compared to existing VLA codebases, making it suitable for applications in robotic control and human-robot interaction.

metadata.name: lingbot-world
metadata.description: Advancing Open-source World Models

summary.zh: LingBot-World 是一个开源的世界模拟器，专注于视频生成技术。它提供高保真和多样化的环境，支持长时间记忆和上下文一致性，能够在实时交互中以每秒16帧的速度生成图像。该项目旨在缩小开源与闭源技术之间的差距，促进内容创作、游戏和机器人学习等领域的应用。
summary.en: LingBot-World is an open-source world simulator focused on video generation technology. It offers high-fidelity and diverse environments, supports long-term memory and contextual consistency, and can generate images at 16 frames per second in real-time interactivity. The project aims to bridge the gap between open-source and closed-source technologies, facilitating applications in content creation, gaming, and robot learning.

metadata.name: excalidraw
metadata.description: Virtual whiteboard for sketching hand-drawn like diagrams

summary.zh: Excalidraw 是一个开源的虚拟白板，支持手绘风格的图表绘制，适用于团队协作和创意表达。其核心亮点包括无限画布、实时协作、端到端加密以及丰富的图形工具，用户可以轻松创建和分享手绘风格的图形，适合于设计、教育和头脑风暴等多种场景。
summary.en: Excalidraw is an open-source virtual whiteboard that supports hand-drawn style diagram creation, ideal for team collaboration and creative expression. Key features include an infinite canvas, real-time collaboration, end-to-end encryption, and a wide range of drawing tools, allowing users to easily create and share hand-drawn style graphics suitable for design, education, and brainstorming.

metadata.name: openOii
metadata.description: 基于多智能体协作的 AI 漫剧生成平台 | AI Agent-based Comic Drama Generation Platform

summary.zh: openOii 是一个基于多智能体协作的 AI 漫剧生成平台，能够将用户的创意故事自动转化为完整的视频作品。通过多个专业 AI Agent 的协作，平台实现了剧本创作、角色设计、分镜绘制和视频生成等功能，支持实时反馈和精准重生成，适用于创意创作、教育和娱乐等多个场景。
summary.en: openOii is an AI agent-based comic drama generation platform that automatically transforms user creative stories into complete video works. By leveraging collaboration among multiple specialized AI agents, the platform facilitates script writing, character design, storyboard creation, and video generation, supporting real-time feedback and precise regeneration, making it suitable for creative production, education, and entertainment.

summary.zh: 扁仓中医大模型致力于推动大语言模型在传统中医领域的应用，辅助医生诊断和患者自我评估。该模型基于Qwen2/2.5，采用两阶段训练方法，已在中医辨病辨证等任务中取得先进性能，并在医学执照考试中表现优异。开源的模型权重包括多个版本，旨在提升中医医疗水平和传承。
summary.en: BianCang Traditional Chinese Medicine Model aims to advance the application of large language models in traditional Chinese medicine, assisting doctors in diagnosis and patients in self-assessment. Based on Qwen2/2.5, it employs a two-stage training method, achieving state-of-the-art performance in TCM diagnosis tasks and excelling in medical licensing exams. The open-sourced model weights include multiple versions, aimed at enhancing TCM healthcare and heritage.

metadata.name: MING
metadata.description: 明医 (MING)：中文医疗问诊大模型

summary.zh: 明医（MING）是一个基于医疗指令微调的中文医疗问诊大模型，旨在提供精准的医疗问答和智能问诊服务。该模型支持多轮问诊，能够分析医疗案例并给出诊断建议，适用于医疗行业的智能客服和在线问诊场景。其技术亮点在于结合了稀疏混合低秩适配器专家的多任务学习方法，提升了模型的医疗问答能力。
summary.en: MING is a Chinese medical consultation large model based on medical instruction fine-tuning, designed to provide accurate medical Q&A and intelligent consultation services. The model supports multi-turn consultations, analyzing medical cases and offering diagnostic suggestions, making it suitable for smart customer service and online consultation in the healthcare industry. Its technical highlight lies in the integration of sparse mixture of low-rank adapter experts for enhanced multi-task learning in medical Q&A.

metadata.name: Zhongjing
metadata.description: A Chinese medical ChatGPT based on LLaMa, training from large-scale pretrain corpus and multi-turn dialogue dataset.

summary.zh: 仲景是首个实现从预训练到强化学习与人类反馈（RLHF）全流程训练的中文医疗大模型，基于LLaMa架构，展示出优异的对话能力。该模型经过70,000条真实医患对话数据集的训练，能够在多轮对话中接近专业医生水平，适用于医疗咨询、健康建议等场景。其独特之处在于结合主动医疗询问能力，提升了模型的实用性与安全性。
summary.en: Zhongjing is the first Chinese medical large model that implements a complete training process from pre-training to Reinforcement Learning with Human Feedback (RLHF), based on the LLaMa architecture. It demonstrates excellent dialogue capabilities and has been trained on a dataset of 70,000 real doctor-patient conversations, approaching the level of professional doctors in multi-turn dialogues. Its uniqueness lies in enhancing proactive medical inquiry abilities, improving the model's practicality and safety.

metadata.name: CMLM-ZhongJing
metadata.description: 首个中医大语言模型——“仲景”。受古代中医学巨匠张仲景深邃智慧启迪，专为传统中医领域打造的预训练大语言模型。  The first-ever Traditional Chinese Medicine large language model - "CMLM-ZhongJing". Inspired by the profound wisdom of the ancient Chinese medical master Zhang Zhongjing, it is a pre-trained large language model designed specifically for the field of Traditional Chinese Medicine.

summary.zh: CMLM-ZhongJing是首个专为传统中医领域设计的大语言模型，灵感源自古代医家张仲景。该模型通过多任务诊疗分解策略，结合超过13.5万条专业指令数据，展现出良好的跨专科泛化能力，支持多种诊疗场景。其轻量级部署特性使得在单张GPU上实现高速推理成为可能，旨在为中医药领域提供可靠的智能工具。
summary.en: CMLM-ZhongJing is the first large language model specifically designed for Traditional Chinese Medicine, inspired by the ancient physician Zhang Zhongjing. Utilizing a multi-task diagnosis strategy and over 135,000 professional instruction data, it demonstrates strong cross-disciplinary generalization capabilities across various diagnostic scenarios. Its lightweight deployment allows for high-speed inference on a single GPU, aiming to provide reliable intelligent tools for the TCM field.

metadata.name: axonhub
metadata.description: ⚡️ Open-source AI Gateway — Use any SDK to call 100+ LLMs. Built-in failover, load balancing, cost control & end-to-end tracing.

summary.zh: AxonHub 是一个开源的 AI 网关，支持无缝切换 100 多种大型语言模型（LLM），无需更改代码。其核心价值在于消除供应商锁定，简化集成复杂性，并提供全面的请求追踪和实时成本控制，适用于需要灵活接入多种 AI 模型的开发者和企业。
summary.en: AxonHub is an open-source AI gateway that allows seamless switching between over 100 large language models (LLMs) without code changes. Its core value lies in eliminating vendor lock-in, simplifying integration complexity, and providing comprehensive request tracing and real-time cost control, making it ideal for developers and enterprises needing flexible access to various AI models.

summary.zh: Aether 是一款自托管的 AI API 网关，支持 Claude、OpenAI、Gemini 等多种 AI 服务的统一接入和管理。其核心功能包括多租户管理、智能负载均衡和健康监控，致力于为用户提供高效、灵活的 AI 服务基础设施。适合团队和个人使用，支持 Docker 部署，简化了配置和管理流程。
summary.en: Aether is a self-hosted AI API gateway that supports unified access and management of various AI services, including Claude, OpenAI, and Gemini. Its core features include multi-tenant management, intelligent load balancing, and health monitoring, aimed at providing an efficient and flexible AI service infrastructure for teams and individuals. It supports Docker deployment, simplifying configuration and management processes.

metadata.name: aipyapp
metadata.description: AI-Powered Python & Python-Powered AI (Python-Use)

summary.zh: Python-Use 是一种任务驱动、结果导向的智能执行范式，紧密结合大型语言模型（LLM）与 Python 解释器，形成完整的执行循环。它简化了传统 AI 代理模型，消除了对外部工具和插件的依赖，使得用户只需提供任务描述，模型即可自动生成并执行 Python 代码，直接与环境交互。Python-Use 通过这种方式，重新连接了 AI 与现实世界，开启了 AI Think Do 时代。
summary.en: Python-Use is a task-driven, result-oriented intelligent execution paradigm that tightly integrates large language models (LLMs) with a Python interpreter to form a complete execution loop. It simplifies traditional AI agent models by eliminating reliance on external tools and plugins, allowing users to provide only a task description while the model autonomously generates and executes Python code, interacting directly with the environment. Python-Use reconnects AI with the real world, ushering in the AI Think Do era.

metadata.name: pure-genealogy
metadata.description: 基于supabase的家庭族谱（测试账号：test@test.com 密码：123456）

summary.zh: pure-genealogy 是一个基于 Next.js 15 和 Supabase 的现代化家族族谱管理系统，专为中文用户设计。它提供了强大的族谱可视化功能，包括2D和3D图形展示，支持成员档案管理和富文本生平记录。项目的技术亮点在于深度中文化的用户体验以及实时数据同步，适合家庭历史记录和族谱研究的应用场景。
summary.en: pure-genealogy is a modern family genealogy management system built on Next.js 15 and Supabase, tailored for Chinese users. It offers powerful visualization features, including 2D and 3D graph displays, along with member profile management and rich text biography recording. The project's highlights include a deeply localized user experience and real-time data synchronization, making it suitable for family history documentation and genealogy research.

metadata.name: Humanizer-zh
metadata.description: Humanizer 的汉化版本，Claude Code Skills，旨在消除文本中 AI 生成的痕迹。

summary.zh: Humanizer-zh 是一款专为中文用户设计的 AI 写作去痕工具，旨在消除文本中 AI 生成的痕迹，使内容更自然、更具人性化。该工具适用于编辑和审阅 AI 生成的内容，提升文章的可读性和真实感，帮助用户识别常见的 AI 写作模式。通过简单的安装和使用方法，用户可以轻松改写文本，确保信息的完整性与个性化表达。
summary.en: Humanizer-zh is an AI writing de-tracing tool designed for Chinese users, aimed at removing traces of AI-generated content to make texts more natural and human-like. This tool is suitable for editing and reviewing AI-generated content, enhancing readability and authenticity, and helping users identify common AI writing patterns. With simple installation and usage methods, users can easily rewrite texts while ensuring information integrity and personalized expression.

metadata.name: media-downloader
metadata.description: 🎬 智能媒体下载器 - 根据用户描述自动搜索和下载图片、视频片段 | Smart Media Downloader - Auto search and download images/videos based on description

summary.zh: 智能媒体下载器能够根据用户的描述自动搜索并下载图片和视频片段，支持自动裁剪功能。用户只需简单的语音指令，即可获取高质量的图像和视频，且无需复杂的API配置，极大地方便了内容创作和媒体获取。该项目支持中英文指令，适用于需要快速获取多媒体素材的用户。
summary.en: The Smart Media Downloader automatically searches and downloads images and video clips based on user descriptions, with auto-trimming capabilities. Users can obtain high-quality media through simple voice commands without complex API configurations, greatly facilitating content creation and media acquisition. The project supports both Chinese and English commands, catering to users needing quick access to multimedia resources.

metadata.name: openclaw
metadata.description: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞

summary.zh: OpenClaw 是一款个人 AI 助手，支持多种操作系统和平台，用户可以在自己的设备上运行。它能够通过常用的通讯渠道（如 WhatsApp、Telegram、Slack 等）与用户互动，并支持语音识别与实时画布渲染。该助手旨在提供快速、始终在线的本地体验，适合希望拥有私密助手的用户。
summary.en: OpenClaw is a personal AI assistant that runs on your own devices, compatible with multiple operating systems and platforms. It interacts with users through popular communication channels like WhatsApp, Telegram, and Slack, and supports voice recognition and live canvas rendering. The assistant aims to deliver a fast, always-on local experience, ideal for users seeking a private assistant.

metadata.name: astron-rpa
metadata.description: Agent-ready RPA suite with out-of-the-box automation tools. Built for individuals and enterprises.

summary.zh: AstronRPA 是一款企业级的机器人流程自动化（RPA）桌面应用，支持低代码/无代码开发，用户可通过可视化设计器快速构建工作流，自动化桌面软件和网页。它与 Astron Agent 平台深度集成，支持双向调用，实现自动化流程与智能代理系统的高效协作，适用于各种业务自动化场景。
summary.en: AstronRPA is an enterprise-grade Robotic Process Automation (RPA) desktop application that supports low-code/no-code development. Users can rapidly build workflows and automate desktop software and web pages through a visual designer. It is deeply integrated with the Astron Agent platform, enabling bi-directional calls for efficient collaboration between automation processes and intelligent agent systems, suitable for various business automation scenarios.

metadata.name: tgo
metadata.description: Open-source AI Agent Customer Service Platform. Build AI agent teams with LLM orchestration, RAG knowledge base, multi-channel support, and human collaboration.

summary.zh: TGO是一个开源的AI客服平台，旨在帮助企业构建AI客服团队。它集成了多渠道接入、代理编排、知识库管理（RAG）和人机协作等功能，支持多种大型语言模型的接入，提供实时响应和智能检索，适用于各种商业场景，提升客户服务效率和准确性。
summary.en: TGO is an open-source AI customer service platform designed to help enterprises build AI agent teams. It integrates multi-channel access, agent orchestration, RAG knowledge base management, and human collaboration. Supporting various large language models, it provides real-time responses and smart retrieval, making it suitable for diverse business scenarios and enhancing customer service efficiency and accuracy.

metadata.name: agentation
metadata.description: The visual feedback tool for agents.

summary.zh: Agentation 是一款与代理无关的可视化反馈工具，旨在帮助用户通过点击页面元素、添加注释并复制结构化输出，精确指向代码。其主要应用场景包括前端开发和用户体验设计，支持多种选择方式和动画暂停功能，确保用户能够清晰表达反馈。该工具无依赖，兼容 React 18 及以上版本，提升了与 AI 编程代理的交互效率。
summary.en: Agentation is an agent-agnostic visual feedback tool designed to help users precisely reference code by clicking on page elements, adding notes, and copying structured output. Its main applications include frontend development and user experience design, supporting various selection methods and animation pause features to ensure clear feedback expression. The tool is dependency-free, compatible with React 18+, enhancing interaction efficiency with AI coding agents.

metadata.name: wxpush
metadata.description: 一个极简且免费的微信消息推送服务

summary.zh: WXPush 是一个基于 Cloudflare Workers 的轻量级微信消息推送服务，提供简单的 API 接口，支持多用户消息推送。其核心特点包括完全免费、每日高达 10 万次的推送额度、原生弹窗和声音提醒等。用户可通过简单的配置和 Docker 部署实现快速上线，适合个人和小型团队使用。
summary.en: WXPush is a lightweight WeChat message push service built on Cloudflare Workers, offering a simple API for multi-user message delivery. Key features include being completely free, a daily limit of up to 100,000 pushes, native pop-up and sound alerts. Users can quickly deploy through straightforward configuration or Docker, making it ideal for individuals and small teams.

metadata.name: dive-into-llms
metadata.description: 《动手学大模型Dive into LLMs》系列编程实践教程

summary.zh: 《动手学大模型》系列编程实践教程旨在为学习者提供大模型相关的入门编程参考，内容涵盖微调、提示学习、知识编辑等多个主题。该教程基于上海交通大学课程，完全免费，适合希望通过实践快速掌握大模型技术的学生和研究者。项目强调公益性，致力于推动大模型的学习与应用。
summary.en: The 'Dive into LLMs' series of programming tutorials aims to provide beginners with practical references related to large models, covering topics such as fine-tuning, prompt learning, and knowledge editing. Based on courses from Shanghai Jiao Tong University, the tutorials are completely free and suitable for students and researchers looking to quickly grasp large model technologies through hands-on practice. The project emphasizes its non-profit nature, promoting the learning and application of large models.

metadata.name: WellAlly-health
metadata.description: Ally-Health is an intelligent healthcare assistant that combines Claude AI technology with medical expertise. Through natural language interaction, it helps users record symptoms, manage medications, track medical records, and access professional multidisciplinary consultation analysis—making health management smarter and more accessible

summary.zh: WellAlly健康助手是一个智能医疗助手，结合了Claude AI技术与医学专业知识。通过自然语言交互，用户可以记录症状、管理药物、跟踪医疗记录，并获取专业的多学科咨询分析，使健康管理更加智能和便捷。该系统支持无数据库的文件存储，具备智能医疗报告图像识别和药物相互作用检测等功能，适用于个人健康信息管理。
summary.en: WellAlly Health Assistant is an intelligent healthcare assistant that integrates Claude AI technology with medical expertise. Through natural language interaction, users can record symptoms, manage medications, track medical records, and access professional multidisciplinary consultation analysis, making health management smarter and more accessible. The system supports file-based storage without a database and features intelligent medical report image recognition and drug interaction detection, suitable for personal health information management.

metadata.name: aitu
metadata.description: AI绘图创作视频

summary.zh: Opentu是一个基于AI的图像和视频创作平台，提供在线绘图、思维导图和流程图等功能。其支持多种AI模型生成高质量图像和视频，具备插件化架构，方便用户自定义扩展。用户可通过一键部署快速搭建服务，适合教育、创意设计等多种应用场景。
summary.en: Opentu is an AI-driven platform for image and video creation, offering online drawing, mind mapping, and flowchart functionalities. It supports various AI models for generating high-quality images and videos, featuring a plugin architecture for easy customization. Users can quickly deploy the service, making it suitable for educational and creative design applications.

metadata.name: Pixelle-Video
metadata.description: 🚀 AI 全自动短视频引擎 | AI Fully Automated Short Video Engine

summary.zh: Pixelle-Video 是一款全自动短视频生成引擎，只需输入主题，便可自动撰写文案、生成配图、合成语音解说并添加背景音乐，最终一键合成视频。其零门槛的设计适合各类用户，尤其是内容创作者，提供多种 AI 模型和灵活的定制选项，支持多样化的视频风格与尺寸，极大地简化了视频制作流程。
summary.en: Pixelle-Video is a fully automated short video generation engine that allows users to create videos by simply inputting a theme. It automatically writes scripts, generates images, synthesizes voiceovers, and adds background music, culminating in a one-click video compilation. Designed for ease of use, it caters to content creators with various AI models and flexible customization options, supporting diverse video styles and formats, significantly simplifying the video production process.

metadata.name: torch-rechub
metadata.description: A Lighting Pytorch Framework for Recommendation Models, Easy-to-use and Easy-to-extend.

summary.zh: Torch-RecHub是一个轻量、高效且易用的PyTorch推荐系统框架，支持30多种主流推荐模型，旨在简化推荐系统的开发与部署。其模块化设计允许用户轻松扩展模型和评估指标，并支持ONNX导出以便于生产环境部署。框架还集成了多种可视化工具，确保实验结果的可复现性，适合于大数据处理和生成式推荐场景。
summary.en: Torch-RecHub is a lightweight, efficient, and user-friendly PyTorch framework for recommendation systems, supporting over 30 mainstream models. It simplifies the development and deployment of recommendation systems with a modular design that allows easy extension of models and evaluation metrics. The framework supports ONNX export for production deployment and integrates various visualization tools to ensure reproducibility, making it suitable for big data processing and generative recommendation scenarios.

metadata.name: universal-db-mcp
metadata.description: 通用数据库 MCP 连接器：支持 MySQL、PostgreSQL、Oracle、MongoDB 等 17 种数据库，支持 Claude Desktop、Cursor、Windsurf、VS Code、ChatGPT 等 50+ 平台，用自然语言查询和分析数据

summary.zh: 通用数据库 MCP 连接器支持 MySQL、PostgreSQL、Oracle、MongoDB 等 17 种数据库，能够通过自然语言与 AI 助手进行交互，简化数据查询和分析。该项目兼容 50 多个平台，提供灵活的架构和智能缓存，确保高效的数据访问与安全性，适用于需要快速、直观数据操作的开发者和企业。
summary.en: The Universal DB MCP connector supports 17 databases including MySQL, PostgreSQL, Oracle, and MongoDB, enabling natural language interactions with AI assistants for simplified data querying and analysis. Compatible with over 50 platforms, it offers a flexible architecture and intelligent caching, ensuring efficient data access and security, ideal for developers and enterprises needing quick and intuitive data operations.

metadata.name: opencowork
metadata.description: OpenCoWork is an open-source alternative to Claude Cowork. Local-first, secure, extensible. Like having a real colleague to help you organize files, manage tasks, and generate documents.

summary.zh: OpenCoWork 是一个开源的 Claude Cowork 替代方案，旨在提供本地优先、安全且可扩展的协作助手。它能够帮助用户组织文件、管理任务和生成文档，确保数据安全且不离开用户设备。该项目支持跨平台沙盒执行，具备一键回滚和插件扩展功能，适合需要高效协作的团队使用。
summary.en: OpenCoWork is an open-source alternative to Claude Cowork, designed to provide a local-first, secure, and extensible collaborative assistant. It helps users organize files, manage tasks, and generate documents while ensuring data remains on the user's device. The project supports cross-platform sandboxed execution, features one-click rollback, and plugin extensibility, making it ideal for teams requiring efficient collaboration.

metadata.name: snow-cli
metadata.description: Agentic coding in your terminal,Simultaneously compatible with OpenAI, Gemini, and Claude.

summary.zh: snow-ai 是一款终端中的智能编码工具，旨在提升开发者的编码效率。它支持多种高级配置，如代理设置、代码库集成和敏感命令保护，适合需要高效开发和安全管理的用户。该工具还提供命令面板、异步任务管理和漏洞检测等功能，适合开发者和安全分析师使用。
summary.en: snow-ai is an intelligent coding tool for the terminal, designed to enhance developer efficiency. It supports various advanced configurations such as proxy settings, codebase integration, and sensitive command protection, making it suitable for users requiring efficient development and secure management. The tool also offers features like command panels, async task management, and vulnerability detection, catering to developers and security analysts.

metadata.name: Dev-Janitor
metadata.description: Cross-platform desktop app for cleaning development artifacts, managing local developer tools, and checking common environment issues.

summary.zh: Dev Janitor 是一款跨平台桌面应用，旨在帮助开发者高效管理开发工具和依赖，智能清理无用文件，释放磁盘空间。其主要功能包括深度扫描、AI工具残留物清理、安全漏洞检测及系统健康监测，确保开发环境的整洁与安全，提升开发效率。
summary.en: Dev Janitor is a cross-platform desktop application designed to help developers efficiently manage development tools and dependencies while intelligently cleaning up unnecessary files to free up disk space. Key features include deep scanning, AI tool residue cleanup, security vulnerability detection, and system health monitoring, ensuring a tidy and secure development environment to enhance productivity.

metadata.name: edge-tts-go
metadata.description: 基于微软 edge 浏览器的大声朗读接口，开发的TTS 文字转语音 Golang 工具，包含晓晓、云扬、云希等“网红主播”

summary.zh: edge-tts-go 是一个基于微软 Edge 浏览器的 Golang 模块，提供文本到语音的转换服务，支持多种声音选择，包括晓晓、云扬等知名主播。用户可以通过简单的命令行操作或在 Go 代码中直接调用，灵活调整语速、音量和音调，适用于语音合成、朗读应用等场景。
summary.en: edge-tts-go is a Golang module that provides text-to-speech conversion services based on Microsoft Edge's online capabilities. It supports various voice options, including popular ones like Xiaoxiao and Yunyang. Users can easily operate via command line or directly integrate it into Go code, allowing flexible adjustments of speech rate, volume, and pitch, suitable for applications in voice synthesis and reading.

metadata.name: edge-tts
metadata.description: Edge TTS is a command-line tool based on Microsoft Edge's text-to-speech service, supporting multiple languages and voices. It can be used both as a command-line tool and as a Go library in your projects.

summary.zh: Edge TTS 是一款基于 Microsoft Edge 语音合成服务的命令行工具，支持多种语言和声音。用户可以通过命令行或将其作为 Go 库集成到项目中，轻松生成音频和字幕文件。其简洁的界面和丰富的功能使其适用于需要语音合成的各种场景，如教育、娱乐和开发。
summary.en: Edge TTS is a command-line tool based on Microsoft Edge's text-to-speech service, supporting multiple languages and voices. It can be utilized as both a command-line tool and a Go library in projects, allowing users to easily generate audio and subtitle files. Its simple interface and rich features make it suitable for various applications, including education, entertainment, and development.

metadata.name: pixels
metadata.description: Facilitates simple large scale processing of HLS Medical images, documents, zip files. OHIF Viewer, 2 segmentation models and interactive learning.

summary.zh: Pixels 项目旨在简化大规模处理 HLS 医学图像、文档和压缩文件的流程。它集成了 OHIF 查看器、两个分割模型以及交互式学习功能，适用于医疗影像分析和处理场景，帮助研究人员和开发者高效处理和分析医学数据。
summary.en: The Pixels project simplifies the large-scale processing of HLS medical images, documents, and zip files. It integrates the OHIF Viewer, two segmentation models, and interactive learning features, making it suitable for medical imaging analysis and processing, enabling researchers and developers to efficiently handle and analyze medical data.

metadata.name: huobao-drama
metadata.description: 🎬 火宝短剧 - 基于AI的一站式短剧生成平台 《一句话生成完整短剧，从剧本到成片全自动化》  Huobao Drama - An AI-Powered End-to-End Short Drama Generator "One Sentence to Complete Drama: Fully Automated from Script to Final Video"

summary.zh: 火宝短剧是一个基于AI的短剧生成平台，能够自动化从剧本创作到视频制作的整个流程。用户只需输入一句话，系统便能生成完整的短剧，包括角色设计、分镜头脚本和视频合成。该平台采用Go和Vue3构建，具备智能角色生成、自动分镜和视频编辑等功能，适合短视频创作者和内容生产者。
summary.en: Huobao Drama is an AI-powered short drama generation platform that automates the entire workflow from script creation to video production. Users can input a single sentence, and the system generates a complete short drama, including character design, storyboarding, and video composition. Built with Go and Vue3, it features intelligent character generation, automatic storyboarding, and video editing, making it ideal for short video creators and content producers.

metadata.name: cook
metadata.description: 🍲 好的，今天我们来做菜！OK, Let's Cook!

summary.zh: Cook 是一个专注于提供简单易用的菜谱平台，旨在帮助在特殊时期因材料有限而无法外出的人们。项目支持网页版本，用户可以通过网站轻松获取各种菜谱信息，且材料选择受到限制以适应居家需求。该项目还鼓励用户反馈和投稿菜谱，促进社区互动。
summary.en: Cook is a user-friendly recipe platform designed to assist those who are limited in ingredients during special circumstances. The project offers a web version where users can easily access various recipes, with ingredient choices tailored to home-cooking needs. It encourages community interaction by allowing users to provide feedback and submit recipes.

metadata.name: aigc-weekly
metadata.description: Agili 的 AIGC 周刊 - 一个由 Agentic AI Agent 驱动的 AIGC（人工智能生成内容）精选周刊。

summary.zh: Agili 的 AIGC 周刊是一个基于 Agentic AI Agent 驱动的人工智能生成内容平台，利用最新的 AI 和 Serverless 技术，提供精选的资讯、工具和资源。该项目采用 Next.js、Payload CMS 和 Cloudflare 构建，具备高性能和低延迟的特点，适合对 AIGC 领域感兴趣的开发者和内容创作者。
summary.en: Agili's AIGC Weekly is a curated platform driven by Agentic AI Agent, utilizing the latest AI and Serverless technologies to provide selected news, tools, and resources. Built on Next.js, Payload CMS, and Cloudflare, it features high performance and low latency, making it ideal for developers and content creators interested in the AIGC domain.

metadata.name: axton-obsidian-visual-skills
metadata.description: Visual Skills Pack for Obsidian: generate Canvas, Excalidraw, and Mermaid diagrams from text with Claude Code

summary.zh: Obsidian Visual Skills Pack 是一个用于生成 Canvas、Excalidraw 和 Mermaid 图表的工具，能够将文本转化为可视化内容。该项目支持多种图表类型，如流程图、思维导图和层级图，适用于项目管理、概念扩展和数据可视化等场景。其核心亮点在于简化的使用方式和对中文的全面支持，适合需要快速生成视觉内容的用户。
summary.en: The Obsidian Visual Skills Pack is a tool for generating Canvas, Excalidraw, and Mermaid diagrams from text. It supports various diagram types, including flowcharts, mind maps, and hierarchical charts, making it suitable for project management, concept expansion, and data visualization. Its key highlights include a simplified usage process and comprehensive support for Chinese, catering to users needing quick visual content generation.

metadata.name: AI-Media2Doc
metadata.description: 一键将音视频转化为小红书/公众号/知识笔记/思维导图/视频字幕等各种风格的文档。

summary.zh: AI-Media2Doc 是一款基于 AI 的音视频转文档工具，支持将视频和音频内容一键转换为小红书、公众号等多种风格的文档。该工具完全开源，无需注册，保护用户隐私，支持本地部署，且具备智能截图、字幕导出等功能，适合内容创作者和学习者使用。
summary.en: AI-Media2Doc is an AI-based tool that converts audio and video content into various document styles such as Xiaohongshu and WeChat public accounts. This fully open-source tool requires no registration, ensuring user privacy, and supports local deployment. It features intelligent screenshot capabilities and subtitle export, making it ideal for content creators and learners.

metadata.name: Free-NTFS-for-Mac
metadata.description: Nigate: An open-source NTFS utility for Mac. It supports all Mac models (Intel and Apple Silicon), providing full read-write access, mounting, and management for NTFS drives.

summary.zh: Nigate 是一款开源的 NTFS 工具，专为 Mac 设计，支持 Intel 和 Apple Silicon 所有型号，提供完整的读写访问、挂载和管理 NTFS 驱动器。其现代化的 Electron 界面使得 NTFS 设备管理更加直观，具备实时监控、自动挂载、状态显示等功能，确保用户在操作时的安全性与便利性。
summary.en: Nigate is an open-source NTFS utility designed for Mac, supporting all models including Intel and Apple Silicon. It offers full read-write access, mounting, and management for NTFS drives. With a modern Electron interface, it provides intuitive device management, featuring real-time monitoring, auto-mounting, and status displays, ensuring user safety and convenience during operations.

metadata.name: antigravity-proxy
metadata.description: 🚀 Transparent proxy injector for Antigravity. Force SOCKS5/HTTP proxy without TUN mode on Windows. | 专为 Antigravity 打造的免 TUN 强制代理工具，支持 DLL 注入与进程流量劫持。

summary.zh: Antigravity-Proxy 是一款专为 Antigravity 编辑器设计的透明代理注入工具，支持在 Windows 系统上无需 TUN 模式强制使用 SOCKS5/HTTP 代理。它解决了用户在使用 Antigravity 时必须开启全局代理的问题，允许用户仅代理特定进程，避免了对本地开发的干扰。该工具简单易用，适合希望在中国环境下稳定使用 Antigravity 的开发者。
summary.en: Antigravity-Proxy is a transparent proxy injector tailored for the Antigravity editor, enabling the use of SOCKS5/HTTP proxies on Windows without TUN mode. It addresses the issue of needing a global proxy when using Antigravity, allowing users to proxy only specific processes and avoiding interference with local development. This tool is user-friendly and ideal for developers looking to use Antigravity reliably in China.

metadata.name: opencode-antigravity-auth
metadata.description: Enable Opencode to authenticate against Antigravity (Google's IDE) via OAuth so you can use Antigravity rate limits and access models like gemini-3-pro and claude-opus-4-5-thinking with your Google credentials.

summary.zh: opencode-antigravity-auth 插件使 Opencode 能够通过 OAuth 认证访问 Google 的 Antigravity IDE，用户可以利用 Antigravity 的速率限制和访问高级模型（如 gemini-3-pro 和 claude-opus-4-6-thinking）。该插件支持多账户管理、双配额系统和自动恢复功能，适合需要高效利用 Google 资源的开发者，但使用时需注意可能违反 Google 服务条款的风险。
summary.en: The opencode-antigravity-auth plugin enables Opencode to authenticate against Google's Antigravity IDE via OAuth, allowing users to leverage Antigravity's rate limits and access advanced models like gemini-3-pro and claude-opus-4-6-thinking. It supports multi-account management, a dual quota system, and auto-recovery features, making it ideal for developers looking to efficiently utilize Google resources, though users should be aware of potential violations of Google's Terms of Service.

metadata.name: unsloth-mlx
metadata.description: Bringing the Unsloth experience to Mac users via Apple's MLX framework

summary.zh: Unsloth-MLX 是一个专为 Mac 用户设计的工具，利用 Apple 的 MLX 框架在本地进行大语言模型（LLM）的微调。它允许用户在 Mac 上快速原型开发，并无缝迁移到云端，无需重写代码。该项目解决了在 Mac 上使用 Unsloth 的局限性，提供了与 Unsloth 相同的 API，支持快速实验和迭代，适合希望降低云计算成本的开发者。
summary.en: Unsloth-MLX is a tool designed for Mac users that leverages Apple's MLX framework for fine-tuning large language models (LLMs) locally. It enables users to quickly prototype on their Mac and seamlessly transition to the cloud without rewriting code. This project addresses the limitations of using Unsloth on Macs, offering the same API for rapid experimentation and iteration, making it ideal for developers looking to reduce cloud computing costs.

metadata.name: DeepTutor
metadata.description: "DeepTutor: Agent-Native Personalized Learning Assistant"

summary.zh: DeepTutor 是一款基于人工智能的个性化学习助手，旨在通过大规模文档知识问答、互动学习可视化和知识强化等功能，提升学习体验。该项目结合了 Python、FastAPI、React 和 Next.js 等现代技术栈，适用于教育领域，尤其是在线学习和自适应学习系统。其技术亮点包括知识生成、深度研究和创意生成，适合希望提升学习效率的用户。
summary.en: DeepTutor is an AI-powered personalized learning assistant designed to enhance the learning experience through features like massive document knowledge Q&A, interactive learning visualization, and knowledge reinforcement. Built with modern technologies such as Python, FastAPI, React, and Next.js, it targets the education sector, particularly online and adaptive learning systems. Key highlights include knowledge generation, deep research, and idea generation, making it ideal for users seeking to improve learning efficiency.

metadata.name: MiroThinker
metadata.description: MiroThinker is a deep research agent optimized for complex research and prediction tasks. Our latest models, MiroThinker-1.7, achieves 74.0 and 75.3 on the BrowseComp and BrowseComp Zh, respectively.

summary.zh: MiroThinker 是一个开源深度研究代理，专为研究和预测优化，在 GAIA 基准测试中取得了 80.8% 的 Avg@8 分数。该项目包含 MiroFlow 工具框架和 MiroVerse 数据集，支持多种文件格式的上传，旨在提升研究效率和准确性，适用于学术研究、金融预测等领域。
summary.en: MiroThinker is an open-source deep research agent optimized for research and prediction, achieving an 80.8% Avg@8 score on the GAIA benchmark. The project includes the MiroFlow tool framework and MiroVerse dataset, supporting various file formats for upload. It aims to enhance research efficiency and accuracy, suitable for academic research, financial forecasting, and more.

metadata.name: eino
metadata.description: The ultimate LLM/AI application development framework in Go.

summary.zh: Eino是一个基于Golang的LLM应用开发框架，借鉴了LangChain和Google ADK等开源框架，遵循Go语言的约定。它提供可重用的组件、AI代理开发工具包（ADK）以及将组件连接成图形和工作流的能力，适用于构建复杂的AI应用。Eino支持多代理协调、上下文管理和人机交互，适合开发智能聊天机器人和数据分析工具。
summary.en: Eino is a LLM application development framework in Golang, inspired by LangChain and Google ADK, adhering to Go conventions. It offers reusable components, an AI Agent Development Kit (ADK), and the ability to connect components into graphs and workflows, making it suitable for building complex AI applications. Eino supports multi-agent coordination, context management, and human-in-the-loop interactions, ideal for developing intelligent chatbots and data analysis tools.

metadata.name: claude-scientific-skills
metadata.description: A set of ready to use Agent Skills for research, science, engineering, analysis, finance and writing.

summary.zh: Claude Scientific Skills 是一个全面的科学和研究技能集合，包含148种以上的即用型技能，适用于生物学、化学、医学等多个领域。该项目支持开放的 Agent Skills 标准，能够与 Cursor、Claude Code、Codex 等多种 AI 代理协同工作，帮助用户执行复杂的科学工作流，提升研究和分析效率。
summary.en: Claude Scientific Skills is a comprehensive collection of over 148 ready-to-use skills for science and research, applicable across biology, chemistry, medicine, and more. Supporting the open Agent Skills standard, it works with various AI agents like Cursor, Claude Code, and Codex, enabling users to execute complex scientific workflows and enhance research and analysis efficiency.

summary.zh: AntAngelMed是由浙江省健康信息中心、安健康医疗和浙江安诊儿医学人工智能科技有限公司联合开发的开源医疗语言模型，具备世界领先的医疗能力。该模型在OpenAI的HealthBench和中国权威基准MedAIBench上表现优异，采用三阶段训练流程，结合高效推理技术，实现了深厚的医学知识和安全伦理遵循，适用于医疗问答和诊断推理等场景。
summary.en: AntAngelMed is an open-source medical language model jointly developed by the Health Information Center of Zhejiang Province, Ant Healthcare, and Zhejiang Anzhen'er Medical AI Technology Co., Ltd. It showcases world-leading medical capabilities, outperforming all open-source and many proprietary models on OpenAI's HealthBench and the authoritative MedAIBench. With a rigorous three-stage training process and efficient inference technology, it is well-suited for medical Q&A and diagnostic reasoning.

metadata.name: arboris-novel
metadata.description: AI 写作伙伴，点亮你的创作灵感

summary.zh: Arboris-Novel 是一款面向创作者的 AI 写作辅助工具，旨在帮助用户克服创作瓶颈。它通过角色、地点和故事线的管理，提供灵感和草稿生成，支持多版本对比，帮助创作者理清思路，提升写作效率。该工具不仅适合小说创作，也可用于其他文学作品的构思与撰写。
summary.en: Arboris-Novel is an AI writing assistant designed for creators to overcome creative blocks. It aids users in managing characters, locations, and storylines, providing inspiration and draft generation, while supporting multi-version comparison to enhance writing efficiency. This tool is suitable not only for novel writing but also for the conception and drafting of other literary works.

metadata.name: fqnovel-unidbg
metadata.description: 使用unidbg模拟so库执行，调用fqnovel安卓端接口

summary.zh: fqnovel-unidbg项目利用unidbg技术模拟安卓端so库的执行，主要用于调用fqnovel的接口并进行签名。项目实现了书籍搜索、书籍信息获取、目录及章节内容批量获取等功能，适合开发者进行二次开发和接口扩展。加解密算法借鉴了其他开源项目，代码部分由GitHub Copilot生成，存在优化空间。
summary.en: The fqnovel-unidbg project utilizes unidbg technology to simulate the execution of Android SO libraries, primarily for calling fqnovel's APIs and performing signatures. It implements features such as book search, book information retrieval, directory access, and batch chapter content fetching, making it suitable for developers for further development and API expansion. The encryption and decryption algorithms reference other open-source projects, and the code is partially generated by GitHub Copilot, leaving room for optimization.

metadata.name: pocketpal-ai
metadata.description: An app that brings language models directly to your phone.

summary.zh: PocketPal AI 是一款便携式 AI 助手应用，支持在 iOS 和 Android 设备上直接运行小型语言模型，无需互联网连接，确保用户隐私。其核心功能包括离线 AI 助理、模型灵活性、个性化助手创建以及 Hugging Face 集成，适用于需要随时随地获取语言模型支持的用户。
summary.en: PocketPal AI is a pocket-sized AI assistant app that runs small language models directly on iOS and Android devices without the need for an internet connection, ensuring user privacy. Key features include offline AI assistance, model flexibility, personalized assistant creation, and Hugging Face integration, making it ideal for users needing language model support anytime, anywhere.

metadata.name: MAI-UI
metadata.description: MAI-UI: Real-World Centric Foundation GUI Agents ranging from 2B to 235B

summary.zh: MAI-UI 是一系列以用户为中心的 GUI 代理基础模型，涵盖从 2B 到 235B 的多种规模。其核心技术包括增强的代理用户交互、设备与云的协作系统，以及动态强化学习扩展，支持高达 512 个并行环境和 50 的上下文长度。MAI-UI 在 GUI 定位和导航任务上取得了新的基准 SOTA 结果，展示了其卓越的性能和广泛的应用潜力。
summary.en: MAI-UI is a family of user-centric GUI agent foundation models ranging from 2B to 235B in size. Key technologies include enhanced agent-user interaction, a device-cloud collaboration system, and dynamic reinforcement learning scaling, supporting up to 512 parallel environments and a context length of 50. MAI-UI sets new benchmark SOTA results in GUI grounding and navigation tasks, showcasing its exceptional performance and broad application potential.

metadata.name: sure
metadata.description: The personal finance app for everyone. NOT affiliated with or endorsed by Maybe Finance Inc.

summary.zh: Sure 是一款面向所有人的个人财务应用，旨在帮助用户自我管理财务。该项目是 Maybe Finance 的社区分支，允许用户自托管并提供丰富的财务管理功能，包括与专业顾问的连接。尽管经历了商业挑战，该应用仍致力于通过开源方式保持代码库的活力，鼓励社区参与和贡献。
summary.en: Sure is a personal finance app designed for everyone, enabling users to manage their finances independently. This project is a community fork of Maybe Finance, allowing self-hosting and offering comprehensive financial management features, including connections with professional advisors. Despite facing business challenges, the app aims to keep the codebase alive through open-source contributions and community involvement.

metadata.name: resume-polish
metadata.description: 简历润色

summary.zh: Resume.polish() 是一款专为程序员设计的简历润色工具，能够将普通描述转化为专业简历语言。用户可免费使用50次，支持多种AI服务，提供三种版本的润色结果，满足不同需求。其技术栈包括 React、TypeScript 和 Supabase，易于使用和集成，适合求职者提升简历质量。
summary.en: Resume.polish() is a resume enhancement tool designed for programmers, transforming plain descriptions into professional resume language. Users can utilize 50 free attempts and access various AI services, offering three versions of polished results to meet diverse needs. Built with React, TypeScript, and Supabase, it is easy to use and integrate, ideal for job seekers looking to improve their resumes.

metadata.name: WeChatAuto.SDK
metadata.description: WeChatAuto.SDK 是一款面向 AI 的微信 PC 客户端自动化 SDK，基于 .NET 与 UI 自动化技术开发。它支持消息收发、转发、群聊与好友管理、朋友圈操作等多种功能，并专为集成人工智能（如 LLM 上下文交互）场景设计

summary.zh: WeChatAuto.SDK 是一款基于 .NET 的微信 PC 客户端自动化 SDK，专为 AI 场景设计。它支持消息收发、群聊管理、朋友圈操作等功能，并提供直观的 API，便于集成人工智能应用。该 SDK 兼容多种 Windows 环境，支持多实例管理和事件监听，适合需要高效自动化的开发者和企业。
summary.en: WeChatAuto.SDK is an AI-oriented automation SDK for the WeChat PC client, developed on .NET. It supports various functionalities such as message sending, group management, and Moments operations, providing intuitive APIs for easy AI integration. The SDK is compatible with multiple Windows environments, supports multi-instance management, and event listening, making it suitable for developers and enterprises seeking efficient automation.

metadata.name: resume
metadata.description: A Feature-Rich Resume Builder that Supports Flexible Customization

summary.zh: 该简历生成器是一个功能丰富的工具，支持灵活的自定义，帮助用户快速创建、编辑和导出专业简历。其核心价值在于本地存储和模块化设计，用户可以方便地管理多份简历，并实时预览编辑效果。支持多种导出格式，包括PDF和图片，适合求职者和自由职业者使用。
summary.en: This resume builder is a feature-rich tool that supports flexible customization, enabling users to quickly create, edit, and export professional resumes. Its core value lies in local storage and modular design, allowing users to manage multiple resumes easily and preview edits in real-time. It supports various export formats, including PDF and images, making it suitable for job seekers and freelancers.

metadata.name: fastapi-best-practices
metadata.description: FastAPI Best Practices and Conventions we used at our startup

summary.zh: 该仓库提供了在初创公司中使用 FastAPI 的最佳实践和规范，涵盖项目结构、异步路由、Pydantic 使用、依赖管理等多个方面。通过分享多年的开发经验，作者总结了有效的策略和常见的错误，以提升开发者体验，适合希望优化 FastAPI 应用架构的团队和开发者。
summary.en: This repository offers best practices and conventions for using FastAPI in startups, covering project structure, async routes, Pydantic usage, and dependency management. By sharing years of development experience, the author summarizes effective strategies and common pitfalls to enhance developer experience, making it suitable for teams and developers looking to optimize their FastAPI application architecture.

metadata.name: sub2api
metadata.description: Sub2API-CRS2 一站式开源中转服务，让 Claude、Openai 、Gemini、Antigravity订阅统一接入，支持拼车共享，更高效分摊成本，原生工具无缝使用。

summary.zh: Sub2API 是一款开源的 AI API 网关平台，旨在高效管理和分配来自多个 AI 产品的订阅配额。它支持多账户管理、精确计费和智能调度，使用户能够通过平台生成的 API 密钥访问上游 AI 服务。此工具特别适合需要共享和分摊订阅成本的团队，提供了便捷的管理界面和强大的功能。
summary.en: Sub2API is an open-source AI API gateway platform designed to efficiently manage and distribute subscription quotas from multiple AI products. It supports multi-account management, precise billing, and smart scheduling, allowing users to access upstream AI services via platform-generated API keys. This tool is particularly suitable for teams needing to share and distribute subscription costs, offering a convenient management interface and powerful features.

metadata.name: mingpan
metadata.description: 命盘（Mingpan） 是一个中华传统术数 MCP 服务，为 Claude 等 AI 应用提供命理排盘与占卜起卦的计算能力。

summary.zh: 命盘（Mingpan）是一个提供中华传统命理排盘与占卜服务的MCP服务器，专为AI应用如Claude设计。其核心价值在于通过八字命理、紫微斗数等工具，帮助用户分析人生运势与进行占卜。项目支持中文输出，结构化文本格式便于AI理解，适用于命理学爱好者及相关应用开发者。
summary.en: Mingpan is an MCP server that offers traditional Chinese astrology charting and divination services, specifically designed for AI applications like Claude. Its core value lies in providing tools for BaZi astrology, Zi Wei Dou Shu, and more, helping users analyze life fortunes and perform divination. The project supports Chinese output and structured text format for better AI comprehension, making it suitable for astrology enthusiasts and related application developers.

metadata.name: guidance
metadata.description: A guidance language for controlling large language models.

summary.zh: Guidance 是一种高效的编程范式，用于控制大型语言模型。它通过提供灵活的输出结构控制，减少了传统提示或微调的延迟和成本。用户可以使用正则表达式和上下文自由文法约束生成，同时无缝地交替控制和生成，适用于各种语言模型，提升了开发者的使用体验。
summary.en: Guidance is an efficient programming paradigm for steering large language models. It offers flexible output structure control, reducing latency and costs compared to conventional prompting or fine-tuning. Users can constrain generation with regex and context-free grammars while seamlessly interleaving control and generation, making it suitable for various language models and enhancing the developer experience.

metadata.name: go-admin
metadata.description: 基于golang+react18的后台管理系统，力求适中简化后台开发过程，满足中小项目开发需要。目前根据自身需要正不断迭代完善中

summary.zh: go-admin是一个基于Golang和React 18的后台管理系统，旨在简化中小型项目的开发过程。它采用了Gin、TypeScript和Ant Design 5等现代技术栈，提供了用户管理、权限控制、数据权限管理等基础功能，并支持多语言和插件化管理。项目经过精简和优化，适合开发者根据自身需求进行二次开发和迭代。
summary.en: go-admin is a backend management system based on Golang and React 18, designed to simplify the development process for small to medium-sized projects. Utilizing modern tech stacks like Gin, TypeScript, and Ant Design 5, it offers essential features such as user management, permission control, and data permission management, while supporting multilingual and plugin management. The project has been streamlined and optimized, making it suitable for developers to customize and iterate based on their needs.

metadata.name: Fabric
metadata.description: Fabric is an open-source framework for augmenting humans using AI. It provides a modular system for solving specific problems using a crowdsourced set of AI prompts that can be used anywhere.

summary.zh: Fabric是一个开源框架，旨在通过AI增强人类能力。它提供了一个模块化系统，允许用户根据实际任务组织和使用众包的AI提示，从而简化AI功能的整合。适用于各种工具，Fabric使得用户能够在一个地方创建、收集和管理重要的AI解决方案，提升工作效率。
summary.en: Fabric is an open-source framework designed to augment human capabilities using AI. It offers a modular system that allows users to organize and utilize crowdsourced AI prompts based on real-world tasks, simplifying the integration of AI functionalities. Suitable for various tools, Fabric enables users to create, collect, and manage essential AI solutions in one place, enhancing productivity.

metadata.name: pdf-craft
metadata.description: PDF craft can convert PDF files into various other formats. This project will focus on processing PDF files of scanned books.

summary.zh: PDF Craft 是一个高效的工具，专注于将扫描书籍的 PDF 文件转换为多种格式，如 Markdown 和 EPUB。基于 DeepSeek OCR 技术，该项目能够准确识别复杂内容，包括表格和公式，并在本地完成转换，确保内容完整性和可读性。其自动识别文档结构的功能，使得转换过程快速且高效，适合学术和技术文档的处理。
summary.en: PDF Craft is an efficient tool focused on converting scanned book PDFs into various formats like Markdown and EPUB. Based on DeepSeek OCR technology, it accurately recognizes complex content such as tables and formulas, completing the conversion locally to ensure content integrity and readability. Its ability to automatically identify document structure makes the conversion process fast and efficient, suitable for handling academic and technical documents.

metadata.name: agentic-rag-for-dummies
metadata.description: A modular Agentic RAG built with LangGraph — learn Retrieval-Augmented Generation Agents in minutes.

summary.zh: Agentic RAG for Dummies 是一个基于 LangGraph 的模块化检索增强生成（RAG）系统，旨在快速学习和构建智能代理。该项目提供了分层索引、对话记忆和查询澄清等功能，支持灵活的组件替换，适合新手和开发者。通过交互式笔记本和模块化架构，用户可以轻松掌握核心概念并快速实现自定义应用。
summary.en: Agentic RAG for Dummies is a modular Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system built with LangGraph, designed for quick learning and development of intelligent agents. The project features hierarchical indexing, conversation memory, and query clarification, supporting flexible component swapping, making it suitable for both beginners and developers. With an interactive notebook and modular architecture, users can easily grasp core concepts and rapidly implement custom applications.

metadata.name: tgbot-verify
metadata.description: 一个基于 Python Telegram Bot 的自动化认证工具，能够自动完成 SheerID 平台的学生/教师身份验证流程。

summary.zh: 这是一个基于 Python 的 Telegram 机器人，旨在自动化 SheerID 平台的学生和教师身份认证流程。该工具通过自动生成身份信息和创建认证文档，简化了认证步骤，支持多种服务的认证，包括 Spotify 和 YouTube Premium。其核心功能包括安全的 MySQL 数据库管理、并发请求控制和积分系统，适合需要快速身份验证的用户。
summary.en: This is a Python-based Telegram bot designed to automate the student and teacher identity verification process on the SheerID platform. The tool simplifies the verification steps by automatically generating identity information and creating verification documents, supporting various services including Spotify and YouTube Premium. Core features include secure MySQL database management, concurrent request control, and a points system, making it suitable for users needing quick identity verification.

metadata.name: banana-slides
metadata.description: 一个基于nano banana pro🍌的原生AI PPT生成应用，迈向真正的＂Vibe PPT＂; 支持上传任意模板图片；上传任意素材&智能解析；一句话/大纲/页面描述自动生成PPT；口头修改指定区域、一键导出可编辑ppt - An AI-native slides generator based on nano banana pro🍌

summary.zh: Banana Slides 是一款基于 nano banana pro🍌 的原生 AI PPT 生成应用，旨在降低 PPT 制作门槛，支持用户通过简单的想法、描述或大纲快速生成美观的演示文稿。它具备智能解析上传素材、自然语言修改和多格式导出等功能，适用于教育、职场和个人创作等多种场景，助力用户轻松实现高质量的 PPT 制作。
summary.en: Banana Slides is a native AI PPT generator based on nano banana pro🍌, designed to lower the barrier for PPT creation. It allows users to quickly generate aesthetically pleasing presentations from simple ideas, descriptions, or outlines. With features like intelligent material parsing, natural language editing, and multi-format export, it caters to various scenarios including education, workplace, and personal projects, enabling users to effortlessly create high-quality PPTs.

metadata.name: Shadowrocket-ADBlock-Rules-Forever
metadata.description: 提供多款 Shadowrocket 规则，拥有强劲的广告过滤功能。每日 8 时重新构建规则。

summary.zh: 本项目提供了一系列针对 Shadowrocket 的广告过滤规则，旨在提升用户的上网体验。规则每日更新，涵盖了黑名单、白名单及自定义广告过滤，确保与 iOS 端兼容。通过自动化生成和开源社区的支持，用户可以轻松选择适合自己的规则，享受更畅快的网络环境。
summary.en: This project offers a series of ad-blocking rules for Shadowrocket, aimed at enhancing users' online experience. The rules are updated daily and include blacklists, whitelists, and custom ad filters, ensuring compatibility with iOS. With automated generation and community support, users can easily select rules that suit their needs for a smoother internet experience.

metadata.name: LunaTV-config
metadata.description: MoonTV/LunaTV源配置，每日自动检测API状态，可在CF部署CORSAPI中转被墙API，本人提供的CORSAPI仅为测试使用，请勿滥用！

summary.zh: LunaTV-config 是一个基于 Cloudflare Workers 的 API 代理工具，支持多种配置源的 JSON 订阅格式，便于用户在被墙环境中获取视频内容。项目提供了多种 API 请求转发功能，并支持 Base58 编码，适合需要稳定视频源的用户使用。
summary.en: LunaTV-config is an API proxy tool based on Cloudflare Workers, supporting various JSON subscription formats for different configuration sources, facilitating users to access video content in restricted environments. The project offers multiple API request forwarding functionalities and supports Base58 encoding, making it suitable for users needing stable video sources.

metadata.name: MindWord
metadata.description: 让写作像画图一样

summary.zh: MindWord 是一款基于思维导图的写作工具，旨在解决写作结构化难题。通过可视化的多层级思维导图与 Markdown 的双向同步编辑，用户可以轻松创建、编辑和导出文档。支持 AI 辅助生成节点，适合写作者、产品经理等，提供高效的文档结构化体验。
summary.en: MindWord is a writing tool based on mind mapping, designed to tackle the challenges of structured writing. With a visual multi-level mind map and bidirectional synchronization with Markdown, users can easily create, edit, and export documents. It supports AI-assisted node generation, making it suitable for writers, product managers, and others seeking an efficient document structuring experience.

metadata.name: MedLLMsPracticalGuide
metadata.description: [Nature Reviews Bioengineering🔥] Application of Large Language Models in Medicine.  A curated list of practical guide resources of Medical LLMs (Medical LLMs Tree, Tables, and Papers)

summary.zh: 本项目提供了医疗领域大语言模型（Medical LLMs）的实用指南资源，涵盖了相关论文、表格和树状结构，旨在为研究人员和从业者提供系统化的信息。该指南基于一篇综述论文，强调了大语言模型在医学中的应用和挑战，适用于医疗研究、临床实践和技术开发等场景。
summary.en: This project offers a curated list of practical guide resources for Medical Large Language Models (Medical LLMs), including relevant papers, tables, and trees, aimed at providing systematic information for researchers and practitioners. Based on a survey paper, it highlights the applications and challenges of large language models in medicine, suitable for medical research, clinical practice, and technology development.

metadata.name: WeChatPYAPI
metadata.description: 基于微信PC端的Python接口，开发者可通过Python轻松调用。实现微信机器人、群管理等强大的功能！3.9.10.19、4.0、4.x、x64、微信hook、微信接口

summary.zh: WeChatPYAPI是一个基于PC端的Python接口，旨在帮助开发者轻松实现微信机器人和群管理等功能。通过该接口，用户可以进行二次开发，支持HTTP调用，适用于多种微信版本。项目分为社区版和专业版，后者提供更强大的功能和稳定性，适合需要长时间运行的应用场景。
summary.en: WeChatPYAPI is a Python interface based on the PC version of WeChat, designed to help developers easily implement features like WeChat bots and group management. The interface supports HTTP calls and is suitable for various WeChat versions. The project offers both a community edition and a professional edition, with the latter providing enhanced functionality and stability for long-running applications.

metadata.name: models.dev
metadata.description: An open-source database of AI models.

summary.zh: Models.dev 是一个开源的 AI 模型数据库，提供模型规格、定价和能力的全面信息。该项目旨在填补当前缺乏统一数据库的空白，支持社区贡献，便于用户查找和比较不同 AI 模型。通过 API 访问数据，用户可以轻松获取模型信息和提供者的标识，促进 AI 技术的透明化和可访问性。
summary.en: Models.dev is an open-source database of AI model specifications, pricing, and capabilities. This project aims to fill the gap of a unified database for available AI models, supporting community contributions for easy model discovery and comparison. Users can access data through an API, facilitating transparency and accessibility in AI technology.

metadata.name: StoryGen-Atelier
metadata.description: AI-assisted storyboard and video generation tool. Uses Gemini for generating storyboard text and frames, Vertex AI Veo for generating transition clips, and ffmpeg for stitching the final video. Built-in logs and gallery management.

summary.zh: StoryGen Atelier 是一款 AI 辅助的故事板和视频生成工具，利用 Gemini 模型生成故事板文本和画面，使用 Vertex AI Veo 生成过渡片段，并通过 ffmpeg 拼接最终视频。该工具支持自定义样式和镜头数量，内置日志和画廊管理，适用于创意工作者和视频制作人。
summary.en: StoryGen Atelier is an AI-assisted storyboard and video generation tool that utilizes the Gemini model for creating storyboard text and frames, Vertex AI Veo for generating transition clips, and ffmpeg for stitching the final video. It supports custom styles and shot counts, with built-in log and gallery management, making it ideal for creative professionals and video producers.

metadata.name: cognee
metadata.description: The memory for your AI Agents in 6 lines of code

summary.zh: Cognee是一个开源知识引擎，旨在为AI代理构建持久且动态的记忆。它通过结合向量搜索、图数据库和自我改善技术，将原始数据转化为可搜索和相互关联的知识。这一工具适用于需要智能记忆的应用场景，如个性化助手和智能决策系统，能够在短短六行代码内实现强大的功能。
summary.en: Cognee is an open-source knowledge engine designed to build persistent and dynamic memory for AI agents. By combining vector search, graph databases, and self-improvement techniques, it transforms raw data into searchable and interconnected knowledge. This tool is ideal for applications requiring intelligent memory, such as personalized assistants and smart decision-making systems, achieving powerful functionality in just six lines of code.

summary.zh: L2do-export 是一款 Tampermonkey 用户脚本，旨在从 linux.do 论坛导出完整的帖子及其回复，支持 JSON 和 HTML 格式。该工具保留帖子格式、图片和链接，并提供图像嵌入选项，确保导出的文件自包含。用户可以轻松获取帖子元数据，处理引用关系，并自动去重标签，适合需要整理和存档论坛内容的用户。
summary.en: L2do-export is a Tampermonkey userscript designed to export complete forum posts and replies from linux.do in JSON or HTML format. It preserves post formatting, images, and links, with an option for image embedding to create self-contained files. Users can easily access post metadata, manage quoted relationships, and automatically deduplicate tags, making it ideal for users looking to organize and archive forum content.

metadata.name: linuxdo-scripts
metadata.description: LinuxDo Scripts 扩展，功能持续更新，欢迎提出新想法！已上架 Chrome Web Store 和 Firefox 商店！文档地址：https://linuxdo-scripts.zishu.me

summary.zh: LinuxDo Scripts 是一款功能强大的浏览器扩展，旨在提升 LinuxDo 论坛的用户体验。它集成了多项实用功能，包括界面优化和 AI 辅助，帮助用户更高效地浏览和互动。该扩展已在 Chrome 和 Firefox 商店上架，欢迎用户提出新功能建议，持续更新以满足社区需求。
summary.en: LinuxDo Scripts is a powerful browser extension designed to enhance the user experience of the LinuxDo forum. It integrates various practical features, including interface optimization and AI assistance, enabling users to browse and interact more efficiently. The extension is available on both Chrome and Firefox stores, inviting users to suggest new features for continuous updates to meet community needs.

metadata.name: transformer-explainer
metadata.description: Transformer Explained Visually: Learn How LLM Transformer Models Work with Interactive Visualization

summary.zh: Transformer Explainer 是一个互动可视化工具，旨在帮助用户理解基于 Transformer 的文本生成模型（如 GPT）的工作原理。用户可以在浏览器中实时实验，观察 Transformer 内部组件如何协同工作以预测下一个标记，适合教育和研究场景，提升对深度学习模型的理解。
summary.en: Transformer Explainer is an interactive visualization tool designed to help users understand how Transformer-based text-generative models like GPT work. Users can experiment in their browser and observe in real-time how internal components collaborate to predict the next tokens, making it suitable for educational and research purposes to enhance understanding of deep learning models.

metadata.name: Foundations-of-LLMs
metadata.description: A book for Learning the Foundations of LLMs

summary.zh: 《大模型基础》是一本系统讲解大语言模型基础知识的书籍，涵盖传统语言模型、模型架构演化、Prompt工程等六大主题。书中通过生动的动物背景使复杂技术易于理解，并附有相关论文列表以跟踪前沿进展。作者团队承诺定期更新，致力于打造严谨且易读的教材，适合科研、毕设等多种应用场景。
summary.en: The book 'Foundations of LLMs' systematically explains the fundamentals of large language models, covering six major themes including traditional language models, model architecture evolution, and prompt engineering. It uses engaging animal backgrounds to simplify complex technologies and includes a paper list to track cutting-edge developments. The author team commits to regular updates, aiming to create a rigorous yet accessible textbook suitable for various applications like research and projects.

metadata.name: PageIndex
metadata.description: 📑 PageIndex: Document Index for Vectorless, Reasoning-based RAG

summary.zh: PageIndex 是一个无向量、基于推理的文档索引系统，旨在提高长文档的检索准确性。它通过构建层次树索引，模拟人类专家的知识提取过程，实现上下文感知的检索。该系统特别适用于需要领域专业知识和多步骤推理的场景，解决了传统向量数据库在语义相似性上的局限性。
summary.en: PageIndex is a vectorless, reasoning-based document indexing system designed to enhance retrieval accuracy for long documents. By constructing a hierarchical tree index, it simulates how human experts extract knowledge, enabling context-aware retrieval. This system is particularly suited for scenarios requiring domain expertise and multi-step reasoning, addressing the limitations of traditional vector databases in semantic similarity.

metadata.name: MobiAgent
metadata.description: The Intelligent GUI Agent for Mobile Phones

summary.zh: MobiAgent 是一个强大的可定制移动代理系统，包含 MobiMind 模型家族、AgentRR 加速框架和 MobiFlow 基准。它支持在智能手机上进行纯本地推理，并通过统一的 GUI 代理运行器简化多模型配置。该系统适用于需要智能化和自动化操作的移动应用场景，具备多任务执行和用户个人资料记忆等先进特性。
summary.en: MobiAgent is a powerful and customizable mobile agent system that includes the MobiMind model family, the AgentRR acceleration framework, and the MobiFlow benchmark. It supports pure on-device inference on smartphones and simplifies multi-model configuration through a unified GUI agent runner. This system is ideal for mobile applications requiring intelligent and automated operations, featuring advanced capabilities like multi-task execution and user profile memory.

summary.zh: ShizhenGPT 是首个为传统中医设计的多模态大语言模型，具备深厚的中医知识，能够理解图像、声音、气味和脉搏等多种信息。该项目开源了最大的中医数据集，包括预训练和指令微调数据集，旨在提升中医相关任务的模型性能，适用于医疗、教育等领域。
summary.en: ShizhenGPT is the first multimodal large language model designed for Traditional Chinese Medicine (TCM), excelling in TCM knowledge and capable of understanding images, sounds, smells, and pulses. This project open-sources the largest TCM dataset, including pre-training and instruction fine-tuning datasets, aimed at enhancing model performance in TCM-related tasks, applicable in healthcare and education.

metadata.name: YPrompt
metadata.description: 通过对话挖掘用户需求，并自动生成专业的提示词，支持系统/用户提示词优化、效果对比，版本管理和支持即时渲染的操练场，新增通过多轮对话绘图改图，图片逆推提示词、绘图提示词优化，https://yprompt.252035.xyz   公共账号：demo / demo

summary.zh: YPrompt 是一个基于对话的 AI 工具，通过挖掘用户需求自动生成专业提示词，支持系统与用户的提示词优化、效果对比及版本管理。其操练场提供即时渲染功能，允许用户进行多轮对话生成和修改图像，同时支持图片逆推提示词及优化，适用于设计师和内容创作者。
summary.en: YPrompt is a dialogue-based AI tool that automatically generates professional prompts by mining user needs. It supports optimization and comparison of system and user prompts, as well as version management. The practice arena offers real-time rendering, enabling users to generate and modify images through multi-turn dialogues, along with reverse prompt generation and optimization, making it ideal for designers and content creators.

metadata.name: myclaude
metadata.description: Multi-agent orchestration workflow (Claude Code  Codex Gemini OpenCode)

summary.zh: Claude Code 多代理编排工作流系统，利用 AI 技术实现开发自动化，支持多后端执行（Codex、Claude、Gemini、OpenCode）。该系统提供模块化功能，包括特性开发、智能路由和轻量级需求到代码的管道，适用于快速原型、企业项目和bug修复等场景。其核心架构通过代理协同工作，提升开发效率和灵活性。
summary.en: The Claude Code Multi-Agent Workflow System leverages AI for development automation with multi-backend execution (Codex, Claude, Gemini, OpenCode). It offers modular features including feature development, intelligent routing, and a lightweight requirements-to-code pipeline, suitable for rapid prototyping, enterprise projects, and bug fixing. Its core architecture enhances development efficiency and flexibility through agent collaboration.

metadata.name: go-wind-admin
metadata.description: 这是一个前后端分离的中后台脚手架，后端基于go、go-kratos、ent、gorm等，前端有vue3和React两个版本。支持多租户、数据权限、动态Api、任务调度、OSS文件上传、滑块拼图验证、国内外主流数据库自由切换和动态高级查询。集成统一认证授权、事件总线、国际化、数据验证、分布式缓存、分布式事务、Ip限流、全Api鉴权、集成测试、性能分析、健康检查、接口文档等。

summary.zh: GoWind Admin 是一款基于 Golang 和 Vue 的企业级前后端分离管理系统，支持多租户、动态 API 和任务调度等功能。其后端采用 go-kratos 框架，前端使用 Vue3 和 Ant Design Vue，具备灵活的架构和高效的开发体验，适合各类企业级管理项目，显著提升开发效率。
summary.en: GoWind Admin is an enterprise-level front-end and back-end separation management system based on Golang and Vue, supporting multi-tenancy, dynamic APIs, and task scheduling. The back-end uses the go-kratos framework, while the front-end employs Vue3 and Ant Design Vue, offering a flexible architecture and efficient development experience, suitable for various enterprise management projects, significantly enhancing development efficiency.

metadata.name: chatwiki
metadata.description: ChatWiki 微信公众号的AI知识库工作流Agent平台，RAG大模型AI客服机器人，致力于成为垂直领域的coze、n8n。

summary.zh: ChatWiki 是一个专注于微信生态的AI知识库工作流平台，旨在将公众号转变为智能AI助手。其核心特性包括深度集成微信功能、自动回复、知识库同步及多种工作流编排，支持多种主流AI模型。适用于企业和个人公众号，提升用户互动和服务效率。
summary.en: ChatWiki is an AI knowledge base workflow platform focused on the WeChat ecosystem, designed to transform public accounts into intelligent AI assistants. Its core features include deep integration with WeChat functionalities, automatic replies, knowledge base synchronization, and various workflow orchestration, supporting multiple mainstream AI models. Ideal for businesses and individual public accounts to enhance user interaction and service efficiency.

metadata.name: gemini-3-pro-image-preview
metadata.description: Gemini 3 Pro - AI 绘图工作台 (Web Client)

summary.zh: Gemini 3 Pro 图像生成工作台是一个基于 Google Gemini 3 Pro 模型的现代化工具，提供直观的用户界面和强大的功能。支持批量并发生成、4K 渲染及本地存储，适用于多种创作场景。其响应式设计和暗黑模式提升了用户体验，适合桌面和移动端使用。
summary.en: Gemini 3 Pro Image Preview is a modern image generation workspace based on the Google Gemini 3 Pro model, featuring an intuitive user interface and powerful functionalities. It supports batch concurrent image generation, 4K rendering, and local storage, catering to various creative scenarios. Its responsive design and dark mode enhance user experience, suitable for both desktop and mobile use.

metadata.name: banana-prompt-quicker
metadata.description: 🍌Awesome Prompts; Nano Banana；Banana Pro; Gemini；AI Studio；Prompt Quickly   [gpt-5.5 -> https://token.glidea.app 0.2 倍率, 0.2元当1刀花，比官方便宜35倍]

summary.zh: Banana Prompt Quicker 是一款专为 AI 应用设计的浏览器扩展，支持在多个网站（如 Google AI Studio 和 Gemini）快速插入提示词。其核心价值在于简化用户在输入框中使用 AI 提示的流程，提升工作效率。项目还支持自定义提示词和多种实用功能，适合需要频繁使用 AI 生成内容的用户。
summary.en: Banana Prompt Quicker is a browser extension designed for AI applications, enabling quick insertion of prompts across multiple websites like Google AI Studio and Gemini. Its core value lies in simplifying the process of using AI prompts in input fields, enhancing user productivity. The project also supports custom prompts and various practical features, making it ideal for users who frequently generate content using AI.

summary.zh: UndyDraw 是一个基于 React 的现代化前端应用，专为与 Google 的 Gemini 3 Pro 模型交互而设计。它提供流畅的聊天界面，支持多模态输入，包括文本和图片上传，增强用户体验。新增的拖拽上传、图片历史记录和 API 余额管理功能，使得用户在使用 AI 时更加便捷。该应用还具备高度可配置性和现代化的 UI/UX，适用于需要与 AI 模型进行互动的场景。
summary.en: UndyDraw is a modern frontend application built with React, designed for interaction with Google's Gemini 3 Pro model. It offers a smooth chat interface supporting multimodal inputs, including text and image uploads, enhancing user experience. New features like drag-and-drop uploads, image history, and API balance management make it more convenient for users engaging with AI. The application also boasts high configurability and a modern UI/UX, suitable for scenarios requiring interaction with AI models.

metadata.name: HuLa
metadata.description: 🍀 A cross-platform instant messaging desktop application with exceptional performance built on Rust + Vue3, compatible with Windows, macOS, Linux, Android, and iOS（一款基于Rust+Vue3极致性能的跨平台即时通讯桌面应用，兼容Windows、MacOS、Linux、Android、IOS）

summary.zh: HuLa是一款基于Rust和Vue3构建的跨平台即时通讯桌面应用，兼容Windows、macOS、Linux、Android和iOS。其采用Tauri和Vite 7等现代技术栈，提供卓越的性能和用户体验，适合需要高效沟通的团队和个人用户。
summary.en: HuLa is a cross-platform instant messaging desktop application built on Rust and Vue3, compatible with Windows, macOS, Linux, Android, and iOS. Utilizing modern technologies like Tauri and Vite 7, it delivers exceptional performance and user experience, making it ideal for teams and individuals seeking efficient communication.

metadata.name: vscode
metadata.description: Visual Studio Code

summary.zh: Visual Studio Code 是一个开源的代码编辑器，结合了简单性与开发者在编辑、构建和调试过程中的核心需求。它提供全面的代码编辑、导航和理解支持，并具备轻量级调试和丰富的扩展性模型。每月更新的新特性和修复使其在开发者中备受欢迎，适用于 Windows、macOS 和 Linux。
summary.en: Visual Studio Code is an open-source code editor that combines simplicity with the core needs of developers in the edit-build-debug cycle. It offers comprehensive code editing, navigation, and understanding support, along with lightweight debugging and a rich extensibility model. Monthly updates with new features and fixes make it popular among developers, available for Windows, macOS, and Linux.

metadata.name: pydantic-ai
metadata.description: AI Agent Framework, the Pydantic way

summary.zh: Pydantic AI 是一个基于 Pydantic 的 Python 代理框架，旨在帮助用户快速、轻松地构建生产级的生成式 AI 应用和工作流。它支持多种模型和提供商，提供无缝的可观察性，并确保类型安全，极大地提升了开发效率。通过与 Pydantic Logfire 的集成，用户可以实现实时调试和性能监控，确保应用的高效运行。
summary.en: Pydantic AI is a Python agent framework built on Pydantic, designed to help users quickly and effortlessly create production-grade generative AI applications and workflows. It supports various models and providers, offers seamless observability, and ensures type safety, significantly enhancing development efficiency. With integration to Pydantic Logfire, users can achieve real-time debugging and performance monitoring, ensuring efficient application operation.

metadata.name: Video-Materials-AutoGEN-Workstation
metadata.description: 一个集内容策划、AI文案自动生成、TTS 批量自动配音、(AI)图片素材合成、ASR自动提取语言字幕脚本、AI自由创作于一体的(短视频)生成工作站。方便管理每期的视频项目。

summary.zh: Norsico的短视频生成工作站集成了内容策划、AI文案生成、TTS配音、图片素材合成及ASR字幕提取等多种功能，旨在简化视频项目管理。用户可通过模板批量生成视频，实时替换素材并预览效果，支持情感化配音和自由创作，适合短视频制作和内容创作者使用。
summary.en: Norsico's Video Material GEN Workstation integrates content planning, AI copywriting, TTS voiceover, image synthesis, and ASR subtitle extraction, aiming to simplify video project management. Users can batch-generate videos using templates, replace materials in real-time, and preview results, supporting emotional voiceovers and creative freedom, making it ideal for short video production and content creators.

metadata.name: Claudix
metadata.description: Gorgeous Claude Code Extend for VS Code.

summary.zh: Claudix 是一款为 VS Code 提供的扩展，集成了 Claude AI，成为交互式编程助手。其核心功能包括会话管理、智能代码分析和实时响应，极大提升了开发效率。适用于需要智能代码理解和工具集成的开发场景，特别适合使用 Claude 模型的用户。
summary.en: Claudix is a VS Code extension that integrates Claude AI, serving as an interactive coding assistant. Its core features include session management, intelligent code analysis, and real-time responses, significantly enhancing development efficiency. It is ideal for scenarios requiring smart code understanding and tool integration, especially for users utilizing Claude models.

metadata.name: ai-doctor
metadata.description: ai多医生会诊

summary.zh: AI医疗会诊面板是一个基于Vue 3和Pinia的前端系统，模拟多医生协同诊断。通过集成多个大语言模型，用户可以添加不同的AI医生进行会诊，实时讨论并智能评估诊断结果。该系统无需后端服务器，所有数据保存在浏览器本地，界面简洁直观，适合医疗领域的AI应用。
