summary.en: The AI Medical Consultation Panel is a front-end system developed with Vue 3 and Pinia, simulating multi-doctor collaborative diagnosis. By integrating multiple large language models, users can add different AI doctors for consultations, engage in real-time discussions, and intelligently evaluate diagnoses. The system requires no backend server, storing all data locally in the browser, making it suitable for AI applications in the medical field.

metadata.name: WriteHERE
metadata.description: An Open-Source AI Writing Project.

summary.zh: WriteHERE 是一个开源框架，通过人性化的自适应规划，革新了长篇写作。与传统的 AI 写作工具不同，WriteHERE 动态分解写作任务，结合递归规划、异构集成和实时适应能力，显著提升了小说创作和技术报告生成的效果。该项目致力于开放源代码，支持社区贡献，旨在推动研究和教育的发展。
summary.en: WriteHERE is an open-source framework that revolutionizes long-form writing through human-like adaptive planning. Unlike traditional AI writing tools, WriteHERE dynamically decomposes writing tasks and integrates recursive planning, heterogeneous integration, and real-time adaptation, significantly enhancing fiction writing and technical report generation. The project emphasizes open-source principles, community contributions, and aims to advance research and education.

summary.zh: AI Partner Chat 是一个基于 Claude Skills 的个性化对话系统，通过整合用户画像和智能笔记，提供上下文感知的对话体验。它能够记住用户的背景和偏好，生成个性化的回应，适用于需要持续性交流和个性化互动的场景。该项目的双画像系统和智能笔记检索功能使得对话更加自然和连贯。
summary.en: AI Partner Chat is a personalized conversation system based on Claude Skills, integrating user personas and smart notes to provide context-aware dialogue experiences. It remembers user backgrounds and preferences, generating personalized responses suitable for scenarios requiring continuous interaction and tailored communication. The dual persona system and intelligent note retrieval features make conversations more natural and coherent.

metadata.name: phi3-Chinese
metadata.description: Phi3 中文后训练模型仓库

summary.zh: phi3-Chinese是一个专注于Phi3中文后训练模型的仓库，致力于收集和分享各种Phi3的训练变体，提升其在手机等轻量设备上的应用潜力。该项目不仅提供多种模型下载链接，还包含相关的训练和部署教程，旨在帮助用户更好地利用Phi3技术。尽管目前存在词表过小和性能不如预期的问题，但其轻量化特性使其在特定场景下仍具备应用价值。
summary.en: phi3-Chinese is a repository focused on the Chinese post-training models of Phi3, dedicated to collecting and sharing various training variants to enhance its applicability on lightweight devices like smartphones. The project provides multiple model download links and includes tutorials on training and deployment, aiming to help users better utilize Phi3 technology. Although there are issues with a small vocabulary and performance not meeting expectations, its lightweight characteristics still offer value in specific scenarios.

metadata.name: skid-homework
metadata.description: Ergonomically designed, AI-powered homework solver. | 符合人体工程学设计、人工智能驱动的作业助手 | 平庸者的苦工到此为止，这是来自外星的效率补丁 (by Gemini)

summary.zh: 打滑作业平台是一款符合人体工程学设计的人工智能驱动作业助手，旨在提高学习效率。用户可以通过浏览器上传文件、拍照并提交给AI进行解析，支持多种输出格式和自定义答案风格。该平台强调无遥测、开源和无广告，适合学生和自学者使用，提供了便捷的操作体验与高效的作业解决方案。
summary.en: Skid Homework is an ergonomically designed AI-powered homework assistant aimed at enhancing learning efficiency. Users can upload files, take photos, and submit them to AI for parsing through a browser, supporting various output formats and customizable answer styles. The platform emphasizes no telemetry, open-source, and ad-free experience, making it suitable for students and self-learners, providing a convenient operation and efficient homework solutions.

metadata.name: MobiLlama
metadata.description: [ICLR-2025-SLLM Spotlight 🔥]MobiLlama : Small Language Model tailored for edge devices

summary.zh: MobiLlama 是一款针对边缘设备优化的小型语言模型，旨在实现高效、准确的自然语言处理。该模型采用了0.5亿参数的设计，强调在资源受限环境下的性能提升，适合需要低内存占用和能效的应用场景。通过参数共享策略，MobiLlama 在保持精度的同时，显著降低了预训练和部署成本，推动了小型语言模型的发展。
summary.en: MobiLlama is a small language model optimized for edge devices, aimed at achieving efficient and accurate natural language processing. With a design of 0.5 billion parameters, it emphasizes performance enhancement in resource-constrained environments, suitable for applications requiring low memory usage and energy efficiency. By employing a parameter sharing strategy, MobiLlama significantly reduces pre-training and deployment costs while maintaining accuracy, advancing the development of small language models.

metadata.name: bisheng
metadata.description: BISHENG is an open LLM devops platform for next generation Enterprise AI applications. Powerful and comprehensive features include: GenAI workflow, RAG, Agent, Unified model management, Evaluation, SFT, Dataset Management, Enterprise-level System Management, Observability and more.

summary.zh: BISHENG是一个开放的LLM开发运维平台，专为下一代企业AI应用而设计。其强大而全面的功能包括生成AI工作流、RAG、智能体、统一模型管理、评估、SFT、数据集管理及企业级系统管理等，广泛应用于多个行业的领先企业和财富500强公司，旨在推动智能应用的广泛实施。
summary.en: BISHENG is an open LLM devops platform designed for next-generation enterprise AI applications. Its powerful and comprehensive features include GenAI workflows, RAG, agents, unified model management, evaluation, SFT, dataset management, and enterprise-level system management. It is widely used by leading organizations and Fortune 500 companies, aiming to promote the widespread implementation of intelligent applications.

metadata.name: hello-agents
metadata.description: 📚 《从零开始构建智能体》——从零开始的智能体原理与实践教程

summary.zh: 《从零开始构建智能体》是一本系统性教程，旨在帮助学习者深入理解智能体的核心原理与应用。该项目结合理论与实践，涵盖智能体的定义、发展历程及构建方法，特别聚焦于AI原生智能体的实现。通过动手实践，读者将掌握智能体系统的设计与实现，推动个人从使用者转变为构建者，适合希望在智能体领域深入发展的学习者。
summary.en: The 'Hello-Agents' project is a comprehensive tutorial designed to help learners understand the core principles and applications of intelligent agents. It combines theory and practice, covering the definition, evolution, and construction methods of agents, with a focus on AI-native agents. Through hands-on practice, readers will master the design and implementation of agent systems, transitioning from users to builders, making it ideal for those looking to advance in the field of intelligent agents.

metadata.name: likeadmin_laravel
metadata.description: 🌟🌟🌟 likeadmin_php的Laravel版本  | likeadmin通用管理后台是快速开发前后端的解决方案，使用目前最流行的技术PHP8、TypeScript、 Laravel 11、Vue3、vite2、Element Plus1.2（ElementUI）。 PHP管理后台、ThtinkPHP管理后台、前后端分离管理后台、Vue3管理后台、Vue.js管理后台、Element Plus管理后台、Element UI管理后台、简单管理后台

summary.zh: likeadmin_laravel 是基于 Laravel 11 的全栈开发框架，旨在快速构建前后端分离的管理后台。该项目兼容 likeadmin_php 的数据库结构和 API 接口，使用 PHP 8、TypeScript、Vue3 和 Element Plus 等现代技术栈，支持多种平台（PC、移动端、小程序）。其设计目标是实现无缝迁移，简化开发流程，适合需要快速开发管理系统的场景。
summary.en: likeadmin_laravel is a full-stack development framework based on Laravel 11, designed for rapid construction of front-end and back-end separated management backends. The project is compatible with the database structure and API interfaces of likeadmin_php, utilizing modern tech stacks such as PHP 8, TypeScript, Vue3, and Element Plus. Its design goal is seamless migration, simplifying the development process, making it suitable for scenarios requiring quick management system development.

metadata.name: xin-admin-laravel
metadata.description: Xin Admin 是基于Laravel12、React、Ant Design、Typescript 等流行技术栈开发的一款中后台管理框架，具有可扩展性，易于部署，最新技术栈等优点，帮助开发者实现快速开发。 演示地址：https://demo.xinadmin.cn

summary.zh: Xin Admin 是一款基于 PHP8.2、Laravel12、React 和 Ant Design 的企业级中后台管理框架，具备高扩展性和易部署性。它支持前后端分离开发，提供完善的权限控制、动态菜单、数据字典和文件管理系统，帮助开发者快速构建高效的管理系统。适合需要快速开发和灵活配置的企业应用场景。
summary.en: Xin Admin is an enterprise-level backend management framework built on PHP8.2, Laravel12, React, and Ant Design. It features high extensibility and easy deployment, supporting a decoupled front-end and back-end development. With comprehensive permission control, dynamic menus, data dictionaries, and a file management system, it enables developers to rapidly build efficient management systems, ideal for quick development and flexible configuration in enterprise applications.

metadata.name: doubao-downloader
metadata.description: 一键批量下载豆包AI无水印图片资源的浏览器扩展/油猴脚本。

summary.zh: doubao-downloader 是一款基于 React 开发的浏览器扩展和油猴脚本，旨在一键批量下载豆包 AI 生成的无水印图片。用户可以通过简单的安装步骤，快速获取高质量的图像资源，适用于设计师和内容创作者。该项目结合了现代前端技术，提供了便捷的使用体验和良好的社区支持。
summary.en: doubao-downloader is a browser extension and Tampermonkey script developed with React, designed for one-click bulk downloading of watermark-free images generated by Doubao AI. Users can quickly access high-quality image resources through simple installation steps, making it ideal for designers and content creators. The project leverages modern frontend technologies, offering a convenient user experience and strong community support.

metadata.name: gin-base
metadata.description: 基于Golang语言框架Go Gin开发的轻量级框架，设计灵感基于laravel、thinphp，项目架构目录层次分明，初学者的福音，后端使用JWT、中间件、缓存、验证器、事件、路由、redis、命令行工具等、前端基于vue-next-admin typescrip改js使用vue3+element-plus+element-plus-table+vite 支持多语言,开发简单易于上手,方便扩展。

summary.zh: gin-base是一个基于Golang的轻量级框架，灵感源自Laravel和ThinPHP，专为初学者设计。其清晰的项目架构和丰富的功能（如JWT认证、中间件、缓存、事件处理等）使得后端开发变得简单高效。同时，前端采用Vue3和Element-Plus，支持多语言，便于扩展，适合快速开发现代Web应用。
summary.en: gin-base is a lightweight framework based on Golang, inspired by Laravel and ThinPHP, designed for beginners. Its clear project structure and rich features (such as JWT authentication, middleware, caching, event handling, etc.) make backend development simple and efficient. The frontend uses Vue3 and Element-Plus, supports multilingual capabilities, and is easy to extend, making it suitable for rapid development of modern web applications.

metadata.name: minimind
metadata.description: 🚀 「大模型」2小时完全从0训练64M的小参数LLM！🌏 Train a 64M-parameter LLM from scratch in just 2h!

summary.zh: MiniMind项目旨在以低成本和短时间训练出小型语言模型，用户仅需3元和2小时即可从零开始构建26M参数的GPT。该项目提供了完整的训练代码，包括数据集清洗、预训练、微调等，且所有核心算法均使用PyTorch原生实现，适合希望深入理解大语言模型的开发者。MiniMind不仅是一个实用的工具，也是学习LLM的入门教程，推动AI社区的进步。
summary.en: The MiniMind project enables users to train a small language model from scratch with minimal cost and time, requiring only $3 and 2 hours to build a 26M-parameter GPT. It offers complete training code, including dataset cleaning, pre-training, and fine-tuning, with all core algorithms implemented in native PyTorch. MiniMind serves as both a practical tool and an introductory tutorial for understanding large language models, fostering progress in the AI community.

metadata.name: pipecat
metadata.description: Open Source framework for voice and multimodal conversational AI

summary.zh: Pipecat 是一个开源的 Python 框架，旨在构建实时语音和多模态对话代理。它支持音频、视频和各种 AI 服务的无缝集成，适用于语音助手、AI 伴侣、交互式故事讲述等应用场景。其模块化组件和低延迟特性使开发者能够快速构建复杂的对话系统，专注于代理的独特性。
summary.en: Pipecat is an open-source Python framework designed for building real-time voice and multimodal conversational agents. It seamlessly integrates audio, video, and various AI services, suitable for applications like voice assistants, AI companions, and interactive storytelling. Its modular components and low-latency features enable developers to quickly create complex dialogue systems, focusing on the uniqueness of their agents.

metadata.name: a2a-samples
metadata.description: Samples using the Agent2Agent (A2A) Protocol

summary.zh: 该仓库包含使用Agent2Agent（A2A）协议的代码示例和演示，旨在帮助开发者理解和应用该协议。A2A协议支持不同代理之间的高效通信，适用于构建智能代理系统。项目的技术亮点包括与A2A相关的多个工具和SDK，便于开发者快速上手和集成。
summary.en: This repository contains code samples and demos using the Agent2Agent (A2A) Protocol, aimed at helping developers understand and implement the protocol. The A2A protocol facilitates efficient communication between different agents, suitable for building intelligent agent systems. Key highlights include various tools and SDKs related to A2A, enabling developers to quickly get started and integrate.

summary.zh: LazyCraft 是一个基于 LazyLLM 的 AI Agent 应用开发与管理平台，旨在帮助开发者以低门槛、低成本快速构建和发布多样化的 AI 应用，如数据洞察师和代码理解助手。该平台支持全流程闭环，提供可视化组件画布、模型服务、资源管理及多租户支持，灵活的架构使得团队能够快速验证想法并加速 AI 技术的落地与迭代。
summary.en: LazyCraft is an AI Agent application development and management platform built on LazyLLM, designed to help developers quickly create and publish diverse AI applications, such as data insight tools and code understanding assistants, with low barriers and costs. The platform supports a complete workflow, offering a visual component canvas, model services, resource management, and multi-tenant support, enabling teams to rapidly validate ideas and accelerate the deployment and iteration of AI technologies.

metadata.name: astron-agent
metadata.description: Enterprise-grade, commercial-friendly agentic workflow platform for building next-generation SuperAgents.

summary.zh: Astron Agent 是一款企业级、商业友好的智能工作流开发平台，集成了 AI 工作流编排、模型管理、RPA 自动化及团队协作功能。该平台支持高可用性部署，帮助组织快速构建可扩展的智能代理应用，奠定未来 AI 基础。其核心技术包括稳定可靠的跨系统集成和灵活的大模型支持，适用于多种行业场景。
summary.en: Astron Agent is an enterprise-grade, commercial-friendly workflow development platform that integrates AI workflow orchestration, model management, RPA automation, and team collaboration features. It supports high-availability deployment, enabling organizations to rapidly build scalable intelligent agent applications and establish a foundation for future AI. Key technologies include stable cross-system integration and flexible large model support, suitable for various industry scenarios.

metadata.name: MuMuAINovel
metadata.description: 一款基于 AI 的智能小说创作助手，帮助你轻松创作精彩故事

summary.zh: MuMuAINovel 是一款基于 AI 的智能小说创作助手，旨在帮助用户轻松创作精彩故事。它支持多种 AI 模型，如 OpenAI 和 Claude，提供智能向导、角色管理和章节编辑等功能，适合个人创作者和小型团队使用。通过 Docker 部署，用户可以快速启动并使用该工具，提升创作效率。
summary.en: MuMuAINovel is an AI-powered intelligent novel creation assistant designed to help users effortlessly craft engaging stories. It supports multiple AI models like OpenAI and Claude, offering features such as intelligent guidance, character management, and chapter editing, making it suitable for individual creators and small teams. Users can quickly deploy the tool via Docker, enhancing their creative efficiency.

metadata.name: SongBloom
metadata.description: The official code repository for SongBloom: Coherent Song Generation via Interleaved Autoregressive Sketching and Diffusion Refinement

summary.zh: SongBloom 是一个创新的全长歌曲生成框架，采用交错自回归草图和扩散精炼的范式。它结合了扩散模型的高保真度与语言模型的可扩展性，通过逐步扩展音乐草图并从粗到细进行细节精炼，提升生成质量。实验结果显示，SongBloom 在主观和客观指标上均优于现有方法，且表现与领先的商业音乐生成平台相当，适用于音乐创作、娱乐和AI艺术等领域。
summary.en: SongBloom is an innovative framework for full-length song generation that employs an interleaved paradigm of autoregressive sketching and diffusion refinement. It combines the high fidelity of diffusion models with the scalability of language models, gradually extending a musical sketch and refining details from coarse to fine. Experimental results show that SongBloom outperforms existing methods in both subjective and objective metrics, achieving performance comparable to leading commercial music generation platforms, making it suitable for music creation, entertainment, and AI art.

metadata.name: claude-proxy
metadata.description: only one claude code proxy

summary.zh: Claude Proxy 是一个高性能的 API 代理服务器，支持 Claude、Codex 和 Gemini 等多种 AI 服务。它提供统一的认证机制、可视化管理面板和智能调度功能，确保高可用性和稳定性。项目已重命名为 CCX，具备故障转移、多 API 密钥管理和协议转换等特性，适用于需要整合多个 AI 服务的场景。
summary.en: Claude Proxy is a high-performance API proxy server that supports various AI services like Claude, Codex, and Gemini. It features unified authentication, a visual management panel, and intelligent scheduling to ensure high availability and stability. The project has been renamed to CCX, offering failover, multi-API key management, and protocol conversion, making it suitable for scenarios requiring integration of multiple AI services.

summary.zh: Claude Status Bar 是一个为 Claude Code 提供的自定义状态栏工具，实时显示 API 使用情况、项目统计和 Git 信息。其主要功能包括 TigerAPI 余额监控、模型信息、项目统计和上下文使用情况，支持 ANSI 彩色输出，提升用户体验。适用于需要监控 API 使用和项目状态的开发者，简化了状态信息的获取与展示。
summary.en: Claude Status Bar is a customizable status bar tool for Claude Code that displays real-time API usage, project statistics, and Git information. Key features include TigerAPI balance monitoring, model information display, project stats, and context usage, all enhanced with ANSI color output for better user experience. It is ideal for developers needing to monitor API usage and project status, simplifying the retrieval and presentation of status information.

metadata.name: parlant
metadata.description: The interaction control harness for customer-facing AI agents - optimized for building controlled, consistent, and predictable customer interactions with LLMs.

summary.zh: Parlant 是一个专为控制而设计的 LLM 代理框架，旨在解决 AI 开发者在生产环境中面临的痛点。通过确保代理遵循明确的行为准则，Parlant 使得构建符合业务需求的客户互动代理变得简单高效。其快速部署和易用性使其适合各种实际应用场景。
summary.en: Parlant is an LLM agent framework designed for control, addressing the pain points AI developers face in production environments. By ensuring agents adhere to clear behavioral guidelines, Parlant simplifies the creation of customer-facing agents that meet business requirements. Its rapid deployment and user-friendliness make it suitable for various real-world applications.

metadata.name: xpander.ai
metadata.description: xpander.ai is the runtime and control plane to build, run, and ship reliable AI agents fast and anywhere

summary.zh: xpander.ai 是一个高效的运行时和控制平面，旨在快速构建、运行和交付可靠的 AI 代理。它支持多种框架，用户可以在云端或自有 VPC/Kubernetes 中部署代理，提供状态数据库、CI/CD 和日志记录功能。xpander.ai 还包括聊天界面、工作台和连接器中心，方便用户管理和调度任务，适用于需要快速开发和部署 AI 解决方案的场景。
summary.en: xpander.ai is a robust runtime and control plane designed for rapidly building, running, and shipping reliable AI agents. It supports any framework, allowing users to deploy agents in the cloud or their own VPC/Kubernetes with stateful databases, CI/CD, and logging capabilities. The platform features a chat interface, a workbench, and a connector hub, making it easy to manage and schedule tasks, ideal for scenarios requiring quick development and deployment of AI solutions.

metadata.name: nofx
metadata.description: Your personal AI trading assistant. Any market. Any model. Pay with USDC, not API keys.

summary.zh: NOFX是一个开源的AI交易操作系统，提供多AI和多交易所的交易基础设施。其核心亮点包括多种AI模型支持、可视化策略构建器、实时仪表盘以及AI模型之间的竞争与辩论功能，适用于加密货币、美国股票、外汇及贵金属市场。该平台旨在为用户提供灵活、高效的交易体验，适合学习和研究用途。
summary.en: NOFX is an open-source AI Trading OS that provides multi-AI and multi-exchange trading infrastructure. Key features include support for various AI models, a visual strategy builder, real-time dashboards, and competitive debates among AI models, catering to cryptocurrency, US stocks, forex, and precious metals markets. The platform aims to deliver a flexible and efficient trading experience, suitable for learning and research purposes.

metadata.name: DeepSeek-OCR-Web
metadata.description: Out-of-the-box DeepSeek OCR document parsing Web Studio

summary.zh: DeepSeek-OCR Studio 是一款基于 DeepSeek-OCR 的多模态文档解析工具，结合 React 前端与 FastAPI 后端，能够高效处理 PDF 文档和图像。其核心功能包括多格式文档解析、智能 OCR 识别、布局分析、支持多语言文本识别、表格与图表解析等，适用于需要高精度文本提取和数据可视化的场景。
summary.en: DeepSeek-OCR Studio is a multimodal document parsing tool based on DeepSeek-OCR, featuring a React frontend and FastAPI backend. It efficiently processes PDF documents and images, offering key functionalities such as multi-format document parsing, intelligent OCR recognition, layout analysis, multi-language text recognition, and table and chart parsing, making it ideal for high-precision text extraction and data visualization applications.

metadata.name: wechat-multi-open
metadata.description: macOS 微信多开终极解决方案 - 交互式管理工具

summary.zh: 微信多开管理工具为macOS用户提供了一个交互式的解决方案，允许用户轻松创建和管理多个微信实例。其核心功能包括智能检测现有副本、增量创建缺失实例、灵活删除副本以及自定义图标，旨在提高用户的使用效率和体验。该工具适合需要同时处理多个微信账户的用户，尤其在工作和社交场景中具有广泛应用。
summary.en: The WeChat Multi-Instance Manager offers macOS users an interactive solution to easily create and manage multiple WeChat instances. Key features include intelligent detection of existing copies, incremental creation of missing instances, flexible deletion of copies, and icon customization, aimed at enhancing user efficiency and experience. This tool is ideal for users needing to handle multiple WeChat accounts simultaneously, especially in work and social scenarios.

metadata.name: in_animation
metadata.description: Instructional Animation 是一个基于大语言模型的教学动画生成工具，能够根据用户输入的知识点主题，自动生成视觉精美、交互流畅的 HTML5 动画页面，并支持导出为 MP4 视频和 GIF 格式

summary.zh: Instructional Animation 是一款基于大语言模型的教学动画生成工具，能够根据用户输入的知识点自动生成精美的 HTML5 动画页面，并支持导出为 MP4 和 GIF 格式。该工具适用于教育、知识分享和在线课程等场景，具备双语支持、实时流式输出及容器化部署等技术亮点，极大提升了教学内容的可视化和互动性。
summary.en: Instructional Animation is an AI-driven educational animation generator that automatically creates visually appealing HTML5 animation pages based on user-inputted knowledge topics, with support for exporting to MP4 and GIF formats. Suitable for education, knowledge sharing, and online courses, it features bilingual support, real-time streaming output, and containerized deployment, significantly enhancing the visualization and interactivity of educational content.

metadata.name: claude-cookbooks
metadata.description: A collection of notebooks/recipes showcasing some fun and effective ways of using Claude.

summary.zh: Claude Cookbooks 是一个为开发者提供的代码和指南集合，旨在帮助他们高效地使用 Claude API。该项目包含可复制的代码片段，适用于文本分类、摘要生成及与外部工具集成等多种应用场景。无论是新手还是经验丰富的开发者，都能通过这些示例快速上手并扩展 Claude 的功能。
summary.en: Claude Cookbooks is a collection of code and guides designed to help developers effectively use the Claude API. It features copy-able code snippets applicable to various scenarios such as text classification, summarization, and integration with external tools. Whether beginners or experienced developers, users can quickly get started and extend Claude's capabilities through these examples.

metadata.name: enterprise-deep-research
metadata.description: Salesforce Enterprise Deep Research

summary.zh: Enterprise Deep Research（EDR）是一个多智能体系统，集成了自适应查询分解的主规划代理和四个专业搜索代理（通用、学术、GitHub、LinkedIn）。该系统支持NL2SQL、文件分析和企业工作流程的可扩展工具生态系统，具备数据驱动洞察的可视化代理及知识差距检测机制，实现自动报告生成和实时流处理，适用于企业深度数据分析。
summary.en: Enterprise Deep Research (EDR) is a multi-agent system that integrates a Master Planning Agent for adaptive query decomposition and four specialized search agents (General, Academic, GitHub, LinkedIn). It features an extensible tool ecosystem supporting NL2SQL, file analysis, and enterprise workflows, along with a Visualization Agent for data-driven insights and a reflection mechanism to detect knowledge gaps, enabling automated report generation and real-time streaming for enterprise deep data analysis.

metadata.name: ChameleonUltra
metadata.description: The new generation chameleon based on NRF52840 makes the performance of card emulation more stable. And gave the chameleon the ability to read, write, and decrypt cards.

summary.zh: ChameleonUltra 是基于 NRF52840 的新一代变色龙设备，提供稳定的卡片仿真性能，并具备读取、写入和解密卡片的能力。该设备适用于 RFID 研究和安全测试，支持多种应用程序，具有强大的社区支持和丰富的文档资源。
summary.en: ChameleonUltra is a next-generation chameleon device based on NRF52840, offering stable card emulation performance along with the ability to read, write, and decrypt cards. It is suitable for RFID research and security testing, supports various applications, and comes with strong community backing and extensive documentation.

metadata.name: wechat-selkies
metadata.description: 基于Selkies的Linux网页版微信/QQ/Telegram，支持本地中文输入法，支持三方应用，支持AMD64和ARM64。

summary.zh: 微信 Selkies 是一个基于 Docker 的 Linux 客户端，利用 Selkies WebRTC 技术实现浏览器访问，支持本地中文输入法及多平台应用。适合远程办公和服务器部署，具备数据持久化、文件传输和硬件加速等功能，兼容 AMD64 和 ARM64 架构，简化了用户的使用体验。
summary.en: WeChat Selkies is a Docker-based Linux client that utilizes Selkies WebRTC technology for browser access, supporting local Chinese input and third-party applications. Ideal for remote work and server deployment, it features data persistence, file transfer, and hardware acceleration, compatible with AMD64 and ARM64 architectures, simplifying user experience.

metadata.name: BuildingAI
metadata.description: AI时代的WordPress，东半球首个积木式AI应用搭建系统，人人都可免费搭建自己的AI应用系统，例如企业智能体系统、AI漫剧系统、AI论文学术系统、AI客服系统...

summary.zh: BuildingAI 是一个企业级开源智能代理平台，旨在为 AI 开发者和企业提供无代码构建原生 AI 应用的能力。用户可以通过可视化配置界面轻松搭建智能体系统、AI 客服等应用。平台支持多种原生功能，包括知识库、模型管理和会员管理，适合各类企业和创新组织使用。
summary.en: BuildingAI is an enterprise-grade open-source intelligent agent platform designed for AI developers and businesses to build native AI applications without coding. Users can easily create applications like intelligent agents and AI customer service through a visual configuration interface. The platform supports various native features, including knowledge bases, model management, and membership management, making it suitable for diverse enterprises and innovative organizations.

metadata.name: nof1-tracker
metadata.description: A command-line tool for tracking nof1.ai AI Agent trading signals and automatically executing Binance futures trades

summary.zh: Nof1-tracker 是一款命令行工具，专为跟踪 nof1.ai AI Agent 的交易信号而设计，能够自动执行 Binance 合约交易。它支持多达七个 AI 量化交易代理，具备实时监控、智能跟单、盈利目标设置等功能，适合希望利用 AI 进行自动化交易的用户。该工具还提供代部署服务，简化了用户的环境配置和运行过程。
summary.en: Nof1-tracker is a command-line tool designed for tracking trading signals from nof1.ai AI Agents and automatically executing Binance futures trades. It supports up to seven AI quantitative trading agents, featuring real-time monitoring, intelligent following, and profit target settings, making it suitable for users looking to leverage AI for automated trading. The tool also offers deployment services, simplifying the environment setup and operation process.

metadata.name: OpenAIglasses_for_Navigation
metadata.description: a open framework for blind navigation based on esp32

summary.zh: AI智能盲人眼镜系统是一个为视障人士设计的导航与辅助框架，集成了盲道导航、过马路辅助、物品识别和实时语音交互等功能。该系统基于ESP32，利用YOLO模型实现实时环境感知，提供语音引导和障碍物避让，旨在提升视障人士的出行安全与便利性。
summary.en: The AI Smart Glasses for the Blind is a navigation and assistance framework designed for visually impaired individuals. It integrates features like blind path navigation, street crossing assistance, object recognition, and real-time voice interaction. Based on ESP32, it utilizes YOLO models for real-time environmental perception, providing voice guidance and obstacle avoidance to enhance the safety and convenience of visually impaired users.

metadata.name: lattifai-python
metadata.description: Precision Alignment, Infinite Possibilities

summary.zh: LattifAI 是一个先进的强制对齐和字幕生成工具，基于 Lattice-1 模型，支持多种语言和格式。其核心功能包括音频与文本的逐字对齐、多模型转录、说话者分离以及流式处理，能够高效处理长达20小时的音频文件。该项目适合需要精确音频处理与字幕生成的应用场景，如影视制作、教育培训等。
summary.en: LattifAI is an advanced forced alignment and subtitle generation tool powered by the Lattice-1 model, supporting multiple languages and formats. Its core features include word-level audio-text synchronization, multi-model transcription, speaker diarization, and streaming mode, efficiently handling audio files up to 20 hours long. This project is ideal for applications requiring precise audio processing and subtitle generation, such as film production and educational training.

metadata.name: WxMQTT
metadata.description: 基于MQTT协议的微信小程序项目。支持温湿度、土壤、水质等传感器。

summary.zh: WxMQTT是一个基于MQTT协议的微信小程序项目，旨在实现对温湿度、土壤和水质等传感器的远程监控与控制。项目新增了小车控制模块，用户可以通过微信ID同步数据，实时操控小车的灯光、方向和电机状态，提升了用户的交互体验。该项目适合物联网应用，特别是在智能家居和远程控制领域。
summary.en: WxMQTT is a WeChat mini-program project based on the MQTT protocol, designed for remote monitoring and control of sensors such as temperature, humidity, soil, and water quality. The project introduces a car control module, allowing users to synchronize data via WeChat ID and control the car's lights, direction, and motor status in real-time, enhancing user interaction. This project is suitable for IoT applications, particularly in smart home and remote control scenarios.

metadata.name: SimpleAccount
metadata.description: [简帐]是一款专注于隐私安全的[本地记账]应用，采用uni-app框架开发.无需联网,所有数据本地存储，让[记账]变得简单高效。 适合注重隐私安全、追求简洁体验的财务记账APP

summary.zh: 简帐是一款专注于隐私安全的本地记账应用，采用uni-app框架开发，所有数据均在本地存储，确保用户隐私。其核心功能包括智能记账、语音识别和可视化数据统计，适合追求简洁高效的用户。该应用支持多端运行，提供丰富的分类管理和数据导入导出功能，满足不同用户的财务管理需求。
summary.en: SimpleAccount is a local accounting application focused on privacy and security, developed using the uni-app framework with all data stored locally to ensure user privacy. Its core features include intelligent bookkeeping, voice recognition, and visual data statistics, making it suitable for users seeking simplicity and efficiency. The app supports multi-platform operation, offering rich category management and data import/export functionalities to meet diverse financial management needs.

metadata.name: xiaozhi-music-mcp
metadata.description: 小智AI免费音乐MCP服务器

summary.zh: 小智AI音乐MCP服务器是一个专为小智AI音响设计的免费音乐服务，提供音乐搜索、播放控制、音量调节和播放列表管理等功能。该项目基于MCP协议，使用Python 3.8+开发，支持通过语音或文字与小智AI交互，用户可以轻松搜索和播放音乐，完全免费且开源，适合音乐爱好者和开发者扩展功能。
summary.en: The XiaoZhi AI Music MCP Server is a free music service designed for XiaoZhi AI speakers, offering features like music search, playback control, volume adjustment, and playlist management. Built on the MCP protocol and developed in Python 3.8+, it allows users to interact with XiaoZhi AI via voice or text for easy music searching and playback. Completely free and open-source, it is ideal for music enthusiasts and developers looking to extend functionalities.

metadata.name: agentic-design-patterns-cn
metadata.description: 《Agentic Design Patterns》中文翻译版

summary.zh: 《Agentic Design Patterns》中文翻译版提供了一套全面的智能体设计模式，旨在帮助开发者构建现代人工智能系统。该项目包含中英文对照翻译，强调核心概念与实践方法，适合希望深入理解智能体设计的技术人员。项目持续更新，确保翻译质量与内容的时效性。
summary.en: The Chinese translation of 'Agentic Design Patterns' offers a comprehensive set of design patterns for agents, aimed at helping developers build modern AI systems. This project features a bilingual translation, emphasizing core concepts and practical approaches, making it suitable for tech professionals seeking to deepen their understanding of agent design. The project is continuously updated to ensure translation quality and content relevance.

metadata.name: tmux_for_windows
metadata.description: tmux是一个开源工具，用于在一个终端窗口中运行多个终端会话。本工具从msys2里提取，可以在Git for Windows的Git Bash (MingW64)下正常使用。

summary.zh: tmux_for_windows 是一个开源工具，旨在让 Windows 用户在 Git Bash (MingW64) 中使用 tmux，支持在一个终端窗口中运行多个会话。该工具从 msys2 提取，安装简单，能够提升终端操作的效率，适合开发者和系统管理员使用。
summary.en: tmux_for_windows is an open-source tool designed for Windows users to utilize tmux within Git Bash (MingW64), allowing multiple terminal sessions in a single window. Extracted from msys2, it offers easy installation and enhances terminal operation efficiency, making it ideal for developers and system administrators.

summary.zh: Veloera 是一个已停止维护的 AI API 网关系统，提供了原汁原味的 New API 体验，支持多种特性如多 Key 随机选取、礼品码管理和正则屏蔽词等。尽管项目不再活跃，仍可通过提供的迁移指南帮助用户转向新 API。该项目遵循 GPL 3.0 协议，承诺无商用限制，适合需要灵活 API 管理的开发者。
summary.en: Veloera is a discontinued AI API gateway system that offers an authentic New API experience with features like multi-key random selection, gift code management, and regex filtering. Although the project is no longer active, users can refer to the provided migration guide for transitioning to the new API. It adheres to the GPL 3.0 license, ensuring no commercial restrictions, making it suitable for developers needing flexible API management.

metadata.name: ha-mcp-for-xiaozhi
metadata.description: Homeassistant MCP server for 小智AI

summary.zh: ha-mcp-for-xiaozhi 是一个为小智AI设计的 Home Assistant MCP 服务器，支持通过 WebSocket 协议直接连接小智AI 官方服务器。它允许用户在一个实体中选择多个 API 组，并将其代理给小智，极大地提升了智能家居的集成与控制能力。该插件简化了配置和调试过程，适合希望优化小智AI 交互体验的用户。
summary.en: ha-mcp-for-xiaozhi is a Home Assistant MCP server designed for 小智AI, enabling direct WebSocket connections to the official 小智AI server. It allows users to select multiple API groups within a single entity and proxy them to 小智, significantly enhancing smart home integration and control capabilities. The plugin simplifies configuration and debugging, making it ideal for users looking to optimize their 小智AI interaction experience.

metadata.name: claude-codex-api
metadata.description: ccapi - A management tool for quickly switching Claude Code and Codex configurations | 一个Claude Code 和 Codex 配置管理工具，一键切换多个中转站API配置；一键切换系统环境变量；一键测试API延迟；一键测试API有效性；自动择优线路切换与国际化支持。

summary.zh: claude-codex-api 是一个高效的配置管理工具，旨在简化 Claude Code 和 Codex API 的切换与管理。用户可以一键切换不同的 API 配置、环境变量，并测试 API 的延迟和有效性。该工具支持多种配置文件格式（如 JSON、YAML），并具备自动优选线路切换和国际化支持，适合开发者在多环境下快速切换和测试 API。其简洁的命令行界面使得操作更加便捷。
summary.en: claude-codex-api is an efficient configuration management tool designed to simplify the switching and management of Claude Code and Codex APIs. Users can easily switch between different API configurations, environment variables, and test API latency and validity with a single command. The tool supports various configuration file formats (like JSON, YAML) and features automatic optimal routing switching and internationalization support, making it suitable for developers to quickly switch and test APIs across multiple environments. Its simple command-line interface enhances usability.

metadata.name: Claude-Code-Remote
metadata.description: Control Claude Code remotely via email、discord、telegram. Start tasks locally, receive notifications when Claude completes them, and send new commands by simply replying to emails.

summary.zh: Claude Code Remote 允许用户通过邮件、Telegram 和 LINE 等多种平台远程控制 Claude Code。用户可以在本地启动任务，并在 Claude 完成后接收通知。该项目的亮点包括双向控制、智能命令、支持多条消息格式以及安全的 ID 白名单验证，适合需要远程管理和协作的开发者和团队。
summary.en: Claude Code Remote enables users to control Claude Code remotely via multiple platforms such as email, Telegram, and LINE. Users can start tasks locally and receive notifications upon completion. Key features include two-way control, smart commands, multi-line support, and secure ID-based whitelisting, making it ideal for developers and teams needing remote management and collaboration.

metadata.name: xunlong
metadata.description: 多模态内容创作系统 - 报告、小说、演示文稿

summary.zh: XunLong 是一个智能多模态内容创作系统，利用大型语言模型自动生成高质量的研究报告、小说和演示文稿。该系统采用多代理协作架构，通过 LangGraph 实现任务分解和并行执行，支持文档输入、智能搜索和多种格式导出，具备风格定制和迭代优化功能，适用于学术、商业和创意写作等多种场景。
summary.en: XunLong is an intelligent multi-modal content generation system that leverages Large Language Models to automatically produce high-quality research reports, novels, and presentations. Utilizing a multi-agent collaborative architecture orchestrated by LangGraph, it supports document input, intelligent search, and professional export in various formats, along with style customization and iterative refinement, making it suitable for academic, business, and creative writing.

metadata.name: awesome-vibe-coding
metadata.description: A curated list of vibe coding references, collaborating with AI to write code.

summary.zh: 《Awesome Vibe Coding》是一个精心策划的参考列表，旨在通过与AI的协作来提升编码体验。该项目涵盖了浏览器工具、IDE、插件、移动应用等多个领域，帮助开发者在构建应用时更轻松地实现创意。其核心亮点在于“vibe coding”理念，鼓励开发者放下传统编码的束缚，专注于创意和快速迭代。
summary.en: Awesome Vibe Coding is a curated list of references aimed at enhancing the coding experience through collaboration with AI. The project covers various domains including browser tools, IDEs, plugins, and mobile apps, assisting developers in realizing their ideas more effortlessly. Its core highlight is the concept of 'vibe coding,' encouraging developers to let go of traditional coding constraints and focus on creativity and rapid iteration.

metadata.name: neutts
metadata.description: On-device TTS model by Neuphonic

summary.zh: NeuTTS 是一款由 Neuphonic 开发的开源、设备端文本转语音（TTS）模型，支持多种语言，包括英语、法语、德语和西班牙语。其核心亮点在于超现实的语音生成、即时语音克隆以及针对移动设备的优化，适用于嵌入式语音助手、玩具和合规应用。通过轻量级的 LLM 架构，NeuTTS 提供了高效的实时性能和安全性，推动了语音 AI 的本地化应用。
summary.en: NeuTTS is an open-source, on-device Text-to-Speech (TTS) model developed by Neuphonic, supporting multiple languages including English, French, German, and Spanish. Its key highlights include ultra-realistic voice generation, instant voice cloning, and optimization for mobile devices, making it suitable for embedded voice assistants, toys, and compliance-safe applications. With a lightweight LLM architecture, NeuTTS offers efficient real-time performance and security, advancing the localization of voice AI.

metadata.name: EasyOffer
metadata.description: 《EasyOffer》（<大模型面经合集>）是针对LLM宝宝们量身打造的大模型暑期实习Offer指南，主要记录大模型暑期实习和秋招准备的一些常见大厂手撕代码、大厂面经经验、常见大厂思考题等；小白一个，正在学习ing......有问题各位大佬随时指正，希望大家都能拿到心仪Offer！

summary.zh: 《EasyOffer》是为大语言模型（LLM）初学者和秋招准备者设计的开源项目，提供大厂面试经验、手写代码实现及常见思考题的记录，旨在帮助用户深入理解LLM原理并高效备战实习。项目内容涵盖DeepSeek模型实现、模型生成方法及强化学习模块，未来计划扩展至LLaMA系列及其他热门模型的实现与解析。
summary.en: EasyOffer is an open-source project designed for beginners of large language models (LLM) and job seekers preparing for autumn recruitment. It provides records of interview experiences from major companies, handwritten code implementations, and common problem-solving questions, aiming to help users deeply understand LLM principles and efficiently prepare for internships. The project currently covers DeepSeek model implementations, model generation methods, and reinforcement learning modules, with plans to expand to LLaMA series and other popular models.

metadata.name: LuoGen-agent
metadata.description: 一键产出爆款视频：1.自动提取对标文案 2.自动进行文案仿写 3.自动根据文案声音克隆 4.自动生成数字人口播 5.自动添加字幕 6.自动添加背景音乐 7.自动添加视频标题 8.自动生成视频封面 9.自动将视频发布到各平台

summary.zh: LuoGen-agent 是一款商业级视频自动化生成工具，能够一键生成高质量数字人口播视频。其核心功能包括智能文案处理、声音克隆、数字人生成以及全流程视频制作，支持多平台发布。该工具通过集成 Whisper、CosyVoice 和 HeyGem 等先进技术，简化视频制作流程，适合内容创作者和营销人员使用。
summary.en: LuoGen-agent is a commercial-grade video automation tool that enables one-click generation of high-quality digital avatar videos. Its core features include smart copywriting, voice cloning, digital human generation, and full video production, supporting multi-platform publishing. By integrating advanced technologies like Whisper, CosyVoice, and HeyGem, it simplifies the video creation process, making it ideal for content creators and marketers.

metadata.name: no-watermark
metadata.description: 基于 Spring Boot 3 的短视频/实况/图集去水印服务，支持：皮皮虾、哔哩哔哩、Instagram、小红书、推特、抖音、Tik Tok、最右、皮皮搞笑、微视、快手等平台。

summary.zh: 本项目是一个基于 Spring Boot 3 的去水印服务，支持多种短视频和图集平台，包括抖音、Instagram、小红书等。用户可通过配置账号信息和代理设置，轻松去除视频和图集中的水印，适用于内容创作者和社交媒体用户，提升内容分享的便捷性与美观性。
summary.en: This project is a watermark removal service based on Spring Boot 3, supporting various short video and image collection platforms, including Douyin, Instagram, Xiaohongshu, etc. Users can easily remove watermarks from videos and images by configuring account information and proxy settings, making it suitable for content creators and social media users, enhancing the convenience and aesthetics of content sharing.

metadata.name: mcp-router
metadata.description: A Unified MCP Server Management App

summary.zh: MCP Router 是一款统一的桌面应用程序，旨在简化模型上下文协议（MCP）服务器的管理。它支持本地和远程服务器的连接，具备跨平台特性，确保所有数据本地存储，增强隐私保护。用户可以轻松管理多个服务器，导入导出配置，并与流行的AI工具无缝集成，适合开发者和技术爱好者使用。
summary.en: MCP Router is a unified desktop application designed to simplify the management of Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers. It supports connections to both local and remote servers, features cross-platform compatibility, and ensures all data is stored locally for enhanced privacy. Users can easily manage multiple servers, import/export configurations, and seamlessly integrate with popular AI tools, making it ideal for developers and tech enthusiasts.

metadata.name: pal-mcp-server
metadata.description: The power of Claude Code / GeminiCLI / CodexCLI + [Gemini / OpenAI / OpenRouter / Azure / Grok / Ollama / Custom Model / All Of The Above] working as one.

summary.zh: PAL MCP 是一个提供抽象层的工具，旨在将多个 AI 模型（如 Claude Code、Gemini 和 Codex CLI）整合到一个工作流中。通过 CLI-to-CLI 桥接，用户可以在同一环境中无缝调用不同的 AI 模型，进行代码审查、问题解决和协作开发。该工具支持对话连续性，允许用户在多个模型之间进行讨论和协作，从而提升开发效率和代码质量。
summary.en: PAL MCP is a provider abstraction layer tool designed to integrate multiple AI models, such as Claude Code, Gemini, and Codex CLI, into a single workflow. With CLI-to-CLI bridging, users can seamlessly invoke different AI models within the same environment for code reviews, problem-solving, and collaborative development. The tool supports conversation continuity, allowing users to discuss and collaborate across multiple models, enhancing development efficiency and code quality.

metadata.name: xiaozhi-esp32-music
metadata.description: 小智ai机器人 音乐播放固件

summary.zh: 小智AI机器人音乐播放固件是一个基于ESP32的开源项目，旨在为用户提供智能音乐播放功能。该固件支持多种角色定制和个性化配置，具备智能音乐控制、离线语音唤醒及声纹识别等功能，适用于智能家居和语音交互场景。通过MCP协议，用户可以实现对设备的多端控制，增强了机器人的互动性和实用性。
summary.en: The Xiao Zhi AI robot music playback firmware is an open-source project based on ESP32, designed to provide users with intelligent music playback capabilities. The firmware supports various character customization and personalization options, featuring smart music control, offline voice wake-up, and voiceprint recognition. It is suitable for smart home and voice interaction scenarios. Through the MCP protocol, users can achieve multi-end control of devices, enhancing the robot's interactivity and practicality.

metadata.name: jules-awesome-list
metadata.description: Some awesome prompts for Jules Agent

summary.zh: Jules Awesome List 是一个为 Google Labs 的异步编码代理 Jules 精心策划的提示集合，涵盖日常开发任务、调试、文档编写、测试和包管理等多个方面。该项目旨在提高开发效率，帮助开发者快速解决常见问题，适用于各种编程语言和开发环境，尤其是需要 AI 辅助的场景。
summary.en: Jules Awesome List is a curated collection of prompts for Jules, an async coding agent from Google Labs. It covers various aspects like everyday development tasks, debugging, documentation, testing, and package management. The project aims to enhance developer efficiency by providing quick solutions to common issues, suitable for various programming languages and development environments, especially in AI-assisted scenarios.

summary.zh: 小智 AI 自定义 Assets 单页应用允许用户在线生成和导出 assets.bin 文件，支持自定义唤醒词、字体、表情包和聊天背景。用户通过选择芯片型号和屏幕配置，分三步完成主题设计。该项目采用浏览器端生成方案，无需后端支持，技术实现包括唤醒词模型打包和资源处理，适用于智能语音设备的个性化定制。
summary.en: The XiaoZhi AI Custom Assets Single Page Application enables users to generate and export assets.bin files online, allowing customization of wake words, fonts, emojis, and chat backgrounds. Users complete theme design in three steps by selecting chip models and screen configurations. The project utilizes a browser-based generation approach, eliminating the need for backend support, with technical implementations including wake word model packaging and resource processing, suitable for personalized customization of smart voice devices.

metadata.name: claude-code-proxy
metadata.description: Claude Code to OpenAI API Proxy

summary.zh: Claude Code Proxy 是一个代理服务器，旨在使 Claude Code 能够与 OpenAI 兼容的 API 提供商进行交互。它支持完整的 Claude API，能够将请求转换为 OpenAI API 调用，支持多种 LLM 提供商，如 OpenAI 和 Azure OpenAI。项目具有智能模型映射、实时流响应和自定义头部注入等技术亮点，适用于需要集成多种语言模型的开发者。
summary.en: Claude Code Proxy is a proxy server designed to enable Claude Code to interact with OpenAI-compatible API providers. It supports full Claude API compatibility, converting requests into OpenAI API calls, and accommodates various LLM providers like OpenAI and Azure OpenAI. The project features smart model mapping, real-time streaming responses, and custom header injection, making it ideal for developers needing to integrate multiple language models.

metadata.name: mcp-manager
metadata.description: This is a visual client tool used to manage MCP (Model Context Protocol). With this tool, you can easily manage and operate the MCP environment without manually performing complex command-line operations.

summary.zh: MCP Manager 是一款用于管理模型上下文协议（MCP）的可视化客户端工具。该工具简化了 MCP 环境的管理，用户无需手动执行复杂的命令行操作即可轻松进行环境安装、启动和停止管理。其直观的图形界面和自动化配置功能，适合个人学习和非商业用途。
summary.en: MCP Manager is a visual client tool for managing the Model Context Protocol (MCP). This tool simplifies the management of the MCP environment, allowing users to easily install, start, and stop without complex command-line operations. Its intuitive graphical interface and automated configuration make it suitable for personal learning and non-commercial use.

metadata.name: TradingAgents-CN
metadata.description: 基于多智能体LLM的中文金融交易框架 - TradingAgents中文增强版

summary.zh: TradingAgents-CN是一个基于多智能体和大语言模型的中文金融交易框架，专为中文用户设计。该平台提供全面的股票分析学习工具，支持A股、港股和美股的合规研究与策略实验。核心技术包括FastAPI后端、Vue 3前端和Docker容器化部署，具备智能模型选择和多数据源同步等功能，旨在推动AI金融技术在中文社区的普及与应用。
summary.en: TradingAgents-CN is a Chinese financial trading framework based on multi-agent systems and large language models, designed specifically for Chinese users. The platform offers comprehensive tools for stock analysis learning, supporting compliant research and strategy experimentation for A-shares, Hong Kong stocks, and US stocks. Key technologies include FastAPI backend, Vue 3 frontend, and Docker containerization, featuring intelligent model selection and multi-data source synchronization, aiming to promote the adoption of AI financial technology in the Chinese community.

metadata.name: AI_NovelGenerator
metadata.description: 使用ai生成多章节的长篇小说，自动衔接上下文、伏笔

summary.zh: AI_NovelGenerator 是一款基于大语言模型的自动小说生成工具，能够高效生成多章节的长篇小说。其核心功能包括智能章节生成、角色发展追踪、语义检索引擎和自动审校机制，确保故事逻辑严谨、设定统一。适用于作家、编剧等创作者，助力创作过程中的灵感激发与内容生成。
summary.en: AI_NovelGenerator is an automated novel generation tool based on large language models, capable of efficiently producing multi-chapter long novels. Its core features include intelligent chapter generation, character development tracking, semantic search engine, and automatic proofreading mechanism, ensuring logical coherence and unified settings in storytelling. It is suitable for writers and screenwriters, aiding in inspiration and content creation.

metadata.name: ComeCut
metadata.description: 「来剪」轻量级视频编辑器。网页版、桌面版等均可免费使用，功能灵感源自 CapCut 等编辑器。A Lightweight Video Editor. Free for the web, desktop, and more, with features inspired by editors like CapCut.

summary.zh: ComeCut是一款轻量级视频编辑器，支持网页版和桌面版，完全免费且无需注册。其灵感来源于CapCut等编辑器，致力于构建一个开放、可扩展的AI视频编辑生态系统。项目具备智能字幕翻译和多种AI功能，确保用户隐私和数据安全，适合个人及创作者使用。
summary.en: ComeCut is a lightweight video editor available for web and desktop, completely free and no registration required. Inspired by editors like CapCut, it aims to create an open and scalable AI video editing ecosystem. The project features intelligent subtitle translation and various AI capabilities, ensuring user privacy and data security, making it suitable for individuals and creators.

metadata.name: mcp-router
metadata.description: A Unified MCP Server Management App (MCP Manager).

summary.zh: MCP Router 是一款桌面应用程序，旨在简化模型上下文协议（MCP）服务器的管理。它支持连接任意本地或远程的 MCP 服务器，具备跨平台特性，适用于 Windows 和 macOS。用户可以通过项目和工作区来组织和管理多个 MCP 服务器，确保数据本地存储，增强隐私和安全性。该应用程序还支持与流行的 AI 工具无缝集成，提供全面的日志记录和分析功能。
summary.en: MCP Router is a desktop application designed to simplify the management of Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers. It supports connecting to any local or remote MCP server and is cross-platform, available for Windows and macOS. Users can organize and manage multiple MCP servers through projects and workspaces, ensuring local data storage for enhanced privacy and security. The application also seamlessly integrates with popular AI tools and provides comprehensive logging and analytics features.

metadata.name: cli_proxy
metadata.description: 本地 claude code 和 codex 代理工具

summary.zh: CLP（CLI Proxy）是一个本地AI代理工具，旨在简化对Claude和Codex等AI服务的API请求管理。其核心亮点包括动态配置切换、敏感数据过滤和多服务支持，用户可以通过统一的命令行界面和Web UI进行监控和管理。该工具适合需要高效管理多个AI服务的开发者，提供了流式响应和使用统计等高级功能，确保安全和灵活性。
summary.en: CLP (CLI Proxy) is a local AI proxy tool designed to simplify API request management for AI services like Claude and Codex. Key features include dynamic configuration switching, sensitive data filtering, and multi-service support, allowing users to monitor and manage through a unified command line interface and Web UI. Ideal for developers needing efficient management of multiple AI services, it offers advanced functionalities like streaming responses and usage statistics, ensuring security and flexibility.

metadata.name: 100-Days-Of-ML-Code
metadata.description: 100-Days-Of-ML-Code中文版

summary.zh: 《机器学习100天》中文版是一个系统的学习资源，涵盖了从数据预处理到多种机器学习算法的实现，包括监督学习和无监督学习的核心技术。项目提供详细的代码示例和图解，适合初学者和有经验的开发者，帮助他们在100天内掌握机器学习的基本概念和应用。该项目的翻译和结构清晰，使得学习过程更加高效。
summary.en: The Chinese version of '100 Days of Machine Learning' is a comprehensive learning resource covering data preprocessing to various machine learning algorithms, including core techniques in supervised and unsupervised learning. It provides detailed code examples and illustrations, suitable for both beginners and experienced developers, facilitating mastery of machine learning concepts and applications within 100 days. The clear translation and structure enhance the learning experience.

metadata.name: practicalAI-cn
metadata.description: AI实战-practicalAI 中文版

summary.zh: AI实战-practicalAI 中文版是一个面向机器学习爱好者的实用教程，涵盖了从基础到进阶的多种机器学习算法和深度学习模型。该项目使用PyTorch实现，用户可以在Google Colab中无缝运行所有示例，便于学习和实验。内容包括线性回归、卷积神经网络、生成对抗网络等，适合希望掌握产品级机器学习编程的开发者。
summary.en: The AI Practical - practicalAI Chinese version is a practical tutorial for machine learning enthusiasts, covering a wide range of algorithms and deep learning models from basics to advanced levels. Implemented using PyTorch, users can seamlessly run all examples in Google Colab, facilitating learning and experimentation. Content includes linear regression, convolutional neural networks, generative adversarial networks, etc., making it suitable for developers aiming to master production-level machine learning programming.

metadata.name: Aix-DB
metadata.description: Aix-DB 基于 LangChain/LangGraph 框架，结合 MCP Skills 多智能体协作架构，实现自然语言到数据洞察的端到端转换。

summary.zh: Aix-DB 是一个基于 LangChain/LangGraph 框架的智能数据分析系统，结合 MCP Skills 多智能体协作架构，实现自然语言到数据洞察的端到端转换。其核心能力包括通用问答、数据问答（Text2SQL）、深度搜索和数据可视化，适用于企业级 AI 解决方案。该系统支持多种数据库，具备开箱即用、安全可控和易于集成的特点，旨在提升数据分析的效率和准确性。
summary.en: Aix-DB is an intelligent data analysis system based on the LangChain/LangGraph framework, integrating the MCP Skills multi-agent collaboration architecture for end-to-end conversion from natural language to data insights. Its core capabilities include general Q&A, data Q&A (Text2SQL), deep search, and data visualization, making it suitable for enterprise-level AI solutions. The system supports various databases and features out-of-the-box usability, security, and easy integration, aiming to enhance the efficiency and accuracy of data analysis.

metadata.name: flat
metadata.description: Project flat is the Web, Windows and macOS client of Agora Flat open source classroom.

summary.zh: Agora Flat是一个开源课堂项目，提供Web、Windows和macOS客户端，支持实时互动、视频/音频聊天和消息传递。其核心功能包括多功能互动白板、课堂管理、录制和回放等，适用于在线教育和远程协作场景。项目易于搭建，支持多种登录方式，适合开发者和教育工作者使用。
summary.en: Agora Flat is an open-source classroom project offering Web, Windows, and macOS clients that support real-time interaction, video/audio chat, and messaging. Key features include a multifunctional interactive whiteboard, classroom management, recording, and replaying, making it suitable for online education and remote collaboration. The project is easy to set up and supports various login methods, catering to developers and educators.

metadata.name: edu-knowlege
metadata.description: 教育各种资料，从幼儿园到小学、中学，涵盖学而思，万维、猿辅导等多个机构，持续增加中

summary.zh: edu-knowlege 项目汇集了从幼儿园到大学的各种教育资料，涵盖多个知名教育机构如学而思、猿辅导等，持续更新丰富内容。该项目为学生和教育工作者提供了一个全面的学习资源平台，助力教育信息的获取与分享。
summary.en: The edu-knowlege project aggregates educational materials from kindergarten to university, covering various renowned institutions such as Xueersi and Yuanfudao, with continuous updates of rich content. This project provides a comprehensive learning resource platform for students and educators, facilitating access to and sharing of educational information.

metadata.name: cc-cli
metadata.description: claude code工具集合

summary.zh: CC CLI 是一款高效的命令行工具，专为 Claude Code 和 Codex 的配置管理而设计。它支持一键切换多站点和 Token，智能合并配置，提供 WebDAV 云端备份功能，简化了用户的配置管理流程。该工具适合开发者和技术人员，提升了 API 管理的便捷性和效率。
summary.en: CC CLI is an efficient command-line tool designed for managing configurations of Claude Code and Codex. It supports one-click switching between multiple sites and tokens, intelligently merges configurations, and offers WebDAV cloud backup functionality, simplifying the configuration management process. This tool is ideal for developers and technical personnel, enhancing the convenience and efficiency of API management.

summary.zh: 《AI项目之母》是一个以学习者为中心的课程，旨在帮助用户构建现代RAG（检索增强生成）系统。通过实战，学员将掌握从基础的关键词搜索到结合语义理解的混合检索的完整流程，最终创建一个能够自动获取和解析学术论文的AI研究助手。课程涵盖Docker、FastAPI、OpenSearch等技术，强调行业最佳实践。
summary.en: The 'Mother of AI Project' is a learner-focused course designed to help users build modern RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) systems. Through hands-on implementation, participants will master the complete process from foundational keyword search to hybrid retrieval with semantic understanding, ultimately creating an AI research assistant that automatically fetches and parses academic papers. The course covers technologies like Docker, FastAPI, and OpenSearch, emphasizing industry best practices.

metadata.name: AI-For-Beginners
metadata.description: 12 Weeks, 24 Lessons, AI for All!

summary.zh: 《初学者人工智能课程》提供为期12周、24节课的学习计划，旨在帮助初学者了解人工智能的基本概念与应用。课程内容涵盖TensorFlow和PyTorch等工具的使用，以及AI伦理等重要主题，配有实践课和测验，适合各类学习者。该项目支持多语言，确保全球用户都能受益。
summary.en: The 'AI for Beginners' curriculum offers a 12-week, 24-lesson program designed to introduce beginners to the fundamentals of artificial intelligence. It covers essential tools like TensorFlow and PyTorch, along with important topics such as AI ethics, featuring practical lessons and quizzes. The project supports multiple languages, ensuring accessibility for learners worldwide.

metadata.name: ardupilot
metadata.description: ArduPlane, ArduCopter, ArduRover, ArduSub source

summary.zh: ArduPilot是最先进、功能齐全且可靠的开源自动驾驶软件，支持多种类型的飞行器和地面车辆，包括飞机、无人机、船只和潜艇。自2010年起，由专业工程师和社区贡献者共同开发，ArduPilot不断扩展以支持新兴的车辆类型，适用于科研、商业和爱好者的多种应用场景。
summary.en: ArduPilot is the most advanced, full-featured, and reliable open-source autopilot software available, capable of controlling various vehicle types including airplanes, drones, boats, and submarines. Developed since 2010 by a diverse team of professional engineers and community contributors, ArduPilot is continually expanded to support emerging vehicle types, making it suitable for research, commercial, and hobbyist applications.

metadata.name: LeetCUDA
metadata.description: 📚LeetCUDA: Modern CUDA Learn Notes with PyTorch for Beginners🐑, 200+ CUDA Kernels, Tensor Cores, HGEMM, FA-2 MMA.🎉

summary.zh: LeetCUDA 是一个面向初学者的现代 CUDA 学习笔记，结合了 PyTorch，提供了 200 多个 CUDA 内核和多个高性能计算示例。项目重点在于 Tensor 核心的应用，支持 TF32/F16/BF16/F8 格式，能够实现高达 98% 的 cuBLAS 性能。适合希望深入学习 CUDA 和高效计算的开发者和研究人员。
summary.en: LeetCUDA is a modern CUDA learning resource for beginners, integrating PyTorch with over 200 CUDA kernels and various high-performance computing examples. The project emphasizes the application of Tensor Cores, supporting TF32/F16/BF16/F8 formats, achieving up to 98% of cuBLAS performance. It is ideal for developers and researchers looking to deepen their understanding of CUDA and efficient computing.

metadata.name: CoreInject
metadata.description: 搞快点

summary.zh: QiuChenly/CoreInject 是一个面向 macOS 用户的开源应用商店，旨在提供自由、无门槛的软件生态。用户可以在此找到各种应用和资源，并与志同道合者分享经验。项目强调共享精神，拒绝传统的付费模式，致力于构建一个平等的社区。通过整合 API 和注入库，用户可轻松使用各种功能，适合开发者和普通用户。
summary.en: QiuChenly/CoreInject is an open-source app store for macOS users, designed to provide a free and barrier-free software ecosystem. Users can discover various applications and resources while sharing experiences with like-minded individuals. The project emphasizes the spirit of sharing, rejecting traditional payment models, and aims to build an equal community. By integrating APIs and injection libraries, users can easily access various functionalities, suitable for both developers and casual users.

metadata.name: Web-Dev-Resources
metadata.description: A collection of free web development resources, including APIs, hosting platforms, cheat sheets, icons, templates, fonts, color tools, learning platforms, and more. 🚀

summary.zh: Web-Dev-Resources 是一个免费的网页开发资源集合，涵盖了 API、托管平台、备忘单、图标、模板、字体、配色工具和学习平台等。该项目旨在为开发者提供丰富的工具和资源，帮助他们提升开发效率和创作灵感，适合初学者和专业开发者使用。
summary.en: Web-Dev-Resources is a collection of free web development resources, including APIs, hosting platforms, cheat sheets, icons, templates, fonts, color tools, and learning platforms. This project aims to provide developers with a wealth of tools and resources to enhance their development efficiency and creativity, making it suitable for both beginners and professional developers.

metadata.name: kotaemon
metadata.description: An open-source RAG-based tool for chatting with your documents.

summary.zh: kotaemon 是一个开源的 RAG（检索增强生成）工具，旨在为用户提供与文档交互的简洁且可定制的界面。该工具支持多种大型语言模型（LLM），并为开发者提供构建自定义 RAG 流水线的框架，适用于文档问答场景。其用户友好的界面和易于安装的特性，使其适合广泛的应用场景。
summary.en: kotaemon is an open-source RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) tool designed to provide a clean and customizable interface for interacting with documents. It supports various large language models (LLMs) and offers developers a framework to build custom RAG pipelines, suitable for document QA scenarios. Its user-friendly interface and easy installation features make it applicable in a wide range of use cases.

metadata.name: claude-relay-service
metadata.description: CRS-自建Claude Code镜像，一站式开源中转服务，让 Claude、OpenAI、Gemini、Droid 订阅统一接入，支持拼车共享，更高效分摊成本，原生工具无缝使用。

summary.zh: Claude Relay Service 是一款开源的中转服务，允许用户自建 Claude API，支持多账户管理和拼车共享，帮助用户高效分摊成本。该服务提供数据安全、性能优化和使用统计等功能，适合对隐私和稳定性有需求的用户。通过简单的脚本部署，用户可以快速搭建服务，享受更稳定的 Claude 访问体验。
summary.en: Claude Relay Service is an open-source relay service that allows users to self-host the Claude API, supporting multi-account management and carpool sharing to efficiently share costs. The service offers data security, performance optimization, and usage statistics, making it suitable for users with privacy and stability needs. With a simple script deployment, users can quickly set up the service for a more stable Claude access experience.

metadata.name: Python-AI
metadata.description: 深度学习100例、深度学习DL、图片分类、目标识别、目标检测、自然语言处理nlp、文本分类、TensorFlow、PyTorch

summary.zh: 《深度学习100例》项目提供了丰富的深度学习示例，涵盖图片分类、目标识别和自然语言处理等领域，使用TensorFlow和PyTorch框架。项目不仅提供可运行的代码和数据，还定期更新原创文章，适合希望深入学习深度学习技术的开发者和研究者。通过此项目，用户可以快速掌握深度学习的核心概念和应用。
summary.en: The 'Deep Learning 100 Examples' project offers a wealth of deep learning examples covering image classification, object recognition, and natural language processing, utilizing TensorFlow and PyTorch frameworks. It provides runnable code and data while regularly updating original articles, making it suitable for developers and researchers eager to delve into deep learning technologies. This project enables users to quickly grasp core concepts and applications of deep learning.

metadata.name: open-lovable
metadata.description: 🔥 Clone and recreate any website as a modern React app in seconds

summary.zh: Open Lovable 是一个基于 AI 的工具，能够快速克隆和重建任何网站为现代 React 应用。用户只需通过简单的聊天界面与 AI 互动，即可实现应用的即时构建，极大地提升了开发效率。该项目展示了 Firecrawl 团队的技术实力，适合需要快速原型开发和网站重建的开发者使用。
summary.en: Open Lovable is an AI-powered tool that allows users to quickly clone and recreate any website as a modern React app. By interacting with AI through a simple chat interface, users can instantly build applications, significantly enhancing development efficiency. This project showcases the technical prowess of the Firecrawl team and is ideal for developers needing rapid prototyping and website reconstruction.

metadata.name: jimeng-free-api-all
metadata.description: Jimeng AI Free 服务支持即梦超强图像与视频生成能力，包含即梦 4.0 文生图等多款模型，提供文生图、图生图、视频生成功能（官方每日赠 66 积分，可生成 66 次），零配置部署且支持多路 token。 接口与 OpenAI 完全兼容，需从即梦官网获取 sessionid 作为 Authorization 的 Bearer Token，支持多账号接入。提供 Docker 部署方式及 dockerhub 镜像，可通过多种接口调用，包括对话补全、视频生成、图像生成（文生图、图生图）等，满足多样化生成需求。

summary.zh: Jimeng AI Free API 提供强大的图像和视频生成能力，支持文生图、图生图及视频生成，兼容 OpenAI 接口。用户可通过零配置部署和多路 token 轻松接入，满足多样化生成需求。该项目适用于开发者，特别是在创意和多媒体领域，提供高分辨率生成和多模态智能视频功能，助力快速实现创意构思。
summary.en: Jimeng AI Free API offers powerful image and video generation capabilities, supporting text-to-image, image-to-image, and video generation, fully compatible with OpenAI interfaces. Users can easily integrate through zero-configuration deployment and multi-token support, catering to diverse generation needs. This project is ideal for developers, especially in creative and multimedia fields, providing high-resolution generation and multimodal intelligent video features to quickly realize creative ideas.

metadata.name: camel
metadata.description: 🐫 CAMEL: The first and the best multi-agent framework. Finding the Scaling Law of Agents. https://www.camel-ai.org

summary.zh: CAMEL是一个开源的多智能体框架，专注于研究智能体的扩展法则。它支持多种类型的智能体、任务和模拟环境，为研究人员提供了丰富的工具和资源。通过大规模的智能体研究，CAMEL旨在揭示智能体的行为、能力及潜在风险，推动智能体系统的演变与应用。
summary.en: CAMEL is an open-source multi-agent framework focused on researching the scaling laws of agents. It supports various types of agents, tasks, and simulated environments, providing researchers with a wealth of tools and resources. By studying agents at scale, CAMEL aims to uncover insights into their behaviors, capabilities, and potential risks, advancing the evolution and application of multi-agent systems.

metadata.name: pathway
metadata.description: Python ETL framework for stream processing, real-time analytics, LLM pipelines, and RAG.

summary.zh: Pathway是一个基于Python的ETL框架，专注于流处理、实时分析、LLM管道和RAG。它提供易用的Python API，支持在开发和生产环境中处理批量和流数据。Pathway的核心是一个可扩展的Rust引擎，能够执行增量计算，支持多线程和分布式计算，且可通过Docker和Kubernetes轻松部署。
summary.en: Pathway is a Python ETL framework designed for stream processing, real-time analytics, LLM pipelines, and RAG. It features an easy-to-use Python API that supports handling both batch and streaming data in development and production environments. Powered by a scalable Rust engine, it performs incremental computation, enabling multithreading and distributed computations, and can be easily deployed with Docker and Kubernetes.

metadata.name: fly-cursor-free
metadata.description: 轻松一键续杯 Cursor Pro，保持14天试用不掉。【支持 Claude 4】

summary.zh: FlyCursor 是一款便捷工具，旨在帮助用户轻松续杯 Cursor Pro 试用，保持14天的免费使用。它支持批量注册本地账号与共享账号池，用户可快速切换账号，享受无限次数的高级模型使用，如 Claude 4 和 GPT 5。该工具兼容 Windows 和 macOS，具备自动注册和人机验证功能，适合需要长期使用 Cursor Pro 的用户。
summary.en: FlyCursor is a convenient tool designed to help users easily extend their Cursor Pro trial for 14 days. It supports batch registration of local accounts and a shared account pool, allowing users to quickly switch accounts for unlimited access to advanced models like Claude 4 and GPT 5. The tool is compatible with both Windows and macOS, featuring automatic registration and CAPTCHA verification, making it ideal for users needing long-term access to Cursor Pro.

metadata.name: Dify2OpenAI
metadata.description: 一个将 Dify 应用程序转换为 OpenAI API 接口的网关服务，使您可以使用 OpenAI API 兼容的方式访问 Dify 的 LLM、知识库、工具和工作流程。

summary.zh: Dify2OpenAI 是一个将 Dify 应用程序转换为 OpenAI API 接口的网关服务，允许用户以 OpenAI API 兼容的方式访问 Dify 的大语言模型、知识库和工具。该项目支持流式传输、持续对话以及多种接入方式，适用于需要集成 Dify 功能的开发者和企业，提升了与 OpenAI 生态系统的兼容性与灵活性。
summary.en: Dify2OpenAI is a gateway service that converts Dify applications into OpenAI API interfaces, allowing users to access Dify's large language models, knowledge bases, and tools in an OpenAI API-compatible manner. The project supports streaming, continuous conversations, and various integration methods, making it suitable for developers and enterprises looking to integrate Dify functionalities, enhancing compatibility and flexibility with the OpenAI ecosystem.

metadata.name: AutoAgent
metadata.description: "AutoAgent: Fully-Automated and Zero-Code LLM Agent Framework"

summary.zh: AutoAgent是一个完全自动化的零代码LLM代理框架，允许用户通过自然语言创建和部署智能代理。其核心价值在于简化AI开发流程，使任何人都能轻松构建自定义代理和工作流。技术亮点包括自然语言驱动的代理构建、智能资源编排和自我管理的工作流生成，极大地提升了用户的开发效率与灵活性。
summary.en: AutoAgent is a fully-automated, zero-code LLM agent framework that enables users to create and deploy intelligent agents using natural language. Its core value lies in simplifying the AI development process, allowing anyone to easily build custom agents and workflows. Key features include natural language-driven agent building, intelligent resource orchestration, and self-managing workflow generation, significantly enhancing user development efficiency and flexibility.

metadata.name: claude-code-templates
metadata.description: CLI tool for configuring and monitoring Claude Code

summary.zh: Claude Code Templates 是一款命令行工具，旨在为 Anthropic 的 Claude Code 提供现成的配置和监控解决方案。它包含丰富的 AI 代理、自定义命令、设置、钩子和外部集成，旨在提升开发工作流的效率。用户可以通过交互式界面轻松浏览和安装超过 100 个组件，快速构建完整的开发栈，适用于多种开发场景。
summary.en: Claude Code Templates is a CLI tool designed to provide ready-to-use configurations and monitoring solutions for Anthropic's Claude Code. It features a comprehensive collection of AI agents, custom commands, settings, hooks, and external integrations aimed at enhancing development workflows. Users can easily browse and install over 100 components through an interactive interface, enabling quick setup of complete development stacks for various scenarios.

metadata.name: api-cf
metadata.description: 简易cloudflare反代大陆无法直连的大模型api

summary.zh: 本项目是一个简易的Cloudflare反向代理工具，旨在帮助用户访问在中国大陆无法直接连接的大模型API服务。它支持多种主流服务，包括Gemini、OpenAI和Claude，提供完全透传的请求与响应，确保兼容性。此外，用户可选配置API密钥轮询和请求日志记录功能，增强可观测性和避免请求限制，部署过程简单，无需服务器维护。
summary.en: This project is a simple Cloudflare reverse proxy tool designed to help users access large model API services that cannot be directly connected in mainland China. It supports multiple mainstream services, including Gemini, OpenAI, and Claude, providing complete passthrough for requests and responses to ensure compatibility. Additionally, users can optionally configure API key rotation and request logging features to enhance observability and avoid request limits, with a straightforward deployment process that requires no server maintenance.

metadata.name: xiaozhi-esp32-server
metadata.description: 本项目为xiaozhi-esp32提供后端服务，帮助您快速搭建ESP32设备控制服务器。Backend service for xiaozhi-esp32, helps you quickly build an ESP32 device control server.

summary.zh: xiaozhi-esp32-server 项目为 ESP32 设备提供后端服务，旨在快速搭建智能设备控制服务器。基于人机共生智能理论，采用 Python、Java 和 Vue 技术，支持 MQTT、UDP 和 Websocket 协议，具备声纹识别和知识库功能，适合希望独立搭建后端服务的用户。
summary.en: The xiaozhi-esp32-server project provides backend services for ESP32 devices, enabling quick setup of intelligent device control servers. Based on human-machine symbiosis theory, it utilizes Python, Java, and Vue technologies, supporting MQTT, UDP, and Websocket protocols, along with voiceprint recognition and knowledge base features, ideal for users looking to independently establish backend services.

metadata.name: 500-AI-Agents-Projects
metadata.description: The 500 AI Agents Projects is a curated collection of AI agent use cases across various industries. It showcases practical applications and provides links to open-source projects for implementation, illustrating how AI agents are transforming sectors such as healthcare, finance, education, retail, and more.

summary.zh: 500 AI代理项目是一个精心策划的AI代理用例集合，涵盖多个行业，展示了AI代理在医疗、金融、教育和零售等领域的实际应用。该项目提供了详细的用例和开源项目链接，帮助开发者和研究人员了解AI代理如何提升行业效率与创新。
summary.en: The 500 AI Agents Projects is a curated collection of AI agent use cases across various industries, showcasing practical applications in healthcare, finance, education, and retail. It provides detailed use cases and links to open-source projects, aiding developers and researchers in understanding how AI agents enhance industry efficiency and innovation.

metadata.name: Nano-Bananary
metadata.description: 香蕉超市｜各种玩法一键生成，无需提示词，支持局部涂选、连续编辑

summary.zh: Nano Bananary 是一款创新的图像生成工具，支持用户通过简单的操作生成各种图像和视频，无需提示词。其核心功能包括局部涂选、连续编辑和历史记录，极大提升了用户体验。该工具适用于设计师、内容创作者等需要快速生成视觉内容的场景，具备中文界面和浅色主题，方便用户使用。
summary.en: Nano Bananary is an innovative image generation tool that allows users to create various images and videos effortlessly without prompts. Its core features include local selection, continuous editing, and history tracking, significantly enhancing user experience. This tool is ideal for designers and content creators who need to generate visual content quickly, offering a Chinese interface and light theme for user convenience.

metadata.name: ZtoApi
metadata.description: ZtoApi 是一个高性能的 OpenAI 兼容 API 代理服务器，专为 Z.ai 的 GLM-4.5 和 GLM-4.5V 模型设计。使用 Deno 原生 HTTP API 实现，支持完整的流式和非流式响应，提供实时监控 Dashboard，让你能够无缝地将 Z.ai 的强大 AI 能力集成到现有的 OpenAI 客户端应用中。

summary.zh: ZtoApi 是一款高性能的 OpenAI 兼容 API 代理服务器，专为 Z.ai 的 GLM-4.5 和 GLM-4.5V 模型设计。它基于 Deno 原生 HTTP API 实现，支持流式和非流式响应，并提供实时监控 Dashboard，便于开发者将 Z.ai 的 AI 能力无缝集成到现有应用中。该项目支持多平台部署，具备灵活配置和安全身份验证等特性。
summary.en: ZtoApi is a high-performance OpenAI-compatible API proxy server designed for Z.ai's GLM-4.5 and GLM-4.5V models. Built on Deno's native HTTP API, it supports both streaming and non-streaming responses, along with a real-time monitoring Dashboard, allowing seamless integration of Z.ai's AI capabilities into existing applications. The project supports multi-platform deployment and features flexible configuration and secure authentication.

metadata.name: z.ai2api_python
metadata.description: 仅供学习

summary.zh: Z.ai2api_python 是一个基于 FastAPI 的高性能代理服务，支持多种 AI 提供商如 Z.AI、K2Think 和 LongCat。它提供 OpenAI API 兼容接口，具备流式响应、数据库管理、智能 Token 池等功能，适合需要多模型支持的开发者。项目支持 Docker 部署，便于快速搭建和管理。
summary.en: Z.ai2api_python is a high-performance proxy service based on FastAPI, supporting multiple AI providers such as Z.AI, K2Think, and LongCat. It offers an OpenAI API compatible interface with features like streaming responses, database management, and intelligent token pooling, making it suitable for developers needing multi-model support. The project supports Docker deployment for easy setup and management.

metadata.name: EchoSoul
metadata.description: Let your conversations reflect your inner self.

summary.zh: EchoSoul 是一款基于 Electron 的应用，结合了 React 和 TypeScript，旨在通过对话反映用户的内心世界。该项目支持跨平台构建，适用于 Windows、macOS 和 Linux，提供了现代化的开发环境设置，适合开发者进行个性化的对话体验开发。
summary.en: EchoSoul is an Electron application that combines React and TypeScript, designed to reflect users' inner selves through conversations. The project supports cross-platform builds for Windows, macOS, and Linux, offering a modern development environment setup, ideal for developers looking to create personalized conversational experiences.

metadata.name: Tutorial
metadata.description: LLM&VLM Tutorial

summary.zh: 书生大模型实战营提供了系统化的LLM和VLM学习路径，通过多个关卡帮助参与者掌握大模型技术。课程涵盖Linux、Python、Git等基础知识，以及InternLM模型的应用与部署，适合技术爱好者和开发者。参与者完成关卡后可获得算力点和结营证书，支持知识分享与共学，助力技术成长。
summary.en: The InternLM Practical Camp offers a structured learning path for LLM and VLM technologies, guiding participants through various levels to master large model techniques. The curriculum covers foundational knowledge in Linux, Python, and Git, as well as applications and deployments of the InternLM model, catering to tech enthusiasts and developers. Participants can earn computing points and certificates upon completion, promoting knowledge sharing and collaborative learning.

metadata.name: esp-brookesia
metadata.description: ESP-Brookesia is a human-machine interaction development framework designed for AIoT devices.

summary.zh: ESP-Brookesia 是一个专为 AIoT 设备设计的人机交互开发框架，旨在简化用户界面设计和应用开发流程。它基于 C/C++ 开发，支持 ESP-IDF 系统，提供丰富的功能组件，支持 AI 应用场景开发。该框架采用应用管理方法，实现 UI 隔离与多应用共存，灵活适应不同设备和应用需求，助力客户加速 HMI 应用产品的开发与市场发布。
summary.en: ESP-Brookesia is a human-machine interaction development framework designed for AIoT devices, aimed at simplifying user interface design and application development processes. Developed in C/C++ and supporting the ESP-IDF system, it offers rich functional components for AI application scenario development. The framework adopts an app-based management approach, enabling UI isolation and coexistence of multiple apps, flexibly adapting to various devices and application requirements, thus accelerating the development and market release of customers' HMI application products.

metadata.name: ZHO-nano-banana-Creation
metadata.description: 我的 nano-banana 创意玩法大合集！  持续更新中！

summary.zh: ZHO-nano-banana-Creation 是一个创意玩法合集，专注于将图像转化为多种形式的艺术作品，如手办、插画、视频等。项目提供了多达46种玩法，涵盖了从人物生成到产品设计的多样化应用，适合艺术创作者和设计师使用。通过开源的 Nano Bananary、BananaPod 和 BananaFlow 工具，用户可以轻松体验和实现这些创意。
summary.en: ZHO-nano-banana-Creation is a creative collection focused on transforming images into various forms of art, such as figures, illustrations, and videos. The project offers up to 46 different applications, ranging from character generation to product design, making it suitable for artists and designers. With the open-source tools Nano Bananary, BananaPod, and BananaFlow, users can easily experience and implement these creative ideas.

metadata.name: open-xiaoai
metadata.description: 🔊 让小爱音箱「听见你的声音」，解锁无限可能。

summary.zh: Open-XiaoAI 项目旨在解锁小爱音箱的潜力，通过多模态大模型和 AI Agent，使其不仅能执行命令，还能理解情感和主动思考。该项目适用于小爱音箱 Pro 和 Xiaomi 智能音箱 Pro，用户可以自定义唤醒词并接入多种 AI 功能，真正实现智能交互，未来由用户定义。
summary.en: The Open-XiaoAI project aims to unlock the potential of XiaoAI speakers by utilizing multimodal large models and AI agents, enabling them to not only execute commands but also understand emotions and think proactively. This project is suitable for XiaoAI Pro and Xiaomi Smart Speaker Pro, allowing users to customize wake words and integrate various AI functionalities, truly achieving intelligent interaction defined by users.

metadata.name: awesome-nano-banana
metadata.description: Awesome curated collection of images and prompts generated by gemini-2.5-flash-image (aka Nano Banana) state-of-the-art image generation and editing model. Explore AI generated visuals created with Gemini, showcasing Google’s advanced image generation capabilities.

summary.zh: 本项目是一个精心策划的图像和提示集合，利用谷歌的Nano Banana（Gemini-2.5-Flash-Image）模型生成的图像，展示了先进的AI图像生成与编辑能力。该集合主要来自Twitter/X及各大AI社区，旨在激发创意并探索新的表达可能性，适合艺术创作者和AI爱好者。
summary.en: This project is a curated collection of images and prompts generated by Google's Nano Banana (Gemini-2.5-Flash-Image) model, showcasing advanced AI image generation and editing capabilities. The collection primarily features cases from Twitter/X and various AI communities, aimed at inspiring creativity and exploring new possibilities for artistic expression.

metadata.name: Awesome-Nano-Banana-images
metadata.description: A curated collection of fun and creative examples generated with Nano Banana & Nano Banana Pro🍌, Gemini-2.5-flash-image based model. We also release Nano-consistent-150K openly to support the community's development of image generation and unified models(click to website to see our blog)

summary.zh: Nano-banana精选图片库汇集了使用Nano Banana及Nano Banana Pro生成的创意图像，展示了Google在图像生成和编辑方面的潜力。该项目不仅提供丰富的示例，还发布了Nano-consistent-150K数据集，旨在提升多样化编辑场景中的人物身份一致性，适合开发者和创作者探索图像生成的无限可能。
summary.en: The Nano-banana curated image library showcases creative images generated with Nano Banana and Nano Banana Pro, highlighting Google's potential in image generation and editing. This project offers a wealth of examples and has released the Nano-consistent-150K dataset, aimed at enhancing identity consistency in diverse editing scenarios, making it ideal for developers and creators to explore the limitless possibilities of image generation.

metadata.name: agentscope
metadata.description: Build and run agents you can see, understand and trust.

summary.zh: AgentScope 是一个易于使用的代理框架，旨在与日益强大的模型能力相结合，支持模型微调。它允许用户在五分钟内构建代理，具备实时语音、记忆、规划等功能，并支持多代理的灵活编排。该框架适用于需要快速开发和部署智能代理的场景，提供了生产就绪的解决方案。
summary.en: AgentScope is an easy-to-use agent framework designed to leverage the growing capabilities of models while supporting fine-tuning. Users can build agents in five minutes with features like real-time voice, memory, and planning, along with flexible multi-agent orchestration. This framework is ideal for scenarios requiring rapid development and deployment of intelligent agents, offering a production-ready solution.

metadata.name: HunyuanWorld-Voyager
metadata.description: Voyager is an interactive RGBD video generation model conditioned on camera input, and supports real-time 3D reconstruction.

summary.zh: HunyuanWorld-Voyager 是一款创新的 RGBD 视频生成模型，能够根据用户定义的相机路径生成一致的 3D 点云序列。该模型支持实时 3D 重建，适用于世界探索和视频重建等多种应用场景，具有高效生成对齐深度和 RGB 视频的技术亮点。
summary.en: HunyuanWorld-Voyager is an innovative RGBD video generation model that produces consistent 3D point-cloud sequences based on user-defined camera paths. It supports real-time 3D reconstruction, making it suitable for various applications such as world exploration and video reconstruction, with the technical highlight of efficiently generating aligned depth and RGB videos.

metadata.name: mcp-use
metadata.description: The fullstack MCP framework to develop MCP Apps for ChatGPT / Claude & MCP Servers for AI Agents.

summary.zh: mcp-use 是一个全栈 MCP 框架，旨在为 ChatGPT 和 Claude 开发 MCP 应用程序以及为 AI 代理提供 MCP 服务器。该框架支持 TypeScript 和 Python SDK，允许开发者快速构建、预览和部署应用。通过与 Manufact MCP Cloud 的集成，用户可以轻松管理生产环境中的应用，获得可观测性、指标和日志等功能。
summary.en: mcp-use is a fullstack MCP framework designed to develop MCP Apps for ChatGPT and Claude, as well as MCP Servers for AI agents. It supports TypeScript and Python SDKs, enabling developers to quickly build, preview, and deploy applications. With integration into Manufact MCP Cloud, users can easily manage their applications in production, gaining observability, metrics, and logs.

metadata.name: node-sass
metadata.description: :rainbow: Node.js bindings to libsass

summary.zh: node-sass 是一个为 Node.js 提供与 LibSass 绑定的库，允许用户以极快的速度将 .scss 文件编译为 CSS。尽管该项目已达到生命周期终点，用户仍可通过连接中间件自动编译样式文件。适合需要高效样式处理的前端开发者，尤其是在使用 Node.js 环境的项目中。
summary.en: node-sass is a library that provides Node.js bindings to LibSass, enabling users to compile .scss files to CSS at incredible speed. Although the project has reached its end of life, users can still leverage it for automatic style compilation via connect middleware. It's ideal for frontend developers needing efficient style processing in Node.js environments.

metadata.name: openrouter-free-model
metadata.description: This is a web application designed to browse, filter, sort, and manage free models available on OpenRouter. It allows users to easily select models and copy their IDs in various formats compatible with other tools. The application is built with Next.js and supports multiple languages (English and Chinese)

summary.zh: OpenRouter 免费模型浏览器是一个基于 Next.js 的网络应用，旨在帮助用户浏览、过滤、排序和管理 OpenRouter 上的免费模型。它支持多语言切换，用户可以轻松选择模型并以多种格式复制模型 ID，兼容其他工具。该应用具备响应式设计，适用于桌面和移动设备，提供批量选择和自定义复制格式等功能。
summary.en: The OpenRouter Free Model Explorer is a web application built with Next.js, designed to browse, filter, sort, and manage free models available on OpenRouter. It supports multilingual switching, allowing users to easily select models and copy their IDs in various formats compatible with other tools. The application features a responsive design optimized for both desktop and mobile devices, offering batch selection and customizable copy formats.

metadata.name: sparkle
metadata.description: :electron: Another Mihomo GUI. (🛠building...)

summary.zh: Sparkle 是一个基于 Electron 和 React 的 Mihomo 图形用户界面，提供开箱即用的功能，支持多种主题和配置管理。其技术亮点包括内置的 Mihomo 内核、WebDAV 一键备份、强大的配置覆写功能和深度集成的 Sub-Store，适合需要灵活配置和管理代理服务的用户。
summary.en: Sparkle is a Mihomo GUI built on Electron and React, offering out-of-the-box functionality with multiple themes and configuration management. Key features include an integrated Mihomo core, one-click WebDAV backup, powerful configuration overriding, and deep integration with Sub-Store, making it ideal for users needing flexible proxy service management.

metadata.name: Prompt-Tools
metadata.description: 一款强大的桌面应用，旨在简化您的 Prompt 管理工作流程。

summary.zh: Prompt Tools 是一款开源的桌面应用，专为简化提示词管理而设计。它通过提供快速、安全的跨平台体验，帮助用户高效创建、编辑和组织提示词，解决了传统管理方式的混乱与低效问题。基于 Rust 和 Tauri 框架构建，确保了轻量与高效，用户数据安全存储在本地，保护隐私。
summary.en: Prompt Tools is an open-source desktop application designed to simplify prompt management. It offers a fast and secure cross-platform experience, enabling users to efficiently create, edit, and organize prompts, addressing the chaos and inefficiency of traditional management methods. Built on Rust and the Tauri framework, it ensures lightweight performance and local data storage for user privacy protection.

metadata.name: UltraRAG
metadata.description: [GitHub Trending #2] A Low-Code MCP Framework for Building Complex and Innovative RAG Pipelines

summary.zh: UltraRAG是一个轻量级的RAG开发框架，基于模型上下文协议（MCP）架构设计，旨在降低开发门槛，加速复杂RAG管道的构建。该框架适用于研究探索和工业原型开发，标准化了核心RAG组件，支持知识摄取和多模态处理，帮助研究人员专注于创新与想法。其低代码特性使得用户能够快速部署高性能的RAG系统。
summary.en: UltraRAG is a lightweight RAG development framework based on the Model Context Protocol (MCP) architecture, designed to lower barriers and accelerate the construction of complex RAG pipelines. It is suitable for research exploration and industrial prototyping, standardizing core RAG components, and supporting knowledge ingestion and multimodal processing, allowing researchers to focus on innovation. Its low-code feature enables users to quickly deploy high-performance RAG systems.

metadata.name: qlib
