metadata.description: Qlib is an AI-oriented Quant investment platform that aims to use AI tech to empower Quant Research, from exploring ideas to implementing productions. Qlib supports diverse ML modeling paradigms, including supervised learning, market dynamics modeling, and RL, and is now equipped with https://github.com/microsoft/RD-Agent to automate R&D process.

summary.zh: Qlib是一个面向AI的量化投资平台，旨在利用AI技术增强量化研究，从创意探索到生产实施。它支持多种机器学习建模范式，包括监督学习、市场动态建模和强化学习，并配备了RD-Agent工具，自动化研发过程，提升投资决策的效率与准确性。
summary.en: Qlib is an AI-oriented quantitative investment platform designed to leverage AI technology for enhancing quantitative research, from idea exploration to production implementation. It supports various ML modeling paradigms, including supervised learning, market dynamics modeling, and reinforcement learning, and is equipped with the RD-Agent tool to automate the R&D process, improving investment decision-making efficiency and accuracy.

metadata.name: awesome-public-datasets
metadata.description: A topic-centric list of HQ open datasets.

summary.zh: Awesome Public Datasets 是一个高质量的主题中心公开数据集列表，涵盖农业、建筑、生物等多个领域。该项目从博客、问答及用户反馈中收集并整理数据集，旨在为研究人员和开发者提供便捷的数据访问。大多数数据集免费，适用于数据科学、机器学习和其他分析应用。
summary.en: Awesome Public Datasets is a curated list of high-quality, topic-centric open datasets across various domains such as agriculture, architecture, and biology. The project collects and organizes datasets from blogs, Q&A, and user feedback, aiming to provide easy access for researchers and developers. Most datasets are free, suitable for data science, machine learning, and other analytical applications.

metadata.name: f2
metadata.description: High-speed downloader for multiple platforms

summary.zh: F2 是一款高效的多平台下载工具，支持 DouYin、TikTok、Twitter 和 WeiBo 等社交媒体。该 Python 库不仅提供快速下载功能，还具备灵活的数据处理接口，适合开发者和内容创作者使用。其易于扩展的特性使得用户能够快速适配更多平台，提升下载效率和用户体验。
summary.en: F2 is a high-speed downloader that supports multiple platforms, including DouYin, TikTok, Twitter, and WeiBo. This Python library offers fast downloading capabilities along with flexible data processing interfaces, making it suitable for developers and content creators. Its extensible features allow users to quickly adapt to more platforms, enhancing download efficiency and user experience.

metadata.name: wedecode
metadata.description: 全自动化，微信小程序 wxapkg 包 源代码还原工具, 线上代码安全审计，支持 Windows, Macos, Linux

summary.zh: Wedecode 是一款全自动化的微信小程序 wxapkg 包源代码还原工具，支持 Windows、MacOS 和 Linux 平台。该工具能够完美还原小程序及小游戏的目录结构和源代码，包括 JS、WXML、WXSS 等文件，提供可视化操作界面，便于用户进行线上代码安全审计和学习反编译原理。其功能强大，适合开发者和安全审计人员使用。
summary.en: Wedecode is an automated tool for restoring source code from WeChat mini program wxapkg packages, supporting Windows, MacOS, and Linux platforms. It perfectly restores the directory structure and source code of mini programs and mini games, including JS, WXML, WXSS, etc. With a user-friendly visual interface, it is ideal for online code security auditing and learning reverse engineering principles, making it suitable for developers and security auditors.

metadata.name: private-gpt
metadata.description: Interact with your documents using the power of GPT, 100% privately, no data leaks

summary.zh: PrivateGPT 是一个专为隐私保护设计的 AI 项目，允许用户在不连接互联网的情况下，安全地与文档互动。它提供高层和低层 API，支持文档的管理、上下文检索及响应生成，适用于金融、医疗等对数据安全要求高的行业。该项目确保数据完全在用户控制之下，适合需要严格隐私保护的应用场景。
summary.en: PrivateGPT is an AI project designed for privacy, enabling users to interact with documents securely without internet connectivity. It offers high-level and low-level APIs for document management, context retrieval, and response generation, making it suitable for industries like finance and healthcare that require stringent data security. The project ensures that data remains fully under user control, ideal for applications demanding strict privacy protection.

metadata.name: LearnPrompt
metadata.description: 永久免费开源的 AIGC 课程, 目前已支持Prompt Engineering, ChatGPT, Midjourney, Runway, Stable Diffusion, AI数字人，AI声音&音乐，开源大模型

summary.zh: LearnPrompt 是一个永久免费开源的 AIGC 课程平台，涵盖提示语工程、ChatGPT、Midjourney、Stable Diffusion 等多个领域。该项目提供多种新功能，如多语言支持和评论区，致力于帮助用户掌握 AI 相关技术，适合学习者和开发者。课程内容持续更新，涵盖大模型微调和 AI 数字人等前沿技术。
summary.en: LearnPrompt is a permanently free and open-source AIGC course platform covering areas such as Prompt Engineering, ChatGPT, Midjourney, and Stable Diffusion. The project offers various new features like multilingual support and comment sections, aimed at helping users master AI-related technologies, suitable for learners and developers. Course content is continuously updated, covering cutting-edge technologies like large model fine-tuning and AI digital humans.

metadata.name: youtu-agent
metadata.description: A simple yet powerful agent framework that delivers with open-source models

summary.zh: Youtu-Agent 是一个灵活且高性能的框架，专为构建、运行和评估自主智能体而设计。它支持数据分析、文件处理和深度研究等多种应用场景，且基于开源模型，具备自动化生成工具代码和配置的能力。该框架通过经验学习和端到端强化学习训练提升智能体性能，已在多个基准测试中取得优异成绩，适合低成本部署和多种实际应用。
summary.en: Youtu-Agent is a flexible and high-performance framework designed for building, running, and evaluating autonomous agents. It supports various applications such as data analysis, file processing, and deep research, leveraging open-source models. The framework features automated tool code and configuration generation, enhances agent performance through experience learning and end-to-end reinforcement learning training, and has achieved outstanding results in multiple benchmark tests, making it suitable for low-cost deployment and diverse practical applications.

metadata.name: prompt-eng-interactive-tutorial
metadata.description: Anthropic's Interactive Prompt Engineering Tutorial

summary.zh: Anthropic的交互式提示工程教程提供了逐步的学习体验，帮助用户掌握Claude模型的最佳提示构建技巧。课程涵盖从基础结构到复杂用例的多个章节，结合练习和示例，旨在提升用户的提示工程能力，适用于初学者和中高级用户。通过实际操作，用户可以深入理解Claude的优缺点，优化其应用效果。
summary.en: Anthropic's Interactive Prompt Engineering Tutorial offers a step-by-step learning experience to help users master optimal prompt construction techniques for the Claude model. The course covers multiple chapters from basic structures to complex use cases, integrating exercises and examples to enhance users' prompt engineering skills, suitable for beginners and intermediate to advanced users. Through hands-on practice, users can gain deep insights into Claude's strengths and weaknesses, optimizing its application effectiveness.

metadata.name: short-video-factory
metadata.description: 一键生成产品营销与泛内容短视频，AI批量自动剪辑，高颜值跨平台桌面端工具 One click generation of product marketing and general content short videos, AI batch automatic cliping, beautiful cross platform desktop tool

summary.zh: 短视频工厂是一个开源桌面应用，利用AI技术简化短视频制作流程。用户只需输入提示词和视频素材，即可快速生成高质量的产品营销和泛内容短视频。其核心功能包括AI驱动的文案生成、自动剪辑、语音合成及字幕特效，支持多语言和批量处理，旨在为用户提供便捷的短视频制作体验。
summary.en: The Short Video Factory is an open-source desktop application that simplifies the short video production process using AI technology. Users can quickly generate high-quality product marketing and general content short videos by inputting prompts and video materials. Key features include AI-driven copy generation, automatic clipping, voice synthesis, and subtitle effects, with support for multiple languages and batch processing, aiming to provide a convenient video creation experience.

metadata.name: JamAIBase
metadata.description: The collaborative spreadsheet for AI. Chain cells into powerful pipelines, experiment with prompts and models, and evaluate LLM responses in real-time. Work together seamlessly to build and iterate on AI applications.

summary.zh: JamAI Base 是一个开源的 RAG（增强生成）后端平台，集成了 SQLite 嵌入式数据库和 LanceDB 嵌入式向量数据库，提供便捷的电子表格式用户界面和简单的 REST API。用户可以通过动态表格和实时交互功能，轻松构建和迭代 AI 应用，提升数据处理和生成能力，适用于智能聊天机器人、知识管理和复杂工作流的开发。
summary.en: JamAI Base is an open-source RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) backend platform that integrates an embedded SQLite database and LanceDB vector database, featuring an intuitive spreadsheet-like UI and a simple REST API. Users can easily build and iterate on AI applications through dynamic tables and real-time interaction capabilities, enhancing data processing and generation for intelligent chatbots, knowledge management, and complex workflow development.

metadata.name: cozeworkflows
metadata.description: coze 的200+工作流合集汇总，一直更新

summary.zh: coze工作流集合提供200多个实用的AI工作流，旨在提升用户的工作效率。通过简单的导入步骤，用户可以轻松获取并使用这些工作流，涵盖文档处理、数据提取、视频生成等多种应用场景，适合希望利用AI工具优化工作流程的开发者和内容创作者。
summary.en: The Coze Workflows collection offers over 200 practical AI workflows designed to enhance user productivity. With simple import steps, users can easily access and utilize these workflows, covering various applications such as document processing, data extraction, and video generation, making it ideal for developers and content creators looking to optimize their workflows with AI tools.

metadata.name: ComfyUI-Workflows-ZHO
metadata.description: 我的 ComfyUI 工作流合集 | My ComfyUI workflows collection

summary.zh: ComfyUI工作流合集是一个专注于ComfyUI平台的工作流集合，涵盖多种应用场景，如图像生成、视频处理和艺术创作。该项目提供了22类54项工作流，用户可以轻松访问和使用这些工具，以提高创作效率和灵活性。技术亮点包括对多种模型的支持和自定义功能，适合开发者和创作者使用。
summary.en: The ComfyUI Workflows collection is a dedicated repository for workflows on the ComfyUI platform, covering various applications such as image generation, video processing, and artistic creation. This project offers 54 workflows across 22 categories, allowing users to easily access and utilize these tools to enhance their creative efficiency and flexibility. Key features include support for multiple models and customization options, making it suitable for developers and creators.

metadata.name: newsnow
metadata.description: Elegant reading of real-time and hottest news

summary.zh: NewsNow 是一个优雅的实时新闻阅读平台，专注于提供最新和最热的新闻内容。其特点包括简洁的用户界面、实时更新、GitHub OAuth 登录、以及自适应抓取间隔，旨在优化资源使用并防止 IP 被封。该项目目前仅支持中文，未来将推出多语言版本和更丰富的个性化选项。
summary.en: NewsNow is an elegant platform for reading real-time and trending news. It features a clean UI, real-time updates, GitHub OAuth login, and adaptive scraping intervals to optimize resource usage and prevent IP bans. Currently supporting Chinese only, it aims to introduce multi-language support and enhanced personalization options in the future.

metadata.name: KittenTTS
metadata.description: State-of-the-art TTS model under 25MB 😻

summary.zh: Kitten TTS 是一款开源的高质量文本转语音模型，体积小于 25MB，专为轻量级部署而设计。该模型支持无 GPU 的设备运行，提供多种优质语音选项，优化了实时语音合成的速度，非常适合需要高效语音合成的应用场景。
summary.en: Kitten TTS is an open-source high-quality text-to-speech model designed for lightweight deployment, with a size under 25MB. It runs on devices without a GPU and offers several premium voice options, optimized for fast real-time speech synthesis, making it ideal for applications requiring efficient voice generation.

metadata.name: LLMForEverybody
metadata.description: 每个人都能看懂的大模型知识分享，LLMs春/秋招大模型面试前必看，让你和面试官侃侃而谈

summary.zh: LLMForEverybody 是一个旨在让每个人都能轻松理解大模型知识的平台，特别适合准备大模型面试的求职者。项目提供精选的面试题库和系统化的论文研读，帮助用户从基础到前沿逐步掌握大模型的核心技术，提升职业竞争力。同时，配套视频教程为学习提供了更直观的支持。
summary.en: LLMForEverybody is a platform designed to make large model knowledge accessible to everyone, especially job seekers preparing for large model interviews. The project offers a curated interview question bank and systematic paper readings, helping users master core technologies of large models progressively from basics to cutting-edge. Accompanying video tutorials provide intuitive support for learning.

metadata.name: pywechat
metadata.description: 仍然可用的微信RPA！支持4.0系列微信pywechat是一个基于pywinauto实现的windows桌面微信自动化操作工具，基本实现了PC微信内置的各项操作。

summary.zh: pywechat 是一个基于 pywinauto 的 Windows 桌面微信自动化工具，支持微信 4.0 及以上版本。该项目实现了 PC 微信的多项内置功能，包括自动回复、文件发送和聊天记录管理等，适用于 Windows 7、10 和 11 系统。用户只需简单几行代码即可实现复杂的自动化操作，极大地提高了微信使用的效率和便捷性。
summary.en: pywechat is a Windows desktop WeChat automation tool based on pywinauto, supporting WeChat versions 4.0 and above. This project implements multiple built-in features of PC WeChat, including auto-reply, file sending, and chat history management, suitable for Windows 7, 10, and 11 systems. Users can achieve complex automation tasks with just a few lines of code, significantly enhancing the efficiency and convenience of using WeChat.

metadata.name: CloudFlare-AI-Insight-Daily
metadata.description: AI资讯日报 是一个基于 Cloudflare Workers 驱动的内容聚合与生成平台。它每日为您精选 AI 领域的最新动态，包括行业新闻、热门开源项目、前沿学术论文、科技大V社交媒体言论，并通过 Google Gemini 模型进行智能处理与摘要生成，最终自动发布到 GitHub Pages 生成 AI 日报。

summary.zh: AI资讯日报是一个基于Cloudflare Workers的内容聚合与生成平台，每日精选AI领域的最新动态，包括行业新闻、开源项目和学术论文。通过Google Gemini模型进行智能处理与摘要生成，自动发布至GitHub Pages，帮助用户高效获取有价值的信息，适合AI从业者、内容创作者和技术爱好者。
summary.en: AI Insight Daily is a content aggregation and generation platform powered by Cloudflare Workers, curating the latest developments in the AI field daily, including industry news, open-source projects, and academic papers. Utilizing the Google Gemini model for intelligent processing and summarization, it automatically publishes to GitHub Pages, helping users efficiently access valuable information, suitable for AI practitioners, content creators, and tech enthusiasts.

metadata.name: wewe-rss
metadata.description: 🤗更优雅的微信公众号订阅方式，支持私有化部署、微信公众号RSS生成（基于微信读书）

summary.zh: WeWe RSS 提供了一种优雅的微信公众号订阅解决方案，支持私有化部署和多种格式的RSS生成。其核心功能包括获取公众号历史文章、自动定时更新内容以及全文输出，确保用户阅读无障碍。此外，项目还支持标题过滤和手动更新功能，适合需要灵活管理内容的用户。
summary.en: WeWe RSS offers an elegant solution for subscribing to WeChat official accounts, supporting private deployment and RSS generation in various formats. Key features include retrieving historical articles, automatic content updates, and full-text output for seamless reading. The project also supports title filtering and manual updates, making it suitable for users needing flexible content management.

metadata.name: 60s
metadata.description: ⏰ 60s API 免费接口。每天 60 秒看世界、奥运奖牌榜、小红书/B站/微博/抖音/知乎热搜、金价、油价、天气、翻译、壁纸、Epic 游戏、二维码、猫眼票房｜一系列 高质量、开源、可靠、全球 CDN 加速 的开放 API 集合，支持 Docker / Deno / Bun / Cloudflare Workers / Node.js 部署

summary.zh: 60s API 是一个高质量的开放接口集合，提供全球新闻、天气、油价等数据，支持多种部署方式如 Docker 和 Cloudflare Workers。项目旨在为开发者提供便捷的数据获取途径，确保信息准确性和快速响应。适用于移动应用、网站资讯展示及聊天机器人等场景。
summary.en: 60s API is a high-quality collection of open interfaces providing global news, weather, oil prices, and more, supporting various deployment methods like Docker and Cloudflare Workers. The project aims to offer developers an easy way to access accurate data with fast response times. It is suitable for mobile apps, website news displays, and chatbots.

metadata.name: continew-admin
metadata.description: 🔥Almost最佳后端规范🔥页面现代美观，且专注设计与代码细节的高质量多租户中后台管理系统框架。开箱即用，持续迭代优化，持续提供舒适的开发体验。当前采用技术栈：SpringBoot v3.4.x (Java17)、Vue3 & ArcoDesign、TS、Vite5 、SaToken、MyBatisPlus、Redisson、FastExcel、CosId、JetCache、JustAuth、Crane4j、SpringDoc、Hutool 等。 AI 编程纪元，从 ContiNew & AI 开始优雅编码，让 AI 也“吃点好的”。

summary.zh: ContiNew Admin 是一个高质量的多租户中后台管理系统框架，采用现代美观的设计，专注于代码细节和开发体验。基于 Spring Boot、Vue3 和其他先进技术栈，提供开箱即用的解决方案，持续优化以满足开发者需求。该项目旨在通过开源社区的力量，提升开发效率和代码质量，让开发者享受更优雅的编码体验。
summary.en: ContiNew Admin is a high-quality multi-tenant backend management system framework that features a modern aesthetic design and focuses on code details and developer experience. Built on Spring Boot, Vue3, and other advanced technologies, it offers an out-of-the-box solution that continuously optimizes to meet developer needs. The project aims to enhance coding efficiency and quality through the power of the open-source community, allowing developers to enjoy a more elegant coding experience.

metadata.name: SmsForwarder
metadata.description: 短信转发器——监控Android手机短信、来电、APP通知，并根据指定规则转发到其他手机：钉钉群自定义机器人、钉钉企业内机器人、企业微信群机器人、飞书机器人、企业微信应用消息、邮箱、bark、webhook、Telegram机器人、Server酱、PushPlus、手机短信等。包括主动控制服务端与客户端，让你轻松远程发短信、查短信、查通话、查话簿、查电量等。（V3.0 新增）PS.这个APK主要是学习与自用，如有BUG请提ISSUE，同时欢迎大家提PR指正

summary.zh: SmsForwarder 是一款强大的短信转发器，能够监控 Android 手机的短信、来电和 APP 通知，并根据用户设定的规则将信息转发至多种平台，如钉钉、企业微信、Telegram 等。该应用支持远程控制功能，用户可轻松发送和查询短信、通话记录等，适合需要信息实时监控的用户。
summary.en: SmsForwarder is a powerful SMS forwarding tool that monitors SMS, calls, and app notifications on Android devices, forwarding them to various platforms like DingTalk, WeChat, and Telegram based on user-defined rules. The app supports remote control features, allowing users to easily send and query SMS, call logs, etc., making it ideal for users needing real-time information monitoring.

metadata.name: build-your-own-x
metadata.description: Master programming by recreating your favorite technologies from scratch.

summary.zh: 该仓库提供了一系列循序渐进的指南，帮助开发者从零开始重建各种技术，如3D渲染器、AI模型、区块链等。通过实践，用户能够深入理解技术原理，提升编程能力，适合希望掌握计算机科学基础和实践技能的学习者。
summary.en: This repository offers a collection of step-by-step guides for developers to recreate various technologies from scratch, such as 3D renderers, AI models, and blockchains. By engaging in hands-on projects, users can deepen their understanding of technical principles and enhance their programming skills, making it ideal for learners aiming to grasp foundational computer science and practical skills.

metadata.name: LLMs-from-scratch
metadata.description: Implement a ChatGPT-like LLM in PyTorch from scratch, step by step

summary.zh: 本仓库提供了从零开始实现类似ChatGPT的大型语言模型（LLM）的代码，适合教育和学习目的。通过逐步指导，用户将深入理解LLM的内部工作原理，掌握模型的开发、预训练和微调过程。该项目不仅适合初学者，还包括加载大型预训练模型权重的代码，便于进一步微调，具有很高的实用价值。
summary.en: This repository provides code for implementing a ChatGPT-like large language model (LLM) from scratch, suitable for educational purposes. Users will gain a deep understanding of LLMs through step-by-step guidance on model development, pretraining, and finetuning. The project is valuable for beginners and includes code for loading weights of larger pretrained models for further finetuning.

metadata.name: context7
metadata.description: Context7 Platform -- Up-to-date code documentation for LLMs and AI code editors

summary.zh: Context7 MCP 是一个为大型语言模型（LLMs）和 AI 代码编辑器提供最新代码文档的服务器。它通过实时获取特定版本的文档和代码示例，解决了传统 LLMs 依赖过时信息的问题。用户只需在提示中添加 'use context7'，即可获得准确的代码示例和文档，提升开发效率，避免错误和过时的 API 调用。
summary.en: Context7 MCP is a server that provides up-to-date code documentation for large language models (LLMs) and AI code editors. It addresses the issue of traditional LLMs relying on outdated information by fetching real-time, version-specific documentation and code examples. Users simply add 'use context7' in their prompts to receive accurate code samples and documentation, enhancing development efficiency and avoiding errors from outdated API calls.

metadata.name: AISystem
metadata.description: AISystem 主要是指AI系统，包括AI芯片、AI编译器、AI推理和训练框架等AI全栈底层技术

summary.zh: AISystem是一个全面的AI系统开源课程，涵盖AI芯片、编译器、推理和训练框架等全栈技术。该课程旨在帮助本科生和研究生深入理解AI系统的设计与实现，结合实际案例探讨前沿技术，促进学习与讨论。课程内容丰富，适合AI从业者和爱好者，提供了系统性的知识体系和实践指导。
summary.en: AISystem is a comprehensive open-source course on AI systems, covering full-stack technologies such as AI chips, compilers, inference, and training frameworks. The course aims to help undergraduates and graduate students deeply understand the design and implementation of AI systems, exploring cutting-edge technologies through practical cases to promote learning and discussion. It offers a rich content suitable for AI practitioners and enthusiasts, providing a systematic knowledge framework and practical guidance.

metadata.name: prompt-forge
metadata.description: AI prompt engineering workbench for crafting, testing, and systematically evaluating prompts with powerful analysis tools.

summary.zh: PromptForge 是一个AI提示工程工作台，旨在帮助用户生成、分析和系统性测试提示。通过智能提示生成、先进的分析工具和全面的评估引擎，用户可以高效地优化提示，确保其在不同场景下的表现。该工具支持多种AI模型，适合需要高质量提示的开发者和研究人员。
summary.en: PromptForge is an AI prompt engineering workbench designed to help users generate, analyze, and systematically test prompts. With smart prompt generation, advanced analysis tools, and a comprehensive evaluation engine, users can efficiently optimize prompts to ensure performance across various scenarios. This tool supports multiple AI models, making it ideal for developers and researchers needing high-quality prompts.

metadata.name: prompt-manager
metadata.description: Efficient management and quick access to AI Prompt templates for Cursor/VSCode

summary.zh: Prompt Manager 是一款针对 Cursor 和 VSCode 的高效扩展，旨在管理和快速访问 AI Prompt 模板。其核心功能包括完整的 Prompt 生命周期管理、智能搜索、分层分类系统以及数据导入导出，支持多编辑器集成。该工具通过 TypeScript 全栈开发，提供流畅的用户体验，适合开发者和内容创作者使用。
summary.en: Prompt Manager is an efficient extension for Cursor and VSCode, designed for managing and quickly accessing AI Prompt templates. Its core features include comprehensive prompt lifecycle management, intelligent search, a hierarchical categorization system, and data import/export, supporting multi-editor integration. Developed with a full-stack TypeScript approach, it offers a smooth user experience, ideal for developers and content creators.

metadata.name: Proxifier-Keygen
metadata.description: Proxifier注册机

summary.zh: Proxifier注册机项目旨在为学习和教育提供一个生成Proxifier软件注册密钥的工具。该工具支持多种版本，包括设置版、便携版和Mac版。项目强调逆向工程的学习过程，提供了详细的使用示例和相关文档，适合对软件破解和逆向分析感兴趣的开发者。
summary.en: The Proxifier Keygen project serves as a tool for generating registration keys for the Proxifier software, intended solely for educational purposes. It supports various versions, including setup, portable, and Mac. The project emphasizes the learning process of reverse engineering, offering detailed usage examples and documentation, making it suitable for developers interested in software cracking and reverse analysis.

metadata.name: ten-framework
metadata.description: Open-source framework for conversational voice AI agents

summary.zh: TEN框架是一个开源的实时多模态对话AI框架，旨在支持语音助手和其他交互式应用。其核心技术包括低延迟的语音识别、说话者分离和实时绘图等功能，适用于智能家居、在线教育和客户服务等场景。TEN框架的扩展性强，支持多种插件和云服务部署，适合开发者快速构建和定制对话AI解决方案。
summary.en: TEN Framework is an open-source real-time multimodal conversational AI framework designed to support voice assistants and other interactive applications. Its core technologies include low-latency speech recognition, speaker diarization, and real-time drawing capabilities, suitable for smart home, online education, and customer service scenarios. With strong extensibility, TEN Framework supports various plugins and cloud service deployments, making it ideal for developers to quickly build and customize conversational AI solutions.

metadata.name: Win11Debloat
metadata.description: A simple, lightweight PowerShell script that allows you to remove pre-installed apps, disable telemetry, as well as perform various other changes to declutter and customize your Windows experience. Win11Debloat works for both Windows 10 and Windows 11.

summary.zh: Win11Debloat 是一款轻量级的 PowerShell 脚本，旨在帮助用户快速清理和优化 Windows 10 和 Windows 11 系统。它能够移除预装的应用程序、禁用遥测功能，并进行多项自定义设置，提升用户体验。该脚本适合普通用户和系统管理员，支持命令行操作，简化了繁琐的手动设置过程。
summary.en: Win11Debloat is a lightweight PowerShell script designed to help users quickly declutter and optimize Windows 10 and Windows 11 systems. It removes pre-installed apps, disables telemetry, and performs various customizations to enhance user experience. Suitable for both casual users and system administrators, the script supports command-line operations, simplifying the tedious manual configuration process.

metadata.name: HunyuanWorld-1.0
metadata.description: Generating Immersive, Explorable, and Interactive 3D Worlds from Words or Pixels with Hunyuan3D World Model

summary.zh: HunyuanWorld-1.0 是一个开源的沉浸式3D世界生成模型，能够通过文本或图像生成可探索和互动的3D环境。该模型解决了现有方法在3D一致性和渲染效率方面的不足，支持快速的世界创建与实时交互，适用于游戏开发、虚拟现实和教育等多个领域。其技术亮点包括对消费者级GPU的优化和多种输入格式的支持。
summary.en: HunyuanWorld-1.0 is an open-source immersive 3D world generation model that creates explorable and interactive 3D environments from text or images. It addresses the shortcomings of existing methods in 3D consistency and rendering efficiency, enabling rapid world creation and real-time interaction, applicable in game development, virtual reality, and education. Key highlights include optimization for consumer-grade GPUs and support for various input formats.

metadata.name: poster-design
metadata.description: 迅排设计 - 美观且功能强大的图片编辑器、在线海报设计，仿稿定设计，适用于多种场景：海报生成、电商产品图、文章长图、视频/公众号封面等。A beautiful online image designer, suitable for various scenarios like generate posters, making design easier!

summary.zh: 迅排设计是一个美观且功能强大的在线海报设计工具，适用于多种场景，如电商产品图、文章长图和视频封面等。它结合了丰富的交互细节和流畅的操作体验，支持PSD文件导入和AI抠图，技术栈包括Vue3和Puppeteer，旨在简化设计流程，提升创意实现的效率。
summary.en: Xunpai Design is a beautiful and powerful online poster design tool suitable for various scenarios such as e-commerce product images, article long images, and video covers. It combines rich interactive details with a smooth user experience, supports PSD file imports and AI background removal, utilizing a tech stack of Vue3 and Puppeteer to simplify the design process and enhance creative efficiency.

metadata.name: joyagent-jdgenie
metadata.description: 开源的端到端产品级通用智能体

summary.zh: JoyAgent-JDGenie是一个开源的端到端多智能体框架，旨在快速构建多智能体产品，解决复杂文档的智能问答与内容生成问题。其多模态知识管理平台集成了解析、检索与生成能力，支持结构化与非结构化知识的高效处理。相比于其他依赖特定平台的解决方案，JoyAgent-JDGenie提供了轻量化的开箱即用体验，已在GAIA榜单中表现优异，适合企业内部知识管理与智能化应用。
summary.en: JoyAgent-JDGenie is an open-source end-to-end multi-agent framework designed to rapidly build multi-agent products, addressing intelligent Q&A and content generation for complex documents. Its multimodal knowledge management platform integrates parsing, retrieval, and generation capabilities, efficiently handling both structured and unstructured knowledge. Unlike other solutions that depend on specific platforms, JoyAgent-JDGenie offers a lightweight, out-of-the-box experience and has performed excellently on the GAIA leaderboard, making it suitable for enterprise knowledge management and intelligent applications.

metadata.name: pyJianYingDraft
metadata.description: 轻量、灵活、易上手的Python剪映草稿生成及导出工具，构建全自动化视频剪辑/混剪流水线。本项目的CapCut版本正于 https://github.com/GuanYixuan/pyCapCut 内开发

summary.zh: pyJianYingDraft 是一款轻量级、灵活且易于上手的 Python 工具，专为剪映草稿生成与导出而设计，旨在构建全自动化的视频剪辑和混剪流水线。该工具支持多种功能，如模板加载、音视频片段替换、批量导出等，适用于剪映5.9及以下版本，极大提升了视频编辑的效率与灵活性。
summary.en: pyJianYingDraft is a lightweight, flexible, and easy-to-use Python tool designed for generating and exporting drafts in Jianying, aimed at building an automated video editing and mixing pipeline. It supports various features such as template loading, audio/video clip replacement, and batch exporting, suitable for versions 5.9 and below, significantly enhancing the efficiency and flexibility of video editing.

metadata.name: Context-Engineering
metadata.description: "Context engineering is the delicate art and science of filling the context window with just the right information for the next step." — Andrej Karpathy. A frontier, first-principles handbook inspired by Karpathy and 3Blue1Brown for moving beyond prompt engineering to the wider discipline of context design, orchestration, and optimization.

summary.zh: Context Engineering 是一项前沿的技术，旨在超越传统的提示工程，专注于上下文设计、协调和优化。该项目提供了一本基于第一性原理的手册，结合最新研究，帮助用户有效填充上下文窗口，以提升模型的推理能力和性能。适用于希望深入理解和应用上下文工程的研究者和开发者。
summary.en: Context Engineering is a cutting-edge discipline that moves beyond traditional prompt engineering, focusing on context design, orchestration, and optimization. This project offers a first-principles handbook that integrates the latest research, helping users effectively fill the context window to enhance model inference capabilities and performance. It is suitable for researchers and developers looking to deepen their understanding and application of context engineering.

metadata.name: graphiti
metadata.description: Build Real-Time Knowledge Graphs for AI Agents

summary.zh: Graphiti 是一个专为动态环境中的 AI 代理构建和查询时间感知知识图谱的框架。与传统的检索增强生成方法不同，Graphiti 能够持续整合用户交互、结构化和非结构化企业数据以及外部信息，形成一个可查询的图谱。它支持增量数据更新、高效检索和精确历史查询，适合开发互动和上下文感知的 AI 应用。
summary.en: Graphiti is a framework designed for building and querying temporally-aware knowledge graphs tailored for AI agents in dynamic environments. Unlike traditional retrieval-augmented generation methods, Graphiti continuously integrates user interactions, structured and unstructured enterprise data, and external information into a coherent, queryable graph. It supports incremental data updates, efficient retrieval, and precise historical queries, making it suitable for developing interactive, context-aware AI applications.

metadata.name: tiktoken
metadata.description: tiktoken is a fast BPE tokeniser for use with OpenAI's models.

summary.zh: tiktoken 是一个快速的 BPE 分词器，专为 OpenAI 的模型设计。它的性能比同类开源分词器快 3-6 倍，能够有效地将文本转换为模型可理解的 token，支持任意文本并具备可逆性。适用于自然语言处理任务，特别是在需要高效编码的场景中，tiktoken 提供了易于使用的 API 和扩展机制，便于用户自定义编码方式。
summary.en: tiktoken is a fast BPE tokenizer designed for OpenAI's models. It performs 3-6 times faster than comparable open-source tokenizers, effectively converting text into tokens that models can understand. It supports arbitrary text and is reversible. Ideal for natural language processing tasks, tiktoken offers an easy-to-use API and extension mechanisms for users to customize encoding methods.

metadata.name: go-zero-looklook
metadata.description: 🔥基于go-zero(go zero) 微服务全技术栈开发最佳实践项目。Develop best practice projects based on the full technology stack of go zero (go zero) microservices.

summary.zh: go-zero-looklook 是一个基于 go-zero 微服务架构的最佳实践项目，涵盖了完整的技术栈，包括 Kubernetes、Nginx、Kafka 和 Prometheus 等。该项目旨在为开发者提供一个全面的示例，帮助他们快速上手微服务开发。通过使用 Docker 和 Kubernetes，用户可以轻松部署和管理服务，同时项目文档提供了详细的使用指南。
summary.en: go-zero-looklook is a best practice project based on the go-zero microservices architecture, encompassing a complete technology stack including Kubernetes, Nginx, Kafka, and Prometheus. The project aims to provide developers with a comprehensive example to quickly get started with microservices development. By utilizing Docker and Kubernetes, users can easily deploy and manage services, while detailed documentation offers guidance on usage.

metadata.name: fogsight
metadata.description: Fogsight is an AI agent and animation engine powered by Large Language Models.

summary.zh: 雾象是一款由大型语言模型驱动的动画引擎，用户只需输入抽象概念，便可生成高质量的生动动画。其核心功能包括智能编排和语言用户界面，支持用户对动画进行精准调优。适用于教育、创意设计等多种场景，帮助用户轻松实现概念可视化。
summary.en: Fogsight is an animation engine powered by Large Language Models, allowing users to generate high-quality animations by simply inputting abstract concepts. Its core features include intelligent orchestration and a Language User Interface, enabling precise tuning of animations. Suitable for various scenarios such as education and creative design, it helps users visualize concepts effortlessly.

metadata.name: gin
metadata.description: Gin is a high-performance HTTP web framework written in Go. It provides a Martini-like API but with significantly better performance—up to 40 times faster—thanks to httprouter. Gin is designed for building REST APIs, web applications, and microservices.

summary.zh: Gin 是一个高性能的 HTTP Web 框架，使用 Go 语言编写。它提供了类似 Martini 的 API，但性能提升显著，速度可达其他框架的 40 倍。Gin 适用于构建 REST API、Web 应用和微服务，强调速度和开发者生产力。其核心特性包括零分配路由、高性能中间件支持、内置恢复机制和自动 JSON 验证，适合需要高吞吐量和快速响应的场景。
summary.en: Gin is a high-performance HTTP web framework written in Go. It offers a Martini-like API but with significantly improved performance—up to 40 times faster. Gin is ideal for building REST APIs, web applications, and microservices, focusing on speed and developer productivity. Key features include zero allocation routing, high-performance middleware support, built-in recovery mechanisms, and automatic JSON validation, making it suitable for high-throughput and fast-response scenarios.

metadata.name: SuperClaude_Framework
metadata.description: A configuration framework that enhances Claude Code with specialized commands, cognitive personas, and development methodologies.

summary.zh: SuperClaude框架是一个元编程配置框架，通过行为指令注入和组件编排，将Claude代码转变为结构化的开发平台。它提供了系统化的工作流自动化，涵盖从头脑风暴到部署的完整开发生命周期，支持30个斜杠命令和多种智能代理，适用于开发者和贡献者，提升开发效率。
summary.en: The SuperClaude Framework is a meta-programming configuration framework that transforms Claude Code into a structured development platform through behavioral instruction injection and component orchestration. It offers systematic workflow automation, covering the entire development lifecycle from brainstorming to deployment, supporting 30 slash commands and various intelligent agents, enhancing developer efficiency.

metadata.name: Bella
metadata.description: Bella is best

summary.zh: Bella AI 是一个数字伴侣，旨在通过语音识别和视觉表达技术，为用户提供个性化的互动体验。该项目采用模块化设计，支持多种 AI 模型，具备情感分析和基本互动功能。Bella 的愿景是成为用户生活中有意义的一部分，未来将扩展至记忆管理和动态个性等高级特性。
summary.en: Bella AI is a digital companion designed to offer personalized interactions through voice recognition and visual expression technologies. The project features a modular design, supporting multiple AI models, with capabilities for emotional analysis and basic interaction. Bella's vision is to become a meaningful part of users' lives, with future expansions into memory management and dynamic personality features.

metadata.name: cloud-mail
metadata.description: A Cloudflare-based email service  | 基于 Cloudflare 的邮箱服务  | Cloudflare Email 邮箱 Mail

summary.zh: Cloud Mail 是一个基于 Cloudflare 的简约响应式邮箱服务，支持邮件发送和附件收发。用户只需一个域名即可创建多个邮箱，且通过 Cloudflare Workers 部署，显著降低服务器成本。项目具有邮件管理、个性化设置、数据可视化等多项功能，适合个人和小型团队使用。
summary.en: Cloud Mail is a minimalist responsive email service based on Cloudflare, supporting email sending and attachment handling. Users can create multiple mailboxes with a single domain, and deployment via Cloudflare Workers significantly reduces server costs. The project features email management, customization options, and data visualization, making it suitable for individuals and small teams.

metadata.name: prefect
metadata.description: Prefect is a workflow orchestration framework for building resilient data pipelines in Python.

summary.zh: Prefect 是一个用于构建 Python 数据管道的工作流编排框架，旨在简化将脚本提升为生产工作流的过程。它支持调度、缓存、重试和基于事件的自动化，使数据团队能够自信地自动化任何数据处理。Prefect 提供了自托管的 Prefect 服务器和管理的 Prefect Cloud 监控工作流活动，确保数据管道的弹性和动态响应能力。
summary.en: Prefect is a workflow orchestration framework for building resilient data pipelines in Python, designed to simplify the transition from scripts to production workflows. It supports features like scheduling, caching, retries, and event-based automation, enabling data teams to confidently automate any data process. Prefect offers monitoring through a self-hosted server or managed Prefect Cloud, ensuring the resilience and dynamic responsiveness of data pipelines.

metadata.name: omni-bot-sdk-oss
metadata.description: 🤖一个基于视觉识别，使用自定义YOLO模型，OCR，数据库监听，实现的运行时零侵入的 微信4.0 RPA框架，支持动态接入插件，适配OpenAI，DIfy，支持解析所有消息类型，内置文本图片文件消息发送能力，可扩展小程序朋友圈发送。

summary.zh: omni-bot-sdk是一个基于视觉识别的微信4.0 RPA框架，采用自定义YOLO模型和OCR技术，实现零侵入式消息接收与处理。它支持动态插件接入，能够解析所有消息类型，并具备发送文本、图片及小程序的能力，适合个人学习和技术交流。该框架强调隐私保护，不收集用户数据，适合对微信进行自动化操作。
summary.en: omni-bot-sdk is a WeChat 4.0 RPA framework based on visual recognition, utilizing a custom YOLO model and OCR technology for zero-intrusion message reception and processing. It supports dynamic plugin integration, capable of parsing all message types, and includes functionalities for sending text, images, and mini-programs, making it suitable for personal learning and technical exchanges. The framework emphasizes privacy protection, not collecting user data, and is designed for automating WeChat operations.

metadata.name: dow-ipad-859
metadata.description: 本项目是一个基于859版iPad协议的微信机器人，集成了dify-on-wechat聊天机器人框架，实现智能对话功能。项目支持在Windows系统本地部署和Linux系统云服务器部署，提供完整的微信消息收发、AI对话、图片识别等功能。

summary.zh: 本项目是一个基于859版iPad协议的微信机器人，集成了dify-on-wechat聊天机器人框架，具备智能对话、图片识别等功能。支持Windows本地和Linux云服务器部署，能够处理多种消息类型，提供灵活的配置选项，适用于智能客服、社交互动等场景，具有高稳定性和多协议支持的特点。
summary.en: This project is a WeChat bot based on the 859 iPad protocol, integrating the dify-on-wechat chatbot framework with features like intelligent dialogue and image recognition. It supports local deployment on Windows and cloud deployment on Linux, capable of handling various message types. With flexible configuration options, it is suitable for smart customer service and social interaction, characterized by high stability and multi-protocol support.

metadata.name: eliza
metadata.description: Autonomous agents for everyone

summary.zh: elizaOS 是一个开源的多智能体人工智能开发框架，旨在简化自主 AI 代理的构建、部署和管理。其模块化架构和库优先的方法使开发者能够快速启动并有效扩展应用场景，包括聊天机器人、业务流程自动化和智能游戏 NPC。elizaOS 提供丰富的连接性，支持多种主流 AI 模型，并配备现代化的用户界面，便于实时管理代理。
summary.en: elizaOS is an open-source framework for multi-agent AI development, designed to simplify the building, deployment, and management of autonomous AI agents. Its modular architecture and library-first approach enable developers to quickly start and effectively scale applications, including chatbots, business process automation, and intelligent game NPCs. elizaOS offers rich connectivity, supports various major AI models, and features a modern web UI for real-time agent management.

summary.zh: 九原山是一个专注于人工智能和机器学习的博客，涵盖了大语言模型（LLM）、自主智能体、嵌入模型等多个技术主题。通过深入分析和实战案例，提供了丰富的学习资源和技术见解，适合研究人员和开发者参考和学习。该博客的内容包括模型评测、微调技术以及硬件性能比较等，具有较强的实用性和前瞻性。
summary.en: Jiuyuan Mountain is a blog focused on artificial intelligence and machine learning, covering various technical topics such as large language models (LLMs), autonomous agents, and embedding models. It offers rich learning resources and technical insights through in-depth analysis and practical case studies, making it suitable for researchers and developers. The content includes model evaluation, fine-tuning techniques, and hardware performance comparisons, showcasing strong practicality and foresight.

metadata.name: opencode
metadata.description: The open source coding agent.

summary.zh: OpenCode 是一个开源的 AI 编码代理，旨在通过智能化的编程助手提升开发效率。它支持多种操作系统的安装，包括桌面应用程序，适用于开发者在编写代码时提供实时建议和自动化功能。该项目的技术亮点在于其灵活的安装方式和跨平台支持，使得开发者能够在不同环境中轻松使用。
summary.en: OpenCode is an open-source AI coding agent designed to enhance developer productivity through intelligent programming assistance. It supports installation on various operating systems, including a desktop application, providing real-time suggestions and automation features for developers. The project's technical highlights include flexible installation methods and cross-platform support, enabling developers to easily use it in different environments.

metadata.name: ebook2audiobook
metadata.description: Generate audiobooks from e-books, voice cloning & 1158+ languages!

summary.zh: ebook2audiobook 是一款强大的工具，能够将电子书转换为有声书，支持1158种语言和语音克隆功能。该工具利用最新的文本转语音（TTS）引擎，提供章节和元数据支持，适用于合法获取的无数字版权管理（DRM）电子书。无论是个人使用还是开发者集成，ebook2audiobook 都能满足多样化的需求。
summary.en: ebook2audiobook is a powerful tool that converts e-books into audiobooks, supporting 1158 languages and voice cloning capabilities. Utilizing the latest text-to-speech (TTS) engines, it provides chapter and metadata support, intended for legally acquired non-DRM e-books. Whether for personal use or developer integration, ebook2audiobook caters to diverse needs.

metadata.name: potato-chat-fullstack
metadata.description: 🥔 全栈多平台聊天应用 - 支持Web、移动端、桌面端的完整聊天解决方案，包含实时聊天、数字钱包、小程序平台和管理后台

summary.zh: Potato Chat v2.0 是一款企业级全栈聊天应用，支持Web、移动端和桌面端。其核心功能包括实时聊天、数字钱包、区块链集成和多语言支持，提供安全的用户认证和消息加密。该平台适用于多种场景，如企业沟通、在线支付和社交互动，具备高可扩展性和跨平台兼容性。
summary.en: Potato Chat v2.0 is a comprehensive enterprise-level chat application that supports Web, mobile, and desktop platforms. Its core features include real-time messaging, digital wallet, blockchain integration, and multilingual support, providing secure user authentication and message encryption. This platform is suitable for various scenarios such as corporate communication, online payments, and social interaction, with high scalability and cross-platform compatibility.

metadata.name: agno
metadata.description: Run agents as production software.

summary.zh: Agno 是一个用于构建、运行和管理代理软件的运行时环境，支持大规模服务的部署。它允许开发者创建具有内存、知识和多种集成的智能代理，提供实时流式处理和动态决策能力。Agno 的控制面板使得监控和管理变得简单，适合需要灵活交互和治理的新型应用场景。
summary.en: Agno is a runtime for building, running, and managing agentic software at scale. It enables developers to create intelligent agents with memory, knowledge, and multiple integrations, offering real-time streaming and dynamic decision-making capabilities. The control plane simplifies monitoring and management, making it suitable for new application scenarios that require flexible interactions and governance.

metadata.name: TaleStreamAI
metadata.description: AI小说推文全自动工作流，自动从ID到视频

summary.zh: TaleStreamAI 是一个全自动的 AI 小说推文工作流，能够从小说 ID 自动生成视频内容。该项目结合了多种先进模型，如 DeepSeek-V3 和 gemini-2.0-flash，支持从文本到音频、图片及视频的全链条生成。适用于内容创作者和小说爱好者，极大提高了创作效率和内容生产能力。
summary.en: TaleStreamAI is an automated AI novel promotion workflow that generates video content from novel IDs. It integrates advanced models like DeepSeek-V3 and gemini-2.0-flash, supporting a full pipeline from text to audio, images, and videos. Ideal for content creators and novel enthusiasts, it significantly enhances creative efficiency and content production capabilities.

metadata.name: inference
metadata.description: Swap GPT for any LLM by changing a single line of code. Xinference lets you run open-source, speech, and multimodal models on cloud, on-prem, or your laptop — all through one unified, production-ready inference API.

summary.zh: Xorbits Inference（Xinference）是一个强大且灵活的库，旨在简化语言、语音识别和多模态模型的服务。用户只需一行代码即可轻松切换GPT或其他大型语言模型，支持在云端、本地或个人电脑上运行开源模型。其核心亮点包括自动批处理、分布式推理和对多种后端的支持，适合研究人员、开发者和数据科学家使用。
summary.en: Xorbits Inference (Xinference) is a powerful and versatile library designed to simplify the serving of language, speech recognition, and multimodal models. Users can effortlessly switch between GPT and other large language models with a single line of code, supporting deployment on cloud, on-prem, or personal laptops. Key highlights include auto-batching, distributed inference, and support for multiple backends, making it suitable for researchers, developers, and data scientists.

metadata.name: wechat
metadata.description: 微信双开

summary.zh: 该项目提供了一种在Mac上实现微信双开的解决方案，支持4.0及以上版本。通过简单的终端命令，用户可以复制微信应用并修改其唯一标识符，从而避免进程冲突。这一方法适用于需要同时使用两个微信账户的用户，具有操作简便、无需复杂配置的特点。
summary.en: This project offers a solution for running two instances of WeChat on Mac, supporting versions 4.0 and above. By using simple terminal commands, users can duplicate the WeChat app and modify its unique identifier to avoid process conflicts. This method is ideal for users needing to operate two WeChat accounts simultaneously, featuring ease of use and no complex configurations.

metadata.name: happy-llm
metadata.description: 📚 从零开始构建大模型

summary.zh: Happy-LLM 是一套系统性的学习教程，旨在帮助读者深入理解大语言模型（LLM）的原理与训练过程。项目结合主流代码框架，提供从基础概念到动手实现 LLaMA2 模型的全面指导，适合希望掌握 NLP 和 LLM 技术的学习者。通过本项目，用户将获得对 Transformer 架构、预训练语言模型及前沿应用的深刻理解。
summary.en: Happy-LLM is a comprehensive learning tutorial designed to help readers deeply understand the principles and training processes of large language models (LLMs). The project combines mainstream code frameworks to provide thorough guidance from foundational concepts to hands-on implementation of the LLaMA2 model, suitable for learners aiming to master NLP and LLM technologies. Users will gain profound insights into Transformer architecture, pre-trained language models, and cutting-edge applications.

metadata.name: chrome-extension-boilerplate-react-vite
metadata.description: Chrome Extension Boilerplate with React + Vite + Typescript

summary.zh: 该项目是一个基于 React 和 TypeScript 的 Chrome 扩展开发模板，采用 Vite 提升构建速度和开发体验。它支持 Chrome 扩展 Manifest V3，集成了 Tailwindcss、Turborepo、Prettier 和 ESLint，适合开发高性能的浏览器扩展。该模板简化了多语言支持和热模块重载，适合开发者快速上手和构建复杂的扩展应用。
summary.en: This project is a Chrome extension boilerplate built with React and TypeScript, leveraging Vite for improved build speed and development experience. It supports Chrome Extension Manifest V3 and integrates Tailwindcss, Turborepo, Prettier, and ESLint, making it suitable for developing high-performance browser extensions. The template simplifies multi-language support and hot module reloading, allowing developers to quickly get started and build complex extension applications.

metadata.name: 91Writing
metadata.description: 一个基于 Vue 3 + Element Plus 的智能Ai小说创作工具，集成多种 AI 模型，助力作者高效创作

summary.zh: 91写作是一个基于Vue 3和Element Plus的智能AI小说创作工具，集成多种先进AI模型，提供从构思到成文的全流程支持。其核心特色包括智能续写、丰富的编辑环境和世界观构建系统，旨在帮助作者高效创作和管理小说。该工具支持本地数据存储，用户可灵活配置AI服务，适合各类小说创作需求。
summary.en: 91Writing is an AI-powered novel creation tool based on Vue 3 and Element Plus, integrating various advanced AI models to support the entire writing process from conception to completion. Key features include intelligent continuation, a rich editing environment, and a world-building system, aimed at helping authors create and manage novels efficiently. The tool supports local data storage and allows users to configure AI services flexibly, catering to diverse novel creation needs.

metadata.name: dify-for-dsl
metadata.description: 本项目是基于dify开源项目实现的dsl工作流脚本合集

summary.zh: 本项目是基于开源的 Dify 平台，提供了一系列 DSL 工作流脚本，旨在帮助用户高效创建和管理各种工作流。这些脚本涵盖了多种应用场景，如 AI 绘图、教学动画生成和多模态识别等，适合自用和学习，支持 Dify 0.8.0 及以上版本，具有易用性和实用性。
summary.en: This project is a collection of DSL workflow scripts based on the open-source Dify platform, designed to help users efficiently create and manage various workflows. The scripts cover multiple application scenarios, such as AI drawing, educational animation generation, and multimodal recognition, suitable for personal use and learning, supporting Dify version 0.8.0 and above, emphasizing usability and practicality.

metadata.name: dify-plus
metadata.description: Dify-Plus 是 Dify 的企业级增强版，集成了基于 gin-vue-admin 的管理中心，并针对企业场景进行了功能优化。 🚀  Dify-Plus = 管理中心 + Dify 二开 。 特别说明： 本项目为开源社区的二次开发成果，严格遵循 Dify 原项目的版权许可协议，未涉及原项目许可的多租户功能及 logo 等版权信息。如有相关需求，请直接联系 Dify 官方获取授权与支持。

summary.zh: Dify-Plus 是 Dify 的企业级增强版，集成了基于 gin-vue-admin 的管理中心，针对企业场景进行了功能优化。该项目通过二次开发，新增了用户额度管理、API密钥设置、钉钉登录等功能，旨在解决企业在使用 Dify 时遇到的痛点，提升管理效率与用户体验。
summary.en: Dify-Plus is an enterprise-grade enhancement of Dify, integrating a management center based on gin-vue-admin and optimizing features for business scenarios. Through secondary development, it introduces user quota management, API key settings, DingTalk login, and more, aiming to address pain points faced by enterprises using Dify and enhance management efficiency and user experience.

metadata.name: ebook-treasure-chest
metadata.description: 欢迎来到电子书下载宝库，一个汇聚了各类电子书下载链接的地方。无论你是喜欢阅读经典文学、经管励志、终身学习、职场创业、技术手册还是其他类型的书籍，这里都能满足你的需求。 该库涵盖了帆书app(原樊登读书)、微信读书、京东读书、喜马拉雅等读书app的大部分电子书。

summary.zh: 电子书下载宝库汇聚了各类电子书下载链接，涵盖经典文学、经管励志、技术手册等多种类型，满足不同读者需求。支持实时搜索功能，用户可快速找到所需书籍，且提供多种格式文件，便于不同设备阅读，是一个理想的电子书资源平台。
summary.en: The eBook Treasure Chest aggregates various eBook download links, covering genres like classic literature, business motivation, and technical manuals to meet diverse reader needs. It features a real-time search function for quick access to desired books and offers multiple file formats for compatibility with different devices, making it an ideal resource platform for eBooks.

metadata.name: flux-kontext-template
metadata.description: 生财有术特供，flux-kontext开源仓库，套壳模板

summary.zh: FluxKontext.space 是一个基于 Next.js 15 的现代化 AI 图像生成平台，集成了 Cloudflare Turnstile 安全验证、Stripe 支付系统和 Supabase 数据库，支持多语言。该项目采用 TypeScript 和 React 构建，提供用户友好的界面和强大的图像生成能力，适用于创意设计、在线艺术生成等场景。
summary.en: FluxKontext.space is a modern AI image generation platform built on Next.js 15, integrating Cloudflare Turnstile security verification, Stripe payment system, and Supabase database with multilingual support. The project is developed using TypeScript and React, offering a user-friendly interface and powerful image generation capabilities, suitable for creative design and online art generation.

metadata.name: PreenCut
metadata.description: AI-Powered Video Retrieval & Clipping Tool

summary.zh: PreenCut 是一款智能视频剪辑工具，利用语音识别和大型语言模型自动分析音视频内容。用户可以通过自然语言查询快速找到并提取相关片段，支持批量处理和智能剪辑。其主要特点包括准确的自动语音识别、AI驱动的内容分析、生成字幕和灵活的导出选项，非常适合需要高效视频编辑的创作者和内容生产者。
summary.en: PreenCut is an intelligent video clipping tool that leverages speech recognition and large language models to automatically analyze audio and video content. Users can quickly find and extract relevant segments using natural language queries, with support for batch processing and smart clipping. Key features include accurate automatic speech recognition, AI-driven content analysis, subtitle generation, and flexible export options, making it ideal for creators and content producers seeking efficient video editing.

metadata.name: liquid-glass-vue
metadata.description: Apple's ios 26 Liquid Glass effect for Vue 3.

summary.zh: Liquid Glass Vue 是一个基于 Vue 3 的库，旨在实现苹果 iOS 26 的液态玻璃效果。它支持多种折射模式、可配置的霜冻程度和弹性，能够模拟苹果的“液态”感觉，并兼容 TypeScript。该库适用于需要视觉吸引力的用户界面，提供了丰富的交互效果，适合用于按钮、卡片等组件，提升用户体验。
summary.en: Liquid Glass Vue is a library based on Vue 3 that implements Apple's iOS 26 Liquid Glass effect. It supports multiple refraction modes, configurable frosty levels, and elasticity to mimic Apple's 'liquid' feel, with TypeScript compatibility. This library is suitable for user interfaces requiring visual appeal, providing rich interactive effects for buttons, cards, and other components to enhance user experience.

metadata.name: SkyReels-V2
metadata.description: SkyReels-V2: Infinite-length Film Generative model

summary.zh: SkyReels-V2 是一个开源的无限长度视频生成模型，采用自回归扩散强制架构，具有领先的性能。该模型支持多种应用场景，包括视频生成和图像转视频合成，适用于创意产业、娱乐和教育等领域。其提供的推理代码和模型权重使得开发者能够轻松实现高质量的视频生成。
summary.en: SkyReels-V2 is an open-source infinite-length video generative model that employs AutoRegressive Diffusion-Forcing architecture, achieving state-of-the-art performance. It supports various applications, including video generation and image-to-video synthesis, making it suitable for creative industries, entertainment, and education. The provided inference code and model weights enable developers to easily implement high-quality video generation.

metadata.name: monaco-editor
metadata.description: A browser based code editor

summary.zh: Monaco Editor 是微软开发的基于浏览器的代码编辑器，源自 VS Code，具备丰富的功能和灵活的 API。它支持多种编程语言，提供智能代码补全、语法高亮和编辑历史管理等特性，适合用于在线开发环境和集成开发工具。用户可通过交互式游乐场体验各种功能，轻松上手并创建可复现的示例。
summary.en: Monaco Editor is a browser-based code editor developed by Microsoft, derived from VS Code, featuring a rich set of functionalities and a flexible API. It supports multiple programming languages, offering features like intelligent code completion, syntax highlighting, and edit history management, making it suitable for online development environments and integrated development tools. Users can explore various features through an interactive playground for easy onboarding and reproducible examples.

metadata.name: BetterWX-UI
metadata.description: 微信|企业微信|抖Y多聊|钉钉 多开、防撤回提示、多账号免扫码登录的终极解决方案

summary.zh: BetterWX-UI 是一款针对微信及企业微信的多开和防撤回提示的解决方案，支持多账号共存且免扫码登录。其主要功能包括对微信消息的撤回提示和多开支持，适用于 Windows 系统。该项目为用户提供了灵活的使用体验，尤其适合需要同时管理多个账号的用户。
summary.en: BetterWX-UI is a solution for multi-instance and recall prevention for WeChat and WeChat Work, supporting multiple accounts without the need for QR code login. Its main features include recall notifications for WeChat messages and multi-instance support, making it suitable for users managing multiple accounts simultaneously on Windows systems.

metadata.name: vue-fastapi-admin
metadata.description: ⭐️ 基于 FastAPI+Vue3+Naive UI 的现代化轻量管理平台 A modern and lightweight management platform based on FastAPI, Vue3, and Naive UI.

summary.zh: vue-fastapi-admin 是一个基于 FastAPI、Vue3 和 Naive UI 的现代化轻量管理平台，专为中小型应用设计。它集成了 RBAC 权限管理、动态路由和 JWT 鉴权，支持快速搭建前后端分离的管理系统。项目内置代码规范插件，确保代码质量，适合开发团队使用，同时也可作为学习参考。
summary.en: vue-fastapi-admin is a modern lightweight management platform built on FastAPI, Vue3, and Naive UI, designed for small to medium-sized applications. It integrates RBAC permission management, dynamic routing, and JWT authentication, enabling rapid development of front-end and back-end separated management systems. The project includes built-in code quality plugins, making it suitable for development teams and a reference for learning.

metadata.name: RAG_Techniques
metadata.description: This repository showcases various advanced techniques for Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems. Each technique has a detailed notebook tutorial.

summary.zh: 本仓库展示了多种先进的检索增强生成（RAG）系统技术，结合信息检索与生成模型，为用户提供准确且富有上下文的响应。该项目旨在提升RAG系统的准确性、效率和上下文丰富性，适用于需要高质量信息生成的应用场景，如智能问答和内容创作。
summary.en: This repository showcases various advanced techniques for Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems, combining information retrieval with generative models to provide accurate and contextually rich responses. The project aims to enhance the accuracy, efficiency, and contextual richness of RAG systems, making it suitable for applications requiring high-quality information generation, such as intelligent Q&A and content creation.

metadata.name: mcp-for-beginners
metadata.description: This open-source curriculum introduces the fundamentals of Model Context Protocol (MCP) through real-world, cross-language examples in .NET, Java, TypeScript, JavaScript, Rust and Python. Designed for developers, it focuses on practical techniques for building modular, scalable, and secure AI workflows from session setup to service orchestration.

summary.zh: 本开源课程通过.NET、Java、TypeScript、JavaScript、Rust和Python等多种语言的真实案例，介绍模型上下文协议（MCP）的基础知识。旨在帮助开发者掌握构建模块化、可扩展和安全的AI工作流的实用技术，从会话设置到服务编排，适合各种开发场景。
summary.en: This open-source curriculum introduces the fundamentals of Model Context Protocol (MCP) through real-world examples in .NET, Java, TypeScript, JavaScript, Rust, and Python. Designed for developers, it focuses on practical techniques for building modular, scalable, and secure AI workflows from session setup to service orchestration, suitable for various development scenarios.

metadata.name: wechat-versions
metadata.description: 保存微信历史版本

summary.zh: 该项目是一个微信历史版本的存档，专注于收集和保存官网发布的Mac版本。通过自动化脚本，项目每日检测官网更新，提取并保存版本信息，确保用户能够获取到最新的安装包和版本号。技术亮点在于使用Python重写脚本，优化了版本号获取方式，提升了准确性和效率。
summary.en: This project serves as an archive for historical versions of WeChat, focusing on collecting and saving the official Mac releases. An automated script checks for updates daily, extracting and saving version information to ensure users can access the latest installation packages and version numbers. The key highlight is the Python script rewrite, which optimizes version number retrieval for improved accuracy and efficiency.

metadata.name: OpenDerisk
metadata.description: AI-Native Risk Intelligence Systems, OpenDeRisk——Your application system risk intelligent manager provides 7* 24-hour comprehensive and in-depth protection.

summary.zh: OpenDeRisk 是一个 AI 原生风险智能系统，旨在为应用系统提供 7×24 小时的全面保护。其核心功能包括深度根因分析、可视化证据链和多代理协作，能够快速定位问题根源并清晰展示诊断过程。该系统采用开放架构，支持框架和代码的重用，适用于需要高效风险管理的企业环境。
summary.en: OpenDeRisk is an AI-native risk intelligence system designed to provide 24/7 comprehensive protection for application systems. Its core features include deep root cause analysis, visualized evidence chains, and multi-agent collaboration, enabling quick identification of root causes and clear presentation of diagnostic processes. The system is built on an open architecture, supporting framework and code reuse, making it suitable for enterprises requiring efficient risk management.

metadata.name: fastapi_best_architecture
metadata.description: FastAPI 企业级后端架构解决方案 | Enterprise-level backend architecture solution with fastapi、sqlalchemy,、celery、pydantic、grafana、docker...

summary.zh: FastAPI最佳架构提供了一种企业级后端架构解决方案，结合了FastAPI、SQLAlchemy、Celery等技术，旨在实现高效的三层架构设计。该项目适用于需要快速开发和高可维护性的后端服务，支持灵活的架构调整，适合各种规模的应用场景。
summary.en: FastAPI Best Architecture offers an enterprise-level backend architecture solution, integrating technologies like FastAPI, SQLAlchemy, and Celery to achieve an efficient three-tier architecture design. This project is suitable for backend services requiring rapid development and high maintainability, supporting flexible architectural adjustments for various application scales.

metadata.name: oba-live-tool
metadata.description: 直播带货工具，支持平台：抖音小店、巨量百应、抖音团购、小红书、视频号、快手小店、淘宝

summary.zh: oba-live-tool 是一款专为直播带货设计的工具，支持多个平台如抖音小店、巨量百应和淘宝等。其核心功能包括多账号管理、智能消息助手、商品自动讲解及 AI 自动回复，极大提高了直播互动效率和用户体验。适合电商主播和团队使用，帮助他们更好地管理直播内容和与观众互动。
summary.en: The oba-live-tool is a specialized tool for live commerce, supporting multiple platforms such as Douyin Store, Juyuan Baiying, and Taobao. Its core features include multi-account management, smart messaging assistant, automatic product explanations, and AI auto-replies, significantly enhancing live interaction efficiency and user experience. It is ideal for e-commerce hosts and teams to better manage live content and engage with audiences.

metadata.name: ioe
metadata.description: One-Stop Retail Inventory Solution

summary.zh: IOE库存管理系统是一个基于Django的综合性解决方案，专为零售商店和小型仓库设计。它提供商品管理、库存跟踪、销售记录、会员管理和数据分析等功能，帮助企业高效管理库存与销售流程。系统具有用户友好的界面、完善的功能模块和安全可靠的数据管理，适合各种零售业务场景。
summary.en: The IOE Inventory Management System is a comprehensive solution built on Django, designed for retail stores and small warehouses. It offers features such as product management, inventory tracking, sales records, member management, and data analysis, enabling businesses to efficiently manage inventory and sales processes. The system boasts a user-friendly interface, complete functionality, and secure data management, making it suitable for various retail scenarios.

metadata.name: money
metadata.description: A money and currency library for PHP

summary.zh:
Brick
the Money是一个为PHP设计的货币和财务数据处理库，专注于精确的货币计算，避免浮点数运算带来的误差。它基于brick/math库，支持任意大小的货币计算，适用于金融应用场景。该库遵循ISO 4217标准，提供了灵活的货币创建和管理功能，确保在生产环境中的稳定性和可靠性。
summary.en:
Brick
the Money is a PHP library designed for handling money and financial data, focusing on precise monetary calculations to avoid errors from floating-point arithmetic. Based on the brick/math library, it supports calculations for currencies of any size, making it suitable for financial applications. The library adheres to the ISO 4217 standard, offering flexible currency creation and management features, ensuring stability and reliability in production environments.

metadata.name: PandaWiki
metadata.description: PandaWiki 是一款 AI 大模型驱动的开源知识库搭建系统，帮助你快速构建智能化的 产品文档、技术文档、FAQ、博客系统，借助大模型的力量为你提供 AI 创作、AI 问答、AI 搜索等能力。

summary.zh: PandaWiki 是一款基于 AI 大模型的开源知识库搭建系统，旨在快速创建智能化的产品文档、技术文档、FAQ 和博客。其核心亮点包括 AI 辅助创作、问答和搜索功能，强大的富文本编辑能力，以及与第三方应用的无缝集成，适用于企业和开发者构建高效的知识管理平台。
summary.en: PandaWiki is an open-source knowledge base system driven by AI large models, designed to quickly create intelligent product documentation, technical documents, FAQs, and blogs. Key features include AI-assisted creation, Q&A, and search capabilities, robust rich text editing, and seamless integration with third-party applications, making it suitable for enterprises and developers to build efficient knowledge management platforms.

metadata.name: FFmpegFreeUI
metadata.description: 3FUI 是 ffmpeg 在 Windows 上的轻度专业交互外壳，收录大量参数，界面美观，交互友好。此项目面向国内使用环境，让普通人也能够轻松压制视频和转换格式。

summary.zh: FFmpegFreeUI（3FUI）是一个在Windows上运行的FFmpeg交互外壳，旨在为普通用户提供简便的视频压制和格式转换工具。它采用.NET 10和WinForm框架，具备美观的暗黑风格界面，支持40多种视频编码器和20多种音频编码器，允许用户自定义参数，适合追求专业性和自由度的用户。该项目强调透明性和无广告体验，致力于为用户提供高效的转码解决方案。
summary.en: FFmpegFreeUI (3FUI) is an interactive shell for FFmpeg on Windows, designed to simplify video compression and format conversion for ordinary users. Built on .NET 10 and WinForm, it features an aesthetically pleasing dark-themed interface, supporting over 40 video encoders and 20 audio encoders, while allowing users to customize parameters. This project emphasizes transparency and an ad-free experience, aiming to provide an efficient transcoding solution for users seeking professionalism and flexibility.

metadata.name: mcp-prompt-server
metadata.description: 这是一个基于Model Context Protocol (MCP)的服务器，用于根据用户任务需求提供预设的prompt模板，帮助Cline/Cursor/Windsurf...更高效地执行各种任务。服务器将预设的prompt作为工具(tools)返回，以便在Cursor和Windsurf等编辑器中更好地使用。

summary.zh: MCP Prompt Server是基于Model Context Protocol的高效服务器，旨在通过自然语言对话提供丰富的Prompt模板，简化用户在多种编辑器（如Raycast、Cursor、Windsurf等）中的任务执行。它支持热加载和扩展，适用于代码、写作、产品设计等多个领域，极大提升工作效率。
summary.en: The MCP Prompt Server is an efficient server based on the Model Context Protocol, designed to provide a rich set of prompt templates through natural language dialogue, simplifying task execution in various editors like Raycast, Cursor, and Windsurf. It supports hot reloading and extensibility, suitable for multiple domains including coding, writing, and product design, significantly enhancing productivity.

metadata.name: APIPark
metadata.description: Cloud native, ultra-high performance AI&API gateway, LLM API management, distribution system, open platform, supporting all AI APIs.🦄云原生、超高性能 AI&API网关，LLM API 管理、分发系统、开放平台，支持所有AI API，不限于OpenAI、Azure、Anthropic Claude、Google Gemini、DeepSeek、字节豆包、ChatGLM、文心一言、讯飞星火、通义千问、360 智脑、腾讯混元等主流模型，统一 API 请求和返回，API申请与审批，调用统计、负载均衡、多模型灾备。一键部署，开箱即用。

summary.zh: APIPark 是一个云原生的高性能 AI 和 API 网关，旨在帮助开发者和企业轻松管理和集成 AI 服务。它支持 100 多种主流 AI 模型，提供统一的 API 请求和返回格式，简化了 AI 模型的使用和维护。APIPark 还具备 API 申请与审批、调用统计、负载均衡等功能，支持快速部署，适合需要高效 API 管理的场景。
summary.en: APIPark is a cloud-native, high-performance AI and API gateway designed to help developers and enterprises easily manage and integrate AI services. It supports over 100 mainstream AI models, providing a unified API request and response format that simplifies the use and maintenance of AI models. APIPark features API application and approval, call statistics, load balancing, and quick deployment, making it ideal for scenarios requiring efficient API management.

metadata.name: muscle-mem
metadata.description: A cache for AI agents to learn and replay complex behaviors.

summary.zh: Muscle Memory 是一个为 AI 代理设计的行为缓存库，旨在记录和重放复杂行为。通过缓存工具调用模式，Muscle Memory 提高了任务执行的速度，减少了变异性，并消除了重复任务中的令牌成本。该库允许开发者灵活实现代理，并通过缓存验证确保安全的工具重用，是提升 AI 代理效率的创新解决方案。
summary.en: Muscle Memory is a behavior caching library designed for AI agents, aimed at recording and replaying complex behaviors. By caching tool-calling patterns, it enhances task execution speed, reduces variability, and eliminates token costs in repetitive tasks. The library allows developers to implement agents flexibly and ensures safe tool reuse through cache validation, making it an innovative solution for improving AI agent efficiency.

metadata.name: mkcert
metadata.description: A simple zero-config tool to make locally trusted development certificates with any names you'd like.

summary.zh: mkcert 是一个简单的工具，用于生成本地受信任的开发证书，无需配置。它自动创建并安装本地 CA，并生成适用于本地主机的证书，避免了使用真实证书机构时的信任错误。适用于开发环境，支持多种操作系统，简化了证书管理流程。
summary.en: mkcert is a simple tool for generating locally trusted development certificates with zero configuration. It automatically creates and installs a local CA, generating certificates for local hosts and avoiding trust errors associated with real certificate authorities. Ideal for development environments, it supports multiple operating systems and simplifies certificate management.

metadata.name: HiveChat
metadata.description: An AI chat bot for small and medium-sized teams, supporting models such as Deepseek, Open AI, Claude, and Gemini. 专为中小团队设计的 AI 聊天应用，支持 Deepseek、Open AI、Claude、Gemini 等模型。

summary.zh: HiveChat 是一款专为中小团队设计的 AI 聊天应用，支持多种模型如 Deepseek、Open AI、Claude 和 Gemini。它提供了灵活的用户管理功能，包括分组管理和模型配置，适合企业和教育机构使用。通过简单的配置，团队成员可以轻松登录并使用多种 AI 服务，提升工作效率和协作能力。
summary.en: HiveChat is an AI chat application designed for small and medium-sized teams, supporting various models such as Deepseek, Open AI, Claude, and Gemini. It offers flexible user management features, including group management and model configuration, making it suitable for enterprises and educational institutions. With simple setup, team members can easily log in and utilize multiple AI services to enhance productivity and collaboration.

metadata.name: buildadmin
metadata.description: 可视化生成CRUD代码、内置WEB终端、workerman常驻内存运行支持，技术栈为Vue3.x(setup)+ThinkPHP8+TypeScript+Vite+Pinia+Element Plus，自适应多端，同时提供Web和Server端、自动注册路由、无限级菜单权限节点、全局数据回收站、字段级修改保护等等，是集颜值、实用、敏捷于一身的管理系统。

summary.zh: BuildAdmin 是一个基于 Vue3.x、ThinkPHP8 和 TypeScript 的后台管理系统，支持可视化 CRUD 代码生成和内置 WEB 终端，具备自适应多端特性。项目提供自动注册路由、无限级菜单权限管理和全局数据回收站等功能，旨在帮助开发者快速构建商业级应用，兼具颜值与实用性。
summary.en: BuildAdmin is a backend management system based on Vue3.x, ThinkPHP8, and TypeScript, featuring visual CRUD code generation and an integrated WEB terminal. It supports multi-device adaptability and offers automatic route registration, infinite-level menu permission management, and a global data recycle bin, aiming to help developers quickly build commercial-grade applications with both aesthetics and practicality.

metadata.name: cool-admin-midway
metadata.description: 🔥 cool-admin(midway版)一个很酷的后台权限管理框架，Ai编码、流程编排、模块化、插件化、CRUD极速开发，永久开源免费，基于nodejs、typescript、typeorm、mysql、jwt、vue3、vite、element-ui等构建

summary.zh: Cool-Admin Midway 是一个基于 Node.js 和 TypeScript 的后台权限管理框架，提供 AI 编码、流程编排、模块化和插件化等功能，旨在快速构建和迭代后台管理系统。支持多种数据库和部署方式，适合开发者快速上手，提升开发效率。
summary.en: Cool-Admin Midway is a backend permission management framework built on Node.js and TypeScript, offering features like AI coding, workflow orchestration, modularity, and plugin support. It aims to facilitate rapid development and iteration of backend management systems, supporting various databases and deployment methods, making it easy for developers to get started and enhance productivity.

metadata.name: cool-admin-vue
metadata.description: 🔥 cool-admin一个很酷的后台权限管理框架，模块化、插件化、CRUD极速开发，永久开源免费，基于vue3、element-plus、pinia、vite、tailwindcss、i18n等构建

summary.zh: cool-admin是一个基于Vue3和Vite构建的开源后台权限管理框架，具备模块化、插件化和快速CRUD开发能力。其独特的AI编码功能可一键生成前端页面，提升开发效率。适用于需要快速迭代和灵活扩展的后台管理系统，支持多种插件扩展，如支付和短信功能。
summary.en: cool-admin is an open-source backend permission management framework built on Vue3 and Vite, featuring modularity, plugin architecture, and rapid CRUD development. Its unique AI coding capability allows for one-click generation of frontend pages, enhancing development efficiency. Ideal for backend management systems that require rapid iteration and flexible expansion, supporting various plugin extensions like payment and SMS functionalities.

metadata.name: magic
metadata.description: Magicrew. The first open-source all-in-one AI productivity platform (Generalist AI Agent + Workflow Engine + IM + Online collaborative office system)

summary.zh: Magic是首个开源的全能AI生产力平台，旨在帮助各类企业快速构建和部署AI应用，实现生产力提升。该平台不仅包括通用AI代理、工作流引擎和企业即时通讯系统，还提供在线协作办公系统。其核心产品Super Magic具备复杂任务场景下的智能能力，支持任务理解、规划和执行，致力于提升企业工作效率。
summary.en: Magic is the first open-source all-in-one AI productivity platform designed to help enterprises of all sizes quickly build and deploy AI applications for enhanced productivity. The platform includes a general-purpose AI agent, workflow engine, enterprise instant messaging system, and online collaborative office system. Its flagship product, Super Magic, features intelligent capabilities for complex task scenarios, supporting task understanding, planning, and execution to boost workplace efficiency.

metadata.name: generative-ai-for-beginners
metadata.description: 21 Lessons, Get Started Building with Generative AI

summary.zh: 本项目提供21个课程，帮助初学者掌握生成式人工智能的基本知识与应用。通过系统化的学习，用户可以快速上手构建生成式AI应用，涵盖了从基础概念到实际操作的全面内容，适合希望进入这一领域的开发者和研究者。
summary.en: This project offers 21 lessons designed to help beginners grasp the fundamentals and applications of Generative AI. Through a systematic learning approach, users can quickly start building Generative AI applications, covering comprehensive content from basic concepts to practical operations, ideal for developers and researchers looking to enter this field.

metadata.name: MCP-SuperAssistant
metadata.description: Brings MCP to ChatGPT, DeepSeek, Perplexity, Grok, Gemini, Google AI Studio, OpenRouter, DeepSeek, T3 Chat and more...

summary.zh: MCP SuperAssistant 是一款 Chrome 扩展，旨在将模型上下文协议 (MCP) 工具与多种 AI 平台（如 ChatGPT、Perplexity、Google Gemini 等）集成。用户可以直接在这些平台上执行 MCP 工具，显著提升网络 AI 助手的功能，适用于需要高效信息处理和交互的场景。
summary.en: MCP SuperAssistant is a Chrome extension that integrates the Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools with various AI platforms, including ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google Gemini. Users can execute MCP tools directly on these platforms, significantly enhancing the capabilities of web-based AI assistants, making it ideal for efficient information processing and interaction.

metadata.name: SnowAdmin
metadata.description: SnowAdmin 一款基于 Vue3、TypeScript、Vite7、Pinia、Arco.Design 开源的后台管理框架，符合直觉的使用模式，使用目前最新技术栈开发。

summary.zh: SnowAdmin 是一款基于 Vue3、TypeScript、Vite6 和 Pinia 的开源后台管理框架，具备直观的使用模式和丰富的主题配置。该框架集成了最新的前端技术，提供了自动化的文件路由系统和内置的 RBAC 权限管理，适合快速构建高效的管理系统，支持多种布局和国际化，极大提升开发效率。
summary.en: SnowAdmin is an open-source backend management framework built on Vue3, TypeScript, Vite6, and Pinia, featuring an intuitive usage pattern and rich theme configurations. It integrates the latest frontend technologies, offers an automated file routing system, and includes built-in RBAC permission management, making it suitable for quickly building efficient management systems with support for multiple layouts and internationalization.

metadata.name: no-as-a-service
metadata.description: No-as-a-Service (NaaS) is a simple API that returns a random rejection reason. Use it when you need a realistic excuse, a fun “no,” or want to simulate being turned down in style.

summary.zh: No-as-a-Service（NaaS）是一个轻量级API，提供随机的拒绝理由，适用于个人、职业、学生生活等多种场景。它不仅能为用户提供幽默的拒绝方式，还能用于应用、聊天机器人、Slack集成等。该项目易于自托管，使用Node.js和Express构建，内含超过1000个通用拒绝理由，旨在为用户带来轻松愉快的体验。
summary.en: No-as-a-Service (NaaS) is a lightweight API that delivers random rejection reasons suitable for various scenarios, including personal, professional, and student life. It provides users with humorous ways to say no and can be integrated into apps, bots, and Slack. The project is easy to self-host, built with Node.js and Express, and features over 1000 universal rejection reasons, aiming to bring a light-hearted experience to users.

metadata.name: easyVoice
metadata.description: 开源文本转语音工具，支持超长文本，多角色配音

summary.zh: EasyVoice 是一款开源文本转语音工具，支持超长文本和多角色配音，旨在为用户提供高质量的语音输出。它具备一键生成语音和字幕、AI 智能推荐配音等功能，完全免费且无字数限制，适合小说朗读、创作配音等多种场景。用户可自定义语音参数，轻松部署于云服务器或本地，满足个性化需求。
summary.en: EasyVoice is an open-source text-to-speech tool that supports long texts and multi-character voiceovers, designed to provide users with high-quality audio output. It features one-click voice and subtitle generation, AI voice recommendations, and is completely free with no word limits, suitable for novel reading and creative voiceovers. Users can customize voice parameters and easily deploy it on cloud servers or locally to meet personalized needs.

metadata.name: awesome-gpt4o-images
metadata.description: Awesome curated collection of images and prompts generated by GPT-4o and gpt-image-1. Explore AI generated visuals created with ChatGPT and Sora, showcasing OpenAI’s advanced image generation capabilities.

summary.zh: 该项目是一个精选的GPT-4o与gpt-image-1生成图像和提示词的合集，展示了OpenAI在AI图像生成领域的前沿能力。用户可以探索来自Twitter和Sora社区的创意视觉，适用于艺术创作、广告设计等多种场景。项目不仅提供高质量的图像生成工具，还包含丰富的提示词技巧，助力创作者实现灵感的快速迭代。
summary.en: This repository is a curated collection of images and prompts generated by GPT-4o and gpt-image-1, showcasing OpenAI's cutting-edge capabilities in AI image generation. Users can explore creative visuals from Twitter and the Sora community, applicable in various scenarios such as artistic creation and advertising design. The project not only offers high-quality image generation tools but also includes rich prompting techniques to help creators rapidly iterate on their ideas.

metadata.name: metorial
metadata.description: Connect any AI model to 600+ integrations; powered by MCP 📡 🚀

summary.zh: Metorial 是一个开源的集成平台，旨在帮助 AI 代理开发者快速将其模型连接到 600 多个 API、数据源和工具。通过使用模型上下文协议（MCP），Metorial 提供了简单的一行代码 SDK，简化了集成过程，支持自托管和高定制化选项，适合需要高质量工具和监控的开发者。
summary.en: Metorial is an open-source integration platform designed to help AI agent developers quickly connect their models to over 600 APIs, data sources, and tools. Utilizing the Model Context Protocol (MCP), Metorial offers a simple one-liner SDK that simplifies the integration process, supports self-hosting, and provides high customization options, making it ideal for developers in need of quality tooling and monitoring.

metadata.name: nunu
metadata.description: A CLI tool for building Go applications.

summary.zh: Nunu 是一个用于构建 Go 应用程序的 CLI 工具，旨在简化开发过程。它集成了多个流行的 Go 库，提供高性能、可扩展性和安全性，适合快速构建高效可靠的应用。Nunu 采用经典的分层架构，支持模块化和可扩展性，配备全面的文档和测试，帮助开发者快速上手。
summary.en: Nunu is a CLI tool designed for building Go applications, simplifying the development process. It integrates multiple popular Go libraries, offering high performance, scalability, and security, making it suitable for quickly building efficient and reliable applications. Nunu adopts a classic layered architecture, supporting modularity and extensibility, and comes with comprehensive documentation and testing to help developers get started quickly.

metadata.name: go-zero
metadata.description: A cloud-native Go microservices framework with cli tool for productivity.

summary.zh: go-zero 是一个云原生的 Go 微服务框架，内置多种工程实践，旨在确保高并发服务的稳定性。其特点包括简单的 API 描述语法和代码生成工具 goctl，支持多种语言生成，具备内置的超时控制、并发控制和自适应负载均衡等功能，适合需要高可用性和易扩展性的微服务应用场景。
summary.en: go-zero is a cloud-native Go microservices framework designed for stability under high concurrency. It features a simple API description syntax and a code generation tool called goctl, which supports generating code in multiple languages. With built-in timeout control, concurrency control, and adaptive load shedding, it is ideal for applications requiring high availability and extensibility.

metadata.name: auto-dev
metadata.description: 🧙‍AutoDev: the AI-native Multi-Agent development platform built on Kotlin Multiplatform, covering all 7 phases of SDLC.

summary.zh: AutoDev 是一个基于 Kotlin Multiplatform 的 AI 原生多代理开发平台，涵盖软件开发生命周期的所有七个阶段，包括需求、开发、审查、测试、数据、部署和运维。它支持 IntelliJ IDEA、VS Code、CLI、Web、桌面、Android、iOS 和服务器等 8 个以上的平台，提供统一的开发体验，提升开发效率和协作能力。
summary.en: AutoDev is an AI-native multi-agent development platform built on Kotlin Multiplatform, covering all seven phases of the software development lifecycle, including Requirements, Development, Review, Testing, Data, Deployment, and Operations. It supports over 8 platforms such as IntelliJ IDEA, VS Code, CLI, Web, Desktop, Android, iOS, and Server, providing a unified development experience that enhances efficiency and collaboration.

metadata.name: HumanSystemOptimization
metadata.description: 健康学习到150岁 - 人体系统调优不完全指南

summary.zh: 《人体系统调优不完全指南》探讨了如何通过科学方法优化健康与学习表现，强调睡眠、饮食和运动的重要性。基于斯坦福大学的神经科学研究，提供了一系列实用建议，如调整光照、控制饮食时间和适度运动，以帮助人们实现更长久的健康与高效的学习状态。适合希望改善生活质量的读者。
summary.en: The 'Incomplete Guide to Human System Optimization' explores how to enhance health and learning performance through scientific methods, emphasizing the importance of sleep, diet, and exercise. Based on Stanford neuroscience research, it offers practical advice such as adjusting light exposure, controlling meal timing, and engaging in moderate exercise to help individuals achieve long-lasting health and efficient learning. Suitable for readers looking to improve their quality of life.

metadata.name: worklenz
metadata.description: All in one project management tool for efficient teams

summary.zh: Worklenz 是一个强大的开源项目管理平台，旨在帮助团队更智能地规划、协作和快速交付。它提供全面的项目管理、任务管理、资源规划和财务跟踪功能，支持团队和客户的协作，确保项目的透明度和效率。无论是云端使用还是自我托管，Worklenz 都能满足不同团队的需求。
summary.en: Worklenz is a powerful open-source project management platform designed to help teams plan smarter, collaborate better, and deliver faster. It offers comprehensive features including project management, task management, resource planning, and financial tracking, facilitating collaboration between teams and clients while ensuring transparency and efficiency. Whether used in the cloud or self-hosted, Worklenz caters to diverse team needs.

metadata.name: mcp-server-browserbase
metadata.description: Allow LLMs to control a browser with Browserbase and Stagehand

summary.zh: Browserbase MCP Server 是一个强大的工具，允许大语言模型（LLMs）通过 Browserbase 和 Stagehand 控制浏览器。它提供了云浏览器自动化功能，支持数据提取、网页交互和截图等操作。该服务器利用 Model Context Protocol (MCP) 实现与外部数据源的无缝集成，适用于构建 AI 驱动的 IDE、聊天界面或自定义工作流。性能提升20-40%，并支持多种浏览器，极大增强了自动化的灵活性和效率。
summary.en: The Browserbase MCP Server is a powerful tool that allows Large Language Models (LLMs) to control browsers through Browserbase and Stagehand. It offers cloud browser automation capabilities, supporting data extraction, web interaction, and screenshot functionalities. Utilizing the Model Context Protocol (MCP), it enables seamless integration with external data sources, suitable for building AI-driven IDEs, chat interfaces, or custom workflows. With a 20-40% performance boost and multi-browser support, it significantly enhances automation flexibility and efficiency.

metadata.name: dia
metadata.description: A TTS model capable of generating ultra-realistic dialogue in one pass.

summary.zh: Dia是由Nari Labs开发的1.6B参数文本转语音模型，能够一次性生成超真实的对话。该模型支持根据音频进行输出调节，实现情感和语调控制，同时能够生成非语言交流（如笑声、咳嗽等）。提供预训练模型和推理代码，现已在Hugging Face上托管，主要应用于英语生成，适合需要高质量对话生成的研究和开发场景。
summary.en: Dia is a 1.6B parameter text-to-speech model developed by Nari Labs, capable of generating ultra-realistic dialogue in one pass. The model allows output conditioning on audio for emotion and tone control, and can produce non-verbal communications like laughter and coughing. Pretrained model checkpoints and inference code are provided, hosted on Hugging Face, primarily focused on English generation, suitable for research and development requiring high-quality dialogue generation.

metadata.name: fastapi_mcp
metadata.description: Expose your FastAPI endpoints as Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools, with Auth!

summary.zh: FastAPI-MCP 是一个将 FastAPI 端点作为模型上下文协议（MCP）工具暴露的库，内置身份验证功能。它支持零或最小配置，能够保留请求和响应模型的架构以及 Swagger 文档，适合需要快速集成和安全访问 API 的应用场景。该项目以 FastAPI 为核心，提供高效的 ASGI 通信，简化了部署过程。
summary.en: FastAPI-MCP is a library that exposes FastAPI endpoints as Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools with built-in authentication. It requires zero or minimal configuration, preserving request and response model schemas as well as Swagger documentation, making it ideal for applications needing quick integration and secure API access. The project is FastAPI-native, offering efficient ASGI communication and simplifying the deployment process.

metadata.name: DrissionPage
metadata.description: Python based web automation tool. Powerful and elegant.

summary.zh: DrissionPage 是一个基于 Python 的网页自动化工具，结合了浏览器控制与数据包处理的优势。它拥有强大的自研内核，支持多标签页操作、快速元素查找及高效的网页解析，适合需要高效网页自动化的开发者。其简洁的语法和丰富的内置功能使得新手也能轻松上手，提升开发效率。
summary.en: DrissionPage is a Python-based web automation tool that combines the advantages of browser control and data packet processing. It features a powerful self-developed core, supporting multi-tab operations, fast element searching, and efficient web parsing, making it suitable for developers needing high-efficiency web automation. Its concise syntax and rich built-in features make it easy for beginners to get started and enhance development efficiency.

metadata.name: llmanager
metadata.description: 🧍‍♂️LLM as a manager for approval processes.

summary.zh: LLManager 是一个基于 LangGraph 的工作流工具，专为管理审批请求而设计。它通过反思机制不断学习，并利用动态提示组合来处理多种审批请求。用户可以自定义审批和拒绝标准，以提高决策的准确性。该工具适用于需要高效审批流程的场景，能够显著减少人工干预，提高工作效率。
summary.en: LLManager is a LangGraph-based workflow tool designed for managing approval requests. It leverages reflection to continuously learn and utilizes dynamic prompt composition to handle various approval requests. Users can customize approval and rejection criteria to enhance decision-making accuracy. This tool is ideal for scenarios requiring efficient approval processes, significantly reducing manual intervention and improving productivity.

metadata.name: morphik-core
metadata.description: The most accurate document search and store for building AI apps

summary.zh: Morphik 是一个 AI 原生工具集，专注于处理视觉丰富的文档和多模态数据，旨在为开发者提供高效的文档搜索和存储解决方案。其核心技术包括多模态搜索、快速可扩展的元数据提取和与现有工具的集成，能够有效理解和管理非结构化数据，避免传统方法中的脆弱性。Morphik 适用于需要处理复杂文档的 AI 应用场景。
summary.en: Morphik is an AI-native toolkit focused on handling visually rich documents and multimodal data, designed to provide developers with efficient document search and storage solutions. Its core technologies include multimodal search, fast scalable metadata extraction, and integration with existing tools, effectively understanding and managing unstructured data while avoiding the fragility of traditional methods. Morphik is ideal for AI applications that require processing complex documents.

metadata.name: AstrBot
metadata.description: AI Agent Assistant that integrates lots of IM platforms, LLMs, plugins and AI feature, and can be your openclaw alternative. ✨
