summary.zh: AstrBot是一个开源的全能代理聊天机器人平台，能够与主流即时通讯应用集成。它为个人、开发者和团队提供可靠且可扩展的对话AI基础设施，支持多种IM平台、LLM和插件，具备丰富的AI功能，是开放式Claw替代方案，适合各种聊天场景。
summary.en: AstrBot is an open-source all-in-one agent chatbot platform that integrates with mainstream instant messaging applications. It provides reliable and scalable conversational AI infrastructure for individuals, developers, and teams, supporting various IM platforms, LLMs, and plugins, making it a rich AI feature alternative to openclaw, suitable for diverse chat scenarios.

metadata.name: mcp-playwright
metadata.description: Playwright Model Context Protocol Server - Tool to automate Browsers and APIs in Claude Desktop, Cline, Cursor IDE and More 🔌

summary.zh: Playwright Model Context Protocol Server 是一款强大的工具，能够在 Claude Desktop、Cline 和 Cursor IDE 等环境中实现浏览器和 API 的自动化。它支持通过自然语言指令进行设备仿真，能够模拟 143 种真实设备，执行网页测试、截图、生成测试代码等操作，极大地提升了开发和测试效率。
summary.en: The Playwright Model Context Protocol Server is a powerful tool for automating browsers and APIs in environments like Claude Desktop, Cline, and Cursor IDE. It supports device emulation with 143 real device profiles and allows for natural language commands, enabling web testing, screenshot capture, and test code generation, significantly enhancing development and testing efficiency.

metadata.name: python-baidusearch
metadata.description: 自己手写的百度搜索接口的封装，pip安装，支持命令行执行。Baidu Search unofficial API for Python with no external dependencies

summary.zh: 该项目是一个非官方的百度搜索API封装，支持Python 2和3，用户可以通过pip安装并在命令行中使用。它利用网页抓取技术，无需API密钥或信用卡，提供免费且无限制的搜索功能，适合需要快速集成百度搜索的开发者。
summary.en: This project is an unofficial Baidu Search API wrapper for Python, compatible with both Python 2 and 3. It can be installed via pip and used from the command line. Utilizing web scraping, it offers a free and unrestricted search capability without the need for an API key or credit card, making it ideal for developers needing quick integration of Baidu search.

metadata.name: awesome-LLMs-In-China
metadata.description: 中国大模型

summary.zh: 该仓库汇总了中国各大机构开发的大模型信息，包括模型名称、来源、类别及相关链接，旨在为研究人员和开发者提供全面的参考。项目持续更新，欢迎社区贡献线索和素材，促进中国大模型的发展与应用。
summary.en: This repository compiles information on large models developed by major institutions in China, including model names, sources, categories, and relevant links, aiming to provide a comprehensive reference for researchers and developers. The project is continuously updated, inviting community contributions to enhance the development and application of large models in China.

metadata.name: ai-engineering-hub
metadata.description: In-depth tutorials on LLMs, RAGs and real-world AI agent applications.

summary.zh: AI工程中心是一个全面的学习资源，提供93个生产就绪项目和深入的教程，涵盖大型语言模型（LLMs）、检索增强生成（RAG）和AI代理的实际应用。无论您是初学者、从业者还是研究人员，都能在这里找到适合自己技能水平的资源，帮助您在AI工程领域取得成功。
summary.en: The AI Engineering Hub is a comprehensive learning resource featuring over 93 production-ready projects and in-depth tutorials on large language models (LLMs), retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), and real-world AI agent applications. Whether you're a beginner, practitioner, or researcher, this hub provides resources tailored to all skill levels to help you succeed in AI engineering.

metadata.name: ragflow-plus
metadata.description: Ragflow-Plus 是 Ragflow 的二次开发版本，使其更为简洁实用

summary.zh: Ragflow-Plus 是 Ragflow 的改进版本，旨在提升用户体验和功能实用性。它提供了后台管理系统、权限回收、增强的文件解析能力以及图文输出功能，适用于需要高效知识管理和文档撰写的场景。该项目特别关注中文用户的需求，致力于简化操作流程。
summary.en: Ragflow-Plus is an enhanced version of Ragflow, aimed at improving user experience and functionality. It features a backend management system, permission recovery, enhanced file parsing capabilities, and image-text output, making it suitable for efficient knowledge management and document writing. The project specifically addresses the needs of Chinese users, focusing on simplifying operational processes.

metadata.name: packvault
metadata.description: PHP Composer 私有包管理，支持发放 License。PHP Composer Private Package Management，support license

summary.zh: PackVault 是一款功能强大的 PHP 私有包管理面板，支持 GitHub 和 Gitee 等多种平台，允许用户高效管理私有包、许可证和用户。其独特之处在于支持多种 Git 协议，并提供灵活的配置选项，适合需要私有包管理的开发团队和企业。
summary.en: PackVault is a powerful PHP private package management panel that supports multiple platforms like GitHub and Gitee, allowing users to efficiently manage private packages, licenses, and users. Its uniqueness lies in supporting various Git protocols and offering flexible configuration options, making it suitable for development teams and enterprises needing private package management.

metadata.name: Yuxi-Know
metadata.description: 结合LightRAG 知识库的知识图谱智能体平台。 An agent platform that integrates a LightRAG knowledge base and knowledge graphs. Build with LangChain v1 + Vue + FastAPI, support DeepAgents、MinerU PDF、Neo4j 、MCP.

summary.zh: Yuxi-Know 是一个基于大模型的知识库与知识图谱智能体开发平台，结合了 LightRAG 知识库和知识图谱，采用 LangChain v1、Vue 和 FastAPI 构建。该平台支持多种文档格式的上传与处理，能够快速构建可推理的知识库和知识图谱，适用于真实业务场景中的智能体开发，具备高效的工具调用和中间件机制。
summary.en: Yuxi-Know is an agent development platform that integrates a LightRAG knowledge base and knowledge graphs, built with LangChain v1, Vue, and FastAPI. It supports multiple document formats for upload and processing, enabling the rapid construction of inferable knowledge bases and knowledge graphs. This platform is suitable for developing agents in real business scenarios, featuring efficient tool invocation and middleware mechanisms.

metadata.name: DeepSeek-671B-SFT-Guide
metadata.description: An open-source solution for full parameter fine-tuning of DeepSeek-V3/R1 671B, including complete code and scripts from training to inference, as well as some practical experiences and conclusions. (DeepSeek-V3/R1 满血版 671B 全参数微调的开源解决方案，包含从训练到推理的完整代码和脚本，以及实践中积累一些经验和结论。)

summary.zh: DeepSeek-671B微调指南是一个开源解决方案，专注于DeepSeek-V3/R1 671B模型的全参数微调。该项目提供了从训练到推理的完整代码和脚本，结合了数据并行和序列并行的技术，旨在提高模型的训练效率。项目中总结了实践中遇到的问题及解决方案，适合研究人员和开发者用于深度学习模型的优化与应用。
summary.en: The DeepSeek-671B Fine-Tuning Guide is an open-source solution focused on full parameter fine-tuning of the DeepSeek-V3/R1 671B model. It provides complete code and scripts from training to inference, leveraging data parallelism and sequence parallelism to enhance training efficiency. The project summarizes encountered challenges and solutions, making it suitable for researchers and developers aiming to optimize and apply deep learning models.

metadata.name: MCP-Chinese-Getting-Started-Guide
metadata.description: Model Context Protocol(MCP) 编程极速入门

summary.zh: 模型上下文协议（MCP）提供了一种标准化的方法，使大语言模型能够与多种数据源和工具无缝连接。该项目的快速入门指南涵盖了如何开发MCP服务器和客户端，重点在于使用Python构建网络搜索服务。MCP的核心功能包括资源管理、提示词、工具和传输层，支持标准输入/输出和服务器发送事件协议，极大地简化了AI应用程序的开发过程。
summary.en: The Model Context Protocol (MCP) offers a standardized approach for large language models to seamlessly connect with various data sources and tools. This quick start guide covers the development of MCP servers and clients, focusing on building a web search service using Python. Core features of MCP include resource management, prompts, tools, and transport layers, supporting standard input/output and server-sent events, significantly simplifying AI application development.

metadata.name: cursor-auto-register
metadata.description: cursor-auto-register

summary.zh: Cursor Auto Register 是一个基于 Python 的开源项目，旨在简化临时邮箱账号的自动注册过程。该项目支持多域名配置，提供 API 接口以便于管理账号，并配有可视化界面，适合开发者进行学习和测试。其核心技术包括异步数据库操作和动态 API 服务，适用于需要快速生成临时账号的场景。
summary.en: Cursor Auto Register is an open-source project built on Python, designed to simplify the automated registration of temporary email accounts. It supports multi-domain configuration, offers API endpoints for account management, and includes a visual interface, making it suitable for developers for learning and testing. Its core technologies include asynchronous database operations and dynamic API services, ideal for scenarios requiring rapid generation of temporary accounts.

metadata.name: Wav2Lip
metadata.description: This repository contains the codes of "A Lip Sync Expert Is All You Need for Speech to Lip Generation In the Wild", published at ACM Multimedia 2020. For HD commercial model, please try out Sync Labs

summary.zh: Wav2Lip 是一个高效的视频口型同步生成工具，基于 ACM Multimedia 2020 发表的研究，能够在复杂环境中实现准确的口型同步。该项目提供了简单易用的 API 接口，支持 Python 和 TypeScript，用户只需提供视频和音频文件即可快速生成同步视频，适用于影视制作、游戏开发等多个领域。
summary.en: Wav2Lip is an efficient lip-sync generation tool that accurately synchronizes lip movements with audio in complex environments, based on research published at ACM Multimedia 2020. The project offers an easy-to-use API interface, supporting both Python and TypeScript, allowing users to quickly generate synchronized videos by providing video and audio files, making it suitable for film production, game development, and more.

metadata.name: rf-detr
metadata.description: [ICLR 2026] RF-DETR is a real-time object detection and segmentation model architecture developed by Roboflow, SOTA on COCO, designed for fine-tuning.

summary.zh: RF-DETR是由Roboflow开发的实时目标检测与分割模型架构，基于DINOv2视觉变换器，具备出色的准确性与延迟平衡，已在COCO和RF100-VL数据集上达到最先进的性能。该模型支持检测和实例分割，提供统一的API，适用于需要高效实时处理的计算机视觉应用场景。
summary.en: RF-DETR is a real-time object detection and segmentation model architecture developed by Roboflow, built on a DINOv2 vision transformer backbone. It achieves state-of-the-art performance on COCO and RF100-VL datasets, offering excellent accuracy and latency trade-offs. The model supports both detection and instance segmentation through a consistent API, making it suitable for efficient real-time computer vision applications.

metadata.name: vecto3d
metadata.description: A super simple tool to convert your SVG's to 3D models.

summary.zh: Vecto3d 是一个简单易用的工具，旨在将 SVG 图形（主要是标志）转换为 3D 模型。它提供多种自定义选项，包括几何形状、材料和环境设置，用户可以轻松调整模型的厚度和颜色，并以 STL、GLB 和 GLTF 格式下载 3D 模型。此外，用户还可以导出高质量的图像，体验独特的“氛围模式”。
summary.en: Vecto3d is a super simple tool designed to convert SVG graphics, primarily logos, into 3D models. It offers various customization options, including geometry, materials, and environment settings, allowing users to easily adjust model thickness and colors, and download 3D models in STL, GLB, and GLTF formats. Additionally, users can export high-quality images and experience a unique 'vibe mode'.

metadata.name: DockerDesktop-CN
metadata.description: Docker汉化 Docker中文版 Docker汉化包 DockerDesktop汉化 Docker Windows Docker MAC

summary.zh: 本仓库提供Docker Desktop的汉化包，支持Windows和Mac系统，旨在为中文用户提供更友好的使用体验。用户可以根据不同的硬件架构下载相应的汉化文件，并通过简单的替换操作实现汉化。该项目特别适合需要中文界面的开发者，提升了Docker的可用性和用户体验。
summary.en: This repository offers a localization package for Docker Desktop, supporting Windows and Mac systems, aimed at providing a more user-friendly experience for Chinese users. Users can download the appropriate localization files based on their hardware architecture and achieve localization through simple replacement operations. This project is particularly suitable for developers needing a Chinese interface, enhancing Docker's usability and user experience.

metadata.name: change-the-md5
metadata.description: 🎉 📝一个用来修改文件 MD5 值的命令行小工具

summary.zh: change-the-md5 是一个命令行工具，用于修改文件的 MD5 值，解决文件在网盘上传或分享时遇到的限制。该工具简单易用，支持显示文件的 MD5 值，适合需要处理文件完整性或安全性的用户。后续版本将继续完善功能。
summary.en: change-the-md5 is a command-line tool designed to modify the MD5 values of files, addressing issues encountered when uploading or sharing files on cloud storage. The tool is user-friendly and supports displaying the MD5 value, making it suitable for users needing to manage file integrity or security. Future versions will enhance its capabilities.

metadata.name: dcat-plus-admin
metadata.description: 🔥 基于 Laravel 的后台系统构建工具 (DcatAdmin)，使用很少的代码快速构建一个功能完善的高颜值后台系统，内置丰富的后台常用组件，开箱即用，让开发者告别冗杂的HTML代码

summary.zh: Dcat-plus Admin 是一个基于 Laravel 的后台系统构建工具，旨在通过极少的代码快速构建功能完善且美观的后台管理系统。它内置丰富的组件，支持用户管理、RBAC 权限管理、无刷新页面构建等多种功能，极大地简化了后端开发流程，适合需要快速开发后台系统的开发者。
summary.en: Dcat-plus Admin is a backend system construction tool based on Laravel, designed to quickly build feature-rich and visually appealing admin systems with minimal code. It includes a wealth of built-in components, supporting user management, RBAC permission management, and AJAX page building, significantly simplifying backend development processes, making it ideal for developers needing rapid admin system development.

metadata.name: XianyuAutoAgent
metadata.description: 智能闲鱼客服机器人系统：专为闲鱼平台打造的AI值守解决方案，实现闲鱼平台7×24小时自动化值守，支持多专家协同决策、智能议价和上下文感知对话。

summary.zh: XianyuAutoAgent是一个专为闲鱼平台设计的智能客服机器人系统，提供7×24小时的自动化客服服务。该系统支持多专家协同决策、智能议价和上下文感知对话，能够有效提升用户体验和交易效率。核心技术包括上下文管理和基于提示工程的专家路由，适用于电商平台的客户服务场景。
summary.en: XianyuAutoAgent is an intelligent customer service robot system designed specifically for the Xianyu platform, providing 24/7 automated customer support. The system supports multi-expert collaborative decision-making, intelligent bargaining, and context-aware dialogue, effectively enhancing user experience and transaction efficiency. Key technologies include context management and expert routing based on prompt engineering, suitable for customer service scenarios in e-commerce platforms.

metadata.name: unibest
metadata.description: unibest - 最好用的 uniapp 开发框架。unibest 是由 uniapp + Vue3 + Ts + Vite4 + UnoCss + UniUI 驱动的跨端快速启动模板，使用 VS Code 开发，具有代码提示、自动格式化、统一配置、代码片段等功能，同时内置了大量平时开发常用的基本组件，开箱即用，让你编写 uniapp 拥有 best 体验。

summary.zh: unibest 是一个基于 uniapp、Vue3、TypeScript、Vite4 和 UnoCss 的跨端开发框架，旨在提供最佳的开发体验。它支持多种平台，包括 H5、iOS 和小程序，内置丰富的组件和功能，如约定式路由、请求封装和国际化，简化了开发流程，提升了效率。使用 VS Code 开发，具备代码提示和自动格式化等功能，适合快速启动项目。
summary.en: unibest is a cross-platform development framework based on uniapp, Vue3, TypeScript, Vite4, and UnoCss, designed to provide the best development experience. It supports multiple platforms, including H5, iOS, and mini-programs, and comes with a rich set of components and features like convention-based routing, request encapsulation, and internationalization, simplifying the development process and enhancing efficiency. Developed using VS Code, it offers features like code suggestions and auto-formatting for quick project startup.

metadata.name: satis
metadata.description: Simple static Composer repository generator - For a full private Composer repo use Private Packagist

summary.zh: Satis 是一个简单的静态 Composer 仓库生成工具，旨在帮助 PHP 开发者创建私有包仓库。它提供了对包分发的更高控制、增强的安全性以及更快的包安装速度。用户可以通过 Docker 或本地环境轻松搭建和管理自己的 Composer 注册表，适合需要私有依赖管理的项目。
summary.en: Satis is a simple static Composer repository generator designed for PHP developers to create private package repositories. It offers greater control over package distribution, enhanced security, and faster package installations. Users can easily set up and manage their Composer registry via Docker or locally, making it ideal for projects needing private dependency management.

metadata.name: Duix-Avatar
metadata.description: 🚀 Truly open-source AI avatar(digital human) toolkit for offline video generation and digital human cloning.

summary.zh: Duix.Avatar 是一款真正开源的 AI 头像工具包，专注于离线视频生成和数字人克隆。该项目通过利用 AI 技术，显著降低了数字人制作成本，使得任何人都能轻松创建个性化的虚拟形象。核心技术包括高精度外观与声音克隆、文本与语音驱动的虚拟头像，以及高效的视频合成，支持多种语言，确保用户在安全的离线环境中进行创作。
summary.en: Duix.Avatar is a truly open-source AI avatar toolkit focused on offline video generation and digital human cloning. By leveraging AI technology, it significantly reduces the production costs of digital humans, enabling anyone to easily create personalized virtual avatars. Core features include precise appearance and voice cloning, text and voice-driven virtual avatars, and efficient video synthesis, supporting multiple languages while ensuring users can create in a secure offline environment.

metadata.name: Qwen-Agent
metadata.description: Agent framework and applications built upon Qwen>=3.0, featuring Function Calling, MCP, Code Interpreter, RAG, Chrome extension, etc.

summary.zh: Qwen-Agent 是一个基于 Qwen>=3.0 的智能代理框架，支持功能调用、MCP、代码解释器和 RAG 等多种应用场景。它提供了丰富的示例应用，如浏览器助手和自定义助手，旨在提升大语言模型的指令跟随、工具使用和规划能力。该框架不仅是 Qwen Chat 的后端支持，还具备强大的扩展性和用户友好的界面。
summary.en: Qwen-Agent is an intelligent agent framework built on Qwen>=3.0, featuring Function Calling, MCP, Code Interpreter, and RAG for various applications. It offers rich example applications like Browser Assistant and Custom Assistant, aimed at enhancing the instruction-following, tool usage, and planning capabilities of large language models. The framework serves as the backend for Qwen Chat and boasts strong extensibility and a user-friendly interface.

metadata.name: full-stack-fastapi-template
metadata.description: Full stack, modern web application template. Using FastAPI, React, SQLModel, PostgreSQL, Docker, GitHub Actions, automatic HTTPS and more.

summary.zh: Full Stack FastAPI 模板是一个现代化的全栈Web应用程序模板，结合了FastAPI、React、SQLModel和PostgreSQL等技术栈。它支持Docker和GitHub Actions，实现自动化部署和HTTPS证书管理，适合快速构建高性能的Web应用。该模板还提供了完善的测试框架和用户认证机制，确保开发过程的高效与安全。
summary.en: The Full Stack FastAPI Template is a modern web application template that integrates FastAPI, React, SQLModel, and PostgreSQL. It supports Docker and GitHub Actions for automated deployment and HTTPS certificate management, making it ideal for quickly building high-performance web applications. The template also includes a comprehensive testing framework and user authentication mechanisms, ensuring efficiency and security in the development process.

metadata.name: public-image-mirror
metadata.description: 很多镜像都在国外。比如 gcr 。国内下载很慢，需要加速。致力于提供连接全世界的稳定可靠安全的容器镜像服务。

summary.zh: public-image-mirror 项目旨在为国内用户提供快速、稳定的容器镜像下载服务，解决国外镜像下载缓慢的问题。通过简洁的名称映射和实时更新机制，用户可以轻松访问和使用各种镜像。该项目支持内网缓存部署，适用于 Kubernetes 和 Docker 加速，确保高效的镜像管理和使用体验。
summary.en: The public-image-mirror project aims to provide fast and stable container image download services for domestic users, addressing the slow download speeds of foreign images. With a simple name mapping and real-time update mechanism, users can easily access and utilize various images. The project supports local cache deployment, suitable for Kubernetes and Docker acceleration, ensuring efficient image management and user experience.

metadata.name: OpenManus
metadata.description: No fortress, purely open ground.  OpenManus is Coming.

summary.zh: OpenManus 是一个开源项目，旨在为用户提供无须邀请码的智能代理体验。该项目由 MetaGPT 团队开发，支持快速原型构建和用户反馈，适用于各种应用场景。OpenManus 还引入了基于强化学习的调优方法，增强了大型语言模型的功能，适合需要灵活定制的开发者和研究人员。
summary.en: OpenManus is an open-source project designed to provide users with an intelligent agent experience without the need for an invite code. Developed by the MetaGPT team, it supports rapid prototyping and user feedback, making it suitable for various applications. OpenManus also introduces reinforcement learning-based tuning methods, enhancing the capabilities of large language models, ideal for developers and researchers seeking flexible customization.

metadata.name: storm
metadata.description: An LLM-powered knowledge curation system that researches a topic and generates a full-length report with citations.

summary.zh: STORM是一个基于大型语言模型的知识策划系统，能够通过互联网搜索研究主题并生成完整的报告，附带引用文献。其核心在于通过多角度提问和检索，自动化研究过程，帮助用户在知识探索中更高效地获取信息。Co-STORM进一步增强了人机协作的能力，使得知识策划更加符合用户需求，适合学术写作和信息整理的预备阶段。
summary.en: STORM is an LLM-powered knowledge curation system that researches topics via internet searches and generates full-length reports with citations. Its core innovation lies in automating the research process through multi-perspective questioning and retrieval, aiding users in efficiently acquiring information for knowledge exploration. Co-STORM enhances human-AI collaboration, making knowledge curation more aligned with user preferences, suitable for academic writing and information organization.

metadata.name: writing-helper
metadata.description: A Next.js-based AI writing assistant supporting multiple LLM APIs (OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, etc.) with rich style customization features to help content creators improve quality and efficiency.

summary.zh: GeekyWizKid 的 AI 写作助手是一个基于 Next.js 的工具，支持多种大型语言模型（LLM）API，如 OpenAI 和 Claude，旨在帮助作家和内容创作者高效生成高质量文章。其核心亮点包括深度风格定制、实时编辑和多种文本优化功能，能够满足个性化的写作需求。
summary.en: GeekyWizKid's AI Writing Assistant is a Next.js-based tool that supports multiple large language model (LLM) APIs, such as OpenAI and Claude, aimed at helping writers and content creators efficiently generate high-quality articles. Key highlights include deep style customization, real-time editing, and various text optimization features to meet personalized writing needs.

metadata.name: owl
metadata.description: 🦉 OWL: Optimized Workforce Learning for General Multi-Agent Assistance in Real-World Task Automation

summary.zh: OWL是一个前沿框架，旨在优化多智能体协作，推动现实任务自动化的边界。基于CAMEL-AI框架，OWL通过动态智能体交互，实现更自然、高效和稳健的任务自动化，适用于多种领域。该框架在GAIA基准测试中取得69.09的平均分，排名第一，展示了其在智能体协作中的核心价值和技术优势。
summary.en: OWL is a cutting-edge framework designed to optimize multi-agent collaboration, pushing the boundaries of real-world task automation. Built on the CAMEL-AI framework, OWL enables more natural, efficient, and robust task automation through dynamic agent interactions, applicable across diverse domains. It achieved an average score of 69.09 on the GAIA benchmark, ranking #1, highlighting its core value and technical advantages in agent collaboration.

metadata.name: openchat-monorepo
metadata.description: 一个现代化的全栈 AI Chatbot 应用，使用 React 和 Cloudflare Workers 结合 Connect RPC 构建，通过 Tauri 支持 Web、移动 App 和桌面端

summary.zh: OpenChat 是一个现代化的全栈 AI 聊天应用，结合 React 和 Cloudflare Workers 构建，支持 Web、移动和桌面端。其核心优势在于全栈 TypeScript 的类型安全、极速部署、全平台同步以及模块化设计，便于扩展新功能。集成 OpenAI GPT-4 和 Flux AI 模型，实现自然语言对话和图像生成，提供无缝的用户体验。
summary.en: OpenChat is a modern full-stack AI chatbot application built with React and Cloudflare Workers, supporting web, mobile, and desktop platforms. Its core advantages include type safety with full-stack TypeScript, rapid deployment, seamless cross-platform synchronization, and a modular design for easy feature expansion. It integrates OpenAI GPT-4 and Flux AI models for natural language conversation and image generation, delivering a seamless user experience.

metadata.name: MTranServer
metadata.description: Offline translation model server with low resource consumption, fast speed, and private deployment capability. 低资源占用速度快可私有部署的离线翻译模型服务器

summary.zh: MTranServer 是一款高效的离线翻译模型服务器，具备低资源消耗和快速响应的特点，支持全球主要语言的翻译。其设计目标是实现无限免费的翻译服务，适合需要私有部署的场景。该项目支持多平台运行，并提供了便捷的桌面端和 Docker 部署方式，适合开发者和普通用户使用。
summary.en: MTranServer is an efficient offline translation model server characterized by low resource consumption and fast response times, supporting translations for major languages worldwide. Designed to achieve unlimited free translation services, it is suitable for private deployment scenarios. The project supports multi-platform operation and offers convenient desktop and Docker deployment methods, making it ideal for both developers and general users.

metadata.name: cognita
metadata.description: RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation) Framework for building modular, open source applications for production by TrueFoundry

summary.zh: Cognita 是一个基于 RAG（检索增强生成）框架的开源应用程序构建工具，旨在提供模块化、可扩展的生产环境。它利用 Langchain 和 LlamaIndex，支持无代码 UI 和增量索引，适合快速原型开发和生产部署。Cognita 的架构设计使得每个组件都可以轻松扩展，适用于各种应用场景，如问答系统和多模态数据处理。
summary.en: Cognita is an open-source application building tool based on the RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation) framework, designed for modular and scalable production environments. Utilizing Langchain and LlamaIndex, it supports no-code UI and incremental indexing, making it suitable for rapid prototyping and production deployment. The architecture allows easy extensibility of each component, applicable in various scenarios such as Q&A systems and multimodal data processing.

metadata.name: ai-trend-publish
metadata.description: TrendPublish: 全自动 AI 内容生成与发布系统 | 微信公众号自动化 | 多源数据抓取 (Twitter/X、网站) | DeepseekAI、千问、讯飞模型 | 智能内容分析排序 | 定时发布 | 多模板支持 | Node.js | TypeScript | AI 技术趋势跟踪工具

summary.zh: TrendPublish 是一个基于 Deno 和 TypeScript 的全自动 AI 内容生成与发布系统，支持多源数据抓取（如 Twitter/X 和网站），并能智能分析和排序内容。该系统实现了微信公众号的自动化发布，提供多种文章模板和定时发布功能，适合需要快速生成和发布内容的用户，尤其是科技领域的内容创作者。
summary.en: TrendPublish is a fully automated AI content generation and publishing system built on Deno and TypeScript. It supports multi-source data scraping (such as Twitter/X and websites) and intelligently analyzes and ranks content. The system automates publishing to WeChat Official Accounts, offering various article templates and scheduled publishing features, making it ideal for users needing to quickly generate and publish content, especially in the tech domain.

metadata.name: langgraph-swarm-py
metadata.description: For your multi-agent needs

summary.zh: LangGraph Multi-Agent Swarm 是一个用于构建基于 LangGraph 的多代理系统的 Python 库。该库支持代理之间的动态控制交接，允许专门化的代理协作并共享上下文。其核心特性包括可定制的交接工具和内置的短期与长期记忆支持，适用于需要多代理协作的场景，如智能客服和复杂任务处理。
summary.en: LangGraph Multi-Agent Swarm is a Python library for building swarm-style multi-agent systems using LangGraph. It enables dynamic control handoff among specialized agents, allowing them to collaborate and share context. Key features include customizable handoff tools and built-in support for short-term and long-term memory, making it ideal for scenarios requiring multi-agent collaboration, such as intelligent customer service and complex task handling.

metadata.name: AI-Vtuber
metadata.description: AI Vtuber是一个由 【ChatterBot/ChatGPT/claude/langchain/chatglm/text-gen-webui/闻达/千问/kimi/ollama】 驱动的虚拟主播【Live2D/UE/xuniren】，可以在 【Bilibili/抖音/快手/微信视频号/拼多多/斗鱼/YouTube/twitch/TikTok】 直播中与观众实时互动 或 直接在本地进行聊天。它使用TTS技术【edge-tts/VITS/elevenlabs/bark/bert-vits2/睿声】生成回答并可以选择【so-vits-svc/DDSP-SVC】变声；指令协同SD画图。

summary.zh: AI Vtuber 是一款结合多种先进技术的虚拟主播，能够在多个直播平台上与观众实时互动。其核心由多种 AI 模型驱动，支持本地和云端运行，结合 TTS 技术生成自然对话，并通过变声技术适应不同场景。此外，AI Vtuber 还支持与图像生成模型协作，展示画作，满足个性化需求。
summary.en: AI Vtuber is a virtual host powered by various advanced technologies, enabling real-time interaction with audiences across multiple streaming platforms. Its core is driven by multiple AI models, supporting both local and cloud operations, generating natural conversations using TTS technology, and adapting to different scenarios through voice modulation. Additionally, it collaborates with image generation models to showcase artworks, catering to personalized needs.

metadata.name: story-flicks
metadata.description: 使用AI大模型，一键生成高清故事短视频。Generate high-definition story short videos with one click using AI large models.

summary.zh: 该项目利用AI大模型，用户只需输入故事主题，即可一键生成高清故事短视频，视频内容包括AI生成的图像、故事文本、音频和字幕。后端采用Python与FastAPI框架，前端使用React、Ant Design和Vite，适合教育、娱乐等多个场景。
summary.en: This project leverages AI large models to generate high-definition story short videos with a single click based on user-provided story themes. The videos include AI-generated images, story text, audio, and subtitles. The backend is built with Python and FastAPI, while the frontend utilizes React, Ant Design, and Vite, suitable for various applications in education and entertainment.

metadata.name: Gewechat
metadata.description: 微信机器人框架，个人微信二次开发，最简单易用的免费二开框架,微信ipad登录（非HOOK破解桌面端）

summary.zh: Gewechat是一个开源的个人微信机器人框架，支持多语言接入和Restful API，旨在简化微信二次开发。用户只需扫码登录，无需安装客户端，操作便捷。框架具备消息自动化、群管理、好友管理等多种功能，适合个人娱乐和技术研究，但不支持商业用途。由于法律原因，项目已停止维护。
summary.en: Gewechat is an open-source personal WeChat bot framework that supports multi-language integration and Restful API, designed to simplify WeChat secondary development. Users can log in by scanning a QR code without installing a client, making it user-friendly. The framework offers various features like message automation, group management, and friend management, suitable for personal entertainment and technical research, but not for commercial use. The project has ceased maintenance due to legal reasons.

metadata.name: DifyAIA
metadata.description: 基于Dify自主创建的AI应用DSL工作流，你可以免费获取，无论是出于个人需求还是学习目的，它都能为您开启一段充满无限可能的智能之旅。

summary.zh: DifyAIA是一个开源的AI应用工作流示例库，基于Dify平台构建，旨在帮助开发者快速上手和实现自动化工作流。该项目提供多种示例，包括生成Excel、PPT和Word文档等功能，适合个人学习和企业团队标准化流程。每个示例均经过调试并附带详细注释，支持开源社区的协作与改进，促进AIGC技术的普及与应用。
summary.en: DifyAIA is an open-source library of AI application workflow examples built on the Dify platform, aimed at helping developers quickly get started and implement automated workflows. The project offers various examples, including generating Excel, PPT, and Word documents, suitable for personal learning and standardized processes in corporate teams. Each example is debugged and comes with detailed annotations, supporting collaboration and improvement within the open-source community, promoting the popularization and application of AIGC technology.

metadata.name: poetry
metadata.description: Python packaging and dependency management made easy

summary.zh: Poetry 是一个用于 Python 项目的依赖管理和打包工具，旨在简化依赖声明、管理和安装过程。它通过使用简单的 `pyproject.toml` 格式替代传统的 `setup.py` 和 `requirements.txt` 文件，确保在各个环境中都能正确配置项目依赖。Poetry 还支持依赖组和可选依赖，使得项目管理更加灵活高效。
summary.en: Poetry is a dependency management and packaging tool for Python projects, designed to simplify the declaration, management, and installation of dependencies. It replaces traditional files like `setup.py` and `requirements.txt` with a simple `pyproject.toml` format, ensuring correct project configuration across environments. Poetry also supports dependency groups and optional dependencies, making project management more flexible and efficient.

metadata.name: awesome-cursorrules
metadata.description: 📄  Configuration files that enhance Cursor AI editor experience with custom rules and behaviors

summary.zh: Awesome Cursor Rules 提供了定制化的 .cursorrules 配置文件，旨在增强 Cursor AI 编辑器的使用体验。通过定义特定项目的规则和行为，开发者可以优化 AI 的代码生成，确保其符合项目需求和编码标准，从而提升开发效率和团队协作。该项目特别适合需要个性化 AI 辅助的开发团队。
summary.en: Awesome Cursor Rules offers customizable .cursorrules configuration files to enhance the Cursor AI editor experience. By defining specific project rules and behaviors, developers can optimize AI code generation to meet project needs and coding standards, thereby improving development efficiency and team collaboration. This project is particularly suitable for development teams seeking personalized AI assistance.

metadata.name: olmocr
metadata.description: Toolkit for linearizing PDFs for LLM datasets/training

summary.zh: olmocr 是一个强大的工具包，旨在将 PDF 和其他基于图像的文档格式转换为干净、可读的纯文本格式。它支持复杂的格式化，包括公式、表格和手写内容，能够自动去除页眉和页脚，确保文本以自然的阅读顺序呈现。该工具高效且经济，适合大规模文档处理，特别适用于需要将文档内容数字化以供大语言模型（LLM）训练的场景。
summary.en: olmocr is a powerful toolkit designed to convert PDFs and other image-based document formats into clean, readable plain text. It supports complex formatting, including equations, tables, and handwriting, while automatically removing headers and footers to ensure text is presented in a natural reading order. The tool is efficient and cost-effective, making it suitable for large-scale document processing, particularly for scenarios requiring digitization of content for training large language models (LLMs).

metadata.name: dataease
metadata.description: 🔥 人人可用的开源 BI 工具，数据可视化神器。An open-source BI tool alternative to Tableau.

summary.zh: DataEase 是一款开源的商业智能（BI）工具，旨在帮助用户快速分析数据并洞察业务趋势。其支持多种数据源连接，用户可通过简单的拖拽操作制作图表，便于分享和协作。DataEase 的优势在于零门槛的安装、易用性和多平台支持，同时集成了智能问数功能，提升数据分析效率，适合各类企业和团队使用。
summary.en: DataEase is an open-source Business Intelligence (BI) tool designed to help users quickly analyze data and gain insights into business trends. It supports various data source connections, allowing users to create charts easily through drag-and-drop operations, facilitating sharing and collaboration. Key advantages include zero-barrier installation, user-friendliness, multi-platform support, and integrated intelligent querying capabilities, making it suitable for various enterprises and teams.

metadata.name: Ultralight-Digital-Human
metadata.description: 一个超轻量级、可以在移动端实时运行的数字人模型

summary.zh: Ultralight Digital Human 是一个超轻量级的数字人模型，能够在移动设备上实时运行，适用于需要实时交互的场景，如虚拟助手和在线教育。该项目开源，提供了简单的训练和推理流程，支持多种音频编码器，具有良好的实时性能和灵活性，是开发者构建数字人应用的理想选择。
summary.en: Ultralight Digital Human is an ultralight digital human model that runs in real-time on mobile devices, suitable for scenarios requiring real-time interaction, such as virtual assistants and online education. This open-source project offers a straightforward training and inference process, supports multiple audio encoders, and demonstrates excellent real-time performance and flexibility, making it an ideal choice for developers building digital human applications.

metadata.name: Auto-Deep-Research
metadata.description: "Your Fully-Automated Personal AI Assistant"

summary.zh: Auto-Deep-Research 是一个开源的个性化 AI 助手，提供高性能和成本效益的解决方案，支持多种大型语言模型（LLM）。其主要特点包括灵活的交互方式、文件上传支持以及零配置的一键启动，适合希望以更低成本使用 AI 助手的用户。该项目为 OpenAI Deep Research 的替代品，旨在提供高效的研究和数据处理能力。
summary.en: Auto-Deep-Research is an open-source personal AI assistant that offers high performance and cost-effective solutions, supporting a wide range of Large Language Models (LLMs). Key features include flexible interaction, file upload support, and a zero-configuration one-click launch, making it ideal for users looking for a more affordable AI assistant. This project serves as an alternative to OpenAI's Deep Research, aiming to provide efficient research and data processing capabilities.

metadata.name: mastra
metadata.description: From the team behind Gatsby, Mastra is a framework for building AI-powered applications and agents with a modern TypeScript stack.

summary.zh: Mastra 是一个基于现代 TypeScript 技术栈的框架，旨在构建 AI 驱动的应用程序和代理。它支持与 React、Next.js 和 Node.js 等前后端框架的集成，提供模型路由、代理、工作流和人机协作等功能，帮助开发者轻松创建、调整和扩展可靠的 AI 产品。Mastra 适合从原型开发到生产应用的全流程，具备强大的上下文管理和生产必备工具。
summary.en: Mastra is a framework built on a modern TypeScript stack for creating AI-powered applications and agents. It integrates with frontend and backend frameworks like React, Next.js, and Node.js, offering features like model routing, agents, workflows, and human-in-the-loop capabilities. Mastra simplifies the development, tuning, and scaling of reliable AI products, suitable for the entire process from prototyping to production-ready applications, with robust context management and production essentials.

metadata.name: dify-on-wechat
metadata.description: 本项目为 chatgpt-on-wechat下游分支, 额外对接了LLMOps平台 Dify，同时支持gewechat，相比itchat更加稳定。

summary.zh: 本项目是基于chatgpt-on-wechat的下游分支，集成了LLMOps平台Dify，提供更稳定的微信接入方案。通过支持gewechat，用户可以更便捷地实现智能助手功能，提升工作效率和生活趣味。项目旨在补充上游项目的不足，适用于个人娱乐和公益项目。
summary.en: This project is a downstream branch of chatgpt-on-wechat, integrating the LLMOps platform Dify for a more stable WeChat access solution. By supporting gewechat, users can conveniently implement intelligent assistant features, enhancing work efficiency and life enjoyment. The project aims to complement the upstream project's shortcomings, suitable for personal entertainment and public welfare projects.

metadata.name: WeChatAI
metadata.description: WeChatAI 是一款基于 Python 开发的微信群聊/个人智能助手，支持多种大语言模型，可以实现智能对话、自动回复等功能。采用现代化的界面设计，操作简单直观。

summary.zh: WeChatAI 是一款基于 Python 开发的智能助手，专为微信群聊和个人聊天设计，支持多种大语言模型，能够实现智能对话和自动回复。其现代化界面简洁直观，支持多群组监听和自定义触发词，确保用户隐私的同时提供实时消息记录，适合需要高效沟通的用户。
summary.en: WeChatAI is a Python-based intelligent assistant designed for group and personal chats on WeChat. It supports multiple large language models for smart conversations and automatic replies. With a modern and intuitive interface, it allows multi-group listening and custom trigger words, ensuring user privacy while providing real-time message logging, ideal for users seeking efficient communication.

metadata.name: deepreasoning
metadata.description: A high-performance LLM inference API and Chat UI that integrates DeepSeek R1's CoT reasoning traces with Anthropic Claude models.

summary.zh: DeepReasoning 是一个高性能的 LLM 推理 API，结合了 DeepSeek R1 的链式思维推理能力与 Anthropic Claude 的创造性和代码生成能力。该项目提供了一个统一的接口，支持快速响应和数据隐私管理，适用于需要高效推理与生成的应用场景。其开源特性和高度可配置性使得用户可以根据需求自由修改和部署。
summary.en: DeepReasoning is a high-performance LLM inference API that integrates DeepSeek R1's Chain of Thought reasoning capabilities with Anthropic Claude's creativity and code generation. It offers a unified interface for fast responses and data privacy management, making it suitable for applications requiring efficient reasoning and generation. Its open-source nature and high configurability allow users to modify and deploy according to their needs.

metadata.name: awesome-deepseek-integration
metadata.description: Integrate the DeepSeek API into popular software

summary.zh: Awesome DeepSeek Integrations 项目旨在将 DeepSeek API 集成到多种流行软件中，提供丰富的应用场景，包括 AI 代理框架、数据 AI 应用、浏览器扩展等。该项目支持多种开发环境，帮助开发者轻松访问 DeepSeek 开放平台，提升软件的智能化水平，适用于各类开发者和企业。
summary.en: The Awesome DeepSeek Integrations project aims to integrate the DeepSeek API into various popular software, offering a wide range of applications including AI agent frameworks, data AI applications, and browser extensions. It supports multiple development environments, enabling developers to easily access the DeepSeek Open Platform and enhance the intelligence of their software, suitable for developers and enterprises alike.

metadata.name: art-avatar
metadata.description: 动态头像生成器

summary.zh: 动态头像生成器是一款能够生成线条动画的工具，展示绘制过程，用户可以下载生成的SVG动画并在博客和社交媒体上使用。该项目基于React和Tailwindcss构建，适合需要个性化头像的用户，提升社交媒体内容的吸引力。
summary.en: The Animation Avatar is a tool that generates line-drawing animations showcasing the drawing process. Users can download the generated SVG animations for use on blogs and social media. Built with React and Tailwindcss, it caters to users seeking personalized avatars, enhancing the appeal of social media content.

metadata.name: vscode-cssrem
metadata.description: Converts between `px` and `rem` units in VSCode

summary.zh: cssrem 是一款 VSCode 插件，能够在开发过程中方便地在 `px` 和 `rem` 单位之间进行转换，支持 WXSS 格式。它提供了智能提示、快捷键操作和鼠标悬停显示转换过程等功能，极大提高了前端开发的效率，尤其适用于响应式设计和小程序开发。
summary.en: cssrem is a VSCode extension that facilitates the conversion between `px` and `rem` units, also supporting WXSS format. It offers features like IntelliSense, keyboard shortcuts, and mouse hover to display conversion processes, significantly enhancing front-end development efficiency, especially for responsive design and mini-program development.

metadata.name: Kiln
metadata.description: Build, Evaluate, and Optimize AI Systems. Includes evals, RAG, agents, fine-tuning, synthetic data generation, dataset management, MCP, and more.

summary.zh: Kiln 是一款全面的 AI 系统构建、评估与优化工具，支持零代码微调、合成数据生成和知识检索增强生成（RAG）。其直观的桌面应用适用于多种操作系统，提供团队协作功能，便于数据集管理和模型评估。Kiln 旨在帮助开发者高效构建高质量的 AI 产品，适用于各类 AI 应用场景。
summary.en: Kiln is a comprehensive tool for building, evaluating, and optimizing AI systems, featuring zero-code fine-tuning, synthetic data generation, and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG). Its intuitive desktop applications support multiple operating systems and offer team collaboration features for dataset management and model evaluation. Kiln aims to help developers efficiently create high-quality AI products suitable for various AI application scenarios.

metadata.name: django-vue3-admin
metadata.description: Django-Vue3-Admin is a comprehensive basic development platform based on the RBAC (Role-Based Access Control) model for permission control, with column-level granularity. It follows a frontend-backend separation architecture, with

summary.zh: Django-Vue3-Admin 是一个基于 RBAC（基于角色的访问控制）模型的全面开发平台，专注于权限控制，支持列级粒度。该平台采用前后端分离架构，后端使用 Django 和 Django Rest Framework，前端使用 Vue3、Composition API、TypeScript、Vite 和 Element Plus。适合快速开发企业管理系统，提供灵活的权限管理和动态菜单加载功能。
summary.en: Django-Vue3-Admin is a comprehensive development platform based on the RBAC (Role-Based Access Control) model for permission control, featuring column-level granularity. It follows a frontend-backend separation architecture, utilizing Django and Django Rest Framework for the backend, and Vue3, Composition API, TypeScript, Vite, and Element Plus for the frontend. Ideal for rapid development of enterprise management systems, it offers flexible permission management and dynamic menu loading capabilities.

metadata.name: Hands-On-Large-Language-Models
metadata.description: Official code repo for the O'Reilly Book - "Hands-On Large Language Models"

summary.zh: 本仓库是《Hands-On Large Language Models》一书的官方代码库，提供了近300个自定义图形和实用示例，帮助读者深入理解大型语言模型的工具和概念。该书适合希望掌握语言模型应用的开发者和研究人员，特别推荐在Google Colab上运行示例以获得最佳体验。
summary.en: This repository is the official code repository for the book 'Hands-On Large Language Models', featuring nearly 300 custom figures and practical examples to help readers understand the tools and concepts behind large language models. It is particularly suited for developers and researchers looking to master the application of language models, with a recommendation to run examples on Google Colab for the best experience.

metadata.name: instructor
metadata.description: structured outputs for llms

summary.zh: Instructor 是一个基于 Pydantic 的库，旨在从大型语言模型（LLMs）中快速提取结构化 JSON 数据。通过简单的模型定义，用户可以轻松获取类型安全的数据，而无需处理复杂的 JSON 解析和错误处理。该工具支持多种 LLM 提供商，简化了数据提取流程，适合需要快速、可靠数据结构的应用场景。
summary.en: Instructor is a library built on Pydantic designed to quickly extract structured JSON data from large language models (LLMs). By simply defining a model, users can easily obtain type-safe data without dealing with complex JSON parsing and error handling. The tool supports multiple LLM providers, streamlining the data extraction process, making it suitable for applications requiring fast and reliable data structures.

metadata.name: MedRAX
metadata.description: MedRAX: Medical Reasoning Agent for Chest X-ray - ICML 2025

summary.zh: MedRAX是首个集成多种胸部X光分析工具和多模态大语言模型的医疗推理代理，旨在提升胸部X光解读的临床应用。该系统通过动态利用先进模型，解决复杂医疗查询，且无需额外训练。MedRAX在ChestAgentBench基准测试中表现出色，展示了其在自动化胸部X光解读系统中的实际应用潜力。
summary.en: MedRAX is the first versatile medical reasoning agent that integrates various chest X-ray analysis tools and multimodal large language models to enhance clinical applications of chest X-ray interpretation. The system dynamically leverages advanced models to address complex medical queries without requiring additional training. MedRAX demonstrates outstanding performance in the ChestAgentBench benchmark, showcasing its practical application potential in automated chest X-ray interpretation systems.

metadata.name: StoryWeaver
metadata.description: [AAAI 2025] StoryWeaver: A Unified World Model for Knowledge-Enhanced Story Character Customization

summary.zh: StoryWeaver是一个统一的世界模型，用于知识增强的故事角色定制，支持单角色和多角色故事可视化。该项目基于AAAI 2025论文，提供了详细的实现和实验结果，适用于游戏开发、故事创作等领域。其技术亮点在于结合知识增强的空间引导，提升角色表现力和故事深度。
summary.en: StoryWeaver is a unified world model for knowledge-enhanced story character customization, enabling both single and multi-character story visualization. Based on the AAAI 2025 paper, it offers detailed implementations and experimental results, suitable for game development and storytelling. Its technical highlight lies in the integration of knowledge-enhanced spatial guidance, enhancing character expressiveness and story depth.

metadata.name: Zonos
metadata.description: Zonos-v0.1 is a leading open-weight text-to-speech model trained on more than 200k hours of varied multilingual speech, delivering expressiveness and quality on par with—or even surpassing—top TTS providers.

summary.zh: Zonos-v0.1是一个领先的开放权重文本转语音模型，经过超过20万小时的多语言语音训练，提供与顶级TTS服务商相媲美甚至超越的表现和质量。该模型支持自然语音生成、语音克隆，并允许对语速、音调和情感进行精细控制，适用于多种语言，特别适合需要高质量语音合成的应用场景。
summary.en: Zonos-v0.1 is a leading open-weight text-to-speech model trained on over 200k hours of diverse multilingual speech, delivering expressiveness and quality that rivals or surpasses top TTS providers. The model enables natural speech generation, speech cloning, and fine control over speaking rate, pitch, and emotions, making it ideal for applications requiring high-quality speech synthesis in multiple languages.

summary.zh: 本工作流基于Dify平台，复现Deep Research的核心功能，整合多源检索与多模型协作，能够在5分钟内生成结构化研究报告。其模块化设计支持灵活替换底层模型和数据源，核心功能包括智能主题解析、混合检索引擎和高效报告生成，适用于快速研究和数据分析场景。
summary.en: This workflow, built on the Dify platform, replicates the core functionalities of Deep Research, integrating multi-source retrieval and multi-model collaboration to generate structured research reports within 5 minutes. Its modular design allows flexible replacement of underlying models and data sources, featuring smart topic parsing, hybrid search engines, and efficient report generation, suitable for rapid research and data analysis scenarios.

metadata.name: new-api
metadata.description: A unified AI model hub for aggregation & distribution. It supports cross-converting various LLMs into OpenAI-compatible, Claude-compatible, or Gemini-compatible formats. A centralized gateway for personal and enterprise model management. 🍥

summary.zh: New API 是一个统一的 AI 模型中心，支持将多种大型语言模型（LLM）转换为 OpenAI、Claude 或 Gemini 兼容格式。它为个人和企业提供集中化的模型管理网关，简化了 AI 资产的聚合与分发，提升了模型使用的灵活性与效率。
summary.en: New API is a unified AI model hub that supports cross-converting various large language models (LLMs) into OpenAI, Claude, or Gemini-compatible formats. It provides a centralized gateway for personal and enterprise model management, streamlining the aggregation and distribution of AI assets, enhancing flexibility and efficiency in model usage.

metadata.name: KeepChatGPT
metadata.description: 这是一款提高ChatGPT的数据安全能力和效率的插件。并且免费共享大量创新功能，如：自动刷新、保持活跃、数据安全、取消审计、克隆对话、言无不尽、净化页面、展示大屏、拦截跟踪、日新月异、明察秋毫等。让我们的AI体验无比安全、顺畅、丝滑、高效、简洁。

summary.zh: KeepChatGPT 是一款旨在提升 ChatGPT 数据安全性和使用效率的插件，提供自动刷新、保持活跃、数据安全等多项创新功能。它简化了用户操作，解决了常见错误，确保用户在使用 AI 时体验流畅、安全且高效。该插件适用于多种系统，支持多语言，致力于为用户创造更好的 AI 交互体验。
summary.en: KeepChatGPT is a plugin designed to enhance data security and efficiency for ChatGPT, offering innovative features like auto-refresh, stay active, and data security. It simplifies user operations, resolves common errors, and ensures a smooth, secure, and efficient AI experience. The plugin is compatible with various systems, supports multiple languages, and aims to create a better AI interaction experience for users.

metadata.name: llm-corpus
metadata.description: 从零搭建大模型知识库(Build LLM RAG Corpus from scratch)

summary.zh: 本项目旨在从零搭建大模型的知识库，涵盖中文数据集处理、词向量模型训练、文档向量化及向量数据库存储等步骤。通过本地部署ChatGLM2-6B大模型，用户可以轻松实现知识库的应用，适合需要构建定制化知识库的开发者和研究者。
summary.en: This project aims to build a large model knowledge base from scratch, covering steps such as Chinese dataset processing, word vector model training, document vectorization, and vector database storage. By deploying the ChatGLM2-6B model locally, users can easily implement knowledge base applications, making it suitable for developers and researchers needing customized knowledge bases.

metadata.name: refly
metadata.description: The first open-source agent skills builder. Define skills by vibe workflow, run on Claude Code, Cursor, Codex & more. Build Clawdbot 🦞· APIs for Lovable · Bots for Slack & Lark/Feishu · Skills are infrastructure, not prompts.

summary.zh: Refly是首个开源的智能体技能构建平台，允许用户通过Vibe工作流定义技能，并在Claude Code、Cursor、Codex等环境中运行。该平台强调技能作为基础设施的可重用性，支持快速构建和部署API，适用于Slack和Lark/Feishu等应用场景。Refly使企业能够将标准操作程序编译为可执行的智能体技能，提升工作效率。
summary.en: Refly is the first open-source agent skills builder that allows users to define skills through Vibe workflows and run them on platforms like Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex. The platform emphasizes the reusability of skills as infrastructure, enabling rapid API construction and deployment for applications like Slack and Lark/Feishu. Refly empowers enterprises to compile standard operating procedures into executable agent skills, enhancing operational efficiency.

metadata.name: openai-gemini
metadata.description: ✦ Gemini ➜ OpenAI API proxy. Serverless!

summary.zh: Gemini 是一个 OpenAI API 的代理，旨在为用户提供一个免费的、兼容的终端。该项目支持无服务器架构，用户可以轻松部署到多个云服务平台，适合个人使用。尽管 Gemini API 提供了慷慨的免费额度，但仍有许多工具仅支持 OpenAI API。本项目为这些工具提供了一个可用的解决方案，简化了集成过程。
summary.en: Gemini is an OpenAI API proxy designed to provide users with a free, compatible endpoint. The project supports a serverless architecture, allowing easy deployment across multiple cloud service platforms, suitable for personal use. While the Gemini API offers generous free tiers, many tools exclusively support the OpenAI API. This project provides a viable solution for integrating those tools seamlessly.

metadata.name: LangBot
metadata.description: Production-grade platform for building agentic IM bots - 生产级多平台智能机器人开发平台. 提供 Agent、知识库编排、插件系统 / Bots for Discord / Slack / LINE / Telegram / WeChat(企业微信, 企微智能机器人, 公众号) / 飞书 / 钉钉 / QQ / Satori e.g. Integrated with ChatGPT(GPT), DeepSeek, Dify, n8n, Langflow, Coze, Claude, Gemini, MiniMax, Ollama, SiliconFlow, Moonshot, GLM, clawdbot / openclaw

summary.zh: LangBot 是一个开源的生产级平台，专为构建智能即时通讯机器人而设计。它支持多种聊天平台（如 Slack、Discord、Telegram 等），并通过集成大型语言模型（LLMs）提供多轮对话、任务执行和工作流集成等功能。其插件生态系统和直观的管理面板使得开发和部署变得简单高效，适合企业级应用。
summary.en: LangBot is an open-source, production-grade platform designed for building intelligent instant messaging bots. It supports various chat platforms such as Slack, Discord, and Telegram, providing features like multi-turn dialogues, task execution, and workflow integration through Large Language Models (LLMs). Its plugin ecosystem and intuitive management panel simplify development and deployment, making it suitable for enterprise applications.

metadata.name: fiddler-everywhere-enhance
metadata.description: Fiddler Everywhere is a secure and modern web debugging proxy for macOS, Windows, and Linux.

summary.zh: Fiddler Everywhere Enhance 是一个针对 Fiddler Everywhere 的增强工具，支持 Windows、Linux 和 macOS 平台。该项目提供了自动补丁工具，简化了 Fiddler 的安装和配置过程，提升了调试效率。用户可以轻松下载和应用补丁，适用于不同版本的 Fiddler，特别是 5.9.0 及以上版本，适合开发者和测试人员使用。
summary.en: Fiddler Everywhere Enhance is a tool designed to enhance Fiddler Everywhere, supporting Windows, Linux, and macOS platforms. This project offers an auto-patch tool that simplifies the installation and configuration of Fiddler, improving debugging efficiency. Users can easily download and apply patches for various versions of Fiddler, particularly for versions 5.9.0 and above, making it suitable for developers and testers.

metadata.name: reqable-app
metadata.description: Reqable issue track repo

summary.zh: Reqable 是一款新一代的 API 调试和测试一站式解决方案，支持 HTTP/1.x、HTTP/2 和部分 HTTP/3 协议。它集成了流量分析与 API 测试的核心功能，具备高性能和多平台支持（Windows、Mac、Linux、Android、iOS）。通过 MITM 代理方法，Reqable 提供了丰富的调试功能，如重写、脚本处理和断点调试，适合开发者和测试人员使用。
summary.en: Reqable is a next-generation one-stop solution for API debugging and testing, supporting HTTP/1.x, HTTP/2, and partial HTTP/3 protocols. It integrates core features of traffic analysis and API testing, offering high performance and multi-platform support (Windows, Mac, Linux, Android, iOS). Utilizing the MITM proxy method, Reqable provides extensive debugging capabilities such as rewriting, scripting, and breakpoint debugging, making it ideal for developers and testers.

metadata.name: awesome-open-source-ai
metadata.description: A curated list of useful open-source AI resources

summary.zh: 这个项目是一个精心策划的开源人工智能资源列表，涵盖推理引擎、语言模型和多种工具。它旨在为开发者提供符合开源标准的高质量资源，适用于机器学习、自然语言处理和多媒体处理等应用场景。项目中的资源包括多种优秀的推理引擎和语言模型，适合不同硬件环境和任务需求。
summary.en: This project is a curated list of open-source AI resources, including inference engines, language models, and various tools. It aims to provide developers with high-quality resources that meet open-source standards, suitable for applications in machine learning, natural language processing, and multimedia processing. The resources include various excellent inference engines and language models, catering to different hardware environments and task requirements.

metadata.name: dnd-resume
metadata.description: 🚀 Resume Builder 在线简历生成工具

summary.zh: dnd-resume 是一款免费的在线简历生成工具，旨在帮助用户轻松创建专业的简历。该工具提供实时预览功能，用户可以在构建简历的同时查看效果。此外，用户还可以通过浏览器的打印功能将简历无缝导出为 PDF 格式，方便分享和保存。其简洁的界面和易用性使其适合求职者和职业发展者。
summary.en: dnd-resume is a free online resume builder designed to help users create professional resumes effortlessly. It features real-time preview functionality, allowing users to see the results as they build their resumes. Additionally, users can seamlessly export their resumes to PDF format using the browser's print feature, making it easy to share and save. Its simple interface and usability make it ideal for job seekers and career developers.

metadata.name: ez-cursor-free
metadata.description: 解决Cursor免费订阅提示问题和自动注册刷新Resolve the issue of free subscription prompts and automatic registration refresh for Cursor

summary.zh: Ez2 Use Cursor Free Tools 是一款旨在解决 Cursor 免费订阅提示和自动注册刷新的工具，特别适合那些急需使用但无法支付的用户。该工具支持最新版本及以下，提供便捷的安装链接，确保用户能够顺利使用 Cursor 的功能，提升工作效率。
summary.en: Ez2 Use Cursor Free Tools is designed to resolve free subscription prompts and automatic registration refresh issues for Cursor, specifically targeting users who urgently need access but cannot afford it. The tool supports the latest versions and below, providing convenient installation links to ensure users can smoothly utilize Cursor's features and enhance their productivity.

metadata.name: CF-Workers-docker.io
metadata.description: 这个项目是一个基于 Cloudflare Workers 的 Docker 镜像代理工具。它能够中转对 Docker 官方镜像仓库的请求，解决一些访问限制和加速访问的问题。

summary.zh: CF-Workers-docker.io 是一个基于 Cloudflare Workers 的 Docker 镜像代理工具，旨在解决对 Docker 官方镜像仓库的访问限制和加速问题。用户可以通过简单的配置，快速部署自己的镜像代理服务，提升 Docker 镜像的拉取速度，适用于需要频繁访问 Docker 镜像的开发环境。
summary.en: CF-Workers-docker.io is a Docker image proxy tool based on Cloudflare Workers, designed to address access restrictions and speed up requests to the official Docker image repository. Users can quickly deploy their own image proxy service with simple configurations, enhancing the speed of Docker image pulls, making it suitable for development environments that frequently access Docker images.

metadata.name: fu-fastapi-vue
metadata.description: 采用当前最流行的技术栈 Vben Vue Vue3 和 FastApi开发的后端管理系统，Python低代码平台。

summary.zh: FuFastApi-Vue 是一个基于 FastAPI 和 Vue3 的后端管理系统，旨在提供高性能的低代码平台。它支持多种 OAuth2.0 登录方式，并具备动态权限管理、菜单管理、用户管理等功能。该项目采用了现代技术栈，具有易用性和高效性，适合需要快速构建管理系统的开发者。FuFastApi-Vue 目前不再更新，建议用户转向 ZQ-Platform。
summary.en: FuFastApi-Vue is a backend management system built on FastAPI and Vue3, designed to provide a high-performance low-code platform. It supports multiple OAuth2.0 login methods and features dynamic permission management, menu management, and user management. Utilizing a modern tech stack, it offers ease of use and efficiency, making it suitable for developers needing to quickly build management systems. FuFastApi-Vue is no longer updated, and users are encouraged to transition to ZQ-Platform.

metadata.name: Sonic
metadata.description: Official implementation of "Sonic: Shifting Focus to Global Audio Perception in Portrait Animation"

summary.zh: Sonic是一个专注于全球音频感知的肖像动画实现，旨在提升动画中的音频表现力。该项目通过深度学习技术，结合情感表达，提供了高质量的动画生成效果，适用于动画制作、游戏开发等领域。其开源特性和在线演示使得用户能够轻松体验和应用该技术。
summary.en: Sonic is an implementation focused on global audio perception in portrait animation, aimed at enhancing audio expressiveness in animations. Utilizing deep learning techniques combined with emotional expression, it offers high-quality animation generation suitable for animation production, game development, and more. Its open-source nature and online demo allow users to easily experience and apply this technology.

metadata.name: MetaGPT
metadata.description: 🌟 The Multi-Agent Framework: First AI Software Company, Towards Natural Language Programming

summary.zh: MetaGPT是一个多智能体框架，旨在通过将不同角色分配给GPT，形成协作实体以处理复杂任务。它能够将简单的需求转化为用户故事、竞争分析、数据结构等，模拟软件公司的整个流程。该项目的核心在于将标准操作程序(SOP)与大型语言模型(LLM)团队结合，推动自然语言编程的实现。
summary.en: MetaGPT is a multi-agent framework designed to form collaborative entities by assigning different roles to GPTs for tackling complex tasks. It transforms simple requirements into user stories, competitive analyses, data structures, and more, simulating the entire process of a software company. The core philosophy integrates Standard Operating Procedures (SOP) with teams of Large Language Models (LLMs), advancing the implementation of natural language programming.

metadata.name: xiaozhi-esp32
metadata.description: An MCP-based chatbot | 一个基于MCP的聊天机器人

summary.zh: 小智聊天机器人是一个基于MCP协议的语音交互平台，结合了Qwen和DeepSeek等大型模型的AI能力，支持多终端控制。其主要特点包括离线语音唤醒、语音识别、OLED显示、以及多语言支持。该项目适用于智能家居控制、PC操作及知识搜索等场景，具备灵活的自定义选项，适合开发者和爱好者进行DIY硬件实践。
summary.en: The XiaoZhi chatbot is a voice interaction platform based on the MCP protocol, leveraging AI capabilities from large models like Qwen and DeepSeek for multi-terminal control. Key features include offline voice wake-up, speaker recognition, OLED display, and multi-language support. This project is suitable for smart home control, PC operations, and knowledge search, offering flexible customization options for developers and DIY enthusiasts.

metadata.name: ai_couplets
metadata.description: 新年没什么可以送给大家的，那就给大家整个赛博春联吧！

summary.zh: AI 春联生成器通过输入主题，自动生成富有创意的春联，结合了现代人工智能技术与传统文化，适合在春节等节日场合使用。该项目易于部署，用户只需配置 API 密钥即可快速上手，展现了 AI 在文化创作中的独特应用。
summary.en: The AI Couplets Generator automatically creates creative couplets based on user-input themes, blending modern AI technology with traditional culture, making it suitable for festive occasions like the Spring Festival. The project is easy to deploy, requiring only API key configuration for quick setup, showcasing the unique application of AI in cultural creation.

metadata.name: one-small-step
metadata.description: 这是一个简单的技术科普教程项目，主要聚焦于解释一些有趣的，前沿的技术概念和原理。每篇文章都力求在 5 分钟内阅读完成。

summary.zh: One Small Step 是一个技术科普教程项目，专注于简明扼要地解释前沿技术概念。每篇文章都力求在5分钟内完成阅读，涵盖人工智能、数学等领域，适合技术爱好者和初学者。该项目每周更新至少三篇文章，旨在提升读者对复杂技术的理解和应用能力。
summary.en: One Small Step is a technical popularization tutorial project focused on succinctly explaining cutting-edge technology concepts. Each article aims to be read in under five minutes, covering areas like artificial intelligence and mathematics, making it suitable for tech enthusiasts and beginners. The project updates at least three articles weekly, aiming to enhance readers' understanding and application of complex technologies.

metadata.name: OpenHands
metadata.description: 🙌 OpenHands: AI-Driven Development

summary.zh: OpenHands 是一个专注于 AI 驱动开发的社区，提供了多种工具和 SDK，支持用户定义和运行智能代理。其核心是一个可组合的 Python 库，用户可以在本地或云端扩展到数千个代理。OpenHands 还提供 CLI 和本地 GUI，方便用户快速上手，并支持与 Slack、Jira 等工具的集成，适合企业和开发者使用。
summary.en: OpenHands is a community focused on AI-driven development, offering various tools and SDKs for users to define and run intelligent agents. Its core is a composable Python library that allows local or cloud scaling to thousands of agents. OpenHands also provides a CLI and a local GUI for easy onboarding, supporting integrations with tools like Slack and Jira, making it suitable for enterprises and developers.

metadata.name: WrenAI
metadata.description: Open-source text-to-SQL and text-to-chart GenBI agent with a semantic layer. Ask your database questions in natural language — get accurate SQL, charts, and BI insights. Supports 12+ data sources (PostgreSQL, BigQuery, Snowflake, etc.) and any LLM (OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, Ollama).

summary.zh: WrenAI 是一个开源的生成性商业智能（GenBI）工具，能够通过自然语言查询任何数据库，快速生成准确的 SQL 语句和图表。其核心功能包括支持多语言查询、AI 自动生成报告和图表，以及提供语义层以确保输出的准确性。适用于需要快速数据分析和决策支持的企业，帮助用户轻松获取数据洞察。
summary.en: WrenAI is an open-source Generative Business Intelligence (GenBI) tool that enables users to query any database in natural language, generating accurate SQL statements and charts rapidly. Key features include multi-language query support, AI-generated reports and charts, and a semantic layer ensuring output accuracy. Ideal for businesses needing quick data analysis and decision support, it empowers users to easily gain data insights.

metadata.name: story-iter
metadata.description: [ICLR 2026] A Training-free Iterative Framework for Long Story Visualization

summary.zh: Story-Iter是一个无训练的迭代框架，旨在提升长篇故事可视化的质量。该方法通过引入全局参考交叉注意力（GRCA）模块，逐步整合前一轮生成的所有参考图像，确保语义一致性和细粒度交互。与传统依赖固定参考图像的方法不同，Story-Iter能够在多达100帧的故事生成中，实现高效且精确的图像生成，适用于需要复杂叙事的应用场景。
summary.en: Story-Iter is a training-free iterative framework designed to enhance the quality of long story visualization. By introducing a Global Reference Cross-Attention (GRCA) module, it progressively integrates all reference images from previous rounds, ensuring semantic consistency and fine-grained interactions. Unlike traditional methods relying on fixed reference images, Story-Iter achieves efficient and precise image generation in narratives of up to 100 frames, making it suitable for applications requiring complex storytelling.

metadata.name: aigcpanel
metadata.description: AIGCPanel 是一个简单易用的一站式AI数字人系统，支持视频合成、声音合成、声音克隆，简化本地模型管理、一键导入和使用AI模型。

summary.zh: AIGCPanel 是一款一站式AI数字人系统，提供视频合成、语音合成和声音克隆等功能，简化本地模型管理，支持一键导入和使用AI模型，适合各类用户。其技术栈包括 Electron、Vue 3 和 TypeScript，旨在让AI创作变得更加便捷和高效。
summary.en: AIGCPanel is an all-in-one AI digital human system that offers video synthesis, voice synthesis, and voice cloning functionalities, simplifying local model management with one-click import and usage of AI models. Built on Electron, Vue 3, and TypeScript, it aims to make AI creation more accessible and efficient for users of all levels.

metadata.name: MagicMirror
metadata.description: 🪞 Instant AI Face Swap 一键 AI 换脸，发现更美的你

summary.zh: MagicMirror 是一款一键 AI 换脸应用，用户可以轻松尝试不同的面孔、发型和服装。该软件操作简单，无需复杂设置，支持离线处理，确保用户隐私。其小巧的安装包和模型文件使其在普通计算机上流畅运行，适合追求便捷和隐私的用户。该项目基于多项开源技术，旨在为用户提供轻松愉快的换脸体验。
summary.en: MagicMirror is an instant AI face swap application that allows users to effortlessly try on different faces, hairstyles, and outfits. The software is user-friendly, requiring no complex setup, and processes images offline to ensure user privacy. Its lightweight installer and model files enable smooth operation on standard computers, catering to users seeking convenience and privacy. This project builds upon several open-source technologies to provide an enjoyable face-swapping experience.

metadata.name: xhs_ai_publisher
metadata.description: AI-powered Xiaohongshu/Rednote content creation and publishing tool with PyQt desktop UI, FastAPI service, login-state reuse, preview publish, and automated browser workflows.

summary.zh: 小红书AI发布助手是一款专为小红书内容创作者设计的自动化工具，集成了智能内容生成与一键发布功能。其核心优势在于利用AI技术高效生成高质量内容，并通过Selenium实现自动化发布，极大提升了创作效率。该工具支持多账户管理、定时发布及数据加密，适合追求高效与专业的内容创作者。
summary.en: The Xiaohongshu AI Publisher is an automation tool designed for content creators on the Xiaohongshu platform, integrating intelligent content generation and one-click publishing. Its core advantage lies in leveraging AI technology to efficiently produce high-quality content, while utilizing Selenium for automated publishing, significantly enhancing creation efficiency. The tool supports multi-account management, scheduled publishing, and data encryption, making it ideal for creators seeking efficiency and professionalism.

metadata.name: Genesis
metadata.description: A generative world for general-purpose robotics & embodied AI learning.

summary.zh: Genesis是一个为通用机器人和具身AI学习设计的物理平台，具备强大的物理引擎、轻量级仿真平台和高效的照片级渲染系统。它能够将用户的自然语言描述转化为多种数据形式，支持多种材料和物理现象的模拟，适用于机器人和物理AI应用。该平台的开放源码将促进社区的参与和创新。
summary.en: Genesis is a physics platform designed for general-purpose robotics and embodied AI learning, featuring a powerful physics engine, a lightweight simulation platform, and an efficient photo-realistic rendering system. It transforms user-prompted natural language descriptions into various data modalities, simulating a wide range of materials and physical phenomena, making it suitable for robotics and physical AI applications. The open-source nature of the platform encourages community engagement and innovation.

metadata.name: Flowise
metadata.description: Build AI Agents, Visually

summary.zh: Flowise 是一个可视化构建 AI 代理的平台，旨在简化 AI 应用的开发过程。通过直观的界面，用户可以快速构建和部署 AI 代理，适用于自动化任务、数据处理和智能决策等场景。该项目采用 Node.js 和 React 技术栈，支持 Docker 部署，提供丰富的模块化架构，便于开发者扩展和集成第三方组件。
summary.en: Flowise is a visual platform for building AI agents, designed to simplify the development of AI applications. With an intuitive interface, users can quickly create and deploy AI agents for automation, data processing, and intelligent decision-making. The project utilizes Node.js and React, supports Docker deployment, and offers a modular architecture that facilitates developer extensions and third-party component integrations.

metadata.name: Picture_book_production
metadata.description: 批量自动化生成儿童绘本故事书

summary.zh: 儿童图画书生成器是一个基于AI技术的工具，能够自动生成儿童故事文本及配套插图，支持多语言和自定义主题。该项目适用于教育工作者、家长和出版社，帮助快速创作个性化故事和教学材料。其技术亮点包括智能场景分析、角色一致性管理和Markdown格式输出，极大提升了儿童绘本的制作效率。
summary.en: The Children's Picture Book Generator is an AI-based tool that automatically creates children's story texts and accompanying illustrations, supporting multiple languages and custom themes. This project is ideal for educators, parents, and publishers, facilitating the rapid creation of personalized stories and teaching materials. Key technical highlights include intelligent scene analysis, character consistency management, and Markdown format output, significantly enhancing the efficiency of picture book production.

metadata.name: RWKV-Runner
metadata.description: A RWKV management and startup tool, full automation, only 8MB. And provides an interface compatible with the OpenAI API. RWKV is a large language model that is fully open source and available for commercial use.

summary.zh: RWKV Runner 是一款轻量级的 RWKV 模型管理和启动工具，体积仅 8MB，致力于消除使用大型语言模型的障碍。它全自动化操作，并提供与 OpenAI API 兼容的接口，使得每个 ChatGPT 客户端都能作为 RWKV 客户端使用。该项目适合需要快速部署和高效管理语言模型的开发者与企业。
summary.en: RWKV Runner is a lightweight RWKV model management and startup tool, only 8MB in size, aimed at eliminating barriers to using large language models. It automates operations and provides an interface compatible with the OpenAI API, allowing every ChatGPT client to function as an RWKV client. This project is ideal for developers and businesses needing quick deployment and efficient management of language models.

metadata.name: chatgpt-custom-instructions
metadata.description: My own Prompts for Custom instructions ChatGPT

summary.zh: 该项目提供了一套优化的自定义指令，旨在提升 ChatGPT 和 Operator 的性能。通过最新的 GPT-5 提示指导，模型在思考过程中会创建角色适应的评分标准，并根据这些标准自我评分，确保输出质量。项目强调减少模糊性，移除无效的提示，并提供明确的回答结构，适合希望提升 ChatGPT 应用效果的开发者和用户。
summary.en: This project offers a set of optimized custom instructions aimed at enhancing the performance of ChatGPT and Operator. Utilizing the latest GPT-5 prompting guidance, the model creates role-appropriate rubrics during its reasoning process and self-scores to ensure output quality. The project emphasizes reducing ambiguity, removing ineffective prompts, and providing a clear answer structure, making it suitable for developers and users seeking to improve ChatGPT application effectiveness.

metadata.name: uicloner-extension
metadata.description: Browser extension to instantly clone any web UI you see with one click, exports to HTML + Tailwind CSS or HTML + pure CSS

summary.zh: UICloner扩展是一款强大的浏览器插件，允许用户通过一次点击快速克隆任何网页的UI组件，并自动生成相应的HTML和CSS代码。支持HTML与Tailwind CSS或纯CSS格式，提供实时预览功能，极大地方便了前端开发者的工作。适合需要快速原型设计和UI组件重用的开发场景。
summary.en: UICloner Extension is a powerful browser plugin that allows users to instantly clone any web UI component with a single click, automatically generating the corresponding HTML and CSS code. It supports both HTML + Tailwind CSS and pure CSS formats, offering a live preview feature that greatly facilitates front-end development. Ideal for rapid prototyping and UI component reuse.

metadata.name: Awesome-gptlike-shellsite
metadata.description: 深入探索精选的套壳站和必备API资源。本文为初学者和经验丰富的运营者提供一站式指南，涵盖常见问题解答和基础攻略，助您迈向套壳站副业成功之路。Dive into a curated selection of shell sites and essential APIs. This article offers a comprehensive guide for both beginners and seasoned operators, covering FAQs and basic strategies to propel you towards success in your shell site side hustle.

summary.zh: 本项目深入探索精选的套壳站和必备API资源，为初学者和经验丰富的运营者提供一站式指南，涵盖常见问题解答和基础运营策略，助力套壳站副业成功。用户可以找到高质量的AI站点部署资源，了解如何选择合适的云服务器和API，提升运营效率，创造差异化产品。
summary.en: This project delves into a curated selection of shell sites and essential API resources, providing a comprehensive guide for both beginners and seasoned operators. It covers FAQs and basic operational strategies to aid in achieving success in shell site side hustles. Users can find high-quality AI deployment resources and learn how to choose suitable cloud servers and APIs to enhance operational efficiency and create differentiated products.

metadata.name: eagle
metadata.description: 🦅 A Go framework for the API or Microservice

summary.zh: Eagle是一个高效的Go框架，专为快速构建API服务和微服务而设计。其核心功能包括集成流行的组件如gin、gRPC、gorm和prometheus，支持分布式追踪和服务发现，适合快速业务开发。Eagle采用经典的分层架构，利用Wire依赖注入框架提升模块化，降低组件间耦合，适合中小型企业和快速迭代的项目。
summary.en: Eagle is an efficient Go framework designed for rapid development of API services and microservices. Its core features include integration with popular components like gin, gRPC, gorm, and prometheus, supporting distributed tracing and service discovery, making it suitable for fast business development. Eagle employs a classic layered architecture and utilizes the Wire dependency injection framework to enhance modularity and reduce coupling between components, ideal for small to medium enterprises and fast-paced projects.

metadata.name: openai-captcha-detection
metadata.description: openai-captcha-detection 是一个使用 OpenAI 进行验证码识别的工具。目前验证码识别准确率100%，通过调用 OpenAI 的 API，这个项目可以实现对复杂验证码图片的文本识别，帮助开发者在验证码处理场景中进行自动化操作。openai-captcha-detection is a tool that uses OpenAI for captcha recognition. Currently, it achieves a 100% accuracy rate in captcha recognition.

summary.zh: openai-captcha-detection 是一个基于 OpenAI 技术的验证码识别工具，具备100%识别准确率。它通过调用 OpenAI API，能够高效处理复杂验证码图像，极大地简化验证码自动化处理的工作流程，适用于开发者在网络安全和自动化测试等场景中的应用。
summary.en: openai-captcha-detection is a captcha recognition tool leveraging OpenAI technology, achieving a 100% accuracy rate. By utilizing the OpenAI API, it efficiently processes complex captcha images, significantly simplifying the automation of captcha handling, making it suitable for developers in web security and automated testing scenarios.

metadata.name: pyenv
metadata.description: Simple Python version management

summary.zh: pyenv 是一个简单的 Python 版本管理工具，允许用户轻松切换多个 Python 版本。它支持按用户和项目设置 Python 版本，且不依赖于 Python 本身，使用纯 shell 脚本实现，避免了引导问题。pyenv 的独特之处在于其简洁性和高效性，适合需要在不同 Python 版本间进行测试和开发的用户。
summary.en: pyenv is a simple Python version management tool that allows users to easily switch between multiple Python versions. It supports setting Python versions on a per-user and per-project basis, and it does not depend on Python itself, using pure shell scripts to avoid bootstrap issues. The uniqueness of pyenv lies in its simplicity and efficiency, making it ideal for users who need to test and develop across different Python versions.

metadata.name: chinese-days
metadata.description: 中国法定节假日、调休和工作日、24节气查询，农历阳历互转，提供 JSON 文件，对非开发者，还提供 iCal 日历订阅，可供 Google Calendar、Apple Calendar、Microsoft Outlook 等客户端使用。

summary.zh: 该项目提供中国法定节假日、调休、工作日及24节气的查询功能，支持农历与阳历的互转，输出JSON文件，便于非开发者使用。此外，项目还提供iCal日历订阅，兼容Google Calendar、Apple Calendar和Microsoft Outlook等客户端，确保用户能及时获取节假日信息。集成AI自动更新功能，保证数据的实时性和准确性。
summary.en: This project offers a comprehensive query system for China's statutory holidays, rest days, working days, and the 24 solar terms, along with lunar-solar conversions, outputting JSON files for non-developers. Additionally, it provides iCal calendar subscriptions compatible with Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, and Microsoft Outlook, ensuring timely access to holiday information. An AI auto-update feature ensures data accuracy and real-time updates.

metadata.name: VideoChat
metadata.description: 实时交互数字人，可自定义形象与音色，支持音色克隆，对话延迟低至3s。Real-time voice interactive digital human, customizable appearance and voice, supporting voice cloning, with initial package delay as low as 3s.

summary.zh: 该项目提供了一个实时语音交互数字人，用户可以自定义其形象与音色，支持音色克隆，且对话延迟低至3秒。通过端到端和级联的技术架构，结合多种先进的语音识别和生成模型，适用于在线客服、虚拟助手等场景，提升用户交互体验。
summary.en: This project offers a real-time voice interactive digital human, allowing users to customize appearance and voice, with support for voice cloning and a conversation delay as low as 3 seconds. Utilizing both end-to-end and cascade architectures with various advanced speech recognition and generation models, it is suitable for online customer service, virtual assistants, and enhances user interaction experience.

metadata.name: LLM-Dojo
metadata.description: 轻量级 LLM Post-training 框架，支持 SFT、RLVR、On-Policy KD、Guide KD 及混合训练；实现单轮/多轮 Guide 蒸馏、多教师蒸馏、Reward 混合训练与自动化数据分流👩‍🎓👨‍🎓

summary.zh: LLM-Dojo是一个开源的大模型学习平台，旨在通过简洁易读的代码构建多种模型训练框架，包括SFT、VLM和RLHF等。该项目支持多种主流模型的训练，具备自动适配功能，适合研究人员和开发者进行实验与创新。其持续更新的RLHF框架涵盖多种强化学习方法，提供了丰富的技术文档和示例，助力用户快速上手和深入理解大模型训练的最新动态。
summary.en: LLM-Dojo is an open-source platform for large model learning, designed to build various model training frameworks, including SFT, VLM, and RLHF, using clean and readable code. The project supports training of mainstream models with automatic adaptation features, making it suitable for researchers and developers for experimentation and innovation. Its continuously updated RLHF framework covers various reinforcement learning methods and provides extensive technical documentation and examples, enabling users to quickly get started and gain insights into the latest developments in large model training.

metadata.name: Easy-ReNamer
metadata.description: 文件重命名

summary.zh: Easy-ReNamer 是一个高效的文件重命名工具，旨在简化用户的文件管理流程。该项目提供了灵活的重命名规则，适用于批量处理文件，特别适合需要频繁整理和重命名文件的用户。其技术亮点在于简单易用的界面和强大的自定义功能。
summary.en: Easy-ReNamer is an efficient file renaming tool designed to streamline users' file management processes. This project offers flexible renaming rules suitable for batch processing files, especially for users who frequently organize and rename files. Its technical highlights include a user-friendly interface and powerful customization features.

metadata.name: jump-jump
metadata.description: 开箱即用，Golang 开发的一个功能完善的短链接系统。URL shortener service developed with golang.

summary.zh: Jump Jump 是一个开箱即用的短链接系统，基于 Golang 开发，具备完善的功能和用户友好的界面。该系统支持快速部署，用户可通过 Docker Compose 启动服务，轻松管理短链接。它提供了完整的接口文档和管理后台，适合需要短链接服务的个人和企业使用，特别是在需要监控访问情况的场景中表现出色。
summary.en: Jump Jump is a ready-to-use URL shortener system developed in Golang, featuring a comprehensive set of functionalities and a user-friendly interface. The system supports quick deployment using Docker Compose, allowing users to easily manage short links. It offers complete API documentation and an admin dashboard, making it ideal for individuals and businesses needing URL shortening services, especially in scenarios requiring access monitoring.

metadata.name: ohUrlShortener
metadata.description: 适合中小型社区网站使用的企业级短链接服务系统，支持短链接生产、查询及302转向，并自带点击量统计、独立IP数统计、访问日志

summary.zh: ohUrlShortener 是一款专为中小型社区网站设计的企业级短链接服务系统，具备短链接生成、查询和302重定向功能。它支持访问日志和点击量统计，便于用户分析流量。该系统可通过 Docker 一步启动，提供 HTTP API 接口，方便集成和管理，适合需要短链接服务的社区和企业。
summary.en: ohUrlShortener is an enterprise-level URL shortening service system designed for small to medium community websites. It supports short URL generation, querying, and 302 redirection, along with click and unique IP statistics for traffic analysis. The system can be deployed with a one-step Docker setup and offers an HTTP API for easy integration and management, making it ideal for communities and businesses needing URL shortening services.

metadata.name: JoyHallo
metadata.description: JoyHallo: Digital human model for Mandarin

summary.zh: JoyHallo是一个针对普通话的视频生成模型，利用29小时的普通话语音视频数据集，解决了普通话复杂的口型和表情生成问题。该模型采用了半解耦结构，显著提高了信息利用效率和推理速度，同时保持了对英语视频生成的强大能力，展现出优秀的跨语言生成能力，适用于教育、医疗等领域。
summary.en: JoyHallo is a digital human model for Mandarin video generation, addressing challenges posed by complex lip movements and expression generation. Leveraging a dataset of 29 hours of Mandarin speech videos, it employs a semi-decoupled structure to enhance information utilization efficiency and inference speed while maintaining strong capabilities in generating English videos, making it suitable for applications in education and healthcare.

metadata.name: pdf2htmlEX
metadata.description: Convert PDF to HTML without losing text or format.

summary.zh: pdf2htmlEX 是一个高效的工具，能够将 PDF 文件转换为 HTML 格式，同时保持文本和格式的准确性。它支持复杂的布局和数学公式，适用于学术论文和杂志等多种场景。项目集成了最新的 Cairo 代码，修复了多个边缘案例的错误，并提供了更精确的文本可见性处理，确保输出的 HTML 文件在视觉上与原始 PDF 保持一致。
summary.en: pdf2htmlEX is an efficient tool that converts PDF files to HTML format while preserving text and format accuracy. It supports complex layouts and mathematical formulas, making it suitable for various applications like academic papers and magazines. The project integrates the latest Cairo code, fixes multiple edge case bugs, and offers improved text visibility handling, ensuring the output HTML visually aligns with the original PDF.

metadata.name: yunda
metadata.description: 低代码搭建小程序、H5、问卷、图文。云搭万物，触手可及！

summary.zh: Yunda 是一款开源的低代码平台，支持用户无需编程即可快速搭建小程序、H5 页面、问卷和图文内容。其核心技术基于 Vue 3 和 Node.js，提供可视化的拖拽式构建体验，适用于多种应用场景，旨在降低开发门槛，提升用户的创作效率。
summary.en: Yunda is an open-source low-code platform that enables users to quickly build mini-programs, H5 pages, questionnaires, and graphic content without coding. Built on Vue 3 and Node.js, it offers a visual drag-and-drop construction experience suitable for various application scenarios, aiming to lower development barriers and enhance user creativity.

metadata.name: zerox
metadata.description: OCR & Document Extraction using vision models

summary.zh: Zerox 是一个简单易用的文档OCR工具，利用视觉模型进行文档提取。支持多种文件格式（如PDF、DOCX和图片），将其转换为图像并通过GPT生成Markdown格式的文本。该工具适用于需要从复杂布局文档中提取信息的场景，支持Node.js和Python两种语言的实现，集成了多种AI服务（如OpenAI、Azure、AWS等），极大地简化了文档处理流程。
summary.en: Zerox is a user-friendly OCR tool for document extraction using vision models. It supports various file formats (PDF, DOCX, images) and converts them into images, then uses GPT to generate Markdown text. This tool is ideal for extracting information from documents with complex layouts and is available in both Node.js and Python, integrating multiple AI services (OpenAI, Azure, AWS, etc.), significantly simplifying the document processing workflow.

metadata.name: Awesome-ChatGPT-Prompts-CN
metadata.description: ChatGPT调教指南|咒语指南|聊天提示词指南|学习指南

summary.zh: 该项目提供了全面的ChatGPT调教指南，涵盖咒语和聊天提示词，旨在帮助用户高效使用ChatGPT进行文本生成、问题解答及创作。适用于程序员、运营人员等各类用户，通过提供实用的提示和技巧，提升工作效率，推动AI技术的应用与发展。
summary.en: This project offers a comprehensive guide for training ChatGPT, covering spells and chat prompts, aimed at helping users efficiently utilize ChatGPT for text generation, answering questions, and creative writing. Suitable for programmers, marketers, and various users, it provides practical tips and techniques to enhance work efficiency and promote the application of AI technology.

metadata.name: YiAi
metadata.description: 基于NineAi2.4.2的二开版本，含编译包和整合包，无需授权，全套源码，开箱即用，喜欢的给个Star~！下方链接推荐API中转商

summary.zh: YiAi是基于NineAi2.4.2的二次开发版本，提供完整源码和编译包，支持多种AI模型的集成与使用。项目专注于学习和参考，具备开箱即用的特性，适合开发者快速搭建AI应用。最新版本优化了模型列表和用户界面，新增识图功能，提升了用户体验和稳定性。
summary.en: YiAi is a secondary development version based on NineAi 2.4.2, offering complete source code and compiled packages, supporting integration and usage of various AI models. The project focuses on learning and reference, featuring out-of-the-box capabilities suitable for developers to quickly build AI applications. The latest version optimizes the model list and user interface, adds image recognition functionality, and enhances user experience and stability.

metadata.name: facefusion
metadata.description: Industry leading face manipulation platform

summary.zh: FaceFusion 是一个行业领先的面部操控平台，专注于提供高效的面部图像处理与合成能力。该平台适合需要进行面部特效、图像合成和批量处理的开发者，支持多种操作模式，包括无头模式和批处理。其技术亮点在于灵活的命令行工具和强大的作业管理功能，适合具备一定技术背景的用户使用。
summary.en: FaceFusion is an industry-leading face manipulation platform that focuses on efficient facial image processing and synthesis capabilities. It is suitable for developers needing facial effects, image compositing, and batch processing, supporting various operation modes including headless and batch runs. Its technical highlights include a flexible command-line tool and robust job management features, designed for users with a certain level of technical expertise.

metadata.name: 99AI
metadata.description: 可商业化的 AI Web 平台，提供一站式人工智能服务解决方案。支持私有化部署，内置多用户管理，适合企业、团队或个人快速构建 AI 服务。

summary.zh: 99AI 是一个可商业化的 AI Web 平台，提供一站式人工智能服务解决方案，支持私有化部署和多用户管理。该平台适合企业、团队或个人快速构建 AI 服务，具备丰富的功能如 AI 对话、深度思考、联网搜索等，确保数据安全与灵活配置，助力商业化运营。
summary.en: 99AI is a commercializable AI Web platform that offers a one-stop artificial intelligence service solution, supporting private deployment and multi-user management. Suitable for enterprises, teams, or individuals to quickly build AI services, it features rich functionalities such as AI dialogue, deep thinking, and online search, ensuring data security and flexible configuration to facilitate commercialization.
