metadata.name: taskcafe
metadata.description: An open source project management tool with Kanban boards

summary.zh: Taskcafe 是一个开源项目管理工具，采用看板界面，支持任务管理、截止日期设置、标签和检查列表等功能。用户可以通过“我的任务”视图查看当前分配的任务，适合个人项目管理。该项目仍在积极开发中，未来将增加更多功能，适合需要灵活管理任务的团队和个人。
summary.en: Taskcafe is an open-source project management tool featuring a Kanban interface for task management, including due date setting, labels, and checklists. Users can view their assigned tasks through the My Tasks view, making it suitable for personal project management. The project is still under active development, with more features planned for the future, ideal for teams and individuals needing flexible task management.

metadata.name: onyx
metadata.description: Open Source AI Platform - AI Chat with advanced features that works with every LLM

summary.zh: Onyx 是一个功能丰富的开源 AI 平台，支持与任何大型语言模型（LLM）协作。它易于部署，能够在完全隔离的环境中运行。Onyx 提供了自定义代理、网络搜索、混合搜索、深度研究等高级功能，连接超过 40 种知识源，适合需要深度交互和多步骤搜索的应用场景。
summary.en: Onyx is a feature-rich open-source AI platform that works with any large language model (LLM). It is easy to deploy and can run in completely air-gapped environments. Onyx offers advanced features like custom agents, web search, hybrid search, and deep research, connecting to over 40 knowledge sources, making it suitable for applications requiring deep interaction and multi-step searches.

metadata.name: gpt-crawler
metadata.description: Crawl a site to generate knowledge files to create your own custom GPT from a URL

summary.zh: GPT Crawler 是一个用于从指定网站抓取数据并生成知识文件的工具，旨在帮助用户创建自定义的 GPT 模型。用户只需提供一个或多个 URL，系统便能自动提取相关信息，适用于知识管理和智能问答等场景。其技术亮点包括灵活的配置选项和支持 Docker 的容器化运行方式，便于快速集成和部署。
summary.en: GPT Crawler is a tool designed to scrape data from specified websites and generate knowledge files to help users create custom GPT models. By simply providing one or multiple URLs, the system can automatically extract relevant information, making it suitable for knowledge management and intelligent Q&A scenarios. Key features include flexible configuration options and support for containerized deployment via Docker, facilitating rapid integration and deployment.

metadata.name: acg-faka
metadata.description: 个人发卡源码，发卡系统，二次元发卡系统，二次元发卡源码，发卡程序，动漫发卡，PHP发卡源码，异次元发卡

summary.zh: acg-faka 是一款基于 PHP 的个人发卡系统，专为二次元文化爱好者设计，提供强大的支付、商品销售、会员管理和推广功能。该系统支持多种支付渠道，具备云更新、分站系统和丰富的插件扩展能力，用户可快速搭建在线商店，满足多样化的需求。其美观的界面兼容 PC 和手机，适合开发者学习和研究。
summary.en: acg-faka is a personal card issuing system based on PHP, designed for fans of the ACG culture. It offers powerful features such as payment processing, product sales, membership management, and promotion capabilities. The system supports various payment channels, features cloud updates, substation systems, and extensive plugin extensions, allowing users to quickly set up online stores to meet diverse needs. Its attractive interface is compatible with both PC and mobile devices, making it suitable for developers to learn and explore.

metadata.name: Fay
metadata.description: fay是一个帮助数字人（2.5d、3d、移动、pc、网页）或大语言模型（openai兼容、deepseek）连通业务系统的agent框架。

summary.zh: Fay是一个开源的数字人框架，旨在连接各种数字人模型和大语言模型，支持多种终端设备的应用。其核心功能包括全离线使用、流式支持、多用户并发、灵活的语音指令配置以及自定义知识库。Fay适合用于虚拟教师、主播和新闻播报等场景，提供全面的数字人应用接口，助力数字人技术的落地。
summary.en: Fay is an open-source framework designed to connect various digital human models and large language models, supporting applications across multiple terminal devices. Key features include offline usage, streaming support, multi-user concurrency, flexible voice command configuration, and customizable knowledge bases. Fay is suitable for scenarios like virtual teachers, broadcasters, and news reporting, providing comprehensive APIs for digital human applications.

metadata.name: Prolet
metadata.description: Historical documents (in Chinese) about the GPCR (Thanks Comrade RC MR HR etc.)

summary.zh: Prolet 是一个专注于中国历史文献的项目，主要收录与中国共产党革命历史相关的重要文件。该项目为研究者和历史爱好者提供了丰富的资料，帮助深入理解中国革命的背景和发展。其技术亮点在于对历史文件的系统整理与数字化，便于用户检索和使用。
summary.en: Prolet is a project focused on Chinese historical documents, specifically important texts related to the history of the Chinese Communist Party's revolution. It provides a wealth of resources for researchers and history enthusiasts, facilitating a deeper understanding of the background and development of the Chinese revolution. Its technical highlight lies in the systematic organization and digitization of historical documents for easy access and use.

metadata.name: NarratoAI
metadata.description: 利用AI大模型，一键解说并剪辑视频； Using AI models to automatically provide commentary and edit videos with a single click.

summary.zh: NarratoAI 是一款基于大模型的自动化影视解说和剪辑工具，支持文案撰写、配音和字幕生成，极大提升内容创作效率。该工具适用于短视频制作、在线教育及影视后期等场景，用户只需一键操作即可完成复杂的剪辑流程，助力创作者轻松实现高质量视频内容。
summary.en: NarratoAI is an automated film commentary and editing tool based on large language models, supporting script writing, voiceover, and subtitle generation, significantly enhancing content creation efficiency. This tool is suitable for short video production, online education, and film post-production, allowing users to complete complex editing processes with a single click, empowering creators to easily achieve high-quality video content.

metadata.name: Vchitect-2.0
metadata.description: Vchitect-2.0: Parallel Transformer for Scaling Up Video Diffusion Models

summary.zh: Vchitect-2.0 是一个并行变换器，旨在提升视频扩散模型的性能。该项目通过高效的计算架构，支持大规模视频生成，适用于影视制作、游戏开发及虚拟现实等领域。其技术亮点包括优化的推理过程和灵活的参数设置，能够生成高质量的视频内容。
summary.en: Vchitect-2.0 is a parallel transformer designed to enhance the performance of video diffusion models. The project supports large-scale video generation through an efficient computational architecture, making it suitable for film production, game development, and virtual reality applications. Key features include optimized inference processes and flexible parameter settings for high-quality video content generation.

metadata.name: Awesome-ChatGPT-AI-ZH
metadata.description: 全网曝光超1000万的「AI 知识库」正式移步Github开源，永久免费更新，提供ChatGPT，Midjourney等使用教程

summary.zh: 《Awesome-ChatGPT-AI-ZH》是一个全面的AI知识库，涵盖ChatGPT、Midjourney等工具的使用教程和实用技巧，致力于帮助中文用户高效利用AI技术。该项目提供丰富的资源，包括AI应用场景、实战变现和交流社群，所有内容永久免费更新，适合希望深入了解AI应用的用户。
summary.en: The 'Awesome-ChatGPT-AI-ZH' repository is a comprehensive AI knowledge base that includes tutorials and practical tips for using tools like ChatGPT and Midjourney. Aimed at helping Chinese users efficiently leverage AI technology, it offers a wealth of resources including AI application scenarios, monetization strategies, and a community for interaction, all with free and continuous updates.

metadata.name: ChatGPT-web-Midjourney-proxy
metadata.description: 🍭 一键拥有你自己的 ChatGPT+Midjourney 网页服务 | Own your own ChatGPT+Midjourney web service with one click

summary.zh: GoMaxAI-ChatGPT-Midjourney 是一个基于 Nestjs 和 Vue3 构建的私有化 AIGC 平台，支持一键部署 ChatGPT 和 Midjourney 网页服务。该平台提供丰富的功能，包括智能问答、绘画、视频生成等，适合需要快速搭建 AI 服务的用户。其独特的会员积分系统和多种支付方式，增强了用户体验和商业化潜力。
summary.en: GoMaxAI-ChatGPT-Midjourney is a privatized AIGC platform built on Nestjs and Vue3, enabling one-click deployment of ChatGPT and Midjourney web services. It offers a rich set of features including intelligent Q&A, painting, and video generation, making it suitable for users looking to quickly set up AI services. Its unique membership points system and multiple payment options enhance user experience and commercialization potential.

metadata.name: YuYuWechat
metadata.description: 一个让微信（非WEB版）定时循环发送消息/文件（cron表达式精确到分钟），批量群发消息，定时检查聊天记录的小工具🚀，提供了简易直观的界面，并支持邮箱报警等功能，可部署到任意平台

summary.zh: YuYuWechat 是一款轻量级的工具，能够让用户在微信上定时循环发送消息和文件，支持批量群发和定时检查聊天记录。该工具提供了简易直观的界面，支持全平台部署，并具备邮件报警功能，确保用户及时处理错误，适合需要自动化消息发送的场景。
summary.en: YuYuWechat is a lightweight tool that allows users to schedule repetitive message and file sending on WeChat, supporting bulk messaging and periodic chat record checks. It features an intuitive interface, supports deployment on all platforms, and includes email alert functionality to ensure timely error handling, making it suitable for automated messaging scenarios.

metadata.name: geekai
metadata.description: AI 助手全套开源解决方案，自带运营管理后台，开箱即用。集成了 ChatGPT, Azure, ChatGLM,讯飞星火，文心一言等多个平台的大语言模型。支持 MJ AI 绘画，Stable Diffusion AI  绘画，微博热搜等插件工具。采用 Go + Vue3 + element-plus 实现。

summary.zh: GeekAI 是一款开源的 AI 助手解决方案，集成了多种大语言模型（如 ChatGPT、Claude 等）和 AI 绘画工具（如 MidJourney 和 Stable Diffusion）。其特点包括开箱即用的运营管理后台、Websocket 实现的流畅体验，以及多种预训练角色应用，满足用户多样化的需求。支持多种支付方式，适合个人和商业用途。
summary.en: GeekAI is an open-source AI assistant solution that integrates various large language models (such as ChatGPT, Claude, etc.) and AI drawing tools (like MidJourney and Stable Diffusion). Key features include a ready-to-use management backend, a smooth experience powered by Websocket, and various pre-trained character applications to meet diverse user needs. It supports multiple payment methods, suitable for both personal and commercial use.

metadata.name: MettChatAi
metadata.description: 提供商业运营版chatgpt/文心一言/通义千问AI聊天+SD绘画+MJ绘画+sora/pika/runway视频生成，具备H5+APP+PC+公众号等多端协作。

summary.zh: MettChatAi 是一款基于 ChatGPT 的多功能 AI 聊天机器人，支持多端协作（H5、APP、PC、公众号）。它集成了智能聊天、语音识别、绘画生成（如 SD、MJ）、视频创作等功能，适用于商业运营和开发者学习。项目采用 PHP 和 uniapp 框架，具备丰富的二次开发支持和完善的文档，旨在推动聊天机器人技术的发展。
summary.en: MettChatAi is a multi-functional AI chatbot based on ChatGPT, supporting multi-platform collaboration (H5, APP, PC, WeChat Official Account). It integrates features such as intelligent chatting, voice recognition, drawing generation (like SD, MJ), and video creation, suitable for commercial operations and developer learning. The project uses PHP and uniapp framework, offering extensive support for secondary development and comprehensive documentation, aiming to advance chatbot technology.

metadata.name: flygon-dahanghai-2024
metadata.description: :books: 龙哥大航海 2024

summary.zh: 龙哥大航海 2024 是一个基于 Docker 和 NPM 的文档项目，旨在提供便捷的在线阅读体验。用户可以通过简单的命令快速部署文档，适合开发者和技术爱好者使用。该项目采用 CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 协议，强调知识共享与传播，具备良好的可扩展性与易用性。
summary.en: Long Ge's Great Navigation 2024 is a documentation project based on Docker and NPM, aimed at providing a convenient online reading experience. Users can quickly deploy the documentation through simple commands, making it suitable for developers and tech enthusiasts. The project is licensed under CC BY-NC-SA 4.0, emphasizing knowledge sharing and dissemination, with good scalability and usability.

metadata.name: enhanced-FaaS-in-China
metadata.description: 提升部署在cloudflare、vercel或netlify的网页在中国的访问速度和稳定性 Improve the access speed and stability in China of web pages hosted on cloudflare, vercel or netlify by merely changing your CNAME record. cf优选域名 | cf优选ip | cloudflare | vercel | netlify | 加速 | 国内 | 中国 | 境内 | 大陆

summary.zh: 该项目旨在通过简单地更改 CNAME 记录，提升在中国访问 Cloudflare、Vercel 或 Netlify 托管网页的速度和稳定性。它提供了优化后的 CNAME 记录，帮助用户规避网络瓶颈和不稳定性，确保更好的访问体验，特别适合在中国大陆的用户。该方案通过定期测试 IP 速度，选择最佳的 A 记录进行解析，具有实用性和高效性。
summary.en: This project aims to enhance the speed and stability of web pages hosted on Cloudflare, Vercel, or Netlify in China by simply changing the CNAME record. It offers optimized CNAME records to help users bypass network bottlenecks and instability, ensuring a better access experience, especially for users in mainland China. The solution periodically tests IP speeds and selects the best A records for resolution, demonstrating practicality and efficiency.

metadata.name: Alibi
metadata.description: Use your phone as a dashcam and save the last 30 minutes when you need them.

summary.zh: Alibi 是一款将手机变为行车记录仪的应用，能够在需要时保存过去 30 分钟的音频和视频记录。它在后台持续录制，完全可配置，无需互联网连接，适合各种场景，如事故记录或安全监控。其简单易用的界面和强大的功能使其成为用户保护自身权益的理想工具。
summary.en: Alibi is an app that transforms your phone into a dashcam, allowing you to save the last 30 minutes of audio and video when needed. It continuously records in the background, is fully configurable, and requires no internet connection, making it suitable for various scenarios like accident documentation or security monitoring. Its user-friendly interface and robust features make it an ideal tool for users to protect their rights.

metadata.name: douyin_upload
metadata.description: 抖音自动发布助手

summary.zh: 抖音自动发布助手提供了一种高效的方式来并发批量上传视频，简化了与其他爬虫项目的对接。用户只需配置视频信息并运行脚本，即可实现自动化上传，适用于内容创作者和营销人员。该项目去除了视频生成拼接的复杂代码，专注于上传功能，使用简单易懂的Python代码，支持无头浏览器操作。
summary.en: The Douyin Upload Assistant offers an efficient method for concurrent batch video uploads, simplifying integration with other crawler projects. Users can easily configure video details and run scripts for automated uploads, making it ideal for content creators and marketers. The project removes complex video generation and stitching code, focusing solely on the upload functionality, utilizing straightforward Python code and supporting headless browser operations.

metadata.name: personal-card-share
metadata.description: 一个基于ZhipuAI的文本到社交卡片(简历卡片)的生成工具.

summary.zh: 这是一个基于ZhipuAI的文本到社交卡片生成工具，旨在帮助用户快速创建个性化的简历卡片。该工具利用智谱API，提供简便的在线体验，适合求职者、自由职业者及社交网络用户。用户只需输入文本，即可生成美观的社交卡片，提升个人品牌形象。
summary.en: This is a text-to-social card generator based on ZhipuAI, designed to help users quickly create personalized resume cards. Utilizing the Zhipu API, it offers a convenient online experience suitable for job seekers, freelancers, and social network users. Users can input text to generate visually appealing social cards, enhancing their personal brand.

metadata.name: ops
metadata.description: 一款轻量级、高性能、功能强大的内网穿透代理服务器。支持tcp、udp、socks5、http等几乎所有流量转发，可用来访问内网网站、本地支付接口调试、ssh访问、远程桌面，内网dns解析、内网socks5代理等等……，并带有功能强大的web管理端。a lightweight, high-performance, powerful intranet penetration proxy server, with a powerful web management terminal.

summary.zh: ops是一款轻量级、高性能的内网穿透代理服务器，支持TCP、UDP、HTTP和SOCKS5等多种流量转发，适用于访问内网网站、调试支付接口、SSH访问和远程桌面等场景。其强大的Web管理端使得配置和管理更加便捷，能够有效提升内网资源的安全性和可访问性。
summary.en: ops is a lightweight, high-performance intranet penetration proxy server that supports various traffic forwarding protocols including TCP, UDP, HTTP, and SOCKS5. It is suitable for accessing intranet websites, debugging payment interfaces, SSH access, and remote desktop scenarios. Its powerful web management terminal facilitates easy configuration and management, enhancing the security and accessibility of intranet resources.

metadata.name: ChatPaper
metadata.description: Use ChatGPT to summarize the arXiv papers. 全流程加速科研，利用chatgpt进行论文全文总结+专业翻译+润色+审稿+审稿回复

summary.zh: ChatPaper 是一款利用 ChatGPT 技术加速科研的工具，提供论文总结、专业翻译、润色、审稿及审稿回复等全流程服务。它旨在消除语言障碍，帮助科研人员高效获取最新知识。该工具支持本地PDF全文翻译，并通过简化操作流程，使用户能够快速掌握领域内的文献，提升科研效率。
summary.en: ChatPaper is a tool that leverages ChatGPT technology to accelerate research processes, offering comprehensive services including paper summarization, professional translation, editing, peer review, and response. It aims to eliminate language barriers, enabling researchers to efficiently access the latest knowledge. The tool supports local PDF full-text translation and simplifies workflows, allowing users to quickly grasp literature in their fields and enhance research productivity.

metadata.name: midjourney-proxy
metadata.description: 代理 MidJourney 的discord频道，实现api形式调用AI绘图

summary.zh: midjourney-proxy 是一个用于代理 MidJourney Discord 频道的工具，支持通过 API 调用 AI 绘图。其核心功能包括支持多种绘图指令、实时任务进度、中文 prompt 翻译及敏感词检测等。用户可灵活配置多账号和任务队列，适合需要高效生成图像的开发者和创意工作者。
summary.en: midjourney-proxy is a tool for proxying the MidJourney Discord channel, enabling API calls for AI-generated images. Key features include support for various drawing commands, real-time task progress, Chinese prompt translation, and sensitive word detection. Users can flexibly configure multiple accounts and task queues, making it suitable for developers and creative professionals needing efficient image generation.

metadata.name: prompts.chat
metadata.description: f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT Prompts. Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community. Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.

summary.zh: prompts.chat 是全球最大的开源 AI 提示库，旨在分享、发现和收集来自社区的提示。该库支持多种 AI 模型，包括 ChatGPT、Claude 和 Llama，用户可以自我托管以确保隐私。它提供了丰富的提示示例和交互式学习资源，适合从初学者到高级用户的不同需求，助力用户掌握提示工程的技巧。
summary.en: prompts.chat is the world's largest open-source prompt library for AI, designed to share, discover, and collect prompts from the community. It supports various AI models, including ChatGPT, Claude, and Llama, allowing users to self-host for privacy. The platform offers a wealth of prompt examples and interactive learning resources, catering to users from beginners to advanced, helping them master the art of prompt engineering.

summary.zh: searxng-docker 提供了一种快速便捷的方式，通过 Docker 在五分钟内搭建 SearXNG 实例。该项目包含 Caddy 作为反向代理，自动处理 TLS 证书，适合初学者使用。同时也支持高级用户自定义反向代理配置，灵活性高。其核心技术栈包括 Docker、Caddy 和 Valkey，适用于需要自托管搜索引擎的场景。
summary.en: searxng-docker offers a quick and convenient way to set up a SearXNG instance in five minutes using Docker. The project includes Caddy as a reverse proxy, automatically handling TLS certificates, making it suitable for beginners. It also supports advanced users with custom reverse proxy configurations, providing high flexibility. The core tech stack includes Docker, Caddy, and Valkey, ideal for self-hosted search engine needs.

metadata.name: ChatTTS_colab
metadata.description: 🚀 一键部署（含离线整合包）！基于 ChatTTS ，支持流式输出、音色抽卡、长音频生成和分角色朗读。简单易用，无需复杂安装。

summary.zh: ChatTTS_colab 是一个基于 ChatTTS 的语音合成工具，支持一键部署，流式输出、音色抽卡、长音频生成和分角色朗读等功能。用户无需复杂安装，即可在 Colab 上轻松运行，适合需要生成多样化语音内容的场景，如有声书、游戏角色配音等。
summary.en: ChatTTS_colab is a speech synthesis tool based on ChatTTS, featuring one-click deployment, streaming output, voice card selection, long audio generation, and character-based reading. Users can easily run it on Colab without complex installations, making it suitable for generating diverse voice content, such as audiobooks and game character dubbing.

metadata.name: Awesome-Dify-Workflow
metadata.description: 分享一些好用的 Dify DSL 工作流程，自用、学习两相宜。 Sharing some Dify workflows.

summary.zh: Awesome-Dify-Workflow 是一个分享和发现 Dify 工作流程的资源库，适合个人使用和学习。该项目支持多任务并行、会话变量及表单等特性，用户可免费使用大部分工作流程。通过简单的 DSL 文件，用户可以快速导入所需的工作流程，提升工作效率，适合开发者和数据科学家使用。
summary.en: Awesome-Dify-Workflow is a resource repository for sharing and discovering Dify workflows, suitable for personal use and learning. The project supports features like parallel tasks, session variables, and forms, with most workflows available for free. Users can quickly import desired workflows via simple DSL files, enhancing productivity, making it ideal for developers and data scientists.

metadata.name: lobehub
metadata.description: The ultimate space for work and life — to find, build, and collaborate with agent teammates that grow with you. We are taking agent harness to the next level — enabling multi-agent collaboration, effortless agent team design, and introducing agents as the unit of work interaction.

summary.zh: LobeHub 是一个为工作和生活提供的终极空间，旨在帮助用户寻找、构建和与成长中的代理团队成员协作。该平台通过支持多代理协作和简化代理团队设计，推动人类与代理的共同进化，成为人机协作网络的核心。其技术亮点包括代理作为工作单元、智能搜索和多用户管理等功能。
summary.en: LobeHub is the ultimate space for work and life, designed to help users find, build, and collaborate with growing agent teammates. The platform enhances multi-agent collaboration and simplifies agent team design, driving the co-evolution of humans and agents, and serving as a core of human-agent collaboration networks. Key features include agents as units of work, smart search, and multi-user management.

metadata.name: awesome-langchain
metadata.description: 😎 Awesome list of tools and projects with the awesome LangChain framework

summary.zh: Awesome LangChain 是一个精心策划的工具和项目列表，旨在帮助开发者快速实现基于 LangChain 框架的 LLM 项目。该仓库汇集了多种工具、服务和开源项目，涵盖低代码解决方案、知识管理和聊天机器人等应用场景，助力开发者在快速发展的生态系统中找到合适的资源与支持。
summary.en: Awesome LangChain is a curated list of tools and projects designed to help developers quickly implement LLM projects using the LangChain framework. This repository aggregates various tools, services, and open-source projects across low-code solutions, knowledge management, and chatbots, empowering developers to find suitable resources and support in the rapidly evolving ecosystem.

metadata.name: Sunsimiao
metadata.description: 🌿孙思邈中文医疗大模型(Sunsimiao)：提供安全、可靠、普惠的中文医疗大模型

summary.zh: 孙思邈中文医疗大模型（Sunsimiao）致力于提供安全、可靠、普惠的中文医疗服务。该模型基于高质量医疗数据进行微调，尤其擅长医学问答和考试，已在多个国家执业医师、药师和护士资格考试中取得优异成绩。项目强调民间医疗经验的积累，旨在满足中文用户的医疗需求。
summary.en: Sunsimiao, the Chinese medical model, aims to provide safe, reliable, and inclusive healthcare services. It is fine-tuned on high-quality medical data, excelling in medical Q&A and examinations, achieving excellent results in various national medical licensing tests. The project emphasizes the accumulation of folk medical experiences to meet the healthcare needs of Chinese-speaking users.

metadata.name: Kalmia
metadata.description: A documentation CMS written in go

summary.zh: Kalmia 是一个用 Go 编写的文档内容管理系统，具有网页界面，支持多版本和多用户管理，内置 Markdown 编辑器，便于文档编辑。它适用于需要高效管理文档的团队，尤其是技术文档。该项目仍在开发中，可能会有破坏性更改。
summary.en: Kalmia is a documentation CMS written in Go, featuring a web interface that supports multiple versions and users, along with a built-in Markdown editor for easy document editing. It is ideal for teams needing efficient documentation management, particularly for technical documents. The project is still in development and may have breaking changes.

metadata.name: panel
metadata.description: ⚡ AcePanel - Enterprise server operation and maintenance management panel

summary.zh: AcePanel 是一款新一代的企业服务器运维管理面板，采用 Go 语言开发，具有极低的系统占用和高效的运维能力。它支持离线运行，设计上减少对系统的修改，兼容性强，适用于快速部署小型网站和复杂应用。AcePanel 完全开源，承诺永久免费使用，适合各类企业的运维需求。
summary.en: AcePanel is a next-generation enterprise server operation and maintenance management panel developed in Go, featuring minimal system resource usage and efficient operation capabilities. It supports offline operation, minimizes system modifications, and offers strong compatibility, suitable for rapid deployment of both small websites and complex applications. Fully open-source and committed to being free forever, AcePanel caters to various enterprise maintenance needs.

metadata.name: developer2gwy
metadata.description: 公务员从入门到上岸，最佳程序员公考实践教程

summary.zh: developer2gwy 是一份开源的公务员考试实践指南，专为程序员转型为公务员而设计。项目通过分享真实的备考经历、体制内生活和职业规划，帮助用户高效准备公务员考试，理解体制工作环境。其核心价值在于结合程序员的背景，提供切实可行的学习框架和资源，适合每个普通人追求公务员梦想的路径。
summary.en: developer2gwy is an open-source practical guide for civil service examination, designed specifically for programmers transitioning to civil servants. The project shares real exam preparation experiences, insights into life within the system, and career planning to help users efficiently prepare for civil service exams and understand the work environment. Its core value lies in combining the background of programmers to provide actionable learning frameworks and resources, suitable for anyone pursuing a civil service dream.

metadata.name: WeReadScan
metadata.description: 扫描“微信读书”已购图书并下载本地PDF的爬虫

summary.zh: WeReadScan 是一个用于从“微信读书”平台扫描已购图书并将其转换为本地 PDF 或 HTML 格式的爬虫库。该项目旨在解决用户只能在应用内阅读的问题，允许用户在其他平台上进行笔记和阅读。通过使用 Selenium，用户可以轻松地获取图书内容，支持无头模式运行，适合个人学习用途。
summary.en: WeReadScan is a web scraping library designed to scan purchased books from the 'WeChat Reading' platform and convert them into local PDF or HTML formats. This project addresses the limitation of reading only within the app, enabling users to take notes and read on other platforms. Utilizing Selenium, users can easily retrieve book content, supporting headless mode operation, suitable for personal learning purposes.

metadata.name: cherry-studio
metadata.description: AI productivity studio with smart chat, autonomous agents, and 300+ assistants. Unified access to frontier LLMs

summary.zh: Cherry Studio 是一个 AI 生产力工作室，集成了智能聊天、自治代理和 300 多个助手，提供对前沿大型语言模型的统一访问。该平台旨在提升用户的工作效率，适用于各种行业的自动化任务和智能助理应用。
summary.en: Cherry Studio is an AI productivity studio that integrates smart chat, autonomous agents, and over 300 assistants, offering unified access to cutting-edge large language models. This platform aims to enhance user productivity, suitable for automation tasks and intelligent assistant applications across various industries.

metadata.name: PyQt-SiliconUI
metadata.description: A powerful and artistic UI library based on PyQt5，基于 PyQt5 的UI框架，灵动、优雅而轻便

summary.zh: PyQt-SiliconUI 是一个基于 PyQt5 的强大而艺术的 UI 库，旨在提供灵动、优雅且轻便的用户界面解决方案。该库正在积极开发中，包含多种重构的组件和小部件，适合用于快速构建现代桌面应用程序。尽管目前尚未在 PyPi 上发布，但其丰富的示例和文档为开发者提供了良好的入门体验。
summary.en: PyQt-SiliconUI is a powerful and artistic UI library based on PyQt5, designed to offer dynamic, elegant, and lightweight user interface solutions. Actively under development, it features various refactored components and widgets, making it suitable for rapidly building modern desktop applications. Although not yet available on PyPi, its extensive examples and documentation provide a solid starting point for developers.

metadata.name: owl-admin
metadata.description: 🎈 Owl Admin : 基于 laravel 和 amis 开发的后台框架, 友好的组件使用体验, 可轻松实现复杂页面, 内置代码生成器, 让开发者快速搭建后台管理系统

summary.zh: Owl Admin 是一个基于 Laravel 和 amis 开发的后台管理框架，提供友好的组件使用体验，能够快速构建复杂页面。内置代码生成器使开发者能够高效搭建后台系统，支持多模块和图形化扩展管理，适合需要快速开发和灵活配置的项目。
summary.en: Owl Admin is a backend management framework developed on Laravel and amis, offering a user-friendly component experience for quickly building complex pages. Its built-in code generator allows developers to efficiently set up backend systems, supporting multi-module and graphical extension management, making it suitable for projects requiring rapid development and flexible configuration.

metadata.name: ComfyUI_Bxb
metadata.description: SD变现宝：一键把comfyui工作流转换成小程序。

summary.zh: SD变现宝是一款创新插件，能够将ComfyUI工作流一键转换为多种小程序（如微信、抖音、快手等），并支持支付功能，适用于内容创作者和开发者。其全新源码版提供私有化部署，增强了性能和安全性，用户可完全掌控数据，支持多端覆盖，极大提升了工作流的灵活性和变现能力。
summary.en: SD Monetization Treasure is an innovative plugin that allows users to convert ComfyUI workflows into various mini-programs (such as WeChat, Douyin, Kuaishou, etc.) with one click, supporting payment functionalities, ideal for content creators and developers. The new source version offers private deployment, enhancing performance and security, allowing users complete control over their data, and supports multi-end coverage, greatly improving workflow flexibility and monetization capabilities.

metadata.name: vue-icons-plus
metadata.description: ⭐ 30+ popular icon packs with totals 50000 svg vue icons

summary.zh: Vue Icons Plus 是一个强大的图标库，提供超过 50000 个 SVG Vue 图标，支持 Vue 3 和 Vue 2.7+。该库允许开发者轻松导入和使用多种流行的图标包，适用于各种 Vue 项目，极大地丰富了用户界面设计的灵活性和美观性。其简洁的用法和广泛的图标选择，使其成为前端开发者的理想工具。
summary.en: Vue Icons Plus is a powerful icon library offering over 50,000 SVG Vue icons, supporting Vue 3 and Vue 2.7+. The library allows developers to easily import and use various popular icon packs, greatly enhancing the flexibility and aesthetics of user interface design in Vue projects. Its straightforward usage and extensive icon selection make it an ideal tool for frontend developers.

metadata.name: coai
metadata.description: 🚀 Next Generation Multi-tenant AI One-Stop Solution. Builtin Admin & Billing System. Enterprise-Grade Unified LLM Gateway Support for 200+ Models And 35+ Providers, Load Balacing w/ Priority-base Routing, Cost Management, Chat Share, Cloud Sync, Credit/Subscription Billing, All File Parsing, Web Search, Built-in Model Cache.

summary.zh: CoAI.Dev 是一个下一代多租户 AI 一站式解决方案，集成了内置的管理和计费系统，支持 200 多种模型和 35 个提供商的企业级统一 LLM 网关。其技术亮点包括负载均衡、优先路由、成本管理、聊天分享、云同步和多种文件解析功能。该平台提供丰富的用户界面设计，支持国际化和多主题切换，适用于各种设备，满足企业对 AI 服务的多样化需求。
summary.en: CoAI.Dev is a next-generation multi-tenant AI one-stop solution featuring a built-in admin and billing system, supporting over 200 models and 35 providers with enterprise-grade unified LLM gateway. Key highlights include load balancing, priority-based routing, cost management, chat sharing, cloud sync, and comprehensive file parsing capabilities. The platform offers a rich UI design, internationalization, and multi-theme support, catering to diverse enterprise AI service needs across various devices.

metadata.name: kinit
metadata.description: FastAPI + vue3 前后端分离后台管理系统，包含PC端，微信小程序端。接口使用：FastAPI+Pydantic+SQLAlchemy 2.0+Mysql，PC 端使用：Vue3+Typescript+Vite+Element Plus，小程序使用：Uni-APP + uview ui。异步存储，RBAC 权限管理，定时任务，部门管理等功能。

summary.zh: Kinit 是一款基于 FastAPI 和 Vue3 的高性能前后端分离后台管理系统，支持 PC 端和微信小程序端。其后端使用 FastAPI、Pydantic 和 SQLAlchemy 2.0，前端则采用 Vue3、TypeScript 和 Element Plus，具备异步存储、RBAC 权限管理、定时任务和部门管理等功能。该系统开箱即用，适合新项目启动和学习参考，且持续更新，关注最新技术动态。
summary.en: Kinit is a high-performance backend management system based on FastAPI and Vue3, supporting both PC and WeChat Mini Program. The backend utilizes FastAPI, Pydantic, and SQLAlchemy 2.0, while the frontend employs Vue3, TypeScript, and Element Plus. It features asynchronous storage, RBAC permission management, scheduled tasks, and department management. This system is ready to use, ideal for new project initiation and learning reference, with ongoing updates to keep up with the latest technology trends.

metadata.name: FinGPT
metadata.description: FinGPT: Open-Source Financial Large Language Models!  Revolutionize 🔥    We release the trained model on HuggingFace.

summary.zh: FinGPT是一个开源金融大语言模型项目，旨在通过先进的自然语言处理技术，推动金融领域的智能化应用。该项目由AI4Finance基金会开发，提供多种金融任务的模型，包括情感分析和市场预测，适用于金融科技、投资分析等场景。其模型已在HuggingFace上发布，支持研究人员和开发者进行进一步的探索与应用。
summary.en: FinGPT is an open-source financial large language model project aimed at advancing intelligent applications in the finance sector through cutting-edge natural language processing technology. Developed by the AI4Finance Foundation, it offers models for various financial tasks, including sentiment analysis and market forecasting, suitable for fintech and investment analysis scenarios. Its models are available on HuggingFace, supporting further exploration and application by researchers and developers.

metadata.name: uv-ui
metadata.description: uv-ui 破釜沉舟之兼容vue3+2、app、h5、小程序等多端基于uni-app和uView2.x的生态框架，支持单独导入，开箱即用，利剑出击。

summary.zh: uv-ui 是一个兼容 Vue 2 和 Vue 3 的多端 UI 框架，基于 uni-app 和 uView 2.x 生态系统构建。它支持应用、H5、小程序等多种平台，提供开箱即用的组件，极大地简化了跨平台开发的复杂性。uv-ui 还具备扩展配置功能，允许用户根据需求自定义主题和工具库，适合快速开发和灵活应用。
summary.en: uv-ui is a multi-platform UI framework compatible with both Vue 2 and Vue 3, built on the uni-app and uView 2.x ecosystem. It supports various platforms including apps, H5, and mini-programs, offering out-of-the-box components that significantly simplify cross-platform development. uv-ui also features extensible configuration, allowing users to customize themes and tool libraries based on their needs, making it suitable for rapid development and flexible applications.

metadata.name: transformers-php
metadata.description: Transformers PHP is a toolkit for PHP developers to add machine learning magic to their projects easily.

summary.zh: Transformers PHP 是一个为 PHP 开发者设计的工具包，旨在轻松将机器学习功能集成到项目中。该库与 Python 的 Transformers 库功能相当，支持文本生成、摘要、翻译等多种任务，且使用 ONNX Runtime 提供高性能模型推理。其简单易用的 API 使得 PHP 开发者能够快速上手，适合需要在 PHP 环境中应用机器学习的场景。
summary.en: Transformers PHP is a toolkit designed for PHP developers to easily integrate machine learning capabilities into their projects. This library is functionally equivalent to the Python Transformers library, supporting various tasks such as text generation, summarization, and translation, while utilizing ONNX Runtime for high-performance model inference. Its simple and user-friendly API allows PHP developers to quickly get started, making it suitable for scenarios requiring machine learning in PHP environments.

metadata.name: PHP_XLSXWriter
metadata.description: Lightweight XLSX Excel Spreadsheet Writer in PHP

summary.zh: PHP_XLSXWriter 是一个轻量级的 PHP 库，专为生成兼容 Excel 的 xlsx 格式电子表格而设计。它支持 UTF-8 输入、多工作表、货币/日期/数字单元格格式、简单公式及基本单元格样式。该库的内存使用极低，能够处理超过 100,000 行的数据，适合需要高效生成大型电子表格的应用场景。
summary.en: PHP_XLSXWriter is a lightweight PHP library designed to generate Excel-compatible spreadsheets in xlsx format. It supports UTF-8 input, multiple worksheets, currency/date/numeric cell formatting, simple formulas, and basic cell styling. With minimal memory usage, it can handle datasets exceeding 100,000 rows, making it ideal for applications requiring efficient large spreadsheet generation.

metadata.name: dcat-admin
metadata.description: 🔥 基于 Laravel 的后台系统构建工具 (Laravel Admin)，使用很少的代码快速构建一个功能完善的高颜值后台系统，内置丰富的后台常用组件，开箱即用，让开发者告别冗杂的HTML代码

summary.zh: Dcat Admin 是一个基于 Laravel 的后台系统构建工具，旨在帮助开发者快速构建高颜值的后台管理系统。它提供了丰富的组件和灵活的 API，支持用户管理、RBAC 权限管理和无刷新页面构建等功能，极大地简化了开发流程，适合需要快速上线的项目。
summary.en: Dcat Admin is a backend system construction tool based on Laravel, designed to help developers quickly build aesthetically pleasing admin systems. It offers rich components and flexible APIs, supporting user management, RBAC permission management, and AJAX page loading, significantly simplifying the development process, making it ideal for projects requiring rapid deployment.

metadata.name: laravel-plus
metadata.description: Laravel-Plus is an efficient Laravel extension package designed to enhance development productivity. It integrates powerful annotation handling and practical helper classes, making the development of Laravel applications more convenient and flexible.

summary.zh: Laravel-Plus 是一个高效的 Laravel 扩展包，旨在提升开发生产力。它集成了强大的注解处理和实用的辅助类，使 Laravel 应用的开发更加便捷灵活。通过引入 AOP 概念和 PHP 8 属性，Laravel-Plus 使得路由配置和请求处理更为高效，适合需要快速开发和自定义的项目。
summary.en: Laravel-Plus is an efficient Laravel extension package designed to enhance development productivity. It integrates powerful annotation handling and practical helper classes, making Laravel application development more convenient and flexible. By incorporating AOP concepts and PHP 8 attributes, Laravel-Plus streamlines routing configuration and request handling, ideal for projects requiring rapid development and customization.

metadata.name: certimate
metadata.description: An open-source and free self-hosted SSL certificates ACME tool, automates the full-cycle of issuance, deployment, renewal, and monitoring visually. 完全开源免费的自托管 SSL 证书 ACME 工具，申请、部署、续期、监控全流程自动化可视化，支持各大主流云厂商。

summary.zh: Certimate 是一款开源免费的自托管 SSL 证书 ACME 工具，能够自动化申请、部署、续期及监控全流程，支持多种云服务商。其特点包括零依赖、低资源占用和用户友好的可视化界面，适合需要高效管理 SSL 证书的开发者和企业。通过灵活的工作流和多种通知渠道，Certimate 提供了便捷的证书管理体验。
summary.en: Certimate is an open-source, self-hosted SSL certificate ACME tool that automates the full cycle of issuance, deployment, renewal, and monitoring. It features zero dependencies, low resource usage, and a user-friendly GUI, making it ideal for developers and businesses needing efficient SSL certificate management. With flexible workflows and multiple notification channels, Certimate offers a seamless certificate management experience.

metadata.name: get_jobs
metadata.description: 💼【AI找工作助手】全平台自动投简历脚本：(boss、前程无忧、猎聘、智联招聘)

summary.zh: Get Jobs 是一款全平台自动投递简历的 AI 助手，支持 Boss 直聘、前程无忧、猎聘和智联招聘等多个招聘平台。其主要特点包括图形化界面、AI 智能匹配、实时通知及黑名单功能，旨在提高求职者的投递效率和成功率。该项目易于配置，适合希望简化求职流程的用户。
summary.en: Get Jobs is an AI-powered job application assistant that automates resume submissions across multiple platforms, including Boss Zhipin, 51Job, Liepin, and Zhaopin. Key features include a graphical interface, AI matching, real-time notifications, and a blacklist function, aimed at enhancing the efficiency and success rate of job seekers. The project is easy to configure, making it suitable for users looking to streamline their job application process.

metadata.name: nvm-desktop
metadata.description: Node Version Manager Desktop - A desktop application to manage multiple active node.js versions.

summary.zh: nvm-desktop 是一款桌面应用程序，旨在通过可视化界面管理多个 Node.js 版本。它支持 macOS、Windows 和 Linux 系统，允许用户轻松安装、管理和切换不同的 Node.js 版本。该应用程序独立于操作系统特性，提供项目间版本隔离，确保全局依赖不会互相干扰。其智能版本检测由 Rust 编写的 nvmd-command 提供支持，具有高效性和可靠性。
summary.en: nvm-desktop is a desktop application designed to manage multiple Node.js versions through a visual interface. It supports macOS, Windows, and Linux, allowing users to easily install, manage, and switch between different Node.js versions independently of OS-specific features. The application provides project-level version isolation, ensuring global dependencies do not interfere with each other. Its smart version detection is powered by nvmd-command, a Rust-based executable, ensuring efficiency and reliability.

metadata.name: awesome-digital-human-live2d
metadata.description: Awesome Digital Human

summary.zh: 该项目致力于打造具有温度和灵魂的数字人，支持多种交互模式和模块化扩展。其核心技术包括低资源消耗的Docker部署、与多种AI服务的接入，以及支持Live2D模型的灵活控制。适用于个人应用、教育、心理咨询等场景，提供沉浸式智能对话体验，满足用户的个性化需求。
summary.en: This project aims to create digital humans with warmth and soul, supporting various interaction modes and modular extensions. Core technologies include low-resource Docker deployment, integration with multiple AI services, and flexible control of Live2D models. Suitable for personal applications, education, and psychological counseling, it offers an immersive intelligent dialogue experience to meet users' personalized needs.

metadata.name: AiPPT
metadata.description: AI 智能生成 PPT，通过主题/文件/网址等方式生成PPT，支持原生图表、动画、3D特效等复杂PPT的解析和渲染，支持用户自定义模板，支持智能添加动画，可在线体验。AI generates PowerPoint Presentation, Supports parsing and rendering of complex PPT features such as native charts, animations, and 3D effects.

summary.zh: AiPPT 是一款商用级 AI 智能生成 PPT 工具，支持通过主题、文件或网址生成演示文稿。它能够解析和渲染复杂的 PPT 特性，如原生图表、动画和 3D 特效，并允许用户自定义模板和智能添加动画。该项目提供在线体验和 PPT 转 JSON 功能，适合需要高效制作演示文稿的用户。
summary.en: AiPPT is a commercial-grade AI tool for generating PowerPoint presentations, supporting creation through themes, files, or URLs. It can parse and render complex PPT features like native charts, animations, and 3D effects, allowing for custom templates and intelligent animation addition. The project offers online experiences and PPT to JSON functionality, ideal for users needing efficient presentation creation.

metadata.name: awesome-ai-agents
metadata.description: A list of AI autonomous agents

summary.zh: 该仓库提供了一个全面的AI自主代理列表，涵盖开源和闭源项目，旨在为开发者提供多样化的AI代理解决方案。用户可以根据不同的应用场景和类别筛选产品，促进AI代理的开发与应用。项目还鼓励社区贡献，持续更新和扩展资源，助力构建智能化应用。
summary.en: This repository offers a comprehensive list of AI autonomous agents, covering both open-source and closed-source projects, aimed at providing developers with diverse AI agent solutions. Users can filter products based on various application scenarios and categories, promoting the development and application of AI agents. The project encourages community contributions for continuous updates and resource expansion, aiding in building intelligent applications.

metadata.name: BigDataView
metadata.description: 100+套大数据可视化炫酷大屏Html5模板；包含行业：社区、物业、政务、交通、金融银行等，全网最新、最多，最全、最酷、最炫大数据可视化模板。陆续更新中

summary.zh: BigDataView 提供了100多套大数据可视化模板，涵盖社区、物业、政务、交通、金融等多个行业。这些模板以 HTML5 格式呈现，设计炫酷且功能丰富，适合各类数据展示需求。项目旨在为用户提供免费的可视化资源，避免在网络上寻找时的资源不均与收费困扰，持续更新中。
summary.en: BigDataView offers over 100 sets of big data visualization templates in HTML5 format, covering various industries such as community, property management, government, transportation, and finance. These templates are designed to be visually appealing and feature-rich, catering to diverse data presentation needs. The project aims to provide free visualization resources to users, alleviating the hassle of searching for inconsistent and costly options online, with continuous updates.

metadata.name: openaiee
metadata.description: OepnaiEE 支持多个 API 服务集成，包括 OpenAI、Groq、Gemini 和 Claude，使其能够在 Vercel 和 Netlify 等平台上快速部署。

summary.zh: OepnaiEE 是一个实验性项目，旨在简化机器学习模型在多个平台上的部署。它支持与 OpenAI、Groq、Gemini 和 Claude 等多个 API 服务的集成，能够快速在 Vercel 和 Netlify 等平台上进行部署。尽管经过优化，OepnaiEE 仍需谨慎使用，用户需自行承担使用后果。
summary.en: OepnaiEE is an experimental project designed to simplify the deployment of machine learning models across multiple platforms. It supports integration with various API services, including OpenAI, Groq, Gemini, and Claude, enabling rapid deployment on platforms like Vercel and Netlify. While optimized, OepnaiEE should be used with caution, and users bear all consequences of its use.

metadata.name: openai-forward
metadata.description: 🚀  大语言模型高效转发服务  · An efficient forwarding service designed for LLMs. ·  OpenAI API Reverse Proxy

summary.zh: OpenAI-Forward 是一款高效的转发服务，专为大型语言模型设计。其核心功能包括用户请求速率控制、Token速率限制、智能预测缓存和日志管理，旨在提升模型转发的效率与便捷性。支持本地和云端语言模型的转发，具备出色的异步性能，适合需要高效API调用的应用场景。
summary.en: OpenAI-Forward is an efficient forwarding service designed for large language models. Its core features include user request rate control, token rate limiting, intelligent prediction caching, and log management, aimed at enhancing the efficiency and convenience of model forwarding. It supports both local and cloud-based language model forwarding, boasting excellent asynchronous performance, suitable for applications requiring efficient API calls.

metadata.name: frpc-desktop
metadata.description: Cross-platform desktop client for FRP, visual configuration, easily achieve intranet penetration!

summary.zh: frpc-desktop 是一款跨平台的桌面客户端，旨在简化 FRP（内网穿透）配置过程。它支持所有 FRP 版本，提供可视化配置界面，用户可以轻松实现内网穿透功能。该工具还具备自动启动、支持多用户、快速分享和配置导入导出等实用功能，适合开发者和需要内网穿透的用户使用。
summary.en: frpc-desktop is a cross-platform desktop client designed to simplify the configuration process of FRP (intranet penetration). It supports all FRP versions and provides a visual configuration interface, allowing users to easily achieve intranet penetration. The tool also features auto-start, multi-user support, quick sharing, and configuration import/export, making it suitable for developers and users needing intranet penetration.

metadata.name: SwarmUI
metadata.description: SwarmUI (formerly StableSwarmUI), A Modular Stable Diffusion Web-User-Interface, with an emphasis on making powertools easily accessible, high performance, and extensibility.

summary.zh: SwarmUI（前称StableSwarmUI）是一个模块化的AI图像生成Web用户界面，旨在提供高性能和可扩展性，方便用户使用强大的工具。它支持多种AI图像和视频模型，并计划未来扩展到音频等领域。该界面适合初学者和专业用户，提供直观的生成选项和高级工作流程，致力于推动用户体验的不断提升。
summary.en: SwarmUI (formerly StableSwarmUI) is a modular AI image generation web user interface designed for high performance and extensibility, making powerful tools easily accessible. It supports various AI image and video models, with plans for future expansion into audio and more. The interface caters to both beginners and advanced users, offering intuitive generation options and advanced workflows, focusing on enhancing user experience.

metadata.name: KillWxapkg
metadata.description: 自动化反编译微信小程序，小程序安全评估工具，发现小程序安全问题，自动解密，解包，可还原工程目录，支持Hook，小程序修改

summary.zh: KillWxapkg 是一款基于 Golang 的自动化反编译工具，专为微信小程序安全评估设计。它能够自动解密和解包小程序，恢复工程目录结构，并支持代码美化输出。该工具还提供动态调试功能，允许开发者在微信开发者工具中运行小程序，帮助发现潜在的安全问题，提升小程序的安全性和开发效率。
summary.en: KillWxapkg is an automated decompilation tool implemented in Golang, specifically designed for security assessment of WeChat Mini Programs. It automatically decrypts and unpacks mini programs, restores project directory structures, and supports code beautification. The tool also offers dynamic debugging capabilities, allowing developers to run mini programs in the WeChat Developer Tool, helping to identify potential security issues and enhancing the security and development efficiency of mini programs.

metadata.name: flux
metadata.description: Official inference repo for FLUX.1 models

summary.zh: FLUX是由Black Forest Labs开发的图像生成与编辑的推理库，提供了一系列开放权重模型，支持文本到图像的转换、图像填充和编辑等功能。该库的安装简单，并支持TensorRT加速，适合需要高效图像处理的开发者和研究人员。
summary.en: FLUX is an inference library developed by Black Forest Labs for image generation and editing, offering a suite of open-weight models that support text-to-image conversion, inpainting, and editing. The library is easy to install and supports TensorRT acceleration, making it suitable for developers and researchers needing efficient image processing.

metadata.name: Smart-AutoClicker
metadata.description: An open-source auto clicker on images for Android

summary.zh: Klick'r 是一款开源的 Android 应用，旨在通过图像检测技术自动化重复任务。它不仅提供传统的自动点击功能，还具备高级的图像识别能力，适用于游戏玩家、测试人员及任何需要自动点击的用户。用户可以通过设置触发器和配置点击、滑动参数，实现灵活的自动化操作。
summary.en: Klick'r is an open-source Android application designed to automate repetitive tasks using image detection technology. It offers traditional auto-clicking functionalities alongside advanced image recognition capabilities, making it suitable for gamers, testers, and anyone needing automated clicking. Users can achieve flexible automation by setting triggers and configuring click and swipe parameters.

metadata.name: JiwuChat
metadata.description: JiwuChat 🍂 - A lightweight cross-platform instant messaging app with integrated AI assistants (DeepSeek/Gemini/Kimi). Features real-time messaging, audio/video calls, multi-device sync, and customizable themes. Built with Vue3 & Tauri2 🍒

summary.zh: JiwuChat 是一款轻量级跨平台即时通讯应用，基于 Tauri2 和 Nuxt3 构建，集成了 AI 聊天机器人、音视频通话及 AI 购物功能。支持多端消息同步，用户可自定义主题，适合高效社交与团队协作，提供丰富的消息类型和群聊功能，助力用户实现无缝沟通。
summary.en: JiwuChat is a lightweight cross-platform instant messaging application built on Tauri2 and Nuxt3, integrating AI chatbots, audio/video calls, and AI shopping features. It supports multi-device message synchronization and customizable themes, making it suitable for efficient social interaction and team collaboration, offering a variety of message types and group chat functionalities for seamless communication.

metadata.name: Deep-Live-Cam
metadata.description: real time face swap and one-click video deepfake with only a single image

summary.zh: Deep-Live-Cam 是一款实时人脸交换和视频深度伪造软件，用户只需一张图片即可一键生成深度伪造视频。该工具适用于创作、动画角色及内容生成，同时内置的内容检查机制确保合规使用，避免处理不当媒体。其主要应用场景包括直播表演、电影观看、社交平台互动等，极大提升了用户的创作效率与趣味性。
summary.en: Deep-Live-Cam is a real-time face swap and video deepfake software that allows users to create deepfake videos with just a single image and one click. This tool is designed for content creation, character animation, and more, with built-in checks to ensure ethical use and compliance. Key applications include live performances, movie watching, and social platform interactions, significantly enhancing user creativity and engagement.

metadata.name: catch-admin
metadata.description: CatchAdmin 是一个功能强大、易于扩展的现代化 PHP 后台管理系统。它采用前后端分离架构，CatchAdmin 集成了 Token 鉴权、权限管理、动态路由、动态表格、分页封装、资源权限、上传下载、代码生成器支持一键导出导入，数据回收站，附件管理的等等一系列实用的开发功能的模块化框架。官网地址:

summary.zh: CatchAdmin 是一个现代化的 PHP 后台管理系统，采用前后端分离架构，集成了强大的权限管理、动态路由、动态表格等功能。该系统支持快速搭建企业级管理平台，适用于 CMS、CRM、OA 等多种场景。其模块化设计降低了开发复杂度，提高了可维护性，适合不同规模团队的开发需求。
summary.en: CatchAdmin is a modern PHP backend management system that adopts a front-end and back-end separation architecture, integrating powerful features like permission management, dynamic routing, and dynamic tables. This system supports rapid setup of enterprise-level management platforms, suitable for various scenarios such as CMS, CRM, and OA. Its modular design reduces development complexity and enhances maintainability, catering to development needs of teams of different sizes.

metadata.name: DH_live
metadata.description: 每个人都能用的数字人

summary.zh: DH_live是一个超轻量级的数字人对话引擎，支持在网页和移动设备上实时运行，适用于所有设备。其核心技术在于无需训练即可实现低算力推理，且网页资源包压缩至3MB，极大降低了使用门槛。该项目适合需要快速部署数字人交互的场景，如在线客服、教育培训等。
summary.en: DH_live is an ultra-lightweight digital human dialogue engine that runs in real-time on web and mobile devices, compatible with all devices. Its core technology allows for low-power inference without training, with a webpage resource package compressed to 3MB, significantly lowering the barrier to use. This project is suitable for scenarios requiring rapid deployment of digital human interactions, such as online customer service and educational training.

metadata.name: EDTalk
metadata.description: [ECCV 2024 Oral] EDTalk - Official PyTorch Implementation

summary.zh: EDTalk 是一个高效的情感对话头合成框架，旨在实现面部动作的解耦控制。该框架通过轻量级模块将面部动态分解为嘴形、头部姿态和情感表达三个独立的潜在空间，支持视频和音频输入的个性化操控。EDTalk 的创新之处在于其高效的训练策略和模块设计，能够在不依赖外部知识的情况下实现独立性和快速训练，适用于娱乐和应用场景。
summary.en: EDTalk is an efficient framework for emotional talking head synthesis, aiming to achieve disentangled control over facial motions. The framework decomposes facial dynamics into three independent latent spaces—mouth shape, head pose, and emotional expression—using lightweight modules, enabling personalized manipulation based on video and audio inputs. The innovation of EDTalk lies in its efficient training strategy and module design, ensuring independence and rapid training without relying on external knowledge, suitable for entertainment and application scenarios.

metadata.name: facechain
metadata.description: FaceChain is a deep-learning toolchain for generating your Digital-Twin.

summary.zh: FaceChain 是一个创新的深度学习工具链，专注于生成保留身份特征的人物肖像。最新版本的 FaceChain FACT 仅需一张照片和 10 秒钟即可生成多种风格的个人肖像，具备高可控性和真实性。该工具兼容 ControlNet 和 LoRAs，支持文本到图像的生成和修补，用户可以通过 Python 脚本或 Gradio 界面轻松使用。
summary.en: FaceChain is an innovative deep-learning toolchain focused on generating identity-preserved human portraits. The latest FaceChain FACT version allows users to generate personal portraits in multiple styles with just one photo in 10 seconds, offering high controllability and authenticity. This tool is compatible with ControlNet and LoRAs, supporting text-to-image generation and inpainting, and can be easily accessed via Python scripts or the Gradio interface.

metadata.name: mattermost
metadata.description: Mattermost is an open source platform for secure collaboration across the entire software development lifecycle..

summary.zh: Mattermost 是一个开源的自托管协作平台，支持软件开发生命周期中的安全协作。它集成了聊天、工作流自动化、语音通话、屏幕共享和 AI 功能，采用 Go 和 React 开发，运行于单一的 Linux 二进制文件上，并依赖 PostgreSQL 数据库。Mattermost 适用于 DevSecOps、事件解决和 IT 服务台等场景，提供灵活的部署选项，支持本地和云端使用。
summary.en: Mattermost is an open-source, self-hosted collaboration platform designed for secure collaboration throughout the software development lifecycle. It integrates chat, workflow automation, voice calling, screen sharing, and AI capabilities. Built with Go and React, it runs as a single Linux binary and relies on PostgreSQL. Mattermost is suitable for use cases like DevSecOps, incident resolution, and IT service desks, offering flexible deployment options for both on-premises and cloud environments.

metadata.name: QAnything
metadata.description: Question and Answer based on Anything.

summary.zh: QAnything 是一个基于问答的系统，旨在提供灵活的问答服务。它的核心价值在于支持多种数据源的解析和处理，适用于教育、客服等领域。技术亮点包括统一的 Docker 版本和 Python 版本，用户只需一行命令即可快速启动，极大提升了可用性和资源消耗效率。
summary.en: QAnything is a question-and-answer system designed to provide flexible Q&A services. Its core value lies in supporting the parsing and processing of various data sources, making it suitable for education, customer service, and more. Key features include a unified Docker and Python version, allowing users to quickly start with a single command, significantly enhancing usability and resource efficiency.

metadata.name: BianQue
metadata.description: 中文医疗对话模型扁鹊(BianQue)

summary.zh: 扁鹊（BianQue）是一个基于主动健康理念的中文医疗对话模型，旨在通过千万级健康对话数据的微调，提升模型在慢性病和心理咨询领域的应用能力。该项目的核心特征包括多轮问询能力和个性化建议，适用于医疗健康咨询、心理辅导等场景，助力学术界在主动健康研究中的进展。
summary.en: BianQue is a Chinese medical dialogue model based on proactive health principles, designed to enhance its application in chronic disease and psychological counseling through fine-tuning on millions of health dialogue data. Key features include multi-turn questioning ability and personalized suggestions, making it suitable for medical health consultations and psychological support, aiding academic progress in proactive health research.

metadata.name: LlamaFactory
metadata.description: Unified Efficient Fine-Tuning of 100+ LLMs & VLMs (ACL 2024)

summary.zh: LLaMA Factory 是一个高效的统一微调平台，支持 100 多种大型语言模型和视觉语言模型。用户可以通过零代码的命令行界面和网页用户界面轻松进行模型微调，适用于各种应用场景，如自然语言处理和计算机视觉。其技术亮点在于简化了微调流程，并提供了强大的可扩展性，适合研究人员和开发者使用。
summary.en: LLaMA Factory is an efficient unified fine-tuning platform that supports over 100 large language models and vision-language models. Users can easily fine-tune models through a zero-code CLI and web UI, suitable for various applications such as natural language processing and computer vision. Its technical highlights include simplifying the fine-tuning process and providing robust scalability, making it ideal for researchers and developers.

metadata.name: hallo
metadata.description: Hallo: Hierarchical Audio-Driven Visual Synthesis for Portrait Image Animation

summary.zh: Hallo是一个层次化的音频驱动视觉合成工具，专注于肖像图像动画。该项目结合了音频输入与先进的视觉合成技术，能够生成动态肖像动画，适用于影视制作、游戏开发及社交媒体内容创作等场景。其技术亮点在于高效的合成算法和对音频信号的精准解析，提升了动画的真实感和互动性。
summary.en: Hallo is a hierarchical audio-driven visual synthesis tool focused on portrait image animation. This project combines audio input with advanced visual synthesis techniques to generate dynamic portrait animations, applicable in film production, game development, and social media content creation. Its technical highlights include efficient synthesis algorithms and precise audio signal analysis, enhancing the realism and interactivity of animations.

metadata.name: litellm
metadata.description: Python SDK, Proxy Server (AI Gateway) to call 100+ LLM APIs in OpenAI (or native) format, with cost tracking, guardrails, loadbalancing and logging. [Bedrock, Azure, OpenAI, VertexAI, Cohere, Anthropic, Sagemaker, HuggingFace, VLLM, NVIDIA NIM]

summary.zh: LiteLLM 是一个功能强大的 Python SDK 和代理服务器，支持调用 100 多个大型语言模型（LLM）API，兼容 OpenAI 格式。它提供了成本追踪、负载均衡和日志记录等功能，适用于需要多种 LLM 接口的应用场景，如聊天机器人和智能助手。通过简单的 API 调用，用户可以轻松集成不同的 LLM 服务，提升开发效率。
summary.en: LiteLLM is a powerful Python SDK and proxy server that supports calling over 100 large language model (LLM) APIs in OpenAI format. It features cost tracking, load balancing, and logging, making it suitable for applications requiring multiple LLM interfaces, such as chatbots and intelligent assistants. Users can easily integrate various LLM services through simple API calls, enhancing development efficiency.

metadata.name: Kolors
metadata.description: Kolors Team

summary.zh: Kolors 是一个高效的扩散模型，专注于逼真的文本到图像合成。该项目通过训练数十亿对文本和图像，支持中英文双语输入，能够生成高质量的图像。应用场景包括虚拟试穿、角色生成等，技术亮点在于其强大的上下文处理能力和多种模型支持，适合开发者和研究人员使用。
summary.en: Kolors is an efficient diffusion model focused on photorealistic text-to-image synthesis. This project trains on billions of text-image pairs, supporting bilingual input in Chinese and English, enabling high-quality image generation. Application scenarios include virtual try-on and character generation, with technical highlights in its robust context handling and support for various models, making it suitable for developers and researchers.

metadata.name: CosyVoice
metadata.description: Multi-lingual large voice generation model, providing inference, training and deployment full-stack ability.

summary.zh: CosyVoice 是一款多语言大型语音生成模型，具备推理、训练和部署的全栈能力。其最新版本 Fun-CosyVoice 3.0 在内容一致性、说话人相似性和自然性方面超越前代，支持9种语言及18种方言的零-shot语音合成，适用于多种应用场景，如语音助手、教育和娱乐等。该模型还具备发音修复、文本规范化和低延迟流式处理等技术亮点。
summary.en: CosyVoice is a multilingual large voice generation model offering full-stack capabilities for inference, training, and deployment. The latest version, Fun-CosyVoice 3.0, surpasses its predecessor in content consistency, speaker similarity, and naturalness, supporting zero-shot speech synthesis in 9 languages and 18 dialects. It is suitable for various applications such as voice assistants, education, and entertainment, featuring pronunciation inpainting, text normalization, and low-latency streaming.

metadata.name: cosyvoice-api
metadata.description: 一个用于CosyVoice的api接口项目

summary.zh: CosyVoice API 是一个为 CosyVoice2 提供的接口项目，支持多种语言的文本转语音功能。用户可以通过简单的 HTTP 请求，将文本合成为语音，支持音色克隆和多语言合成，适用于语音助手、教育应用和娱乐等场景。其技术亮点在于兼容 OpenAI TTS，并提供灵活的参数设置，满足不同用户需求。
summary.en: The CosyVoice API is an interface project for CosyVoice2, enabling text-to-speech functionality in multiple languages. Users can easily convert text into speech through simple HTTP requests, supporting voice cloning and multilingual synthesis, suitable for voice assistants, educational applications, and entertainment. Its technical highlights include compatibility with OpenAI TTS and flexible parameter settings to meet diverse user needs.

metadata.name: exo
metadata.description: Run frontier AI locally.

summary.zh: exo 是一个前沿 AI 本地运行解决方案，能够将多个设备连接成一个 AI 集群，支持大模型的高效运行。其核心技术包括自动设备发现、Thunderbolt 5 的 RDMA 支持和拓扑感知的自动并行处理，显著降低延迟并提升计算速度。适用于需要高性能计算的 AI 应用场景，如深度学习和模型推理。
summary.en: exo is a frontier AI solution for running models locally by connecting multiple devices into an AI cluster. Key features include automatic device discovery, RDMA support over Thunderbolt 5, and topology-aware auto parallelism, significantly reducing latency and enhancing computational speed. It is ideal for high-performance computing in AI applications such as deep learning and model inference.

metadata.name: MARS5-TTS
metadata.description: MARS5 speech model (TTS) from CAMB.AI

summary.zh: MARS5是CAMB.AI推出的一种新型语音合成模型，采用独特的两阶段自回归-非自回归架构，能够在仅有5秒音频和文本片段的情况下生成高质量的语音。该模型特别适用于需要复杂语调的场景，如体育解说和动漫配音，支持通过文本中的标点和大小写来引导语音的自然表达，提升了合成语音的自然度和表现力。
summary.en: MARS5 is a novel speech synthesis model from CAMB.AI, utilizing a unique two-stage AR-NAR architecture to generate high-quality speech from just 5 seconds of audio and a text snippet. It excels in scenarios requiring complex prosody, such as sports commentary and anime dubbing, allowing users to guide the naturalness of the output through punctuation and capitalization in the text, enhancing the expressiveness of the synthesized speech.

metadata.name: LivePortrait
metadata.description: Bring portraits to life!

summary.zh: LivePortrait 是一款高效的肖像动画工具，支持肖像的拼接与重定向控制，广泛应用于短视频平台如快手、抖音等。该项目通过先进的深度学习技术，能够将静态肖像生动化，提升用户的创作体验。其技术亮点在于高效的动画生成和多样化的应用场景，适合个人创作者和企业使用。
summary.en: LivePortrait is an efficient portrait animation tool that supports stitching and retargeting control, widely used in short video platforms like Kuaishou and Douyin. Leveraging advanced deep learning techniques, it brings static portraits to life, enhancing the creative experience for users. Its key features include efficient animation generation and diverse application scenarios, suitable for both individual creators and enterprises.

metadata.name: lemon-cleaner
metadata.description: 腾讯柠檬清理是针对macOS系统专属制定的清理工具。主要功能包括重复文件和相似照片的识别、软件的定制化垃圾扫描、可视化的全盘空间分析、内存释放、浏览器隐私清理以及设备实时状态的监控等。重点聚焦清理功能，对上百款软件提供定制化的清理方案，提供专业的清理建议，帮助用户轻松完成一键式清理。

summary.zh: 腾讯柠檬清理是一款专为macOS设计的清理工具，提供重复文件和相似照片识别、定制化垃圾扫描、全盘空间分析等功能。它聚焦于用户的清理需求，支持多种应用的深度定制清理方案，帮助用户高效管理存储空间和隐私，简化清理过程，是Mac用户的实用选择。
summary.en: Tencent Lemon Cleaner is a macOS-specific cleaning tool that offers duplicate file and similar photo recognition, customized junk scanning, and comprehensive disk space analysis. It focuses on users' cleaning needs, providing tailored cleaning solutions for various applications, helping users efficiently manage storage space and privacy, making it a practical choice for Mac users.

metadata.name: proxypin
metadata.description: Open source free capture HTTP(S) traffic  software ProxyPin, supporting full platform systems

summary.zh: ProxyPin 是一款开源的 HTTP(S) 流量捕获软件，支持 Windows、Mac、Android、iOS 和 Linux 等全平台系统。它允许用户拦截、检查和重写 HTTP(S) 流量，特别适合捕获 Flutter 应用的流量。其主要特点包括移动扫码连接、域名过滤、请求重写、请求解密和历史记录保存等，界面美观且易于使用。
summary.en: ProxyPin is an open-source HTTP(S) traffic capture software that supports full platform systems including Windows, Mac, Android, iOS, and Linux. It allows users to intercept, inspect, and rewrite HTTP(S) traffic, particularly suitable for capturing Flutter app traffic. Key features include mobile scan code connection, domain filtering, request rewriting, request decryption, and history saving, all with a beautiful and user-friendly interface.

metadata.name: Easy-Wav2Lip
metadata.description: Colab for making Wav2Lip high quality and easy to use

summary.zh: Easy-Wav2Lip 是一个优化版的 Wav2Lip 工具，旨在简化视频口型同步的过程。通过 Google Colab，用户可以快速设置并执行，显著缩短处理时间，从原来的近 7 分钟减少到不足 1 分钟。该工具还修复了口部的视觉缺陷，并提供多种质量选项，适用于不同需求的用户，提升了生成视频的整体效果。
summary.en: Easy-Wav2Lip is an optimized version of the Wav2Lip tool designed to simplify the process of video lipsyncing. By utilizing Google Colab, users can quickly set up and execute tasks, significantly reducing processing time from nearly 7 minutes to under 1 minute. The tool also fixes visual bugs around the lips and offers multiple quality options, catering to various user needs and enhancing the overall output of generated videos.

metadata.name: MineAdmin
metadata.description: 🎉🎉🎉 MineAdmin是基于Hyperf框架 和 Vue3+Vite5 开发的前后端分离权限管理系统，自适应多终端。特色：后端 crud 生成 + 前端低代码 json 化配置

summary.zh: MineAdmin是一个基于Hyperf框架和Vue3+Vite5构建的前后端分离权限管理系统，适用于网站管理、CMS、CRM等多种场景。其核心优势在于后端CRUD自动生成和前端低代码JSON配置，支持多终端自适应，具备用户、角色、菜单等多种管理功能，适合创业公司及个人使用。
summary.en: MineAdmin is a front-end and back-end separated permission management system developed based on the Hyperf framework and Vue3+Vite5, suitable for various scenarios such as website management, CMS, and CRM. Its core advantages include automatic CRUD generation on the backend and low-code JSON configuration on the frontend, supporting multi-terminal adaptation and offering various management features like user, role, and menu management, making it ideal for startups and individuals.

summary.zh: ChatTTS-Enhanced 是一款音质增强工具，旨在解决 Chat-TTS 生成音频时的噪音问题。该项目支持批量处理多种文本格式，能够处理长文本并支持中英混读。用户可以自定义音频参数，如语速和停顿，并导出 SRT 文件。该工具适用于 Windows 和 Mac，提供便捷的离线一键整合包，方便用户快速部署和使用。
summary.en: ChatTTS-Enhanced is an audio enhancement tool designed to address noise issues in Chat-TTS generated audio. The project supports batch processing of multiple text formats, handles long texts, and allows for mixed Chinese and English reading. Users can customize audio parameters such as speed and pauses, and export SRT files. It is compatible with Windows and Mac, offering a convenient offline integration package for quick deployment and use.

metadata.name: wechat-windows-versions
metadata.description: 保存微信历史版本

summary.zh: 该项目收集并保存 Windows 微信 3.x 及以前版本，利用 GitHub Action 自动下载最新安装包并计算 Hash 值，确保版本的完整性与可追溯性。适用于需要特定旧版本微信的用户和开发者，提供了便捷的访问与管理历史版本的解决方案。
summary.en: This project collects and preserves Windows WeChat versions 3.x and earlier, utilizing GitHub Actions to automatically download the latest installation packages and compute their hash values, ensuring version integrity and traceability. It serves users and developers needing specific legacy versions of WeChat, offering a convenient solution for accessing and managing historical versions.

metadata.name: LiveTalking
metadata.description: Real time interactive streaming digital human

summary.zh: LiveTalking 是一款实时交互流式数字人解决方案，支持多种数字人模型和声音克隆，能够实现音视频同步对话。其主要应用场景包括在线教育、虚拟客服和娱乐互动等。技术亮点在于支持 WebRTC 和虚拟摄像头输出，具备多并发处理能力，能够为用户提供个性化的数字人形象。
summary.en: LiveTalking is a real-time interactive streaming digital human solution that supports various digital human models and voice cloning, enabling synchronized audio and video conversations. Its primary application scenarios include online education, virtual customer service, and entertainment interactions. Key features include support for WebRTC and virtual camera output, as well as multi-concurrent processing capabilities, allowing for personalized digital human avatars.

summary.zh: seed-tts-eval 仓库提供了一个用于评估零样本语音生成能力的客观测试集，包含来自公共语料库的样本，旨在测量模型在不同客观指标上的表现。该测试集使用了 Common Voice 和 DiDiSpeech-2 数据集的样本，并采用字错误率（WER）和说话人相似度（SIM）作为评估指标，支持中英文的语音合成与转换任务。
summary.en: The seed-tts-eval repository offers an objective test set for evaluating the zero-shot speech generation capability, featuring samples from public corpora to measure model performance across various metrics. It utilizes samples from the Common Voice and DiDiSpeech-2 datasets, employing word error rate (WER) and speaker similarity (SIM) as evaluation metrics, supporting both English and Mandarin speech synthesis and conversion tasks.

metadata.name: ER-NeRF
metadata.description: [ICCV'23] Efficient Region-Aware Neural Radiance Fields for High-Fidelity Talking Portrait Synthesis

summary.zh: 本项目实现了高效的区域感知神经辐射场（ER-NeRF），用于高保真度的动态人像合成。通过区域感知技术，该方法能够在保持高质量的同时，显著提高合成效率，适用于虚拟现实、动画制作和社交媒体等领域。其技术亮点在于对人脸解析和3DMM模型的有效结合，确保了合成过程中的细节保留与自然表现。
summary.en: This project implements Efficient Region-Aware Neural Radiance Fields (ER-NeRF) for high-fidelity talking portrait synthesis. By leveraging region-aware techniques, it significantly enhances synthesis efficiency while maintaining high quality, making it suitable for applications in virtual reality, animation production, and social media. Key highlights include effective integration of face parsing and 3DMM models, ensuring detail retention and natural expression during synthesis.

metadata.name: Vach
metadata.description: Real time streaming talking head

summary.zh: Vach 是一款实时流式数字人技术，能够实现音视频同步对话，适用于在线教育、虚拟客服等场景。其核心功能包括文本和语音交互，支持 SyncTalk 项目，具备商用潜力。项目基于 PyTorch 和 CUDA，提供预训练模型，用户可自定义训练模型，方便快速部署和使用。
summary.en: Vach is a real-time streaming talking head technology that enables synchronized audio and video conversations, suitable for online education and virtual customer service. Its core features include text and voice interaction, support for the SyncTalk project, and commercial potential. The project is based on PyTorch and CUDA, providing pre-trained models and allowing users to customize their own training models for easy deployment and use.

metadata.name: RWKV-LM
metadata.description: RWKV (pronounced RwaKuv) is an RNN with great LLM performance, which can also be directly trained like a GPT transformer (parallelizable). We are at RWKV-7 "Goose". So it's combining the best of RNN and transformer - great performance, linear time, constant space (no kv-cache), fast training, infinite ctx_len, and free sentence embedding.

summary.zh: RWKV是一种具有出色大语言模型性能的RNN，结合了RNN和Transformer的优点，具备线性时间和常量空间的特性，适合大语言模型和多模态应用。RWKV-7 'Goose'支持快速训练和无限上下文长度，且无需kv-cache，提供了高效的推理能力。该项目完全免费，适合开发者和研究者进行模型升级和应用开发。
summary.en: RWKV is an RNN with exceptional performance in large language models, combining the strengths of RNNs and Transformers with linear time and constant space characteristics, making it suitable for LLM and multimodal applications. RWKV-7 'Goose' supports fast training and infinite context length without kv-cache, offering efficient inference capabilities. The project is completely free, ideal for developers and researchers looking to upgrade models and develop applications.

metadata.name: ultralytics
metadata.description: Ultralytics YOLO 🚀

summary.zh: Ultralytics YOLO 是一个基于计算机视觉和人工智能研究的先进目标检测模型，具备快速、准确和易用的特点。该项目支持多种任务，包括目标检测、跟踪、实例分割、图像分类和姿态估计，适用于各种应用场景。Ultralytics 不断更新模型以提升性能和灵活性，提供详细文档和社区支持，帮助用户快速上手和解决问题。
summary.en: Ultralytics YOLO is an advanced object detection model built on foundational research in computer vision and AI, known for its speed, accuracy, and ease of use. The project supports various tasks, including object detection, tracking, instance segmentation, image classification, and pose estimation, making it suitable for diverse applications. Ultralytics continuously updates its models for performance and flexibility, offering comprehensive documentation and community support for quick onboarding and troubleshooting.

metadata.name: latentbox
metadata.description: A collection of awesome-lists for AI, creativity and art. AI、创意和艺术领域的精选合集。https://latentbox.com

summary.zh: Latent Box 是一个专注于人工智能、创意和艺术领域的精选资源聚合平台，旨在通过高质量内容缩小信息差距，促进多元化和跨学科合作。该项目鼓励社区共同创作，用户可以通过 GitHub 提交内容和建议，确保资源的持续更新与优化。
summary.en: Latent Box is a curated resource platform focused on AI, creativity, and art, aimed at bridging the information gap with high-quality content and promoting diversity and interdisciplinary collaboration. The project encourages community co-creation, allowing users to submit content and suggestions via GitHub, ensuring continuous updates and optimization of resources.

metadata.name: dddd_trainer
metadata.description: ddddocr训练工具

summary.zh: dddd_trainer是一个基于Pytorch的OCR训练工具，专为NVIDIA显卡用户设计，支持CNN和CRNN模型训练。该工具提供断点恢复、自动导出ONNX模型及与ddddocr和ocr_api_server的无缝集成，适用于Windows和Linux环境。项目即将更新，新增可视化训练和训练策略，极大提升了OCR模型训练的便捷性和灵活性。
summary.en: dddd_trainer is an OCR training tool based on Pytorch, specifically designed for NVIDIA GPU users, supporting CNN and CRNN model training. It offers features like checkpoint recovery, automatic ONNX model export, and seamless integration with ddddocr and ocr_api_server, suitable for Windows and Linux environments. The project is set for an update, introducing visual training and new training strategies, greatly enhancing the convenience and flexibility of OCR model training.

metadata.name: TTSlist
metadata.description: 10000 chatTTS voices ！chatTTS 音色库，再也不为音色抽卡烦恼啦。这是我第一个项目，熬夜龟速生产10000条音色并上传Github，给点鼓励呗哈！主域名：https://www.TTSlist.com  备用：http://ttslist.aiqbh.com/

summary.zh: TTSlist 是一个包含 10000 种中文音色的音色库，旨在解决用户在 chatTTS 中音色选择的烦恼。用户可以在线挑选音色并通过简单的编号参数生成所需音频。该项目由康康开发，致力于为 AI 语音合成提供丰富的音色选择，适合开发者和爱好者使用。
summary.en: TTSlist is a voice library featuring 10,000 Chinese tones, designed to alleviate the hassle of selecting voices in chatTTS. Users can easily choose voices online and generate audio using simple numeric parameters. Developed by Kang Kang, this project aims to provide a rich selection of tones for AI voice synthesis, making it suitable for developers and enthusiasts.

metadata.name: fish-speech
metadata.description: SOTA Open Source TTS

summary.zh: Fish Speech 是一个开源的文本转语音（TTS）和语音克隆模型，旨在生成自然、真实且富有情感的语音。该模型关注人类的真实发声方式，具有情感、变化和意图，避免了机械化的语音输出。FishAudio-S1 是该系列的首个模型，提供显著的质量和性能提升，适用于需要高质量语音合成的应用场景，如虚拟助手、游戏和教育等。
summary.en: Fish Speech is an open-source text-to-speech (TTS) and voice cloning model designed to generate natural, realistic, and emotionally rich speech. It focuses on how humans actually speak, incorporating emotion, variation, and intent, avoiding robotic outputs. FishAudio-S1 is the first model in this series, offering significant improvements in quality and performance, suitable for applications requiring high-quality speech synthesis, such as virtual assistants, gaming, and education.

metadata.name: Speech-AI-Forge
metadata.description: 🍦 Speech-AI-Forge is a project developed around TTS generation model, implementing an API Server and a Gradio-based WebUI.

summary.zh: Speech-AI-Forge 是一个基于 TTS 生成模型的项目，提供 API 服务器和 Gradio WebUI，支持多种音色和风格的文本转语音功能。用户可以通过本地部署、Docker 或 Colab 体验该项目，适合需要高质量语音合成的应用场景，如语音助手、教育和娱乐等。其技术亮点包括音色切换、自定义音色上传及长文本处理等。
summary.en: Speech-AI-Forge is a project centered around TTS generation models, offering an API server and a Gradio-based WebUI. It supports various voice tones and styles for text-to-speech functionalities. Users can experience the project through local deployment, Docker, or Colab, making it suitable for high-quality speech synthesis applications like voice assistants, education, and entertainment. Key features include voice switching, custom voice uploads, and long text processing.

metadata.name: mi-gpt
metadata.description: 🏠 将小爱音箱接入 ChatGPT 和豆包，改造成你的专属语音助手。

summary.zh: MiGPT 是一款将小爱音箱与 ChatGPT 结合的智能家居助手，通过 AI 问答、角色扮演和流式响应等功能，提升用户体验。它支持自定义 TTS 和长短期记忆，让设备更懂用户的需求，打造温馨的智能家居环境。适合希望将智能家居升级为更智能、互动的用户。
summary.en: MiGPT is an intelligent home assistant that integrates Xiao Ai speaker with ChatGPT, enhancing user experience through features like AI Q&A, role-playing, and streaming responses. It supports custom TTS and long-term memory, allowing devices to better understand user needs and creating a warm smart home environment. Ideal for users looking to upgrade their smart home to be more intelligent and interactive.

metadata.name: Easy-Voice-Toolkit
metadata.description: A user-friendly toolkit for voice recgonition/transcription/conversion etc. | 简单易用的语音工具箱

summary.zh: Easy Voice Toolkit 是一个用户友好的音频工具包，专注于语音识别、语音转录和语音转换等功能。该工具包基于开源语音项目，提供多种自动化音频处理工具，用户可以根据需求选择或组合使用，逐步将原始音频文件转化为理想的语音模型。适用于学术交流与学习，非商业用途。
summary.en: Easy Voice Toolkit is a user-friendly audio toolkit focused on voice recognition, transcription, and conversion. Based on open-source voice projects, it offers various automated audio processing tools that users can selectively use or combine to gradually transform raw audio files into ideal speech models. It is intended for academic exchange and learning purposes, not for commercial use.

metadata.name: Awesome-ChatTTS
metadata.description: 官方推荐的 ChatTTS 资源汇总项目，整理了全网相关资源和常见问题 || Officially recommended ChatTTS resource collection project

summary.zh: Awesome-ChatTTS 是一个官方推荐的资源汇总项目，旨在为用户提供全面的 ChatTTS 相关资料和常见问题解答。该项目涵盖了多种功能增强和扩展，支持音色控制、文本处理和情感调节，适合开发者和用户快速上手和深入使用 ChatTTS。通过丰富的社区资源，用户能够更好地体验和应用文本转语音技术。
summary.en: Awesome-ChatTTS is an officially recommended resource collection project designed to provide users with comprehensive materials and FAQs related to ChatTTS. The project includes various feature enhancements and extensions, supporting timbre control, text processing, and emotional modulation, making it suitable for developers and users to quickly get started and delve into ChatTTS. With abundant community resources, users can better experience and apply text-to-speech technology.

metadata.name: awesome-instruction-dataset
metadata.description: A collection of open-source dataset to train instruction-following LLMs (ChatGPT,LLaMA,Alpaca)

summary.zh: 该仓库汇集了多种开源数据集，旨在训练遵循指令的语言模型（LLMs），如ChatGPT和LLaMA。它提供了视觉和文本指令调优数据集，以及人类反馈强化学习（RLHF）数据集，帮助研究人员和开发者更高效地获取和利用这些资源，推动智能对话系统的发展。
summary.en: This repository aggregates various open-source datasets designed for training instruction-following language models (LLMs) like ChatGPT and LLaMA. It offers visual and text instruction tuning datasets, along with Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) datasets, facilitating researchers and developers in efficiently accessing and utilizing these resources to advance intelligent dialogue systems.

metadata.name: ChatTTS
metadata.description: A generative speech model for daily dialogue.

summary.zh: ChatTTS 是一个专为日常对话场景设计的生成性语音模型，支持英语和中文，能够实现自然流畅的语音合成。其技术亮点包括对话式 TTS、多说话者支持、细粒度的韵律控制（如笑声和停顿）以及优于大多数开源 TTS 模型的韵律表现。该模型经过超过 10 万小时的音频数据训练，适用于学术研究和开发。
summary.en: ChatTTS is a generative speech model specifically designed for daily dialogue scenarios, supporting English and Chinese, enabling natural and expressive speech synthesis. Key highlights include conversational TTS, multi-speaker support, fine-grained prosodic control (like laughter and pauses), and superior prosody compared to most open-source TTS models. The model is trained on over 100,000 hours of audio data, intended for academic research and development.

metadata.name: one-api
metadata.description: LLM API 管理 & 分发系统，支持 OpenAI、Azure、Anthropic Claude、Google Gemini、DeepSeek、字节豆包、ChatGLM、文心一言、讯飞星火、通义千问、360 智脑、腾讯混元等主流模型，统一 API 适配，可用于 key 管理与二次分发。单可执行文件，提供 Docker 镜像，一键部署，开箱即用。LLM API management & key redistribution system, unifying multiple providers under a single API. Single binary, Docker-ready, with an English UI.

summary.zh: One API 是一款 LLM API 管理与分发系统，支持多种主流大模型，如 OpenAI、Azure、Google Gemini 等，提供统一的 API 接口，便于进行密钥管理和二次分发。该系统以单一可执行文件形式提供，支持 Docker 部署，用户可快速上手，适合需要集成多种 AI 模型的开发者和企业。
summary.en: One API is a management and distribution system for LLM APIs, supporting various mainstream models such as OpenAI, Azure, and Google Gemini. It offers a unified API interface for key management and redistribution. The system is available as a single executable file and supports Docker deployment, making it easy for developers and enterprises to integrate multiple AI models.

metadata.name: ChatLYT_wechatbot
metadata.description: 无需网页微信，基于图像识别的ai自动回复，可使用gpt4

summary.zh: ChatLYT是一个基于图像识别的微信AI自动回复机器人，无需网页版微信即可使用。它支持GPT-4模型，能够处理文字、图片和语音消息，并具备拟人化回复功能，适合个人用户进行高效沟通。该项目不断更新，优化了代码逻辑和用户界面，提升了用户体验。
summary.en: ChatLYT is an AI auto-reply bot for WeChat that operates without the web version. Utilizing image recognition, it supports the GPT-4 model and can handle text, images, and voice messages. With human-like response capabilities, it is ideal for personal users seeking efficient communication. The project is continuously updated to enhance code logic and user interface.

metadata.name: univer
metadata.description: Build AI-native spreadsheets. Univer is a full-stack framework for creating and editing spreadsheets on both web and server. With Univer Platform, Univer Spreadsheets is driven directly through natural language.

summary.zh: Univer是一个全栈框架，旨在构建和编辑AI原生电子表格，支持在Web和服务器上运行。它通过自然语言驱动电子表格，具备高性能、可扩展性和易嵌入性，适合各种应用场景。Univer提供丰富的功能，包括公式支持、条件格式、数据验证和协作编辑，且具有强大的插件架构，方便开发者根据需求进行定制。
summary.en: Univer is a full-stack framework designed for building and editing AI-native spreadsheets, operating seamlessly on both web and server environments. It leverages natural language to drive spreadsheets, offering high performance, extensibility, and easy embedding for various applications. With features like formula support, conditional formatting, data validation, and collaborative editing, Univer also boasts a powerful plugin architecture for developers to customize according to their needs.

metadata.name: MusicGPT
metadata.description: Generate music based on natural language prompts using LLMs running locally

summary.zh: MusicGPT 是一款基于自然语言提示生成音乐的应用，支持在本地高效运行最新的音乐生成 AI 模型。当前支持 Meta 的 MusicGen，未来将扩展至更多模型。用户可通过简单的命令行或图形界面交互，生成多样化的音乐样本，适用于音乐创作、游戏开发等场景，且无需安装繁重的依赖。该项目致力于提供便捷的音乐生成体验。
summary.en: MusicGPT is an application that generates music based on natural language prompts, allowing efficient local execution of the latest AI music generation models. Currently supporting Meta's MusicGen, it plans to expand to more models in the future. Users can interact through a simple command line or graphical interface to generate diverse music samples, suitable for music creation, game development, and more, without the need for heavy dependencies. The project aims to provide a convenient music generation experience.

metadata.name: CopilotKit
metadata.description: The Frontend Stack for Agents & Generative UI. React + Angular.  Makers of the AG-UI Protocol

summary.zh: CopilotKit 是一个高效的 SDK，专为构建全栈智能应用、生成式用户界面和聊天应用而设计。它支持实时共享状态、动态生成 UI 组件以及人机交互工作流，适用于需要智能代理和用户交互的场景。该项目已被多家知名企业采纳，展现了其在现代应用开发中的核心价值。
summary.en: CopilotKit is an efficient SDK designed for building full-stack agentic applications, generative UIs, and chat applications. It supports real-time shared state, dynamic UI component generation, and human-in-the-loop workflows, making it suitable for scenarios requiring intelligent agents and user interaction. The project has been adopted by several renowned companies, showcasing its core value in modern application development.

metadata.name: kalidokit
metadata.description: Blendshape and kinematics calculator for Mediapipe/Tensorflow.js Face, Eyes, Pose, and Finger tracking models.

summary.zh: Kalidokit 是一个用于 Mediapipe/Tensorflow.js 的混合形状和运动学计算器，专注于人脸、眼睛、姿势和手部跟踪。它支持多种预训练模型，能够计算 3D 地标的简单欧拉旋转和混合形状面部值，适用于 Vtuber 网页应用。尽管 Kalidokit 目前已被官方弃用，但其技术仍将直接集成到 MediaPipe 中，展示了其在实时动画和虚拟角色应用中的核心价值。
summary.en: Kalidokit is a blendshape and kinematics calculator for Mediapipe/Tensorflow.js, focusing on face, eyes, pose, and hand tracking. It supports various pretrained models, calculating simple euler rotations and blendshape face values, making it suitable for Vtuber web applications. Although officially deprecated, its technology will be integrated directly into MediaPipe, showcasing its core value in real-time animation and virtual character applications.

metadata.name: FaceMesh
metadata.description: AI face effects based on tfjs & threejs. Demo: https://caiwenlie.github.io/FaceMesh

summary.zh: FaceMesh 是一个基于 TensorFlow.js 和 Three.js 的 AI 面部特效库，旨在为用户提供实时面部效果处理。该项目适用于增强现实应用、社交媒体滤镜以及游戏开发，展示了深度学习与三维图形技术的结合，具有良好的互动性和视觉效果。
summary.en: FaceMesh is an AI face effects library based on TensorFlow.js and Three.js, designed to provide real-time facial effect processing for users. This project is suitable for augmented reality applications, social media filters, and game development, showcasing the integration of deep learning and 3D graphics technology with excellent interactivity and visual effects.

metadata.name: SUPIR
metadata.description: SUPIR aims at developing Practical Algorithms for Photo-Realistic Image Restoration In the Wild. Our new online demo is also released at suppixel.ai.

summary.zh: SUPIR致力于开发实用的算法，以实现野外环境下的照片级图像恢复。该项目结合了最新的AI技术，提供了高质量的图像处理和放大功能，适用于图像增强、修复和清晰化等应用场景。用户可以通过在线演示体验其强大功能，进一步推动图像处理领域的创新。
summary.en: SUPIR aims to develop practical algorithms for photo-realistic image restoration in wild environments. This project leverages cutting-edge AI technology to deliver high-quality image processing and upscaling, suitable for applications like image enhancement, restoration, and clarification. Users can experience its powerful capabilities through the online demo, further advancing innovation in the field of image processing.
