summary.zh: FlashFace 是一个高保真度的人像个性化工具，专注于保持身份特征。该项目通过优化生成模型，能够生成多样化的面孔，适用于各种应用场景，如虚拟形象创建和个性化内容生成。其技术亮点在于支持多参考面孔的增强效果，特别适合于亚洲人脸的生成，提供了详细的参数设置建议以确保生成结果的稳定性和准确性。
summary.en: FlashFace is a high-fidelity human image personalization tool focused on identity preservation. This project optimizes generative models to create diverse faces, applicable in various scenarios such as virtual avatar creation and personalized content generation. Its technical highlights include enhanced effects through multiple reference faces, particularly suited for generating Asian faces, and detailed parameter settings to ensure stable and accurate output.

metadata.name: fabritor-web
metadata.description: 👻 A creative editor based on fabricjs. 一款基于 fabricjs 的开源创意图片编辑器，旨在让开发者快速构建属于自己的图片编辑器。可应用于海报设计、小红书公众号封面设计、banner 设计等场景。

summary.zh: fabritor 是一款基于 fabric.js 的开源创意图片编辑器，旨在帮助开发者快速构建个性化的图片编辑工具。它支持多种文本、图片和形状编辑功能，适用于海报设计、小红书封面等多种场景。用户可通过在线体验，享受丰富的特性和便捷的操作，且所有数据均在浏览器端安全保存。
summary.en: fabritor is an open-source creative image editor based on fabric.js, designed to help developers quickly build personalized image editing tools. It supports various text, image, and shape editing features, suitable for poster design, social media covers, and more. Users can enjoy a rich set of features and convenient operations through online experience, with all data securely saved in the browser.

metadata.name: AniTalker
metadata.description: [ACM MM 2024] This is the official code for "AniTalker: Animate Vivid and Diverse Talking Faces through Identity-Decoupled Facial Motion Encoding"

summary.zh: AniTalker 是一款通过身份解耦的面部运动编码技术，生动多样地动画化谈话面孔的工具。该项目利用先进的深度学习模型，支持音频驱动的面部动画生成，适用于虚拟角色、游戏开发和社交媒体应用。其技术亮点在于对面部运动的精确控制与多样化表现，提升了用户交互体验。
summary.en: AniTalker is a tool that animates vivid and diverse talking faces through identity-decoupled facial motion encoding. Utilizing advanced deep learning models, it supports audio-driven facial animation generation, making it suitable for virtual characters, game development, and social media applications. Its key highlights include precise control over facial movements and diverse expressions, enhancing user interaction experience.

metadata.name: langflow
metadata.description: Langflow is a powerful tool for building and deploying AI-powered agents and workflows.

summary.zh: Langflow 是一个强大的平台，旨在构建和部署 AI 驱动的代理和工作流。它提供了可视化的创作体验，内置 API 和 MCP 服务器，使每个工作流都能集成到任何框架或技术栈的应用中。支持所有主要的 LLM、向量数据库和不断增长的 AI 工具库，适合开发者快速迭代和定制化。
summary.en: Langflow is a powerful platform for building and deploying AI-powered agents and workflows. It offers a visual authoring experience, built-in API, and MCP servers that allow seamless integration of workflows into applications across various frameworks. Supporting all major LLMs, vector databases, and a growing library of AI tools, it enables developers to iterate quickly and customize components.

metadata.name: chatbot-app
metadata.description: "ChatBot" AI application, supporting GPT,  Gemini Pro, Cohere & Ollama models

summary.zh: ChatBot 是一款支持多种 AI 模型的应用程序，包括 GPT、Gemini Pro、Cohere 和 Ollama。它注重隐私，所有数据均本地存储，提供响应式设计和黑暗模式，支持语音对话和图像生成，适合长时间对话，并支持多语言。该应用程序适用于 iOS、Android 和 macOS，满足用户多样化的需求。
summary.en: ChatBot is an AI application supporting various models including GPT, Gemini Pro, Cohere, and Ollama. It prioritizes privacy with local data storage, features responsive design and dark mode, supports voice conversations and image generation, and is suitable for long dialogues. The app is available on iOS, Android, and macOS, catering to diverse user needs.

metadata.name: IC-Light
metadata.description: More relighting!

summary.zh: IC-Light 是一个用于操控图像照明的项目，提供文本条件和背景条件的重光模型。用户可以通过输入前景图像，利用该项目实现不同的照明效果，适用于艺术创作、图像处理等场景。该项目的技术亮点在于其灵活的照明偏好设置，能够根据用户需求生成多样化的视觉效果。
summary.en: IC-Light is a project designed for manipulating image illumination, offering both text-conditioned and background-conditioned relighting models. Users can input foreground images to achieve various lighting effects, making it suitable for artistic creation and image processing. The project's technical highlight lies in its flexible lighting preference settings, enabling diverse visual outcomes based on user requirements.

metadata.name: sqlchat
metadata.description: Chat-based SQL Client and Editor for the next decade

summary.zh: SQL Chat 是一个基于聊天的 SQL 客户端，利用自然语言与数据库进行交互，实现查询、修改、添加和删除等操作。该工具旨在通过直观的聊天界面简化数据库操作，适用于 MySQL、PostgreSQL、MSSQL 等多种数据库，适合开发者在日常工作中提高效率。
summary.en: SQL Chat is a chat-based SQL client that uses natural language to interact with databases for operations like querying, modifying, adding, and deleting. Designed to simplify database interactions through an intuitive chat interface, it supports various databases such as MySQL, PostgreSQL, and MSSQL, making it ideal for developers seeking to enhance productivity.

metadata.name: llm-action
metadata.description: 本项目旨在分享大模型相关技术原理以及实战经验（大模型工程化、大模型应用落地）

summary.zh: 本项目分享大模型技术的原理与实战经验，涵盖大模型工程化及应用落地。内容包括LLM训练、推理、压缩及数据工程等多个方面，提供高效微调、分布式训练、模型压缩等技术的深入解析与实践案例，适合对大模型技术感兴趣的开发者与研究者。
summary.en: This project shares the principles and practical experiences of large model technologies, covering engineering and application implementation. It includes various aspects such as LLM training, inference, compression, and data engineering, providing in-depth analysis and practical cases on efficient fine-tuning, distributed training, and model compression, suitable for developers and researchers interested in large model technologies.

metadata.name: ChatALL
metadata.description: Concurrently chat with ChatGPT, Bing Chat, Bard, Alpaca, Vicuna, Claude, ChatGLM, MOSS, 讯飞星火, 文心一言 and more, discover the best answers

summary.zh: ChatALL 是一个创新工具，允许用户同时与多个 AI 聊天机器人（如 ChatGPT、Bing Chat、Claude 等）进行对话，帮助用户快速发现最佳答案。其核心价值在于通过并行交互，节省时间并提升效率，适用于 LLM 研究人员、开发者和 AI 爱好者，支持多种主流 AI 模型，满足不同需求。
summary.en: ChatALL is an innovative tool that allows users to concurrently chat with multiple AI bots (such as ChatGPT, Bing Chat, Claude, etc.), helping users quickly discover the best answers. Its core value lies in parallel interactions, saving time and enhancing efficiency, making it suitable for LLM researchers, developers, and AI enthusiasts, supporting various mainstream AI models to meet diverse needs.

metadata.name: Tiktok_Signature
metadata.description: 🛡️ 抖音 X-Bogus，msToken 和 ttwid 获取

summary.zh: Tiktok_Signature 是一款便捷的工具，专为抖音用户设计，能够自动生成 xbogus、mstoken 和 ttwid。这些参数在抖音的 API 调用中至关重要，尤其适合开发者和研究者进行数据抓取和分析。该工具基于抖音的加密算法实现，使用简单且快速，适合学习和交流，但请勿用于非法用途。
summary.en: Tiktok_Signature is a convenient tool designed for Douyin users to automatically generate xbogus, mstoken, and ttwid. These parameters are crucial for API calls in Douyin, making it ideal for developers and researchers for data scraping and analysis. The tool is based on Douyin's encryption algorithm, offering a simple and quick usage, suitable for learning and communication, but should not be used for illegal purposes.

summary.zh: GPT4V图像打标器是一个多功能图像处理工具，利用GPT-4视觉或Claude 3 API等进行图像标记。它支持单图和批量图像处理，具备一键安装、视觉标签分析、图像预压缩等功能，适用于需要高效图像标注的开发者和设计师。该项目兼容多种在线API和本地模型，提升了图像处理的灵活性和效率。
summary.en: The GPT4V-Image-Captioner is a multifunctional image processing toolbox that utilizes the GPT-4 vision or Claude 3 API for image tagging. It supports single and batch image processing, featuring one-click installation, visual tag analysis, and image pre-compression, making it suitable for developers and designers needing efficient image annotation. The project is compatible with various online APIs and local models, enhancing flexibility and efficiency in image processing.

metadata.name: wukong-robot
metadata.description: 🤖 wukong-robot 是一个简单、灵活、优雅的中文语音对话机器人/智能音箱项目，支持ChatGPT多轮对话能力，还可能是首个支持脑机交互的开源智能音箱项目。

summary.zh: wukong-robot 是一个灵活优雅的中文语音对话机器人/智能音箱项目，支持多轮对话和脑机交互，旨在帮助中国的 Maker 和 Haker 快速构建个性化智能音箱。该项目集成多家语音识别和合成技术，具备模块化设计，支持智能家居控制，已安装超过 13,000 台，唤醒次数超 700,000 次。
summary.en: wukong-robot is a flexible and elegant Chinese voice dialogue robot/smart speaker project that supports multi-turn conversations and brain-computer interaction, aimed at helping Chinese Makers and Hackers quickly build personalized smart speakers. The project integrates various speech recognition and synthesis technologies, features a modular design, supports smart home control, and has been installed over 13,000 times with more than 700,000 wake-up instances.

metadata.name: StoryDiffusion
metadata.description: Accepted as [NeurIPS 2024] Spotlight Presentation Paper

summary.zh: StoryDiffusion 是一款创新的图像和视频生成工具，采用一致性自注意力机制，能够在长序列中生成连贯的角色图像。该项目支持与多种扩散模型兼容，用户可通过输入多个文本提示来优化生成效果。此外，Motion Predictor 功能使得长视频生成成为可能，通过压缩的图像语义空间预测运动，提升了视频生成的质量与连贯性。
summary.en: StoryDiffusion is an innovative tool for image and video generation that employs consistent self-attention mechanisms to create coherent character images over long sequences. The project is compatible with various diffusion models, allowing users to optimize results by providing multiple text prompts. Additionally, the Motion Predictor feature enables long-range video generation by predicting motion in a compressed image semantic space, enhancing the quality and coherence of the generated videos.

metadata.name: vue-element-plus-admin
metadata.description: A backend management system based on vue3, typescript, element-plus, and vite

summary.zh: vue-element-plus-admin 是一个基于 Vue3、TypeScript、Element-Plus 和 Vite 的后台管理系统模板，提供了现代化的前端解决方案。它集成了国际化、主题配置、动态路由权限等多种功能，适合用于项目的起始模板和学习参考。该项目关注最新技术趋势，适合开发者进行二次开发或作为基础模板使用。
summary.en: vue-element-plus-admin is a backend management system template based on Vue3, TypeScript, Element-Plus, and Vite, offering a modern front-end solution. It integrates various features such as internationalization, theme configuration, and dynamic routing permissions, making it suitable as a starting template and learning reference for projects. The project focuses on the latest technology trends, ideal for developers for secondary development or as a basic template.

metadata.name: cnn_for_captcha
metadata.description: 图片类验证码识别(数字验证码/缺口验证码/文字验证码/旋转验证码/相似物体验证码)

summary.zh: 该项目基于深度学习技术，提供多种类型验证码的识别解决方案，包括数字验证码、滑动验证码、文字验证码和旋转验证码。通过使用CNN和YOLO等模型，项目实现了高效的验证码识别，适用于需要自动化处理验证码的场景。其技术亮点在于结合了传统图像处理与现代深度学习方法，能够在多种复杂情况下达到较高的准确率。
summary.en: This project offers deep learning-based solutions for recognizing various types of captchas, including numeric, sliding, text, and rotated captchas. By utilizing CNNs and YOLO models, it achieves efficient captcha recognition suitable for automated captcha handling scenarios. The technical highlight lies in the combination of traditional image processing with modern deep learning methods, achieving high accuracy in diverse and complex situations.

metadata.name: python-vue
metadata.description: 后端python+前端vue3技术栈window桌面小工具脚手架

summary.zh: 该项目是一个基于Python和Vue3的Windows桌面小工具脚手架，旨在简化开发过程。它支持前后端热加载，提供代码加密以提高性能和安全性，并定义了编码和文件层级规范。开发者可以通过简单的命令启动后端、打包成exe，并在系统托盘中运行，适合需要快速构建桌面应用的开发者。
summary.en: This project is a Windows desktop tool scaffold based on Python and Vue3, designed to simplify the development process. It supports hot reloading for both frontend and backend, provides code encryption for performance and security, and defines coding and file hierarchy standards. Developers can easily start the backend, package it into an exe, and run it from the system tray, making it suitable for those needing to quickly build desktop applications.

metadata.name: Deep-Learning-Framework
metadata.description: 深度学习脚手架

summary.zh: Deep-Learning-Framework 是一个专注于重现和简化经典深度学习论文代码的项目，旨在帮助初学者深入理解深度学习模型的基本代码结构。该项目基于 Python 3.9+ 和 PyTorch，提供多种网络实现、相关数据集、预训练模型及训练测试脚本，适合深度学习爱好者学习和交流。
summary.en: Deep-Learning-Framework is a project dedicated to reproducing and simplifying the code of classic deep learning papers, aimed at helping beginners gain a deeper understanding of the fundamental code structure of deep learning models. Built on Python 3.9+ and PyTorch, it offers various network implementations, relevant datasets, pre-trained models, and training/testing scripts, making it suitable for deep learning enthusiasts to learn and engage in discussions.

metadata.name: tts-api
metadata.description: RESTful API for synthesizing speech in catalan

summary.zh: TTS API 是一个基于 RESTful 的语音合成接口，专为加泰罗尼亚语设计。它利用 FastAPI 和 eSpeak-ng 提供高效的文本转语音服务，支持多种语音和语言选项。用户可以通过简单的 API 调用生成语音，适用于教育、娱乐和无障碍应用等场景。该项目还支持 Docker 部署，方便开发和集成。
summary.en: The TTS API is a RESTful interface for speech synthesis specifically designed for Catalan. It utilizes FastAPI and eSpeak-ng to provide efficient text-to-speech services, supporting various voice and language options. Users can generate speech through simple API calls, making it suitable for education, entertainment, and accessibility applications. The project also supports Docker deployment for easy development and integration.

metadata.name: fu-admin
metadata.description: 采用当前最流行的技术栈 Vben Vue Vue3 Python Django Ninja（Fast Api 和 Django的结合）开发的后端管理系统

summary.zh: FuAdmin 是一个基于 Vben Vue、Vue3 和 Django-Ninja 的后端管理系统，结合了 FastAPI 和 Django 的优势，提供高效的 API 开发体验。该平台支持多种 OAuth2.0 登录方式，具备动态权限管理、菜单管理、用户管理等功能，适合企业级应用。其前端使用现代化框架，后端则利用 Django 的强大功能，确保了系统的高性能与可扩展性。
summary.en: FuAdmin is a backend management system developed with Vben Vue, Vue3, and Django-Ninja, leveraging the strengths of both FastAPI and Django for efficient API development. The platform supports various OAuth2.0 login methods and features dynamic permission management, menu management, and user management, making it suitable for enterprise applications. Its frontend utilizes modern frameworks while the backend harnesses Django's robust capabilities, ensuring high performance and scalability.

metadata.name: InstantID
metadata.description: InstantID: Zero-shot Identity-Preserving Generation in Seconds 🔥

summary.zh: InstantID 是一种新型的无调优方法，能够在几秒钟内实现身份保留生成，支持多种下游任务。该技术仅需单张图像，显著提升了生成图像的保真度和文本可编辑性，适用于风格转移等应用场景。其最新进展包括与多种工具的兼容性和加速推理，展示了在图像生成领域的前沿技术。
summary.en: InstantID is a novel tuning-free method for identity-preserving generation in seconds, supporting various downstream tasks with just a single image. This technology significantly enhances image fidelity and text editability, making it suitable for applications like style transfer. Recent advancements include compatibility with various tools and accelerated inference, showcasing cutting-edge technology in the field of image generation.

metadata.name: llama3-chinese
metadata.description: Llama3-Chinese是以Meta-Llama-3-8B为底座，使用 DORA + LORA+ 的训练方法，在50w高质量中文多轮SFT数据 + 10w英文多轮SFT数据 + 2000单轮自我认知数据训练而来的大模型。

summary.zh: Llama3-Chinese是基于Meta-Llama-3-8B的大型语言模型，采用DORA和LORA+训练方法，利用50万条高质量中文和10万条英文多轮SFT数据，以及2000条单轮自我认知数据进行训练。该模型专注于中文多轮对话，适用于智能客服、教育辅导等场景，具有良好的语言理解和生成能力。
summary.en: Llama3-Chinese is a large language model based on Meta-Llama-3-8B, trained using DORA and LORA+ methods on 500k high-quality Chinese multi-turn SFT data, 100k English multi-turn SFT data, and 2k single-turn self-cognition data. This model focuses on Chinese multi-turn dialogue, suitable for applications like intelligent customer service and educational tutoring, demonstrating strong language understanding and generation capabilities.

metadata.name: Agently
metadata.description: [GenAI Application Development Framework]  🚀 Build GenAI application quick and easy 💬 Easy to interact with GenAI agent in code using structure data and chained-calls syntax 🧩 Use Event-Driven Flow *TriggerFlow* to manage complex GenAI working logic 🔀 Switch to any model without rewrite application code

summary.zh: Agently 是一个用于快速构建生成式人工智能应用的开发框架，提供结构化数据和链式调用语法，简化与 GenAI 代理的交互。其事件驱动的 TriggerFlow 功能能够高效管理复杂的工作逻辑，并支持在不重写代码的情况下切换模型，确保稳定的输出和可维护的工作流，适用于生产级 AI 应用开发。
summary.en: Agently is a development framework for rapidly building Generative AI applications, simplifying interactions with GenAI agents through structured data and chained-call syntax. Its event-driven TriggerFlow feature efficiently manages complex workflows and allows model switching without code rewrites, ensuring stable outputs and maintainable workflows, suitable for production-grade AI application development.

metadata.name: llama3
metadata.description: The official Meta Llama 3 GitHub site

summary.zh: Meta Llama 3 是一个强大的大型语言模型，旨在为个人、创作者、研究人员和企业提供创新和实验的基础。该版本支持8B到70B参数的预训练和指令调优模型，适用于多种应用场景。通过简化的加载和推理示例，用户可以快速上手并利用其强大的功能。该项目还提供了与 Hugging Face 的集成，便于模型的下载和使用。
summary.en: Meta Llama 3 is a powerful large language model designed to empower individuals, creators, researchers, and businesses to innovate and experiment. This version supports pre-trained and instruction-tuned models ranging from 8B to 70B parameters, suitable for various applications. With simplified loading and inference examples, users can quickly get started and leverage its capabilities. The project also offers integration with Hugging Face for easy model downloads and usage.

metadata.name: python-fxxk-spider
metadata.description: 收集各种免费的 Python 爬虫项目

summary.zh: python-fxxk-spider 是一个收集各种免费 Python 爬虫项目的资源库，提供了多种爬虫示例，适用于不同的网站和数据源。该项目定期更新，旨在帮助开发者快速获取和使用爬虫工具。用户可以根据具体需求对爬虫进行修改，以适应不同网站的结构变化。
summary.en: python-fxxk-spider is a resource repository collecting various free Python spider projects, offering multiple examples suitable for different websites and data sources. The project is regularly updated to assist developers in quickly accessing and utilizing spider tools. Users can modify the spiders according to specific needs to adapt to changes in website structures.

metadata.name: live-room-watcher
metadata.description: 📺 可抓取直播间 弹幕, 礼物, 点赞, 原始流地址等

summary.zh: Live Room Watcher 是一个用于抓取直播间信息的工具，支持获取弹幕、礼物、点赞和原始流地址等数据，适用于抖音和 TikTok 等平台。该项目提供了简单易用的 API，开发者可以轻松集成到自己的应用中，适合用于学习和研究直播数据分析。
summary.en: Live Room Watcher is a tool for scraping live room information, supporting the retrieval of chat messages, gifts, likes, and raw stream URLs from platforms like Douyin and TikTok. It offers a simple API for developers to easily integrate into their applications, making it suitable for learning and research in live data analysis.

metadata.name: IDM-VTON
metadata.description: [ECCV2024] IDM-VTON : Improving Diffusion Models for Authentic Virtual Try-on in the Wild

summary.zh: IDM-VTON项目旨在通过改进扩散模型，实现真实的虚拟试穿体验。该技术可广泛应用于电子商务和虚拟时尚领域，提升用户在线购物的互动性和真实感。项目的亮点在于其对VITON-HD和DressCode数据集的支持，以及高效的训练和推理流程，能够生成高质量的服装试穿效果。
summary.en: The IDM-VTON project aims to enhance diffusion models for authentic virtual try-on experiences. This technology can be widely applied in e-commerce and virtual fashion, improving user interactivity and realism in online shopping. Key highlights include support for VITON-HD and DressCode datasets, along with efficient training and inference processes that generate high-quality clothing try-on results.

metadata.name: AniPortrait
metadata.description: AniPortrait: Audio-Driven Synthesis of Photorealistic Portrait Animation

summary.zh: AniPortrait 是一个创新框架，能够根据音频和参考肖像图像生成高质量的肖像动画。该项目支持面部重现和视频驱动的动画合成，适用于游戏开发、影视制作等领域。其技术亮点包括音频驱动的动画生成和高效的姿态重定向策略，能够处理复杂的姿态差异，提升动画的真实感和互动性。
summary.en: AniPortrait is an innovative framework for generating high-quality portrait animations driven by audio and reference images. It supports face reenactment and video-driven animation synthesis, making it suitable for game development and film production. Key features include audio-driven animation generation and an efficient pose retargeting strategy that handles complex pose variations, enhancing realism and interactivity.

metadata.name: chinese-poetry
metadata.description: The most comprehensive database of Chinese poetry 🧶最全中华古诗词数据库,  唐宋两朝近一万四千古诗人,  接近5.5万首唐诗加26万宋诗.  两宋时期1564位词人，21050首词。 欢迎参加飞书AI先锋诗活动  https://bytedance.aiforce.cloud/app/app_4jvnd48x7khm1

summary.zh: 该项目是一个全面的中华古典诗词数据库，包含近5.5万首唐诗和26万首宋诗，涵盖约1.4万位古诗人和1564位词人。通过JSON格式提供数据，方便开发者构建诗词相关应用，旨在传承和普及中华文化，解决传统文集获取困难的问题。
summary.en: This project is a comprehensive database of Chinese classical poetry, featuring approximately 55,000 Tang poems and 260,000 Song poems, representing around 14,000 poets and 1,564 lyricists. It provides data in JSON format, facilitating developers to build poetry-related applications, aiming to preserve and promote Chinese culture while addressing the challenges of accessing traditional literature.

metadata.name: Streamer-Sales
metadata.description: Streamer-Sales 销冠 —— 卖货主播 LLM 大模型🛒🎁，一个能够根据给定的商品特点从激发用户购买意愿角度出发进行商品解说的卖货主播大模型。🚀⭐内含详细的数据生成流程❗ 📦另外还集成了 LMDeploy 加速推理🚀、RAG检索增强生成 📚、TTS文字转语音🔊、数字人生成 🦸、 Agent 使用网络查询实时信息🌐、ASR 语音转文字🎙️、Vue 生态搭建前端🍍、FastAPI 搭建后端🗝️、Docker-compose 打包部署🐋

summary.zh: Streamer-Sales 销冠是一款创新的卖货主播大模型，能够根据商品特点生成吸引用户的解说词，提升购物体验。该模型集成了多项先进技术，如推理加速、语音转文字、文字转语音、数字人生成等，适用于线上直播和线下推广，帮助商家提高销售效率。其灵活的架构和实时反馈机制确保每次互动都能优化购物效果。
summary.en: Streamer-Sales is an innovative sales anchor LLM that generates engaging product descriptions based on product features to enhance the shopping experience. It integrates advanced technologies such as inference acceleration, ASR, TTS, and digital human generation, suitable for both online live sales and offline promotions, helping merchants boost sales efficiency. Its flexible architecture and real-time feedback mechanism ensure optimized shopping interactions.

metadata.name: TTS
metadata.description: 🐸💬 - a deep learning toolkit for Text-to-Speech, battle-tested in research and production

summary.zh: Coqui TTS 是一个先进的文本转语音生成库，支持超过1100种语言的预训练模型。它提供了训练新模型和微调现有模型的工具，以及数据集分析和整理的实用工具。该库在研究和生产中经过严格测试，适用于多种应用场景，如语音助手和无障碍技术，具有低延迟的实时语音生成能力。
summary.en: Coqui TTS is an advanced Text-to-Speech generation library that supports pretrained models in over 1100 languages. It provides tools for training new models and fine-tuning existing ones, along with utilities for dataset analysis and curation. The library is battle-tested in research and production, suitable for various applications like voice assistants and accessibility technologies, featuring low-latency real-time speech generation.

metadata.name: SadTalker
metadata.description: [CVPR 2023] SadTalker：Learning Realistic 3D Motion Coefficients for Stylized Audio-Driven Single Image Talking Face Animation

summary.zh: SadTalker是一个基于音频驱动的单图像人脸动画生成工具，能够从单个肖像图像和音频生成逼真的3D运动系数，创造出栩栩如生的说话视频。该项目在CVPR 2023上发布，具有高质量视频生成能力，并已集成至Discord平台，用户可免费使用。其技术亮点包括对图像的全身模式支持和与稳定扩散WebUI的集成。
summary.en: SadTalker is an audio-driven single-image talking face animation tool that generates realistic 3D motion coefficients from a single portrait image and audio, creating lifelike talking head videos. Released at CVPR 2023, it offers high-quality video generation and is integrated into Discord for free use. Key features include full-body image mode support and integration with the stable diffusion WebUI.

metadata.name: OpenVoice
metadata.description: Instant voice cloning by MIT and MyShell. Audio foundation model.

summary.zh: OpenVoice 是由 MIT 和 MyShell 开发的即时语音克隆工具，具备准确的音色克隆和灵活的语音风格控制。其零样本跨语言克隆能力使得用户无需提供训练数据即可生成多种语言的语音。最新版本 V2 提升了音质，支持多种语言，并允许商业使用，广泛应用于全球用户的语音合成需求。
summary.en: OpenVoice is an instant voice cloning tool developed by MIT and MyShell, featuring accurate tone color cloning and flexible voice style control. Its zero-shot cross-lingual cloning capability allows users to generate speech in multiple languages without requiring training data. The latest version, V2, enhances audio quality, supports multiple languages, and permits commercial use, catering to the voice synthesis needs of users worldwide.

metadata.name: clone-voice
metadata.description: A sound cloning tool with a web interface, using your voice or any sound to record audio / 一个带web界面的声音克隆工具，使用你的音色或任意声音来录制音频

summary.zh: Clone Voice 是一款基于 Web 的声音克隆工具，允许用户使用自己的声音或任意音色合成语音。该工具支持多种语言，操作简单，无需高性能 GPU 即可使用，适合音频制作、配音等场景。其核心技术基于开源的 xtts_v2 模型，提供高质量的语音合成效果，尤其在英语合成上表现优异。
summary.en: Clone Voice is a web-based sound cloning tool that allows users to synthesize speech using their own voice or any sound. The tool supports multiple languages and is easy to use without requiring high-performance GPUs, making it suitable for audio production and voice-over scenarios. Its core technology is based on the open-source xtts_v2 model, delivering high-quality speech synthesis, especially excelling in English synthesis.

metadata.name: web-video-live
metadata.description: 网页H5播放视频流/直播系统，使用 flv.js，vue-video-player播放器，测试支持 rtmp，http-flv，hls 视频流格式，可以做视频监控，也可以通过视频截图。

summary.zh: 该项目是一个基于H5的视频流播放和直播系统，集成了flv.js和vue-video-player播放器，支持RTMP、HTTP-FLV和HLS等视频流格式。适用于视频监控和实时直播场景，具有低延迟和高兼容性，能够满足多种视频播放需求。
summary.en: This project is an H5-based video streaming and live broadcasting system that integrates flv.js and vue-video-player. It supports RTMP, HTTP-FLV, and HLS video stream formats, making it suitable for video surveillance and real-time broadcasting scenarios. It features low latency and high compatibility to meet various video playback needs.

metadata.name: DeepFaceLive
metadata.description: Real-time face swap for PC streaming or video calls

summary.zh: DeepFaceLive 是一款实时人脸替换工具，适用于 PC 流媒体和视频通话。用户可以通过训练好的面部模型，将自己的面孔与视频中的面孔进行替换，创造出逼真的效果。该项目支持多种公共面部模型，适合直播、社交互动等场景，提升用户体验与娱乐性。
summary.en: DeepFaceLive is a real-time face swap tool designed for PC streaming and video calls. Users can replace their face with faces from videos using trained facial models, creating realistic effects. The project supports various public facial models, making it suitable for live streaming and social interactions, enhancing user experience and entertainment.

metadata.name: DDColor
metadata.description: [ICCV 2023] DDColor: Towards Photo-Realistic Image Colorization via Dual Decoders

summary.zh: DDColor是一个基于双解码器的图像上色工具，旨在实现逼真的图像上色效果。该项目通过优化可学习的颜色标记，利用多尺度视觉特征，能够为历史黑白照片和动漫游戏场景提供生动自然的上色效果。其在自动图像上色领域表现出色，适用于历史修复、艺术创作等多种应用场景。
summary.en: DDColor is an image colorization tool based on dual decoders, aimed at achieving photo-realistic colorization effects. By optimizing learnable color tokens and utilizing multi-scale visual features, it provides vivid and natural colorization for historical black-and-white photos and anime game landscapes. It excels in automatic image colorization, suitable for historical restoration, artistic creation, and various other applications.

metadata.name: anyRTC-RTMP-OpenSource
metadata.description: RTMP 推流器，RTMP(HLS)秒开播放器，直播点播，跨平台（Win,IOS,Android）开源代码

summary.zh: anyLive 是一款基于 WebRTC 的跨平台 RTMP 推流与播放器开源项目，支持 Android、iOS、Windows 和 Mac 等多种系统。其核心功能包括自定义音视频采集和渲染、GPU 美颜滤镜、屏幕共享及多种流媒体协议（如 RTMP、HLS 等）。该项目适用于直播和点播场景，提供了灵活的 UI 自定义和低延迟的流媒体体验。
summary.en: anyLive is an open-source RTMP streaming and playback project based on WebRTC, supporting multiple platforms including Android, iOS, Windows, and Mac. Key features include customizable audio/video capture and rendering, GPU beauty filters, screen sharing, and support for various streaming protocols (e.g., RTMP, HLS). This project is suitable for both live streaming and video on demand, offering flexible UI customization and low-latency streaming experiences.

metadata.name: heimdallr
metadata.description: 一个非常轻量的通知网关，可以聚合各种推送渠道，使用 Serverless 部署，几乎零成本运行。

summary.zh: Heimdallr 是一个轻量级的通知网关，支持多种推送渠道的聚合，具备 Serverless 部署特性，几乎零成本运行。它兼容多种通知服务，如 Bark 和企业微信，提供灵活的配置选项和丰富的功能，适合需要高效推送通知的开发者和团队。通过其配置生成器，用户可以快速上手，解决 webhook 接入问题。
summary.en: Heimdallr is a lightweight notification gateway that aggregates various push channels and features Serverless deployment for nearly zero-cost operation. It is compatible with multiple notification services such as Bark and WeChat Work, offering flexible configuration options and rich functionalities, ideal for developers and teams needing efficient notification delivery. Users can quickly get started with its configuration generator, addressing webhook integration issues.

metadata.name: parler-tts
metadata.description: Inference and training library for high-quality TTS models.

summary.zh: Parler-TTS 是一个轻量级的文本转语音（TTS）模型，能够生成高质量、自然的语音，支持根据特定说话者的性别、音调和说话风格进行调整。该项目完全开源，提供所有数据集、预处理、训练代码和权重，便于社区构建自己的 TTS 模型。新版本包括两个检查点，分别为 880M 和 2.3B 参数模型，经过优化以实现更快的生成速度，适合多种应用场景。
summary.en: Parler-TTS is a lightweight text-to-speech (TTS) model capable of generating high-quality, natural-sounding speech tailored to specific speaker characteristics such as gender, pitch, and speaking style. This fully open-source project provides all datasets, preprocessing, training code, and weights, enabling the community to develop their own TTS models. The latest release includes two checkpoints, an 880M and a 2.3B parameter model, optimized for faster generation, suitable for various applications.

summary.zh: autMan 是一个基于 AI 和机器人技术的可扩展个人助理解决方案，支持多种通讯软件的深度集成。其核心特点包括高度个性化的服务、自我进化能力和自动化工作流管理，能够执行复杂任务如邮件清理和市场监控。支持多种编程语言的插件扩展，兼容主流大模型，具备实时消息监听和智能响应功能，适合需要高效管理日常任务的用户。
summary.en: autMan is an extensible personal assistant solution driven by AI and robotics, integrating deeply with various communication software. Its core features include highly personalized services, self-evolution capabilities, and automated workflow management, capable of executing complex tasks like email cleaning and market monitoring. It supports plugin extensions in multiple programming languages, is compatible with mainstream large models, and features real-time message listening and intelligent response, ideal for users needing efficient daily task management.

metadata.name: gptsovits-api
metadata.description: 适用于 GPT-SoVITS 的api调用接口

summary.zh: gptsovits-api 是一个针对 GPT-SoVITS 的 API 调用接口，旨在提升其音频合成能力。该项目解决了原 API 在中英混合和句子切分等方面的不足，支持用户通过命令行参数灵活配置音频和模型，适用于中文、日语和英语的声音克隆应用场景。其简洁的使用方式和强大的功能，使其成为音频合成领域的重要工具。
summary.en: gptsovits-api is an API interface for GPT-SoVITS, designed to enhance its audio synthesis capabilities. This project addresses the limitations of the original API in mixed-language support and sentence segmentation, allowing users to flexibly configure audio and models via command-line parameters. It supports voice cloning applications in Chinese, Japanese, and English, making it a significant tool in the audio synthesis domain with its straightforward usage and powerful features.

metadata.name: ReverseTool
metadata.description: 逆向工具集合

summary.zh: ReverseTool 是一个全面的逆向工程工具集合，涵盖 Java、C++、C# 和 iOS 等多种技术栈。它提供了多种反编译、调试和分析工具，适用于 APK、DLL 和 EXE 文件的逆向分析，支持动态跟踪和漏洞查询，能够帮助安全研究人员和开发者深入理解和分析软件的内部结构与行为。
summary.en: ReverseTool is a comprehensive collection of reverse engineering tools covering various tech stacks including Java, C++, C#, and iOS. It offers multiple decompilation, debugging, and analysis tools for reverse engineering APKs, DLLs, and EXEs, supporting dynamic tracing and vulnerability queries, aiding security researchers and developers in understanding and analyzing software internals and behaviors.

metadata.name: Xcx_ScanLogin
metadata.description: 微信小程序实现的网页扫码授权登录，无论是个人小程序还是企业小程序，都可以调用wx.login接口获取到openid实现微信鉴权快速扫码登录！

summary.zh: 该项目实现了基于微信小程序的网页扫码授权登录，适用于个人和企业小程序。通过调用wx.login接口获取openid，简化了微信鉴权过程，降低了开发门槛。用户只需扫描生成的小程序码即可完成登录，系统支持回调功能，便于集成到现有网站中，提升用户体验。
summary.en: This project implements web-based QR code authorization login using WeChat Mini Programs, suitable for both personal and enterprise mini programs. By calling the wx.login interface to obtain openid, it simplifies the WeChat authentication process and lowers development barriers. Users can complete the login by scanning the generated mini program code, and the system supports callback functionality for easier integration into existing websites, enhancing user experience.

metadata.name: stable-diffusion-webui-colab
metadata.description: stable diffusion webui colab

summary.zh: 该仓库提供了一个基于Google Colab的稳定扩散WebUI，用户可以方便地使用DreamBooth和LoRA训练模型。项目分为lite、stable和nightly三个版本，满足不同用户的需求。尽管该仓库已不再更新，但其提供的功能和灵活性使其在图像生成领域仍具备实用价值，适合希望快速部署和测试稳定扩散模型的开发者和研究人员。
summary.en: This repository offers a stable diffusion WebUI based on Google Colab, allowing users to easily utilize DreamBooth and LoRA for model training. It features three versions: lite, stable, and nightly, catering to different user needs. Although the repository is no longer updated, its functionality and flexibility still provide practical value in the image generation domain, making it suitable for developers and researchers looking to quickly deploy and test stable diffusion models.

metadata.name: YurunHttp
metadata.description: YurunHttp 是开源的 PHP HTTP 客户端，支持链式操作，简单易用。完美支持Curl、Swoole 协程。QQ群：17916227

summary.zh: YurunHttp 是一个开源的 PHP HTTP 客户端，支持链式操作和智能识别 Curl/Swoole 环境，旨在简化 HTTP 请求的开发。其特点包括并发批量请求、HTTP2、WebSocket 支持及浏览器级别的 Cookies 管理，非常适合用于开发通用 SDK 包，提升开发效率。
summary.en: YurunHttp is an open-source PHP HTTP client that supports chain operations and intelligently recognizes Curl/Swoole environments, aimed at simplifying HTTP request development. Its features include concurrent batch requests, HTTP2, WebSocket support, and browser-level cookie management, making it ideal for developing general SDK packages and enhancing development efficiency.

metadata.name: self-llm
metadata.description: 《开源大模型食用指南》针对中国宝宝量身打造的基于Linux环境快速微调（全参数/Lora）、部署国内外开源大模型（LLM）/多模态大模型（MLLM）教程

summary.zh: 《开源大模型食用指南》是为中国初学者量身定制的教程，专注于Linux环境下的开源大模型（LLM）微调与部署。项目提供详细的环境配置、模型使用和微调方法，旨在简化大模型的应用流程，使普通学生和研究者能够更轻松地掌握开源大模型的使用，推动其在学习和研究中的广泛应用。
summary.en: The 'Open Source Large Model Usage Guide' is tailored for Chinese beginners, focusing on fine-tuning and deploying open-source large models (LLM) in a Linux environment. The project offers detailed instructions on environment setup, model usage, and fine-tuning methods, aiming to simplify the application process of large models, enabling ordinary students and researchers to easily master the use of open-source large models and promote their widespread application in learning and research.

metadata.name: aurora
metadata.description: free

summary.zh: AURORA 是一个免费的 GPT-3.5 接口实现，支持通过 Web 界面和 Docker 部署，方便用户快速搭建自己的聊天机器人。该项目允许用户自定义访问 URL，绕过登录限制，适合需要本地化 ChatGPT 功能的开发者和企业。其技术亮点在于简易的部署方式和灵活的配置选项。
summary.en: AURORA is a free implementation of the GPT-3.5 API, supporting web interface and Docker deployment, enabling users to quickly set up their own chatbots. The project allows users to customize access URLs to bypass login restrictions, making it suitable for developers and enterprises needing localized ChatGPT functionalities. Its technical highlights include easy deployment and flexible configuration options.

metadata.name: HowToLiveLonger
metadata.description: 程序员延寿指南 | A programmer's guide to live longer

summary.zh: 《程序员延寿指南》提供了一系列科学依据和实用建议，旨在帮助程序员通过改善饮食、运动和生活习惯来延长寿命。核心内容包括减少全因死亡率的策略，如饮食选择（如多吃蔬果和坚果）、定期运动和良好的睡眠习惯。该指南不仅关注健康数据，还强调心理和社会因素对寿命的影响，适合希望提升生活质量的程序员群体。
summary.en: The 'Programmer's Guide to Live Longer' offers a collection of scientific evidence and practical advice aimed at helping programmers extend their lifespan through improved diet, exercise, and lifestyle habits. Key strategies include reducing all-cause mortality through dietary choices (such as increasing fruit and nut intake), regular exercise, and good sleep practices. The guide emphasizes not only health data but also the impact of psychological and social factors on longevity, making it suitable for programmers looking to enhance their quality of life.

metadata.name: LightDiffusionFlow
metadata.description: This extension is developed for AUTOMATIC1111's Stable Diffusion web UI that provides import/export options for parameters.

summary.zh: LightDiffusionFlow 是为 AUTOMATIC1111 的 Stable Diffusion Web UI 开发的扩展，提供参数的导入和导出功能。用户可以通过单个文件轻松记录和恢复图像、输入、滑块等设置，支持解析 PNG 信息。该插件兼容 SD Web UI v1.5 及以上版本，旨在简化用户在生成图像时的参数管理，提高工作效率。
summary.en: LightDiffusionFlow is an extension developed for AUTOMATIC1111's Stable Diffusion Web UI, providing import and export functionalities for parameters. Users can easily record and restore settings like images, inputs, and sliders through a single file, supporting PNG info parsing. The plugin is compatible with SD Web UI v1.5 and above, aiming to streamline parameter management and enhance workflow efficiency.

metadata.name: stable-diffusion-webui
metadata.description: Stable Diffusion web UI

summary.zh: Stable Diffusion Web UI 是一个基于 Gradio 库的网页界面，提供强大的图像生成和编辑功能。用户可以通过简单的操作实现文本到图像、图像到图像的转换，以及多种图像处理技术，如外推、内推和高分辨率修复。该项目支持多种神经网络工具，允许用户自定义生成参数，适合艺术创作、设计和图像处理等应用场景。
summary.en: The Stable Diffusion Web UI is a web interface built on the Gradio library, offering powerful image generation and editing capabilities. Users can easily perform text-to-image and image-to-image transformations, along with various image processing techniques such as outpainting, inpainting, and high-resolution fixes. The project supports multiple neural network tools, allowing users to customize generation parameters, making it suitable for artistic creation, design, and image processing applications.

metadata.name: Suno-API
metadata.description: Create Music in Seconds with SunoAPI.

summary.zh: SunoAPI 是一个基于 Python 和 FastAPI 的非官方 API，专注于快速生成音乐和歌词。它具备自动令牌维护和保持活跃的功能，确保用户无需担心令牌过期。该 API 完全异步，速度快，易于维护，适合二次开发，适合需要音乐创作的应用场景。
summary.en: SunoAPI is an unofficial API based on Python and FastAPI, focusing on rapid music and lyric generation. It features automatic token maintenance and keep-alive functionality, ensuring users don't have to worry about token expiration. The API is fully asynchronous, fast, easy to maintain, and suitable for secondary development, making it ideal for applications requiring music creation.

metadata.name: client
metadata.description: ⚡️ Gemini PHP is a community-maintained PHP API client that allows you to interact with the Gemini AI API.

summary.zh: Gemini PHP 是一个社区维护的 PHP API 客户端，旨在与 Gemini AI API 进行交互。该客户端支持多种输入形式，包括文本、图像和视频，适用于聊天、内容生成和文件管理等多种应用场景。其技术亮点在于支持多轮对话、流式生成内容以及与 Google 搜索和地图的整合，极大地扩展了开发者的使用灵活性。
summary.en: Gemini PHP is a community-maintained PHP API client designed for interacting with the Gemini AI API. It supports various input types, including text, images, and videos, suitable for applications like chat, content generation, and file management. Key features include multi-turn conversations, streaming content generation, and integration with Google Search and Maps, significantly enhancing developers' flexibility.

metadata.name: ai-comic-factory
metadata.description: Generate comic panels using a LLM + SDXL. Powered by Hugging Face 🤗

summary.zh: AI Comic Factory 是一个基于大型语言模型和稳定扩散技术的漫画生成工具，用户只需输入一个提示即可创建个性化漫画。该项目利用 Hugging Face 提供的强大 API，支持多种后端配置，适合漫画创作者和开发者。其开源特性使得用户能够在本地环境中灵活部署和定制，推动了创意表达与技术结合的应用场景。
summary.en: AI Comic Factory is a comic generation tool powered by a large language model and SDXL, allowing users to create personalized comics with a single prompt. Utilizing the robust APIs from Hugging Face, it supports various backend configurations, making it suitable for comic creators and developers. Its open-source nature enables flexible deployment and customization in local environments, fostering creative expression through technology integration.

metadata.name: text2video
metadata.description: 半个神器👉一键文本转视频的工具

summary.zh: 该文本转视频工具能够将文本内容转换为视频，旨在实现小说的可视化阅读。通过分段处理文本，生成图像和音频，最终合成带有字幕和声音的mp4视频。项目使用了stable-diffusion生成图像，edge-tts生成语音，并通过OpenCV和FFmpeg进行视频合成，适合开发者和创作者使用。
summary.en: This text-to-video tool converts textual content into videos, aiming to visualize novel reading. It segments the text, generates images and audio, and ultimately composes an mp4 video with subtitles and sound. The project utilizes stable-diffusion for image generation, edge-tts for speech synthesis, and combines them using OpenCV and FFmpeg, making it suitable for developers and creators.

metadata.name: folotoy-bin
metadata.description: Firmwares for FoloToy, Documents https://docs.folotoy.com

summary.zh: FoloToy的固件仓库，提供FoloToy玩具的固件下载及升级文档，用户可通过指定链接获取最新版本的固件。该项目专注于提升玩具的功能与性能，适合FoloToy用户进行固件升级和维护。
summary.en: The FoloToy firmware repository provides downloads and upgrade documentation for FoloToy toys. Users can access the latest firmware versions through the specified link. This project focuses on enhancing the functionality and performance of the toys, making it suitable for FoloToy users for firmware upgrades and maintenance.

metadata.name: social-auto-upload
metadata.description: 自动化上传视频到社交媒体：抖音、小红书、视频号、tiktok、youtube、bilibili

summary.zh: `social-auto-upload` 是一款自动化工具，旨在帮助内容创作者高效地将视频一键上传至多个社交媒体平台，包括抖音、小红书、Bilibili、TikTok 等。该项目支持定时发布、Cookie 管理及多平台扩展，适合需要在多个平台上发布内容的用户。其灵活的配置和扩展性使得用户能够快速上手并满足不同需求。
summary.en: `social-auto-upload` is an automation tool designed to help content creators efficiently upload videos to various social media platforms, including Douyin, Xiaohongshu, Bilibili, and TikTok. The project supports scheduled uploads, cookie management, and multi-platform expansion, making it ideal for users who need to publish content across multiple platforms. Its flexible configuration and extensibility allow users to quickly get started and meet diverse needs.

metadata.name: pinyin-pro
metadata.description: 中文转拼音、拼音音调、拼音声母、拼音韵母、多音字拼音、姓氏拼音、拼音匹配、中文分词

summary.zh: `pinyin-pro` 是一款高性能的 JavaScript 汉字拼音转换库，支持多种拼音输出格式，包括声母、韵母和音调等功能。它具备自动识别多音字、文本与拼音匹配以及自定义拼音等特性，适用于教育、语言学习和文本处理等场景。该库以其卓越的准确率和性能，成为开发者进行中文拼音处理的理想选择。
summary.en: `pinyin-pro` is a high-performance JavaScript library for Chinese character to pinyin conversion, supporting various output formats including initials, finals, and tones. It features automatic recognition of polyphonic characters, text and pinyin matching, and customizable pinyin, making it suitable for education, language learning, and text processing. With its exceptional accuracy and performance, it is an ideal choice for developers working on Chinese pinyin processing.

metadata.name: hf-mirror-cli
metadata.description: hf-mirror-cli 使用国内镜像，无需配置开箱即用，快速下载hugingface上的模型

summary.zh: hf-mirror-cli 是一款针对国内用户的工具，旨在快速下载 Hugging Face 平台上的模型和数据集，解决了因海外服务器导致的下载速度慢的问题。该工具支持环境检测、网络容错、并发下载和断点续传，且无需配置 Python 环境，开箱即用，极大提升了使用体验。
summary.en: hf-mirror-cli is a tool designed for domestic users to quickly download models and datasets from the Hugging Face platform, addressing slow download speeds due to overseas servers. It supports environment checks, network fault tolerance, concurrent downloads, and resuming interrupted downloads, all without requiring Python environment setup, providing a seamless user experience.

metadata.name: python-special-efficiency
metadata.description: 🌈Python特效实战：词云表白、图片转字符画、图片转数字画、千图成像、数字舞蹈、可视化进度条、无穷炫酷五角星、黑客帝国代码雨、无法关闭的表白弹窗、一行代码能实现的丧心病狂的功能、图片特效转换、高级图片特效处理、3d图片渲染等

summary.zh: 该项目展示了多种Python特效应用，包括词云表白、图片转字符画、数字舞蹈等。适合开发者学习如何利用Python实现创意视觉效果，涵盖了从简单的字符转换到复杂的3D渲染技术，具有很高的实用性和趣味性，适合用于教学、展示和娱乐等场景。
summary.en: This project showcases various Python effect applications, including word cloud confessions, image-to-character art, and digital dancing. It is suitable for developers to learn how to create creative visual effects using Python, covering everything from simple character conversions to complex 3D rendering techniques, making it highly practical and entertaining for educational, demonstration, and entertainment purposes.

metadata.name: ai_timeline
metadata.description: AI时间线，产品地址：http://www.ai-timeline.top

summary.zh: AI时间线是一个专注于人工智能发展历程的工具，旨在为用户提供清晰的AI技术演变和应用场景。通过直观的时间线展示，用户可以轻松了解AI的历史与未来趋势，适用于教育、研究和商业分析等领域。该项目虽代码结构较为混乱，但核心功能明确，适合对AI发展感兴趣的用户使用和研究。
summary.en: AI Timeline is a tool focused on the evolution of artificial intelligence, designed to provide users with a clear view of AI technology's development and application scenarios. By presenting an intuitive timeline, users can easily understand the history and future trends of AI, making it suitable for education, research, and business analysis. Although the code structure is somewhat chaotic, the core functionality is clear, making it ideal for users interested in AI development.

metadata.name: ip-info-api
metadata.description: Free IP information query APIs / 免费IP信息查询API接口，GET请求，可直接访问，无任何鉴权

summary.zh: 该项目提供了一系列免费的IP信息查询API接口，用户无需任何鉴权即可直接访问，适用于快速获取IP的地理位置、ISP信息及网络类型等数据。API列表持续更新，方便开发者根据需求选择合适的接口，提升开发效率。
summary.en: This project offers a collection of free IP information query APIs that can be accessed directly without any authentication. It is suitable for quickly obtaining data such as geographical location, ISP details, and network type of an IP. The API list is continuously updated, allowing developers to choose the appropriate interface based on their needs, enhancing development efficiency.

metadata.name: cog-face-to-sticker
metadata.description: face-to-sticker

summary.zh: face-to-sticker 是一个将人脸转换为贴纸的工具，支持在 Replicate 和 ComfyUI 上运行。该项目依赖多个自定义节点，能够实现高效的图像处理和转换，适用于社交媒体、表情包制作等场景，具有简单易用的界面和强大的功能。
summary.en: face-to-sticker is a tool that converts faces into stickers, runnable on Replicate and ComfyUI. The project relies on several custom nodes for efficient image processing and transformation, suitable for social media and meme creation, featuring an easy-to-use interface and powerful functionality.

metadata.name: tsparticles
metadata.description: tsParticles - Easily create highly customizable JavaScript particles effects, confetti explosions and fireworks animations and use them as animated backgrounds for your website. Ready to use components available for React.js, Vue.js (2.x and 3.x), Angular, Svelte, jQuery, Preact, Inferno, Solid, Riot and Web Components.

summary.zh: tsParticles 是一个轻量级的 TypeScript 库，旨在轻松创建高度可定制的粒子效果、彩带爆炸和烟花动画，适用于网站的动态背景。该库支持多种流行框架，包括 React.js、Vue.js、Angular 和 Svelte，提供即用组件，帮助开发者快速集成炫酷的视觉效果，提升用户体验。
summary.en: tsParticles is a lightweight TypeScript library designed for easily creating highly customizable particle effects, confetti explosions, and fireworks animations for animated backgrounds on websites. It supports various popular frameworks, including React.js, Vue.js, Angular, and Svelte, offering ready-to-use components that help developers quickly integrate stunning visual effects to enhance user experience.

metadata.name: MineAdmin-Vue
metadata.description: MineAdmin Vue 是一个开源免费专门适配于 MineAdmin 后台权限管理系统的前端中后台模板，使用了 vue3, vite5, pinia, arco design, javascript 等主流开发技术，未使用Typescript，我们选择了简单。

summary.zh: MineAdmin Vue 是一个开源的前端中后台模板，专为 MineAdmin 后台权限管理系统设计。它采用了 Vue3、Vite5、Pinia 和 Arco Design 等现代技术栈，提供了完善的权限管理、国际化支持和灵活的布局选项，旨在简化开发流程并提升用户体验。该模板适合需要快速构建后台管理系统的开发者。
summary.en: MineAdmin Vue is an open-source front-end template specifically designed for the MineAdmin backend permission management system. It utilizes modern tech stacks like Vue3, Vite5, Pinia, and Arco Design, offering comprehensive permission management, internationalization support, and flexible layout options, aimed at simplifying the development process and enhancing user experience. This template is ideal for developers looking to quickly build backend management systems.

metadata.name: saiadmin-vue
metadata.description: SaiAdmin前端代码

summary.zh: SaiAdmin Vue 是一个基于 Vue.js 的前端管理系统，旨在为开发者提供高效的管理界面解决方案。该项目支持快速安装和运行，适用于构建各种管理后台，具备良好的扩展性和可定制性。其使用现代前端技术栈，帮助开发者轻松实现复杂的业务需求。
summary.en: SaiAdmin Vue is a front-end management system based on Vue.js, designed to provide developers with an efficient management interface solution. The project supports quick installation and operation, suitable for building various management backends, featuring good scalability and customization. It employs modern front-end technology stacks to help developers easily fulfill complex business requirements.

metadata.name: Ciphey
metadata.description: ⚡ Automatically decrypt encryptions without knowing the key or cipher, decode encodings, and crack hashes ⚡

summary.zh: Ciphey 是一个全自动的解密、解码和破解工具，利用自然语言处理和人工智能技术，无需知道密钥或密码即可处理多种加密形式。该工具适用于安全研究、数据恢复和密码破解等场景，具有高效、智能的特点，能够快速识别并解密多种编码和哈希。其便捷的安装方式支持多种平台，极大地方便了用户的使用。
summary.en: Ciphey is a fully automated decryption, decoding, and cracking tool that utilizes natural language processing and artificial intelligence, allowing users to handle various encryption forms without knowing the key or cipher. It is suitable for security research, data recovery, and password cracking, featuring efficient and intelligent capabilities to quickly identify and decrypt multiple encodings and hashes. Its convenient installation supports various platforms, greatly enhancing user accessibility.

metadata.name: comflowyspace
metadata.description: Comflowyspace is an intuitive, user-friendly, open-source AI tool for generating images and videos, democratizing access to AI technology.

summary.zh: Comflowyspace 是一个直观、用户友好的开源 AI 工具，专注于图像和视频生成，旨在让更多人能够轻松访问 AI 技术。与传统的 SDWebUI 和 ComfyUI 相比，Comflowyspace 提供了更好的互动体验，并支持本地和云端版本，满足不同用户的需求。
summary.en: Comflowyspace is an intuitive, user-friendly open-source AI tool for generating images and videos, aimed at democratizing access to AI technology. It offers a better interactive experience compared to standard SDWebUI and ComfyUI, supporting both local and cloud versions to cater to diverse user needs.

metadata.name: image-watermark-tool
metadata.description: 一个能够在本地设备上为图片添加水印，并且图片不会被发送到任何服务器，所有操作都在本地浏览器完成的工具。非常适合保护您敏感证件（如身份证、驾照、护照等）

summary.zh: Image Watermark Tool 是一个开源工具，允许用户在本地设备上为图片添加水印，确保敏感证件（如身份证、驾照、护照等）的隐私安全。所有操作均在本地浏览器完成，无需网络连接，支持一键部署到 Vercel，方便快捷，适合个人及小型团队使用。
summary.en: Image Watermark Tool is an open-source utility that allows users to add watermarks to images locally, ensuring the privacy of sensitive documents such as ID cards, driver's licenses, and passports. All operations are performed in the local browser without the need for internet connectivity, and it supports one-click deployment to Vercel, making it convenient for individuals and small teams.

metadata.name: LKY_OfficeTools
metadata.description: 一键自动化 下载、安装、激活 Office 的利器。

summary.zh: LKY Office Tools 是一款绿色开源的自动化工具，旨在简化 Microsoft Office 的下载、安装和激活过程。用户可以一键安装最新版 Office，并根据提示自助安装其他组件。该工具支持自动识别操作系统架构，确保下载适配版本，并采用正版激活方式，保证系统安全。适合希望快速部署 Office 的用户。
summary.en: LKY Office Tools is a green, open-source automation tool designed to simplify the download, installation, and activation of Microsoft Office. Users can install the latest version of Office with one click and self-install additional components as prompted. The tool automatically detects the operating system architecture to ensure the correct version is downloaded and uses legitimate activation methods to maintain system security. Ideal for users looking to quickly deploy Office.

metadata.name: SoraWebui
metadata.description: SoraWebui is an open-source Sora web client, enabling users to easily create videos from text with OpenAI's Sora model.

summary.zh: SoraWebui 是一个开源的 Sora 网页客户端，用户可以通过文本轻松生成视频，利用 OpenAI 的 Sora 模型。该项目支持一键部署，简化了视频制作流程，适合需要快速生成视频内容的用户和开发者。
summary.en: SoraWebui is an open-source Sora web client that allows users to easily create videos from text using OpenAI's Sora model. The project features one-click deployment, simplifying the video creation process, making it ideal for users and developers who need to generate video content quickly.

metadata.name: llm-universe
metadata.description: 本项目是一个面向小白开发者的大模型应用开发教程，在线阅读地址：https://datawhalechina.github.io/llm-universe/

summary.zh: 本项目是面向初学者的大模型应用开发教程，结合阿里云服务器与个人知识库助手，帮助开发者快速掌握大模型开发技能。内容涵盖大模型简介、API调用、知识库搭建、RAG应用构建及验证迭代等，旨在通过实践引导学习，降低学习门槛。适合具备基础Python能力的开发者，提供了丰富的实例与技巧，助力快速入门与进阶。
summary.en: This project is a tutorial for beginners on large model application development, integrating Alibaba Cloud server and personal knowledge base assistant to help developers quickly grasp large model development skills. It covers topics like introduction to large models, API calls, knowledge base construction, RAG application building, and validation iteration, aiming to guide learning through practice and lower the learning threshold. Suitable for developers with basic Python skills, it offers rich examples and techniques for rapid entry and advancement.

metadata.name: OOTDiffusion
metadata.description: [AAAI 2025] Official implementation of "OOTDiffusion: Outfitting Fusion based Latent Diffusion for Controllable Virtual Try-on"

summary.zh: OOTDiffusion是基于潜在扩散的可控虚拟试衣的实现，利用服装融合技术，支持半身和全身模型。该项目在VITON-HD和Dress Code数据集上训练，提供了ONNX支持和多种模型检查点，适合时尚行业和虚拟试衣应用。其核心亮点在于高效的图像生成和服装匹配能力，能够为用户提供个性化的虚拟试衣体验。
summary.en: OOTDiffusion is an implementation for controllable virtual try-on based on latent diffusion, utilizing outfitting fusion technology to support both half-body and full-body models. Trained on VITON-HD and Dress Code datasets, it offers ONNX support and various model checkpoints, making it suitable for the fashion industry and virtual fitting applications. Its key highlights include efficient image generation and garment matching capabilities, providing users with personalized virtual try-on experiences.

metadata.name: LocalAI
metadata.description: LocalAI is the open-source AI engine. Run any model - LLMs, vision, voice, image, video - on any hardware. No GPU required.

summary.zh: LocalAI 是一个免费的开源替代方案，旨在提供与 OpenAI 等平台兼容的本地 AI 推理服务。它支持在消费级硬件上运行多种模型，无需 GPU，适合生成文本、音频、视频和图像等多种应用场景。其去中心化和分布式特性使得用户能够在本地环境中高效地进行 AI 开发和部署。
summary.en: LocalAI is a free, open-source alternative designed to provide local AI inference services compatible with platforms like OpenAI. It supports running various models on consumer-grade hardware without the need for a GPU, suitable for generating text, audio, video, and images. Its decentralized and distributed features enable efficient AI development and deployment in local environments.

metadata.name: duanju-cps
metadata.description: 短剧cps小程序，抖音短剧九州短剧A5短语麻雀同款短剧cps系统

summary.zh: duanju-cps 是一款专为短剧项目设计的 CPS 小程序，借鉴了市场上多款热门短剧 CPS 系统的经验，集成了三级分销、会员管理、充值、收益管理等多种功能，适用于短视频平台的商业化需求。该系统支持多种主流玩法，旨在帮助用户高效管理短剧业务。
summary.en: duanju-cps is a CPS mini-program designed specifically for short drama projects, leveraging experiences from popular CPS systems in the market. It integrates features such as three-tier distribution, membership management, recharge, and revenue management, catering to the commercial needs of short video platforms. The system supports various mainstream gameplay, aiming to help users efficiently manage short drama businesses.

metadata.name: DouyinLiveRecorder
metadata.description: 可循环值守和多人录制的直播录制软件，支持抖音、TikTok、Youtube、快手、虎牙、斗鱼、B站、小红书、pandatv、sooplive、flextv、popkontv、twitcasting、winktv、百度、微博、酷狗、17Live、Twitch、Acfun、CHZZK、shopee等40+平台直播录制

summary.zh: DouyinLiveRecorder是一款多平台直播录制软件，支持抖音、TikTok、Youtube等40多个平台的直播录制。该工具基于FFmpeg实现，具备循环值守和多人录制功能，用户可自定义录制配置并接收直播状态推送，适合需要长时间监控和录制直播内容的用户。
summary.en: DouyinLiveRecorder is a multi-platform live streaming recording software that supports over 40 platforms including Douyin, TikTok, and YouTube. Built on FFmpeg, it features loop monitoring and multi-user recording capabilities, allowing users to customize recording settings and receive live status updates, making it ideal for users needing long-term monitoring and recording of live content.

metadata.name: campus-imaotai
metadata.description: i茅台app自动预约，每日自动预约，支持docker一键部署（本项目不提供成品，使用的是已淘汰的算法）

summary.zh: 校园茅台预约自动化工具，支持每日自动预约，用户可自定义时间和门店类型。项目基于已淘汰的算法，提供Docker一键部署，适合需要高效预约的用户。该工具简化了茅台酒的预约流程，提升了用户体验。
summary.en: Campus-imaotai is an automation tool for daily reservations of the iMoutai app, allowing users to customize appointment times and store types. Built on a deprecated algorithm, it supports one-click Docker deployment, making it ideal for users seeking efficient reservation processes. This tool streamlines the Moutai reservation workflow and enhances user experience.

metadata.name: aicover
metadata.description: ai cover generator

summary.zh: AI Cover 是一款基于人工智能的封面生成器，旨在为用户提供快速、便捷的封面设计解决方案。该项目利用 Next.js 构建全栈应用，集成了用户认证、图像存储和支付功能，适合需要高效设计封面的创作者和企业。其技术亮点包括与 OpenAI API 的集成和对 PostgreSQL 数据库的支持。
summary.en: AI Cover is an AI-powered cover generator designed to provide users with quick and convenient cover design solutions. Built with Next.js, this full-stack application integrates user authentication, image storage, and payment features, making it suitable for creators and businesses needing efficient cover designs. Key highlights include integration with the OpenAI API and support for PostgreSQL databases.

metadata.name: cliptalk
metadata.description: 使用谷歌 gemini-pro-vision和gemini-pro或者 GPT4-vision以及 GPT4来解析抖音和tiktok以及本地视频内容，分析成文本内容，另外附带抖音和 tiktok去水印接口

summary.zh: ClipTalk 是一款基于谷歌 Gemini 和 GPT-4 的视频内容解析工具，专注于去除抖音和 TikTok 视频水印，并将视频内容转换为文本。该工具支持本地视频处理，适用于内容创作者和数据分析师，能够高效提取视频信息，提升内容利用率。
summary.en: ClipTalk is a video content analysis tool based on Google Gemini and GPT-4, focusing on removing watermarks from Douyin and TikTok videos and converting video content into text. It supports local video processing, making it suitable for content creators and data analysts, efficiently extracting video information to enhance content utilization.

metadata.name: FridaScripts
metadata.description: 一些frida脚本

summary.zh: FridaScripts 是一组专为字节系列应用设计的 Frida 脚本，提供通用的抓包解决方案。该项目适用于安全研究人员和开发者，帮助他们在动态分析和逆向工程中捕获应用程序的网络请求与数据流。其技术亮点在于简化了复杂的抓包过程，提升了分析效率。
summary.en: FridaScripts is a collection of Frida scripts specifically designed for ByteDance applications, offering a universal packet capture solution. This project is aimed at security researchers and developers, assisting them in capturing network requests and data flows during dynamic analysis and reverse engineering. Its technical highlight lies in simplifying the complex packet capturing process and enhancing analysis efficiency.

metadata.name: wxbot
metadata.description: PC微信Hook模块、Hook WeChat / 微信逆向、微信机器人、WeChatRobot

summary.zh: wxbot 是一款针对特定版本微信的聊天机器人，支持 Windows 和 Docker 部署。该工具通过 Hook 技术实现与微信的交互，提供自动登录、二维码回调等功能，适合开发者进行微信自动化操作和研究。使用时需注意法律风险，且仅限于学习与研究用途。
summary.en: wxbot is a chat robot designed for specific versions of WeChat, supporting both Windows and Docker deployment. Utilizing Hook technology, it enables interaction with WeChat, offering features like automatic login and QR code callbacks, making it suitable for developers interested in WeChat automation and research. Users should be aware of legal risks and use it strictly for educational purposes.

metadata.name: ddddocr
metadata.description: 带带弟弟 通用验证码识别OCR pypi版

summary.zh: DdddOcr 是一个通用的验证码识别SDK，支持多种验证码类型的离线识别，包括数字字母组合、中文、滑块及特殊字符验证码。该库设计简洁，依赖少，提供易用的API接口，适合开发者快速集成。其核心功能包括文字识别、目标检测和滑块验证码处理，支持GPU加速和自定义模型导入，能够满足不同场景的需求。
summary.en: DdddOcr is a versatile CAPTCHA recognition SDK that supports offline recognition of various CAPTCHA types, including alphanumeric, Chinese, slider, and special character CAPTCHAs. The library is designed to be simple with minimal dependencies, offering an easy-to-use API for quick integration by developers. Its core features include text recognition, object detection, and slider CAPTCHA handling, with support for GPU acceleration and custom model imports to meet diverse application needs.

metadata.name: WeChatOpenDevTools-Python
metadata.description: WeChatOpenDevTool 微信小程序强制开启开发者工具

summary.zh: WeChatOpenDevTools-Python 是一个基于 Python3 的微信小程序开发者工具，旨在强制开启微信开发者模式。该工具支持多种微信版本，提供简单的自动化功能，帮助开发者调试小程序和内置浏览器。适用于学习和实验，使用者需注意版权和使用风险。
summary.en: WeChatOpenDevTools-Python is a developer tool for WeChat Mini Programs, built on Python3, designed to force-enable the developer mode. It supports multiple versions of WeChat and offers simple automation features to assist developers in debugging Mini Programs and the built-in browser. Intended for learning and experimentation, users should be aware of copyright and usage risks.

metadata.name: jeepay
metadata.description: Jeepay是一套适合互联网企业使用的开源支付系统，支持多渠道服务商和普通商户模式。已对接微信支付，支付宝，云闪付官方接口，支持聚合码支付。

summary.zh: Jeepay是一款专为互联网企业设计的开源支付系统，支持多渠道服务商和普通商户模式，已对接微信支付、支付宝及云闪付等主流支付接口。其核心技术基于Spring Boot和Ant Design Vue，具备高并发处理能力和分布式部署特性，确保交易安全可靠。该系统提供简洁易用的管理界面，适合快速接入多种支付解决方案。
summary.en: Jeepay is an open-source payment system designed for internet enterprises, supporting multiple channel service providers and regular merchant modes. It integrates mainstream payment interfaces like WeChat Pay, Alipay, and Cloud Flash Pay. Built on Spring Boot and Ant Design Vue, it features high concurrency handling and distributed deployment capabilities, ensuring secure and reliable transactions. The system offers a user-friendly management interface, ideal for quick integration of various payment solutions.

metadata.name: nineai
metadata.description: nineai 开源版

summary.zh: NineAI 开源版是一个基于 NestJS 和 Vue3 构建的 AIGC 生态社区，支持多种 AI 能力如 GPT-3.5/4 和 DALL·E 2，提供完善的卡密系统和用户管理功能。该项目旨在为个人和企业提供低成本的 AI 服务平台，具有高扩展性和易部署性，适合开发者共同参与优化和构建。
summary.en: NineAI open-source version is an AIGC ecosystem community built on NestJS and Vue3, supporting various AI capabilities like GPT-3.5/4 and DALL·E 2, along with a comprehensive card key system and user management features. The project aims to provide a low-cost AI service platform for individuals and businesses, emphasizing high scalability and easy deployment, inviting developers to collaborate and enhance.

metadata.name: chatgpt-web-midjourney-proxy
metadata.description: One UI is all done with chatgpt web, midjourney, gpts,suno,luma,runway,viggle,flux,ideogram,realtime,pika,udio; Simultaneous support  Web / PWA / Linux / Win / MacOS platform

summary.zh: ChatGPT Web Midjourney Proxy 是一个多平台的用户界面，集成了 ChatGPT、Midjourney、Suno、Luma 等多种 AI 服务，支持实时生成音乐、视频和图像。该项目基于开源协议，提供丰富的功能，如自定义 API、图像处理和多模态交互，适合开发者和创作者使用。
summary.en: ChatGPT Web Midjourney Proxy is a multi-platform user interface that integrates various AI services like ChatGPT, Midjourney, Suno, and Luma, supporting real-time generation of music, videos, and images. Built on an open-source license, it offers extensive features such as customizable APIs, image processing, and multimodal interactions, making it ideal for developers and creators.

metadata.name: weibo-crawler
metadata.description: 新浪微博爬虫，用python爬取新浪微博数据，并下载微博图片和微博视频

summary.zh: 该项目是一个基于Python的新浪微博爬虫，能够高效地爬取单个或多个用户的微博数据，包括用户信息和微博内容。支持将数据输出为CSV、JSON文件或存储到多种数据库中，并可下载微博中的图片和视频。该爬虫具备定期增量爬取功能，适合需要长期监测微博动态的用户或研究者。
summary.en: This project is a Python-based Weibo crawler that efficiently scrapes data from one or multiple Weibo users, including user profiles and posts. It supports outputting data in CSV, JSON formats, or storing it in various databases, and can download images and videos from posts. The crawler features periodic incremental scraping, making it suitable for users or researchers needing to monitor Weibo dynamics over time.

metadata.name: vueuse
metadata.description: Collection of essential Vue Composition Utilities for Vue 3

summary.zh: VueUse 是一套为 Vue 3 提供的核心组合式工具集合，旨在提升开发效率。它支持树摇优化，确保只引入所需功能，且完全兼容 SSR。项目采用 TypeScript 编写，提供互动文档和示例，适合各种应用场景，如状态管理、主题切换等。VueUse 使开发者能够快速构建高效、灵活的 Vue 应用。
summary.en: VueUse is a collection of essential composition utilities for Vue 3, designed to enhance development efficiency. It supports tree-shaking, ensuring only the necessary features are included, and is fully SSR-friendly. Written in TypeScript, it offers interactive documentation and examples, suitable for various application scenarios like state management and theme switching. VueUse enables developers to quickly build efficient and flexible Vue applications.

metadata.name: gushi_namer
metadata.description: 古诗文起名: 利用诗经 楚辞 唐诗 宋词等给小朋友起名字

summary.zh: 古诗文起名项目通过随机组合经典诗词中的字词，为小朋友提供独特的名字选择。该项目支持《诗经》、《楚辞》、《唐诗》、《宋词》等多部经典文献，旨在让用户在翻阅传统文化的同时，获得灵感与惊喜。尽管没有使用人工智能技术，但其随机生成的名字常常带来意想不到的趣味和美感，适合追求个性化命名的家庭。
summary.en: The Gushi Namer project offers unique name options for children by randomly combining words from classic poetry. It supports various traditional texts, including the Book of Songs, Chuci, Tang poetry, and Song lyrics, allowing users to draw inspiration from cultural heritage. Although it doesn't employ AI technology, the randomly generated names often yield unexpected charm and humor, making it ideal for families seeking personalized naming.

metadata.name: Pake
metadata.description: 🤱🏻 Turn any webpage into a desktop app with one command.

summary.zh: Pake 是一个轻量级工具，可以通过一条命令将任何网页转换为桌面应用，支持 macOS、Windows 和 Linux。其核心技术基于 Rust Tauri，相比传统 JS 框架，具有更快的性能和更低的内存占用。用户可以通过 CLI 或在线构建轻松打包，无需复杂配置，适合初学者和开发者。
summary.en: Pake is a lightweight tool that turns any webpage into a desktop app with a single command, supporting macOS, Windows, and Linux. Built on Rust Tauri, it offers faster performance and lower memory usage compared to traditional JS frameworks. Users can easily package apps via CLI or online building without complex configurations, making it suitable for beginners and developers alike.

metadata.name: run
metadata.description: 润学全球官方指定GITHUB，整理润学宗旨、纲领、理论和各类润之实例；解决为什么润，润去哪里，怎么润三大问题； 并成为新中国人的核心宗教，核心信念。

summary.zh: 该仓库是润学全球官方指定平台，旨在整理润学的宗旨、理论和实例，解答为何润、润去哪里及如何润等核心问题。它不仅为新中国人提供信仰支持，还鼓励用户分享个人润的经历，形成一个丰富的中文润学文库，助力移民与迁徙自由的讨论。
summary.en: This repository serves as the official global platform for the Run Philosophy, aiming to organize its principles, theories, and examples while addressing key questions such as why to run, where to run, and how to run. It provides a supportive belief system for new Chinese citizens and encourages users to share their personal experiences, creating a comprehensive Chinese library on the Run Philosophy.

summary.zh: 暂无描述。

metadata.name: bookget
metadata.description: bookget 数字古籍图书下载工具

summary.zh: bookget 是一款数字古籍图书下载工具，支持超过 50 个数字图书馆，旨在为用户提供便捷的古籍获取方式。该工具适合研究人员和爱好者，支持多平台编译，用户可根据需求进行二次开发。其使用手册和社区支持使得用户能够轻松上手，探索古籍的数字化世界。
summary.en: bookget is a digital ancient book download tool that supports over 50 digital libraries, designed to provide users with convenient access to ancient texts. It is suitable for researchers and enthusiasts, with multi-platform compilation support and options for secondary development. The user manual and community support facilitate easy onboarding for users exploring the digital realm of ancient literature.

metadata.name: vaultwarden
metadata.description: Unofficial Bitwarden compatible server written in Rust, formerly known as bitwarden_rs

summary.zh: Vaultwarden 是一个用 Rust 编写的非官方 Bitwarden 兼容服务器，适合自托管部署。它提供了一个轻量级的替代方案，完美支持官方 Bitwarden 客户端，尤其适合资源有限的环境。该项目的技术亮点在于其高效性和兼容性，使用户能够在不牺牲安全性的情况下管理密码。
summary.en: Vaultwarden is an unofficial Bitwarden-compatible server written in Rust, ideal for self-hosted deployments. It offers a lightweight alternative that fully supports official Bitwarden clients, making it perfect for resource-constrained environments. The project's technical highlights include efficiency and compatibility, allowing users to manage passwords without compromising security.

metadata.name: Hitomi-Downloader
metadata.description: :cake: Desktop utility to download images/videos/music/text from various websites, and more.

summary.zh: Hitomi-Downloader 是一款桌面实用工具，支持从多个网站下载图片、视频、音乐和文本。其界面简洁明了，具备下载加速、24线程支持、速度限制、用户脚本等多项功能，适合需要批量下载内容的用户。支持的站点包括 YouTube、Instagram、Pixiv 等，满足多种下载需求。
summary.en: Hitomi-Downloader is a desktop utility that allows users to download images, videos, music, and text from various websites. With a simple interface, it features download acceleration, support for 24 threads, speed limiting, and user scripts, making it ideal for users needing bulk downloads. Supported sites include YouTube, Instagram, and Pixiv, catering to diverse downloading needs.

summary.zh: 该项目是一个基于云存储的文件系统，旨在提供高效的数据管理和访问解决方案。其核心价值在于简化用户在云环境中的文件操作，支持多种云服务平台，适用于需要跨平台文件共享和存储的场景。技术亮点包括灵活的API接口和高可扩展性，能够满足不同用户的需求。
summary.en: This project is a cloud storage-based file system designed to provide efficient data management and access solutions. Its core value lies in simplifying file operations in cloud environments, supporting multiple cloud service platforms, and catering to scenarios requiring cross-platform file sharing and storage. Key technical highlights include flexible API interfaces and high scalability to meet diverse user needs.

metadata.name: 1Panel
metadata.description: 🔥 1Panel is a modern, open-source VPS control panel — and the only one with native AI agent support. Run Ollama models, deploy OpenClaw agents, and manage your entire server stack from one clean web interface.

summary.zh: 1Panel 是一个现代化的开源 VPS 控制面板，通过直观的网页界面简化管理。其核心价值在于一键部署 OpenClaw 和网站，支持本地 LLM 托管，提供集中化的服务器管理和安全防护。适用于需要高效管理和快速部署的开发者和企业用户。
summary.en: 1Panel is a modern open-source VPS control panel that simplifies administration through an intuitive web interface. Its core value lies in one-click deployment of OpenClaw and websites, supporting local LLM hosting, centralized server management, and enhanced security. It is ideal for developers and enterprises needing efficient management and rapid deployment.

metadata.name: v2rayN
metadata.description: A GUI client for Windows, Linux and macOS, support Xray and sing-box and others

summary.zh: v2rayN 是一款跨平台的图形用户界面客户端，支持 Windows、Linux 和 macOS 系统，兼容 Xray 和 sing-box 等核心，旨在为用户提供简便的网络代理管理体验。其直观的界面和多样的功能使其成为网络安全和隐私保护的理想选择，适合需要高效翻墙和网络访问的用户。
summary.en: v2rayN is a cross-platform GUI client for Windows, Linux, and macOS, supporting cores like Xray and sing-box. It aims to provide users with an easy-to-use network proxy management experience. With its intuitive interface and diverse features, it is ideal for users seeking efficient access to the internet while ensuring security and privacy.

metadata.name: UserLAnd
metadata.description: Main UserLAnd Repository

summary.zh: UserLAnd 是一款便捷的 Android 应用，允许用户在设备上运行完整的 Linux 发行版或特定应用，无需获取 root 权限。其主要特点包括像普通应用一样安装和卸载，支持多种 Linux 发行版，适合开发者和普通用户使用，提供了灵活的 Linux 环境体验。
summary.en: UserLAnd is a convenient Android application that allows users to run full Linux distributions or specific applications on their devices without requiring root access. Key features include easy installation and uninstallation like regular apps, support for various Linux distros, making it suitable for both developers and casual users seeking a flexible Linux environment.

metadata.name: WeCulture
metadata.description: 文旅小程序:全方位的旅游服务平台，涵盖活动报名、景点介绍、旅行攻略以及游记分享等功能，满足用户在旅游过程中的多种需求，提升旅游体验，同时助力文旅发展。  活动报名：分类呈现各类文旅活动，如文化节庆、户外探险、亲子研学、美食体验等，每项活动展示活动名称、时间、地点、活动亮点）、参与人数上限以及报名截止日期等关键信息，并配以精美的活动海报图片，方便用户快速了解活动概况；点击后进入报名表单填写页面，用户填写完成后可提交报名，系统自动生成报名订单。 景点攻略：将景点按照不同类型进行分类，用户可通过分类导航快速进入相应类别页面浏览景点。 我的游记：展示用户发布的精彩的游记案例，用户也可以自行发布自己的游记。

summary.zh: 文旅小程序是一个全面的旅游服务平台，提供活动报名、景点介绍、旅行攻略和游记分享等功能，旨在提升用户的旅游体验并促进文旅发展。项目基于微信小程序开发，利用腾讯云开发技术，确保安全性和可扩展性，适合快速迭代和小工具使用场景。
summary.en: The WeCulture mini-program is a comprehensive tourism service platform offering features such as event registration, attraction introductions, travel guides, and travelogue sharing, aimed at enhancing user travel experiences and promoting cultural tourism development. Developed on the WeChat mini-program platform, it utilizes Tencent Cloud development technology for security and scalability, suitable for rapid iteration and small tool usage scenarios.

metadata.name: nicegui
metadata.description: Create web-based user interfaces with Python. The nice way.

summary.zh: NiceGUI 是一个基于 Python 的用户界面框架，能够在浏览器中创建直观的网页应用。它支持按钮、对话框、3D 场景等多种元素，非常适合微型网页应用、仪表盘、机器人项目及智能家居解决方案。其简化的数据绑定和自动重载功能，使得开发者可以快速构建和调试应用，提升开发效率。
summary.en: NiceGUI is a Python-based UI framework that allows users to create intuitive web applications in the browser. It supports various elements like buttons, dialogs, and 3D scenes, making it ideal for micro web apps, dashboards, robotics projects, and smart home solutions. Its simplified data binding and auto-reload features enable developers to quickly build and debug applications, enhancing development efficiency.

metadata.name: Python-100-Days
metadata.description: Python - 100天从新手到大师

summary.zh: 《Python - 100天从新手到大师》是一本系统化的Python学习指南，适合初学者通过100天的学习逐步掌握Python编程。该项目涵盖了Python的基础知识、数据结构、函数及面向对象编程等核心内容，并结合实际案例，帮助学习者在多个应用领域（如数据科学、自动化测试等）中提升技能。其低学习门槛和丰富的生态系统使得Python成为热门的编程语言。
summary.en: The 'Python - 100 Days from Novice to Master' is a comprehensive guide designed for beginners to systematically learn Python programming over 100 days. It covers essential topics such as Python basics, data structures, functions, and object-oriented programming, complemented by practical examples. This resource helps learners enhance their skills across various application fields like data science and automation testing. Its low entry barrier and rich ecosystem make Python a popular programming language.

metadata.name: dootask
metadata.description: DooTask是一款开源在线项目任务管理工具，提供各类文档协作工具、在线思维导图、在线流程图、项目管理、任务分发、即时IM，文件管理等工具；同时消息功能使用非对称加密技术让你的沟通更安全。

summary.zh: DooTask是一款开源的在线项目任务管理工具，集成文档协作、思维导图、流程图、任务分发和即时通讯等功能。其独特的非对称加密技术确保了用户沟通的安全性，适用于团队协作和项目管理，提升工作效率。
summary.en: DooTask is an open-source online project management tool that integrates document collaboration, mind mapping, flowcharting, task distribution, and instant messaging. Its unique asymmetric encryption technology ensures secure communication, making it ideal for team collaboration and project management, enhancing work efficiency.

metadata.name: optimizer
metadata.description: The finest Windows Optimizer

summary.zh: Optimizer 是一款先进的 Windows 配置工具，旨在提升用户的隐私和安全性。它适用于新安装的 Windows 系统，提供多语言支持和多种系统优化功能，如禁用不必要的服务、关闭 Windows 监控、清理系统驱动等。尽管该项目已被 OptimizerNXT 替代，但其丰富的功能仍然为用户提供了强大的系统管理能力。
summary.en: Optimizer is an advanced configuration utility for Windows designed to enhance user privacy and security. Recommended for fresh Windows installations, it offers multilingual support and various optimization features, such as disabling unnecessary services, turning off Windows telemetry, and cleaning system drives. Although it has been replaced by OptimizerNXT, its rich functionalities still provide users with powerful system management capabilities.

metadata.name: ollama
metadata.description: Get up and running with Kimi-K2.5, GLM-5, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.

summary.zh: Ollama 是一个开源平台，旨在简化与多种AI模型（如Kimi-K2.5、GLM-5等）的集成与使用。用户可以通过简单的命令行界面快速启动和管理模型，支持多种编程语言的库（如Python和JavaScript），并提供REST API以便于开发者构建自定义应用。适用于需要AI助手或集成现有应用的开发者。
summary.en: Ollama is an open-source platform designed to simplify the integration and usage of various AI models, such as Kimi-K2.5 and GLM-5. Users can quickly start and manage models through a simple command-line interface, with libraries available for multiple programming languages (like Python and JavaScript) and a REST API for developers to build custom applications. Ideal for developers looking to create AI assistants or integrate with existing applications.

metadata.name: AnimateDiff
metadata.description: Official implementation of AnimateDiff.

summary.zh: AnimateDiff 是一个官方实现的模块，能够将大多数社区文本到图像模型转变为动画生成器，无需额外训练。该项目支持多种模型，用户只需简单配置即可生成个性化动画，适用于艺术创作、游戏开发等场景。其技术亮点在于无缝集成与易用性，极大地拓展了文本到图像生成的应用范围。
summary.en: AnimateDiff is the official implementation that transforms most community text-to-image models into animation generators without additional training. The project supports various models, allowing users to generate personalized animations with simple configurations, making it suitable for artistic creation and game development. Its technical highlights include seamless integration and ease of use, significantly expanding the application scope of text-to-image generation.

metadata.name: istoreos
metadata.description: 提供一个人人会用的的路由、NAS系统 （目前活跃的分支是 istoreos-24.10，main或master分支不维护请勿使用）

summary.zh: iStoreOS 是一款入门级路由和 NAS 系统，基于 OpenWRT，经过长期迭代优化，支持多种硬件平台。它旨在为用户提供简单易用的网络管理和存储解决方案，适合家庭和小型办公室使用。活跃的开发分支为 istoreos-24.10，用户应避免使用主分支或其他不再维护的版本。
summary.en: iStoreOS is an entry-level routing and NAS system based on OpenWRT, optimized through extensive iterations to support multiple hardware platforms. It aims to provide users with an easy-to-use network management and storage solution, suitable for home and small office use. The active development branch is istoreos-24.10, and users are advised against using the main or other unmaintained branches.

metadata.name: chromedp
metadata.description: A faster, simpler way to drive browsers supporting the Chrome DevTools Protocol.

summary.zh: chromedp 是一个高效、简洁的 Go 语言库，用于驱动支持 Chrome DevTools 协议的浏览器，无需外部依赖。它适用于自动化测试、网页抓取和性能监控等场景，提供了丰富的功能，如全页截图和复杂操作的示例，帮助开发者快速实现浏览器操作。
summary.en: chromedp is an efficient and simple Go library for driving browsers that support the Chrome DevTools Protocol without external dependencies. It is suitable for automation testing, web scraping, and performance monitoring, offering rich features like full-page screenshots and examples of complex actions, enabling developers to quickly implement browser interactions.

metadata.name: SafeLine
metadata.description: SafeLine is a self-hosted WAF(Web Application Firewall) / reverse proxy to protect your web apps from attacks and exploits.

summary.zh: SafeLine 是一款自托管的网络应用防火墙（WAF）和反向代理，旨在保护您的网络应用免受各种攻击和漏洞的威胁。它通过过滤和监控 HTTP 流量，防御 SQL 注入、XSS、代码注入等多种网络攻击，同时提供动态保护、速率限制和反机器人挑战等功能，确保应用的安全性和稳定性。
summary.en: SafeLine is a self-hosted Web Application Firewall (WAF) and reverse proxy designed to protect your web applications from various attacks and exploits. It filters and monitors HTTP traffic to defend against threats such as SQL injection, XSS, and code injection, while offering dynamic protection, rate limiting, and anti-bot challenges to ensure application security and stability.

metadata.name: DragGAN
metadata.description: Official Code for DragGAN (SIGGRAPH 2023)

summary.zh: DragGAN 是一款基于生成对抗网络的交互式图像编辑工具，允许用户通过简单的点选操作在生成图像流形上进行精确操控。该项目在 SIGGRAPH 2023 上发布，展示了其在图像生成和编辑领域的创新应用，特别适用于艺术创作和视觉效果制作。其技术亮点在于高效的图像生成和灵活的用户交互体验。
summary.en: DragGAN is an interactive image editing tool based on Generative Adversarial Networks, enabling users to manipulate generated images precisely through simple point-based interactions. Released at SIGGRAPH 2023, it showcases innovative applications in image generation and editing, particularly suited for artistic creation and visual effects production. Its technical highlights include efficient image generation and a flexible user interaction experience.

metadata.name: V2EX_Polish
metadata.description: 专业的 V2EX 浏览器扩展，集合了众多实用功能，重塑你的浏览体验！

summary.zh: V2EX Polish 是一款专为 V2EX 用户设计的轻量级浏览器扩展，提供现代化的界面和多种实用功能，如评论层级展示、热门回复筛选和便捷的回复操作，旨在提升用户的浏览体验。该插件持续更新，致力于满足用户需求，确保最佳使用效果。
summary.en: V2EX Polish is a lightweight browser extension designed for V2EX users, offering a modern interface and various practical features such as nested comment display, popular reply filtering, and convenient reply operations, aimed at enhancing the browsing experience. The plugin is continuously updated to meet user needs and ensure optimal performance.

metadata.name: diffusionbee-stable-diffusion-ui
metadata.description: Diffusion Bee is the easiest way to run Stable Diffusion locally on your M1 Mac. Comes with a one-click installer. No dependencies or technical knowledge needed.

summary.zh: Diffusion Bee 是一款专为 M1/M2 Mac 设计的本地运行 Stable Diffusion 的图形用户界面应用，提供一键安装，用户无需具备技术知识。它确保数据隐私，支持多种图像生成和处理功能，如图像到图像、修复、放大等，且优化了性能，适合创意工作者和开发者使用。
summary.en: Diffusion Bee is a GUI application designed for running Stable Diffusion locally on M1/M2 Macs, featuring a one-click installer that requires no technical knowledge. It ensures data privacy and supports various image generation and processing features, such as image-to-image, inpainting, and upscaling, optimized for creative professionals and developers.

metadata.name: arwes
metadata.description: Futuristic Sci-Fi UI Web Framework.

summary.zh: ARWES 是一个基于未来科幻设计的网页用户界面框架，结合了动画和音效，旨在激发对先进科技的想象。该框架受到了《星际公民》、《光环》等作品的影响，适合用于创建具有未来感的应用界面。虽然目前处于开发阶段，但其独特的设计理念和视觉效果使其在科幻主题项目中具有很高的应用潜力。
summary.en: ARWES is a web framework designed for building user interfaces inspired by futuristic science fiction aesthetics, animations, and sound effects. Influenced by productions like Star Citizen and Halo, it aims to evoke advanced technology concepts. Currently in development, it offers unique design principles and visual effects, making it highly suitable for sci-fi themed applications.

metadata.name: crawlab
metadata.description: Distributed web crawler admin platform for spiders management regardless of languages and frameworks. 分布式爬虫管理平台，支持任何语言和框架

summary.zh: Crawlab 是一个基于 Golang 的分布式爬虫管理平台，支持多种编程语言和爬虫框架，如 Python、NodeJS、Scrapy 和 Selenium。它提供了简单的安装和一键启动的功能，适用于需要管理多个爬虫的场景，帮助用户高效地进行数据抓取和管理。
summary.en: Crawlab is a Golang-based distributed web crawler management platform that supports multiple programming languages and frameworks, including Python, NodeJS, Scrapy, and Selenium. It offers easy installation and one-click startup features, making it suitable for scenarios requiring management of multiple crawlers, helping users efficiently perform data scraping and management.

metadata.name: GodOfHacker
metadata.description: 黑客神器

summary.zh: GodOfHacker 是一款功能强大的黑客工具，集成了多种顶级黑客技术，支持一键攻击、破解、CTF 及无线网络操作等多种功能。其高度定制化的插件系统允许用户根据需求扩展功能，适合安全研究、渗透测试及网络安全爱好者。该软件的多样化功能和强大的操作能力使其成为黑客领域的利器。
