summary.en: GodOfHacker is a powerful hacking tool that integrates various top hacking techniques, supporting one-click attacks, cracking, CTF, and wireless network operations. Its highly customizable plugin system allows users to extend functionalities based on their needs, making it suitable for security research, penetration testing, and network security enthusiasts. The diverse features and robust capabilities make it a formidable asset in the hacking domain.

metadata.name: link-lock
metadata.description: Password-protect URLs using AES in the browser; create hidden bookmarks without a browser extension

summary.zh: Link Lock 是一款基于 AES 加密的工具，允许用户在浏览器中对 URL 进行密码保护，确保隐私安全。该工具支持隐藏书签功能，适用于共享计算机上的私人书签存储、加密网页、发送敏感链接等场景。所有数据均存储在生成的链接中，无需服务器支持，确保用户数据的完全控制。
summary.en: Link Lock is a browser-based tool that allows users to password-protect URLs using AES encryption, ensuring privacy and security. It supports hidden bookmarks and is suitable for storing private bookmarks on shared computers, encrypting web pages, and sending sensitive links. All data is stored within the generated link, eliminating the need for server support and ensuring complete user control over their data.

metadata.name: v2ray-agent
metadata.description: Xray、Tuic、hysteria2、sing-box 八合一一键脚本

summary.zh: v2ray-agent 是一款集成 Xray、Tuic、Hysteria2 和 Sing-box 的多协议一键安装脚本，支持多种核心和协议，具备自动 TLS 证书管理、用户和配置管理、订阅链接生成及流量分流等功能。适用于需要快速搭建和管理代理服务的用户，提供简单易用的管理界面，帮助用户高效解锁流媒体和规避 IP 验证。
summary.en: v2ray-agent is an all-in-one installation script integrating Xray, Tuic, Hysteria2, and Sing-box, supporting multiple cores and protocols. It features automatic TLS certificate management, user and configuration management, subscription link generation, and traffic diversion capabilities. Ideal for users needing to quickly set up and manage proxy services, it offers an easy-to-use management interface to efficiently unlock streaming media and bypass IP verification.

metadata.name: pinduoduo_backdoor_detailed_report
metadata.description: Maybe the most detailed analysis of pdd  backdoors

summary.zh: 本项目提供了对拼多多恶意代码的深入分析，涵盖了其潜在后门的详细信息与技术细节。该报告是目前为止对拼多多恶意行为的最全面研究，适用于安全研究人员和开发者，帮助识别和防范相关安全威胁。
summary.en: This project offers an in-depth analysis of malicious code in Pinduoduo, detailing potential backdoors and technical specifics. It represents the most comprehensive study of Pinduoduo's malicious behaviors to date, aimed at security researchers and developers to help identify and mitigate related security threats.

metadata.name: python-proxy
metadata.description: HTTP/HTTP2/HTTP3/Socks4/Socks5/Shadowsocks/ShadowsocksR/SSH/Redirect/Pf TCP/UDP asynchronous tunnel proxy implemented in Python 3 asyncio.

summary.zh: python-proxy 是一个基于 Python 3 asyncio 实现的轻量级异步隧道代理，支持 HTTP/HTTP2/HTTP3、Socks4/Socks5、Shadowsocks 等多种协议。它可用于 TCP/UDP 的代理服务，具备流量统计、负载均衡、用户认证等功能，适合需要高效网络代理的场景，如科学上网和流量转发。
summary.en: python-proxy is a lightweight asynchronous tunnel proxy implemented in Python 3 asyncio, supporting various protocols including HTTP/HTTP2/HTTP3, Socks4/Socks5, and Shadowsocks. It provides TCP/UDP proxy services with features like traffic statistics, load balancing, and user authentication, making it ideal for efficient network proxy scenarios such as scientific internet access and traffic forwarding.

metadata.name: php-dockerfile
metadata.description: PHP7.4，包含composer、redis、mongo、swoole等

summary.zh: cqcqs/php-dockerfile 是一个基于 PHP 官方镜像的定制 Docker 镜像，支持 PHP 7.4 和 8.2，集成了 Composer、Redis、Mongo、Swoole 等多种扩展，适合需要快速搭建 PHP Web 项目的开发者。该镜像通过 Docker Compose 轻松与 Nginx 配合使用，提供了灵活的构建和部署方案。
summary.en: cqcqs/php-dockerfile is a customized Docker image based on the official PHP image, supporting PHP 7.4 and 8.2, and integrating various extensions such as Composer, Redis, Mongo, and Swoole. It is ideal for developers looking to quickly set up PHP web projects. The image easily integrates with Nginx using Docker Compose, offering a flexible build and deployment solution.

metadata.name: shermie-proxy
metadata.description: ⚡️ A proxy packet capture tool implemented in Go, supports multiple protocols such as Http, Https, Ws, Wss, Tcp, Socks5, and can intercept and modify messages.一个用Go实现的代理数据抓包工具，支持Http、Https、Ws、Wss、Tcp、Socks5等多种协议，可以拦截和修改数据

summary.zh: Shermie-Proxy 是一个用 Go 实现的代理数据抓包工具，支持多种协议（如 HTTP、HTTPS、WebSocket、TCP 和 Socks5）。它能够自动识别入站协议，拦截和修改数据包，适用于网络调试和安全测试等场景。该工具简化了数据捕获过程，允许用户在单一端口上监控多种协议，具有灵活的扩展性和高效的性能。
summary.en: Shermie-Proxy is a proxy packet capture tool implemented in Go, supporting multiple protocols such as HTTP, HTTPS, WebSocket, TCP, and Socks5. It automatically identifies inbound protocols, intercepts, and modifies packets, making it suitable for network debugging and security testing. This tool simplifies the data capture process, allowing users to monitor various protocols on a single port with flexible extensibility and high performance.

metadata.name: deepseek
metadata.description: 演示站可以免费使用deepseek-r1满血模型进行AI对话，并支持使用stablediffusion模型画图。本项目是PHP版调用DeepSeek第三方接口进行问答和画图，采用Stream流模式通信，一边生成一边输出。前端采用EventSource，支持Markdown格式解析，支持公式显示，代码有着色处理，支持画图。页面UI简洁，支持上下文连续会话。源码只有几个文件，没用任何框架，支持所有PHP版本，全部开源，极易二开，适合PHP初学者。保姆级教程，账号等周边资源，欢迎进群交流，一切全免费。

summary.zh: DeepSeek是一个基于PHP的开源项目，允许用户通过DeepSeek-R1模型进行AI对话和图像生成。该项目采用流式通信模式，支持Markdown格式和代码高亮，适合PHP初学者。用户可以轻松配置API密钥，且无需数据库，功能包括上下文连续对话、错误处理和自定义API调用。项目旨在促进个人或小组之间的AI应用分享，提供全方位的支持和交流平台。
summary.en: DeepSeek is an open-source PHP project that enables users to engage in AI conversations and image generation using the DeepSeek-R1 model. It employs a streaming communication mode, supports Markdown formatting and code highlighting, making it suitable for PHP beginners. Users can easily configure API keys without the need for a database, with features including contextual conversations, error handling, and custom API calls. The project aims to facilitate AI application sharing among individuals or small groups, providing comprehensive support and a communication platform.

metadata.name: Smoji
metadata.description: Social emoji for mastodon, pleroma, misskey...

summary.zh: Smoji是一个社交表情包项目，旨在为Mastodon、Pleroma、Misskey等联邦社交应用提供丰富的表情选择。该项目内置多种默认表情包，并包含一些有趣的表情，适用于网站和评论系统。用户可以通过简单的命令导入表情，提升社交互动的趣味性。
summary.en: Smoji is a social emoji project designed to provide a rich selection of emojis for federated social applications like Mastodon, Pleroma, and Misskey. It includes various default emoji packs and some fun little emojis, suitable for websites and comment systems. Users can easily import emojis via simple commands, enhancing the fun of social interactions.

summary.zh: LumenApiDevTemplate 是一个基于 Lumen 8.x 框架的快速 API 开发模板，集成了 JWT 认证和仓库模式，旨在提高开发效率和代码维护性。该项目支持 PHP 7.3 及以上版本，利用 Redis 提升性能，适合需要快速搭建高效 API 的开发者。
summary.en: LumenApiDevTemplate is a rapid API development template based on the Lumen 8.x framework, integrating JWT authentication and repository pattern to enhance development efficiency and code maintainability. It supports PHP 7.3 and above, leveraging Redis for performance, making it suitable for developers needing to quickly build efficient APIs.

metadata.name: SMSBoom
metadata.description: SMSBoom - Deprecate: Due to judicial reasons, the repository has been suspended!

summary.zh: SMSBoom 是一个用于短信轰炸的工具，因司法原因已被停用。该项目允许用户通过自定义接口定义、关键字替换和多线程请求等功能进行短信发送。尽管目前无法使用，SMSBoom 的设计强调了易用性，适合初学者，支持 Windows 系统的可执行文件。该工具的主要特征包括命令行支持、代理调用和用户友好的界面。
summary.en: SMSBoom is a tool for SMS bombing that has been suspended due to judicial reasons. It allows users to send messages through custom interface definitions, keyword replacements, and multi-threaded requests. Although currently unusable, SMSBoom emphasizes usability, making it suitable for beginners, with an executable file for Windows systems. Key features include command-line support, proxy calls, and a user-friendly interface.

metadata.name: dtm
metadata.description: A distributed transaction framework, supports workflow, saga, tcc, xa, 2-phase message, outbox patterns, supports many languages.

summary.zh: DTM是一个分布式事务框架，支持多种事务模式（如SAGA、TCC、XA等），旨在实现跨服务的数据最终一致性。它适用于缓存管理、库存扣减、非单体订单系统等场景，支持多种编程语言和数据库引擎，具备高可用性和易于横向扩展的特点，能够有效解决微服务架构中的数据一致性问题。
summary.en: DTM is a distributed transaction framework that supports various transaction modes such as SAGA, TCC, and XA, aiming for cross-service eventual data consistency. It is applicable in scenarios like cache management, inventory deduction, and non-monolithic order systems. Supporting multiple programming languages and database engines, it features high availability and easy horizontal scaling, effectively addressing data consistency issues in microservices architectures.

metadata.name: ColossalAI
metadata.description: Making large AI models cheaper, faster and more accessible

summary.zh: Colossal-AI 是一个旨在降低大型 AI 模型训练成本、提高速度和可访问性的框架。它提供了高效的分布式训练解决方案，支持多种 GPU 配置，能够在云环境中快速启动和运行。通过 Colossal-AI，用户可以轻松实现大规模模型的训练，适用于自然语言处理、计算机视觉等领域，显著提升 AI 工作负载的处理能力。
summary.en: Colossal-AI is a framework designed to make training large AI models cheaper, faster, and more accessible. It offers efficient distributed training solutions that support various GPU configurations, allowing users to quickly start and run in cloud environments. With Colossal-AI, users can easily train large-scale models, applicable in fields like natural language processing and computer vision, significantly enhancing the processing capabilities of AI workloads.

metadata.name: immersive-translate
metadata.description: 沉浸式双语网页翻译扩展 , 支持输入框翻译， 鼠标悬停翻译， PDF, Epub, 字幕文件, TXT 文件翻译 - Immersive Dual Web Page Translation Extension

summary.zh: 沉浸式双语网页翻译扩展提供了多种翻译方式，包括输入框翻译、鼠标悬停翻译，以及对PDF、Epub、字幕文件和TXT文件的支持。该扩展旨在提升用户的阅读体验，使用户能够在浏览网页时轻松理解外语内容，适合语言学习者和需要多语言支持的用户。
summary.en: The Immersive Dual Web Page Translation Extension offers various translation methods, including input box translation, hover translation, and support for PDF, Epub, subtitle, and TXT file translations. This extension aims to enhance user reading experience, allowing users to easily comprehend foreign language content while browsing, making it suitable for language learners and users needing multilingual support.

metadata.name: Openaibot
metadata.description: ⚡️ Build Your Own chatgpt Bot|🧀 Discord/Slack/Kook/Telegram |⛓ ToolCall|🔖 Plugin Support | 🌻 out-of-box | gpt-4o

summary.zh: LlmKira/Openaibot 是一个强大的聊天机器人框架，支持 Discord、Slack、Kook 和 Telegram 等多平台。它提供了消息队列和快照系统，允许插件机制和认证功能，确保插件执行的安全性。项目遵循 OpenAI 格式架构，具备灵活的插件开发生态，用户可以自定义环境变量，适用于多种应用场景，如自动回复和智能助手。
summary.en: LlmKira/Openaibot is a powerful chatbot framework that supports multiple platforms including Discord, Slack, Kook, and Telegram. It features a message queuing and snapshot system, allowing for plugin mechanisms and authentication to ensure secure plugin execution. Following the OpenAI format schema, it offers a flexible plugin development ecosystem where users can customize environment variables, making it suitable for various applications like automated responses and intelligent assistants.

metadata.name: scribe
metadata.description: Generate API documentation for humans from your Laravel codebase.✍

summary.zh: Scribe 是一个为 Laravel 代码库生成人性化 API 文档的工具，提供美观的单页 HTML 文档，包含友好的文本、代码示例和在线 API 测试功能。它能够提取请求参数、调用 API 端点获取示例响应，并支持生成 Postman 集合和 OpenAPI 规范。用户可以自定义文档的 UI 和数据提取策略，适合需要高质量、可维护的 API 文档的开发者。
summary.en: Scribe is a tool for generating human-friendly API documentation from your Laravel codebase, offering a visually appealing single-page HTML doc with friendly text, code samples, and an in-browser API tester. It can extract request parameters, safely call API endpoints for sample responses, and supports generating Postman collections and OpenAPI specs. Users can customize the UI and data extraction strategies, making it ideal for developers seeking high-quality, maintainable API documentation.

metadata.name: tgnav.github.io
metadata.description: TGNAV - Telegram频道群组导航。收录Telegram上的优质频道、群组、机器人，打造一个高质量Telegram导航。

summary.zh: TGNAV是一个高质量的Telegram频道、群组和机器人导航网站，收录超过20,000个优质资源，旨在帮助用户快速发现和访问Telegram上的优秀内容。该平台分为频道导航、群组导航和机器人导航三个模块，提供便捷的分类和搜索功能，是Telegram用户的理想选择。
summary.en: TGNAV is a high-quality navigation website for Telegram channels, groups, and bots, featuring over 20,000 curated resources to help users quickly discover and access excellent content on Telegram. The platform is divided into three modules: channel navigation, group navigation, and bot navigation, offering convenient categorization and search functions, making it an ideal choice for Telegram users.

metadata.name: AnimationAutoUpdate
metadata.description: 🤪动漫、电视剧的自动更新及在线观看。🫡

summary.zh: AnimationAutoUpdate 是一个用于动漫和电视剧的自动更新与在线观看的工具，旨在为用户提供便捷的观看体验。该项目通过自动检测新剧集并更新资源，解决了用户手动查找更新的繁琐问题，提升了观看效率和体验。
summary.en: AnimationAutoUpdate is a tool for automatic updates and online viewing of anime and TV series, designed to provide users with a convenient watching experience. The project automates the detection of new episodes and updates resources, addressing the tedious task of manually searching for updates, thus enhancing viewing efficiency and experience.

metadata.name: alist
metadata.description: 🗂️A file list/WebDAV program that supports multiple storages, powered by Gin and Solidjs. / 一个支持多存储的文件列表/WebDAV程序，使用 Gin 和 Solidjs。

summary.zh: AlistGo 是一个支持多种存储的文件列表/WebDAV 程序，基于 Gin 和 Solidjs 开发。它允许用户轻松管理和访问不同云存储服务（如 Google Drive、OneDrive、阿里云等），并提供简单的部署体验。该项目的技术亮点在于其灵活的存储支持和用户友好的界面，适合需要集中管理多种文件存储的用户。
summary.en: AlistGo is a file list/WebDAV program that supports multiple storage options, built with Gin and Solidjs. It allows users to easily manage and access various cloud storage services (such as Google Drive, OneDrive, and Aliyun) while offering a straightforward deployment experience. The project's technical highlights include its flexible storage support and user-friendly interface, making it ideal for users needing centralized management of diverse file storage.

metadata.name: wechat-video-generate
metadata.description: 一键生成微信对话视频的工具

summary.zh: wechat-video-generate 是一款便捷的工具，旨在一键生成微信对话视频。用户只需填写关键字和图片数量，工具将自动进行文字识别并生成视频，适合需要快速制作社交媒体内容的用户。其主要技术亮点包括 OCR 文字识别和简易的用户操作流程，尽管该项目已不再更新，但仍具备实用价值。
summary.en: wechat-video-generate is a convenient tool designed for one-click generation of WeChat conversation videos. Users simply input keywords and the number of images, and the tool automatically performs OCR text recognition to create videos, making it suitable for users needing quick social media content creation. Key technical highlights include OCR text recognition and a straightforward user operation process, although the project is no longer maintained, it still holds practical value.

metadata.name: wechat-chatgpt
metadata.description: Use ChatGPT On Wechat via wechaty

summary.zh: wechat-chatgpt 项目通过 wechaty 实现了在微信上使用 ChatGPT 的功能，支持对话和命令设置。该项目提供多种部署选项，包括 Docker 和云平台，便于用户快速上手。尽管项目已归档，但其技术亮点在于将强大的 AI 聊天功能与广泛使用的社交平台结合，适合希望在微信中集成智能聊天的开发者。
summary.en: The wechat-chatgpt project enables the use of ChatGPT on WeChat via wechaty, featuring conversation support and command settings. It offers various deployment options, including Docker and cloud platforms, facilitating quick user adoption. Although the project is archived, its technical highlight lies in integrating powerful AI chat capabilities with a widely used social platform, making it suitable for developers looking to incorporate intelligent chat in WeChat.

metadata.name: EServer
metadata.description: Windows Mac平台下的一款集成Nginx、PHP、MySQL、Redis等服务的GUI集成环境

summary.zh: EServer是一款为Windows和Mac平台设计的图形用户界面软件，集成了Nginx、PHP、MySQL和Redis等多种服务，旨在简化开发环境的搭建与管理。其直观的界面和一站式服务使得开发者能够高效地配置和运行各种Web应用，极大提升了开发效率。
summary.en: EServer is a GUI software designed for Windows and Mac platforms that integrates various services such as Nginx, PHP, MySQL, and Redis. It aims to simplify the setup and management of development environments. With its intuitive interface and all-in-one service, developers can efficiently configure and run various web applications, significantly enhancing productivity.

metadata.name: message-pusher
metadata.description: 搭建专属于你的消息推送服务，支持多种消息推送方式，支持 Markdown，基于 Golang 仅单可执行文件，开箱即用

summary.zh: 消息推送服务是一个基于Golang的开源项目，旨在帮助用户快速搭建个性化的消息推送系统。它支持多种推送方式，如邮件、微信、QQ等，并允许用户自定义消息内容和发送渠道。该服务仅需单个可执行文件，开箱即用，适合用于博客通知、深度学习监控和脚本运行结果提醒等场景，具有强大的灵活性和易用性。
summary.en: Message Pusher is an open-source project based on Golang, designed to help users quickly set up a personalized message-pushing system. It supports various push methods such as email, WeChat, and QQ, allowing users to customize message content and delivery channels. The service requires only a single executable file, making it ready to use, suitable for scenarios like blog notifications, deep learning monitoring, and script execution alerts, showcasing great flexibility and usability.

metadata.name: JdBuyer
metadata.description: 京东抢购自动下单助手，GUI 支持 Windows 和 macOS

summary.zh: JdBuyer 是一款京东抢购自动下单助手，支持 Windows 和 macOS 平台。该工具能够全天候监听商品库存，并在商品有货时自动下单，成功下单后可通过微信通知用户。项目提供了 Shell 脚本和图形用户界面两种运行模式，用户可根据需求选择配置，极大提升了抢购效率。
summary.en: JdBuyer is an automatic ordering assistant for JD.com, supporting both Windows and macOS platforms. This tool monitors product inventory around the clock and attempts to place orders automatically when items are in stock, notifying users via WeChat upon successful orders. The project offers both Shell script and GUI modes, allowing users to configure based on their needs, significantly enhancing purchasing efficiency.

metadata.name: paopao-ce
metadata.description: A scalable social community platform powered by Gin backend and modern TypeScript/Vue frontend architecture

summary.zh: PaoPao是一个基于Go和Vue的清新文艺微社区，旨在为用户提供类似Twitter的社交体验。该项目结合了现代技术栈，如Gin、Zinc和Meilisearch，支持多种功能集配置，适合开发者快速搭建个性化社区平台。其简洁的界面和丰富的功能使其成为小型社交网络的理想选择。
summary.en: PaoPao is an artistic micro-community built on Go and Vue, designed to offer users a Twitter-like social experience. The project integrates a modern tech stack including Gin, Zinc, and Meilisearch, allowing for customizable feature sets, making it ideal for developers to quickly set up personalized community platforms. Its clean interface and rich functionalities make it a perfect choice for small social networks.

metadata.name: free-canvas
metadata.description: 一键免费下载在线LOGO设计网站的高清无水印海报或LOGO，支持裁剪功能

summary.zh: 自由画布是一款便捷的浏览器扩展，允许用户一键免费下载在线LOGO设计网站的高清无水印LOGO和海报，支持灵活裁剪功能。该工具适用于标小智和标智客等平台，用户可根据需求选择保留背景或智能裁剪，极大提升了LOGO设计的效率和灵活性。未来版本将增加更多功能和网站支持。
summary.en: Free Canvas is a convenient browser extension that allows users to download high-definition, watermark-free logos and posters from online logo design websites with one click, featuring flexible cropping options. This tool is compatible with platforms like Biao Xiao Zhi and Biao Zhi Ke, enabling users to choose background retention or smart cropping based on their needs, significantly enhancing logo design efficiency and flexibility. Future versions will introduce more features and website support.

metadata.name: mall-cook
metadata.description: 商城低代码平台，可视化搭建H5、小程序多端商城

summary.zh: Mall-Cook 是一款基于 Vue 的低代码商城搭建平台，支持可视化构建 H5、小程序等多端商城。其核心功能包括多页面可视化构建和 Json Schema 生成器，旨在为用户提供简单、便捷的商城搭建体验。该平台适用于电商、问卷等多种场景，帮助开发者快速实现项目落地。
summary.en: Mall-Cook is a low-code platform for building e-commerce stores based on Vue, enabling visual construction of multi-end stores like H5 and mini-programs. Key features include multi-page visual building and a Json Schema generator, aimed at providing users with a simple and convenient store-building experience. The platform is suitable for various applications such as e-commerce and surveys, helping developers quickly realize project implementation.

metadata.name: lingva-translate
metadata.description: Alternative front-end for Google Translate

summary.zh: Lingva Translate 是一个替代 Google 翻译的前端应用，提供免费和开源的翻译服务，支持超过一百种语言。该项目通过抓取 Google 翻译内容，避免直接访问 Google 服务，从而保护用户隐私。技术上，Lingva 使用 TypeScript、React 和 Next.js 构建，结合了高效的测试工具和 GraphQL 处理，适合需要自定义翻译服务的用户和开发者。
summary.en: Lingva Translate is an alternative front-end for Google Translate, offering a free and open-source translation service with support for over a hundred languages. The project scrapes content from Google Translate, preventing direct access to Google services and protecting user privacy. Technically, Lingva is built with TypeScript, React, and Next.js, incorporating efficient testing tools and GraphQL handling, making it suitable for users and developers needing a customizable translation service.

metadata.name: welcome
metadata.description: 翻墙软件下载（Windows/Android/macOS/iOS）

summary.zh: 该仓库提供多平台翻墙软件下载，包括Windows、Android、macOS和iOS，主要支持V2ray、Clash和Shadowrocket等主流翻墙工具。用户可根据自己的操作系统选择合适的下载链接，并附有详细的使用教程和机场推荐，方便用户快速上手和获取资源。
summary.en: This repository offers VPN software downloads for multiple platforms, including Windows, Android, macOS, and iOS, primarily supporting mainstream tools like V2ray, Clash, and Shadowrocket. Users can select appropriate download links based on their operating system, with detailed usage tutorials and recommended VPN providers for quick setup and resource access.

metadata.name: linux-command
metadata.description: Linux命令大全搜索工具，内容包含Linux命令手册、详解、学习、搜集。https://git.io/linux

summary.zh: 该仓库是一个全面的Linux命令搜索工具，收录了600多个Linux命令，提供手册、详解和学习资源，旨在帮助用户快速查找和学习Linux命令。项目以非盈利为目的，内容来自网络和用户贡献，适合开发者和Linux爱好者使用，是一个值得收藏的命令速查手册。
summary.en: This repository serves as a comprehensive Linux command search tool, featuring over 600 Linux commands along with manuals, detailed explanations, and learning resources. It aims to assist users in quickly finding and learning Linux commands. The project is non-profit, with content sourced from the web and user contributions, making it a valuable reference manual for developers and Linux enthusiasts.

metadata.name: soybean-admin
metadata.description: A clean, elegant, beautiful and powerful admin template, based on Vue3, Vite7, TypeScript, Pinia, NaiveUI and UnoCSS. 一个清新优雅、高颜值且功能强大的后台管理模板，基于最新的前端技术栈，包括 Vue3, Vite7, TypeScript, Pinia, NaiveUI 和 UnoCSS。

summary.zh: SoybeanAdmin 是一个基于 Vue3、Vite7、TypeScript、Pinia 和 UnoCSS 的后台管理模板，具备清新优雅的设计和强大的功能。它内置丰富的主题配置、自动化文件路由系统和国际化支持，适合快速构建现代化管理系统，且遵循严格的代码规范，适合开发者学习和实践前沿技术。
summary.en: SoybeanAdmin is a powerful admin template built on Vue3, Vite7, TypeScript, Pinia, and UnoCSS, featuring a clean and elegant design. It includes rich theme configurations, an automated file routing system, and internationalization support, making it ideal for quickly building modern management systems while adhering to strict coding standards, suitable for developers to learn and practice cutting-edge technologies.

metadata.name: kjfx
metadata.description: 2026机场推荐

summary.zh: 2026机场推荐项目提供了一系列高性能的机场服务，适用于需要翻墙的用户。该项目汇总了不同机场的特点、网址及节点类型，帮助用户根据需求选择合适的机场。技术亮点包括多种协议支持（如SSR、V2ray、Trojan等），以及针对速度、稳定性和性价比的详细分类，满足不同用户的使用场景。
summary.en: The 2026 Airport Recommendation project offers a selection of high-performance airport services for users needing to bypass restrictions. It compiles features, URLs, and node types of various airports, assisting users in choosing the right one based on their needs. Key highlights include support for multiple protocols (like SSR, V2ray, Trojan, etc.) and detailed categorization based on speed, stability, and cost-effectiveness, catering to diverse user scenarios.

metadata.name: tabby
metadata.description: A terminal for a more modern age

summary.zh: Tabby（前称Terminus）是一款高度可配置的终端模拟器，集成了SSH和串口客户端，支持Windows、macOS和Linux。其核心价值在于提供丰富的功能，如多窗格分割、主题定制、快捷键配置和全Unicode支持，适合开发者和系统管理员管理远程环境。Tabby还支持直接文件传输和加密SSH配置，提升了用户的操作体验。
summary.en: Tabby (formerly Terminus) is a highly configurable terminal emulator that integrates SSH and serial client capabilities for Windows, macOS, and Linux. Its core value lies in offering rich features such as split panes, theming, customizable shortcuts, and full Unicode support, making it ideal for developers and system administrators managing remote environments. Tabby also supports direct file transfers and encrypted SSH configurations, enhancing user experience.

metadata.name: free-api
metadata.description: 收集免费的接口服务,做一个api的搬运工

summary.zh: 该项目汇集了众多免费的API接口服务，旨在为开发者提供便捷的API资源。每月定期更新新接口，包括火车票查询、天气预报等多种实用功能，适合需要快速集成API的开发者。关注其公众号可获取密钥和更新信息，极大提升开发效率。
summary.en: This project aggregates numerous free API services, aiming to provide developers with convenient API resources. Monthly updates introduce new interfaces, including train ticket queries, weather forecasts, and more, making it ideal for developers needing quick API integration. Following its official account allows access to keys and updates, significantly enhancing development efficiency.

metadata.name: ip2region
metadata.description: Ip2region is an offline IP-to-Region localization library and IP data management framework with both IPv4 and IPv6 supports, 10-microsecond level query efficiency, xdb search client for many programming languages

summary.zh: ip2region 是一个离线 IP 地址管理框架，支持 IPv4 和 IPv6，能够处理数十亿的数据段，查询性能达到十微秒级别。该项目提供了 xdb 数据生成和多种编程语言的查询客户端，适用于需要高效 IP 定位和数据管理的场景，如网络安全、用户地理分析等。其独特的离线特性和高效查询能力使其在大规模数据处理和实时定位中具有显著优势。
summary.en: ip2region is an offline IP address management framework that supports both IPv4 and IPv6, capable of handling billions of data segments with a query performance of ten microseconds. The project provides xdb data generation and query clients for various programming languages, making it suitable for applications requiring efficient IP localization and data management, such as network security and user geographic analysis. Its unique offline capability and high-speed querying make it advantageous for large-scale data processing and real-time localization.

metadata.name: synapse
metadata.description: Synapse: Matrix homeserver written in Python/Twisted.

summary.zh: Synapse是一个开源的Matrix家庭服务器，使用Python/Twisted开发，支持联邦、加密和VoIP等功能。作为Matrix.org基金会的一部分，Synapse旨在为用户提供安全的通信平台。该项目在Element的支持下持续维护，适合需要自定义配置和高安全性的用户。其文档详细介绍了安装、配置和升级过程，适合开发者和系统管理员使用。
summary.en: Synapse is an open-source Matrix homeserver developed in Python/Twisted, supporting federation, encryption, and VoIP functionalities. As part of the Matrix.org Foundation, Synapse aims to provide a secure communication platform for users. The project is actively maintained by Element, making it suitable for users needing custom configurations and high security. Its documentation provides detailed instructions for installation, configuration, and upgrades, catering to developers and system administrators.

metadata.name: gitea
metadata.description: Git with a cup of tea! Painless self-hosted all-in-one software development service, including Git hosting, code review, team collaboration, package registry and CI/CD

summary.zh: Gitea 是一个轻量级的自托管 Git 服务，旨在提供快速、简单的设置体验。它集成了代码托管、代码审查、团队协作、包管理和 CI/CD 等功能，适用于各类开发团队。Gitea 采用 Go 语言开发，支持多种平台和架构，确保了广泛的兼容性和高效性。
summary.en: Gitea is a lightweight self-hosted Git service designed for a fast and easy setup experience. It integrates features such as code hosting, code review, team collaboration, package management, and CI/CD, making it suitable for various development teams. Developed in Go, Gitea supports multiple platforms and architectures, ensuring broad compatibility and efficiency.

metadata.name: gogs
metadata.description: Gogs is a painless self-hosted Git service

summary.zh: Gogs 是一个简单、稳定且可扩展的自托管 Git 服务，旨在以最简便的方式进行设置。它支持多平台，包括 Linux、macOS 和 Windows，适合个人和小型团队使用。Gogs 提供丰富的功能，如用户管理、SSH 访问、Webhook 支持以及多种数据库后端，确保用户能够高效地进行代码管理和协作。
summary.en: Gogs is a simple, stable, and extensible self-hosted Git service designed for painless setup. It supports multiple platforms, including Linux, macOS, and Windows, making it suitable for individuals and small teams. Gogs offers rich features such as user management, SSH access, webhook support, and various database backends, ensuring efficient code management and collaboration.

metadata.name: btcloud
metadata.description: PHP开发的宝塔面板第三方云端

summary.zh: 该项目是一个基于PHP开发的宝塔面板第三方云端解决方案，支持私有化部署，确保用户隐私与安全。它提供了无强制账号绑定的灵活性，允许用户自定义面板功能。项目包含最新的宝塔Linux和Windows面板安装包，支持一键同步插件和增量更新，适合具备一定编程和Linux运维基础的用户。
summary.en: This project is a third-party cloud solution for the Baota panel developed in PHP, supporting private deployment to ensure user privacy and security. It offers flexibility without mandatory account binding, allowing users to customize panel features. The project includes the latest installation packages for Baota Linux and Windows panels, supports one-click plugin synchronization and incremental updates, suitable for users with programming and Linux operation skills.

metadata.name: php-ext-xlswriter
metadata.description: 🚀 PHP Extension for creating and reader XLSX files.

summary.zh: php-ext-xlswriter 是一个高效的 PHP 扩展，专为创建和读取 XLSX 文件而设计。它支持多工作表的文本、数字、公式和超链接写入，具备完全的 Excel 格式兼容性和内存优化功能，适合处理大规模数据导出。该扩展在 Linux、Windows 等多个平台上运行，解决了传统 PHPExcel 在处理大数据时的性能瓶颈，适合需要高效 Excel 文件操作的开发者。
summary.en: php-ext-xlswriter is an efficient PHP extension designed for creating and reading XLSX files. It supports writing text, numbers, formulas, and hyperlinks across multiple worksheets with full Excel format compatibility and memory optimization features, making it suitable for handling large-scale data exports. This extension runs on multiple platforms including Linux and Windows, addressing performance bottlenecks faced by traditional PHPExcel when dealing with large datasets, ideal for developers needing efficient Excel file operations.

metadata.name: Administrative-divisions-of-China
metadata.description: 中华人民共和国行政区划：省级（省份）、 地级（城市）、 县级（区县）、 乡级（乡镇街道）、 村级（村委会居委会） ，中国省市区镇村二级三级四级五级联动地址数据。

summary.zh: 该项目提供了中国行政区划的详细数据，包括省级、地级、县级、乡级和村级的五级联动地址数据，适用于政府统计、地理信息系统及相关应用。数据基于国家统计局的标准，支持多种格式（JSON、CSV）下载，便于开发者集成和使用，且已更新至2023年的最新统计数据。
summary.en: This project offers detailed data on China's administrative divisions, including five levels: provincial, prefectural, county, township, and village. It is suitable for government statistics, geographic information systems, and related applications. The data is based on standards from the National Bureau of Statistics, available for download in multiple formats (JSON, CSV), facilitating integration and use by developers, with the latest updates reflecting 2023 statistics.

metadata.name: weibo-search
metadata.description: 获取微博搜索结果信息，搜索即可以是微博关键词搜索，也可以是微博话题搜索

summary.zh: 该项目提供了一个强大的微博搜索工具，能够根据关键词或话题获取微博内容，并支持多种输出格式，包括CSV和多种数据库。用户可以自定义搜索时间范围和筛选条件，获取大量相关微博数据，适合数据分析、舆情监测等应用场景。其技术亮点在于高效的爬虫架构和灵活的配置选项，能够处理海量数据。
summary.en: This project offers a powerful Weibo search tool that retrieves content based on keywords or topics, supporting various output formats including CSV and multiple databases. Users can customize search time frames and filters to gather extensive relevant Weibo data, suitable for data analysis and public opinion monitoring. Its technical highlights include an efficient crawling architecture and flexible configuration options capable of handling massive datasets.

metadata.name: socks-proxy
metadata.description: 优雅访问国外技术网站 方便程序员学习 按时收费 不用不花钱

summary.zh: 该项目提供了一种通过阿里云API创建按时收费的虚拟机，帮助程序员优雅地访问国外技术网站，节省成本。用户可以随时创建和销毁实例，避免不必要的费用，适合需要灵活访问的开发者。支持PHP环境，操作简单，适合Mac和Linux用户。
summary.en: This project offers a way to create pay-as-you-go virtual machines via Alibaba Cloud API, enabling programmers to access foreign tech websites elegantly while saving costs. Users can create and destroy instances on demand, avoiding unnecessary charges, making it ideal for developers needing flexible access. It supports PHP and is easy to operate, suitable for Mac and Linux users.

metadata.name: china_regions
metadata.description: 2025最新最全省市区街道sql/json 文件

summary.zh: 该项目提供了2025年最新的中国省市区街道的SQL和JSON文件，支持四级和五级地理信息联动，数据来源于京东和国家统计局。项目包含自动更新的爬虫程序，用户可快速获取最新数据，适用于地理信息系统、数据分析和应用开发等场景。支持PHP和Golang两种爬虫实现，方便用户根据需求选择。
summary.en: This project offers the latest 2025 SQL and JSON files for China's provinces, cities, districts, and streets, supporting four-level and five-level geographic information linkage. The data is sourced from JD.com and the National Bureau of Statistics. It features an automated updating crawler, allowing users to quickly obtain the latest data, suitable for geographic information systems, data analysis, and application development. Both PHP and Golang crawler implementations are provided for user convenience.

metadata.name: jd_tb_auto
metadata.description: 基于AutoJsx编写的618||双十一||淘宝||京东||幻想岛总动员||赚喵币||赚汪汪币||炸年兽任务自动完成脚本

summary.zh: 该项目是基于AutoJsx开发的自动化脚本，旨在帮助用户在618、双十一等大型促销活动中自动完成淘宝和京东的任务。其核心价值在于简化繁琐的任务流程，用户只需手动进入任务界面即可，后续操作由脚本自动完成。项目不断更新，优化了任务执行逻辑，提升了用户体验，适合热衷于电商活动的用户。
summary.en: This project is an automation script developed based on AutoJsx, designed to help users automatically complete tasks on Taobao and JD during major promotional events like 618 and Double Eleven. Its core value lies in simplifying tedious task processes, requiring users only to manually enter the task interface while the script handles subsequent operations automatically. The project is continuously updated, optimizing task execution logic and enhancing user experience, making it suitable for avid e-commerce event participants.

metadata.name: WeiboSpider
metadata.description: 持续维护的新浪微博采集工具🚀🚀🚀

summary.zh: WeiboSpider 是一个持续维护的新浪微博采集工具，基于新版 API 构建，支持多种采集模式，包括用户信息、微博内容、粉丝和评论等。核心代码简洁，易于定制，适合需要进行数据分析和社交媒体研究的开发者和数据科学家。
summary.en: WeiboSpider is a continuously maintained data collection tool for Sina Weibo, built on the new API. It supports various collection modes, including user information, posts, followers, and comments. With a concise core codebase, it is highly customizable, making it suitable for developers and data scientists engaged in data analysis and social media research.

metadata.name: laravel-best-practices
metadata.description: Laravel best practices

summary.zh: 该仓库提供了Laravel开发的最佳实践指南，涵盖了单一责任原则、模型与控制器的分离、数据验证等关键主题。通过遵循这些实践，开发者能够提升代码质量、可维护性和性能，适用于各种规模的Laravel项目。该项目还提供多语言翻译，便于全球开发者使用。
summary.en: This repository offers a guide to best practices for Laravel development, covering key topics such as the Single Responsibility Principle, separation of models and controllers, and data validation. By following these practices, developers can enhance code quality, maintainability, and performance, suitable for Laravel projects of all sizes. The project also provides multilingual translations for global accessibility.

metadata.name: download
metadata.description: 极光官方版本下载页 翻墙 代理 科学上网 外网 加速器 梯子 路由

summary.zh: 极光（Aurora）是一个提供多平台下载的翻墙和科学上网工具，支持Android、Windows和Mac OS等操作系统。该项目的核心价值在于为用户提供稳定的版本下载链接，确保在网络受限环境下的顺畅访问。其技术亮点包括多种下载源和抗封锁特性，适合需要翻墙的用户使用。
summary.en: Aurora is a multi-platform download tool for circumventing internet restrictions, supporting Android, Windows, and Mac OS. The core value of this project lies in providing stable version download links, ensuring smooth access in restricted network environments. Its technical highlights include multiple download sources and anti-blocking features, making it suitable for users needing to bypass censorship.

metadata.name: qttabbar
metadata.description: QTTabBar is a small tool that allows you to use tab multi label function in Windows Explorer.   https://www.yuque.com/indiff/qttabbar

summary.zh: QTTabBar 是一款小巧的工具，允许用户在 Windows 资源管理器中使用标签多标签功能，显著提高工作效率。该工具提供多种插件，如文件操作工具和树形目录，增强了用户体验。QTTabBar 经过国内优化，添加了中文特性，方便国内用户使用，支持多种语言和深色模式，适用于 Windows 11。
summary.en: QTTabBar is a lightweight tool that enables tabbed multi-label functionality in Windows Explorer, significantly enhancing work efficiency. It offers various plugins such as file operation tools and tree directories, improving user experience. Optimized for domestic use, QTTabBar includes Chinese features, supports multiple languages, and dark mode, making it suitable for Windows 11.

metadata.name: hand-write
metadata.description: 模拟手写效果，节约时间。

summary.zh: 本项目提供了一种手写模拟工具，通过GUI界面生成高质量的手写风格文档图片，旨在节约用户的时间和精力。支持Windows平台，基于Python和Qt开发，用户可自定义背景和字体，简单易用，适合需要手写效果的文档制作场景。
summary.en: This project offers a handwriting simulation tool that generates high-quality handwritten-style document images through a GUI interface, aimed at saving users' time and effort. It supports Windows platforms and is developed using Python and Qt, allowing users to customize backgrounds and fonts, making it easy to use for document creation requiring handwriting effects.

metadata.name: sherlock
metadata.description: Hunt down social media accounts by username across social networks

summary.zh: Sherlock 是一个强大的工具，旨在通过用户名在 400 多个社交网络上追踪社交媒体账户。它支持多用户查询，并能将结果以文本文件形式保存，方便用户管理和分析。该项目的技术亮点包括对 Tor 网络的支持，增强隐私保护，及多种输出格式（如 CSV 和 XLSX），适合安全研究人员和社交媒体分析师使用。
summary.en: Sherlock is a powerful tool designed to hunt down social media accounts by username across over 400 social networks. It supports querying multiple users and saves results in text files for easy management and analysis. Key features include support for Tor network for enhanced privacy protection and multiple output formats (like CSV and XLSX), making it ideal for security researchers and social media analysts.

metadata.name: shopxo-uniapp
metadata.description: ShopXO免费开源商城uniapp端主题源码、支持(微信+支付宝+百度+头条&抖音+QQ)小程序、H5、APP

summary.zh: ShopXO是一款企业级免费开源电商系统的uniapp手机端主题源码，支持多种小程序平台（如微信、支付宝等）及H5和APP。项目提供可视化DIY拖拽装修功能，内置多种标准组件和主题配色，用户可根据需求快速搭建个性化商城。其灵活性和易用性使其适合各类电商场景。
summary.en: ShopXO is an enterprise-level free and open-source e-commerce system's uniapp mobile theme source code, supporting multiple mini-program platforms (such as WeChat, Alipay, etc.), H5, and APP. The project offers a visual DIY drag-and-drop decoration feature, built-in various standard components, and theme color options, enabling users to quickly build personalized stores according to their needs. Its flexibility and ease of use make it suitable for various e-commerce scenarios.

metadata.name: liKeYun_WxShare
metadata.description: 创建微信分享给好友，分享到朋友圈的卡片，自定义分享，微信jssdk分享，微信卡片分享，微信分享带描述文字、带图片、带标题的卡片。

summary.zh: liKeYun_WxShare 是一款用于创建自定义微信分享卡片的工具，支持分享给好友和朋友圈，能够添加描述文字、图片和标题。该项目利用微信 JSSDK 实现分享功能，适合需要增强社交媒体互动的开发者。尽管该版本已停止维护，开发者可参考其实现方式，或转向作者的新项目进行整合使用。
summary.en: liKeYun_WxShare is a tool for creating custom WeChat sharing cards, allowing users to share with friends and on Moments, including descriptions, images, and titles. Utilizing the WeChat JSSDK, it is suitable for developers looking to enhance social media interaction. Although this version is no longer maintained, developers can refer to its implementation or move to the author's new project for integration.

metadata.name: shopxo
metadata.description: ShopXO企业级免费开源商城系统，可视化DIY拖拽装修、包含PC、H5、多端小程序(微信+支付宝+百度+头条&抖音+QQ+快手)、APP、多仓库、多商户、多门店、IM客服，进销存遵循MIT开源协议发布、基于ThinkPHP8框架研发

summary.zh: ShopXO是一个企业级免费开源电商系统，支持多端自适应布局，包括PC、H5和小程序，满足多商户、多门店的需求。其可视化DIY拖拽装修功能和丰富的组件库使得用户可以轻松定制电商平台，适用于各种行业。基于ThinkPHP8框架开发，遵循MIT开源协议，支持二次开发，极大地降低了企业的电商建设成本。
summary.en: ShopXO is an enterprise-level free and open-source e-commerce system that supports multi-end adaptive layouts, including PC, H5, and mini-programs, catering to multi-vendor and multi-store needs. Its visual DIY drag-and-drop decoration feature and rich component library allow users to easily customize their e-commerce platforms, suitable for various industries. Developed based on the ThinkPHP8 framework and released under the MIT open-source license, it supports secondary development, significantly reducing the cost of e-commerce setup for enterprises.

summary.zh: 校园综合服务平台的服务端项目，旨在为用户提供便捷的校园综合服务。该平台支持后台管理与小程序端协同工作，具备易于安装和使用的特点。用户可以通过简单的命令启动服务，并使用默认账户进行登录，适合高校管理者和学生使用，提升校园服务效率。
summary.en: The backend project of the Campus Integrated Service Platform aims to provide users with convenient campus services. This platform supports collaboration between the backend management and mini-program front-end, featuring easy installation and usage. Users can start the service with simple commands and log in using default credentials, making it suitable for university administrators and students to enhance campus service efficiency.

metadata.name: Beanbun
metadata.description: Beanbun 是用 PHP 编写的多进程网络爬虫框架，具有良好的开放性、高可扩展性，基于 Workerman。

summary.zh: Beanbun 是一个基于 PHP 的多进程网络爬虫框架，具备高可扩展性和良好的开放性。它支持守护进程和普通模式，能够进行分布式爬取，使用 Guzzle 作为下载器，并提供灵活的插件机制，支持多种队列方式和自定义爬取策略，适合需要高效数据抓取的应用场景。
summary.en: Beanbun is a multi-process web crawling framework written in PHP, offering high extensibility and openness. It supports both daemon and normal modes for distributed crawling, utilizes Guzzle as the downloader, and features a flexible plugin mechanism. With support for various queue methods and customizable crawling strategies, it is ideal for efficient data extraction applications.

metadata.name: spider-flow
metadata.description: 新一代爬虫平台，以图形化方式定义爬虫流程，不写代码即可完成爬虫。

summary.zh: Spider-Flow 是一款新一代的爬虫平台，通过图形化界面定义爬虫流程，无需编写代码即可实现数据抓取。它支持多种数据提取方式和格式，能够处理动态渲染页面，并提供丰富的插件扩展功能，适合数据分析、市场调研等场景。
summary.en: Spider-Flow is a next-generation web scraping platform that allows users to define scraping workflows through a graphical interface without writing code. It supports various data extraction methods and formats, handles dynamic rendering pages, and offers rich plugin extension capabilities, making it suitable for data analysis and market research.

metadata.name: weiboSpider
metadata.description: 新浪微博爬虫，用python爬取新浪微博数据

summary.zh: WeiboSpider 是一个强大的新浪微博爬虫工具，使用 Python 编写，支持爬取单个或多个微博用户的详细数据，包括用户信息和微博内容。用户可以选择将数据保存为多种格式（如 TXT、CSV、JSON）或存入数据库（如 MySQL、MongoDB）。此外，该工具还支持下载微博中的图片和视频，适合数据分析、社交媒体研究等应用场景。
summary.en: WeiboSpider is a powerful web scraping tool for Sina Weibo, developed in Python, capable of extracting detailed data from single or multiple Weibo users, including user profiles and posts. Users can save the data in various formats (such as TXT, CSV, JSON) or store it in databases (like MySQL, MongoDB). Additionally, it supports downloading images and videos from Weibo, making it suitable for data analysis and social media research.

metadata.name: php-dfa-sensitive
metadata.description: :see_no_evil: 实现过滤敏感词汇:underage:，基于确定有穷自动机(DFA)算法，支持composer安装扩展

summary.zh: php-DFA-filterWord 是一个基于确定有穷自动机(DFA)算法的敏感词过滤库，支持 Composer 安装，能够高效检测和替换文本中的敏感词汇。该库适用于需要内容审查的场景，如社交媒体、论坛等，提供多种敏感词处理功能，包括标记、替换和获取敏感词列表，便于开发者快速集成和使用。
summary.en: php-DFA-filterWord is a sensitive word filtering library based on the Deterministic Finite Automaton (DFA) algorithm, supporting Composer installation. It efficiently detects and replaces sensitive words in text, making it suitable for content moderation scenarios such as social media and forums. The library offers various functionalities for handling sensitive words, including marking, replacing, and retrieving lists of sensitive words, allowing developers to integrate and use it quickly.

metadata.name: nvm
metadata.description: Node Version Manager - POSIX-compliant bash script to manage multiple active node.js versions

summary.zh: nvm 是一个用于管理多个 Node.js 版本的工具，支持通过命令行快速安装和切换不同版本。它适用于开发者在不同项目中使用不同 Node.js 版本的场景，确保兼容性与灵活性。nvm 的技术亮点包括 POSIX 兼容性和简单易用的命令行接口，极大地提升了 Node.js 开发的效率。
summary.en: nvm is a tool for managing multiple Node.js versions, allowing quick installation and switching via the command line. It is ideal for developers needing different Node.js versions for various projects, ensuring compatibility and flexibility. Key features include POSIX compliance and a user-friendly command-line interface, significantly enhancing Node.js development efficiency.

metadata.name: predict_Lottery_ticket
metadata.description: 双色球+大乐透彩票AI预测

summary.zh: 该项目提供双色球和大乐透彩票的AI预测功能，利用深度学习模型进行数据训练与预测。用户可通过简单的步骤安装环境并获取训练数据，支持对模型参数的灵活配置。项目亮点包括对大乐透数据的爬取与预测，以及对模型预测结果的评估，旨在降低使用门槛，适合对彩票预测感兴趣的开发者和研究者。
summary.en: This project offers AI prediction capabilities for the Double Color Ball and Super Lotto, utilizing deep learning models for data training and forecasting. Users can easily set up the environment and fetch training data, with flexible configuration of model parameters. Key features include data scraping and prediction for the Super Lotto, along with evaluation of model predictions, aimed at lowering the entry barrier for developers and researchers interested in lottery predictions.

metadata.name: laravel-study
metadata.description: Laravel学习

summary.zh: 该项目是一个 Laravel 学习资源，旨在帮助开发者掌握这一优雅的 PHP Web 开发框架。通过 Eloquent ORM，用户可以轻松管理数据关系，并享受简洁的代码结构。项目提供了在线阅读和本地下载的方式，适合希望深入了解 Laravel 的开发者。
summary.en: This project serves as a learning resource for Laravel, aimed at helping developers master this elegant PHP web development framework. With Eloquent ORM, users can easily manage data relationships while enjoying a clean code structure. The project offers both online reading and local download options, making it suitable for developers looking to deepen their understanding of Laravel.

metadata.name: jieba-php
metadata.description: "結巴"中文分詞：做最好的 PHP 中文分詞、中文斷詞組件。 / "Jieba" (Chinese for "to stutter") Chinese text segmentation: built to be the best PHP Chinese word segmentation module.

summary.zh: jieba-php 是一个高效的 PHP 中文分词组件，支持多种分词模式（精确、全模式和搜索引擎模式），适用于文本分析和搜索引擎构建。该项目基于 Trie 树和动态规划算法，能够处理繁体中文，并支持自定义词典和词性标注。其设计旨在提供快速、准确的中文文本处理，适合需要中文分词的开发者和应用场景。
summary.en: jieba-php is an efficient PHP Chinese word segmentation module that supports multiple segmentation modes (accurate, full, and search engine modes), suitable for text analysis and search engine construction. The project is based on Trie trees and dynamic programming algorithms, capable of handling traditional Chinese, and supports custom dictionaries and part-of-speech tagging. It is designed to provide fast and accurate Chinese text processing, ideal for developers and applications requiring Chinese segmentation.

metadata.name: QueryList
metadata.description: :spider: The progressive PHP crawler framework!  优雅的渐进式PHP采集框架。

summary.zh: QueryList 是一个优雅的渐进式 PHP 爬虫框架，基于 phpQuery 构建，具备与 jQuery 相同的 CSS3 DOM 选择器和 DOM 操作 API。它支持复杂的 HTTP 请求，提供强大的内容过滤和模块化设计，适用于多线程爬取和动态页面抓取等场景，适合开发者快速构建高效的网络爬虫。
summary.en: QueryList is an elegant progressive PHP crawler framework built on phpQuery, featuring the same CSS3 DOM selectors and DOM manipulation API as jQuery. It supports complex HTTP requests, offers powerful content filtering, and has a modular design, making it suitable for scenarios like multithreaded crawling and scraping dynamic pages, enabling developers to quickly build efficient web crawlers.

metadata.name: kphp
metadata.description: KPHP — a PHP compiler

summary.zh: KPHP 是一个 PHP 编译器，将有限子集的 PHP 编译为本地二进制文件，运行速度比 PHP 快 3-10 倍。它通过对代码进行整体分析和优化，专注于性能和安全性，支持严格类型检查和编译时优化。尽管 KPHP 有一些限制，如不支持某些 PHP 特性，但它为需要高性能 PHP 应用的开发者提供了一个有效的解决方案。
summary.en: KPHP is a PHP compiler that compiles a limited subset of PHP into a native binary, running 3-10 times faster than PHP. It focuses on performance and safety through whole code analysis and optimizations, supporting strict type checks and compile-time optimizations. Although KPHP has some limitations, such as not supporting certain PHP features, it offers an effective solution for developers needing high-performance PHP applications.

metadata.name: auxpi
metadata.description: 🍭 集合多家 API 的新一代图床

summary.zh: AUXPI 是一个新一代的图床解决方案，集成了多家 API，支持网页和 API 上传图片，具备分发和控制反转功能。用户可通过拖拽自定义首页菜单，且系统提供异步分发机制，确保图片链接根据权重进行优化。该项目适合需要高效图片管理和分发的开发者与团队。
summary.en: AUXPI is a next-generation image hosting solution that integrates multiple APIs, supporting both web and API image uploads, with features like distribution and inversion of control. Users can customize the homepage menu through drag-and-drop, and the system offers an asynchronous distribution mechanism to optimize image links based on weight. This project is ideal for developers and teams needing efficient image management and distribution.

metadata.name: RuoYi-Vue
metadata.description: :tada: (RuoYi)官方仓库 基于SpringBoot，Spring Security，JWT，Vue & Element 的前后端分离权限管理系统，同时提供了 Vue3 的版本

summary.zh: RuoYi-Vue是一个基于SpringBoot和Vue的前后端分离权限管理系统，提供快速开发框架，支持JWT认证和动态权限控制。其高效的代码生成器能够一键生成前后端代码，适用于个人和企业的开发需求。项目还提供了多个版本，包括Vue3和TypeScript，满足不同技术栈的要求。
summary.en: RuoYi-Vue is a front-end and back-end separation permission management system based on SpringBoot and Vue, offering a rapid development framework with support for JWT authentication and dynamic permission control. Its efficient code generator allows for one-click generation of front-end and back-end code, catering to both individual and enterprise development needs. The project also offers multiple versions, including Vue3 and TypeScript, to meet different tech stack requirements.

metadata.name: kphp
metadata.description: KPHP — a PHP compiler

summary.zh: KPHP 是一个 PHP 编译器，能够将有限子集的 PHP 代码编译为本地二进制文件，运行速度比传统 PHP 快 3-10 倍。该项目由 VK.com 开发并于 2020 年开源，专注于性能和安全性优化，支持类型推断和编译时检查。虽然 KPHP 不支持所有 PHP 特性，但它为需要高性能的 PHP 应用提供了一个有效的解决方案。
summary.en: KPHP is a PHP compiler that compiles a limited subset of PHP code into native binaries, achieving 3-10 times faster performance than traditional PHP. Developed by VK.com and open-sourced in 2020, KPHP focuses on performance and safety optimizations, supporting type inference and compile-time checks. While it does not support all PHP features, it offers an effective solution for high-performance PHP applications.

metadata.name: vue-admin-better
metadata.description: 🎉 vue admin,vue3 admin,vue3.0 admin,vue后台管理,vue-admin,vue3.0-admin,admin,vue-admin,vue-element-admin,ant-design,vab admin pro,vab admin plus,vue admin plus,vue admin pro

summary.zh: Vue Admin Better 是一个高性能的 Vue 后台管理框架，支持 Vue 2.x 和 Vue 3.x，强调简化开发流程，提升开发效率。其核心特性包括灵活的权限控制、快速的构建时间和丰富的单页应用模板，适合希望快速搭建管理系统的开发者。该项目支持多平台，具备良好的类型定义和开源商业使用许可。
summary.en: Vue Admin Better is a high-performance Vue backend management framework that supports both Vue 2.x and Vue 3.x, focusing on simplifying the development process and enhancing efficiency. Key features include flexible permission control, fast build times, and a rich set of single-page application templates, making it suitable for developers looking to quickly build management systems. The project supports multiple platforms and offers good type definitions with an open-source commercial usage license.

metadata.name: form-generator
metadata.description: :sparkles:Element UI表单设计及代码生成器

summary.zh: 该项目是一个基于Element UI的表单设计及代码生成器，支持将表单代码直接应用于Vue项目，并能够导出JSON格式的表单。用户可以通过配套的解析器将JSON解析为真实表单，极大地简化了表单开发流程。此外，项目还提供了VSCode插件，帮助开发者快速搭建表单代码，提升开发效率。
summary.en: This project is a form design and code generator based on Element UI, allowing users to directly apply generated form code in Vue projects and export forms in JSON format. The accompanying parser enables the conversion of JSON into real forms, significantly simplifying the form development process. Additionally, a VSCode plugin is provided to assist developers in quickly building form code, enhancing development efficiency.

metadata.name: svelte
metadata.description: web development for the rest of us

summary.zh: Svelte 是一种新型的网页应用开发框架，通过编译器将声明式组件转换为高效的 JavaScript，从而精确更新 DOM。它旨在简化开发流程，使开发者能够更轻松地构建现代网页应用。Svelte 的开源特性和活跃的社区支持使其在开发者中备受欢迎，适合各种规模的项目。
summary.en: Svelte is a novel framework for building web applications, utilizing a compiler to transform declarative components into efficient JavaScript that precisely updates the DOM. It aims to simplify the development process, enabling developers to create modern web applications with ease. Its open-source nature and active community support make Svelte popular among developers for projects of all sizes.

metadata.name: vue-vben-admin
metadata.description: A modern vue admin panel built with Vue3, Shadcn UI, Vite, TypeScript, and Monorepo. It's fast!

summary.zh: Vue Vben Admin 是一个现代化的 Vue3 后台管理面板，采用 Shadcn UI、Vite 和 TypeScript 构建，提供快速的开发体验。该项目支持多种主题和国际化，具备动态路由权限生成的内置解决方案，适合用于中后台系统的开发和学习参考。
summary.en: Vue Vben Admin is a modern Vue3 admin panel built with Shadcn UI, Vite, and TypeScript, offering a fast development experience. The project supports multiple themes and internationalization, featuring a built-in solution for dynamic route-based permission generation, making it ideal for developing and learning about middle and back-end systems.

metadata.name: vue-cli4-config
metadata.description: vue-cli4配置vue.config.js持续更新

summary.zh: 该项目提供了全面的 vue-cli4 配置指南，涵盖多环境变量、代理配置、热更新修复等多项功能，旨在帮助开发者根据需求灵活配置 vue.config.js。适合需要自定义配置的 Vue.js 开发者，避免直接作为模板使用，鼓励学习和实践。
summary.en: This project offers a comprehensive guide for vue-cli4 configuration, covering multiple environment variables, proxy setup, hot module replacement fixes, and more. It aims to assist developers in flexibly configuring vue.config.js according to their needs. Ideal for Vue.js developers seeking custom configurations, it discourages direct use as a template, promoting learning and practice.

metadata.name: easy-meituan
metadata.description: PHP 美团开放平台（外卖）SDK

summary.zh: easy-meituan 是一个 PHP SDK，专为美团开放平台的外卖服务设计。它支持多种调用方式，包括封装方式、原始方式和链式调用，方便开发者集成美团的门店、配送范围、菜品等功能。该 SDK 提供了表单验证和推送处理功能，确保数据的准确性和安全性，适合需要与美团外卖系统对接的开发者使用。
summary.en: easy-meituan is a PHP SDK designed for Meituan's open platform, specifically for food delivery services. It supports various calling methods, including encapsulated, raw, and chain calls, making it easy for developers to integrate features like store management, delivery range, and product listings. The SDK also offers form validation and push handling capabilities, ensuring data accuracy and security, ideal for developers needing to interface with Meituan's delivery system.

metadata.name: notes
metadata.description: 笔记与心得

summary.zh: 该仓库汇集了多种技术笔记与心得，涵盖字符编码、ThinkPHP队列、Laravel会话管理及Lumen路由管理等主题，适合开发者深入学习和参考。通过系统化的笔记，用户可以快速掌握相关技术要点，提高开发效率。
summary.en: This repository consolidates various technical notes and insights, covering topics such as character encoding, ThinkPHP queue, Laravel session management, and Lumen route management. It is suitable for developers seeking to deepen their understanding and reference. The systematic notes enable users to quickly grasp key technical points and enhance development efficiency.

metadata.name: laravel-tips
metadata.description: Awesome tips for Laravel

summary.zh: LaravelTips是一个为Laravel开发者提供的实用技巧与窍门的集合，涵盖数据库模型、路由、验证等多个方面，共有357条技巧，分为14个部分，旨在提升开发效率和代码质量。该项目欢迎贡献者提交PR和新想法，适合所有Laravel爱好者。
summary.en: LaravelTips is a collection of practical tips and tricks for Laravel developers, covering various aspects such as database models, routing, and validation, with a total of 357 tips organized into 14 sections. The project welcomes contributors to submit PRs and new ideas, making it suitable for all Laravel enthusiasts.

metadata.name: isign
metadata.description: Code sign iOS applications, without proprietary Apple software or hardware

summary.zh: isign 是一个用于重新签名 iOS 应用的工具和库，无需依赖专有的 Apple 软件或硬件。它允许开发者在 Linux 等操作系统上对 iOS 应用进行签名，使其能够在其他开发者的设备上运行。通过简单的命令行操作，isign 提供了便捷的应用签名解决方案，适用于跨平台开发场景，提升了 iOS 开发的灵活性和可操作性。
summary.en: isign is a tool and library for re-signing iOS applications without relying on proprietary Apple software or hardware. It enables developers to sign iOS apps on operating systems like Linux, allowing them to run on other developers' devices. With simple command-line operations, isign offers a convenient application signing solution, suitable for cross-platform development scenarios, enhancing flexibility and operability in iOS development.

metadata.name: MockingBird
metadata.description: 🚀Clone a voice in 5 seconds to generate arbitrary speech in real-time

summary.zh: MockingBird 是一个基于 PyTorch 的实时语音克隆工具，能够在 5 秒内生成任意语音。它支持多种中文数据集，并兼容 Windows 和 Linux 系统。用户只需使用新训练的合成器，便可轻松实现高质量的语音合成。该项目适合需要快速生成语音的应用场景，如语音助手、游戏配音等，尽管目前不再积极更新，但仍可通过云端优化版本继续使用。
summary.en: MockingBird is a real-time voice cloning tool based on PyTorch, capable of generating arbitrary speech in just 5 seconds. It supports multiple Chinese datasets and is compatible with both Windows and Linux systems. Users can easily achieve high-quality speech synthesis using a newly trained synthesizer. This project is suitable for applications requiring quick speech generation, such as voice assistants and game dubbing. Although it is no longer actively updated, a cloud-optimized version is still available.

metadata.name: Slscq
metadata.description: 申论生成器(

summary.zh: Slscq是一个申论文章生成器，用户可以输入主题和字数，系统将随机拼凑生成一篇文章。该工具主要用于娱乐和搞笑，生成的内容不代表任何观点，适合非正式场合使用。项目基于C++开发，使用了nlohmann的Json库，提供简单的编译步骤，便于用户快速上手。
summary.en: Slscq is an essay generator that allows users to input a topic and word count, producing a randomly assembled article. This tool is primarily for entertainment and humor, with generated content not reflecting any viewpoints, suitable for informal use. Developed in C++, it utilizes the nlohmann Json library and offers straightforward compilation steps for quick user access.

metadata.name: keepObserver
metadata.description: web observer lib

summary.zh: Keep-observer 是一款基于 JavaScript 的网页监控工具，旨在实时捕获和跟踪用户交互，支持 Elasticsearch 和 Kibana 数据可视化。它提供细粒度的时间维度分析、单用户追踪记录以及页面加载性能分析，适用于前端团队快速部署监控服务，满足业务监控、异常报警和错误追踪等需求，具有高度的可定制性和扩展性。
summary.en: Keep-observer is a JavaScript-based web monitoring tool designed for real-time capture and tracking of user interactions, supporting Elasticsearch and Kibana for data visualization. It offers fine-grained time dimension analysis, single user tracking records, and page load performance analysis, suitable for front-end teams to quickly deploy monitoring services, meeting needs for business monitoring, anomaly alerts, and error tracking, with high customizability and extensibility.

metadata.name: freeCodeCamp
metadata.description: freeCodeCamp.org's open-source codebase and curriculum. Learn math, programming, and computer science for free.

summary.zh: freeCodeCamp是一个开放源代码的学习平台，提供免费的全栈开发和机器学习课程，旨在帮助忙碌的成年人转型进入技术行业。通过互动编码挑战和认证课程，用户可以自我节奏地学习编程、数学和计算机科学，已帮助超过10万人获得开发者职位。
summary.en: freeCodeCamp is an open-source learning platform offering free full-stack development and machine learning curricula aimed at helping busy adults transition into tech. Through interactive coding challenges and certification courses, users can learn programming, math, and computer science at their own pace, having already assisted over 100,000 people in securing developer jobs.

metadata.name: kuaishou-crawler
metadata.description: As you can see, a kuaishou crawler

summary.zh: kuaishou-crawler 是一个用于爬取快手平台上用户视频和图片的工具。该项目采用面向对象的编程方式重构，支持根据用户ID获取作品，并提供exe版本一键执行。用户需登录快手网站并配置cookie以确保爬取的有效性。该工具适合开发者和研究者用于数据采集，但需遵循法律法规，避免非法使用。
summary.en: kuaishou-crawler is a tool for scraping user videos and images from the Kuaishou platform. The project is refactored using object-oriented programming, supporting retrieval of works based on user IDs, and provides an executable version for easy execution. Users must log in to the Kuaishou website and configure cookies to ensure the validity of the scraping. This tool is suitable for developers and researchers for data collection but must comply with legal regulations to avoid illegal use.

metadata.name: devops-exercises
metadata.description: Linux, Jenkins, AWS, SRE, Prometheus, Docker, Python, Ansible, Git, Kubernetes, Terraform, OpenStack, SQL, NoSQL, Azure, GCP, DNS, Elastic, Network, Virtualization. DevOps Interview Questions

summary.zh: 该仓库提供了2624道与DevOps和SRE相关的技术问题和练习，涵盖Linux、Jenkins、AWS等多个领域。适合希望进入DevOps工程师职业的人士进行面试准备，尽管大部分问题并不完全代表真实面试。用户还可以通过提交拉取请求来增加更多练习，促进学习和交流。
summary.en: This repository offers 2624 technical questions and exercises related to DevOps and SRE, covering various domains such as Linux, Jenkins, and AWS. It is suitable for individuals preparing for a career as a DevOps engineer, although most questions do not fully represent actual interviews. Users can also contribute by submitting pull requests to add more exercises, fostering learning and collaboration.

metadata.name: secguide
metadata.description: 面向开发人员梳理的代码安全指南

summary.zh: 腾讯的代码安全指南专为开发人员设计，提供API层面的安全风险分析及实用的安全编码方案。基于DevSecOps理念，该指南旨在帮助开发者从源头规避漏洞，适用于日常参考、安全系统扫描策略编写及漏洞修复。涵盖多种编程语言的安全规范，促进安全编码实践。
summary.en: Tencent's Secure Coding Guide is designed for developers, offering an analysis of API-level security risks and practical secure coding solutions. Based on the DevSecOps philosophy, it aims to help developers avoid vulnerabilities from the source. Applicable for daily reference, writing security scanning strategies, and vulnerability remediation, it covers security standards across multiple programming languages to promote secure coding practices.

metadata.name: mqtt
metadata.description: 🕹 MQTT Protocol Analysis and Coroutine Client for PHP. Support for 3.1, 3.1.1 and 5.0 versions of the MQTT protocol.

summary.zh: 这是一个用于 PHP 的 MQTT 协议分析和协程客户端，支持 MQTT 3.1、3.1.1 和 5.0 版本。该库实现了多种服务质量（QoS）级别，并支持通过 WebSocket 进行 MQTT 通信。作为首个支持 MQTT 5.0 协议的 PHP 库，它为开发者提供了高效的消息传递解决方案，适合物联网和实时数据传输应用场景。
summary.en: This is an MQTT protocol analysis and coroutine client for PHP, supporting MQTT versions 3.1, 3.1.1, and 5.0. The library implements multiple Quality of Service (QoS) levels and supports MQTT communication over WebSocket. As the first PHP library to support the MQTT 5.0 protocol, it provides an efficient messaging solution suitable for IoT and real-time data transmission applications.

metadata.name: Introduction-to-Golang
metadata.description: 【未来服务器端编程语言】最全空降golang资料补给包（满血战斗），包含文章，书籍，作者论文，理论分析，开源框架，云原生，大佬视频，大厂实战分享ppt

summary.zh: 本仓库是一个全面的Golang学习资源包，涵盖了文章、书籍、学术论文、理论分析、开源框架、云原生技术以及大佬视频和实战分享PPT等多种资料，旨在帮助开发者深入理解和掌握Go语言，适合初学者和进阶者使用。
summary.en: This repository serves as a comprehensive resource package for learning Golang, including articles, books, academic papers, theoretical analyses, open-source frameworks, cloud-native technologies, as well as videos and practical sharing PPTs from industry experts. It aims to help developers deeply understand and master the Go language, suitable for both beginners and advanced users.

metadata.name: vue-vuedraggable-iView-
metadata.description: vue，vuedraggable，拖拽，后台管理，页面设计，动态修改页面。该插件页面分为三个部分，左中右。 左边是封装好的一些常用模块组件，中间是用户可拖拽左边的组件到此，自由组合页面并预览的区域，右边则是对左边的组件属性进行修改，展示不同的效果，效果预览见中间这part。

summary.zh: 该项目是一个基于 Vue 的拖拽组件插件，适用于后台管理系统的页面设计。它将页面分为三个区域：左侧为常用模块组件，中间为可拖拽的组合区域，右侧用于修改组件属性并实时预览效果。该插件支持动态修改页面布局，提升用户体验和效率。
summary.en: This project is a Vue-based draggable component plugin designed for page layout in backend management systems. It divides the interface into three sections: the left for common module components, the middle for draggable composition, and the right for modifying component properties with real-time previews. The plugin enhances user experience and efficiency by allowing dynamic page layout adjustments.

metadata.name: Antmove
metadata.description: 小程序转换器，基于支付宝/微信小程序， 轻松地转换成其它平台的小程序。

summary.zh: Antmove 是一款小程序转换器，支持将支付宝和微信小程序轻松转换为其他平台的小程序，极大简化跨平台开发流程。其核心特性包括一键转换、详细的编译和运行时日志、可读性强的生成代码及二次编程支持，适合开发者快速迁移和重用已有代码，提升开发效率。
summary.en: Antmove is a mini-program converter that simplifies the process of converting Alipay and WeChat mini-programs into mini-programs for other platforms, greatly easing cross-platform development. Key features include one-click conversion, detailed compile and runtime logs, readable generated code, and support for secondary programming, making it ideal for developers to quickly migrate and reuse existing code, enhancing development efficiency.

metadata.name: Ventoy
metadata.description: A new bootable USB solution.

summary.zh: Ventoy 是一款开源工具，旨在简化可启动 USB 驱动器的创建过程。用户只需将 ISO、WIM、IMG、VHD(x) 或 EFI 文件复制到 USB 驱动器，无需反复格式化，即可通过启动菜单选择启动。支持多种操作系统，包括 Windows、Linux 和 Unix，兼容 x86 和 ARM 架构，且已测试超过 1300 个 ISO 文件，适合广泛的应用场景。
summary.en: Ventoy is an open-source tool designed to simplify the creation of bootable USB drives. Users can simply copy ISO, WIM, IMG, VHD(x), or EFI files to the USB drive without repeated formatting, and boot them through a selection menu. It supports various operating systems, including Windows, Linux, and Unix, compatible with x86 and ARM architectures, and has been tested with over 1300 ISO files, making it suitable for a wide range of applications.

metadata.name: gin-vue-admin
metadata.description: 🚀Vite+Vue3+Gin拥有AI辅助的基础开发平台，企业级业务AI+开发解决方案，内置mcp辅助服务，内置skills管理，支持TS和JS混用。它集成了JWT鉴权、权限管理、动态路由、显隐可控组件、分页封装、多点登录拦截、资源权限、上传下载、代码生成器、表单生成器和可配置的导入导出等开发必备功能。

summary.zh: flipped-aurora/gin-vue-admin 是一个基于 Vite、Vue3 和 Gin 的企业级开发平台，集成了 AI 辅助功能，支持 TS 和 JS 混用。项目提供了 JWT 鉴权、权限管理、动态路由等多种开发必备功能，旨在加速前后端基础代码的生成，适用于需要快速开发企业级应用的场景。
summary.en: flipped-aurora/gin-vue-admin is an enterprise-level development platform based on Vite, Vue3, and Gin, featuring AI-assisted capabilities and supporting mixed use of TS and JS. The project offers essential development features such as JWT authentication, permission management, and dynamic routing, aimed at accelerating the generation of foundational front-end and back-end code, suitable for rapid development of enterprise applications.

metadata.name: gorse
metadata.description: AI powered open source recommender system engine supports classical/LLM rankers and multimodal content via embedding

summary.zh: Gorse 是一个基于 AI 的开源推荐系统，旨在快速集成到各种在线服务中。它支持多种推荐算法，包括经典推荐和基于大语言模型的推荐，能够处理文本、图像和视频等多模态内容。Gorse 提供用户友好的 GUI 仪表板和 RESTful API，方便数据管理和推荐请求，适合需要个性化推荐的应用场景。
summary.en: Gorse is an AI-powered open-source recommender system designed for quick integration into various online services. It supports multiple recommendation algorithms, including classical and LLM-based recommenders, and can handle multimodal content such as text, images, and videos. Gorse offers a user-friendly GUI dashboard and RESTful APIs for data management and recommendation requests, making it suitable for applications requiring personalized recommendations.

metadata.name: win11React
metadata.description: Windows 11 in React 💻🌈⚡

summary.zh: Win11React 是一个开源项目，旨在使用标准网页技术（如 React、CSS 和 JavaScript）重现 Windows 11 的桌面体验。该项目提供了丰富的功能，包括开始菜单、桌面操作、窗口管理等，适合开发者和爱好者体验和学习前端开发。尽管该项目与微软无关，但它展示了现代网页技术的强大能力。
summary.en: Win11React is an open-source project aimed at replicating the Windows 11 desktop experience using standard web technologies like React, CSS, and JavaScript. It offers a rich set of features including a Start Menu, desktop interactions, and window management, making it suitable for developers and enthusiasts to experience and learn front-end development. Although not affiliated with Microsoft, it showcases the power of modern web technologies.

metadata.name: go-crontab
metadata.description: windows 版 crontab | 基于 golang 的 crontab 定时任务管理器 （替代windows定时任务的一种方案）

summary.zh: Go-Crontab 是一个基于 Golang 的定时任务管理器，专为 Windows 环境设计，解决了缺乏有效定时任务工具的问题。它支持秒级和分钟级的任务调度，能够自动识别操作系统并调用相应的命令。用户可以通过自定义 JSON 配置文件定义多个定时任务，并自动生成日志记录执行情况，具备跨平台特性，适用于 Windows、Linux 和 MacOS。
summary.en: Go-Crontab is a task scheduler manager based on Golang, specifically designed for the Windows environment, addressing the lack of effective scheduling tools. It supports both second-level and minute-level task scheduling, automatically recognizing the operating system to execute the corresponding commands. Users can define multiple scheduled tasks through a custom JSON configuration file, with automatic log generation for execution tracking, and it features cross-platform compatibility for Windows, Linux, and MacOS.

metadata.name: shadowsocks-windows
metadata.description: A C# port of shadowsocks

summary.zh: Shadowsocks for Windows 是一个基于 C# 的代理工具，提供系统代理配置、PAC 模式、用户自定义规则以及服务器自动切换等功能。它支持 HTTP 代理和 UDP 转发，适用于需要安全上网的用户。该项目的技术亮点在于其灵活的配置选项和多实例管理能力，适合开发者和普通用户使用。
summary.en: Shadowsocks for Windows is a C# port of a proxy tool that offers system proxy configuration, PAC mode, user-defined rules, and server auto-switching. It supports HTTP proxy and UDP relay, making it suitable for users needing secure internet access. The project's technical highlights include flexible configuration options and multi-instance management, catering to both developers and general users.

metadata.name: goproxy.cn
metadata.description: The most trusted Go module proxy in China.

summary.zh: Goproxy.cn 是中国最受信任的 Go 模块代理，旨在解决中国开发者在访问 Go 模块时面临的网络限制问题。该项目完全实现了 GOPROXY 协议，并由知名云服务提供商七牛云支持，提供免费、可靠且全球加速的服务。Goproxy.cn 通过缓存模块的原始状态，确保数据的完整性和安全性，适合所有 Go 开发者使用。
summary.en: Goproxy.cn is the most trusted Go module proxy in China, designed to address network restrictions faced by developers in accessing Go modules. Fully implementing the GOPROXY protocol and supported by the renowned cloud service provider Qiniu Cloud, it offers a free, reliable, and globally accelerated service. Goproxy.cn ensures data integrity and security by caching modules in their original state, making it suitable for all Go developers.

metadata.name: car-code-generator
metadata.description: 挪车码生成器

summary.zh: 挪车码生成器通过二维码的方式提供手机联系方式，有效避免直接展示手机号，降低被广告推销人员盯上的风险。用户只需输入手机号，生成二维码并打印，方便临时停车时使用。该工具支持多种扫码方式，简化拨号过程，提升用户体验。
summary.en: The Car Code Generator provides a QR code method to share phone contact information, effectively reducing the risk of direct exposure to phone numbers and unwanted advertising. Users simply input their phone number to generate a QR code, which can be printed for temporary parking use. The tool supports various scanning methods, simplifying the dialing process and enhancing user experience.

metadata.name: BiliDuang
metadata.description: (暂停维护) Bilibili 哔哩哔哩视频下载 C# GUI版 - 支持BV 支持4K 支持地区限制下载 支持互动视频 支持无水印 支持弹幕/字幕下载转换 支持课程下载

summary.zh: BiliDuang 是一款基于 C# 的 Bilibili 视频下载工具，支持多种视频格式和清晰度，包括 4K、无水印、互动视频等。用户可通过账号登录获取追番和收藏夹内容，支持地区限制下载。该软件采用 Material Design 设计，功能丰富，适合学习交流使用，但请遵循版权规定。
summary.en: BiliDuang is a C# based Bilibili video downloader that supports various formats and resolutions, including 4K, watermark-free, and interactive videos. Users can log in to access their watchlist and favorites, with support for region-restricted downloads. The software features Material Design and offers rich functionality, suitable for educational purposes, while adhering to copyright regulations.

metadata.name: gogocode
metadata.description: GoGoCode is a transformer for JavaScript/Typescript/HTML based on AST but providing a more intuitive API.

summary.zh: GoGoCode 是一个基于抽象语法树（AST）的 JavaScript/TypeScript/HTML 转换工具，提供直观的 API。它采用类似 jQuery 的语法选择和转换 AST，支持正则表达式风格的代码匹配与替换，极大简化了代码转换过程。适用于需要快速重构和迁移项目的开发者，特别是在 Vue 和 ElementUI 迁移到 Vue3 和 ElementPlus 的场景中。
summary.en: GoGoCode is a transformer for JavaScript/TypeScript/HTML based on Abstract Syntax Tree (AST), offering an intuitive API. It features a jQuery-like syntax for selecting and transforming AST, along with a regex-like syntax for code matching and replacement, simplifying the code transformation process. Ideal for developers needing quick refactoring and migration, especially in scenarios like transitioning from Vue and ElementUI to Vue3 and ElementPlus.

metadata.name: Taper
metadata.description: 高效率 PC微信机器人框架 WxHook

summary.zh: Taper是一个高效的可拓展式微信机器人框架，采用C++开发，旨在提供稳定且低内存占用的解决方案。该框架支持插件开发，使用多进程模式确保插件的沙盒性，并通过TCP实现进程间可靠通信。项目适合技术研究和学习，鼓励开发者共同参与维护与改进。
summary.en: Taper is an efficient and extensible WeChat bot framework developed in C++, designed to provide a stable solution with low memory usage. The framework supports plugin development, utilizes a multi-process model to ensure plugin sandboxing, and employs TCP for reliable inter-process communication. The project is suitable for technical research and learning, inviting developers to collaborate on maintenance and improvement.

metadata.name: brick-design
metadata.description: 低代码框架，支持流式布局与自由布局拖拽编排，可视化拖拽、随意嵌套组合、实时渲染、实时辅助线展示、自由布局支持辅助对齐、支持自动吸附、实时组件间距展示、实时拖拽排序、状态域管理，可视化属性配置、可视化样式配置、多设备适配展示，支持逻辑渲染、模板字符变量、表达式、自定义方法、自定义状态

summary.zh: Brick Design 是一款低代码框架，提供流式布局与自由布局的拖拽编排功能。其核心亮点包括可视化拖拽、实时渲染、组件间距展示以及状态域管理，支持多设备适配和逻辑渲染，适合快速构建复杂的用户界面。该框架特别适用于需要快速开发和灵活布局的应用场景。
summary.en: Brick Design is a low-code framework that offers drag-and-drop layout capabilities for both flow and free layouts. Key features include visual drag-and-drop, real-time rendering, component spacing display, and state domain management, making it suitable for rapid development of complex user interfaces. This framework is particularly useful for applications requiring quick development and flexible layouts.

metadata.name: MyBookshelf
metadata.description: 阅读是一款可以自定义来源阅读网络内容的工具，为广大网络文学爱好者提供一种方便、快捷舒适的试读体验。

summary.zh: 阅读是一款为网络文学爱好者提供自定义来源的阅读工具，旨在提升试读体验。通过专业搜索，用户可以便捷地获取不同网站的最新章节，减少无意义的时间浪费，同时促进优秀网络文学的传播与发展。该项目已转移至新地址并使用Kotlin重新开发，强调开源与用户隐私保护。
summary.en: Reading is a customizable tool for web literature enthusiasts, designed to enhance the reading experience. By offering professional search capabilities, users can conveniently access the latest chapters from various websites, reducing wasted time while promoting the dissemination of quality web literature. The project has migrated to a new address and has been redeveloped in Kotlin, emphasizing open-source principles and user privacy protection.

metadata.name: go-gin-api
metadata.description: 基于 Gin 进行模块化设计的 API 框架，封装了常用功能，使用简单，致力于进行快速的业务研发。比如，支持 cors 跨域、jwt 签名验证、zap 日志收集、panic 异常捕获、trace 链路追踪、prometheus 监控指标、swagger 文档生成、viper 配置文件解析、gorm 数据库组件、gormgen 代码生成工具、graphql 查询语言、errno 统一定义错误码、gRPC 的使用、cron 定时任务 等等。

summary.zh: go-gin-api 是一个基于 Gin 框架的模块化 API 设计，旨在简化业务研发过程。它集成了多种常用功能，如 CORS 支持、JWT 验证、日志收集、链路追踪、Prometheus 监控等，提供了快速开发和高效管理的能力，适合需要快速迭代的项目。该框架还强调代码规范，帮助团队避免混乱。
summary.en: go-gin-api is a modular API framework based on the Gin framework, designed to simplify the business development process. It integrates various common features such as CORS support, JWT validation, logging, tracing, and Prometheus monitoring, enabling rapid development and efficient management, suitable for projects requiring quick iterations. The framework also emphasizes code standards to help teams avoid chaos.

metadata.name: lizhireader
metadata.description: 这是一个基于阅读改版的软件

summary.zh: 荔枝阅读是一款开源网络文学搜索工具，旨在为用户提供便捷的试读体验。通过提交书名关键词到多个第三方网站，荔枝阅读帮助用户快速获取最新章节，减少搜索时间。该软件强调用户隐私保护，并不对第三方内容负责，鼓励用户发现优秀网络小说，促进网络文学的传播与发展。
summary.en: Lizhi Reader is an open-source tool for searching online literature, designed to provide users with a convenient reading experience. By submitting book title keywords to various third-party websites, it helps users quickly access the latest chapters, minimizing search time. The software emphasizes user privacy protection and does not take responsibility for third-party content, encouraging users to discover excellent online novels and promoting the dissemination and development of online literature.

metadata.name: WeChatSeptet-ForMac
metadata.description: 简版Mac微信小助手

summary.zh: WeChatSeptet-ForMac 是一款简版的 Mac 微信小助手，旨在为用户提供便捷的微信使用体验。尽管项目已停止维护，但其核心功能仍然为用户提供了轻量级的微信扩展服务，适合需要简化操作的用户群体。
summary.en: WeChatSeptet-ForMac is a lightweight Mac WeChat assistant designed to enhance user experience with convenient features. Although the project is no longer maintained, it still offers essential functionalities for users seeking a simplified WeChat operation.

metadata.name: v2rayNG
metadata.description: A V2Ray client for Android, support Xray core and v2fly core

summary.zh: v2rayNG 是一款适用于 Android 的 V2Ray 客户端，支持 Xray 核心和 v2fly 核心。该项目提供了便捷的代理服务，能够处理 geoip 和 geosite 数据，用户可通过 Telegram 获取更新和支持。其开发基于 Kotlin，支持 Android API 24 及以上，适合需要科学上网的用户，具有良好的扩展性和社区支持。
summary.en: v2rayNG is an Android client for V2Ray, supporting both Xray and v2fly cores. This project offers convenient proxy services, handling geoip and geosite data, with updates and support available via Telegram. Developed in Kotlin, it supports Android API 24 and above, making it suitable for users needing internet access, with good extensibility and community backing.

metadata.name: ios_super_sign_vue
metadata.description: 超级签名 免签封装 安卓打包 企业签名 超级签名MDM 企业签名MDM vue前端

summary.zh: 该项目提供了一个基于 Vue 的前端解决方案，旨在简化企业级 iOS 应用的超级签名和免签打包流程。用户可以通过自助分发功能，快速完成安卓打包和企业签名，提升了开发和发布的效率。项目还提供了详细的部署教程，便于用户快速上手。
summary.en: This project offers a Vue-based frontend solution designed to simplify the super signing and non-signing packaging process for enterprise-level iOS applications. Users can quickly complete Android packaging and enterprise signing through a self-distribution feature, enhancing development and release efficiency. The project also provides detailed deployment tutorials for easy onboarding.

metadata.name: zpan
metadata.description: A self-hosted cloud disk base on the cloud storage./ 一个基于云存储的网盘系统，用于自建私人网盘或企业网盘。

summary.zh: ZPan 是一个自托管的云盘系统，基于兼容 S3 协议的云存储，支持文件和文件夹管理、分享、预览及多用户存储空间控制。其无带宽限制的特性使其适合个人和企业使用，提供安全、灵活的存储解决方案。
summary.en: ZPan is a self-hosted cloud disk system based on S3-compatible cloud storage. It supports file and folder management, sharing, previewing, and multi-user storage space control. With no bandwidth limitations, it is suitable for both personal and enterprise use, offering a secure and flexible storage solution.

metadata.name: relationship
metadata.description: 中国亲戚关系计算器 - 家庭称谓/亲戚称呼/称呼计算/辈分计算/亲戚关系算法/親戚稱呼計算機_Chinese kinship system.

summary.zh: 中国亲戚关系计算器提供了一种简便的方式来计算和理解家庭称谓，解决了现代人对亲戚关系模糊的困扰。用户只需输入相关称谓，即可快速获得准确的称呼。该工具支持多种叫法和逆向查找，适用于不同地域的习惯，极大地方便了家庭聚会时的称呼使用。
summary.en: The Chinese kinship calculator offers a convenient way to compute and understand family titles, addressing the confusion many face regarding relatives. Users can quickly obtain accurate titles by inputting relevant terms. The tool supports various appellations and reverse lookup, accommodating regional naming customs, greatly facilitating the use of titles during family gatherings.

metadata.name: nosqlclient
metadata.description: Cross-platform and self hosted, easy to use, intuitive mongodb management tool - Formerly Mongoclient

summary.zh: Nosqlclient（前称Mongoclient）是一个跨平台、自托管的MongoDB管理工具，支持MongoDB 4.0及以上版本。其界面友好、易于使用，适合开发者和数据库管理员进行数据库管理。尽管该项目不再积极开发，但仍可通过Docker进行安装和使用，适合需要自托管解决方案的用户。
summary.en: Nosqlclient, formerly known as Mongoclient, is a cross-platform, self-hosted MongoDB management tool that supports MongoDB 4.0 and above. It features an intuitive interface, making it suitable for developers and database administrators. Although the project is no longer actively developed, it can still be installed and used via Docker, catering to users needing self-hosted solutions.

metadata.name: AnotherRedisDesktopManager
metadata.description: 🚀🚀🚀A faster, better and more stable Redis desktop manager [GUI client], compatible with Linux, Windows, Mac.

summary.zh: Another Redis Desktop Manager 是一款高效、稳定的 Redis 桌面管理工具，兼容 Linux、Windows 和 Mac 系统。它能够快速加载大量键值，避免崩溃，提供了友好的用户界面，适合开发者和运维人员使用。该工具支持多种安装方式，极大地方便了用户的使用体验。
summary.en: Another Redis Desktop Manager is a fast and stable Redis desktop management tool compatible with Linux, Windows, and Mac. It efficiently loads massive key-value pairs without crashing, offering a user-friendly interface ideal for developers and operations personnel. The tool supports various installation methods, greatly enhancing user experience.

metadata.name: octane
metadata.description: Supercharge your Laravel application's performance.

summary.zh: Laravel Octane 通过高性能应用服务器（如 FrankenPHP、Open Swoole、Swoole 和 RoadRunner）显著提升 Laravel 应用的性能。该工具通过一次性启动应用并将其保持在内存中，以超高速处理请求，适合需要高并发和快速响应的应用场景，极大地优化了开发者的工作效率。
summary.en: Laravel Octane significantly enhances the performance of Laravel applications by leveraging high-powered application servers such as FrankenPHP, Open Swoole, Swoole, and RoadRunner. It boots the application once and keeps it in memory to handle requests at supersonic speeds, making it ideal for high-concurrency and rapid-response scenarios, thus greatly optimizing developer efficiency.

metadata.name: MiniProgram-DouyinParse
metadata.description: 抖音无水印视频解析小程序，利用云开发云函数无需后端服务器即可上线

summary.zh: MiniProgram-DouyinParse 是一款无水印抖音视频解析小程序，利用云开发技术实现无需后端服务器的快速部署。用户只需注册小程序并配置相关环境，即可轻松解析抖音视频链接，适合需要视频下载功能的开发者和内容创作者。该项目的技术亮点在于简化了视频解析流程，降低了开发门槛。
summary.en: MiniProgram-DouyinParse is a watermark-free Douyin video parsing mini-program that utilizes cloud development technology for quick deployment without a backend server. Users can easily parse Douyin video links by registering the mini-program and configuring the environment, making it suitable for developers and content creators needing video download functionality. The project's technical highlight lies in simplifying the video parsing process and lowering the development barrier.

metadata.name: dev-sidecar
metadata.description: 开发者边车，github打不开，github加速，git clone加速，git release下载加速，stackoverflow加速

summary.zh: dev-sidecar 是一款为开发者提供加速服务的边车工具，通过本地代理将 HTTPS 请求转发至国内加速通道，显著提升 GitHub、Stack Overflow 和 npm 等网站的访问速度。其核心功能包括智能 DNS 解析、请求拦截与镜像切换，确保高可用性与快速响应，适用于 Windows、Mac 和 Linux 系统，特别适合需要频繁访问外部开发资源的用户。
