summary.en: dev-sidecar is a sidecar tool designed to enhance developer experience by accelerating access to services like GitHub, Stack Overflow, and npm through local proxying to domestic acceleration channels. Key features include intelligent DNS resolution, request interception, and mirror switching, ensuring high availability and quick response times. It supports Windows, Mac, and Linux systems, making it ideal for users who frequently access external development resources.

metadata.name: video-parse-tools
metadata.description: 短视频的PHP拓展包，集成各大短视频的去水印功能、抖音、快手、微视主流短视频。PHP去水印

summary.zh: Smalls是一个PHP扩展包，专注于短视频去水印功能，支持抖音、快手、微视等21个主流平台。该工具允许用户提取短视频并去除水印，适合开发者在短视频应用中集成去水印功能。项目提供了详细的使用文档和示例，便于快速上手，尽管该项目已不再更新，但仍然为短视频处理提供了便利。
summary.en: Smalls is a PHP extension package focused on watermark removal for short videos, supporting 21 mainstream platforms like Douyin, Kuaishou, and Weishi. This tool allows users to extract short videos and remove watermarks, making it suitable for developers integrating watermark removal features in short video applications. The project offers detailed documentation and examples for quick onboarding, although it is no longer actively maintained.

metadata.name: laravel-bridge
metadata.description: Complete Laravel integration for RoadRunner with support for HTTP, Jobs, gRPC, and Temporal plugins - going beyond Octane's capabilities

summary.zh: RoadRunner Laravel Bridge 提供了与 RoadRunner 的完整集成，支持 HTTP、作业、gRPC 和 Temporal 插件，超越了 Octane 的能力。该包允许开发者轻松配置和管理 Laravel 应用的高性能运行环境，适用于需要高并发处理和灵活插件支持的现代 Web 应用场景。
summary.en: The RoadRunner Laravel Bridge offers complete integration with RoadRunner, supporting HTTP, Jobs, gRPC, and Temporal plugins, surpassing Octane's capabilities. This package enables developers to easily configure and manage a high-performance runtime environment for Laravel applications, suitable for modern web applications requiring high concurrency and flexible plugin support.

metadata.name: puffidea
metadata.description: 获取Jetbrains激活码

summary.zh: Puffidea 是一个用于获取 Jetbrains 激活码的工具，简化了激活过程。用户只需通过简单的命令安装并使用，便可快速获取所需的激活码，适合开发者和软件使用者。该项目提供了便捷的安装和使用方式，且支持通过公众号获取更新，确保用户始终使用最新版本。
summary.en: Puffidea is a tool for obtaining Jetbrains activation codes, streamlining the activation process. Users can quickly acquire the required activation codes with simple commands, making it suitable for developers and software users. The project offers convenient installation and usage methods, and supports updates via a public account to ensure users always have the latest version.

metadata.name: Reader
metadata.description: A win32 txt file reader

summary.zh: Reader 是一款开源的 Win32 文本和电子书阅读器，专为网络文学爱好者设计，提供便捷的阅读体验。软件支持多种文件格式，包括 TXT 和 EPUB，并具备丰富的自定义设置，如字体、段距和背景色等。其最新版本修复了多个功能问题，并优化了用户体验，是开发者和爱好者的学习参考。
summary.en: Reader is an open-source Win32 text and eBook reader designed for online literature enthusiasts, offering a convenient reading experience. It supports various file formats including TXT and EPUB, with extensive customization options such as font, line spacing, and background color. The latest version fixes multiple issues and enhances user experience, making it a valuable reference for developers and enthusiasts.

metadata.name: yanderifier
metadata.description: First-Order-Wrapper (formerly known as Yanderify) is a front-end tool for first-order-motion. It aims to make using first-order-motion face animation accessible to everyone, for education and entertainment.

summary.zh: First-Order-Wrapper（前称Yanderify）是一个前端工具，旨在使第一阶运动面部动画的使用变得简单易懂，适用于教育和娱乐。该工具通过提供一个用户友好的界面，消除了对命令行和库安装的需求，使任何技术水平的用户都能轻松使用。它利用人工智能将源视频与面部图像结合，生成动态面部动画，适合广泛的应用场景。
summary.en: First-Order-Wrapper, formerly known as Yanderify, is a front-end tool designed to make first-order motion face animation accessible for education and entertainment. It provides a user-friendly interface that eliminates the need for command line knowledge and library installations, allowing users of any technical skill level to easily utilize it. The tool employs AI to animate a face image based on the movements of a source video, making it suitable for a wide range of applications.

metadata.name: fucking-algorithm
metadata.description: Crack LeetCode, not only how, but also why.

summary.zh: 该仓库包含60多篇基于LeetCode问题的原创文章，旨在帮助用户理解算法背后的思维过程，而不仅仅是记忆解决方案。重点在于清晰和实用的理解，构建可重用的思维框架，使算法问题变得易于接近和解决。适合希望通过LeetCode提升编程能力以求职的学习者。
summary.en: This repository contains over 60 original articles based on LeetCode problems, aimed at helping users understand the thought process behind algorithms rather than just memorizing solutions. The focus is on clarity and practical understanding, building reusable mental frameworks that make algorithm problems approachable and solvable. Ideal for learners looking to enhance their programming skills through LeetCode for job opportunities.

metadata.name: frida-python
metadata.description: Frida Python bindings

summary.zh: frida-python 提供了 Frida 的 Python 绑定，使开发者能够在 Python 环境中轻松使用 Frida 的强大功能。该项目适用于需要动态分析和调试的场景，尤其是在安全研究和逆向工程领域。其简化的接口和灵活的使用方式，使得开发者能够快速构建和测试自定义的 Frida 扩展。
summary.en: frida-python provides Python bindings for Frida, enabling developers to easily utilize Frida's powerful capabilities within a Python environment. This project is ideal for dynamic analysis and debugging, particularly in security research and reverse engineering. Its simplified interface and flexible usage allow developers to quickly build and test custom Frida extensions.

metadata.name: breadwinner
metadata.description: 使用数学和计算机知识投机倒把

summary.zh: 该仓库收集了作者在金融市场中的失败案例，包括加密货币套利、中国体育彩票预测和京东众筹抽奖等项目。尽管这些策略未能盈利，但作者希望通过分享这些经验，帮助他人从中获得启发，探索更有效的投资策略。
summary.en: This repository collects the author's failed cases in the financial market, including cryptocurrency arbitrage, Chinese sports lottery prediction, and JD crowdfunding lottery. Although these strategies did not yield profits, the author hopes to inspire others to explore more effective investment strategies through sharing these experiences.

metadata.name: uni-app-template
metadata.description: uni-app的项目模板

summary.zh: 该uni-app项目模板是一个为期五年的开源快速开发框架，旨在帮助具有一年以上uni-app经验的开发者快速上手。模板包含丰富的组件示例和SDK功能，如登录、支付、分享等，适用于H5和移动端应用开发。其结构清晰，易于扩展，适合用于构建复杂的前端项目。
summary.en: This uni-app template is a five-year open-source rapid development framework designed to help developers with over a year of experience in uni-app get started quickly. The template includes a wealth of component examples and SDK functionalities such as login, payment, and sharing, suitable for H5 and mobile application development. Its clear structure and extensibility make it ideal for building complex frontend projects.

metadata.name: iqiqiya-API
metadata.description: API接口大全不断更新中~欢迎Fork和Star(✎ 1.一言(古诗句版)api  ✎ 2.必应每日一图api  ✎ 3.在线ip查询  ✎ 4.m3u8视频在线解析api  ✎ 5.随机生成二次元图片api  ✎ 6.快递查询api-支持国内百家快递  ✎ 7.flv视频在线解析api ✎ 8.抖音视频无水印解析api✎ 9.一句话随机图片api✎ 10.QQ用户信息获取api✎11.哔哩哔哩封面图获取api✎12.千图网58pic无水印解析下载api✎13.喜马拉雅主播FM数据采集api✎14.网易云音乐api✎15.CCTV央视网视频解析api✎16.微信运动刷步数api✎17.皮皮搞笑APP短视频无水印解析api✎18.皮皮虾短视频去水印解析✎19.蓝奏云直链解析✎20.千库网无水印解析✎21.17素材网免VIP解析✎22.快手短视频去水印解析✎23.微视短视频去水印解析)

summary.zh: iqiqiya-API 是一个不断更新的 API 接口集合，涵盖了视频解析、音频获取、图片生成等多种功能，适用于开发者和爱好者。项目提供了丰富的接口，例如抖音、快手、网易云音乐等，方便用户获取多媒体内容。其核心亮点在于多样化的接口选择和实时更新，适合需要快速集成多种 API 的场景。
summary.en: iqiqiya-API is a continuously updated collection of APIs that covers various functionalities such as video parsing, audio retrieval, and image generation, suitable for developers and enthusiasts. The project offers a rich set of interfaces, including Douyin, Kuaishou, and NetEase Cloud Music, facilitating users to access multimedia content. Its core highlights are the diverse API options and real-time updates, ideal for scenarios requiring quick integration of multiple APIs.

metadata.name: v2ray-core
metadata.description: A platform for building proxies to bypass network restrictions.

summary.zh: V2Ray Core 是一个构建代理的平台，旨在帮助用户绕过网络限制，保护网络连接的安全性和隐私。该项目提供了一套强大的网络工具，适用于需要安全网络访问的场景，如翻墙和数据加密。其核心技术基于 Go 语言，支持多种网络协议，具有灵活的配置和扩展性。
summary.en: V2Ray Core is a platform for building proxies aimed at helping users bypass network restrictions while securing their network connections and privacy. This project offers a robust set of network tools suitable for scenarios requiring secure internet access, such as circumventing censorship and data encryption. Its core technology is based on Go, supporting various network protocols with flexible configuration and extensibility.

metadata.name: V2rayU
metadata.description: V2rayU,基于v2ray核心的mac版客户端,用于科学上网,使用swift编写,支持trojan,vmess,shadowsocks,socks5等服务协议,支持订阅, 支持二维码,剪贴板导入,手动配置,二维码分享等

summary.zh: V2rayU 是一款基于 V2Ray 核心的 macOS 客户端，旨在提供科学上网服务。它使用 Swift 编写，支持多种协议，包括 Trojan、Vmess、Shadowsocks 和 Socks5。该客户端具备订阅功能、二维码扫描、剪贴板导入及手动配置等多种实用特性，极大地方便了用户的网络访问体验。
summary.en: V2rayU is a macOS client based on the V2Ray core, designed for scientific internet access. Written in Swift, it supports multiple protocols including Trojan, Vmess, Shadowsocks, and Socks5. The client features subscription support, QR code scanning, clipboard import, and manual configuration, greatly enhancing the user experience for network access.

metadata.name: RevokeMsgPatcher
metadata.description: :trollface: A hex editor for WeChat/QQ/TIM - PC版微信/QQ/TIM防撤回补丁（我已经看到了，撤回也没用了）

summary.zh: RevokeMsgPatcher 是一款针对 Windows 平台的微信、QQ 和 TIM 的防撤回补丁工具。它通过修改 WeChatWin.dll 和 IM.dll 文件，允许用户在消息被撤回后仍能查看内容，支持多开功能，提升了用户的聊天体验。该工具简单易用，适合需要保留聊天记录的用户。
summary.en: RevokeMsgPatcher is a patch tool for WeChat, QQ, and TIM on Windows that prevents message recall. By modifying WeChatWin.dll and IM.dll files, it allows users to view messages even after they are retracted, and supports multi-instance functionality, enhancing the chat experience. The tool is user-friendly and ideal for users who want to retain chat records.

metadata.name: WeChatICU-ForMac
metadata.description: Mac版企业微信消息防撤回, 聊天会话去水印

summary.zh: WeChatICU-ForMac 是一款针对 Mac 用户的企业微信消息防撤回工具，能够有效去除聊天会话中的水印。该项目虽然已停止维护，但其核心功能依然为用户提供了更好的聊天体验，适合需要保留重要信息的职场用户。
summary.en: WeChatICU-ForMac is a tool for Mac users that prevents message retraction in WeChat Work and removes watermarks from chat sessions. Although the project is no longer maintained, its core functionality still enhances the chat experience for users who need to retain important information in a professional setting.

metadata.name: Anti-recall
metadata.description: Android 免root 防撤回神器 !

summary.zh: Anti-recall 是一款针对 Android 的免 root 防撤回工具，能够实时记录和显示微信及 QQ 的撤回消息，确保用户不会错过重要信息。其核心功能包括通知栏显示撤回消息、查看撤回的图片和闪照等。该软件在 v5.2.0 版本后转为闭源，因其高权限需求及商业化考虑，提供了更强大的消息记录和提醒功能。
summary.en: Anti-recall is a non-root tool for Android that prevents message recall on WeChat and QQ, allowing users to capture and display recalled messages in real-time. Key features include notification display of recalled messages, viewing recalled images, and flash photos. The software transitioned to a closed source after version 5.2.0 due to high permission requirements and commercialization, offering enhanced message recording and notification capabilities.

metadata.name: PaddleGAN
metadata.description: PaddlePaddle GAN library, including lots of interesting applications like First-Order motion transfer,  Wav2Lip, picture repair, image editing, photo2cartoon, image style transfer, GPEN, and so on.

summary.zh: PaddleGAN 是一个高性能的生成对抗网络库，支持多种应用场景，如图像编辑、视频超分辨率和风格迁移等。它为开发者提供了快速构建、训练和部署 GAN 的能力，适用于学术研究、娱乐和工业应用。该库包含多种前沿技术和教程，帮助用户掌握 GAN 的基本与高级知识。
summary.en: PaddleGAN is a high-performance Generative Adversarial Network library that supports various applications such as image editing, video super-resolution, and style transfer. It enables developers to quickly build, train, and deploy GANs for academic, entertainment, and industrial purposes. The library features cutting-edge technologies and tutorials to help users master both basic and advanced GAN concepts.

summary.zh: 校园综合服务平台的后台服务端项目，旨在为校园用户提供综合服务。该项目支持数据库配置和依赖安装，用户可通过小程序端进行交互，适用于高校环境。技术亮点包括对MySQL的支持及灵活的配置选项，便于快速部署和使用。
summary.en: The backend server project for the Campus Comprehensive Service Platform aims to provide integrated services for campus users. It supports database configuration and dependency installation, allowing users to interact via a mini-program. Key features include MySQL support and flexible configuration options for quick deployment and usage.

metadata.name: freqtrade
metadata.description: Free, open source crypto trading bot

summary.zh: Freqtrade 是一个免费的开源加密货币交易机器人，使用 Python 编写，支持所有主要交易所。它提供了通过 Telegram 或 WebUI 控制的功能，包含回测、绘图、资金管理工具以及基于机器学习的策略优化。该项目适合希望在加密市场中进行自动交易的开发者和交易者，尤其是那些具备编程和 Python 知识的人。
summary.en: Freqtrade is a free and open-source crypto trading bot written in Python, designed to support all major exchanges. It offers control via Telegram or webUI, along with backtesting, plotting, money management tools, and strategy optimization using machine learning. This project is ideal for developers and traders looking to automate trading in the crypto market, especially those with coding and Python knowledge.

metadata.name: WeApp_Demos
metadata.description: 持续更新中的微信小程序和小游戏的源码案例库。目前涵盖了120多个微信小程序或小游戏。

summary.zh: WeApp_Demos 是一个持续更新的微信小程序和小游戏源码案例库，现已涵盖120多个不同应用场景的实例。该项目为开发者提供了丰富的参考资料，助力快速构建和优化微信小程序，具有较高的实用价值和技术参考意义。
summary.en: WeApp_Demos is a continuously updated repository of source code examples for WeChat Mini Programs and games, currently featuring over 120 instances across various application scenarios. This project offers developers a wealth of reference materials, facilitating rapid development and optimization of WeChat Mini Programs, showcasing significant practical value and technical insights.

metadata.name: money-maker-apps
metadata.description: 我认为有赚钱能力的开源小程序、个人网站

summary.zh: Money Maker Apps 是一个专注于收集和分享有潜力的开源小程序和个人网站的项目。该项目强调运营的重要性，提供了多种实用的案例和工具，帮助开发者快速抓住市场热点，实现盈利。通过分析不同类型的小程序，项目展示了如何利用技术和创意结合，创造出具有商业价值的应用。
summary.en: Money Maker Apps is a project focused on collecting and sharing open-source mini-programs and personal websites with profit potential. It emphasizes the importance of operations and provides various practical cases and tools to help developers quickly seize market trends for monetization. By analyzing different types of mini-programs, the project showcases how to combine technology and creativity to create commercially valuable applications.

metadata.name: coupons
metadata.description: 美团饿了吗外卖红包外卖优惠券，先领红包再下单。外卖红包优惠券，cps分成，别人领红包下单，你拿佣金。

summary.zh: 该项目提供美团和饿了么的外卖红包优惠券功能，用户可通过领取红包后下单，从中获得佣金。基于uniapp开发，支持小程序和H5编译，新增订阅功能和云开发数据管理，适合希望通过外卖平台进行推广的开发者与商家。
summary.en: This project offers a coupon feature for Meituan and Ele.me food delivery, allowing users to receive red envelopes before placing orders and earn commissions. Developed with uniapp, it supports compilation into mini-programs and H5, featuring a new subscription function and cloud development data management, ideal for developers and businesses looking to promote through delivery platforms.

summary.zh: wxappUnpacker 是一个用于解包微信小程序的工具，能够高效提取小程序的资源和代码。该项目适用于开发者和安全研究人员，帮助他们分析和调试微信小程序，提升开发效率。其技术亮点在于简单易用的命令行界面和对多种小程序格式的支持。
summary.en: wxappUnpacker is a tool for unpacking WeChat Mini Programs, efficiently extracting resources and code. This project is suitable for developers and security researchers, aiding in the analysis and debugging of WeChat Mini Programs to enhance development efficiency. Its technical highlights include a user-friendly command-line interface and support for various Mini Program formats.

metadata.name: remove-water-mark-server
metadata.description: 短视频去水印小程序系列教程源码【服务端-php】

summary.zh: 该项目提供了一个基于PHP和Laravel框架的短视频去水印小程序服务端源码，适合有基本编码能力的开发者使用。通过详细的安装和配置步骤，用户可以快速搭建服务端，支持与微信小程序的对接，满足短视频去水印的需求，具有良好的实用性和扩展性。
summary.en: This project offers a PHP and Laravel-based server-side source code for a short video watermark removal mini-program, aimed at developers with basic coding skills. With detailed installation and configuration steps, users can quickly set up the server to integrate with WeChat mini-programs, addressing the need for watermark removal in short videos, showcasing practicality and extensibility.

metadata.name: redCover
metadata.description: 微信红包封面领取，用户观看视频广告或者邀请用户可获取微信红包序列号

summary.zh: 该项目是一个微信红包封面领取小程序，用户通过观看视频广告或邀请新用户来获取红包封面序列号，具有引流外卖优惠券的功能。基于uniapp开发，适合希望通过广告变现的开发者，提供了便捷的红包封面获取方式，增强用户互动与参与感。
summary.en: This project is a WeChat red envelope cover acquisition mini-program, allowing users to obtain red envelope cover serial numbers by watching video ads or inviting new users, with the added functionality of driving traffic for takeaway coupons. Developed with uniapp, it is suitable for developers looking to monetize through ads, providing an easy way to acquire red envelope covers and enhance user engagement.

metadata.name: taro-project-templates
metadata.description: Templates for `taro init`

summary.zh: taro-project-templates 提供了用于 `taro init` 的项目模板，旨在简化 Taro 应用的快速启动。该仓库为开发者提供了多种预设模板，帮助他们快速构建跨平台应用，提升开发效率，适用于移动端和小程序等多种场景。
summary.en: taro-project-templates offers project templates for `taro init`, aimed at simplifying the quick start of Taro applications. This repository provides various preset templates to help developers quickly build cross-platform applications, enhancing development efficiency for mobile and mini-program scenarios.

summary.zh: ShadowsocksR for Windows 是一款高效的代理工具，旨在为用户提供安全的网络访问。它支持多服务器配置，允许用户灵活管理代理设置，并提供了对 PAC 文件的自定义支持，适合需要科学上网的用户。该项目基于 GPLv3 许可证，使用 C# 开发，兼容 Windows 7 及以上版本，具有良好的可扩展性和易用性。
summary.en: ShadowsocksR for Windows is an efficient proxy tool designed to provide users with secure internet access. It supports multiple server configurations, allowing flexible management of proxy settings, and offers custom PAC file support, making it suitable for users needing to bypass internet restrictions. The project is developed in C# under the GPLv3 license and is compatible with Windows 7 and above, featuring good extensibility and usability.

metadata.name: lin-ui
metadata.description: 🌈 简洁、易用、灵活的微信小程序组件库

summary.zh: Lin UI 是一款基于微信小程序原生语法的高质量组件库，旨在提供简洁、易用且灵活的 UI 解决方案。它适用于开发微信小程序，支持 NPM 模块化管理，帮助开发者快速构建美观的用户界面。其设计遵循现代化的美学标准，适合各类小程序项目。
summary.en: Lin UI is a high-quality component library based on the native syntax of WeChat Mini Programs, designed to provide a simple, easy-to-use, and flexible UI solution. It is suitable for developing WeChat Mini Programs and supports NPM modular management, helping developers quickly build aesthetically pleasing user interfaces. Its design adheres to modern aesthetic standards, making it suitable for various mini program projects.

metadata.name: qrbtf
metadata.description: AI & parametric QR code generator. AI & 参数化二维码生成器。https://qrbtf.com

summary.zh: QRBTF 是全球首个 AI 和参数化二维码生成器，支持多种风格和 SVG 格式，无需后端。其 AI 部分基于大量图像训练，提供快速高质量的推理，适用于需要个性化二维码的场景，如营销和艺术创作。该项目开源，欢迎贡献多语言支持。
summary.en: QRBTF is the world's first AI and parametric QR code generator, supporting various styles and SVG format without backend requirements. Its AI component is trained on a large dataset, offering fast and high-quality inference, ideal for personalized QR codes in marketing and artistic applications. The project is open-source and welcomes contributions for multilingual support.

metadata.name: mqtt.org
metadata.description: The mqtt.org website

summary.zh: mqtt.org 是一个专注于 MQTT 协议的官方网站，旨在提供 MQTT 相关的资源和信息。该项目通过 Jekyll 框架进行重设计，便于用户访问和更新。适合开发者和技术爱好者，提供了简单的本地服务器启动指令，便于快速部署和维护。
summary.en: mqtt.org is the official website dedicated to the MQTT protocol, aimed at providing resources and information related to MQTT. The project is redesigned using the Jekyll framework, facilitating user access and updates. It is suitable for developers and tech enthusiasts, offering straightforward local server startup instructions for quick deployment and maintenance.

metadata.name: WeChat-Group-HuoMa
metadata.description: 微信群二维码活码工具，生成微信群活码，随时可以切换二维码！

summary.zh: 微信群二维码活码工具，提供灵活的二维码生成与切换功能，方便用户管理微信群。尽管项目已停止维护，但其核心功能已整合至另一个更强大的项目中，适合需要动态二维码的用户。
summary.en: WeChat group dynamic QR code tool that allows users to generate and switch QR codes for group management. Although the project is no longer maintained, its core features have been integrated into another more powerful project, suitable for users needing dynamic QR codes.

metadata.name: liKeYun_TbkTool
metadata.description: 淘宝客工具箱，朋友圈私域流量助手，一个用于朋友圈淘宝客引流工具，致力于淘宝客安全、方便、高效推广！

summary.zh: liKeYun_TbkTool 是一款专为淘宝客推广者设计的工具箱，旨在通过微信朋友圈和微信群等渠道安全高效地推广淘口令。该工具通过生成中间页避免了微信对淘口令的检测，降低了封号风险。尽管项目已停止维护并整合至引流宝，但其核心功能仍为淘宝客提供了便捷的引流解决方案。
summary.en: liKeYun_TbkTool is a toolbox designed for Taobao affiliate marketers, aimed at promoting Taobao codes safely and efficiently through WeChat Moments and groups. By generating intermediary pages, it avoids detection of Taobao codes by WeChat, reducing the risk of account bans. Although the project is no longer maintained and has been integrated into another project, its core functionality still offers a convenient solution for affiliate marketing.

metadata.name: weapp-qrpay
metadata.description: 五合一收款码在线生成微信小程序版,35个模板 支持微信支付、支付宝支付、手机QQ支付、京东钱包、百度钱包,五合一收款，将其二维码合并为一个二维码，无需手续费,支持qq头像,昵称判断(HTML单页版多模板免安装) 腾讯云服务器 https://api.isoyu.com/qrpay/  腾讯云COS https://qrpay.isoyu.com/

summary.zh: weapp-qrpay 是一款五合一收款码在线生成工具，专为微信小程序设计，支持微信支付、支付宝、QQ支付、京东钱包和百度钱包。该工具提供35种模板，能够将多个支付二维码合并为一个，且无手续费，适合商家和个人用户使用。支持QQ头像和昵称判断，且提供HTML单页版，便于快速部署。
summary.en: weapp-qrpay is an online tool for generating a unified payment QR code, specifically designed for WeChat Mini Programs. It supports multiple payment methods including WeChat Pay, Alipay, QQ Pay, JD Wallet, and Baidu Wallet, offering 35 templates. This tool allows users to merge multiple payment QR codes into one without transaction fees, making it ideal for both businesses and individuals. It also supports QQ avatar and nickname verification, with an easy-to-deploy HTML single-page version.

metadata.name: douyin-ios-objectc
metadata.description: 抖音 iOS Object-C版

summary.zh: 该项目是一个使用Objective-C编写的抖音iOS应用仿制版，兼容iOS8.0至iOS12.0。它实现了个人主页、视频播放和即时聊天功能，采用多队列解析webp动图、AVPlayerLayer进行视频边下载边播放，以及WebSocket实现聊天功能。项目展示了丰富的网络请求处理、数据模型转换和动画效果，适合开发者学习iOS应用开发的核心技术。
summary.en: This project is a Douyin (TikTok) iOS app clone written in Objective-C, compatible with iOS 8.0 to iOS 12.0. It features personal homepage, video playback, and instant messaging functionalities, utilizing multi-queue for webp image parsing, AVPlayerLayer for video streaming, and WebSocket for chat. The project showcases extensive network request handling, data model conversion, and animation effects, making it suitable for developers to learn core iOS app development techniques.

metadata.name: prestissimo
metadata.description: composer parallel install plugin

summary.zh: prestissimo 是一个用于 Composer 1.x 的插件，通过并行下载包来显著加快安装速度，适用于需要快速构建 PHP 项目的开发者。该插件在处理大规模依赖时表现出色，能够将安装时间从 288 秒缩短至 26 秒，极大提高了开发效率。需要注意的是，Composer 2 已经具备了更快的安装能力，因此建议用户升级 Composer 以获得更好的性能。
summary.en: Prestissimo is a Composer 1.x plugin that significantly speeds up the installation process by downloading packages in parallel, making it ideal for developers building PHP projects quickly. The plugin excels in handling large dependencies, reducing installation time from 288 seconds to just 26 seconds, greatly enhancing development efficiency. It's important to note that Composer 2 already offers improved installation speed, so users are encouraged to upgrade Composer for better performance.

metadata.name: laravel-backup
metadata.description: A package to backup your Laravel app

summary.zh: Spatie 的 Laravel Backup 包为 Laravel 应用提供现代化的备份解决方案。该工具能够创建包含指定目录文件和数据库转储的压缩备份，并支持将备份存储在多个文件系统上。用户可通过简单的 Artisan 命令轻松执行备份，同时还提供备份监控功能，确保备份健康，并可通过多种渠道接收通知。此外，包还具备清理旧备份的功能，有效节省磁盘空间。
summary.en: The Spatie Laravel Backup package offers a modern backup solution for Laravel applications. It creates compressed backups containing specified directory files and database dumps, supporting storage on multiple filesystems. Users can easily execute backups with a simple Artisan command, and the package also includes backup monitoring to ensure health, with notifications available through various channels. Additionally, it features old backup cleanup to effectively save disk space.

metadata.name: fearless
metadata.description: A dashboard scaffolding based on Vue.js 3.x & TypeScript created by Vite.

summary.zh: Fearless 是一个基于 Vue.js 3.x 和 TypeScript 的现代仪表板脚手架，采用 Vite 构建。它提供了强类型支持和完整的工程工作流，集成了 Pinia、Vue Router 和 Naive UI 等现代前端技术，适合快速开发企业级应用。内置的模拟 API 服务器和灵活的授权机制，使得开发和测试更加高效。
summary.en: Fearless is a modern dashboard scaffolding based on Vue.js 3.x and TypeScript, built with Vite. It offers strong typing support and a complete engineering workflow, integrating modern frontend technologies like Pinia, Vue Router, and Naive UI, making it suitable for rapid development of enterprise-level applications. The built-in mock API server and flexible authorization mechanisms enhance development and testing efficiency.

metadata.name: package-builder
metadata.description: :package: A composer package builder.

summary.zh: Package Builder 是一个用于快速构建 Composer 扩展包的工具，虽然该项目已停止维护，但它提供了便捷的命令行接口，帮助开发者生成标准化的包结构。适用于 PHP 开发者，尤其是在创建和管理扩展包时。推荐使用的替代模板包括 overtrue/php-package 和 overtrue/laravel-package。
summary.en: Package Builder is a tool for quickly building Composer packages. Although the project is no longer maintained, it offers a convenient command-line interface for developers to generate standardized package structures. It is suitable for PHP developers, especially when creating and managing packages. Recommended alternatives include overtrue/php-package and overtrue/laravel-package.

metadata.name: jQuery-File-Upload
metadata.description: File Upload widget with multiple file selection, drag&drop support, progress bar, validation and preview images, audio and video for jQuery. Supports cross-domain, chunked and resumable file uploads. Works with any server-side platform (Google App Engine, PHP, Python, Ruby on Rails, Java, etc.) that supports standard HTML form file uploads.

summary.zh: jQuery File Upload 是一个功能强大的文件上传小部件，支持多文件选择、拖放上传、进度条、文件验证及预览。它支持跨域、分块和可恢复的文件上传，兼容多种服务器端平台，如 PHP、Python 和 Java。该工具基于 HTML5 和 JavaScript，无需额外插件，适用于现代浏览器，且提供优雅的降级支持。
summary.en: jQuery File Upload is a powerful file upload widget that supports multiple file selection, drag-and-drop uploads, progress bars, file validation, and previews. It supports cross-domain, chunked, and resumable uploads, working with various server-side platforms like PHP, Python, and Java. Based on HTML5 and JavaScript, it requires no additional plugins and is suitable for modern browsers, with graceful degradation support.

metadata.name: sol-weapp
metadata.description: :clap:红包雨，大转盘，小程序营销组件，小程序商城常用组件  https://sunniejs.github.io/sol-weapp/

summary.zh: sol-weapp 是一套简单易用的微信小程序营销组件库，提供了大转盘、红包雨、九宫格翻牌等多种常用组件，旨在简化小程序商城的开发流程。该库不断更新，适合需要快速构建营销活动的小程序开发者，提升用户互动体验。
summary.en: sol-weapp is a simple and user-friendly marketing component library for WeChat mini-programs, offering various common components like lucky wheels, red envelope rain, and grid flipping. It aims to simplify the development process for mini-program malls, continuously updated to enhance user engagement for developers building marketing activities.

metadata.name: vant-weapp
metadata.description: 轻量、可靠的小程序 UI 组件库

summary.zh: Vant Weapp 是一个轻量且可靠的微信小程序 UI 组件库，旨在为开发者提供高效的组件使用体验。其组件设计简洁，易于集成，支持通过 npm 安装，适合快速开发小程序应用。该库不仅提供了丰富的组件选择，还具备良好的文档支持，适合移动端开发者使用。
summary.en: Vant Weapp is a lightweight and reliable UI component library for WeChat Mini Programs, designed to provide developers with an efficient component usage experience. Its components are simply designed and easy to integrate, supporting npm installation, making it suitable for rapid development of mini program applications. The library offers a rich selection of components and excellent documentation, ideal for mobile developers.

summary.zh: RAP2-Dolores是一个基于React的前端静态构建项目，旨在为API文档和数据模拟提供高效的解决方案。它是RAP1的重构版本，结合了现代前端技术如Redux和SASS，支持灵活的开发和生产环境配置。适合需要快速构建和管理API文档的团队，提升开发效率和协作能力。
summary.en: RAP2-Dolores is a front-end static build project based on React, designed to provide an efficient solution for API documentation and data mocking. It is a restructured version of RAP1, incorporating modern front-end technologies like Redux and SASS, and supports flexible configuration for development and production environments. Ideal for teams needing to quickly build and manage API documentation, enhancing development efficiency and collaboration.

metadata.name: vue-cli3-H5
metadata.description: 🎉 基于 vue-cli3 搭建的前端H5模板

summary.zh: 该项目是基于 vue-cli3 构建的前端 H5 模板，提供了快速搭建移动端应用的基础框架。它支持页面切换动画，适合需要快速开发和部署的前端开发者。项目还集成了持续集成工具 Jenkins 和 Nginx，提升了开发效率和项目管理能力。
summary.en: This project is a front-end H5 template built on vue-cli3, providing a foundational framework for quickly developing mobile applications. It supports page transition animations and is suitable for front-end developers looking for rapid development and deployment. The project also integrates CI tools like Jenkins and Nginx, enhancing development efficiency and project management.

metadata.name: rocky
metadata.description: Rocky Linux is a community enterprise Operating System designed to be 100% bug-for-bug compatible with Enterprise Linux created in response to the effective discontinuation of CentOS.

summary.zh: Rocky Linux 是一个社区驱动的企业级操作系统，旨在与企业级 Linux 完全兼容，作为 CentOS 转型后的替代方案。自 2021 年 6 月以来，Rocky Linux 提供稳定的生产版本，致力于为用户提供一个可靠、透明的操作系统。该项目强调社区参与，确保其发展不受商业利益驱动，适合各种生产环境。
summary.en: Rocky Linux is a community-driven enterprise operating system designed to be 100% bug-for-bug compatible with Enterprise Linux, serving as an alternative following CentOS's shift in direction. Since June 2021, Rocky Linux has provided stable production-ready releases, focusing on delivering a reliable and transparent OS. The project emphasizes community involvement, ensuring its development is free from corporate interests, suitable for various production environments.

metadata.name: rap2-delos
metadata.description: 阿里妈妈前端团队出品的开源接口管理工具RAP第二代

summary.zh: RAP2-DELOS 是阿里妈妈前端团队开发的开源接口管理工具，基于 Koa 和 MySQL 构建，提供接口文档管理、Mock 数据和导出功能。该工具支持 Docker 快速部署，适合开发者用于接口管理和文档生成，尤其在团队协作和项目开发中具有重要应用价值。RAP2 旨在提升接口开发效率，简化文档维护流程。
summary.en: RAP2-DELOS is an open-source API management tool developed by Alibaba's front-end team, built on Koa and MySQL. It offers features like API documentation management, mock data, and export capabilities. The tool supports quick deployment via Docker, making it ideal for developers in API management and documentation generation, particularly valuable in team collaboration and project development. RAP2 aims to enhance API development efficiency and simplify documentation maintenance.

metadata.name: vue-h5-template
metadata.description: :tada:vue搭建移动端开发,基于vue-cli4.0+webpack 4+vant ui + sass+ rem适配方案+axios封装，构建手机端模板脚手架

summary.zh: vue-h5-template 是一个基于 Vue 3 和 Vite 构建的移动端开发模板，集成了 NutUI、Varlet 或 Vant UI 组件库，支持 TypeScript 和 SASS，提供视口适配方案和 Axios 封装。该项目旨在为开发者提供高效的手机端开发脚手架，适合希望快速搭建移动应用的团队和个人。
summary.en: vue-h5-template is a mobile development template built on Vue 3 and Vite, integrating NutUI, Varlet, or Vant UI component libraries, supporting TypeScript and SASS, and providing viewport adaptation and Axios encapsulation. This project aims to offer developers an efficient scaffolding for mobile application development, suitable for teams and individuals looking to quickly set up mobile apps.

metadata.name: Himalayan-lite
metadata.description: 这是一个模仿喜马拉雅lite的微信小程序 - 新人学习

summary.zh: Himalayan-lite 是一个模仿喜马拉雅lite的微信小程序示例，旨在帮助新手学习微信小程序开发。该项目展示了基本的页面跳转和功能实现，尽管未完全复刻实际应用的所有功能，但为初学者提供了良好的学习基础。适合对微信小程序开发感兴趣的初学者，项目仍在不断完善中。
summary.en: Himalayan-lite is a WeChat Mini Program demo that mimics the features of Himalayan lite, designed to help beginners learn WeChat Mini Program development. This project showcases basic page navigation and functionality, although it does not fully replicate all features of the actual app, it provides a solid foundation for newcomers. Ideal for those interested in WeChat Mini Program development, the project is still under continuous improvement.

metadata.name: awesome-wechat-weapp
metadata.description: 微信小程序开发资源汇总 :100:

summary.zh: 本仓库汇总了微信小程序开发所需的各种资源，包括官方文档、工具、插件和组件库，旨在为开发者提供便捷的参考和学习资料。项目不仅整理了网络上的资料，还包括社区推荐，适合希望提升小程序开发技能的开发者使用。
summary.en: This repository aggregates various resources needed for WeChat Mini Program development, including official documentation, tools, plugins, and component libraries, aimed at providing developers with convenient references and learning materials. The project not only organizes online resources but also includes community recommendations, making it suitable for developers looking to enhance their Mini Program development skills.

metadata.name: PaddleFormers
metadata.description: PaddleFormers is an easy-to-use library of pre-trained large language model zoo based on PaddlePaddle.

summary.zh: PaddleFormers 是基于 PaddlePaddle 的预训练大语言模型库，旨在提供与 Hugging Face Transformers 相当的功能体验。它支持大语言模型和视觉语言模型的训练，具备高性能、低资源占用的特点。通过实现多种分布式训练策略和自动混合精度，PaddleFormers 在多个关键模型上展现出卓越的训练性能，帮助用户高效完成大模型的训练与优化。
summary.en: PaddleFormers is a pre-trained large language model library based on PaddlePaddle, designed to provide a comparable experience to Hugging Face Transformers. It supports training for both large language models and vision-language models, featuring high performance and low resource consumption. By implementing various distributed training strategies and automatic mixed precision, PaddleFormers demonstrates exceptional training performance on key models, assisting users in efficiently training and optimizing large models.

metadata.name: laravel-enum
metadata.description: Simple, extensible and powerful enumeration implementation for Laravel.

summary.zh: Laravel Enum 是一个简单、可扩展且强大的枚举实现库，专为 Laravel 框架设计。它支持枚举键值对、类型提示、属性转换和本地化等功能，适用于需要枚举类型的应用场景。尽管该库提供了丰富的功能，但不再推荐用于新项目，因为 PHP 8.1 已原生支持枚举，用户应考虑迁移至原生解决方案。
summary.en: Laravel Enum is a simple, extensible, and powerful enumeration implementation designed for the Laravel framework. It supports enum key-value pairs, type hinting, attribute casting, and localization, making it suitable for applications requiring enumeration types. However, the library is no longer recommended for new projects as PHP 8.1 offers native enum support, prompting users to consider migration to the native solution.

metadata.name: sdk-http-php
metadata.description: 可爱猫API接口Demo-PHP版本

summary.zh: 可爱猫API接口Demo的PHP版本，提供了简单易用的示例代码，帮助开发者快速集成可爱猫API。支持默认配置和外网API接口配置，采用单例模式，便于管理和调用。适合需要与可爱猫API进行交互的PHP开发者，提升开发效率。
summary.en: The PHP version of the Cute Cat API Demo offers easy-to-use sample code for developers to quickly integrate the Cute Cat API. It supports both default and external API configurations, utilizing a singleton pattern for efficient management and invocation. Ideal for PHP developers needing to interact with the Cute Cat API, enhancing development efficiency.

metadata.name: lumen-api-starter
metadata.description: Lumen 10 基础上扩展出的API 启动项目，精心设计的目录结构，规范统一的响应数据格式，Repository 模式架构的最佳实践。

summary.zh: Lumen API Starter 是基于 Lumen 10 构建的高效 API 启动项目，具备规范统一的响应格式和清晰的目录结构，适合中大型项目的快速开发。项目采用 Repository 模式架构，简化了依赖管理，支持 JWT 授权，便于团队协作与维护，提升了开发效率。
summary.en: Lumen API Starter is an efficient API starter project built on Lumen 10, featuring a standardized response format and a clear directory structure, suitable for rapid development of medium to large projects. The project adopts a Repository pattern architecture, simplifies dependency management, supports JWT authorization, and enhances team collaboration and maintenance, improving development efficiency.

metadata.name: crypto
metadata.description: Encrypt and decrypt data using private/public keys

summary.zh: Spatie Crypto 是一个用于生成 RSA 私钥和公钥对的 PHP 包，能够轻松地对数据进行加密和解密。它提供了简单易用的接口，支持从文件或字符串加载密钥，并允许使用密码保护私钥。该工具适用于需要安全数据传输和存储的应用场景，提升了开发者的用户体验。
summary.en: Spatie Crypto is a PHP package for generating RSA private and public key pairs, enabling easy data encryption and decryption. It offers a user-friendly interface for loading keys from files or strings and supports password protection for private keys. This tool is suitable for applications requiring secure data transmission and storage, enhancing developer experience.

metadata.name: laravel-settings
metadata.description: Store strongly typed application settings

summary.zh: Spatie 的 Laravel Settings 包允许开发者在 Laravel 应用中轻松存储和管理强类型的应用设置。通过定义设置类，用户可以将设置存储在数据库或 Redis 等存储库中，并在应用中方便地注入和使用这些设置。该包提供了简单的 API，使得设置的读取和更新变得直观，适合需要动态配置的应用场景。
summary.en: The Spatie Laravel Settings package allows developers to easily store and manage strongly typed application settings within Laravel applications. By defining settings classes, users can store settings in repositories like databases or Redis, and conveniently inject and use these settings in their applications. The package offers a straightforward API, making reading and updating settings intuitive, ideal for applications requiring dynamic configuration.

metadata.name: china_job_survey
metadata.description: stats of Chinese developers. 统计中国程序员的就业情况

summary.zh: 该项目通过分析中国招聘网站的数据，统计程序员的就业情况，包括薪资分布和编程语言使用比例。它为开发者提供了关于市场趋势的深入见解，适用于求职者、招聘公司及行业研究者，帮助他们更好地理解中国程序员的就业环境和技术需求。
summary.en: This project analyzes data from Chinese job websites to provide statistics on developers' employment, including salary distribution and programming language usage. It offers deep insights into market trends for job seekers, recruiting companies, and industry researchers, helping them better understand the employment landscape and technical demands of Chinese developers.

metadata.name: element-plus
metadata.description: 🎉 A Vue.js 3 UI Library made by Element team

summary.zh: Element Plus 是一个基于 Vue 3 的 UI 库，专为现代 Web 应用设计。它利用 Vue 3 的组合 API 和 TypeScript 提供了高效的组件开发体验。该库支持快速构建响应式界面，并包含迁移工具，方便用户从 Element UI 升级至 Element Plus，适合需要高质量界面的开发者。
summary.en: Element Plus is a UI library based on Vue 3, designed for modern web applications. It leverages Vue 3's Composition API and TypeScript to provide an efficient component development experience. The library supports rapid construction of responsive interfaces and includes a migration tool for users upgrading from Element UI to Element Plus, making it ideal for developers seeking high-quality interfaces.

metadata.name: laradock
metadata.description: Full PHP development environment for Docker.

summary.zh: Laradock 是一个基于 Docker 的完整 PHP 开发环境，为开发者提供了便捷的容器化解决方案。它支持多种服务和工具的集成，适用于快速构建和部署 PHP 应用，降低了环境配置的复杂性。该项目开源且由社区支持，适合希望提升开发效率的团队和个人。
summary.en: Laradock is a full PHP development environment based on Docker, providing developers with a convenient containerized solution. It supports integration with various services and tools, making it suitable for quickly building and deploying PHP applications while reducing the complexity of environment setup. This open-source project is community-supported, ideal for teams and individuals looking to enhance development efficiency.

metadata.name: iterm2-with-oh-my-zsh
metadata.description: iTerm2 + Oh My Zsh 打造舒适终端体验

summary.zh: 本项目旨在通过结合 iTerm2 和 Oh My Zsh，提供一个舒适且美观的终端体验。用户可以通过简单的安装步骤，配置 Powerline 字体、配色方案和主题，提升终端的可用性和美观性。适合开发者和终端用户，帮助他们创建个性化的工作环境。
summary.en: This project aims to create a comfortable and aesthetically pleasing terminal experience by combining iTerm2 and Oh My Zsh. Users can enhance usability and aesthetics through simple installation steps for Powerline fonts, color schemes, and themes. It's suitable for developers and terminal users looking to personalize their working environment.

metadata.name: cat
metadata.description: Sebastian is a LLM assistant with the ability to have permanent memory.

summary.zh: Sebastian 是一款具有永久记忆能力的 LLM 助手，旨在提升用户交互体验。它利用先进的自然语言处理技术，能够在多次对话中保持上下文，适用于客户支持、教育和个人助理等场景。其技术亮点在于持久的记忆管理和智能响应能力，使得用户能够获得更加个性化的服务。
summary.en: Sebastian is an LLM assistant with permanent memory capabilities, designed to enhance user interaction experiences. Utilizing advanced natural language processing technology, it maintains context across multiple conversations, making it suitable for customer support, education, and personal assistant applications. Its technical highlights include persistent memory management and intelligent response capabilities, providing users with more personalized services.

metadata.name: laravel-quick
metadata.description: 封装了larave开发中常用的工具，使开发变得更加高效

summary.zh: laravel-quick 是一个高效的 Laravel 开发工具包，封装了常用工具和功能，旨在提升开发效率。它提供了简化的异常处理、API 响应格式化和缓存操作等功能，适合需要快速开发和维护的 Laravel 项目。通过简单的 Artisan 命令，开发者可以轻松创建 Trait、Service 和 Repository，进一步加速开发流程。
summary.en: laravel-quick is an efficient development toolkit for Laravel, encapsulating commonly used tools and features to enhance development productivity. It offers simplified exception handling, API response formatting, and caching operations, making it suitable for rapid development and maintenance of Laravel projects. With straightforward Artisan commands, developers can easily create Traits, Services, and Repositories, further accelerating the development process.

metadata.name: dnmp
metadata.description: Docker LNMP (Nginx, PHP7/PHP5, MySQL, Redis)

summary.zh: DNMP是一个全功能的LNMP一键安装程序，基于Docker技术，支持多版本PHP共存（PHP5.4至PHP8.0）、Nginx和多种数据库（MySQL、Redis、MongoDB等）。它允许用户在Windows、Linux和MacOS上快速配置和管理开发环境，具备HTTPS和HTTP/2支持，且所有组件均可在主机中直接修改，确保灵活性和安全性。
summary.en: DNMP is a fully-featured LNMP one-click installation program based on Docker technology, supporting multiple PHP versions (from PHP5.4 to PHP8.0), Nginx, and various databases (MySQL, Redis, MongoDB, etc.). It allows users to quickly configure and manage development environments on Windows, Linux, and MacOS, with support for HTTPS and HTTP/2, while all components can be modified directly on the host, ensuring flexibility and security.

metadata.name: BookStack
metadata.description: BookStack，基于MinDoc，使用Beego开发的在线文档管理系统，功能类似Gitbook和看云。

summary.zh: BookStack 是一个基于 Beego 开发的在线文档管理系统，旨在为用户提供高效的知识分享与管理平台。它支持一键导入和拉取 Markdown 文档，生成 PDF、EPUB 等离线文档，并具备文档排序和批量创建功能。BookStack 的设计兼顾了美观与移动端兼容性，适合团队协作和个人知识管理。
summary.en: BookStack is an online document management system developed with Beego, designed to provide users with an efficient platform for knowledge sharing and management. It supports one-click import and pull of Markdown documents, generates offline documents in PDF, EPUB, and more, and features document sorting and batch creation. BookStack balances aesthetics with mobile compatibility, making it suitable for team collaboration and personal knowledge management.

metadata.name: taro-request
metadata.description: 对Taro.request进行封装

summary.zh: taro-request 是一个针对 Taro 框架的请求封装库，提供了拦截器、URL 配置和授权管理等功能，旨在简化 API 请求的处理。该库适用于 Taro 项目，帮助开发者更高效地管理 HTTP 请求，提升代码的可维护性和可读性。
summary.en: taro-request is a request encapsulation library for the Taro framework, offering features like interceptors, URL configuration, and authorization management. It aims to simplify API request handling, making it easier for developers to manage HTTP requests in Taro projects, thus enhancing code maintainability and readability.

metadata.name: BusinessCard
metadata.description: 使用京东Taro开发的名片系统小程序

summary.zh: 该名片系统小程序基于京东Taro开发，旨在提供简洁高效的名片管理和分享功能。用户可以轻松创建、编辑和分享个人名片，适用于商务交流和社交场合。系统界面友好，操作流畅，适合各类用户使用。
summary.en: This business card mini-program is developed using JD Taro, aiming to provide a simple and efficient solution for managing and sharing business cards. Users can easily create, edit, and share their personal cards, making it suitable for business communication and social interactions. The system features a user-friendly interface and smooth operation, catering to various users.

metadata.name: Taro-demo
metadata.description: github上能找到的taro适配Android、iOS、微信小程序、H5最佳实践项目脚手架

summary.zh: Taro-demo 是一个多端适配的最佳实践项目脚手架，支持 Android、iOS、微信小程序和 H5。该项目通过封装基础网络请求、简化样式引用、实现自定义 tabBar 和全局模态对话框等功能，解决了多端开发中的常见问题。目标是构建一个多端共用的基础组件库，适合全新项目的开发。
summary.en: Taro-demo is a best practice project scaffold for multi-platform adaptation, supporting Android, iOS, WeChat Mini Programs, and H5. It addresses common issues in multi-end development by encapsulating basic network requests, simplifying style references, and implementing custom tabBars and global modal dialogs. The goal is to build a shared component library for multi-end development, suitable for new projects.

metadata.name: card-system
metadata.description: 卡密商城系统，高效安全的在线卡密商城

summary.zh: CardSystem 是一款高效安全的在线卡密商城系统，支持多种支付渠道，包括支付宝、微信支付和多种数字货币。该系统提供灵活的支付接口，适合电商平台和数字商品销售，确保交易安全与用户体验。其易于安装和更新的文档使得开发者能够快速上手，满足市场对卡密交易的需求。
summary.en: CardSystem is an efficient and secure online card key mall system that supports various payment channels, including Alipay, WeChat Pay, and multiple cryptocurrencies. The system offers flexible payment interfaces, making it suitable for e-commerce platforms and digital goods sales, ensuring transaction security and user experience. Its easy-to-install and update documentation allows developers to quickly get started, meeting market demands for card key transactions.

metadata.name: InfoSpider
metadata.description: INFO-SPIDER 是一个集众多数据源于一身的爬虫工具箱🧰，旨在安全快捷的帮助用户拿回自己的数据，工具代码开源，流程透明。支持数据源包括GitHub、QQ邮箱、网易邮箱、阿里邮箱、新浪邮箱、Hotmail邮箱、Outlook邮箱、京东、淘宝、支付宝、中国移动、中国联通、中国电信、知乎、哔哩哔哩、网易云音乐、QQ好友、QQ群、生成朋友圈相册、浏览器浏览历史、12306、博客园、CSDN博客、开源中国博客、简书。

summary.zh: INFO-SPIDER 是一款集成多种数据源的爬虫工具箱，旨在帮助用户安全、快捷地获取和分析个人数据。支持的数据源涵盖了社交媒体、邮箱、购物网站等多个平台，用户可以通过简单的操作获取分散在不同网站上的个人信息，并进行可视化分析，深入了解自己的数据使用情况。该工具开源透明，适合对个人数据管理有需求的用户。
summary.en: INFO-SPIDER is a comprehensive web scraping toolkit designed to help users securely and quickly retrieve and analyze their personal data from various sources. It supports a wide range of platforms, including social media, email services, and e-commerce sites. Users can easily gather their scattered personal information and visualize it for deeper insights into their data usage. The tool is open-source and transparent, making it ideal for users looking to manage their personal data effectively.

summary.zh: 校园综合服务平台是一个基于微信小程序的多功能服务系统，旨在为校园用户提供便捷的服务体验。该项目包括前端小程序和后端服务，支持订单管理、代理商功能和支付服务。技术亮点在于优化的后端逻辑和多项修复，确保系统稳定性和用户体验。适合高校及其周边服务需求的开发与部署。
summary.en: The Campus Integrated Service Platform is a multifunctional service system based on WeChat Mini Programs, designed to provide a convenient service experience for campus users. The project includes a front-end mini program and back-end services, supporting order management, agent functionalities, and payment services. Key highlights include optimized backend logic and multiple fixes to ensure system stability and user experience, suitable for development and deployment in universities and surrounding service needs.

metadata.name: SmartProxyPool
metadata.description: 高质量, 高灵活的IP代理池服务

summary.zh: SmartProxyPool 是一个高质量、高灵活的开放代理池服务，支持动态代理和多种过滤选项，适用于爬虫和内部代理需求。尽管项目不再维护新功能，但其核心特性包括代理验证、评分系统和基于区域的过滤，适合需要高可用性代理的场景。该项目提供了简洁的WEB管理界面，便于用户配置和监控代理池状态。
summary.en: SmartProxyPool is a high-quality, flexible open proxy pool service that supports dynamic proxies and various filtering options, suitable for web scraping and internal proxy needs. Although the project is no longer maintained for new features, its core features include proxy validation, a scoring system, and region-based filtering, making it ideal for scenarios requiring highly available proxies. The project offers a user-friendly WEB management interface for configuring and monitoring the proxy pool status.

metadata.name: examples-of-web-crawlers
metadata.description: 一些非常有趣的python爬虫例子,对新手比较友好,主要爬取淘宝、天猫、微信、微信读书、豆瓣、QQ等网站。(Some interesting examples of python crawlers that are friendly to beginners. )

summary.zh: 该项目提供了一系列友好的Python爬虫示例，专为新手设计，涵盖淘宝、天猫、微信等多个热门网站。每个示例都配有详细注释，便于理解和学习。项目的代码通用性强，适合初学者快速掌握网络爬虫的基本概念和技巧。
summary.en: This project offers a series of beginner-friendly Python crawler examples, covering popular websites like Taobao, Tmall, and WeChat. Each example is well-documented to facilitate understanding and learning. The code is highly reusable, making it suitable for beginners to quickly grasp the fundamental concepts and techniques of web crawling.

metadata.name: faka
metadata.description: 个人发卡源码，发卡系统，二次元发卡系统，二次元发卡源码，发卡程序，动漫发卡，PHP发卡源码

summary.zh: 荔枝发卡系统是一个基于PHP开发的个人发卡源码，专为二次元文化爱好者设计。其核心功能包括卡密销售、批发优惠、支付对接和自动更新，支持PC和手机界面，用户可轻松添加商品和支付方式。系统使用Eloquent ORM和Smarty模板引擎，提供了良好的扩展性和易用性，适合个人或小型团队快速搭建发卡平台。
summary.en: Lizhi Faka System is a PHP-based personal card issuing source code designed for ACG culture enthusiasts. Its core features include card key sales, wholesale discounts, payment integration, and automatic updates, supporting both PC and mobile interfaces. The system utilizes Eloquent ORM and Smarty template engine, offering good extensibility and usability, making it suitable for individuals or small teams to quickly set up a card issuing platform.

metadata.name: quark-h5
metadata.description: 基于vue2 + koa2的 H5制作工具。让不会写代码的人也能轻松快速上手制作H5页面。类似易企秀、百度H5等H5制作、建站工具

summary.zh: Quark-h5 是一个基于 Vue2 和 Koa2 的 H5 页面制作工具，旨在帮助非程序员轻松创建炫酷的 H5 页面。该项目提供了完整的前后端代码和详细的实现思路，用户可以通过可视化编辑器拖拽组件、编辑样式，并将页面数据存储到数据库中。其技术亮点包括动态组件渲染、状态管理和灵活的数据结构设计，适合希望快速构建 H5 应用的开发者和设计师。
summary.en: Quark-h5 is an H5 page creation tool based on Vue2 and Koa2, designed to help non-coders easily create stunning H5 pages. The project offers complete front-end and back-end code along with detailed implementation ideas, allowing users to drag and drop components, edit styles, and store page data in a database through a visual editor. Its technical highlights include dynamic component rendering, state management, and flexible data structure design, making it suitable for developers and designers looking to quickly build H5 applications.

metadata.name: PythonPlantsVsZombies
metadata.description: a simple PlantsVsZombies game

summary.zh: PythonPlantsVsZombies 是一个简单的植物大战僵尸游戏，旨在个人学习和非商业用途。该项目实现了多种植物和僵尸角色，使用 JSON 文件存储关卡数据，支持多种游戏模式，包括白天、夜晚和移动卡片选择关卡。适合 Python 和 Pygame 爱好者，提供了良好的学习机会。
summary.en: PythonPlantsVsZombies is a simple Plants vs. Zombies game designed for personal learning and non-commercial use. The project features various plant and zombie characters, utilizes JSON files to store level data, and supports multiple game modes including day, night, and moving card select levels. It's ideal for Python and Pygame enthusiasts, offering a great learning opportunity.

metadata.name: la-user-center
metadata.description: 《PHP微服务练兵》系列教程源码 https://blog.csdn.net/donjan/article/details/103005084

summary.zh: 该项目是基于Hyperf框架构建的用户中心，旨在为《PHP微服务练兵》系列教程提供源码支持。它提供了用户管理和权限控制功能，适合用于学习和实践PHP微服务架构。项目包含详细的安装步骤和数据库迁移、填充指令，便于开发者快速上手。
summary.en: This project is a user center built on the Hyperf framework, designed to support the source code for the 'PHP Microservices Training' tutorial series. It offers user management and permission control features, making it suitable for learning and practicing PHP microservices architecture. The project includes detailed installation steps and commands for database migration and seeding, allowing developers to get started quickly.

metadata.name: Live
metadata.description: 直播抓取，支持的直播:YY直播，斗鱼直播，花椒直播，熊猫直播，映客直播，一直播

summary.zh: 该项目提供了一个直播抓取工具，支持YY直播、斗鱼直播、花椒直播、熊猫直播、映客直播和一直播等多个平台。用户只需通过Composer安装并简单配置，即可自动分析直播平台并获取直播流信息，便于快速搭建直播播放页面，适用于开发者和直播内容聚合应用。
summary.en: This project offers a live streaming capture tool that supports multiple platforms including YY Live, Douyu, Huajiao, Panda Live, Inke, and Yizhibo. Users can easily install it via Composer and configure it to automatically analyze the live platform and retrieve live stream information, making it suitable for developers and applications that aggregate live content.

metadata.name: hyperf-watch
metadata.description: 🚀 Hyperf Watch Hot Reload Scripts  😊 Make Coding More Happy  👉 监听文件变化自动重启Hyperf

summary.zh: hyperf-watch 是一款基于 Swoole 的热重载脚本，旨在提升 Hyperf 开发效率。它通过监听文件变化，自动重启 Hyperf 服务，适合在开发环境中使用。该工具支持自定义配置，能够灵活调整监听目录、文件扩展名及扫描间隔，极大地方便了开发者的工作流程。
summary.en: hyperf-watch is a hot reload script based on Swoole, designed to enhance Hyperf development efficiency. It automatically restarts the Hyperf service by monitoring file changes, making it suitable for development environments. The tool supports customizable configurations, allowing developers to flexibly adjust the watch directory, file extensions, and scan intervals, greatly facilitating their workflow.

metadata.name: dwoole
metadata.description: ⚙️ Docker image for Swoole apps with Composer, auto-restart on development and a production-ready version.

summary.zh: Dwoole 是一个为 Swoole 应用提供的 Docker 镜像，支持 Composer，具备开发环境的自动重启功能和生产环境的精简版本。它内置了多种开发工具和数据库支持，简化了开发流程，同时允许用户根据项目需求定制生产环境。该镜像专注于高效的 PHP 开发，适合需要高性能和灵活性的应用场景。
summary.en: Dwoole is a Docker image designed for Swoole applications, featuring Composer support, auto-restart in development, and a minimal production version. It comes bundled with various development tools and database support, streamlining the development process while allowing users to customize the production environment based on project needs. This image focuses on efficient PHP development, suitable for high-performance and flexible application scenarios.

metadata.name: vue-admin-template
metadata.description: a vue2.0 minimal admin template

summary.zh: vue-admin-template 是一个基于 Vue 2.0 的简约管理模板，集成了 Element UI、axios、权限控制和代码检查功能。该模板适用于快速构建管理后台，支持现代浏览器和 IE 10+，并提供了便捷的开发和构建流程，适合开发者用于各种管理系统的搭建。
summary.en: vue-admin-template is a minimal admin template based on Vue 2.0, integrating Element UI, axios, permission control, and linting features. It is suitable for quickly building management backends, supports modern browsers and IE 10+, and provides an easy development and build process, making it ideal for developers to create various management systems.

summary.zh: 暂无描述。

metadata.name: CnC_Remastered_Collection
metadata.description: Command & Conquer: Remastered Collection

summary.zh: 《命令与征服：重制版合集》仓库包含了TiberianDawn.dll、RedAlert.dll及地图编辑器的源代码，支持Steam Workshop。该项目旨在为游戏开发者提供重制版的开发工具，适用于Windows环境，需依赖Windows 8.1 SDK和Visual Studio C++的MFC。此仓库仅用于保存目的，不接受外部贡献，且不提供支持。
summary.en: The repository for Command & Conquer: Remastered Collection includes source code for TiberianDawn.dll, RedAlert.dll, and the Map Editor, providing support for Steam Workshop. It aims to offer development tools for game developers in a Windows environment, requiring Windows 8.1 SDK and MFC for Visual Studio C++. This repository is archived for preservation purposes only, with no external contributions or support accepted.

metadata.name: technical_books
metadata.description: :books:🔥收集全网最热门的技术书籍 (GO、黑客、Android、计算机原理、人工智能、大数据、机器学习、数据库、PHP、java、架构、消息队列、算法、python、爬虫、操作系统、linux、C语言)，不间断更新中:hotsprings:

summary.zh: 该仓库汇集了全网热门的技术书籍，涵盖多个领域如GO、黑客、Android、人工智能等，适合各类技术人员学习与参考。书籍持续更新，提供了丰富的学习资源，帮助开发者提升技能，掌握前沿技术。
summary.en: This repository collects the most popular technical books from the internet, covering various fields such as GO, hacking, Android, artificial intelligence, and more. It is suitable for all types of technical personnel for learning and reference. The books are continuously updated, providing abundant learning resources to help developers enhance their skills and master cutting-edge technologies.

metadata.name: vant
metadata.description: A lightweight, customizable Vue UI library for mobile web apps.

summary.zh: Vant 是一个轻量级、可定制的 Vue UI 库，专为移动网页应用设计。它提供超过 80 个高质量组件，平均组件大小仅为 1KB，且无第三方依赖，支持 Vue 2 和 Vue 3。Vant 还具备良好的文档支持和主题定制功能，适合需要快速构建移动端界面的开发者。
summary.en: Vant is a lightweight, customizable Vue UI library designed for mobile web applications. It offers over 80 high-quality components with an average size of just 1KB and zero third-party dependencies, supporting both Vue 2 and Vue 3. Vant also features extensive documentation and theme customization, making it ideal for developers looking to quickly build mobile interfaces.

summary.zh: 该项目是基于 Vue CLI 4 和 Vant UI 构建的 H5 项目开发模板，旨在为大型应用提供最佳实践方案。项目结构清晰，包含完整的开发框架，支持国际化、状态管理和路由等功能，适合团队协作和复杂业务逻辑的开发。内置多种实用工具和命令，助力开发者快速上手并高效开发。
summary.en: This project is a H5 development template based on Vue CLI 4 and Vant UI, designed to provide best practices for large applications. The clear project structure includes a complete development framework, supporting internationalization, state management, and routing, making it suitable for team collaboration and complex business logic development. It comes with various useful tools and commands to help developers get started quickly and efficiently.

metadata.name: flutter_tiktok
metadata.description: Flutter tiktok short video app.

summary.zh: 该项目是一个基于Flutter的短视频应用，仿照抖音实现了流畅的视频浏览体验，支持上下滑动和点赞功能。当前已支持Flutter Web，并计划扩展至iOS、Android、MacOS、Linux和Windows等多个平台。项目具备动态加载视频、预加载控制、以及自定义页面的能力，适合开发者快速构建短视频应用。
summary.en: This project is a Flutter-based short video application that mimics TikTok, providing a smooth video browsing experience with features like vertical swiping and liking. Currently supporting Flutter Web, it plans to expand to iOS, Android, MacOS, Linux, and Windows. The project includes dynamic video loading, preloading control, and customizable pages, making it suitable for developers to quickly build short video applications.

metadata.name: libgd
metadata.description: GD Graphics Library

summary.zh: GD图形库是一个开源库，专为程序员动态创建图像而设计。它支持多种图像格式，如JPEG、PNG和GIF，常用于网站开发和图形生成。GD库以C语言编写，提供了多种语言的封装，适合生成图表、缩略图等多种应用场景。其灵活性和广泛的格式支持使其成为图像处理的理想选择。
summary.en: The GD Graphics Library is an open-source library designed for programmers to dynamically create images. It supports various image formats, including JPEG, PNG, and GIF, and is commonly used in web development and graphic generation. Written in C, GD offers wrappers for multiple languages, making it ideal for generating charts, thumbnails, and more. Its flexibility and extensive format support make it a perfect choice for image processing.

metadata.name: cphalcon
metadata.description: High performance, full-stack PHP framework delivered as a C extension.

summary.zh: Phalcon是一个高性能的全栈PHP框架，作为C扩展提供，旨在降低资源消耗。它以Zephir/C编写，支持多平台，包括Windows、GNU/Linux、FreeBSD和macOS，适合需要高效性能的Web应用开发。Phalcon的独特性在于其高效的执行速度和灵活的扩展性，适合构建复杂的Web应用。
summary.en: Phalcon is a high-performance, full-stack PHP framework delivered as a C extension, designed to reduce resource consumption. Written in Zephir/C, it supports multiple platforms including Windows, GNU/Linux, FreeBSD, and macOS, making it suitable for high-efficiency web application development. Phalcon's uniqueness lies in its execution speed and flexible extensibility, ideal for building complex web applications.

metadata.name: phalcon-devtools
metadata.description: Phalcon Developer Tools

summary.zh: Phalcon Devtools 是一款为 Phalcon PHP 框架提供的开发工具，旨在加速应用程序开发。它通过生成代码脚本，简化了控制器、模型、模块等的创建过程，显著提高开发效率。该工具支持 PHP 7.2 及以上版本，并与 Phalcon 4.0 兼容，适合需要高性能和低资源消耗的 Web 应用开发场景。
summary.en: Phalcon Devtools is a development tool for the Phalcon PHP framework, designed to accelerate application development. It simplifies the creation of controllers, models, modules, and more through code generation scripts, significantly enhancing development efficiency. The tool supports PHP 7.2 and above, and is compatible with Phalcon 4.0, making it suitable for high-performance, low-resource web application development.

metadata.name: xxl-job
metadata.description: A distributed task scheduling framework.（分布式任务调度平台XXL-JOB）

summary.zh: XXL-JOB是一个高效的分布式任务调度平台，旨在提供简单易用的任务管理功能。其核心特性包括动态任务管理、调度中心高可用性、任务执行器集群部署以及丰富的触发策略，适用于需要定时和动态调度的企业级应用。该平台已被多家公司广泛应用，支持快速开发和扩展，真正实现开箱即用。
summary.en: XXL-JOB is an efficient distributed task scheduling platform designed to offer simple and user-friendly task management features. Its core attributes include dynamic task management, high availability of the scheduling center, cluster deployment of task executors, and a variety of triggering strategies, making it suitable for enterprise-level applications requiring scheduled and dynamic tasks. The platform is widely adopted by various companies, enabling rapid development and expansion, truly out-of-the-box.

metadata.name: easyswoole_panel
metadata.description: easyswoole写的后台，权限管理，前后分离模板

summary.zh: easyswoole_panel 是基于 EasySwoole 框架开发的后台管理系统，提供可视化管理、权限控制和插件市场等功能。其核心亮点包括在线管理服务、IP 限流器、CURD 在线生成等，极大简化了开发者的工作流程。该项目适用于需要快速搭建管理后台的开发者，支持前后端分离，提升了系统的灵活性和可扩展性。
summary.en: easyswoole_panel is a backend management system developed on the EasySwoole framework, offering features like visual management, permission control, and a plugin marketplace. Key highlights include online service management, IP rate limiting, and online CURD generation, significantly simplifying developers' workflows. This project is suitable for developers looking to quickly build management backends, supporting front-end and back-end separation, enhancing system flexibility and scalability.

metadata.name: php-enum
metadata.description: The enum PHP is missing, inspired from SplEnum

summary.zh: myclabs/php-enum 是一个灵感来源于 SplEnum 的 PHP 枚举实现，旨在填补 PHP 中缺失的枚举功能。该库允许开发者使用枚举作为参数和返回类型，提供更强的类型安全性和可扩展性。通过定义枚举，开发者可以轻松管理一组常量，并利用丰富的方法来操作这些值，适用于需要明确状态或选项的场景。
summary.en: myclabs/php-enum is a PHP enum implementation inspired by SplEnum, designed to fill the gap of missing enum functionality in PHP. This library allows developers to use enums as parameter and return types, providing enhanced type safety and extensibility. By defining enums, developers can easily manage a set of constants and leverage rich methods to manipulate these values, making it suitable for scenarios requiring clear states or options.

metadata.name: laibot-client
metadata.description: 开源人工智能，基于开源软硬件构建语音对话机器人、智能音箱……人机对话、自然交互，来宝拥有无限可能。特别说明，来宝运行于Python 3！

summary.zh: 来宝是一款基于树莓派的开源语音对话机器人，旨在提升人机交互体验。该项目利用开源软硬件和免费语音服务，探索智能音箱的潜力，特别关注用户体验。运行于Python 3，来宝致力于通过简单易用的接口和良好的可扩展性，为开发者提供一个创新的平台。
summary.en: Laibot is an open-source voice dialogue robot based on Raspberry Pi, aimed at enhancing human-computer interaction. The project leverages open-source hardware and free voice services to explore the potential of smart speakers, with a strong focus on user experience. Running on Python 3, Laibot provides an innovative platform for developers through its user-friendly interface and excellent scalability.

metadata.name: chat
metadata.description: 基于自然语言理解与机器学习的聊天机器人，支持多用户并发及自定义多轮对话

summary.zh: Chat是一个基于自然语言理解和机器学习的聊天机器人框架，支持多用户并发和自定义多轮对话。它提供丰富的语义分析工具和知识图谱构建功能，适合快速搭建个性化聊天机器人，减少开发者的重复工作。Chat的模块化设计和易扩展性使其在智能化生活和工作中具备广泛应用潜力。
summary.en: Chat is a chatbot framework based on natural language understanding and machine learning, supporting multi-user concurrency and customizable multi-turn dialogues. It offers rich semantic analysis tools and knowledge graph construction capabilities, making it suitable for quickly building personalized chatbots and reducing repetitive work for developers. Its modular design and extensibility provide broad application potential in smart living and work.

metadata.name: wukong-robot
metadata.description: 🤖 wukong-robot 是一个简单、灵活、优雅的中文语音对话机器人/智能音箱项目，支持ChatGPT多轮对话能力，还可能是首个支持脑机交互的开源智能音箱项目。

summary.zh: wukong-robot 是一个灵活且优雅的中文语音对话机器人项目，支持多轮对话和脑机交互，旨在帮助中国的 Maker 和 Haker 快速构建个性化智能音箱。该项目集成了多家语音识别和合成技术，具备模块化设计，支持智能家居控制，已在市场上获得广泛应用，安装设备超13,000台，唤醒次数超过700,000次。
summary.en: wukong-robot is a flexible and elegant Chinese voice dialogue robot project that supports multi-turn conversations and brain-machine interaction, aimed at helping Chinese Makers and Hackers quickly build personalized smart speakers. The project integrates multiple voice recognition and synthesis technologies, features a modular design, supports smart home control, and has gained widespread adoption with over 13,000 installations and more than 700,000 wake-up instances.

metadata.name: PadChat-SDK
metadata.description: 永久免费 微信ipad、微信mac协议，可实现微信80%功能；支持62数据登录、扫码登录、收发朋友圈、查看朋友圈、微信建群、微信拉人进群、微信公众号阅读、微信消息收发、微信附近的人定位、微信添加好友、微信红包接收、微信防撤回、分享小程序、微信加粉、微信收藏、微信标签等

summary.zh: PadChat-SDK 是一个免费的微信协议开发包，支持 iPad 和 Mac 平台，能够实现微信的80%功能，包括登录、群管理、朋友圈操作等。通过 WebSocket 协议与微信服务程序通信，提供丰富的 API 接口，适合开发者在应用中集成微信功能，提升用户体验。
summary.en: PadChat-SDK is a free WeChat protocol development kit for iPad and Mac platforms, enabling 80% of WeChat functionalities, including login, group management, and Moments operations. It communicates with WeChat service programs via WebSocket protocol, offering a rich set of API interfaces, ideal for developers to integrate WeChat features into applications and enhance user experience.

metadata.name: php-zipkin
metadata.description: PHP library for OpenZipkin

summary.zh: PHP-Zipkin 是一个非官方的 PHP 库，用于 OpenZipkin，旨在帮助开发者在 PHP 应用中实现分布式追踪。该库目前处于不完整状态，仅支持一种传输方式，提供了最基本的功能以发送追踪信息到 Zipkin。适合需要在 Laravel 等框架中集成追踪功能的开发者，未来计划增加对 Symfony、Redis、HTTP、PDO 和 Kafka 的支持。
summary.en: PHP-Zipkin is an unofficial PHP library for OpenZipkin, designed to assist developers in implementing distributed tracing in PHP applications. Currently in an incomplete state, it supports only one transport method and provides minimal functionality for sending tracing information to Zipkin. Ideal for developers looking to integrate tracing features in frameworks like Laravel, with plans to add support for Symfony, Redis, HTTP, PDO, and Kafka in the future.

metadata.name: OpsManage
metadata.description: 自动化运维平台: 代码及应用部署CI/CD、资产管理CMDB、计划任务管理平台、SQL审核|回滚、任务调度、站内WIKI

summary.zh: OpsManage是一款自动化运维平台，集成了代码及应用部署的CI/CD、资产管理CMDB、计划任务管理、SQL审核与回滚、任务调度等功能。该平台基于Python、Django和Celery等技术构建，适用于企业在运维管理中的高效协作与资源优化，提升了运维效率与安全性。
summary.en: OpsManage is an automation operations platform that integrates CI/CD for code and application deployment, asset management CMDB, scheduled task management, SQL auditing and rollback, and task scheduling. Built on technologies like Python, Django, and Celery, it is suitable for enterprises to enhance collaboration and resource optimization in operations management, improving efficiency and security.

metadata.name: thinkphp-inaction
metadata.description: 《ThinkPHP实战》随书代码

summary.zh: 本仓库提供《ThinkPHP实战》一书的随书代码，版本号为3.2，旨在帮助开发者快速上手ThinkPHP框架。包含详细的本地部署教程，适合初学者和爱好者进行实践与学习。通过配置数据库和访问项目，用户可以轻松体验ThinkPHP的强大功能，提升开发技能。
summary.en: This repository contains the accompanying code for the book 'ThinkPHP in Action', version 3.2, aimed at helping developers quickly get started with the ThinkPHP framework. It includes a detailed local deployment tutorial, making it suitable for beginners and enthusiasts to practice and learn. By configuring the database and accessing the project, users can easily experience the powerful features of ThinkPHP and enhance their development skills.

metadata.name: OEasyScreenshot
metadata.description: Qt实现，高仿QQ截图器，中国码云独家开源插件。 可以随意修改优化源码，但请尊重软件著作者及其他维护人员，保留其署名权。也欢迎大家一起来维护这个库。 详情查看：Apache v2开源协议

summary.zh: OEasyScreenshot 是一个基于 Qt 5 开发的高仿 QQ 截图工具，提供简洁的接口和丰富的截图功能，包括多屏幕截图、截图编辑和自动校准等。该项目支持自由修改与优化，旨在为开发者提供一个高效的截图解决方案，适用于各种应用场景。欢迎社区参与维护与功能扩展。
summary.en: OEasyScreenshot is a QQ-like screenshot tool developed with Qt 5, offering a simple interface and rich screenshot features, including multi-screen capture, editing, and auto-calibration. This project supports free modification and optimization, aiming to provide developers with an efficient screenshot solution suitable for various application scenarios. Community contributions for maintenance and feature expansion are welcome.

summary.zh: Navicat_Keygen 是一个针对 Navicat 的密钥生成器，基于 DoubleLabyrinth 的研究，进行了小幅改进，并采用图形用户界面（GUI）形式开发。该项目旨在为用户提供便捷的密钥生成解决方案，提升使用体验。
summary.en: Navicat_Keygen is a key generator for Navicat, based on the studies of DoubleLabyrinth with minor improvements. Developed in a graphical user interface (GUI) format, this project aims to provide users with a convenient key generation solution to enhance their experience.

metadata.name: laravel-dotenv-editor
metadata.description: A package for editing the .env file in your Laravel root.

summary.zh: 该项目是一个用于动态编辑Laravel根目录下.env文件的包，支持通过控制器或模型进行操作。其图形用户界面基于VueJS，提供简单易用的功能，包括检查键值、获取和修改.env内容、备份和恢复等。适用于需要频繁调整环境变量的Laravel应用，提升了开发和运维的效率。
summary.en: This package allows dynamic editing of the .env file in the Laravel root via controllers or models. It features a user-friendly graphical interface built on VueJS, offering functionalities like checking keys, retrieving and modifying .env content, and managing backups. Ideal for Laravel applications that require frequent adjustments to environment variables, enhancing development and operational efficiency.

metadata.name: across
metadata.description: Across the Great Wall we can reach every corner in the world

summary.zh: Across 项目提供了一系列实用的脚本，旨在简化服务器管理和网络配置。主要功能包括 WireGuard VPN 服务器配置、TCP BBR 内核自动安装、KMS 服务器安装、I/O 性能测试及数据库备份等。通过这些工具，用户可以高效地管理和优化其服务器环境，适用于开发者和系统管理员。
summary.en: The Across project offers a set of practical scripts designed to simplify server management and network configuration. Key features include configuring WireGuard VPN servers, auto-installing TCP BBR kernel, setting up KMS servers, performing I/O performance tests, and backing up databases. These tools enable users to efficiently manage and optimize their server environments, making it suitable for developers and system administrators.

metadata.name: webchat
metadata.description: 基于 Laravel + Swoole + Vue 构建在线聊天室

summary.zh: 该项目基于 Laravel、Swoole 和 Vue 构建了一个实时在线聊天室，提供了完整的环境准备和功能实现指南，包括 WebSocket 服务器搭建、用户认证、消息发送等。适用于需要实时通讯的应用场景，技术亮点在于高效的长连接管理和灵活的前端交互设计。
summary.en: This project builds a real-time online chat room using Laravel, Swoole, and Vue, offering comprehensive guides on environment setup and feature implementation, including WebSocket server setup, user authentication, and message sending. It is suitable for applications requiring real-time communication, with technical highlights in efficient long connection management and flexible front-end interaction design.

metadata.name: pyproxy-async
metadata.description: 基于 Python Asyncio + Redis  实现的代理池

summary.zh: PyProxy-Async 是一个基于 Python Asyncio 和 Redis 的代理池解决方案，支持 HTTP/HTTPS 检测和 Web API 接口。该项目通过协程实现高效的代理 IP 抓取和管理，适用于需要动态代理的应用场景，如爬虫和数据抓取。用户可以轻松配置和扩展抓取服务，支持 Docker 部署，便于集成和使用。
summary.en: PyProxy-Async is a proxy pool solution based on Python Asyncio and Redis, supporting HTTP/HTTPS detection and Web API interfaces. The project efficiently manages and fetches proxy IPs using coroutines, making it suitable for dynamic proxy applications like web scraping and data collection. Users can easily configure and extend fetching services, with Docker support for seamless integration.

metadata.name: 12306_code_server
metadata.description: 该仓库用于构建自托管的12306验证码识别服务器

summary.zh: 该项目提供一个自托管的12306验证码识别服务器，利用深度学习模型实现验证码自动识别，支持多种平台和Python版本。用户可通过Docker或源码方式快速部署，接口符合12306购票小助手的云打码格式，适合需要自动化购票的用户和开发者。
summary.en: This project offers a self-hosted 12306 captcha recognition server, utilizing deep learning models for automatic captcha recognition. It supports multiple platforms and Python versions, allowing quick deployment via Docker or source code. The API conforms to the cloud captcha format of the 12306 ticket purchasing assistant, making it suitable for users and developers needing automated ticket purchasing.

metadata.name: python-data-science-cheatsheet
metadata.description: Python数据科学速查表

summary.zh: 该项目提供了14张Python数据科学速查表，涵盖基础知识、数据处理（如Numpy、Pandas）、可视化（如Matplotlib、Seaborn）及机器学习（如Keras、Scikit-learn）等核心领域。适合数据科学初学者和从业者快速查阅和学习，提升工作效率。
summary.en: This project offers 14 Python data science cheat sheets covering core areas such as fundamentals, data processing (Numpy, Pandas), visualization (Matplotlib, Seaborn), and machine learning (Keras, Scikit-learn). It is designed for beginners and practitioners in data science to quickly reference and enhance their learning and productivity.

metadata.name: imi
metadata.description: imi 是一款支持长连接微服务分布式的 PHP 开发框架，它可以运行在 PHP-FPM、Swoole、Workerman、RoadRunner 等多种容器环境下。它支持 HttpApi、WebSocket、TCP、UDP、MQTT 服务的开发。特别适合互联网微服务、即时通讯聊天im、物联网等场景！QQ群：17916227

summary.zh: imi 是一款支持长连接的 PHP 微服务开发框架，适用于多种容器环境如 PHP-FPM 和 Swoole。它提供丰富的功能，包括 HTTP、WebSocket、TCP、UDP 和 MQTT 服务的开发，特别适合互联网微服务、即时通讯和物联网场景。自 2018 年发布以来，imi 已在多个项目中稳定运行，具备强大的 ORM、依赖注入和微服务支持等特性。
summary.en: imi is a PHP microservice development framework that supports long connections and can run in various container environments like PHP-FPM and Swoole. It offers rich functionalities for developing HTTP, WebSocket, TCP, UDP, and MQTT services, making it ideal for internet microservices, instant messaging, and IoT scenarios. Since its launch in 2018, imi has been reliably used in multiple projects, featuring a powerful ORM, dependency injection, and microservice support.

metadata.name: py12306
metadata.description: 🚂 12306 购票助手，支持集群，多账号，多任务购票以及 Web 页面管理

summary.zh: py12306 是一款强大的购票助手，支持分布式、多账号和多任务购票，能够自动打码、查询余票并提供语音、邮件和微信通知。其独特的 Web 管理页面和 Docker 支持，使得用户可以方便地管理购票任务和配置，适合需要高效购票的用户群体。
summary.en: py12306 is a powerful ticket purchasing assistant that supports distributed, multi-account, and multi-task ticket buying. It features automatic captcha solving, ticket availability queries, and notifications via voice, email, and WeChat. Its unique Web management interface and Docker support allow users to easily manage purchasing tasks and configurations, making it ideal for users needing efficient ticket purchasing.

metadata.name: taichi
metadata.description: Productive, portable, and performant GPU programming in Python.

summary.zh: Taichi Lang 是一种开源的命令式并行编程语言，专为高性能数值计算而设计，嵌入于 Python 中。它利用 JIT 编译器将计算密集型的 Python 代码转化为本地 GPU 或 CPU 指令，广泛应用于实时物理模拟、增强现实、人工智能等领域。Taichi Lang 以其与 Python 的高兼容性、灵活性和出色的性能，成为科学计算和图形渲染的理想选择。
summary.en: Taichi Lang is an open-source, imperative parallel programming language designed for high-performance numerical computation, embedded in Python. It utilizes a JIT compiler to convert compute-intensive Python code into native GPU or CPU instructions, with broad applications in real-time physical simulation, augmented reality, and artificial intelligence. Taichi Lang stands out for its high compatibility with Python, flexibility, and exceptional performance, making it an ideal choice for scientific computing and graphics rendering.

metadata.name: canvas
metadata.description: Publishing on your own terms

summary.zh: Canvas 是一个完全开源的 Laravel 扩展包，旨在帮助用户快速搭建博客。它提供无干扰的写作体验，并允许用户查看内容的月度趋势和读者流量分析。适用于希望在现有 Laravel 应用中集成博客功能的开发者，Canvas 通过简单的安装和配置流程，极大地提升了内容创作的效率。
summary.en: Canvas is a fully open-source Laravel package designed to help users quickly set up a blog. It offers a distraction-free writing experience and allows users to view monthly trends on content and reader traffic analysis. Ideal for developers looking to integrate blogging functionality into their existing Laravel applications, Canvas enhances content creation efficiency through a straightforward installation and configuration process.

metadata.name: from_coder_to_expert
metadata.description: 2021年最新总结，从程序员到CTO，从专业走向卓越，分享大牛企业内部pdf与PPT

summary.zh: 本仓库汇集了从程序员到CTO的最新总结，分享了多家知名企业的技术文档和架构实践，包括网易、京东、阿里等。内容涵盖大数据、微服务、分布式存储等前沿技术，适合希望提升技术能力和架构设计的开发者。持续更新的资料为技术人员提供了宝贵的学习资源和行业洞察。
summary.en: This repository compiles the latest summaries from programmers to CTOs, sharing technical documents and architectural practices from renowned companies like NetEase, JD, and Alibaba. It covers cutting-edge technologies such as big data, microservices, and distributed storage, making it suitable for developers looking to enhance their technical skills and architectural design. The continuously updated materials provide valuable learning resources and industry insights.

metadata.name: exchangeratesapi
metadata.description: Exchange Rates API

summary.zh: Exchange Rates API 是一个免费的外汇汇率服务，提供当前和历史汇率数据，基于欧洲中央银行发布的信息。该 API 支持多种货币的实时汇率查询和历史数据检索，适用于金融应用和数据分析。其高效的架构基于 Sanic，能够异步处理数千个请求，确保快速响应和稳定性。
summary.en: The Exchange Rates API is a free service providing current and historical foreign exchange rates based on data published by the European Central Bank. It supports real-time exchange rate queries and historical data retrieval for various currencies, making it suitable for financial applications and data analysis. Built on Sanic, it efficiently handles thousands of requests asynchronously, ensuring fast responses and stability.

metadata.name: laravel-exchange-rates
metadata.description: A Laravel wrapper package for interacting with the exchangeratesapi.io API.

summary.zh: Laravel Exchange Rates 是一个简单的 Laravel 包，旨在与多个汇率 API 进行交互。它支持获取最新或历史汇率，并能够在不同货币之间进行转换，适用于需要处理多种货币的应用场景，如电商平台和金融应用。该包兼容 PHP 8.0 和 Laravel 8，提供了灵活的配置和缓存机制，确保高效的汇率查询与转换。
summary.en: Laravel Exchange Rates is a simple Laravel package designed for interacting with multiple exchange rate APIs. It supports fetching the latest or historical exchange rates and converting between different currencies, making it suitable for applications that handle multiple currencies, such as e-commerce platforms and financial apps. The package is compatible with PHP 8.0 and Laravel 8, offering flexible configuration and caching mechanisms for efficient rate queries and conversions.

metadata.name: lux
metadata.description: 👾 Fast and simple video download library and CLI tool written in Go

summary.zh: Lux 是一个快速简便的视频下载库和命令行工具，使用 Go 语言编写。它支持多种视频平台，提供多线程下载、重试机制和自定义输出路径等功能，适合开发者和普通用户使用。其简洁的安装方式和丰富的选项使得视频下载变得高效而灵活。
summary.en: Lux is a fast and simple video download library and CLI tool written in Go. It supports various video platforms and offers features like multi-threaded downloads, retry mechanisms, and customizable output paths, making it suitable for both developers and casual users. Its straightforward installation and rich options make video downloading efficient and flexible.

metadata.name: Base
metadata.description: Until 2018, Backpack v3 used this Base package to offer admin authentication and a blank admin panel using AdminLTE. Backpack v4 no longer uses this package, they're now built-in - use Backpack/CRUD instead.

summary.zh: Laravel Backpack/Base 是一个用于 Laravel 5.x 的核心包，提供了管理员身份验证和基于 AdminLTE 的空白管理面板。尽管此包在 Backpack v3 中使用，但自 v4 起已被整合至 Backpack/CRUD 中。该包支持基本菜单、错误页面和通知系统，适合需要快速搭建管理后台的开发者。
summary.en: Laravel Backpack/Base is a core package for Laravel 5.x that provides admin authentication and a blank admin panel based on AdminLTE. Although this package was used in Backpack v3, it has been integrated into Backpack/CRUD starting from v4. It supports basic menus, error pages, and a notification system, making it suitable for developers looking to quickly set up an admin backend.

metadata.name: vbot
metadata.description: weixin-cli,qiwei-cli,微信，企微，机器人，企业微信，企微机器人，微信机器人，ipad协议，视频号下载，聚合聊天，RPA，协议，hook，逆向，群发，自动回复，API对接，稳定防封全语言通用，企业定制/SCRM/SAAS专用

summary.zh: vbot 是一个基于微信网页协议的机器人框架，支持企业微信和微信的自动回复、群发消息等功能。该项目适合开发者学习和参考，提供稳定的 API 接口，支持多种语言，具备防封机制，适合企业定制和 SCRM 应用。项目还集成了 AI 自动回复功能，便于快速构建聊天机器人。
summary.en: vbot is a bot framework based on the WeChat web protocol, supporting automatic replies and mass messaging for both WeChat and WeChat Work. This project is suitable for developers for learning and reference, providing stable API interfaces with anti-blocking mechanisms, ideal for enterprise customization and SCRM applications. It also integrates AI automatic reply features for quick chatbot development.

metadata.name: kutt
metadata.description: Free Modern URL Shortener.

summary.zh: Kutt是一个现代化的免费URL缩短服务，支持自定义域名，用户可以创建、编辑链接并查看统计数据。它具有零配置、易于设置的特点，支持多种数据库（SQLite、Postgres、MySQL），并提供RESTful API和用户管理功能，适合个人和团队使用。
summary.en: Kutt is a free modern URL shortener that supports custom domains, allowing users to create and edit links while viewing statistics. It features zero configuration, easy setup, and supports various databases (SQLite, Postgres, MySQL). With a RESTful API and user management capabilities, it is suitable for both individuals and teams.

summary.zh: 该项目提供了科学上网的全面指南，适合希望自建代理服务的用户。内容涵盖从购买VPS、搭建代理服务到客户端设置的详细步骤，强调自建的安全性和隐私保护。技术亮点包括Docker服务的设置、流量伪装及防探测技巧，适用于需要访问被墙网站的用户，尤其是技术人员和开发者。
summary.en: This project offers a comprehensive guide for scientific internet access, tailored for users looking to build their own proxy services. It covers detailed steps from purchasing VPS to setting up proxy services and client configurations, emphasizing the security and privacy benefits of self-hosting. Key highlights include Docker service setup, traffic obfuscation, and anti-detection techniques, making it suitable for users needing access to blocked websites, particularly tech-savvy individuals and developers.

metadata.name: ycsocket
metadata.description: 基于swoole的socket框架，支持协程版MySQL、Redis连接池，已用于大型RPG游戏服务端
