summary.zh: ycsocket是一个基于Swoole的轻量级WebSocket框架，专为高并发的IO密集型应用设计，支持协程化的MySQL和Redis连接池，具备自动重连功能。该框架已在大型RPG游戏服务端中应用，提供了高效的PHP解决方案，兼顾性能与开发效率，适合需要实时通信的场景。
summary.en: ycsocket is a lightweight WebSocket framework based on Swoole, designed for high-concurrency IO-intensive applications, supporting coroutine-based MySQL and Redis connection pools with automatic reconnection. This framework has been applied in large RPG game servers, offering an efficient PHP solution that balances performance and development efficiency, ideal for real-time communication scenarios.

metadata.name: crater
metadata.description: Open Source Invoicing Solution for Individuals & Businesses

summary.zh: Crater 是一个开源的发票解决方案，适用于个人和企业，能够帮助用户跟踪费用、支付并创建专业的发票和估算。该项目基于 Laravel 和 VueJS 构建网页应用，同时移动应用使用 React Native 开发，适合需要高效管理财务的用户。
summary.en: Crater is an open-source invoicing solution for individuals and businesses, designed to help users track expenses, payments, and create professional invoices and estimates. The web application is built with Laravel and VueJS, while mobile apps are developed using React Native, catering to users who need efficient financial management.

metadata.name: laravue
metadata.description: Admin dashboard for enterprise Laravel applications built by VueJS and Element UI https://laravue.dev

summary.zh: Laravue 是一个为企业级 Laravel 应用构建的美观仪表盘，结合了 Vue.js 和 Element UI。它提供了一个完整的全栈解决方案，适合从零开始构建管理系统，支持快速开发和高性能前端展示。该项目灵感来源于 vue-element-admin，旨在提升企业应用的管理效率。
summary.en: Laravue is a beautiful admin dashboard for enterprise Laravel applications, built with Vue.js and Element UI. It offers a full-stack solution ideal for starting management systems from scratch, enabling rapid development and high-performance front-end presentation. Inspired by vue-element-admin, it aims to enhance management efficiency for enterprise applications.

metadata.name: UnblockNeteaseMusic
metadata.description: Revive unavailable songs for Netease Cloud Music

summary.zh: UnblockNeteaseMusic 是一款用于解锁网易云音乐中变灰歌曲的工具。它通过替换音源链接，支持多种音乐平台（如 QQ、虾米等），并提供完整的流量代理功能，适用于多种客户端（Windows、Android、macOS 等）。该工具还支持设置代理和自定义服务器 IP，确保用户能够访问受限内容，提升音乐体验。
summary.en: UnblockNeteaseMusic is a tool designed to unlock unavailable songs in Netease Cloud Music. It replaces song source links from various platforms (like QQ, Xiami, etc.) and offers comprehensive traffic proxy features, compatible with multiple clients (Windows, Android, macOS, etc.). The tool also supports proxy settings and custom server IPs, ensuring users can access restricted content and enhance their music experience.

metadata.name: sorrypy
metadata.description: GIF表情包神器sorry的python重制版

summary.zh: sorrypy是一个基于Python的GIF表情包生成工具，旨在为用户提供自定义GIF的功能。用户可以通过简单的操作，替换视频和字幕模板，快速生成个性化的GIF表情。该项目支持多平台部署，提供Docker和普通安装两种方式，极大地便利了用户的使用体验。其核心亮点在于灵活的模板适配能力，适合社交媒体、娱乐和创意表达等场景。
summary.en: sorrypy is a Python-based GIF meme generator that allows users to create customized GIFs easily. Users can quickly generate personalized GIFs by replacing video and subtitle templates through simple operations. The project supports multi-platform deployment, offering both Docker and standard installation methods, enhancing user experience. Its core highlight is the flexible template adaptation capability, making it suitable for social media, entertainment, and creative expression.

metadata.name: intellij-solidity
metadata.description: Solidity plugin for IntelliJ

summary.zh: IntelliJ Solidity 插件为开发者提供了强大的 Solidity 语言支持，具备语法高亮、代码补全、文件模板、跳转声明、查找用法和代码格式化等功能。该插件特别适合区块链开发者，能够提升智能合约的开发效率和代码质量。
summary.en: The IntelliJ Solidity plugin offers robust support for the Solidity language, featuring syntax highlighting, code completion, file templates, goto declaration, find usages, and code formatting. This plugin is particularly suited for blockchain developers, enhancing the efficiency and quality of smart contract development.

metadata.name: cos-js-sdk-v5
metadata.description: 腾讯云 COS JS SDK（XML API）

summary.zh: 腾讯云 COS JS SDK（XML API）为开发者提供了便捷的接口，用于在浏览器中实现文件的上传和管理。该 SDK 支持 HTML5 特性，允许用户通过 AJAX 上传文件，并通过后端获取临时密钥以保证安全性。适用于需要与腾讯云对象存储服务集成的前端应用，具备易于使用的接口和良好的文档支持。
summary.en: The Tencent Cloud COS JS SDK (XML API) provides developers with convenient interfaces for file upload and management in browsers. This SDK supports HTML5 features, allowing users to upload files via AJAX and obtain temporary keys from the backend for security. It is suitable for front-end applications that need to integrate with Tencent Cloud Object Storage Service, featuring an easy-to-use interface and comprehensive documentation.

metadata.name: Dash-iOS
metadata.description: Dash for iOS was discontinued. Please check out Dash for macOS instead.

summary.zh: Dash for iOS 已停止维护，用户可转向 Dash for macOS。Dash 提供离线访问 150 多个 API 文档集，适用于 iPad 和 iPhone。该项目的安装可通过 App Store 或 Xcode 完成，适合开发者使用。
summary.en: Dash for iOS has been discontinued, and users are encouraged to switch to Dash for macOS. Dash provides offline access to over 150 API documentation sets for iPad and iPhone. Installation can be done via the App Store or Xcode, making it suitable for developers.

metadata.name: devdocs-desktop
metadata.description: 🗂 A full-featured desktop app for DevDocs.io.

summary.zh: DevDocs Desktop 是一款功能齐全的桌面应用，旨在为开发者提供快速、组织良好且可搜索的 API 文档访问体验。该应用基于 DevDocs.io，支持后台运行和内置快捷键，提升了文档查阅的效率。未来计划增加菜单栏模式和标签支持，进一步优化用户体验。
summary.en: DevDocs Desktop is a fully-featured desktop application designed to provide developers with fast, organized, and searchable access to API documentation. Based on DevDocs.io, it supports background operation and built-in shortcuts, enhancing the efficiency of document retrieval. Planned features include menubar mode and tab support to further optimize user experience.

metadata.name: solidity
metadata.description: Solidity, the Smart Contract Programming Language

summary.zh: Solidity是一种静态类型的合约导向高级编程语言，专为在以太坊平台上实现智能合约而设计。它允许开发者在去中心化的网络中创建和执行具有价值、所有权和投票等逻辑的智能合约。Solidity的快速迭代和持续更新使其成为区块链开发的核心工具，适用于需要安全和透明交易的各种应用场景。
summary.en: Solidity is a statically-typed, contract-oriented high-level programming language designed for implementing smart contracts on the Ethereum platform. It enables developers to create and execute smart contracts with logic related to value, ownership, and voting in a decentralized network. The rapid iteration and continuous updates of Solidity make it a core tool for blockchain development, suitable for various applications requiring secure and transparent transactions.

metadata.name: bitcoin
metadata.description: Bitcoin Core integration/staging tree

summary.zh: Bitcoin Core 是一个连接比特币点对点网络的软件，能够下载并完全验证区块和交易。它提供了一个钱包和可选的图形用户界面，适用于需要安全和高效管理比特币的用户。该项目遵循 MIT 许可证，定期发布稳定版本，并鼓励开发者进行单元测试和代码审查，以确保软件的安全性和可靠性。
summary.en: Bitcoin Core is a software that connects to the Bitcoin peer-to-peer network to download and fully validate blocks and transactions. It includes a wallet and an optional graphical user interface, catering to users who need secure and efficient management of Bitcoin. The project is licensed under the MIT license, regularly releases stable versions, and encourages developers to conduct unit tests and code reviews to ensure software security and reliability.

metadata.name: hoppscotch
metadata.description: Open-Source API Development Ecosystem • https://hoppscotch.io • Offline, On-Prem & Cloud • Web, Desktop & CLI • Open-Source Alternative to Postman, Insomnia

summary.zh: Hoppscotch 是一个开源的 API 开发生态系统，提供轻量级、快速的请求发送和响应接收功能，支持多种 HTTP 方法。它具备高度可定制的主题选项，并可作为渐进式 Web 应用程序安装，支持离线使用。Hoppscotch 是 Postman 和 Insomnia 的开源替代品，适合开发者在本地、云端或离线环境中高效进行 API 测试和开发。
summary.en: Hoppscotch is an open-source API development ecosystem that offers lightweight and fast request sending and response receiving capabilities, supporting various HTTP methods. It features highly customizable theme options and can be installed as a Progressive Web App, supporting offline use. Hoppscotch serves as an open-source alternative to Postman and Insomnia, ideal for developers to efficiently test and develop APIs in local, cloud, or offline environments.

metadata.name: WeChat.CRM.SDK
metadata.description: 微信开发sdk，微信二次开发SDK，微信开发API接口协议。非微信ipad协议、非mac协议,非安卓协议，api可实现微信99%功能； 无需扫码登录、可收发朋友圈、查看朋友圈、朋友圈互动点赞、评论、 好友列表、微信消息收发、发文本消息、图片消息、名片消息、动图表情、发文件、删好友 添加好友、微信转账、微信红包接收、分享小程序、分享名片、加通讯录好友、微信收藏、微信标签等！ 清理僵尸粉、消息群发、通过好友请求、 微信建群、微信拉人进群、踢群成员、邀请群成员、退群、改群名称、群列表、发布群公告、多群消息同步等

summary.zh: WeChat.CRM.SDK 是一款专为微信个人号开发的 SDK，支持无扫码登录，能够实现微信的99%功能，包括消息收发、朋友圈互动、好友管理等。该 SDK 适用于微信营销、客服系统及群控系统的二次开发，提供稳定的商用解决方案，兼容性强，支持多种通信协议，适合快速开发各种基于微信的应用。
summary.en: WeChat.CRM.SDK is a specialized SDK for WeChat personal accounts, enabling login without QR code and supporting 99% of WeChat's functionalities, including message sending, Moments interaction, and friend management. This SDK is suitable for secondary development in WeChat marketing, customer service systems, and group control systems, offering a stable commercial solution with strong compatibility and support for various communication protocols, ideal for rapid development of WeChat-based applications.

metadata.name: HackingNeuralNetworks
metadata.description: A small course on exploiting and defending neural networks

summary.zh: 《黑客神经网络：简短介绍》是一个关于利用和防御神经网络的课程，涵盖了漏洞挖掘、恶意软件注入等攻击方法，以及如何利用现有神经网络进行信息提取和后门植入。课程提供多个实践练习，帮助学习者掌握这些技术，适合对机器学习安全感兴趣的开发者和研究人员。
summary.en: The 'Hacking Neural Networks: A Short Introduction' course focuses on exploiting and defending neural networks, covering techniques such as bug hunting and malware injection, as well as how to leverage existing neural networks for information extraction and backdooring. It includes practical exercises aimed at helping learners master these skills, making it suitable for developers and researchers interested in machine learning security.

metadata.name: oneinstack
metadata.description: OneinStack - A PHP/JAVA Deployment Tool

summary.zh: OneinStack 是一个高效的 PHP/JAVA 部署工具，支持快速安装 LEMP、LAMP、LNMP 等多种环境，适用于多种 Linux 发行版。该工具提供了丰富的数据库和 PHP 版本选择，具备安全优化功能，支持自动安装和交互式操作，适合开发者和运维人员在生产环境中快速搭建和管理应用。其独特之处在于提供多种服务的升级和备份脚本，极大提高了部署的灵活性和便利性。
summary.en: OneinStack is an efficient PHP/JAVA deployment tool that enables quick installation of LEMP, LAMP, LNMP, and other environments across various Linux distributions. It offers a wide selection of database and PHP versions, includes security optimizations, and supports both auto-installation and interactive operations, making it ideal for developers and operators to swiftly set up and manage applications in production environments. Its unique features include upgrade and backup scripts for multiple services, enhancing deployment flexibility and convenience.

metadata.name: php-xtea
metadata.description: XTEA implementation in PHP

summary.zh: php-xtea 是一个用 PHP 实现的 XTEA 加密算法库，支持二进制安全的数据加密与解密。该库提供灵活的填充方案和加密轮数设置，适用于需要安全数据传输的应用场景。通过简单的 API，用户可以轻松实现数据加密和解密，确保数据在传输过程中的安全性。
summary.en: php-xtea is a PHP implementation of the XTEA encryption algorithm, offering binary-safe data encryption and decryption. The library supports flexible padding schemes and configurable encryption rounds, making it suitable for applications requiring secure data transmission. With a straightforward API, users can easily encrypt and decrypt data, ensuring security during transmission.

metadata.name: BullshitGenerator
metadata.description: Needs to generate some texts to test if my GUI rendering codes good or not. so I made this.

summary.zh: BullshitGenerator 是一个用于生成无意义文本的工具，专为 GUI 开发测试文本渲染而设计。该项目强调生成的内容仅供搞笑用途，避免用于正式场合。基于 Python3 开发，未来计划增加多样化的冗长文本和手写体渲染功能，旨在提升测试效果。
summary.en: BullshitGenerator is a tool designed to generate nonsensical text for testing GUI text rendering. The project emphasizes that the generated content is for humorous purposes only and should not be used in formal contexts. Developed in Python3, future plans include adding diverse verbose text and handwritten rendering features to enhance testing effectiveness.

metadata.name: advanced-go-programming-book
metadata.description: :books: 《Go语言高级编程》开源图书，涵盖CGO、Go汇编语言、RPC实现、Protobuf插件实现、Web框架实现、分布式系统等高阶主题(完稿)

summary.zh: 《Go语言高级编程》是一本开源图书，专为希望深入掌握Go语言的开发者设计。内容涵盖CGO、Go汇编、RPC、Protobuf、Web框架及分布式系统等高阶主题，适合有一定基础的读者。书中提供了丰富的实践案例和深入的技术分析，帮助开发者在实际项目中应用Go语言的高级特性。
summary.en: The 'Advanced Go Programming' book is an open-source resource designed for developers seeking to deepen their understanding of Go language. It covers advanced topics such as CGO, Go assembly, RPC, Protobuf, web frameworks, and distributed systems, making it suitable for readers with a foundational knowledge of Go. The book offers practical examples and in-depth technical analysis to help developers apply advanced Go features in real projects.

metadata.name: taobaoVisitingVenues
metadata.description: 京东/淘宝的自动浏览逛店脚本

summary.zh: 本项目是一个自动浏览京东和淘宝店铺的脚本，旨在解放用户的双手，减少手动操作。基于 Auto.js Pro 开发，支持 Android 7.0 及以上版本。尽管存在使用后收益减少的风险，但仍可有效提高浏览效率，适合需要频繁访问这些电商平台的用户。更新频率受限于开发者的工作安排，脚本功能不断完善。
summary.en: This project is an automated browsing script for JD and Taobao, designed to free users' hands and reduce manual operations. Developed based on Auto.js Pro, it supports Android 7.0 and above. Although there is a risk of reduced earnings after use, it can still effectively improve browsing efficiency, suitable for users who frequently visit these e-commerce platforms. Update frequency is limited by the developer's work schedule, with ongoing improvements to the script's functionality.

metadata.name: laravel-modules
metadata.description: Module Management In Laravel

summary.zh: nwidart/laravel-modules 是一个用于管理大型 Laravel 应用的模块化包，支持 Laravel 11。通过将应用拆分为多个模块，开发者可以更高效地组织代码，提升可维护性。该包经过重新组织和维护，增加了测试功能，确保了更高的稳定性和可靠性。适合需要模块化管理的 Laravel 项目。
summary.en: nwidart/laravel-modules is a modular package for managing large Laravel applications, supporting Laravel 11. By breaking the application into multiple modules, developers can organize code more efficiently, enhancing maintainability. The package has been reorganized and maintained, adding testing features to ensure higher stability and reliability. It is ideal for Laravel projects requiring modular management.

metadata.name: zim
metadata.description: The Zim Framework

summary.zh: Zim框架是一个简单的PHP框架，灵感来源于Yaf、Laravel和Symfony，基于Zephir语言构建。它作为PHP语言的C扩展提供，或可选择纯PHP实现。Zim框架旨在简化Web开发，提供快速路由和轻量级的架构，适合需要高性能和灵活性的应用场景。
summary.en: The Zim Framework is a simple PHP framework inspired by Yaf, Laravel, and Symfony, built on the Zephir language. It is delivered as a C extension for PHP or can be used as a pure PHP implementation. Zim aims to simplify web development, offering fast routing and a lightweight architecture, suitable for applications requiring high performance and flexibility.

metadata.name: Thinkphp5-Plugin
metadata.description: phpstorm插件,用于thinkphp5框架的视图,配置,路由,数据库,模型智能提示和跳转

summary.zh: Thinkphp5-Plugin 是一个专为 ThinkPHP 5 框架设计的 PHPStorm 插件，提供视图、配置、路由、数据库和模型的智能提示与跳转功能。该插件通过分析代码，提升开发效率，支持快速导航和类型分析，适用于 ThinkPHP 开发者，帮助他们更高效地进行项目开发和维护。
summary.en: Thinkphp5-Plugin is a PHPStorm plugin designed for the ThinkPHP 5 framework, offering intelligent hints and navigation for views, configurations, routes, databases, and models. By analyzing code, it enhances development efficiency, supports quick navigation and type analysis, making it ideal for ThinkPHP developers to streamline project development and maintenance.

metadata.name: php-beast
metadata.description: PHP source code encrypt module (PHP源码加密扩展)

summary.zh: php-beast是一个PHP源码加密扩展，支持自定义加密模块，提供多种加密算法（如AES、DES、Base64），适用于保护PHP项目的源代码。用户可通过简单的配置和命令行工具实现项目加密，增强代码安全性。该扩展兼容PHP 5.2.x至7.1.x，适合需要保护商业逻辑和知识产权的开发者。
summary.en: php-beast is a PHP source code encryption extension that supports custom encryption modules and offers various encryption algorithms (such as AES, DES, Base64) to protect PHP project source code. Users can easily encrypt their projects via simple configurations and command-line tools, enhancing code security. This extension is compatible with PHP versions 5.2.x to 7.1.x, making it suitable for developers needing to safeguard commercial logic and intellectual property.

metadata.name: wechat-php-sdk
metadata.description: PHP微信SDK（微信平台 + 微信支付）

summary.zh: wechat-php-sdk 是一个高效的 PHP SDK，专为微信平台及微信支付接口设计。它支持自动处理 access_token 失效问题，确保稳定性和可靠性。该 SDK 提供了丰富的功能，包括自动回复、菜单操作、客服消息、二维码生成、用户信息查询等，适合开发者在微信生态中快速集成和开发应用。
summary.en: wechat-php-sdk is an efficient PHP SDK designed for the WeChat platform and WeChat payment interfaces. It automatically handles access_token expiration issues, ensuring stability and reliability. The SDK offers a wide range of features, including auto-replies, menu operations, customer service messages, QR code generation, and user information queries, making it suitable for developers to quickly integrate and develop applications within the WeChat ecosystem.

metadata.name: L5-Swagger
metadata.description: OpenApi or Swagger integration to Laravel

summary.zh: L5-Swagger 是一个为 Laravel 项目提供 OpenApi 或 Swagger 规范集成的工具，旨在简化 API 文档的生成和管理。该项目通过将 swagger-php 和 swagger-ui 封装为 Laravel 友好的形式，使开发者能够轻松地为其应用程序提供 API 文档。适用于需要快速构建和维护 API 文档的 Laravel 开发者。
summary.en: L5-Swagger is a tool that integrates OpenApi or Swagger specification into Laravel projects, aimed at simplifying the generation and management of API documentation. By wrapping swagger-php and swagger-ui in a Laravel-friendly manner, it allows developers to easily provide API documentation for their applications. Ideal for Laravel developers needing to quickly build and maintain API documentation.

metadata.name: x-editable
metadata.description: In-place editing with Twitter Bootstrap, jQuery UI or pure jQuery

summary.zh: X-editable 是一个基于 Twitter Bootstrap、jQuery UI 或纯 jQuery 的内联编辑库，允许用户在页面上直接编辑内容。尽管该库已被弃用，但它曾为开发者提供了灵活的编辑功能，适用于需要快速编辑界面的应用场景。用户可以通过 CDN 或 Bower 轻松集成，支持多种样式和功能。该项目的文档和示例也为开发者提供了良好的参考。
summary.en: X-editable is an in-place editing library based on Twitter Bootstrap, jQuery UI, or pure jQuery, allowing users to edit content directly on the page. Although the library is deprecated, it previously offered developers flexible editing capabilities suitable for applications requiring quick interface edits. Users can easily integrate it via CDN or Bower, supporting various styles and functionalities. The project's documentation and examples also provide good references for developers.

metadata.name: scientific_internet_access
metadata.description: 爱国守法 科学上网 翻墙 梯子

summary.zh: 该项目提供了一套科学上网的解决方案，旨在帮助用户在国内访问被封锁的国外网站和资源。通过使用阿里云等服务，用户可以快速搭建翻墙工具，解决网络封锁问题。项目强调合法合规使用，提供详细的搭建教程和故障排除指南，适合需要稳定和快速访问国外信息的用户。
summary.en: This project offers a solution for scientific internet access, helping users in China to access blocked foreign websites and resources. By utilizing services like Alibaba Cloud, users can quickly set up VPN tools to bypass internet censorship. The project emphasizes lawful usage and provides detailed setup tutorials and troubleshooting guides, making it suitable for users needing stable and fast access to foreign information.

metadata.name: larabbs
metadata.description: A forum project base on Laravel

summary.zh: Larabbs 是一个基于 Laravel 框架的论坛项目，旨在提供一个易于使用和扩展的社区平台。其核心价值在于利用 Laravel 的强大功能，如简洁的路由、强大的依赖注入和灵活的数据库 ORM，帮助开发者快速构建高效的论坛应用。适合希望搭建在线社区的开发者，具备良好的文档支持和学习资源。
summary.en: Larabbs is a forum project built on the Laravel framework, designed to provide an easy-to-use and extensible community platform. Its core value lies in leveraging Laravel's powerful features, such as simple routing, robust dependency injection, and flexible database ORM, to help developers quickly build efficient forum applications. It is suitable for developers looking to create online communities, with excellent documentation and learning resources.

metadata.name: laravel-filesystem-qiniu
metadata.description: A Qiniu Storage filesystem for Laravel

summary.zh: Laravel-filesystem-qiniu 是一个为 Laravel 提供的七牛云存储文件系统扩展，基于 overtrue/flysystem-qiniu 开发。该扩展支持 Laravel 9 及以上版本，允许开发者轻松集成七牛云存储，进行文件上传、下载、复制、移动等操作，适用于需要云存储解决方案的 Laravel 应用。
summary.en: Laravel-filesystem-qiniu is a Qiniu cloud storage filesystem extension for Laravel, developed based on overtrue/flysystem-qiniu. This extension supports Laravel 9 and above, enabling developers to easily integrate Qiniu cloud storage for operations like file upload, download, copy, and move, making it suitable for Laravel applications requiring cloud storage solutions.

metadata.name: qiniu-laravel-storage
metadata.description: Qiniu 云储存 Laravel 5 Storage版

summary.zh: 该项目是一个基于七牛云存储的Laravel 5/6/7/8/9的存储解决方案，提供了与Laravel Storage接口兼容的功能。它支持文件的上传、下载、删除及管理，并提供了CDN防盗链功能。项目的技术亮点在于与七牛API的无缝集成，确保高效的文件处理和存储。适合需要云存储解决方案的Laravel应用开发者。
summary.en: This project is a storage solution for Laravel 5/6/7/8/9 based on Qiniu Cloud Storage, offering compatibility with Laravel Storage interfaces. It supports file upload, download, deletion, and management, along with CDN hotlink prevention features. The technical highlight lies in seamless integration with Qiniu API, ensuring efficient file handling and storage. Ideal for Laravel developers seeking cloud storage solutions.

metadata.name: TopList
metadata.description: 今日热榜，一个获取各大热门网站热门头条的聚合网站，使用Go语言编写，多协程异步快速抓取信息，预览:https://mo.fish

summary.zh: 今日热榜是一个聚合各大热门网站头条的工具，采用Go语言开发，利用多协程异步抓取技术，实现快速信息获取。该项目适用于需要实时跟踪热门新闻和话题的用户，提供简洁的API接口，便于集成和扩展。其高效的爬虫机制和灵活的配置选项使其在信息聚合领域具有独特优势。
summary.en: Today Hot List is a tool for aggregating headlines from major popular websites, developed in Go language, utilizing multi-threaded asynchronous scraping technology for fast information retrieval. This project is suitable for users who need to track trending news and topics in real-time, offering a simple API interface for easy integration and extension. Its efficient crawling mechanism and flexible configuration options give it a unique advantage in the information aggregation domain.

metadata.name: schedule
metadata.description: Python job scheduling for humans.

summary.zh: Schedule 是一个轻量级的 Python 任务调度库，旨在以友好的语法让人类轻松地定期运行 Python 函数。它提供了简单易用的 API，无需额外进程，适合各种定时任务场景。该库具有优秀的测试覆盖率，支持多种 Python 版本，适合开发者在自动化和定时任务中使用。
summary.en: Schedule is a lightweight Python job scheduling library designed to allow humans to easily run Python functions periodically with a friendly syntax. It offers a simple API without the need for extra processes, making it suitable for various scheduling scenarios. With excellent test coverage and support for multiple Python versions, it is ideal for developers in automation and scheduling tasks.

metadata.name: spikeSystem
metadata.description: 一个秒杀系统的例子分析

summary.zh: 该项目是一个秒杀系统的示例分析，重点探讨如何在高并发情况下提供稳定的服务。通过对12306抢票系统的研究，项目展示了分布式架构、负载均衡技术（如Nginx加权轮询）以及预扣库存策略的应用，确保在极端流量下的高可用性和性能优化。适用于电商、票务等领域的高并发场景。
summary.en: This project is an analysis of a spike system example, focusing on how to provide stable services under high concurrency. By studying the 12306 ticket grabbing system, it showcases the application of distributed architecture, load balancing techniques (like Nginx weighted round-robin), and pre-reserving inventory strategies to ensure high availability and performance optimization under extreme traffic. Suitable for high-concurrency scenarios in e-commerce and ticketing.

metadata.name: handbook
metadata.description: 放置我的笔记、搜集、摘录、实践，保持好奇心。看文需谨慎，后果很严重。

summary.zh: 该仓库是个人笔记和实践的集合，涵盖了广泛的技术知识点，旨在保持好奇心。内容虽广泛，但不保证准确性，适合技术爱好者进行参考和学习。用户需谨慎对待文中信息，避免误用。
summary.en: This repository is a collection of personal notes and practices, covering a wide range of technical knowledge aimed at fostering curiosity. While the content is broad, it does not guarantee accuracy and is suitable for tech enthusiasts for reference and learning. Users should approach the information with caution to avoid misuse.

metadata.name: down_52pojie_cn
metadata.description: A single page file explorer that can be hosted on static website. 吾爱破解论坛 爱盘 https://down.52pojie.cn/ 页面的源代码

summary.zh: 该项目是一个基于 Vue.js 的在线文件列表浏览器，适合部署在静态网站上。它支持快速响应的单页应用体验，提供文件搜索、模糊搜索和正则表达式搜索功能。用户可以通过导航栏轻松定位文件，并为文件或文件夹添加描述。适合用于展示服务器文件列表，特别是在文件数量不多的情况下。
summary.en: This project is an online file list browser built with Vue.js, suitable for deployment on static websites. It offers a fast, single-page application experience with features like file search, fuzzy search, and regex search. Users can easily navigate through files via a navigation bar and add descriptions to files or folders. Ideal for showcasing server file lists, especially when the number of files is limited.

metadata.name: Laravel-AdminLTE
metadata.description: Easy AdminLTE integration with Laravel

summary.zh: Laravel-AdminLTE 是一个简化的 Laravel 与 AdminLTE 集成的工具，适用于 Laravel 7 及以上版本。该包提供了一个可扩展的 Blade 模板和高级菜单配置系统，用户可以快速构建管理面板。此外，它还提供了 AdminLTE 风格的身份验证视图，替代传统的 Laravel/ui 认证框架，极大提高了开发效率。
summary.en: Laravel-AdminLTE is a tool that simplifies the integration of Laravel with AdminLTE for Laravel versions 7 and above. This package offers an extendable Blade template and an advanced menu configuration system, allowing users to quickly build admin panels. Additionally, it provides AdminLTE-styled authentication views as a replacement for the traditional Laravel/ui authentication scaffolding, significantly enhancing development efficiency.

metadata.name: libaddressinput
metadata.description: Google’s postal address library, powering Android and Chromium

summary.zh: libaddressinput 是谷歌开发的邮政地址库，支持 Android 和 Chromium 平台。该库通过使用全球地址元数据，帮助开发者收集和处理邮政地址，提供输入字段的有效性检查和错误提示，确保用户输入的地址格式正确。其 C++ 和 Java 实现分别适用于不同的开发环境，具有良好的可移植性和易用性。
summary.en: libaddressinput is a postal address library developed by Google, supporting both Android and Chromium platforms. It utilizes global address metadata to assist developers in collecting and handling postal addresses, providing validation and error highlighting for input fields to ensure correct address formatting. Its C++ and Java implementations cater to different development environments, offering portability and ease of use.

metadata.name: laravel-province-city-area
metadata.description: 全国「省市区县乡镇街道」数据，来源于【京东】，【内置爬虫】，可自行获取最新数据)

summary.zh: 该项目提供全国省市区县乡镇街道数据，数据来源于京东，确保准确性与完整性。内置爬虫功能，用户可随时获取最新数据。支持地址解析功能，能够自动识别地址中的省市县信息，适用于电商、物流等领域，提升地址处理效率。
summary.en: This project provides nationwide data for provinces, cities, districts, towns, and streets sourced from JD.com, ensuring accuracy and completeness. It features a built-in crawler for users to fetch the latest data at any time. The address parsing function can automatically identify province, city, and district information, making it suitable for e-commerce and logistics, enhancing address processing efficiency.

metadata.name: laravel-pay
metadata.description: 可能是我用过的最优雅的 Alipay/WeChat/Unipay 的 laravel 支付扩展包了

summary.zh: Laravel-Pay 是一个优雅的支付扩展包，支持支付宝、微信、抖音及江苏银行等多种支付方式。它简化了 Laravel 和 Lumen 应用中的支付集成，提供了直观的 API 接口，适用于电商、在线服务等场景。该包依赖 PHP 8.0 及以上版本，具有良好的扩展性和易用性，是开发者实现支付功能的理想选择。
summary.en: Laravel-Pay is an elegant payment extension package that supports multiple payment methods including Alipay, WeChat, Douyin, and Jiangsu Bank. It simplifies payment integration in Laravel and Lumen applications, offering an intuitive API suitable for e-commerce and online services. The package requires PHP 8.0 or higher, providing excellent extensibility and ease of use, making it an ideal choice for developers to implement payment functionalities.

metadata.name: china-divisions
metadata.description: 📍中国行政区划地址库 SDK + 爬虫 + 数据。

summary.zh: 本项目提供了一个中国行政区划地址库的SDK和爬虫工具，数据来源于淘宝菜鸟物流，确保了数据的真实准确性，涵盖港澳台地区。主要应用场景包括省市区选择、地址结构化转换及地址联想等，适合电商和物流系统使用。用户可通过简单的Composer安装和调用API，快速集成到自己的应用中。
summary.en: This project offers an SDK and crawler tool for China's administrative division address database, sourced from Taobao's Cainiao Logistics, ensuring data authenticity and accuracy, including Hong Kong, Macau, and Taiwan. Typical applications include province, city, and district selection, address structuring, and address association, making it suitable for e-commerce and logistics systems. Users can quickly integrate it into their applications with simple Composer installation and API calls.

metadata.name: china_regions
metadata.description: 最全最新中国省，市，地区json及sql数据

summary.zh: china_regions 仓库提供了最新的中国省、市、地区的 JSON 和 SQL 数据，自动从国家统计局抓取并生成。数据涵盖行政区划到居委会级别，支持多种格式，适合开发者在地理信息系统、数据分析等场景中使用。该项目还提供更新机制，确保数据的时效性和准确性。
summary.en: The china_regions repository offers the latest JSON and SQL data for China's provinces, cities, and regions, automatically scraped from the National Bureau of Statistics. It covers administrative divisions down to the community level and supports multiple formats, making it suitable for developers in geographic information systems and data analysis. The project also provides an update mechanism to ensure data timeliness and accuracy.

metadata.name: jadx
metadata.description: Dex to Java decompiler

summary.zh: JADX 是一个强大的工具，能够将 Android Dex 和 Apk 文件反编译为 Java 源代码。它不仅支持从 APK、dex、aar、aab 和 zip 文件中提取 Java 代码，还能解码 AndroidManifest.xml 和其他资源。JADX 提供命令行和图形用户界面（GUI），并包含去混淆功能，适用于需要分析和调试 Android 应用的开发者和安全研究人员。
summary.en: JADX is a powerful tool that decompiles Android Dex and Apk files into Java source code. It supports extracting Java code from APK, dex, aar, aab, and zip files, and can decode AndroidManifest.xml and other resources. With both command-line and GUI options, JADX includes deobfuscation features, making it ideal for developers and security researchers needing to analyze and debug Android applications.

metadata.name: select2
metadata.description: Select2 is a jQuery based replacement for select boxes. It supports searching, remote data sets, and infinite scrolling of results.

summary.zh: Select2 是一个基于 jQuery 的选择框替代方案，支持搜索、远程数据集和结果的无限滚动。它能够增强原生选择框的功能，提供更好的多选界面，支持 AJAX 数据加载、分组和标签功能，适用于处理大型数据集。其兼容多种浏览器，易于集成和定制，适合需要复杂选择功能的应用场景。
summary.en: Select2 is a jQuery-based replacement for select boxes that supports searching, remote datasets, and infinite scrolling of results. It enhances native selects with better multi-select interfaces, AJAX data loading, grouping, and tagging capabilities, making it suitable for handling large datasets. Compatible with various browsers, it is easy to integrate and customize, ideal for applications requiring complex selection functionalities.

metadata.name: payment
metadata.description: Payment是php版本的支付聚合第三方sdk，集成了微信支付、支付宝支付、招商一网通支付。提供统一的调用接口，方便快速接入各种支付、查询、退款、转账能力。服务端接入支付功能，方便、快捷。

summary.zh: Payment是一个基于PHP的支付聚合SDK，集成了主流支付方式如微信支付、支付宝和招商一网通。它提供统一的接口，简化了支付、查询、退款和转账的接入流程，极大提高了开发效率。该项目旨在解决开发者在对接多个支付平台时的复杂性，支持PHP 7.0及以上版本，适合需要快速集成支付功能的应用场景。
summary.en: Payment is a PHP-based payment aggregation SDK that integrates popular payment methods such as WeChat Pay, Alipay, and China Merchants Bank's OneNet. It offers a unified interface to simplify the integration process for payment, query, refund, and transfer functionalities, significantly enhancing development efficiency. This project aims to address the complexity developers face when interfacing with multiple payment platforms, supporting PHP 7.0 and above, making it suitable for applications needing quick payment integration.

metadata.name: wechat-mdeditor
metadata.description: 微信公众号 Markdown 在线编辑器

summary.zh: 这款微信公众平台Markdown在线编辑器能够将Markdown格式的文本转换为符合微信公众号样式的内容，简化了创作过程，用户可以专注于文章内容而非样式调整。它支持多种列表、外链自动转换为参考文献、丰富的字体样式以及独特的代码配色方案，适合需要高效创作的公众号运营者。
summary.en: This WeChat public platform Markdown online editor converts Markdown text into styles suitable for WeChat official accounts, streamlining the creation process so users can focus on content rather than formatting. It supports various lists, automatic conversion of external links to references, a variety of font styles, and unique code color schemes, making it ideal for efficient content creators on WeChat.

metadata.name: laravel-logger
metadata.description: An out the box activity logger for your Laravel or Lumen application. Laravel logger is an activity event logger for your laravel application. It comes out the box with ready to use with dashboard to view your activity. Laravel logger can be added as a middleware or called through a trait. This package is easily configurable and customizable. Supports Laravel 5.3, 5.4, 5.5, 5.6, 5.7, 5.8, 6, and 7+

summary.zh: Laravel Logger 是一个为 Laravel 或 Lumen 应用程序提供的开箱即用的活动日志记录器。它配备了可视化仪表板，支持通过中间件或特性调用，易于配置和定制。该工具兼容 Laravel 5.3 至 9+ 版本，能够记录用户登录、登出及其他活动事件，适合需要监控用户行为的应用场景。
summary.en: Laravel Logger is an out-of-the-box activity logger for Laravel or Lumen applications. It features a visual dashboard and can be integrated as middleware or called via traits, making it highly configurable and customizable. Compatible with Laravel versions 5.3 to 9+, it logs user logins, logouts, and other activity events, ideal for applications needing user behavior monitoring.

metadata.name: laravel-activitylog
metadata.description: Log activity inside your Laravel app

summary.zh: spatie/laravel-activitylog 是一个用于在 Laravel 应用中轻松记录用户活动的包。它支持自动记录模型事件，将所有活动存储在 `activity_log` 表中。开发者可以通过简单的 API 记录和检索活动，支持自定义属性和事件日志，适用于需要用户行为追踪和审计的应用场景。
summary.en: spatie/laravel-activitylog is a package for easily logging user activities within Laravel applications. It supports automatic logging of model events, storing all activities in the `activity_log` table. Developers can log and retrieve activities through a simple API, supporting custom properties and event logging, making it suitable for applications requiring user behavior tracking and auditing.

metadata.name: web_chat
metadata.description: 使用laravel和swoole做一个网页聊天程序

summary.zh: 该项目是一个基于Laravel和Swoole构建的网页聊天程序，支持用户登录、注册、聊天主面板及一对一聊天功能。项目采用纯CSS、HTML和jQuery实现前端，具备聊天机器人、离线消息、表情和图片上传等多项实用功能，适合需要实时通讯的Web应用场景。
summary.en: This project is a web chat application built on Laravel and Swoole, supporting user login, registration, chat main panel, and one-on-one chat features. The frontend is implemented using pure CSS, HTML, and jQuery, featuring practical functionalities like a chat bot, offline messages, emojis, and image uploads, making it suitable for real-time communication in web applications.

metadata.name: layuimini
metadata.description: 后台admin前端模板，基于 layui 编写的最简洁、易用的后台框架模板。只需提供一个接口就直接初始化整个框架，无需复杂操作。

summary.zh: layuimini是一个基于layui的后台管理前端模板，旨在提供简洁易用的开发体验。用户只需提供一个接口即可快速初始化框架，支持多配色方案和多标签页，适配手机端，具备良好的用户体验。该模板适合需要快速构建后台管理系统的开发者。
summary.en: layuimini is a backend admin front-end template based on layui, designed to offer a simple and user-friendly development experience. Users can quickly initialize the framework by providing just one interface, supporting multiple color schemes and tabs, and is mobile-friendly, ensuring a great user experience. This template is ideal for developers looking to quickly build backend management systems.

metadata.name: chat
metadata.description: 基于laravelS和layim的聊天系统

summary.zh: woann-chat是一个基于LaravelS和Layim构建的聊天系统，旨在提供实时通讯功能。该系统支持用户注册、好友查找、群聊创建及消息推送等功能，适合开发者用于学习和交流。项目依赖于PHP和Swoole，结合Laravel框架，具有高性能和可扩展性。尽管当前版本存在一些bug，但仍在持续开发中，欢迎社区参与维护。
summary.en: woann-chat is a chat system built on LaravelS and Layim, designed to provide real-time communication features. It supports user registration, friend search, group chat creation, and message push, making it suitable for developers for learning and communication. The project relies on PHP and Swoole, combined with the Laravel framework, offering high performance and scalability. Although the current version has some bugs, it is under continuous development, and community contributions are welcome.

metadata.name: composer-registry-manager
metadata.description: :hammer_and_wrench: :hammer: Composer registry manager that help to easily switch to the  composer repository you want.

summary.zh: Composer Registry Manager 是一个便捷的工具，帮助用户快速切换不同的 Composer 仓库。它支持列出可用的仓库，并允许用户根据地理位置筛选，极大地方便了开发者在不同环境下的依赖管理。该工具的主要亮点在于其简洁的命令行界面和灵活的配置选项，适合需要频繁更换 Composer 源的开发者使用。
summary.en: Composer Registry Manager is a convenient tool that allows users to quickly switch between different Composer repositories. It supports listing available repositories and filtering by geographical location, greatly facilitating dependency management for developers in various environments. The tool's main highlights include a simple command-line interface and flexible configuration options, making it ideal for developers who frequently change Composer sources.

metadata.name: k8s-for-docker-desktop
metadata.description: 为Docker Desktop for Mac/Windows开启Kubernetes和Istio。

summary.zh: 该项目旨在为Docker Desktop的Mac和Windows用户提供便捷的Kubernetes和Istio启用方法。通过简单的脚本和配置，用户可以轻松设置和管理Kubernetes集群，支持多版本切换，适合开发和测试环境。项目强调了对Docker Desktop使用条款的遵守，并提供了必要的资源配置建议，确保用户能够顺利体验Kubernetes的强大功能。
summary.en: This project aims to provide a convenient method for enabling Kubernetes and Istio for Docker Desktop users on Mac and Windows. With simple scripts and configurations, users can easily set up and manage Kubernetes clusters, supporting multiple version switches, making it suitable for development and testing environments. The project emphasizes compliance with Docker Desktop's usage terms and offers necessary resource configuration recommendations to ensure a smooth experience with Kubernetes's powerful features.

metadata.name: laravel-log-viewer
metadata.description: :dromedary_camel: Laravel log viewer

summary.zh: Laravel Log Viewer 是一个轻量级的日志查看工具，支持 Laravel 6 至 12 及 Lumen。用户只需通过 Composer 安装并设置路由即可使用。该工具无公共资产和供应商路由，适用于有无日志轮换的环境，便于开发者快速查看和分析日志信息，提升调试效率。
summary.en: Laravel Log Viewer is a lightweight log viewing tool that supports Laravel versions 6 to 12 and Lumen. Users can easily install it via Composer and set up routes for immediate use. The tool operates without public assets or vendor routes, making it suitable for environments with or without log rotation, thus enhancing developers' ability to quickly view and analyze log information for efficient debugging.

summary.zh: EasyTDJ 是一个基于 Laravel 的轻量级数据处理工具，旨在简化数据的提取和处理流程。它通过简单的安装和配置，帮助开发者快速集成数据处理功能，适用于需要高效数据管理的应用场景。该工具的核心亮点在于其易用性和与 Laravel 框架的无缝集成。
summary.en: EasyTDJ is a lightweight data processing tool based on Laravel, designed to simplify data extraction and processing workflows. With straightforward installation and configuration, it helps developers quickly integrate data handling capabilities, suitable for applications requiring efficient data management. The core highlight of this tool is its ease of use and seamless integration with the Laravel framework.

metadata.name: nautilus
metadata.description: 阿里百川电商Flutter插件。

summary.zh: Nautilus是阿里百川电商SDK在Flutter上的实现，提供淘宝登录、商品详情查看等功能。该插件简化了与淘宝电商平台的集成，适用于开发者希望在Flutter应用中实现电商功能的场景。其核心技术包括异步初始化、用户授权及商品链接处理，提升了开发效率。
summary.en: Nautilus is the Flutter implementation of Alibaba Baichuan E-commerce SDK, enabling features such as Taobao login and product detail viewing. This plugin simplifies integration with the Taobao e-commerce platform, catering to developers looking to implement e-commerce functionalities in Flutter applications. Key technologies include asynchronous initialization, user authorization, and product link handling, enhancing development efficiency.

metadata.name: WeChatTools
metadata.description: 微信域名检测接口:实时检测域名能否在微信中直接访问的技术;微信小程序状态检测接口;QQ管家域名检测接口;抖音域名检测;域名icp备案信息查询接口

summary.zh: 微信工具集提供多种域名检测接口，包括微信、QQ、抖音等平台的实时访问检测及域名备案信息查询。该工具具有快速稳定的特点，响应时间仅需0.2秒，支持多域名同时查询，适合开发者集成到各类系统中。其核心技术基于官方接口，确保高准确率和实时性，满足用户对域名安全性的需求。
summary.en: WeChat Tools offers various domain detection APIs, including real-time access checks for WeChat, QQ, and Douyin platforms, as well as domain ICP registration information queries. This tool features fast and stable performance with a response time of just 0.2 seconds, supporting multiple domain queries simultaneously, making it suitable for developers to integrate into various systems. Its core technology is based on official APIs, ensuring high accuracy and real-time results to meet users' domain security needs.

metadata.name: tbk
metadata.description: 可能是最优雅、简易的淘宝客SDK

summary.zh: 阿里淘宝客SDK是一个优雅且易于使用的工具，旨在帮助开发者快速接入淘宝客API。它支持多种功能，包括商品查询、链接转换和店铺推荐等，适用于电商推广和营销场景。该SDK的设计简洁，易于集成，适合希望提升淘宝客推广效率的开发者。
summary.en: The Ali Taobao Affiliate SDK is an elegant and easy-to-use tool designed to help developers quickly integrate with the Taobao affiliate API. It supports various functionalities, including product queries, link conversions, and store recommendations, making it suitable for e-commerce promotion and marketing scenarios. The SDK's simple design allows for easy integration, ideal for developers looking to enhance their Taobao affiliate promotion efficiency.

metadata.name: flutter-go
metadata.description: flutter 开发者帮助 APP，包含 flutter 常用 140+ 组件的demo 演示与中文文档

summary.zh: Flutter Go 是一款为 Flutter 开发者提供的学习工具，包含超过 140 个常用组件的示例和中文文档，旨在帮助开发者快速上手 Flutter。该项目整合了丰富的 Widget 使用示例，解决了官方文档示例不足的问题，适合初学者和需要快速查阅的开发者。
summary.en: Flutter Go is a learning tool for Flutter developers, featuring over 140 commonly used components with demos and Chinese documentation, aimed at helping developers quickly get started with Flutter. This project consolidates rich widget usage examples, addressing the lack of comprehensive official documentation, making it suitable for beginners and developers needing quick references.

metadata.name: laravel-easemob
metadata.description: 环信即时通讯laravel包开发，用于环信用户、群、聊天室等功能

summary.zh: laravel-easemob 是一个为 Laravel 框架开发的环信即时通讯包，提供用户、群组和聊天室等功能的集成。该包简化了环信 API 的调用，支持用户注册、消息发送、群组管理等操作，适用于需要即时通讯功能的应用场景，如社交网络、在线客服等。其主要技术亮点在于易于安装和使用，提供丰富的接口，帮助开发者快速构建实时通讯应用。
summary.en: laravel-easemob is a Laravel package developed for integrating Easemob instant messaging features, including user, group, and chatroom management. The package simplifies the interaction with Easemob's API, supporting user registration, message sending, and group management, making it suitable for applications requiring instant messaging, such as social networks and online customer service. Its key technical highlights include easy installation and usage, along with a rich set of interfaces for rapid real-time communication application development.

metadata.name: miniprogram-ecommerce-open-source
metadata.description: 果酱小店小程序端，基于原生小程序开发

summary.zh: 果酱小店小程序是一个开源电子商务解决方案，基于原生小程序开发，具有模块化和易扩展的特点。该项目支持快速定制，适用于国内电商的多种场景。使用Gulp和Webpack进行开发，降低了开发门槛，并提供了详细的系统使用教程和后台管理解决方案，便于开发者上手和扩展。
summary.en: Guojian Mini Program is an open-source e-commerce solution developed with native mini-program technology, featuring modularity and easy extensibility. It supports rapid customization for various domestic e-commerce scenarios. Utilizing Gulp and Webpack for development lowers the entry barrier, and it provides comprehensive system tutorials and backend management solutions, making it easy for developers to get started and extend functionalities.

metadata.name: awesome-php-meetup
metadata.description: 持更【大咖说PHP】大厂或大牛分享的PHP高阶玩法。大厂有如腾讯、新浪、有赞、陌陌、瓜子、阅文集团等，大咖有如鸟哥、韩天峰、胡波、高驰涛等

summary.zh: 该仓库汇集了来自大厂和业界大咖对PHP高阶玩法的分享，涵盖了腾讯、新浪等公司的技术实践，提供了丰富的学习资料和案例分析。内容动态更新，专注于当前PHP开发的实用技术，适合开发者提升技能和了解行业前沿。
summary.en: This repository gathers advanced PHP practices shared by industry leaders and major companies like Tencent and Sina. It offers a wealth of learning materials and case studies, with content dynamically updated to focus on practical technologies relevant to current PHP development, making it suitable for developers looking to enhance their skills and stay updated with industry trends.

metadata.name: laravel-filesystem-cos
metadata.description: Tencent Cloud COS storage for Laravel based on overtrue/flysystem-cos.

summary.zh: 该项目是一个为 Laravel 提供腾讯云 COS 存储支持的扩展包，基于 overtrue/flysystem-cos 构建。它允许开发者轻松集成腾讯云对象存储服务，支持文件的上传、下载、复制和移动等操作，适用于需要高效存储解决方案的 Laravel 应用。项目兼容 Laravel 9 及以上版本，提供了灵活的配置选项，确保用户能够根据需求自定义存储设置。
summary.en: This project is an extension package for Laravel that provides support for Tencent Cloud COS storage, built on overtrue/flysystem-cos. It allows developers to easily integrate Tencent Cloud Object Storage services, supporting operations such as file upload, download, copy, and move, making it suitable for Laravel applications requiring efficient storage solutions. The project is compatible with Laravel 9 and above, offering flexible configuration options to ensure users can customize their storage settings as needed.

metadata.name: ecommerce-open-api
metadata.description: 果酱小店：基于 Laravel + swoole + 小程序的开源电商系统，优雅与性能兼顾  : )

summary.zh: 果酱小店是一个基于 Laravel 和 Swoole 的开源电商系统，专为国内市场设计，支持模块化开发，易于扩展与定制。该系统提供完整的 API 和后端管理，适合 B2C、B2B 等多种电商模式，具备高性能与优雅的用户体验，满足现代移动互联网需求。
summary.en: Guojiang Store is an open-source e-commerce system built on Laravel and Swoole, designed specifically for the domestic market. It supports modular development, making it easy to extend and customize. The system provides a complete API and backend management, suitable for various e-commerce models like B2C and B2B, ensuring high performance and an elegant user experience to meet modern mobile internet demands.

metadata.name: laravel-dotenv-editor
metadata.description: A Laravel package for editing the .env file dynamically.

summary.zh: laravel-dotenv-editor 是一个 Laravel 包，允许用户通过控制器或模型动态编辑 .env 文件。该包提供了基于 VueJS 的图形用户界面，简化了功能实现，包括检查键值、获取和修改环境变量、备份管理等。适用于需要动态配置环境变量的 Laravel 应用，提升了开发效率和灵活性。
summary.en: laravel-dotenv-editor is a Laravel package that allows users to dynamically edit the .env file through controllers or models. It features a VueJS-based graphical user interface that simplifies the implementation of functionalities such as checking keys, retrieving and modifying environment variables, and managing backups. Ideal for Laravel applications requiring dynamic environment configuration, enhancing development efficiency and flexibility.

metadata.name: LogViewer
metadata.description: :page_with_curl: Provides a log viewer for Laravel

summary.zh: LogViewer 是一个为 Laravel 提供的日志查看器，支持 Laravel 5.x 至 11.x。它允许用户轻松管理和跟踪日志文件，具备查看、分页、过滤、下载和删除日志的功能。该工具开箱即用，提供了良好的文档和测试覆盖率，适合处理大规模日志，支持多种语言本地化，适合开发者在项目中集成使用。
summary.en: LogViewer is a log viewer for Laravel, supporting versions 5.x to 11.x. It allows users to easily manage and track log files with features like viewing, pagination, filtering, downloading, and deleting logs. The tool is ready to use out of the box, well-documented, and tested for high code coverage, making it suitable for handling large logs and supporting multiple localizations, ideal for developers to integrate into their projects.

metadata.name: Taobao_Spider
metadata.description: 基于Scrapy的Python3分布式淘宝爬虫

summary.zh: 该项目是一个基于Scrapy的Python3分布式淘宝爬虫，能够通过输入关键字和搜索页数，抓取淘宝商品的标题、链接、价格及评论数量，并将数据存储在MongoDB中。尽管项目已失效且不再更新，但其实现方法和结构仍然对学习分布式爬虫有参考价值，适合对电商数据抓取感兴趣的开发者。
summary.en: This project is a distributed Taobao spider based on Scrapy and Python3, capable of scraping product titles, links, prices, and review counts from Taobao by inputting keywords and search pages, storing the data in MongoDB. Although the project is no longer maintained, its implementation and structure remain valuable for learning about distributed web scraping, particularly for developers interested in e-commerce data extraction.

metadata.name: Spider
metadata.description: 爬虫实例：微博、b站、csdn、淘宝、今日头条、知乎、豆瓣、知乎APP、大众点评

summary.zh: Spider是一个多功能爬虫实例，支持从多个平台（如微博、知乎、淘宝等）提取数据。项目利用Selenium、Scrapy等技术实现模拟登录、数据清洗和存储，具备断点续爬和分布式部署功能。适用于数据分析、市场研究等场景，能够高效获取并处理各类网页信息。
summary.en: Spider is a multifunctional web crawler that extracts data from various platforms such as Weibo, Zhihu, and Taobao. The project employs technologies like Selenium and Scrapy for simulating logins, data cleaning, and storage, featuring breakpoint continuation and distributed deployment. It is suitable for data analysis and market research, efficiently gathering and processing diverse web information.

metadata.name: alimama-webapi
metadata.description: 无需阿里开放平台淘客权限，实现服务端全自动淘客抓取、佣金计划申请、优惠券生成、淘客链接创建等功能

summary.zh: alimama-webapi 是一个无需阿里开放平台淘客权限的服务端自动化工具，支持全自动淘客抓取、佣金计划申请、优惠券生成及淘客链接创建。该项目利用 Python 的 Scrapy 框架进行商品数据采集，并通过模拟登录阿里妈妈实现高佣金计划的申请，适用于希望简化淘客操作的开发者和商家。
summary.en: alimama-webapi is a server-side automation tool that operates without Alibaba Open Platform affiliate permissions, enabling fully automated affiliate data scraping, commission plan applications, coupon generation, and affiliate link creation. The project utilizes Python's Scrapy framework for product data collection and simulates login to AliMama for applying high commission plans, ideal for developers and merchants looking to streamline affiliate operations.

metadata.name: tkspider
metadata.description: 淘宝商品信息爬虫

summary.zh: tkspider 是一个基于 Scrapy 框架的淘宝商品信息爬虫，旨在高效抓取活跃的淘客网站数据。该项目适用于电商数据分析、市场调研及商品监测等场景，提供了自动化的数据抓取解决方案，助力用户获取实时的商品信息。
summary.en: tkspider is a Taobao product information crawler built on the Scrapy framework, designed to efficiently scrape data from active affiliate websites. This project is suitable for e-commerce data analysis, market research, and product monitoring, offering an automated solution for real-time product information retrieval.

metadata.name: php-jwt
metadata.description: PHP package for JWT

summary.zh: Firebase PHP-JWT 是一个简单的 PHP 库，用于编码和解码 JSON Web Tokens (JWT)，符合 RFC 7519 标准。该库支持多种加密算法，易于集成，适用于需要安全身份验证和信息交换的应用场景，如 Web 应用和 API。通过 Composer 安装，提供了示例代码以帮助开发者快速上手。
summary.en: Firebase PHP-JWT is a simple PHP library for encoding and decoding JSON Web Tokens (JWT) in compliance with RFC 7519. The library supports various cryptographic algorithms and is easy to integrate, making it suitable for applications requiring secure authentication and information exchange, such as web applications and APIs. It can be installed via Composer, with example code provided for quick onboarding.

metadata.name: think-api
metadata.description: 帮助 thinkphp 5 开发者快速、轻松的构建Api🎉🎉🎉

summary.zh: think-api 是一款为 thinkphp 5 开发者设计的 API 扩展工具，旨在简化 API 应用的构建过程。它提供了 API 版本管理、响应生成器、数据过滤器及 JWT 支持等功能，帮助开发者快速构建高效的 API 应用。该工具适用于 thinkphp 5.1 及以上版本，极大提升了开发效率。
summary.en: think-api is an API extension tool designed for thinkphp 5 developers, aimed at simplifying the API application building process. It offers features like API version management, response generators, data filters, and JWT support, enabling developers to quickly build efficient API applications. This tool is suitable for thinkphp 5.1 and above, significantly enhancing development efficiency.

metadata.name: jwt-auth
metadata.description: JSON Web Token Authentication for Thinkphp

summary.zh: JWT-AUTH是一个为ThinkPHP框架提供的JSON Web Token身份验证包，支持多种传参方式（如Header、Cookie和Param）。它具备验证、自动刷新等中间件功能，支持多种加密方式（RSA、HASH、DSA），并允许用户自定义密钥和加密算法，适合需要安全认证的Web应用场景。
summary.en: JWT-AUTH is a JSON Web Token authentication package for the ThinkPHP framework, supporting multiple parameter transmission methods (such as Header, Cookie, and Param). It features middleware for validation and automatic token refreshing, supports various encryption methods (RSA, HASH, DSA), and allows users to customize keys and algorithms, making it suitable for secure authentication in web applications.

metadata.name: jetbrains-in-chinese
metadata.description: JetBrains 系列软件汉化包 关键字: Android Studio 3.5 汉化包 CLion 2019.3 汉化包 DataGrip 2019.3 汉化包 GoLand 2019.3 汉化包 IntelliJ IDEA 2019.3 汉化包 PhpStorm 2019.3 汉化包 PyCharm 2019.3 汉化包 Rider 2019.3 汉化包 RubyMine 2019.3 汉化包 WebStorm 2019.3 汉化包

summary.zh: 本项目提供 JetBrains 系列软件的汉化包，涵盖 Android Studio、CLion、DataGrip 等多个版本，旨在为中文用户提供更友好的开发环境。由于汉化包体积较大，特设立独立仓库以便于管理和下载。用户可通过主项目获取更多信息及支持。
summary.en: This project offers Chinese localization packages for JetBrains software, including Android Studio, CLion, DataGrip, and more, aimed at providing a more user-friendly development environment for Chinese users. Due to the large size of the localization packages, a separate repository has been established for easier management and download. Users can find more information and support through the main project.

metadata.name: TranslatorX
metadata.description: JetBrains 系列软件汉化包 关键字: Android Studio 3.5 汉化包 CLion 2019.3 汉化包 DataGrip 2019.3 汉化包 GoLand 2019.3 汉化包 IntelliJ IDEA 2019.3 汉化包 PhpStorm 2019.3 汉化包 PyCharm 2019.3 汉化包 Rider 2019.3 汉化包 RubyMine 2019.3 汉化包 WebStorm 2019.3 汉化包

summary.zh: TranslatorX 是一款针对 JetBrains 系列软件的汉化包，支持多个版本的 IDE，如 Android Studio、IntelliJ IDEA 和 PyCharm。该项目提供了简便的汉化方法，用户只需将汉化包放入软件的 lib 目录并重启即可生效。项目强调汉化质量，避免使用机器翻译，确保翻译的准确性和可用性，适合中文用户提升使用体验。
summary.en: TranslatorX is a localization package for JetBrains IDEs, supporting various versions like Android Studio, IntelliJ IDEA, and PyCharm. The project offers a straightforward method for localization, requiring users to place the package in the software's lib directory and restart for it to take effect. It emphasizes translation quality, avoiding machine translation to ensure accuracy and usability, making it ideal for Chinese users to enhance their experience.

metadata.name: design-patterns-for-humans-cn
metadata.description: 设计模式超简单的解释 - An ultra-simplified explanation to design patterns

summary.zh: 本项目是《设计模式超简单的解释》的中文翻译版，旨在以简单易懂的方式介绍常见的设计模式及其应用。通过对创建型、结构型和行为型设计模式的详细分类，帮助开发者理解如何在实际开发中有效应用这些设计原则，提升代码质量与可维护性。配合相关项目，提供更优质的学习体验。
summary.en: This project is the Chinese translation of 'An ultra-simplified explanation to design patterns', aimed at introducing common design patterns and their applications in an easy-to-understand manner. By categorizing creational, structural, and behavioral design patterns, it helps developers understand how to effectively apply these design principles in real-world development, enhancing code quality and maintainability. It offers a better learning experience when paired with related projects.

metadata.name: Learning_Laravel_Kernel
metadata.description: Laravel核心代码学习

summary.zh: 本项目深入探讨Laravel框架的核心代码，涵盖依赖注入、服务容器、路由、中间件等关键模块。适合具备PHP和Laravel基础的开发者，通过逐步解析源码，帮助读者掌握Laravel的设计思路与实现细节，提升开发技能与最佳实践能力。
summary.en: This project delves into the core code of the Laravel framework, covering key modules such as dependency injection, service container, routing, and middleware. It is suitable for developers with a foundation in PHP and Laravel, guiding readers through source code analysis to master Laravel's design philosophy and implementation details, enhancing development skills and best practices.

metadata.name: thinkphp-permission
metadata.description: 这是一个基于thinkphp5.1开发 的一个RABC权限管理包，支持一键重建节点等功能

summary.zh: thinkphp-permission 是一个基于 ThinkPHP 5.1 开发的 RABC 权限管理包，提供一键重建权限节点、用户与角色管理等功能。该包通过 Composer 安装，支持多种权限生成方式，采用中间件思想进行权限控制，具备良好的可扩展性与易用性，适合需要快速实现权限管理的开发者。
summary.en: thinkphp-permission is an RABC permission management package developed on ThinkPHP 5.1, offering features like one-click permission node regeneration and user-role management. It can be installed via Composer and supports various permission generation methods. Utilizing middleware concepts for access control, it provides excellent extensibility and usability, ideal for developers needing rapid permission management implementation.

metadata.name: php_interviews
metadata.description: PHP 面试题汇总、剑指 Offer PHP 代码实现版本

summary.zh: 该项目汇总了多道 PHP 面试题及其代码实现，旨在帮助开发者提升面试准备。涵盖了从基础知识到高级概念，如数据库优化、SQL 注入防护等，适合希望深入理解 PHP 的程序员。项目不仅提供示例代码，还鼓励社区交流，提升学习效果。
summary.en: This repository compiles various PHP interview questions and their code implementations, aimed at helping developers enhance their interview preparation. It covers topics from basic knowledge to advanced concepts like database optimization and SQL injection prevention, making it suitable for programmers looking to deepen their understanding of PHP. The project not only provides example code but also encourages community interaction to enhance the learning experience.

metadata.name: yii2-easy-wechat
metadata.description: WeChat SDK for Yii2 , 基于 overtrue/wechat 4.x 和 5.x

summary.zh: yii2-easy-wechat 是一个基于 overtrue/wechat 4.x 和 5.x 的 Yii2 框架的微信 SDK 扩展，旨在简化微信功能的集成。该项目解决了原有库不支持新版本的问题，提供了便捷的接口来实现微信网页授权、用户信息获取及支付功能，适用于需要与微信生态系统深度集成的 Yii2 应用。
summary.en: yii2-easy-wechat is a WeChat SDK extension for the Yii2 framework, based on overtrue/wechat 4.x and 5.x, designed to simplify the integration of WeChat functionalities. This project addresses the lack of support for newer versions in the original library, offering convenient interfaces for WeChat web authorization, user information retrieval, and payment functionalities, suitable for Yii2 applications that require deep integration with the WeChat ecosystem.

metadata.name: rageframe2
metadata.description: 一个基于 Yii2 高级框架的快速开发应用引擎

summary.zh: RageFrame 2.0 是一个基于 Yii2 框架的快速开发引擎，旨在简化二次开发过程。其核心特点包括极强的可扩展性、模块化和插件化机制，支持多种业务入口和灵活的权限控制。该框架整合了第三方登录和支付功能，提供 RESTful API，适合构建多端应用，极大提升开发效率。适合有 PHP 和 Yii2 基础的开发者使用。
summary.en: RageFrame 2.0 is a rapid development engine based on the Yii2 framework, designed to simplify the secondary development process. Its core features include strong extensibility, modular and plugin mechanisms, support for multiple business entrances, and flexible permission control. The framework integrates third-party login and payment functionalities, provides RESTful APIs, and is suitable for building multi-end applications, significantly enhancing development efficiency. It is ideal for developers with a background in PHP and Yii2.

metadata.name: yii2-queue
metadata.description: Yii2 Queue Extension. Supports DB, Redis, RabbitMQ, Beanstalk and Gearman

summary.zh: Yii2 Queue扩展支持多种队列后端（如DB、Redis、RabbitMQ等），实现异步任务处理。用户可以轻松定义任务类并将其推送到队列，支持延迟执行和状态追踪，非常适合需要高效任务调度的应用场景。
summary.en: The Yii2 Queue extension supports various queue backends (such as DB, Redis, RabbitMQ, etc.) for asynchronous task processing. Users can easily define job classes and push them to the queue, with support for delayed execution and status tracking, making it ideal for applications requiring efficient task scheduling.

metadata.name: bfe
metadata.description: A modern layer 7 load balancer from baidu

summary.zh: BFE（Beyond Front End）是来自百度的现代化第七层负载均衡器，旨在为用户提供高效的流量管理解决方案。其系统由数据平面和控制平面组成，支持多种协议，包括HTTP、HTTPS和WebSocket等。BFE不仅具备内容路由和负载均衡功能，还提供API管理和图形化界面，适用于云原生架构，特别是在Kubernetes环境中表现优异。
summary.en: BFE (Beyond Front End) is a modern layer 7 load balancer from Baidu, designed to provide efficient traffic management solutions. The system consists of a data plane and a control plane, supporting multiple protocols including HTTP, HTTPS, and WebSocket. BFE offers content-based routing and load balancing capabilities, along with API management and a graphical interface, making it well-suited for cloud-native architectures, particularly in Kubernetes environments.

metadata.name: nps
metadata.description: 一款轻量级、高性能、功能强大的内网穿透代理服务器。支持tcp、udp、socks5、http等几乎所有流量转发，可用来访问内网网站、本地支付接口调试、ssh访问、远程桌面，内网dns解析、内网socks5代理等等……，并带有功能强大的web管理端。a lightweight, high-performance, powerful intranet penetration proxy server, with a powerful web management terminal.

summary.zh: NPS是一款轻量级、高性能的内网穿透代理服务器，支持TCP、UDP、HTTP(S)、SOCKS5等多种协议。它可用于访问内网网站、调试本地支付接口、SSH访问和远程桌面等场景。NPS提供强大的Web管理界面，支持多用户注册、HTTPS集成及多种扩展功能，适用于Linux、Windows和macOS等平台，配置简单，功能强大。
summary.en: NPS is a lightweight, high-performance intranet penetration proxy server that supports various protocols including TCP, UDP, HTTP(S), and SOCKS5. It is suitable for accessing intranet websites, debugging local payment interfaces, SSH access, and remote desktop scenarios. NPS features a powerful web management interface, supports multi-user registration, HTTPS integration, and various extension functions, making it compatible with Linux, Windows, and macOS, with simple configuration and robust capabilities.

metadata.name: ui
metadata.description: Open-source components, blocks, and AI agents designed to speed up your workflow. Import them seamlessly into your favorite tools through Registry and MCPs.

summary.zh: Creative Tim UI 是一个全面的组件库，基于 shadcn/ui 构建，旨在加速现代网页应用的开发。它提供可自定义的 React 组件和模块，用户可以通过 CLI 轻松将这些组件集成到 Next.js 项目中。该库支持 Tailwind CSS，并提供丰富的预构建块，适用于多种应用场景，如账户管理、账单处理和市场营销等。
summary.en: Creative Tim UI is a comprehensive component library built on shadcn/ui, designed to accelerate the development of modern web applications. It offers customizable React components and blocks that can be seamlessly integrated into Next.js projects via a CLI. The library supports Tailwind CSS and provides a rich collection of pre-built blocks suitable for various application scenarios, such as account management, billing, and marketing.

metadata.name: python_autocomplete
metadata.description: A simple neural network for python autocompletion

summary.zh: 该项目实现了一个简单的LSTM神经网络，用于Python代码的自动补全。通过对Python代码进行标记化处理，该模型在大多数文件中节省了超过30%的按键，某些情况下甚至接近50%。尽管当前的效率仍有待提升，但其在代码编辑器中的集成潜力值得关注。项目包含了一个经过训练的模型，用户可通过简单的步骤进行测试和评估。
summary.en: This project implements a simple LSTM neural network for Python code autocompletion. By tokenizing Python code, the model saves over 30% of keystrokes in most files, and nearly 50% in some cases. While the current efficiency needs improvement, its potential for integration into code editors is noteworthy. The repository includes a trained model, allowing users to easily test and evaluate it through straightforward steps.

metadata.name: laravel-graphql
metadata.description: Facebook GraphQL for Laravel 5. It supports Relay, eloquent models, validation and GraphiQL.

summary.zh: 该项目为 Laravel 5 提供 Facebook GraphQL 支持，兼容 Eloquent 模型，具备 Relay 支持、验证及 GraphiQL 功能。尽管该包已不再维护，但其设计理念和实现方式为开发者提供了一个良好的 GraphQL 接入示例，适用于需要构建复杂 API 的 Laravel 应用。推荐使用其他维护中的 Laravel GraphQL 包。
summary.en: This project provides Facebook GraphQL support for Laravel 5, compatible with Eloquent models and features Relay support, validation, and GraphiQL functionality. Although this package is no longer maintained, its design and implementation offer a solid example for developers looking to integrate GraphQL into complex APIs in Laravel applications. It is recommended to use other actively maintained Laravel GraphQL packages.

metadata.name: graphql-laravel
metadata.description: Laravel wrapper for Facebook's GraphQL

summary.zh: 该项目是一个为 Laravel 提供的 GraphQL 集成包，基于 PHP 的 GraphQL 实现。它允许用户创建查询和变更请求端点，支持多种模式和自定义解析器中间件。项目的亮点包括每个操作的授权、动态字段查询、分页支持以及文件上传功能，旨在解决 n+1 问题并提升数据加载效率，非常适合需要复杂数据交互的应用场景。
summary.en: This project is a GraphQL integration package for Laravel, based on the PHP implementation of GraphQL. It allows users to create query and mutation request endpoints, supports multiple schemas, and custom resolver middleware. Key features include per-operation authorization, dynamic field querying, pagination support, and file uploads, aimed at addressing n+1 problems and improving data loading efficiency, making it ideal for applications requiring complex data interactions.

metadata.name: project-readme
metadata.description: Summary of the items in the technical documents .项目中的遇到的技术文档的总结.

summary.zh: 该项目总结了在使用多种技术模块（如Docker、Kubernetes、ElasticSearch等）时遇到的问题和经验教训，旨在提升开发者的能力和知识。每个模块由专人维护，确保文档的准确性和实用性，促进团队协作与学习。通过规范的提交流程，项目鼓励开发者共同贡献，形成良好的技术文档生态。
summary.en: This project summarizes the issues and lessons learned while using various technical modules such as Docker, Kubernetes, and ElasticSearch, aiming to enhance developers' skills and knowledge. Each module is maintained by a dedicated individual to ensure document accuracy and usability, promoting team collaboration and learning. The project encourages contributions through a standardized submission process, fostering a robust technical documentation ecosystem.

metadata.name: ueditor
metadata.description: rich text 富文本编辑器

summary.zh: UEditor是由百度开发的轻量级富文本编辑器，具有高度可定制性和良好的用户体验。该编辑器基于MIT协议开源，适用于需要集成富文本编辑功能的Web应用。尽管存在一些安全隐患，用户仍可通过自定义配置和API灵活使用，满足多样化的需求。
summary.en: UEditor is a lightweight rich text editor developed by Baidu, featuring high customizability and excellent user experience. Open-sourced under the MIT license, it is suitable for web applications requiring rich text editing capabilities. Despite some security vulnerabilities, users can flexibly utilize it through custom configurations and APIs to meet diverse needs.

metadata.name: flutter-in-action
metadata.description: 《Flutter实战》书稿。第二版书稿已上传，请移步新Repo。

summary.zh: 《Flutter实战》是一本专注于Flutter框架的开源电子书，旨在帮助开发者快速掌握Flutter的核心技术与应用场景。第二版草稿已上传，涵盖了最新的Flutter与Dart更新，提供了丰富的源码示例和实用的开发技巧。欢迎开发者参与内容创作与修订，共同提升书籍质量。
summary.en: "Flutter in Action" is an open-source electronic book focused on the Flutter framework, aimed at helping developers quickly master core technologies and application scenarios of Flutter. The second edition draft has been uploaded, covering the latest updates in Flutter and Dart, along with rich source code examples and practical development tips. Developers are encouraged to participate in content creation and revisions to enhance the book's quality.

metadata.name: interview_internal_reference
metadata.description: 2025年最新总结，阿里，腾讯，百度，美团，头条等技术面试题目，以及答案，专家出题人分析汇总。

summary.zh: 该仓库汇集了2025年最新的技术面试题目及答案，涵盖阿里、腾讯、百度等知名企业，提供专家分析和解答。适合求职者准备面试，尤其是技术岗位，内容持续更新，涉及算法、数据库、网络等多个领域，帮助用户系统性提升面试能力。
summary.en: This repository compiles the latest technical interview questions and answers for 2025 from major companies like Alibaba, Tencent, and Baidu, along with expert analyses. It is ideal for job seekers preparing for technical positions, with continuously updated content covering algorithms, databases, and networking, aiding users in systematically enhancing their interview skills.

metadata.name: plugin-python
metadata.description: Prettier Python Plugin

summary.zh: Prettier Python 插件已被弃用，建议使用 Black 进行 Python 代码格式化。该插件曾旨在为 Python 提供 Prettier 风格的代码格式化功能，支持开发者在项目中保持一致的代码风格，提升代码可读性和维护性。尽管该项目不再维护，Prettier 仍然是一个广泛使用的代码格式化工具。
summary.en: The Prettier Python Plugin is deprecated and users are advised to use Black for Python code formatting. This plugin aimed to provide Prettier-style code formatting for Python, helping developers maintain consistent code style and improve readability and maintainability. Although the project is no longer maintained, Prettier remains a widely used code formatting tool.

metadata.name: plugin-php
metadata.description: Prettier PHP Plugin

summary.zh: Prettier PHP 插件为 PHP 语言提供了一种一致的代码格式化工具，旨在通过解析代码并根据预设规则重新打印来实现代码风格的一致性。该插件遵循 PSR/PER 规范进行格式化，但并不完全遵循，适合用于纯 PHP 文件的格式化，混合 PHP 和 HTML 的文件仍在开发中。用户可以通过简单的安装和配置，将其集成到现有的开发环境中。
summary.en: The Prettier PHP Plugin offers a consistent code formatting tool for the PHP language, aiming to enforce style consistency by parsing and re-printing code according to predefined rules. It uses PSR/PER guidelines for formatting but does not fully comply, making it suitable for formatting pure PHP files, while mixed PHP and HTML files are still under development. Users can easily integrate it into their existing development environments with simple installation and configuration.

metadata.name: laravel-admin
metadata.description: Build a full-featured administrative interface in ten minutes

summary.zh: laravel-admin 是一个为 Laravel 框架构建全功能管理界面的工具，能够在十分钟内快速生成 CRUD 后端。该项目通过简单的代码实现复杂的管理功能，适合需要快速开发后台管理系统的开发者。其灵活的配置和丰富的扩展功能，使得用户可以轻松定制和扩展管理界面。
summary.en: laravel-admin is a tool for building full-featured administrative interfaces for Laravel, enabling rapid CRUD backend generation in just ten minutes. It allows developers to implement complex management functionalities with minimal code, making it ideal for those needing to quickly develop backend management systems. Its flexible configuration and rich extension capabilities facilitate easy customization and enhancement of the admin interface.

metadata.name: shortuuid
metadata.description: A generator library for concise, unambiguous and URL-safe UUIDs.

summary.zh: shortuuid 是一个简单的 Python 库，能够生成简洁、明确且安全的 URL UUID。它通过将 UUID 转换为 base57 编码，避免了相似字符的使用，适用于需要在用户界面展示的非顺序 ID。该库支持自定义字母表和长度设置，提供了多种生成方式，包括基于名称的 UUID 和加密随机字符串，适合各种应用场景。
summary.en: shortuuid is a simple Python library that generates concise, unambiguous, and URL-safe UUIDs. It translates UUIDs to base57 encoding, avoiding similar-looking characters, making it suitable for non-sequential IDs displayed to users. The library supports custom alphabets and length settings, offering various generation methods, including name-based UUIDs and cryptographically secure random strings, ideal for diverse application scenarios.

metadata.name: TabNine
metadata.description: AI Code Completions

summary.zh: TabNine 是一个支持多种编程语言的 AI 自动补全工具，其后端系统为闭源。该项目允许用户通过配置文件进行功能请求和修改，支持多种编辑器的客户端集成。核心亮点在于其语言识别和标记化能力，使得跨文件扩展名的智能建议成为可能，提升了开发效率。
summary.en: TabNine is an AI code completion tool that supports multiple programming languages, with a closed-source backend. Users can request features and modify configurations through files, enabling integration with various editor clients. Its key highlight lies in language recognition and tokenization capabilities, allowing intelligent suggestions across file extensions, enhancing developer productivity.

metadata.name: Apollo-11
metadata.description: Original Apollo 11 Guidance Computer (AGC) source code for the command and lunar modules.

summary.zh: Apollo 11 仓库提供了阿波罗 11 号指引计算机（AGC）的原始源代码，涵盖指令模块（Comanche055）和登月模块（Luminary099）。该项目旨在为研究和复原阿波罗任务提供基础，支持开发者提交问题和改进建议。通过数字化的方式，用户可以访问这一历史代码，了解人类航天的技术进步与创新。
summary.en: The Apollo 11 repository contains the original source code for the Apollo Guidance Computer (AGC), specifically for the Command Module (Comanche055) and Lunar Module (Luminary099). This project aims to serve as a foundation for research and restoration of the Apollo missions, welcoming contributions for issues and enhancements. Digitized for accessibility, it allows users to explore the technological advancements and innovations of human spaceflight.

metadata.name: overlord
metadata.description: Overlord是哔哩哔哩基于Go语言编写的memcache和redis&cluster的代理及集群管理功能，致力于提供自动化高可用的缓存服务解决方案。

summary.zh: Overlord是哔哩哔哩基于Go语言开发的高可用缓存服务解决方案，支持memcache和redis的代理及集群管理。其主要组件包括轻量级的缓存代理模块、集群管理平台及数据同步工具，旨在实现自动化的缓存节点管理，提升系统的稳定性与扩展性。该项目已在哔哩哔哩的生产环境中应用，具有良好的实用性和可靠性。
summary.en: Overlord is a high-availability caching service solution developed by Bilibili in Go, supporting proxy and cluster management for memcache and redis. Its main components include a lightweight caching proxy module, a cluster management platform, and data synchronization tools, aimed at automating cache node management to enhance system stability and scalability. This project is already in production use at Bilibili, demonstrating its practicality and reliability.

metadata.name: magnetW
metadata.description: [已失效，不再维护]

summary.zh: magnetW 是一个开源的爬虫技术工具，旨在为用户提供磁力链接的搜索和下载功能。尽管该项目已失效且不再维护，但其设计理念和技术实现仍可为学习爬虫技术的开发者提供参考。项目强调了开源和无广告的原则，适合技术交流和学习使用。
summary.en: magnetW is an open-source web crawler tool designed to provide users with search and download capabilities for magnet links. Although the project is now inactive and no longer maintained, its design principles and technical implementations can still serve as a reference for developers learning web crawling techniques. The project emphasizes open-source and ad-free principles, making it suitable for technical exchange and learning.

metadata.name: avbook
metadata.description: AV 电影管理系统， avmoo , javbus , javlibrary 爬虫，线上 AV 影片图书馆，AV 磁力链接数据库，Japanese Adult Video Library,Adult Video Magnet Links - Japanese Adult Video Database

summary.zh: AVBook 是一个专为成人影片管理设计的系统，集成了 avmoo、javbus 和 javlibrary 的爬虫功能，提供线上 AV 影片图书馆和磁力链接数据库。用户可以方便地管理和访问日本成人影片，支持自定义配置和本地部署，适合成人内容爱好者和开发者使用。
summary.en: AVBook is a management system designed for adult films, integrating crawlers from avmoo, javbus, and javlibrary to provide an online AV film library and magnet link database. Users can easily manage and access Japanese adult videos, supporting custom configurations and local deployment, making it suitable for adult content enthusiasts and developers.

metadata.name: Tars
metadata.description: Tars is a high-performance RPC framework based on name service and Tars protocol, also integrated administration platform, and implemented hosting-service via flexible schedule.

summary.zh: Tars是一个高性能的RPC框架，基于名称服务和Tars协议，集成了管理平台，并通过灵活调度实现托管服务。自2008年起在腾讯使用，支持C++、Java、Node.js和PHP等多种语言，提供高效的开发、维护和测试解决方案，适用于快速开发可靠的微服务分布式应用，广泛应用于数百个业务场景。
summary.en: Tars is a high-performance RPC framework based on name service and Tars protocol, integrated with an administration platform and hosting service via flexible scheduling. Used in Tencent since 2008, it supports multiple languages including C++, Java, Node.js, and PHP, offering efficient solutions for development, maintenance, and testing, suitable for rapidly developing reliable distributed applications based on microservices.

metadata.name: phpjieba
metadata.description: 结巴中文分词之php扩展，适用php5,php7

summary.zh: phpjieba 是一个基于结巴中文分词的 PHP 扩展，支持 PHP5 和 PHP7，旨在为开发者提供高效的中文分词功能。它提供多种分词模式，包括提取、搜索切分和词性标注，适用于文本分析、自然语言处理等场景。通过简单的安装和配置，用户可以快速集成该扩展，提升中文文本处理的效率。
summary.en: phpjieba is a PHP extension based on the Jieba Chinese word segmentation tool, supporting PHP5 and PHP7. It aims to provide developers with efficient Chinese word segmentation capabilities. The library offers various segmentation modes, including extraction, search cutting, and part-of-speech tagging, suitable for text analysis and natural language processing scenarios. With simple installation and configuration, users can quickly integrate this extension to enhance Chinese text processing efficiency.

summary.zh: Shielded_detector 是一款专为检测女友是否取消拉黑而设计的工具，具备简洁的 GUI 界面，用户只需输入女友的备注名即可设置检测。该软件支持多种通知方式，并可在用户不在时自动回复消息，提升互动的趣味性与隐私保护。适合希望掌握社交动态的用户。
summary.en: Shielded_detector is a tool designed to detect whether your girlfriend has unblocked you, featuring a user-friendly GUI. Users simply input their girlfriend's nickname to set up detection. The software supports various notification methods and can automatically reply to messages when the user is unavailable, enhancing interaction and privacy. Ideal for users wanting to keep track of social dynamics.

metadata.name: hongbao
metadata.description: 依据截尾正态分布算法生成指定金额的固定红包与随机红包

summary.zh: 该红包生成器基于截尾正态分布算法，提供固定与随机红包的生成方案，适用于需要分配资金的场景，如活动奖励或节日赠礼。用户可通过简单的配置选项，快速生成所需金额和数量的红包，确保分配的灵活性与公平性。
summary.en: This red envelope generator utilizes the truncated normal distribution algorithm to create fixed and random red envelopes, suitable for scenarios requiring fund distribution, such as event rewards or holiday gifts. Users can quickly generate the desired amount and number of envelopes through simple configuration options, ensuring flexibility and fairness in distribution.

metadata.name: w7-rangine-empty
metadata.description: 软擎是基于 Php 7.2+ 和 Swoole 4.4+ 的高性能、简单易用的开发框架。支持同时在 Swoole Server 和 php-fpm 两种模式下运行。内置了 Http (Swoole, Fpm)，Tcp，WebSocket，Process，Crontab服务。集成了大量成熟的组件，可以用于构建高性能的Web系统、API、中间件、基础服务等等。

summary.zh: 软擎是一个基于 PHP 7.2+ 和 Swoole 4.4+ 的高性能开发框架，支持 Swoole Server 和 php-fpm 两种运行模式。它内置多种服务，如 HTTP、TCP、WebSocket 和 Crontab，适合构建高性能的 Web 系统、API 和中间件。框架集成了丰富的组件，提供了 MVC 设计、数据库连接池、ORM 模型等功能，极大简化了开发流程。
summary.en: W7 Rangine is a high-performance development framework based on PHP 7.2+ and Swoole 4.4+, supporting both Swoole Server and php-fpm modes. It includes various built-in services such as HTTP, TCP, WebSocket, and Crontab, making it suitable for building high-performance web systems, APIs, and middleware. The framework integrates numerous components, offering features like MVC design, database connection pooling, and ORM models, significantly simplifying the development process.

metadata.name: help
metadata.description: 【史上最详细的SS/SSR/v2ray/trojan/clash/Android/iOS节点使用教程】魔法上网/科学上网/正确上网/免费梯子

summary.zh: 该项目提供了详细的SS/SSR/V2ray/Trojan/Clash节点使用教程，旨在帮助用户在iOS和Android等平台上实现科学上网。教程涵盖了多种操作系统的节点订阅方法，适合需要访问国际网络的用户，如学术研究、外贸购物等。项目还提供了苹果商店账号共享和优秀付费节点推荐，极大地方便了用户的网络使用体验。
summary.en: This project offers comprehensive tutorials for using SS/SSR/V2ray/Trojan/Clash nodes, aimed at helping users achieve scientific internet access on platforms like iOS and Android. The tutorials cover node subscription methods for various operating systems, catering to users needing access to international networks for academic research, foreign trade shopping, and more. The project also includes shared Apple Store accounts and recommendations for premium nodes, greatly enhancing the user's online experience.

metadata.name: InformationPush
metadata.description: 小米系统级推送、个人微信模板信息推送，企业微信信息推送、PHP微信信息推送，钉钉机器人信息推送。

summary.zh: 该项目提供了多种信息推送功能，包括小米系统级推送、个人微信模板推送、企业微信推送和钉钉机器人推送。用户可以通过简单的接口实现消息推送，适用于需要实时通知的场景。项目代码简洁易懂，适合开发者快速集成和使用。
summary.en: This project offers various information push functionalities, including Xiaomi system-level push, personal WeChat template push, corporate WeChat push, and DingTalk robot push. Users can achieve message delivery through simple interfaces, suitable for scenarios requiring real-time notifications. The code is concise and easy to understand, making it ideal for developers to integrate and use quickly.

metadata.name: Biny
metadata.description: Biny is a tiny, high-performance PHP framework for web applications

summary.zh: Biny是一个高性能的轻量级PHP框架，遵循MVC模式，旨在快速开发现代Web应用程序。其代码简洁易懂，支持跨库连表、RESTful、表单验证等功能，且具有强大的安全性，能有效防止SQL注入和XSS攻击。Biny的响应时间低于1ms，适合新手和高并发场景，具有极高的性能和易用性。
summary.en: Biny is a high-performance lightweight PHP framework that follows the MVC pattern for rapid development of modern web applications. Its code is simple and easy to understand, supporting features like cross-library joins, RESTful, and form validation, while ensuring strong security against SQL injection and XSS attacks. With response times under 1ms, Biny is suitable for beginners and high-concurrency scenarios, offering exceptional performance and usability.

metadata.name: readme-md-generator
metadata.description: 📄 CLI that generates beautiful README.md files

summary.zh: readme-md-generator 是一个命令行工具，能够自动生成美观的 README.md 文件。它通过读取项目的 package.json 和 git 配置，提供默认答案，简化了文档创建过程。该工具适用于开发者和团队，帮助快速生成标准化的项目文档，提高项目的可读性和专业性。
summary.en: readme-md-generator is a CLI tool that automatically generates beautiful README.md files. It simplifies the documentation creation process by suggesting default answers based on the project's package.json and git configuration. This tool is ideal for developers and teams, helping to quickly create standardized project documentation, enhancing readability and professionalism.

metadata.name: clockwork
metadata.description: Clockwork - php dev tools in your browser - server-side component

summary.zh: Clockwork 是一款为 PHP 开发者提供的浏览器开发工具，能够实时监控应用程序的运行状态，包括请求数据、性能指标、日志条目、数据库查询等。该项目的服务器端组件支持在调试模式下收集和存储应用数据，用户可根据需求配置功能，适用于 HTTP 请求、命令、队列作业和测试等场景，极大提升开发效率与调试体验。
summary.en: Clockwork is a browser-based development tool for PHP developers that provides real-time insights into application runtime, including request data, performance metrics, log entries, and database queries. The server-side component collects and stores application data in debug mode, allowing users to configure features as needed. It is suitable for HTTP requests, commands, queue jobs, and tests, significantly enhancing development efficiency and debugging experience.

metadata.name: hyperf
metadata.description: 🚀 A coroutine framework that focuses on hyperspeed and flexibility. Building microservice or middleware with ease.

summary.zh: Hyperf 是一个高性能且灵活的 PHP 协程框架，专注于微服务和中间件的构建。它通过 Swoole 和 Swow 协程技术，提供了极快的处理能力，支持多种常用组件如 MySQL、Redis 和 WebSocket 等。Hyperf 的设计强调灵活性与可组合性，采用 AOP 和依赖注入，确保组件可插拔，适合构建现代化的分布式应用。
summary.en: Hyperf is a high-performance and flexible PHP coroutine framework designed for building microservices and middleware. Leveraging Swoole and Swow coroutine technologies, it offers exceptional processing speed and supports various common components like MySQL, Redis, and WebSocket. Hyperf emphasizes flexibility and composability, utilizing AOP and dependency injection to ensure components are pluggable, making it suitable for modern distributed applications.

metadata.name: wizard
metadata.description: Wizard是一款开源的文档管理工具，支持Markdown/Swagger/Table类型的文档。

summary.zh: Wizard是一款开源文档管理工具，支持Markdown、Swagger和表格文档类型，旨在提升团队文档协作效率。其核心功能包括文档修改历史管理、用户权限控制、文档搜索和LDAP认证等，适用于技术团队和企业文档管理。通过Docker快速部署，用户可享受自动保存、版本对比等便捷体验，是开发文档管理的理想选择。
summary.en: Wizard is an open-source document management tool that supports Markdown, Swagger, and table document types, aimed at enhancing team collaboration on documentation. Key features include document version history management, user permission control, document search, and LDAP authentication, making it suitable for tech teams and enterprise documentation management. Quick deployment via Docker allows users to enjoy features like auto-saving and version comparison, making it an ideal choice for managing development documentation.

metadata.name: The-Art-Of-Programming-By-July-2nd
metadata.description: 本项目曾冲到全球第一，干货集锦见本页面最底部，另完整精致的纸质版《编程之法：面试和算法心得》已在京东/当当上销售
