summary.zh: 本项目是《编程之法：面试和算法心得》的基础，汇集了微软面试100题的精华，涵盖了编程艺术的核心问题与解法。项目提供了详细的代码示例与优化建议，适合希望提升编程能力和面试技巧的开发者。更新版将加入新题和机器学习技术，助力读者掌握最新的编程趋势。
summary.en: This project serves as the foundation for 'The Art of Programming: Interview and Algorithm Insights', compiling the essence of 100 Microsoft interview questions. It covers core programming issues and solutions, providing detailed code examples and optimization suggestions, ideal for developers looking to enhance their programming skills and interview techniques. The updated version will include new questions and machine learning technologies, helping readers grasp the latest programming trends.

metadata.name: PHP-DouyinRobot
metadata.description: PHP抖音机器人 抖音自动找好看的小姐姐😍,自动点赞+关注

summary.zh: PHP抖音机器人自动寻找并点赞关注好看的小姐姐，利用人脸识别技术检测颜值、年龄和性别，提供便捷的社交互动体验。适合抖音用户和开发者，具备简单的安装步骤和自定义安卓脚本功能，提升用户在社交平台的参与度。
summary.en: The PHP Douyin Robot automatically finds and likes attractive users on Douyin, utilizing facial recognition technology to assess beauty, age, and gender. It offers a convenient social interaction experience, suitable for Douyin users and developers, with straightforward installation steps and customizable Android script capabilities to enhance user engagement on social platforms.

metadata.name: architect-awesome
metadata.description: 后端架构师技术图谱

summary.zh: 《后端架构师技术图谱》是一个全面的学习资源，旨在帮助从初级开发者到资深架构师掌握后端架构的核心知识。该项目涵盖数据结构、常用算法及架构设计等多个方面，提供了丰富的学习材料和参考书籍，适用于希望提升技术能力的开发者和架构师。
summary.en: The 'Backend Architect Technical Map' is a comprehensive learning resource designed to help developers from junior to senior architect levels master core backend architecture knowledge. This project covers various aspects including data structures, common algorithms, and architectural design, providing a wealth of learning materials and reference books suitable for developers and architects looking to enhance their technical skills.

metadata.name: shell-script-collection
metadata.description: shell小框架，地址：http://www.linkops.cn/363.htm

summary.zh: ssc是一个用于服务部署的Shell框架，提供丰富的函数和示例，支持一键安装LNMP、Redis集群等服务。它具有中英文双语支持，能够自定义安装目录，并与Ansible等工具兼容，适用于生产环境。框架具备错误检测机制，允许在出错后继续执行，确保操作的安全性与灵活性。
summary.en: ssc is a Shell framework designed for service deployment, offering a wealth of functions and examples for one-click installation of LNMP, Redis clusters, and more. It supports bilingual usage (Chinese and English), allows custom installation directories, and is compatible with tools like Ansible, making it suitable for production environments. The framework features error detection, enabling continued execution after resolving issues, ensuring operational safety and flexibility.

metadata.name: esd-server
metadata.description: ⚡️ EasySwoole Distributed

summary.zh: EasySwoole Distributed（ESD）是一个高性能的PHP协程框架，专注于简化分布式和微服务架构的开发。它提供强大的插件管理系统，支持多种插件的灵活组合，极大地增强了框架的功能性。同时，框架内置注解和面向切片编程（AOP）支持，方便开发者快速实现复杂的业务逻辑。适合需要高扩展性和高性能的现代Web应用。
summary.en: EasySwoole Distributed (ESD) is a high-performance PHP coroutine framework designed to simplify the development of distributed and microservice architectures. It features a powerful plugin management system that allows flexible combinations of various plugins, significantly enhancing the framework's functionality. Additionally, it supports annotations and Aspect-Oriented Programming (AOP), enabling developers to quickly implement complex business logic. Ideal for modern web applications requiring high scalability and performance.

metadata.name: Parser-PHP
metadata.description: Browser sniffing gone too far — A useragent parser library for PHP

summary.zh: WhichBrowser/Parser-PHP 是一个用于 PHP 的用户代理解析库，尽管其复杂性使其在浏览器嗅探中几乎无用，但在特定场景下仍可用于改善用户体验或收集浏览器使用情况数据。该库支持 PHP 7.0 及以上版本，提供详细的浏览器、渲染引擎、操作系统和设备信息，适合需要精确识别用户环境的开发者。
summary.en: WhichBrowser/Parser-PHP is a user agent parsing library for PHP. Despite its complexity making it nearly useless for browser sniffing, it can be beneficial in specific scenarios to enhance user experience or gather browser usage data. The library supports PHP 7.0 and above, providing detailed information about browsers, rendering engines, operating systems, and devices, making it suitable for developers needing precise user environment identification.

metadata.name: Guzzle-Swoole
metadata.description: 让基于 Guzzle 的项目完美无缝兼容 Swoole 协程，支持：Guzzle、Elasticsearch client——来自宇润 PHP 全家桶

summary.zh: Guzzle-Swoole 是一款让 Guzzle 在 Swoole 协程环境中无缝运行的工具，支持 Guzzle 的多个版本及 Composer 的不同版本。该库无需修改任何第三方包代码，便可实现协程化，适用于 ElasticSearch 和 AWS 等 SDK，兼容所有 Swoole 框架，极大地提升了基于 Guzzle 的项目的性能和灵活性。
summary.en: Guzzle-Swoole is a tool that enables seamless operation of Guzzle in Swoole coroutine environments, supporting multiple versions of Guzzle and different versions of Composer. This library allows coroutine support without modifying any third-party package code, making it suitable for SDKs like ElasticSearch and AWS, and is compatible with all Swoole frameworks, significantly enhancing the performance and flexibility of Guzzle-based projects.

metadata.name: dubbo-php-framework
metadata.description: php for Apache Dubbo

summary.zh: dubbo-php-framework 是一个为 PHP 语言设计的 RPC 通信框架，完全兼容 Dubbo 协议，支持同时作为服务提供者和消费者。该框架利用 Zookeeper 进行服务注册与发现，采用 fastjson 和 hessian 进行序列化，适用于需要高效服务调用的分布式系统。
summary.en: dubbo-php-framework is an RPC communication framework for PHP, fully compatible with the Dubbo protocol, functioning as both a provider and consumer. It utilizes Zookeeper for service registration and discovery, and employs fastjson and hessian for serialization, making it ideal for distributed systems requiring efficient service invocation.

metadata.name: ex-baiduyunpan
metadata.description: 百度云盘、百度云盘企业版解除大文件限制，批量复制链接

summary.zh: EX-百度云盘是一个用于解除百度云盘和企业版大文件下载限制的脚本，支持批量复制下载链接、文件夹下载及多文件下载。该工具专为Chrome和Safari浏览器的TamperMonkey扩展设计，简化了用户在下载大文件时的操作，提升了使用体验。
summary.en: EX-BaiduYunPan is a script designed to remove download limits for large files on Baidu Cloud and its enterprise version. It supports batch copying of download links, folder downloads, and multiple file downloads. This tool is specifically designed for the TamperMonkey extension in Chrome and Safari browsers, simplifying user operations when downloading large files and enhancing the overall experience.

metadata.name: phpinsights
metadata.description: 🔰 Instant PHP quality checks from your console

summary.zh: PHP Insights 是一款旨在简化 PHP 代码质量分析的工具，用户可以通过终端快速进行代码质量和编码风格检查。它支持多种框架，如 Laravel、Symfony 和 Magento，提供清晰的代码架构和复杂度概览，帮助开发者编写可靠、简洁的代码。
summary.en: PHP Insights is a tool designed to simplify the analysis of PHP code quality directly from the terminal. It allows users to quickly check code quality and coding style, supporting frameworks like Laravel, Symfony, and Magento. The tool provides a clear overview of code architecture and complexity, helping developers write reliable and clean code.

metadata.name: composer-mirror
metadata.description: Composer 全量镜像发布于2017年3月，曾不间断运行2年多。这个开源有助于理解 Composer 镜像的工作原理

summary.zh: Composer 镜像项目提供了一个完整的解决方案，帮助用户理解和部署 Composer 镜像。该项目自2017年发布以来，持续运行超过两年，支持 Laravel China 社区的需求。通过简单的配置和命令，用户可以轻松搭建自己的 Composer 镜像，优化包管理和下载速度，适用于开发者和团队在国内环境下的使用。
summary.en: The Composer mirror project offers a comprehensive solution for understanding and deploying Composer mirrors. Launched in 2017, it ran continuously for over two years, supporting the needs of the Laravel China community. With straightforward configuration and commands, users can easily set up their own Composer mirror, optimizing package management and download speeds, suitable for developers and teams in domestic environments.

metadata.name: cgr
metadata.description: Safe replacement for `composer global require`

summary.zh: Consolidation\Cgr 提供了一个安全的替代方案，用于 `composer global require` 命令。该工具通过在独立目录中安装 PHP 命令行工具，避免了不同项目间的依赖冲突，确保了更高的安装成功率。Cgr 适合需要全局安装命令行工具的 PHP 开发者，且支持设置项目的最小稳定性，增强了灵活性和可控性。
summary.en: Consolidation\Cgr offers a safer alternative to the `composer global require` command. By installing PHP command-line tools in isolated directories, it prevents dependency conflicts between different projects, ensuring higher installation success rates. Cgr is ideal for PHP developers needing to install command-line tools globally and supports setting minimum stability for projects, enhancing flexibility and control.

metadata.name: laravel-sendgrid-driver
metadata.description: This library can add sendgrid driver into the laravel's mail configure.

summary.zh: Laravel SendGrid Driver 是一个为 Laravel 邮件配置添加 SendGrid 驱动的库，支持 SendGrid Web API。它扩展了原有的 Laravel 类，允许用户使用相同的方法发送邮件。通过简单的配置，开发者可以轻松集成 SendGrid 的邮件发送功能，适用于 Laravel 和 Lumen 框架，特别适合需要高效邮件发送的应用场景。
summary.en: The Laravel SendGrid Driver is a library that adds a SendGrid driver to Laravel's mail configuration, supporting the SendGrid Web API. It extends the original Laravel classes, allowing users to send emails using the same methods. With simple configuration, developers can easily integrate SendGrid's email sending capabilities, making it ideal for applications requiring efficient email delivery, compatible with both Laravel and Lumen frameworks.

metadata.name: swoft
metadata.description: 🚀 PHP Microservice Full Coroutine Framework

summary.zh: Swoft 是一个基于 Swoole 扩展的 PHP 微服务协程框架，提供内置的高性能网络服务器，支持 HTTP、WebSocket、RPC 和 TCP。它具备灵活的组件化、强大的 AOP、依赖注入和服务治理功能，适合构建高性能微服务应用。Swoft 通过简洁的注解和标准 PSR 实现，成为 PHP 领域的 Spring Cloud 解决方案。
summary.en: Swoft is a PHP microservice coroutine framework based on the Swoole extension, featuring a built-in high-performance network server that supports HTTP, WebSocket, RPC, and TCP. It offers flexible componentization, powerful AOP, dependency injection, and service governance, making it ideal for high-performance microservice applications. With concise annotations and standard PSR implementations, Swoft serves as the Spring Cloud solution in the PHP ecosystem.

metadata.name: deployer
metadata.description: The PHP deployment tool with support for popular frameworks out of the box

summary.zh: Deployer 是一款 PHP 部署工具，支持主流框架的开箱即用部署。其核心价值在于提供自动服务器配置和零停机时间的部署体验，适合需要高效部署的开发团队。该工具还提供了针对大多数框架的现成配方，简化了部署流程。
summary.en: Deployer is a PHP deployment tool that offers out-of-the-box support for popular frameworks. Its core value lies in providing automatic server provisioning and zero downtime deployments, making it ideal for development teams seeking efficient deployment solutions. The tool also includes ready-to-use recipes for most frameworks, streamlining the deployment process.

metadata.name: laravel-server-script
metadata.description: Laravel Server Script

summary.zh: 该项目提供了一系列实用的 Laravel 服务器脚本和配置，旨在简化新服务器的设置过程。用户可以直接使用这些脚本，快速部署和配置 Laravel 应用，提升开发效率，适合开发者和运维人员。
summary.en: This project offers a collection of useful Laravel server scripts and configurations designed to simplify the setup process for new servers. Users can directly utilize these scripts for quick deployment and configuration of Laravel applications, enhancing development efficiency, suitable for developers and operations personnel.

metadata.name: wxrobot
metadata.description: 基于python的微信机器人

summary.zh: wxrobot是一个基于Python的微信机器人，提供丰富的好友和群聊管理功能，包括自动通过好友申请、机器人聊天、群聊监控等。支持管理员远程控制，能够灵活配置机器人行为，适用于需要自动化管理微信社交的场景，提升沟通效率。
summary.en: wxrobot is a Python-based WeChat bot that offers rich features for friend and group chat management, including automatic friend requests, bot chatting, and group monitoring. It supports remote control by administrators, allowing flexible configuration of bot behavior, making it suitable for automating WeChat social management and enhancing communication efficiency.

metadata.name: WechatAuthorization
metadata.description: 基于微信小程序登录授权机制延伸第三方平台使用

summary.zh: 该项目基于Laravel和Swoole实现了微信小程序的登录授权机制，支持第三方平台的接入。通过WebSocket技术，用户扫描小程序码后可实现高效的登录反馈，避免了传统的AJAX轮询方式，显著提高了性能。项目依赖于PHP、Redis等技术，适用于需要集成微信登录的应用场景。
summary.en: This project implements the WeChat Mini Program login authorization mechanism based on Laravel and Swoole, enabling third-party platform integration. By utilizing WebSocket technology, users can efficiently receive login feedback after scanning the mini program code, avoiding traditional AJAX polling and significantly enhancing performance. The project relies on PHP, Redis, and is suitable for applications needing WeChat login integration.

metadata.name: alipayTool
metadata.description: 支付宝小程序登录授权『Laravel扩展』

summary.zh: 该项目是一个为Laravel框架开发的支付宝小程序扩展包，旨在简化支付宝小程序的登录授权流程。通过提供对支付宝OAuth接口的封装，开发者可以轻松获取用户授权信息，支持的功能包括换取访问令牌和查询用户信息。此扩展包解决了支付宝官方SDK缺乏Composer支持的问题，适合需要集成支付宝小程序的Laravel开发者。
summary.en: This project is an Alipay Mini Program extension package for the Laravel framework, designed to simplify the login authorization process for Alipay Mini Programs. By providing a wrapper for the Alipay OAuth interfaces, developers can easily obtain user authorization information, supporting functions like token exchange and user info retrieval. This extension addresses the lack of Composer support in the official Alipay SDK, making it suitable for Laravel developers integrating Alipay Mini Programs.

metadata.name: amis
metadata.description: 前端低代码框架，通过 JSON 配置就能生成各种页面。

summary.zh: amis是一个前端低代码框架，通过JSON配置快速生成各种后台页面，显著降低开发成本，适合不具备前端开发经验的用户。其可视化编辑器和丰富的文档支持，使得用户能够轻松上手，快速构建应用。该框架采用TypeScript开发，支持模块化和高效的测试机制，适合企业级应用开发。
summary.en: amis is a front-end low-code framework that allows users to quickly generate various backend pages through JSON configuration, significantly reducing development costs and catering to users without front-end development experience. Its visual editor and comprehensive documentation facilitate easy onboarding and rapid application building. Developed in TypeScript, the framework supports modularity and efficient testing mechanisms, making it suitable for enterprise-level application development.

metadata.name: hacker-laws-zh
metadata.description: 💻📖对开发人员有用的定律、理论、原则和模式。(Laws, Theories, Principles and Patterns that developers will find useful.)

summary.zh: 该项目是对开发人员有用的定律、理论、原则和模式的中文翻译，涵盖了多种经典概念，如阿姆达尔定律、摩尔定律和KISS原则等。通过提供中英文对照，帮助开发者更好地理解和应用这些理论，提升软件开发效率和质量，适合各类开发者和技术团队参考。
summary.en: This project is a Chinese translation of useful laws, theories, principles, and patterns for developers, covering various classic concepts such as Amdahl's Law, Moore's Law, and the KISS principle. By providing bilingual references, it aids developers in better understanding and applying these theories, enhancing software development efficiency and quality, suitable for all types of developers and tech teams.

metadata.name: vote
metadata.description: 班级实时投票系统

summary.zh: 该班级实时投票系统基于thinkPHP3.2.3构建，旨在为学校管理学院提供便捷的投票解决方案。系统通过微信openid限制每位用户仅能投票一次，确保投票的公正性。主要功能包括手机投票页面、实时数据展示及后台管理界面，支持验证码、实时刷新和数据监控，提升了投票的互动性和管理效率。
summary.en: This real-time voting system for classes is built on thinkPHP3.2.3, aimed at providing a convenient voting solution for the School of Management. The system restricts each user to one vote via WeChat openid, ensuring fairness. Key features include a mobile voting page, real-time data display, and an admin interface, supporting captcha, real-time updates, and data monitoring, enhancing interactivity and management efficiency.

metadata.name: html-parser
metadata.description: php html parser，类似与PHP Simple HTML DOM Parser，但是比它快好几倍

summary.zh: HtmlParser 是一款高效的 PHP HTML 解析工具，基于 PHP 的 DOM 模块，解析速度比 PHP Simple HTML DOM Parser 快数倍。它支持 UTF-8 编码的 HTML 文档，提供了丰富的选择器功能，允许用户轻松查找和操作 DOM 元素，适用于网页数据提取和内容处理等场景。
summary.en: HtmlParser is an efficient PHP HTML parsing tool based on the PHP DOM module, offering parsing speeds several times faster than PHP Simple HTML DOM Parser. It supports UTF-8 encoded HTML documents and provides rich selector functionalities, allowing users to easily find and manipulate DOM elements, making it suitable for web data extraction and content processing.

metadata.name: geohash
metadata.description: php geohash extension

summary.zh: 该 PHP geohash 扩展提供了地理编码和解码功能，能够将经纬度转换为 geohash 字符串，并支持获取相邻地理位置的 geohash 值。其主要应用于地理信息系统（GIS）和位置服务，允许开发者高效处理地理数据。扩展简单易用，支持自定义精度，适合需要地理位置处理的 PHP 项目。
summary.en: This PHP geohash extension provides geocoding and decoding functionalities, converting latitude and longitude into geohash strings while supporting retrieval of neighboring geohash values. Its primary applications are in Geographic Information Systems (GIS) and location services, enabling developers to efficiently handle geographic data. The extension is user-friendly and allows for customizable precision, making it suitable for PHP projects requiring geographic data processing.

metadata.name: flysystem-upyun
metadata.description: Laravel 又拍云文件存储，上传，删除。

summary.zh: Laravel Flysystem Upyun 是一个专为 Laravel 项目设计的文件存储解决方案，支持又拍云的文件上传、删除等操作。通过简单的配置，开发者可以轻松集成并使用 Flysystem 的强大功能，适用于需要云存储的应用场景，提升了文件管理的灵活性和效率。
summary.en: Laravel Flysystem Upyun is a file storage solution designed specifically for Laravel projects, supporting file upload, deletion, and other operations with Upyun. With simple configuration, developers can easily integrate and utilize the powerful features of Flysystem, making it suitable for applications requiring cloud storage, enhancing flexibility and efficiency in file management.

metadata.name: laravel-filesystem-oss
metadata.description: :floppy_disk: Oss storage filesystem for Laravel.

summary.zh: laravel-filesystem-oss 是一个为 Laravel 提供的阿里云 OSS 存储文件系统扩展包，支持 Laravel 9 及以上版本。它基于 flysystem-oss，简化了与阿里云 OSS 的集成，允许开发者轻松上传、下载和管理文件。该扩展包的核心亮点在于其灵活的配置选项和对多种存储桶的支持，适用于需要高效文件存储解决方案的 Laravel 应用。
summary.en: laravel-filesystem-oss is an extension package for Laravel that provides Aliyun OSS storage filesystem support, compatible with Laravel 9 and above. Based on flysystem-oss, it simplifies integration with Aliyun OSS, allowing developers to easily upload, download, and manage files. The core highlights of this package include flexible configuration options and support for multiple storage buckets, making it suitable for Laravel applications requiring efficient file storage solutions.

metadata.name: blur-admin
metadata.description: AngularJS Bootstrap Admin Panel Framework

summary.zh: BlurAdmin 是一个基于 AngularJS 的可定制管理面板框架，专为开发现代化的管理界面而设计。它支持响应式布局，集成了 Bootstrap、Sass 和 Gulp，提供丰富的图表和地图组件，适用于各种后台管理系统。该框架的灵活性和高分辨率设计使其成为构建用户友好管理界面的理想选择。
summary.en: BlurAdmin is a customizable admin panel framework built on AngularJS, designed for developing modern management interfaces. It supports responsive layouts, integrates Bootstrap, Sass, and Gulp, and offers a rich set of chart and map components, making it suitable for various backend management systems. Its flexibility and high-resolution design make it an ideal choice for creating user-friendly admin interfaces.

metadata.name: easywechat
metadata.description: 📦 一个 PHP 微信 SDK

summary.zh: EasyWeChat 是一个功能强大的 PHP 微信开发 SDK，旨在简化与微信平台的集成。它支持公众号、小程序等多种应用场景，提供了丰富的 API 接口，帮助开发者快速构建高效的微信应用。该项目由微擎团队维护，具备良好的文档和社区支持，是开发者实现微信功能的理想选择。
summary.en: EasyWeChat is a powerful PHP SDK for WeChat development, designed to simplify integration with the WeChat platform. It supports various application scenarios such as official accounts and mini-programs, offering a rich set of API interfaces to help developers quickly build efficient WeChat applications. Maintained by the WeChat team, it features excellent documentation and community support, making it an ideal choice for developers looking to implement WeChat functionalities.

metadata.name: gentelella
metadata.description: Free Bootstrap 5 Admin Dashboard Template

summary.zh: Gentelella 是一个现代化的免费 Bootstrap 5 管理仪表板模板，采用 Vite 构建系统，具备出色的性能优化和最新的网页技术。该模板为构建管理面板、仪表板和后端应用程序提供了全面的基础，支持响应式设计和 TypeScript，适合开发者快速搭建高效的管理界面。
summary.en: Gentelella is a modern free Bootstrap 5 admin dashboard template featuring a Vite build system, offering excellent performance optimizations and the latest web technologies. This template provides a comprehensive foundation for building admin panels, dashboards, and backend applications, supporting responsive design and TypeScript, making it ideal for developers to quickly create efficient management interfaces.

metadata.name: ngx-admin
metadata.description: Customizable admin dashboard template based on Angular 10+

summary.zh: ngx-admin 是一个基于 Angular 10+ 的可定制管理仪表板模板，广泛应用于企业级项目。它提供超过 40 个 Angular 组件和 60 个使用示例，支持响应式布局和多种主题配置。该模板兼容 Angular Material 和 Nebular，适合开发者快速启动项目，节省开发成本。当前项目处于维护状态，主要关注 Angular 版本的更新。
summary.en: ngx-admin is a customizable admin dashboard template based on Angular 10+, widely used in enterprise-level projects. It offers over 40 Angular components and 60 usage examples, supporting responsive layouts and various theme configurations. The template is compatible with Angular Material and Nebular, making it suitable for developers to kickstart projects and save costs. The project is currently in a maintenance state, focusing primarily on updating the Angular version.

metadata.name: tabler
metadata.description: Tabler is free and open-source HTML Dashboard UI Kit built on Bootstrap

summary.zh: Tabler 是一个免费的开源 HTML 仪表板 UI 套件，基于 Bootstrap 构建，旨在提供响应式和高质量的用户界面。它适用于创建各种类型的管理面板，支持移动、平板和桌面设备，满足不同用户的需求。项目特别注重组件的可定制性和用户友好性，适合有基本 HTML 和 CSS 知识的开发者使用。
summary.en: Tabler is a free and open-source HTML Dashboard UI Kit built on Bootstrap, designed to provide a responsive and high-quality user interface. It is suitable for creating various types of admin panels, supporting mobile, tablet, and desktop devices to meet diverse user needs. The project emphasizes component customizability and user-friendliness, making it ideal for developers with basic HTML and CSS knowledge.

metadata.name: SmartWiki
metadata.description: 因个人精力有限，不在维护此项目，推荐用MinDoc代替

summary.zh: SmartWiki是一款专为IT团队设计的文档管理系统，支持接口文档、数据库字典等文档的存储与管理。具备项目管理、用户管理和权限管理等功能，满足中小团队的需求。虽然作者不再维护该项目，但其简单易用的特性和Docker部署选项使其仍具备一定的应用价值。
summary.en: SmartWiki is a document management system designed for IT teams, allowing storage and management of API documentation, database dictionaries, and more. It features project management, user management, and permission management, catering to the needs of small to medium teams. Although the author no longer maintains the project, its simplicity and Docker deployment options still provide value.

metadata.name: mindoc
metadata.description: Golang实现的基于beego框架的接口在线文档管理系统

summary.zh: MinDoc 是一款基于 Golang 和 Beego 框架的文档管理系统，专为 IT 团队设计，提供简单易用的接口文档管理和分享功能。它支持项目管理、用户管理和权限管理，适合中小型团队使用。MinDoc 的前身是 SmartWiki，因 PHP 部署复杂而转为 Golang 开发，便于用户部署和使用。
summary.en: MinDoc is a documentation management system built on Golang and the Beego framework, designed for IT teams to easily manage and share API documentation. It supports project management, user management, and permission management, making it suitable for small to medium-sized teams. MinDoc evolved from SmartWiki, transitioning from PHP to Golang for easier deployment and usability.

metadata.name: open_kf_v1
metadata.description: php 开源客服系统

summary.zh: 本项目是一个基于PHP的开源客服系统，旨在为企业提供高效的在线客服解决方案。虽然当前版本不再维护，但用户可以根据需求使用。系统依赖于Nginx、MySQL和YII2框架，支持WebSocket通信，适合需要实时客户支持的场景。未来将推出更好的版本，敬请期待。
summary.en: This project is an open-source customer service system based on PHP, designed to provide efficient online support solutions for businesses. Although the current version is no longer maintained, users can utilize it based on their needs. The system relies on Nginx, MySQL, and the YII2 framework, supporting WebSocket communication, making it suitable for scenarios requiring real-time customer support. A better version is expected in the future.

metadata.name: docker-images
metadata.description: 本仓库为自定义及收藏的一些镜像，方便使用。包含PHP5、PHP7开发环境等镜像。

summary.zh: 本仓库提供了一系列自定义的Docker镜像，主要包括PHP5和PHP7开发环境，旨在简化开发者的工作流程。通过这些镜像，用户能够快速搭建和管理PHP环境，提升开发效率。该项目还包含常用的Docker命令和学习资源，适合需要快速部署PHP应用的开发者。
summary.en: This repository offers a collection of custom Docker images, primarily featuring PHP5 and PHP7 development environments, aimed at simplifying developers' workflows. With these images, users can quickly set up and manage PHP environments, enhancing development efficiency. The project also includes common Docker commands and learning resources, making it suitable for developers needing to rapidly deploy PHP applications.

metadata.name: laravel-cors
metadata.description: Send CORS headers in a Laravel application

summary.zh: 该项目为 Laravel 和 Lumen 应用提供 CORS 头支持，便于跨域请求的处理。虽然 Laravel 7 及以上版本已原生支持 CORS，但对于使用 Laravel 6 及以下版本的开发者，该包仍然是一个有效的解决方案。其配置灵活，支持预检请求，适合需要跨域资源共享的应用场景。
summary.en: This package provides CORS header support for Laravel and Lumen applications, facilitating cross-origin request handling. While Laravel 7 and above have native CORS support, this package remains a viable solution for developers using Laravel 6 or below. Its flexible configuration supports preflight requests, making it suitable for applications requiring cross-origin resource sharing.

metadata.name: laravel-cors
metadata.description: Adds CORS (Cross-Origin Resource Sharing) headers support in your Laravel application

summary.zh: fruitcake/laravel-cors 是一个为 Laravel 应用程序提供 CORS（跨域资源共享）支持的中间件。它允许开发者通过配置中间件来添加 CORS 头，处理预检请求，并针对特定路由启用或禁用 CORS。虽然该包在 Laravel 9 及以上版本中已被弃用，但仍适用于较旧版本的 Laravel，方便开发者在处理跨域请求时提供灵活的解决方案。
summary.en: fruitcake/laravel-cors is a middleware that adds CORS (Cross-Origin Resource Sharing) support to Laravel applications. It allows developers to configure middleware to add CORS headers, handle pre-flight requests, and enable or disable CORS for specific routes. Although this package is deprecated in Laravel 9 and above, it remains useful for older versions, providing a flexible solution for handling cross-origin requests.

metadata.name: laravel-sluggable
metadata.description: 根据Eloquent模型轻松创建 - slug Easy create slug for your Eloquent models in Laravel

summary.zh: laravel-sluggable 是一个 Laravel 扩展包，旨在简化 Eloquent 模型的 slug 创建过程。通过自动生成友好的 URL，用户可以将文章和分类的链接从 ID 转换为易读的名称，提高了网站的可用性和 SEO 效果。该包易于安装和使用，只需简单配置即可实现功能，适合需要优化 URL 的 Laravel 开发者。
summary.en: laravel-sluggable is a Laravel package designed to simplify the creation of slugs for Eloquent models. By automatically generating user-friendly URLs, it allows users to convert article and category links from IDs to readable names, enhancing website usability and SEO. The package is easy to install and use, requiring minimal configuration, making it ideal for Laravel developers looking to optimize URLs.

metadata.name: lin-cms-flask
metadata.description: 🎀A simple and practical CMS implememted by Flask

summary.zh: Lin-CMS-Flask 是一个基于 Flask 的内容管理系统框架，旨在提高开发者的 CMS 开发效率。它提供前后端分离的解决方案，内置用户管理、权限管理等常用功能，并支持插件扩展，方便开发者快速实现个性化需求。该框架适合中小型项目，具有良好的文档支持，帮助开发者专注于业务逻辑的实现。
summary.en: Lin-CMS-Flask is a content management system framework based on Flask, designed to enhance developers' efficiency in CMS development. It offers a front-end and back-end separation solution, with built-in features like user management and permission management, while supporting plugin extensions for personalized needs. This framework is suitable for small to medium-sized projects and comes with comprehensive documentation to help developers focus on business logic implementation.

metadata.name: 955.WLB
metadata.description: 955 不加班的公司名单 - 工作 955，work–life balance (工作与生活的平衡)

summary.zh: 955.WLB 是一个致力于列出不加班公司名单的项目，旨在帮助人们逃离996工作制，追求更好的工作与生活平衡。该项目提供了多个知名企业的名单，涵盖了不同地区，鼓励用户参与投票以更新信息，促进更健康的工作文化。
summary.en: 955.WLB is a project aimed at listing companies that do not require overtime, helping individuals escape the 996 work culture and pursue a better work-life balance. The project provides a list of well-known companies across various regions, encouraging users to participate in voting to update information and promote a healthier work culture.

metadata.name: think-helper
metadata.description: thinkphp常用的助手类 助手函数

summary.zh: think-helper 是一个为 ThinkPHP 6 提供的助手类库，旨在简化常见的字符串操作。该库基于 PHP 7.1+，提供了多种实用的字符串处理函数，如检查包含关系、随机字符串生成及大小写转换等，适合开发者在日常开发中提高效率。
summary.en: think-helper is a utility library for ThinkPHP 6, designed to simplify common string operations. Built on PHP 7.1+, it offers various practical string manipulation functions, such as checking containment, generating random strings, and case conversion, making it ideal for developers to enhance productivity in daily tasks.

metadata.name: laravel-swoole
metadata.description: High performance HTTP server based on Swoole. Speed up your Laravel or Lumen applications.

summary.zh: Laravel-Swoole 是一个基于 Swoole 的高性能 HTTP 服务器，旨在显著提升 Laravel 和 Lumen 应用的性能，速度可提升至 5 倍。该项目支持 WebSocket 和 Socket.io 协议，并提供沙箱模式以隔离应用容器。尽管该包已不再维护，推荐使用 Laravel 官方的 laravel/octane 作为替代方案。
summary.en: Laravel-Swoole is a high-performance HTTP server based on Swoole, designed to significantly boost the performance of Laravel and Lumen applications, achieving up to 5x speed improvements. It supports WebSocket and Socket.io protocols and offers a sandbox mode for application isolation. Although this package is no longer maintained, it is recommended to use Laravel's official laravel/octane as an alternative.

metadata.name: dependencyInjection
metadata.description: 简单的示例帮助了解laravel依赖注入的内部实现

summary.zh: 该仓库提供了一个简单的 PHP 示例，帮助开发者理解 Laravel 框架中依赖注入的内部实现。尽管 Laravel 的实际实现更加复杂，但这个示例通过简化的代码展示了依赖注入的基本概念和工作原理，适合初学者学习和掌握这一重要技术。
summary.en: This repository offers a simple PHP example to help developers understand the internal implementation of dependency injection in the Laravel framework. Although the actual implementation in Laravel is more complex, this example illustrates the basic concepts and workings of dependency injection, making it suitable for beginners to learn and grasp this essential technique.

metadata.name: Carbon
metadata.description: A simple PHP API extension for DateTime.

summary.zh: Carbon 是一个国际化的 PHP DateTime 扩展，提供了丰富的日期和时间处理功能。它支持超过 200 种语言及 500 种地区变体，能够轻松进行时间计算、格式化和比较。Carbon 的 API 简洁易用，适合需要处理复杂日期时间逻辑的 PHP 开发者，广泛应用于 Web 开发和数据处理场景。
summary.en: Carbon is an international PHP extension for DateTime, offering extensive date and time manipulation capabilities. It supports over 200 languages and 500 regional variants, allowing for easy time calculations, formatting, and comparisons. With a clean and user-friendly API, Carbon is ideal for PHP developers dealing with complex date-time logic, widely used in web development and data processing scenarios.

metadata.name: date
metadata.description: 🗓 A library to help you work with dates in multiple languages, based on Carbon.

summary.zh: Jenssegers/date 是一个基于 Carbon 的日期处理库，提供多语言支持。它扩展了 Carbon 的功能，使日期格式、时间差等方法能够根据用户的语言环境进行翻译，适用于需要国际化的应用场景。该库与 Laravel 框架兼容，便于开发者在多语言环境中高效管理日期和时间。
summary.en: Jenssegers/date is a date handling library based on Carbon, offering multi-language support. It extends Carbon's functionality, allowing methods like date formatting and time differences to be translated based on user locale, making it suitable for applications requiring internationalization. The library is compatible with the Laravel framework, facilitating efficient date and time management in multi-language environments.

metadata.name: toastr
metadata.description: Simple javascript toast notifications

summary.zh: toastr 是一个简单的 JavaScript 库，用于非阻塞通知，依赖于 jQuery。该库旨在提供一个可定制和扩展的核心功能，适用于需要即时反馈的应用场景，如表单提交、操作结果提示等。其技术亮点包括支持多种通知类型（信息、成功、警告、错误）、可配置的动画效果和自定义样式。
summary.en: toastr is a simple JavaScript library for non-blocking notifications, requiring jQuery. It aims to provide a customizable and extendable core functionality, suitable for applications needing instant feedback, such as form submissions and operation result prompts. Key features include support for various notification types (info, success, warning, error), configurable animations, and customizable styles.

metadata.name: phpstorm-laravel-live-templates
metadata.description: Laravel Live Templates for PhpStorm

summary.zh: 该仓库提供了 PhpStorm 的 Laravel 代码片段模板，旨在提高开发效率。尽管该项目已不再维护，但用户仍可通过简单的设置快速访问多种 Laravel 相关的代码模板，如路由、请求、视图等。推荐使用 Laravel IDE Helper 作为更强大的替代方案，以实现更好的自动补全和静态检查功能。
summary.en: This repository offers Laravel code snippets for PhpStorm, aimed at enhancing development efficiency. Although the project is no longer maintained, users can quickly access various Laravel-related templates such as routes, requests, and views through simple setup. It is recommended to use Laravel IDE Helper as a more robust alternative for better autocompletion and static checking.

metadata.name: ChromeAppHeroes
metadata.description: 🌈谷粒-Chrome插件英雄榜, 为优秀的Chrome插件写一本中文说明书, 让Chrome插件英雄们造福人类~  ChromePluginHeroes, Write a Chinese manual for the excellent Chrome plugin, let the Chrome plugin heroes benefit the human~ 公众号「0加1」同步更新

summary.zh: 谷粒-Chrome插件英雄榜是一个专注于为优秀Chrome插件提供中文说明书的项目，旨在帮助用户更好地理解和使用这些插件。项目使用开源工具docsify构建，内容涵盖多种实用插件，如广告屏蔽、视频下载和语言学习等，极大提升了Chrome浏览体验。
summary.en: GuLi - Chrome Plugin Heroes is a project dedicated to providing Chinese manuals for excellent Chrome plugins, aimed at helping users better understand and utilize these tools. Built with the open-source tool docsify, it covers a variety of practical plugins, such as ad blockers, video downloaders, and language learning tools, significantly enhancing the Chrome browsing experience.

metadata.name: pay
metadata.description: A variety of payment solutions based on easyswoole.

summary.zh: easy-swoole/pay 是基于 EasySwoole 框架的多种支付解决方案，支持支付宝 v3 接口，包括单笔转账和用户授权等功能。该组件提供公钥和证书两种签名方式，便于开发者灵活配置和使用。适用于需要集成支付宝支付的 PHP 应用，简化了支付流程的实现。
summary.en: easy-swoole/pay is a variety of payment solutions based on the EasySwoole framework, supporting Alipay v3 interfaces, including single transfers and user authorization. The component offers both public key and certificate signing methods, allowing developers to configure and use it flexibly. It is suitable for PHP applications that need to integrate Alipay payments, simplifying the payment process implementation.

metadata.name: laravel-s
metadata.description: LaravelS is an out-of-the-box adapter between Laravel/Lumen and Swoole.

summary.zh: LaravelS 是一个即插即用的适配器，连接 Laravel/Lumen 与 Swoole，旨在提升 PHP 应用的性能和并发处理能力。它内置了 HTTP/WebSocket 服务器，支持多端口混合协议、异步事件监听和任务队列，适合需要高性能和实时性的应用场景，如即时通讯和在线游戏。
summary.en: LaravelS is an out-of-the-box adapter that connects Laravel/Lumen with Swoole, aimed at enhancing the performance and concurrency of PHP applications. It features a built-in HTTP/WebSocket server, supports multi-port mixed protocols, asynchronous event listening, and task queues, making it suitable for high-performance and real-time applications like instant messaging and online gaming.

metadata.name: nginxconfig.io
metadata.description: ⚙️ NGINX config generator on steroids 💉

summary.zh: NGINXConfig.io 是一个强大的 NGINX 配置生成器，旨在简化 NGINX 服务器的配置过程。它支持 HTTPS、HTTP/2、IPv6、SSL 证书管理等多种功能，用户可以通过直观的界面生成适合特定需求的配置，提升服务器性能和安全性。该工具适合开发者和系统管理员，帮助他们快速配置高效的 NGINX 环境。
summary.en: NGINXConfig.io is a powerful NGINX configuration generator designed to simplify the configuration process of NGINX servers. It supports various features such as HTTPS, HTTP/2, IPv6, and SSL certificate management, allowing users to generate configurations tailored to specific needs through an intuitive interface, enhancing server performance and security. This tool is ideal for developers and system administrators looking to quickly set up efficient NGINX environments.

metadata.name: contracts
metadata.description: [READ ONLY] Subtree split of the Illuminate Contracts component (see laravel/framework)

summary.zh: Illuminate Contracts 是 Laravel 框架中的核心组件，提供了一组接口和抽象类，旨在促进不同组件之间的解耦和可替换性。该库适用于构建灵活的 PHP 应用程序，支持依赖注入和服务提供者模式，增强了代码的可维护性和可测试性。
summary.en: Illuminate Contracts is a core component of the Laravel framework that provides a set of interfaces and abstractions designed to promote decoupling and interchangeability among different components. This library is suitable for building flexible PHP applications, supporting dependency injection and service provider patterns, enhancing code maintainability and testability.

metadata.name: php-awesome
metadata.description: PHP 优秀资源整理汇集

summary.zh: php-awesome 是一个汇集了丰富 PHP 资源的项目，涵盖了代码标准、设计模式、框架、教程及成品软件等多个方面。它为开发者提供了便捷的学习和参考资料，适合各个水平的 PHP 程序员，帮助他们快速找到所需的工具和知识。该项目持续更新，旨在提升 PHP 开发的效率与质量。
summary.en: php-awesome is a comprehensive collection of PHP resources, covering code standards, design patterns, frameworks, tutorials, and finished software. It provides developers with convenient learning and reference materials, suitable for PHP programmers of all levels, helping them quickly find the tools and knowledge they need. The project is continuously updated to enhance the efficiency and quality of PHP development.

metadata.name: download
metadata.description: Lantern官方版本下载 蓝灯 翻墙 代理 科学上网 外网 加速器 梯子 路由 proxy vpn circumvention gfw

summary.zh: 蓝灯（Lantern）是一个高效的翻墙工具，提供多平台版本下载，包括Windows、Android、iOS和Ubuntu。其核心功能是帮助用户突破网络限制，实现科学上网，提升外网访问速度。蓝灯的简便安装和使用，使其成为用户获取自由互联网的重要助手。
summary.en: Lantern is an efficient circumvention tool that offers downloads for multiple platforms, including Windows, Android, iOS, and Ubuntu. Its core function is to help users bypass network restrictions and achieve scientific internet access, enhancing external web access speed. Lantern's easy installation and usage make it an essential assistant for users seeking a free internet.

metadata.name: taro-yanxuan
metadata.description: 首个 Taro 多端统一实例 - 网易严选（小程序 + H5 + React Native） - By 趣店 FED

summary.zh: taro-yanxuan 是首个基于 Taro 的多端统一实例，涵盖小程序、H5 和 React Native，旨在分享网易严选的开发经验。项目提供了多端开发的实用技巧和思路，适合开发者学习如何高效使用 Taro 进行跨平台应用开发。尽管项目未实现完整功能，但通过注释详细记录了开发过程中的注意事项和踩坑经验，具有很高的参考价值。
summary.en: taro-yanxuan is the first unified multi-end instance based on Taro, covering Mini Programs, H5, and React Native, aimed at sharing development experiences from NetEase Yanxuan. The project offers practical tips and insights for multi-end development, suitable for developers to learn how to efficiently use Taro for cross-platform application development. Although the project does not implement complete functionality, it provides detailed annotations documenting the development process's key considerations and pitfalls, making it highly valuable for reference.

metadata.name: pipenv
metadata.description: Python Development Workflow for Humans.

summary.zh: Pipenv 是一个为 Python 开发者设计的虚拟环境管理工具，旨在简化项目的依赖管理和环境配置。它通过自动创建和管理虚拟环境，使用 Pipfile 和 Pipfile.lock 文件来确保可重复构建，解决了传统 pip 和 virtualenv 分离使用的问题。Pipenv 强调安全性，支持最新依赖版本，提供依赖图视图，极大地优化了开发工作流程。
summary.en: Pipenv is a virtual environment management tool designed for Python developers, aimed at simplifying dependency management and environment configuration for projects. It automatically creates and manages virtual environments, using Pipfile and Pipfile.lock to ensure deterministic builds, addressing the issues of using pip and virtualenv separately. Pipenv emphasizes security, supports the latest dependency versions, and provides insights into the dependency graph, significantly optimizing the development workflow.

metadata.name: ngx_lua_waf
metadata.description: ngx_lua_waf是一个基于lua-nginx-module(openresty)的web应用防火墙

summary.zh: ngx_lua_waf是一个基于Lua-Nginx模块的高性能Web应用防火墙，旨在防止SQL注入、XSS、SSRF等多种网络攻击。其轻量级设计使得配置和使用变得简单，适合各种Web环境。项目开源并遵循MIT协议，提供灵活的规则配置，支持动态规则更新，确保高效的安全防护。
summary.en: ngx_lua_waf is a high-performance web application firewall based on the Lua-Nginx module, designed to prevent various network attacks such as SQL injection, XSS, and SSRF. Its lightweight design simplifies configuration and usage, making it suitable for various web environments. The project is open-source under the MIT license, offering flexible rule configuration and support for dynamic rule updates to ensure efficient security protection.

metadata.name: programmer-job-blacklist
metadata.description: :see_no_evil:程序员找工作黑名单，换工作和当技术合伙人需谨慎啊 更新有赞

summary.zh: 该项目提供了一个程序员找工作黑名单，旨在帮助求职者识别潜在的雇主风险。通过收集和整理关于公司不当行为的案例，用户可以在求职过程中更加谨慎。技术亮点在于其社区驱动的维护方式，鼓励用户参与更新和讨论，确保信息的及时性和准确性。
summary.en: This project offers a blacklist for programmers seeking jobs, aimed at helping job seekers identify potential employer risks. By collecting and organizing cases of misconduct by companies, users can be more cautious during their job search. The technical highlight lies in its community-driven maintenance approach, encouraging user participation in updates and discussions to ensure the timeliness and accuracy of information.

metadata.description: 12306智能刷票，订票

summary.zh: 12306智能刷票助手是一个基于Python的购票工具，支持自动打码、登录、准点预售及智能候补等功能，旨在提升用户购票效率。该项目依赖于本地验证码识别模型，并提供邮件和server酱通知功能，适合需要快速抢票的用户。用户可通过Docker简化部署流程，方便快捷地启动抢票服务。
summary.en: The 12306 Smart Ticket Assistant is a Python-based ticket purchasing tool that supports features like automatic captcha recognition, login, on-time pre-sale, and intelligent backup. It aims to enhance user ticket purchasing efficiency. The project relies on a local captcha recognition model and provides email and server notifications, making it suitable for users needing quick ticket purchases. Users can simplify deployment through Docker for a fast ticket grabbing service.

metadata.name: idcardgenerator
metadata.description: 身份证图片生成工具 generate an id card picture

summary.zh: 身份证图片生成工具，用户只需填写信息并选择头像，即可生成黑白和彩色身份证图片。支持自动抠图功能，适用于纯色背景，且可手动调整。该工具依赖于numpy、pillow和opencv库，便于研究和学习。未来计划支持复杂背景的抠图功能，适合需要快速生成身份证图片的开发者和研究者。
summary.en: The ID card picture generator allows users to fill in information and select a profile picture to generate black-and-white and color ID cards. It supports an automatic cropping feature for solid backgrounds and allows manual adjustments. The tool relies on numpy, pillow, and opencv libraries, making it suitable for research and learning. Future plans include support for cropping from complex backgrounds, ideal for developers and researchers needing quick ID card generation.

metadata.name: 500LineorLess_CN
metadata.description: 500 line or less 中文翻译计划。

summary.zh: 500LineorLess_CN 是一个致力于将《500 Lines or Less》一书中的内容翻译为中文的项目。该计划涵盖了多种编程主题，包括可视化编程、持续集成、分布式系统等，旨在为中文读者提供高质量的技术资料。项目通过链接和表格形式展示已完成翻译的文章，便于读者快速查找和学习相关知识。
summary.en: 500LineorLess_CN is a project aimed at translating the content of the book '500 Lines or Less' into Chinese. It covers various programming topics, including visual programming, continuous integration, and distributed systems, providing high-quality technical resources for Chinese readers. The project showcases completed translations through links and tables, facilitating quick access to relevant knowledge for readers.

metadata.name: 500lines
metadata.description: 500 Lines or Less

summary.zh: 《500行或更少》是《开源应用架构》系列中的第四本书，旨在帮助程序员理解在编写代码时所做的设计决策和权衡。书中通过最多500行源代码的程序实例，探讨模块划分、继承与组合的使用，以及如何预测程序扩展需求。该书不仅适合希望深入理解软件工程的开发者，也为扩展或修改现有项目提供了基础。
summary.en: The book '500 Lines or Less' is the fourth in the 'Architecture of Open Source Applications' series, aimed at helping programmers understand design decisions and trade-offs made during coding. It explores module division, the use of inheritance versus composition, and how to anticipate program extension needs through examples of programs that solve canonical software engineering problems in at most 500 lines of code. This book is ideal for developers looking to deepen their understanding of software engineering and provides a foundation for extending or modifying existing projects.

metadata.name: jpush-api-php-client
metadata.description: JPush's officially supported PHP client library for accessing JPush APIs.  极光推送官方支持的 PHP 版本服务器端 SDK。

summary.zh: JPush API PHP Client 是极光推送官方提供的 PHP 版本 SDK，旨在简化对 JPush REST API 的访问。该库支持 PHP 5.3.3 至 7.x 的版本，提供了推送、报告、设备管理等多种功能，适合需要实现推送通知的 PHP 开发者。其简洁的 API 设计和丰富的示例代码，使得开发者能够快速上手并集成推送服务。
summary.en: The JPush API PHP Client is an official SDK provided by JPush for PHP, designed to simplify access to the JPush REST API. Supporting PHP versions from 5.3.3 to 7.x, it offers functionalities such as push notifications, reporting, and device management, making it suitable for PHP developers looking to implement push services. Its straightforward API design and abundant example code enable quick integration.

metadata.name: scrapyd
metadata.description: A service daemon to run Scrapy spiders

summary.zh: Scrapyd 是一个用于部署和运行 Scrapy 爬虫的服务。它提供了一个 JSON API，允许用户上传 Scrapy 项目并控制其爬虫，适用于需要高效管理爬虫任务的场景。其核心技术基于 Python，支持灵活的爬虫调度与监控，提升了数据抓取的自动化和可控性。
summary.en: Scrapyd is a service for deploying and running Scrapy spiders. It provides a JSON API for uploading Scrapy projects and controlling their spiders, making it suitable for efficiently managing web scraping tasks. Built on Python, it offers flexible spider scheduling and monitoring, enhancing automation and control in data extraction.

metadata.name: pinduoduo
metadata.description: 拼多多sdk

summary.zh: 拼多多SDK是为Laravel框架开发的API接口库，旨在简化与拼多多平台的集成过程。该SDK提供了高效的接口调用方式，适用于电商应用开发，帮助开发者快速实现拼多多的功能，提升开发效率。
summary.en: The Pinduoduo SDK is an API interface library developed for the Laravel framework, designed to simplify the integration process with the Pinduoduo platform. This SDK offers efficient interface calling methods, suitable for e-commerce application development, enabling developers to quickly implement Pinduoduo functionalities and enhance development efficiency.

metadata.name: geoip_server_test_data
metadata.description: Test data for https://github.com/JackDanger/geoip_server

summary.zh: 该仓库提供了用于 geoip_server 的测试数据，旨在帮助开发者验证和调试地理位置服务。通过提供真实的地理位置数据，用户可以更有效地测试其应用程序的地理定位功能，确保服务的准确性和可靠性。该项目适用于需要地理位置数据的开发场景，尤其是与用户位置相关的应用。
summary.en: This repository provides test data for geoip_server, aimed at helping developers validate and debug geolocation services. By offering real geographical data, users can effectively test their applications' geolocation features, ensuring accuracy and reliability of the services. This project is suitable for development scenarios requiring geographical data, particularly for applications related to user location.

metadata.name: elasticsearch-head
metadata.description: A web front end for an elastic search cluster

summary.zh: elasticsearch-head 是一个为 Elasticsearch 集群提供的网页前端工具，旨在简化数据管理和可视化。用户可以通过本地服务器、Docker 或 Chrome 扩展等多种方式运行该工具，支持与不同版本的 Elasticsearch 兼容。其技术亮点包括直观的界面和灵活的连接选项，使得用户能够轻松监控和管理 Elasticsearch 集群。
summary.en: elasticsearch-head is a web front-end tool for managing and visualizing data in Elasticsearch clusters. It can be run through various methods, including a local server, Docker, or as a Chrome extension, ensuring compatibility with different Elasticsearch versions. Key features include an intuitive interface and flexible connection options, enabling users to easily monitor and manage their Elasticsearch clusters.

Corpus：大规模GitHub多语言拼写错误/语法错误数据集、TextCluster：短文本聚类预处理模块 Short text cluster、面向语音识别的中文文本规范化、BLINK：最先进的实体链接库、BertPunc：基于BERT的最先进标点修复模型、Tokenizer：快速、可定制的文本词条化库、中文语言理解测评基准，包括代表性的数据集、基准(预训练)模型、语料库、排行榜、spaCy 医学文本挖掘与信息提取 、 NLP任务示例项目代码集、 python拼写检查库、chatbot-list - 行业内关于智能客服、聊天机器人的应用和架构、算法分享和介绍、语音质量评价指标(MOSNet, BSSEval, STOI, PESQ, SRMR)、 用138GB语料训练的法文RoBERTa预训练语言模型 、BERT-NER-Pytorch：三种不同模式的BERT中文NER实验、无道词典 - 有道词典的命令行版本，支持英汉互查和在线查询、2019年NLP亮点回顾、 Chinese medical dialogue data 中文医疗对话数据集 、最好的汉字数字(中文数字)-阿拉伯数字转换工具、 基于百科知识库的中文词语多词义/义项获取与特定句子词语语义消歧、awesome-nlp-sentiment-analysis - 情感分析、情绪原因识别、评价对象和评价词抽取、LineFlow：面向所有深度学习框架的NLP数据高效加载器、中文医学NLP公开资源整理 、MedQuAD：(英文)医学问答数据集、将自然语言数字串解析转换为整数和浮点数、Transfer Learning in Natural Language Processing (NLP) 、面向语音识别的中文/英文发音辞典、Tokenizers：注重性能与多功能性的最先进分词器、CLUENER 细粒度命名实体识别 Fine Grained Named Entity Recognition、 基于BERT的中文命名实体识别、中文谣言数据库、NLP数据集/基准任务大列表、nlp相关的一些论文及代码, 包括主题模型、词向量(Word Embedding)、命名实体识别(NER)、文本分类(Text Classificatin)、文本生成(Text Generation)、文本相似性(Text Similarity)计算等，涉及到各种与nlp相关的算法，基于keras和tensorflow 、Python文本挖掘/NLP实战示例、 Blackstone：面向非结构化法律文本的spaCy pipeline和NLP模型通过同义词替换实现文本“变脸” 、中文 预训练 ELECTREA 模型: 基于对抗学习 pretrain Chinese Model 、albert-chinese-ner - 用预训练语言模型ALBERT做中文NER 、基于GPT2的特定主题文本生成/文本增广、开源预训练语言模型合集、多语言句向量包、编码、标记和实现：一种可控高效的文本生成方法、 英文脏话大列表 、attnvis：GPT2、BERT等transformer语言模型注意力交互可视化、CoVoST：Facebook发布的多语种语音-文本翻译语料库，包括11种语言(法语、德语、荷兰语、俄语、西班牙语、意大利语、土耳其语、波斯语、瑞典语、蒙古语和中文)的语音、文字转录及英文译文、Jiagu自然语言处理工具 - 以BiLSTM等模型为基础，提供知识图谱关系抽取 中文分词 词性标注 命名实体识别 情感分析 新词发现 关键词 文本摘要 文本聚类等功能、用unet实现对文档表格的自动检测，表格重建、NLP事件提取文献资源列表 、 金融领域自然语言处理研究资源大列表、CLUEDatasetSearch - 中英文NLP数据集：搜索所有中文NLP数据集，附常用英文NLP数据集 、medical_NER - 中文医学知识图谱命名实体识别 、(哈佛)讲因果推理的免费书、知识图谱相关学习资料/数据集/工具资源大列表、Forte：灵活强大的自然语言处理pipeline工具集 、Python字符串相似性算法库、PyLaia：面向手写文档分析的深度学习工具包、TextFooler：针对文本分类/推理的对抗文本生成模块、Haystack：灵活、强大的可扩展问答(QA)框架、中文关键短语抽取工具

summary.zh: funNLP是一个全面的中文自然语言处理资源库，涵盖敏感词检测、语言识别、信息抽取、文本生成等多种功能。它提供了丰富的工具和数据集，适用于学术研究、工业应用和开发者的日常需求。项目的技术亮点包括多种预训练模型、情感分析工具和知识图谱构建能力，适合各类NLP任务的实现与探索。
summary.en: funNLP is a comprehensive Chinese natural language processing resource library, covering various functionalities such as sensitive word detection, language recognition, information extraction, and text generation. It offers a wealth of tools and datasets suitable for academic research, industrial applications, and developers' daily needs. The project's technical highlights include various pre-trained models, sentiment analysis tools, and knowledge graph construction capabilities, making it ideal for implementing and exploring various NLP tasks.

metadata.name: redis-py
metadata.description: Redis Python client

summary.zh: redis-py 是 Redis 的 Python 客户端，提供了与 Redis 键值存储的高效交互接口。该库支持多种 Redis 版本，并通过简单的 API 使得数据操作变得直观易用。其亮点包括对 RESP3 协议的支持和可选的 hiredis 性能优化，适合需要高效数据存取的 Python 开发者。
summary.en: redis-py is the Python client for Redis, offering an efficient interface for interacting with the Redis key-value store. The library supports multiple Redis versions and provides a straightforward API for data operations. Key features include support for the RESP3 protocol and optional hiredis performance optimization, making it suitable for Python developers needing efficient data access.

metadata.name: ca-bundle
metadata.description: The Mozilla CA bundle extracted and converted to PEM. This repository functions as a backup to the automated service on the curl web site.

summary.zh: 该仓库提供了Mozilla CA证书包的PEM格式备份，定期从Mozilla源提取和转换。作为curl网站自动服务的备份，用户可以通过此仓库获取最新的CA证书信息，确保安全连接。该项目主要用于支持依赖于CA证书的应用程序，确保其在更新时能够获取到最新的证书数据。
summary.en: This repository provides a PEM format backup of the Mozilla CA bundle, extracted and converted at regular intervals. Serving as a backup to the automated service on the curl website, users can access the latest CA certificate information to ensure secure connections. The project primarily supports applications relying on CA certificates, ensuring they can obtain the latest certificate data during updates.

metadata.name: captcha
metadata.description: 😁一个Laravel5使用的简单图形验证码组件包

summary.zh: 这是一个为Laravel 5开发的简单图形验证码组件，旨在增强应用的安全性。它提供了易于使用的API，允许开发者生成和验证验证码，支持自定义配置，如验证码长度、字符集及图像样式等。适合需要防止自动化攻击的Web应用，能够有效提升用户注册和登录的安全性。
summary.en: This is a simple graphical captcha component developed for Laravel 5, aimed at enhancing application security. It provides an easy-to-use API for generating and validating captchas, allowing developers to customize settings such as captcha length, character set, and image styles. Ideal for web applications needing to prevent automated attacks, effectively improving security during user registration and login.

metadata.name: captcha
metadata.description: Captcha for Laravel 5+

summary.zh: 该项目为 Laravel 5 及以上版本提供了一个简单易用的验证码服务，支持自定义设置和多种使用模式（如会话模式和无状态模式）。通过 Composer 安装后，用户可以方便地在 Laravel 应用中集成验证码功能，增强表单安全性。项目支持多种配置选项，适用于需要防止自动化提交的场景。
summary.en: This project offers a simple and easy-to-use captcha service for Laravel 5 and above, supporting custom settings and various usage modes (such as session mode and stateless mode). After installation via Composer, users can easily integrate captcha functionality into their Laravel applications to enhance form security. The project supports multiple configuration options, making it suitable for scenarios requiring protection against automated submissions.

metadata.name: pinyin-poem
metadata.description: 一个计划用来实现一些偶尔想到的小方法，想写一个将古诗转成带拼音的古诗，这样的一个小项目

summary.zh: pinyin-poem 是一个将古诗转换为带拼音版本的小项目，旨在帮助用户更好地理解和学习古诗。项目使用 Laravel 框架，提供多种功能，如数字转汉字、字符串反转、敏感词检测等，适合对古诗感兴趣的学习者和开发者。
summary.en: pinyin-poem is a small project designed to convert ancient poems into their pinyin versions, aiding users in understanding and learning classical poetry. Built on the Laravel framework, it offers various features such as number-to-Chinese conversion, string reversal, and sensitive word detection, making it suitable for poetry enthusiasts and developers.

metadata.name: javascript-decode
metadata.description: javascript decode

summary.zh: 该项目提供了一种高效的 JavaScript 解码工具，旨在简化和优化数据解码过程。其核心功能包括支持多种编码格式，快速解析和转换数据，适用于需要处理编码数据的 Web 应用和服务。技术亮点在于其简洁的 API 和高性能的解码算法，能够显著提升开发效率。
summary.en: This project offers an efficient JavaScript decoding tool designed to simplify and optimize the data decoding process. Its core features include support for multiple encoding formats, fast parsing, and data conversion, making it suitable for web applications and services that require handling encoded data. The technical highlights include a simple API and high-performance decoding algorithms that significantly enhance development efficiency.

metadata.name: wangEditor
metadata.description: wangEditor, open-source Web rich text editor 开源 Web 富文本编辑器

summary.zh: wangEditor 是一款开源的 Web 富文本编辑器，支持 JS、Vue 和 React，具有开箱即用和简单配置的特点。它适用于需要富文本编辑功能的各类 Web 应用，提供了友好的用户体验和灵活的定制选项，是开发者构建内容管理系统和博客平台的理想选择。
summary.en: wangEditor is an open-source Web rich text editor that supports JS, Vue, and React, featuring out-of-the-box usability and simple configuration. It is suitable for various Web applications requiring rich text editing capabilities, offering a user-friendly experience and flexible customization options, making it an ideal choice for developers building content management systems and blogging platforms.

metadata.name: TrustedProxy
metadata.description: Laravel Proxy Package for handling sessions when behind load balancers or other intermediaries.

summary.zh: Laravel Trusted Proxies 是一个用于处理在负载均衡器或其他中介后面时的会话的 Laravel 代理包。通过设置受信任的代理，可以确保在反向代理后，URL 生成、重定向、会话处理和日志记录的准确性，特别适用于使用 Nginx、HAProxy 等负载均衡器的应用。该包简化了配置过程，使开发者能够轻松管理 HTTP 请求的真实来源，确保应用的安全性和正确性。
summary.en: Laravel Trusted Proxies is a proxy package for Laravel that handles sessions when behind load balancers or other intermediaries. By setting trusted proxies, it ensures accurate URL generation, redirection, session handling, and logging when operating behind reverse proxies like Nginx or HAProxy. This package simplifies the configuration process, allowing developers to easily manage the real source of HTTP requests, ensuring application security and correctness.

metadata.name: redis
metadata.description: Redis is an in-memory database that persists on disk. The data model is key-value, but many different kind of values are supported: Strings, Lists, Sets, Sorted Sets, Hashes

summary.zh: Redis 是一个内存数据库，支持多种数据类型，如字符串、列表、集合等，并可持久化到磁盘。该项目为 Windows 平台移植的版本，支持 64 位系统，提供了 Windows 服务安装选项。尽管该项目不再积极维护，但仍可用于需要在 Windows 环境中运行 Redis 的场景，特别是在需要高性能数据存储和快速访问的应用中。
summary.en: Redis is an in-memory database that supports various data types like strings, lists, and sets, with persistence to disk. This project is a Windows port, officially supporting 64-bit systems and offering installation as a Windows Service. Although no longer actively maintained, it remains useful for scenarios requiring Redis in a Windows environment, particularly for high-performance data storage and quick access applications.

metadata.name: laravel-wang-editor
metadata.description: wangEditor for Laravel

summary.zh: laravel-wang-editor 是一个基于 wangEditor 的 Laravel 扩展包，提供轻量级、易用的富文本编辑器解决方案。它支持多图片上传和文件名优化，适配 Laravel 5.1 及以上版本，方便开发者在项目中集成富文本编辑功能。该工具的简洁性和开源特性使其适合各种 Web 应用场景。
summary.en: laravel-wang-editor is a Laravel extension package based on wangEditor, offering a lightweight and user-friendly rich text editor solution. It supports multiple image uploads and filename optimization, compatible with Laravel 5.1 and above, making it easy for developers to integrate rich text editing features into their projects. Its simplicity and open-source nature make it suitable for various web application scenarios.

metadata.name: selenium
metadata.description: A browser automation framework and ecosystem.

summary.zh: Selenium是一个浏览器自动化框架，提供了多种工具和库，支持W3C WebDriver规范，兼容所有主流浏览器。它的核心价值在于简化了浏览器操作的自动化过程，适用于测试、爬虫和任务调度等场景。项目由志愿者贡献，致力于持续开发和维护。
summary.en: Selenium is a browser automation framework that encapsulates various tools and libraries, providing support for the W3C WebDriver specification, compatible with all major web browsers. Its core value lies in simplifying the automation of browser operations, applicable in testing, web scraping, and task scheduling scenarios. The project is maintained by volunteer contributors dedicated to ongoing development.

metadata.name: scrapy-splash
metadata.description: Scrapy+Splash for JavaScript integration

summary.zh: scrapy-splash 是一个用于将 Scrapy 与 JavaScript 集成的库，利用 Splash HTTP API 实现动态网页抓取。它支持高级响应处理和去重功能，适用于需要处理 JavaScript 渲染内容的爬虫项目。该库通过配置中间件和请求指纹功能，优化了网络流量和存储效率，适合开发者在数据采集时提升抓取效果。
summary.en: scrapy-splash is a library that integrates Scrapy with JavaScript using the Splash HTTP API for dynamic web scraping. It supports advanced response processing and deduplication features, making it suitable for web scraping projects that need to handle JavaScript-rendered content. By configuring middleware and request fingerprinting, it optimizes network traffic and storage efficiency, enhancing the scraping effectiveness for developers.

metadata.name: scrapy-zyte-smartproxy
metadata.description: Zyte Smart Proxy Manager (formerly Crawlera) middleware for Scrapy

summary.zh: scrapy-zyte-smartproxy 是一个用于 Scrapy 的下载中间件，旨在集成 Zyte 的代理服务，包括 Zyte API 的代理模式和 Zyte Smart Proxy Manager（前身为 Crawlera）。该工具简化了网络爬虫的代理管理，提升了爬取效率，适用于需要高效数据抓取的应用场景。
summary.en: scrapy-zyte-smartproxy is a downloader middleware for Scrapy that integrates Zyte's proxy services, including the proxy mode of the Zyte API and the Zyte Smart Proxy Manager (formerly Crawlera). This tool simplifies proxy management for web scraping, enhancing crawling efficiency, and is suitable for applications requiring efficient data extraction.

metadata.name: scrapy-proxies
metadata.description: Random proxy middleware for Scrapy

summary.zh: 该项目是一个为Scrapy框架提供的随机代理中间件，旨在通过使用随机代理来避免IP封禁并提高爬取速度。用户只需提供代理列表，设置相应的配置后即可轻松集成，适用于需要高频率请求的网络爬虫场景。
summary.en: This project is a random proxy middleware for the Scrapy framework, designed to avoid IP bans and improve crawling speed by using random proxies. Users simply need to provide a proxy list and configure the settings for easy integration, making it suitable for web scraping scenarios requiring high-frequency requests.

metadata.name: fake-useragent
metadata.description: Up-to-date simple useragent faker with real world database

summary.zh: fake-useragent 是一个简单且实时更新的用户代理伪造库，内置真实世界数据库，支持多种浏览器的用户代理字符串生成。它可以获取桌面、平板和移动设备的用户代理信息，适用于 Python 3.9 及以上版本，适合需要模拟不同浏览器环境的开发者使用。
summary.en: fake-useragent is a simple and up-to-date user agent faker with a real-world database, supporting the generation of user agent strings for various browsers. It retrieves user agent information for desktop, tablet, and mobile devices, suitable for developers needing to simulate different browser environments, compatible with Python 3.9 and above.

metadata.name: duoduoke-sdk
metadata.description: 多多客【多多进宝】API SDK【拼多多开放平台】

summary.zh: 多多客API SDK是为拼多多开放平台提供的PHP开发工具，支持商品详情查询等功能。该SDK要求PHP 7.0及以上版本，并依赖Composer及相关扩展。通过简单的配置，开发者可以快速集成拼多多的API，提升电商应用的开发效率。
summary.en: The DuoDuoKe API SDK is a PHP development tool designed for the Pinduoduo Open Platform, enabling functionalities like product detail queries. It requires PHP version 7.0 or higher, along with Composer and relevant extensions. With straightforward configuration, developers can quickly integrate Pinduoduo's APIs, enhancing the efficiency of e-commerce application development.

metadata.name: hashids
metadata.description: A small PHP library to generate YouTube-like ids from numbers. Use it when you don't want to expose your database ids to the user.

summary.zh: Hashids 是一个小型 PHP 库，用于从数字生成类似 YouTube 的 ID，适用于不希望将数据库 ID 直接暴露给用户的场景。它支持多种编码方式，包括自定义字母表和填充选项，确保生成的 ID 独特且安全。该库易于集成，适合需要隐藏数据库结构的应用程序。
summary.en: Hashids is a small PHP library for generating YouTube-like IDs from numbers, ideal for scenarios where you want to avoid exposing database IDs to users. It supports various encoding options, including custom alphabets and padding, ensuring unique and secure IDs. The library is easy to integrate, making it suitable for applications that require obscured database structures.

metadata.name: scout-extended
metadata.description: Scout Extended: The Full Power of Algolia in Laravel

summary.zh: Scout Extended 是一个为 Laravel 应用集成 Algolia 提供的强大工具，简化了搜索功能的实现。它基于 Laravel Scout 构建，支持零停机时间的数据重新导入，允许在多个模型中实现全站搜索，并自动提升搜索结果的相关性。该工具还提供了丰富的宏和外观，帮助开发者轻松管理索引和搜索体验。
summary.en: Scout Extended is a powerful tool for integrating Algolia into Laravel applications, simplifying the implementation of search functionalities. Built on Laravel Scout, it supports zero-downtime data reimports, enables site-wide search across multiple models, and automatically enhances the relevancy of search results. The tool also offers a rich collection of macros and facades, assisting developers in managing indexes and search experiences effortlessly.

metadata.name: laragon
metadata.description: Laragon is a portable, isolated, fast & powerful universal development environment for PHP, Node.js, Python. It is fast, lightweight, easy-to-use and easy-to-extend.

summary.zh: Laragon 是一个便携、隔离、快速且强大的通用开发环境，支持 PHP、Node.js 和 Python。它专注于性能，设计简洁灵活，易于使用和扩展。Laragon 具有自动配置功能，能够轻松管理多种服务，适合构建现代网页应用。其轻量级特性使得启动迅速，内存占用低，适合开发者和企业家使用。
summary.en: Laragon is a portable, isolated, fast, and powerful universal development environment for PHP, Node.js, and Python. It focuses on performance with a design that emphasizes simplicity, flexibility, and ease of use. Laragon features auto-configuration for managing various services effortlessly, making it ideal for building modern web applications. Its lightweight nature allows for quick startup and low memory usage, catering to developers and entrepreneurs.

metadata.name: api.yike.io
metadata.description: 一刻社区后端 API 源码

summary.zh: 一刻社区后端 API 源码基于 Laravel 5 开发，提供了丰富的功能模块，包括用户管理、帖子发布与搜索等。项目支持多种扩展包，提升了短信发送、图片存储和社交登录等功能的实现效率。适合希望快速搭建社区平台的开发者，具备良好的文档支持和环境配置指导。
summary.en: The backend API source code for Yike Community is developed based on Laravel 5, offering rich functionality modules including user management, post publishing, and search. The project supports various extensions to enhance the efficiency of features like SMS sending, image storage, and social login. It is suitable for developers looking to quickly build a community platform, with comprehensive documentation and environment setup guidance.

metadata.name: yike.io
metadata.description: 一刻社区前端源码

summary.zh: Yike.io 是一个基于 Vue.js 开发的 Laravel 单页面应用（SPA）论坛项目，旨在为用户提供高效的社区交流平台。该项目的开源代码可供开发者学习和改进，适合希望构建现代化社区网站的开发者。其核心亮点在于前后端分离架构和灵活的配置选项，便于快速上手和部署。
summary.en: Yike.io is a Laravel SPA forum project developed with Vue.js, aimed at providing an efficient community communication platform. The open-source code is available for developers to learn and improve, making it suitable for those looking to build modern community websites. Its key highlights include a front-end and back-end separation architecture and flexible configuration options for quick setup and deployment.

metadata.name: ArticleSpider-resourses
metadata.description: python分布式爬虫打造搜索引擎课程的资源

summary.zh: 该项目提供了一个基于Python的分布式爬虫课程资源，旨在帮助学习者构建自己的搜索引擎。通过系统的学习，用户能够掌握爬虫技术及其在搜索引擎中的应用，适合希望深入了解网络数据抓取与处理的开发者。
summary.en: This project offers resources for a Python-based distributed web crawler course, aimed at helping learners build their own search engines. Through systematic learning, users can master web scraping techniques and their applications in search engines, suitable for developers looking to delve into web data extraction and processing.

metadata.name: open-uploader
metadata.description: Intellij Idea Plugin

summary.zh: Open-Uploader 是一款针对 IntelliJ IDEA 的插件，旨在简化 APK 文件及其他文件的上传过程。用户无需打开网页即可直接上传文件，支持自定义上传路径和参数设置，极大提升了开发效率，特别适合需要频繁上传文件的开发者。
summary.en: Open-Uploader is a plugin for IntelliJ IDEA designed to simplify the uploading process of APK and other files. Users can upload files directly without opening a web page, supporting custom upload paths and parameter settings, significantly enhancing development efficiency, especially for developers who frequently upload files.

metadata.name: zheye
metadata.description: 者也 - 知乎 倒立的文字 汉字验证码识别程序

summary.zh: 者也是一个专为知乎设计的汉字验证码识别程序，利用卷积神经网络和高斯混合模型技术，能够准确识别倒立的文字。该项目适用于需要自动化处理知乎登录验证码的场景，展示了深度学习在图像识别中的应用潜力，具有较高的技术价值和实用性。
summary.en: Zheye is a Chinese character captcha recognition program specifically designed for Zhihu, utilizing convolutional neural networks and Gaussian mixture models to accurately identify inverted text. This project is suitable for automating the handling of Zhihu login captchas, showcasing the potential of deep learning in image recognition with significant technical value and practicality.

metadata.name: ApiDebugger
metadata.description: A IDEA plug-in to help you easily complete the API debugging.

summary.zh: ApiDebugger 是一款 IntelliJ 插件，旨在简化 API 调试过程。通过该插件，开发者可以快速完成 API 调试，提高开发效率。其直观的界面和易于安装的特性，使其成为 JetBrains IDE 用户的理想选择，尤其适合需要频繁进行 API 调试的项目。
summary.en: ApiDebugger is an IntelliJ plugin designed to simplify the API debugging process. With this plugin, developers can quickly complete API debugging, enhancing development efficiency. Its intuitive interface and easy installation make it an ideal choice for JetBrains IDE users, especially for projects that require frequent API debugging.

metadata.name: PocketFlow
metadata.description: An Automatic Model Compression (AutoMC) framework for developing smaller and faster AI applications.

summary.zh: PocketFlow是一个开源框架，旨在通过最小的人为干预压缩和加速深度学习模型，提升AI应用的推理效率。该框架支持多种模型压缩算法，开发者只需指定所需的压缩或加速比，PocketFlow将自动选择合适的超参数生成高效的压缩模型，适用于计算资源有限的移动设备。其简化的工具包使得深度学习模型在各个领域的应用更加广泛。
summary.en: PocketFlow is an open-source framework designed to compress and accelerate deep learning models with minimal human intervention, enhancing inference efficiency for AI applications. The framework supports various model compression algorithms, allowing developers to specify desired compression or acceleration ratios, while PocketFlow automatically selects appropriate hyper-parameters to generate efficient compressed models, suitable for mobile devices with limited computational resources. Its simplified toolkit broadens the applicability of deep learning models across various domains.

metadata.name: DeepLearning-500-questions
metadata.description: 深度学习500问，以问答形式对常用的概率知识、线性代数、机器学习、深度学习、计算机视觉等热点问题进行阐述，以帮助自己及有需要的读者。 全书分为18个章节，50余万字。由于水平有限，书中不妥之处恳请广大读者批评指正。   未完待续............ 如有意合作，联系scutjy2015@163.com                     版权所有，违权必究       Tan 2018.06

summary.zh: 《深度学习500问》通过问答形式深入探讨深度学习及相关领域的核心知识，涵盖概率论、线性代数、机器学习、计算机视觉等内容，适合研究人员、学生及面试官参考。全书系统性强，内容丰富，凝聚了众多专家的经验，旨在提升读者的实际应用能力与面试准备。适合各层次的学习者，尤其是希望补充知识的求职者。
summary.en: The '500 Questions on Deep Learning' book explores core knowledge in deep learning and related fields through a Q&A format, covering probability theory, linear algebra, machine learning, and computer vision. It is suitable for researchers, students, and interviewers. The book is comprehensive and rich in content, consolidating the expertise of many professionals, aiming to enhance readers' practical application skills and interview preparation. It is ideal for learners at all levels, especially job seekers looking to fill knowledge gaps.

metadata.name: soar
metadata.description: SQL Optimizer And Rewriter

summary.zh: SOAR（SQL Optimizer And Rewriter）是小米开发的自动化SQL优化与改写工具，支持跨平台使用，专注于MySQL语法的优化。其技术亮点包括启发式算法优化、复杂查询的多列索引优化、丰富的EXPLAIN信息解读及自定义规则改写，适合需要提升SQL性能的开发者和数据库管理员。
summary.en: SOAR (SQL Optimizer And Rewriter) is an automated SQL optimization and rewriting tool developed by Xiaomi. It supports cross-platform usage and focuses on optimizing MySQL syntax. Key features include heuristic algorithm optimization, multi-column index optimization for complex queries, detailed EXPLAIN information interpretation, and custom rule rewriting, making it ideal for developers and DBAs looking to enhance SQL performance.

metadata.name: fashop
metadata.description: php开源商城系统，基于swoole、easyswoole框架开发

summary.zh: FaShop 是一个基于 Swoole 和 EasySwoole 框架开发的 PHP 开源商城系统，旨在提供高效的电商解决方案。该系统支持自定义后台界面、订单管理、商品管理及多种商品分类，适合希望快速搭建电商平台的开发者。项目持续维护，欢迎社区参与，共同推动功能扩展与优化。
summary.en: FaShop is an open-source PHP e-commerce system developed on the Swoole and EasySwoole frameworks, aimed at providing an efficient e-commerce solution. The system supports customizable backend interfaces, order management, product management, and various product categories, making it suitable for developers looking to quickly set up an e-commerce platform. The project is actively maintained and welcomes community participation to enhance features and optimizations.

metadata.name: php-printer-demo
metadata.description: 基于php_printer扩展，实现PHP控制连接打印机。示例代码包括文字的打印、条码的打印、以及二维码打印的示例

summary.zh: 该项目基于php_printer扩展，提供了在PHP中控制打印机的示例代码，涵盖文字、条码和二维码的打印功能。适用于Windows系统，支持PHP 5.5及以下版本，展示了如何通过PHP实现打印机的直接控制，适合需要打印功能的应用场景。
summary.en: This project utilizes the php_printer extension to demonstrate how to control printers using PHP. It includes sample code for printing text, barcodes, and QR codes. Designed for Windows systems and compatible with PHP version 5.5 and below, it showcases direct printer control through PHP, making it suitable for applications requiring printing capabilities.

metadata.name: laravel-chartjs
metadata.description: Simple package to facilitate and automate the use of charts in Laravel 5.x using Chartjs v2 library

summary.zh: laravel-chartjs 是一个用于 Laravel 5.x 的简单包，旨在简化和自动化 Chart.js v2 图表的使用。尽管该库已被弃用，但它提供了一个便捷的接口来构建和配置图表，支持多种图表类型和自定义选项。用户可以通过流畅的接口设置图表名称、类型、大小、标签和数据集，支持 PHP 数组和原始 JSON 格式的选项配置。
summary.en: laravel-chartjs is a simple package designed to facilitate and automate the use of Chart.js v2 charts in Laravel 5.x. Although the library is deprecated, it offers a convenient interface for building and configuring charts, supporting various chart types and custom options. Users can set chart names, types, sizes, labels, and datasets through a fluent interface, supporting both PHP array and raw JSON format for option configurations.

metadata.name: laravel
metadata.description: Laravel 深入详解 —— 源代码解析，新手进阶指南

summary.zh: 该项目深入解析 Laravel 源代码，为新手提供系统的进阶指南。内容涵盖 HTTP 入口、服务提供者、依赖注入、事件机制等核心概念，帮助开发者理解 Laravel 的内部机制与架构设计，提升开发效率与代码质量。
summary.en: This project provides an in-depth analysis of Laravel's source code, serving as a comprehensive guide for beginners to advance their skills. It covers core concepts such as HTTP entry, service providers, dependency injection, and event mechanisms, helping developers understand Laravel's internal architecture and improve their coding efficiency and quality.

metadata.name: akaunting
metadata.description: Online Accounting Software

summary.zh: Akaunting 是一款为小型企业和自由职业者设计的在线会计软件，基于现代技术栈如 Laravel、VueJS 和 RESTful API 构建。其模块化结构允许用户和开发者通过应用商店扩展功能，提供灵活的会计管理解决方案，适合各种业务需求。
summary.en: Akaunting is an online accounting software designed for small businesses and freelancers, built with modern technologies such as Laravel, VueJS, and RESTful API. Its modular structure allows users and developers to extend functionalities through an app store, providing a flexible accounting management solution suitable for various business needs.

metadata.name: october
metadata.description: Self-hosted CMS platform based on the Laravel PHP Framework.

summary.zh: October CMS 是一个基于 Laravel PHP 框架的自托管内容管理系统，旨在简化开发工作流程。它解决了现有系统的复杂性，使开发者能够更轻松地构建网站。October CMS 提供了直观的安装和学习资源，支持插件扩展，适合希望快速搭建网站的开发者。
summary.en: October CMS is a self-hosted content management system built on the Laravel PHP framework, designed to simplify the development workflow. It addresses the complexities of existing systems, enabling developers to build websites more easily. October CMS offers intuitive installation and learning resources, supporting plugin extensions, making it ideal for developers looking to quickly set up websites.

summary.zh: getCurrentQQGroupList 是一个用于获取当前登录的QQ群信息及指定QQ群成员信息的工具。该项目采用面向对象的编程方式重写，提供了更清晰的结构和易于维护的代码。适合需要集成QQ群管理功能的开发者，能够有效提升群组信息的获取效率。
summary.en: getCurrentQQGroupList is a tool for retrieving information about currently logged-in QQ groups and specified group members. The project is rewritten in an object-oriented manner, providing a clearer structure and maintainable code. It is suitable for developers looking to integrate QQ group management features, enhancing the efficiency of group information retrieval.

metadata.name: python-spider
metadata.description: :rainbow:Python3网络爬虫实战：淘宝、京东、网易云、B站、12306、抖音、笔趣阁、漫画小说下载、音乐电影下载等

summary.zh: 该项目是一个基于Python3的网络爬虫实战教程，涵盖了多个热门网站的爬虫实现，包括淘宝、京东、网易云、B站等。项目提供了丰富的示例代码和工具，适合学习网络爬虫技术的开发者。用户可以通过本仓库掌握爬虫的基本原理和应用，提升数据抓取能力，特别适合对数据采集有需求的个人或团队。
summary.en: This project is a practical tutorial on web scraping using Python3, covering various popular websites such as Taobao, JD, NetEase Cloud, and Bilibili. It provides a wealth of example codes and tools, making it suitable for developers looking to learn web scraping techniques. Users can grasp the fundamentals and applications of scraping, enhancing their data collection capabilities, particularly beneficial for individuals or teams with data acquisition needs.

summary.zh: RESP.app 是一个为 Redis 提供的图形用户界面工具，旨在提升开发者在使用 Redis 时的体验和生产力。该项目与 Redis 合作，致力于为开发者提供最佳的支持，简化 Redis 数据库的管理和操作。其直观的界面和丰富的功能使得开发者能够更高效地进行数据管理和查询。
summary.en: RESP.app is a GUI tool for Redis aimed at enhancing the developer experience and productivity when working with Redis. The project collaborates with Redis to provide optimal support for developers, simplifying the management and operation of the Redis database. Its intuitive interface and rich features enable developers to manage and query data more efficiently.

metadata.name: flask-wtf
metadata.description: Simple integration of Flask and WTForms, including CSRF, file upload and Recaptcha integration.

summary.zh: Flask-WTF 是一个简化 Flask 与 WTForms 集成的库，支持 CSRF 保护、文件上传及 reCAPTCHA 功能。它为开发者提供了便捷的表单处理解决方案，适用于需要用户输入的 Web 应用场景，提升了安全性和用户体验。
summary.en: Flask-WTF is a library that simplifies the integration of Flask with WTForms, offering features like CSRF protection, file uploads, and reCAPTCHA support. It provides developers with an efficient form handling solution, ideal for web applications requiring user input, enhancing both security and user experience.

metadata.name: mongo-python-driver
metadata.description: PyMongo - the Official MongoDB Python driver

summary.zh: PyMongo是MongoDB官方的Python驱动，提供与MongoDB数据库的交互工具。它支持同步和异步API，兼容多个MongoDB版本（4.0至8.0），并实现了BSON格式和GridFS。PyMongo的设计遵循语义版本控制，适合需要高效数据库操作的Python开发者。
summary.en: PyMongo is the official MongoDB Python driver, offering tools for interacting with MongoDB databases. It supports both synchronous and asynchronous APIs, compatible with multiple MongoDB versions (4.0 to 8.0), and implements BSON format and GridFS. PyMongo follows semantic versioning, making it suitable for Python developers needing efficient database operations.

metadata.name: pierced
metadata.description: 钉钉内网穿透

summary.zh: 钉钉内网穿透工具提供了一种便捷的方式，帮助开发者在没有公网域名或IP的情况下进行开发测试。该工具支持HTTP和数据库的内网穿透，用户只需简单配置即可快速启动。尽管工具便于临时使用，但不适合正式环境，需使用真实公网IP或域名。推荐使用最新的Stream模式以确保安全合规。
summary.en: The DingTalk intranet penetration tool offers a convenient way for developers to conduct testing without a public domain or IP. It supports both HTTP and database tunneling, allowing users to quickly start with simple configurations. While the tool is useful for temporary use, it is not suitable for production environments, which require real public IPs or domains. The latest Stream mode is recommended for security compliance.

metadata.name: mysqlclient
metadata.description: MySQL/MariaDB connector for Python

summary.zh: mysqlclient 是一个为 Python 提供 MySQL/MariaDB 连接器的库，基于 MySQLdb1 的分支，支持 Python 3，并修复了多个已知问题。它适用于需要与 MySQL/MariaDB 数据库交互的 Python 应用程序，尤其是在多线程环境中提供了实验性的自由线程支持。该库的安装相对复杂，尤其是在 Windows 平台上，但提供了详细的安装指南。
summary.en: mysqlclient is a MySQL/MariaDB connector library for Python, forked from MySQLdb1, adding Python 3 support and fixing numerous bugs. It is suitable for Python applications that need to interact with MySQL/MariaDB databases, particularly offering experimental free threading support in multi-threaded environments. The installation can be complex, especially on Windows, but detailed installation instructions are provided.

metadata.name: react-transition-group
metadata.description: An easy way to perform animations when a React component enters or leaves the DOM

summary.zh: react-transition-group 是一个专为 React 组件设计的动画管理库，简化了组件进入和离开 DOM 时的动画效果。该库提供了一套组件，用于在组件状态变化时实现平滑的过渡效果，适用于需要动态展示内容的应用场景。其 TypeScript 支持和详细的文档使得开发者能够快速上手并集成到现有项目中。
summary.en: react-transition-group is an animation management library designed for React components, simplifying the animation effects when components enter and leave the DOM. It provides a set of components for smooth transitions during state changes, making it suitable for applications that require dynamic content display. Its TypeScript support and comprehensive documentation enable developers to quickly integrate it into existing projects.

metadata.name: sequel-pro-laravel-export
metadata.description: A Sequel Pro / Sequel Ace bundle to generate Laravel migration files from existing tables.

summary.zh: Sequel Pro 和 Sequel Ace 的 Laravel 迁移导出工具，能够从现有数据库表生成 Laravel 迁移文件。用户只需连接数据库，选择表格，即可通过简单的菜单操作导出迁移文件，方便快速集成到 Laravel 项目中。该工具适用于需要将现有数据库结构迁移至 Laravel 框架的开发者，提升了开发效率。
summary.en: A Laravel migration exporter for Sequel Pro and Sequel Ace that generates migration files from existing database tables. Users can easily connect to a database, select a table, and export migration files through a simple menu operation, facilitating quick integration into Laravel projects. This tool is ideal for developers looking to migrate existing database structures to the Laravel framework, enhancing development efficiency.

metadata.name: laravel-dompdf
metadata.description: A DOMPDF Wrapper for Laravel

summary.zh: laravel-dompdf 是一个为 Laravel 提供的 DOMPDF 封装，简化了 HTML 到 PDF 的转换过程。该库支持通过简单的 API 加载 HTML 内容并生成 PDF 文件，适用于发票、报告等多种应用场景。其配置灵活，支持自定义纸张大小和方向，便于开发者快速集成 PDF 生成功能。
summary.en: laravel-dompdf is a DOMPDF wrapper for Laravel that simplifies the process of converting HTML to PDF. This library allows developers to easily load HTML content and generate PDF files, suitable for various applications such as invoices and reports. Its flexible configuration supports custom paper sizes and orientations, making it easy for developers to integrate PDF generation functionality.

metadata.name: guzzle
metadata.description: Guzzle, an extensible PHP HTTP client

summary.zh: Guzzle 是一个可扩展的 PHP HTTP 客户端，简化了 HTTP 请求的发送和与网络服务的集成。它支持同步和异步请求，使用 PSR-7 接口实现与其他库的兼容性，并通过中间件系统增强客户端行为。Guzzle 适用于需要与 RESTful API 交互的应用程序，提供了便捷的接口来处理复杂的 HTTP 请求。
summary.en: Guzzle is an extensible PHP HTTP client that simplifies sending HTTP requests and integrating with web services. It supports both synchronous and asynchronous requests, utilizes PSR-7 interfaces for compatibility with other libraries, and enhances client behavior through a middleware system. Guzzle is suitable for applications that need to interact with RESTful APIs, providing an easy interface for handling complex HTTP requests.

metadata.name: elasticsearch-php
metadata.description: Official PHP client for Elasticsearch.

summary.zh: Elasticsearch PHP 客户端是与 Elasticsearch 服务器兼容的官方 PHP 客户端，提供 500 多个端点用于索引、搜索和管理文档。该客户端支持与当前维护的 PHP 版本兼容，确保用户能够高效地与 Elasticsearch 进行交互，适合构建搜索引擎和数据分析应用。
summary.en: The Elasticsearch PHP client is the official PHP client for Elasticsearch, offering over 500 endpoints for indexing, searching, and managing documents. This client is compatible with currently maintained PHP versions, ensuring efficient interaction with Elasticsearch, making it suitable for building search engines and data analysis applications.

metadata.name: elasticsearch-rtf
metadata.description: elasticsearch中文发行版，针对中文集成了相关插件，方便新手学习测试.
