summary.zh: Elasticsearch-RTF是针对中文用户的Elasticsearch发行版，集成了多种中文分词插件，旨在简化新手的学习与测试过程。用户无需繁琐的配置，直接下载即可使用，适合对Elasticsearch感兴趣的开发者和数据分析师。该版本基于最新的稳定版本5.1.1，提供了丰富的插件支持，帮助用户快速上手。
summary.en: Elasticsearch-RTF is a Chinese-focused distribution of Elasticsearch that integrates various Chinese segmentation plugins, simplifying the learning and testing process for beginners. Users can download and use it directly without complex configurations, making it suitable for developers and data analysts interested in Elasticsearch. This version is based on the latest stable release 5.1.1 and offers extensive plugin support for quick onboarding.

metadata.name: laravel-shop
metadata.description: Laravel 电商实战教程的项目代码

summary.zh: 该项目是一个基于Laravel框架的电商实战教程代码，旨在帮助开发者快速掌握电商网站的构建与开发。项目涵盖了Laravel的核心特性，如路由、依赖注入、数据库ORM等，适合希望深入学习Laravel及电商开发的开发者。
summary.en: This project is the code for an e-commerce practical tutorial based on the Laravel framework, aimed at helping developers quickly grasp the construction and development of e-commerce websites. It covers core features of Laravel such as routing, dependency injection, and database ORM, making it suitable for developers looking to deepen their understanding of Laravel and e-commerce development.

metadata.name: fook-note
metadata.description: 技术学习笔记

summary.zh: Fook Note 是一个专注于技术学习的笔记仓库，涵盖 Laravel、PHP、前端开发、工具使用等多个领域。通过结合官方文档与个人经验，提供实用的学习资源和操作指南，旨在帮助初学者快速掌握技术要点，提升开发效率。该项目不仅适合新手，也为有经验的开发者提供了丰富的参考资料。
summary.en: Fook Note is a repository dedicated to technical learning notes, covering various fields such as Laravel, PHP, front-end development, and tool usage. By combining official documentation with personal experiences, it offers practical learning resources and operational guides aimed at helping beginners quickly grasp key concepts and enhance development efficiency. This project is beneficial not only for novices but also provides rich reference materials for experienced developers.

metadata.name: laravel-visits
metadata.description: 📊 Laravel Visits is a counter that can be attached to any model to track its visits using Redis or Eloquent. (with tags, IP protection and caching)

summary.zh: Laravel Visits 是一个可以附加到任何模型的访问计数器，利用 Redis 或 Eloquent 跟踪访问量。它提供了 IP 保护、缓存列表等实用功能，适用于需要监控用户访问的 Laravel 应用场景，帮助开发者轻松实现访问统计与分析。
summary.en: Laravel Visits is a visit counter that can be attached to any model to track visits using Redis or Eloquent. It offers useful features like IP protection and caching lists, making it ideal for Laravel applications that require user visit monitoring, enabling developers to easily implement visit statistics and analysis.

metadata.name: id-validator
metadata.description: 中华人民共和国居民身份证、中华人民共和国港澳居民居住证以及中华人民共和国台湾居民居住证号码验证工具（PHP 版）

summary.zh: 该项目是一个用于验证中华人民共和国居民身份证、港澳居民居住证及台湾居民居住证号码的PHP工具，支持15位和18位号码的合法性检查。它不仅能验证身份证号的有效性，还能提取相关信息，如出生日期、性别和地址等。此外，项目还提供生成符合校验的假身份证号码的功能，适用于需要身份证信息验证的应用场景。
summary.en: This project is a PHP tool for validating the identification numbers of the People's Republic of China residents' ID cards, Hong Kong and Macau resident permits, and Taiwan resident permits, supporting both 15 and 18-digit formats. It not only checks the validity of ID numbers but also extracts related information such as birth date, gender, and address. Additionally, the project offers functionality to generate valid fake ID numbers, suitable for applications requiring ID information verification.

metadata.name: baum
metadata.description: Baum is an implementation of the Nested Set pattern for Laravel's Eloquent ORM.

summary.zh: Baum 是一个为 Laravel 的 Eloquent ORM 实现嵌套集模式的库。它允许高效地查询有序树结构，适用于菜单、商业分类等场景。通过复杂的 SQL 操作，Baum 使得插入、移动和删除节点变得简单，极大地提升了树形数据的处理效率。该库适用于 Laravel 5 及以上版本，提供了快速获取节点及其子节点的能力。
summary.en: Baum is a library that implements the Nested Set pattern for Laravel's Eloquent ORM. It enables efficient querying of ordered tree structures, suitable for menus, commercial categories, and more. By handling complex SQL operations, Baum simplifies the insertion, movement, and deletion of nodes, significantly enhancing the efficiency of tree data management. This library is compatible with Laravel 5 and above, providing quick access to nodes and their descendants.

metadata.name: aliyun-oss-storage
metadata.description: 阿里云OSS laravel storage Filesystem adapter

summary.zh: 该项目是一个阿里云OSS的Laravel存储文件系统适配器，旨在让开发者能够像使用Laravel Storage一样方便地使用阿里云OSS。它基于原版的Aliyun-oss-storage进行了优化，支持Laravel 5及以上版本，并提供了丰富的接口和功能，适合需要云存储解决方案的Laravel应用。
summary.en: This project is an Aliyun OSS storage filesystem adapter for Laravel, designed to allow developers to use Aliyun OSS as easily as Laravel Storage. It is optimized based on the original Aliyun-oss-storage, supports Laravel 5 and above, and provides a rich set of interfaces and features, making it suitable for Laravel applications that require cloud storage solutions.

metadata.name: laratrust
metadata.description: Handle roles and permissions in your Laravel application

summary.zh: Laratrust 是一个专为 Laravel 应用设计的角色与权限管理包，支持多用户模型、角色与权限的灵活分配及验证。它提供了缓存机制、事件管理、团队角色支持及简单的管理面板，极大地简化了权限控制的复杂性，适用于需要细粒度权限管理的应用场景。
summary.en: Laratrust is a role and permission management package designed for Laravel applications, supporting multiple user models and flexible assignment and verification of roles and permissions. It features caching mechanisms, event management, team role support, and a simple administration panel, greatly simplifying the complexity of permission control for applications requiring fine-grained access management.

metadata.name: socialite
metadata.description: Socialite is an OAuth2 Authentication tool. It is inspired by laravel/socialite, you can easily use it without Laravel.

summary.zh: Socialite 是一个灵活的 OAuth2 认证工具，支持多达 20 个社交平台的认证，包括 Facebook、Google 和微信等。它的设计灵感来源于 laravel/socialite，但可以在任何 PHP 项目中轻松使用。用户只需配置平台信息，即可快速实现用户认证和信息获取，适合需要集成多种社交登录的应用场景。
summary.en: Socialite is a flexible OAuth2 authentication tool that supports authentication from up to 20 social platforms, including Facebook, Google, and WeChat. Inspired by laravel/socialite, it can be easily used in any PHP project. Users only need to configure platform information to quickly implement user authentication and information retrieval, making it suitable for applications requiring integration of multiple social logins.

metadata.name: image
metadata.description: PHP Image Processing

summary.zh: Intervention Image 是一个 PHP 图像处理库，提供简单而富有表现力的方式来创建、编辑和合成图像。它支持 GD 和 Imagick 两种流行的图像处理扩展，具有可互换的驱动架构，适用于动画图像，并且与各种框架兼容。该库遵循 PSR-12 标准，适合需要图像处理的 PHP 开发者。
summary.en: Intervention Image is a PHP image processing library that offers a simple and expressive way to create, edit, and compose images. It supports two popular image manipulation extensions, GD and Imagick, featuring an interchangeable driver architecture, support for animated images, and framework-agnostic compatibility. This library adheres to PSR-12 standards, making it ideal for PHP developers needing image processing capabilities.

metadata.name: simple-qrcode
metadata.description: An easy-to-use PHP QrCode generator with first-party support for Laravel.

summary.zh: Simple QrCode 是一个易于使用的 PHP 二维码生成器，专为 Laravel 框架提供原生支持。该库基于 BaconQrCode 的优秀工作，提供了一个熟悉且易于安装的接口，适合 Laravel 用户。它的应用场景包括在线票务平台等，能够快速生成高质量的二维码，方便用户使用。
summary.en: Simple QrCode is an easy-to-use PHP QR code generator with first-party support for the Laravel framework. Built on the excellent work of BaconQrCode, it offers a familiar and easy-to-install interface for Laravel users. Use cases include online ticketing platforms, enabling quick generation of high-quality QR codes for user convenience.

metadata.name: Laravel-Excel
metadata.description: 🚀 Supercharged Excel exports and imports in Laravel

summary.zh: Laravel-Excel 是一个为 Laravel 提供的强大 Excel 导入导出工具，基于 PhpSpreadsheet 封装而成。它支持将集合轻松导出为 Excel 或 CSV 文件，并具备自动分块导出和导入功能，适合处理大数据集。用户可以自定义 Blade 视图导出，提升了数据处理的灵活性与性能，适用于需要频繁进行数据交换的 Laravel 应用场景。
summary.en: Laravel-Excel is a powerful Excel import/export tool for Laravel, built as a wrapper around PhpSpreadsheet. It allows easy export of collections to Excel or CSV, with features like automatic chunking for better performance, making it suitable for large datasets. Users can customize Blade views for exports, enhancing flexibility and efficiency in data handling, ideal for Laravel applications requiring frequent data exchange.

metadata.name: easy-sms
metadata.description: 📲 一款多渠道的短信发送轮子

summary.zh: Easy SMS 是一款多渠道短信发送组件，支持多家服务商，提供统一的接口和灵活的配置方式。用户可以通过简单的配置，快速增减服务商，并支持自定义轮询策略，确保短信发送的高可用性。适用于需要短信通知的应用场景，如验证码、通知等，极大简化了短信发送的复杂性。
summary.en: Easy SMS is a multi-channel SMS sending component that supports various service providers, offering a unified interface and flexible configuration options. Users can quickly add or remove providers through simple settings and customize polling strategies to ensure high availability of SMS delivery. It is ideal for applications requiring SMS notifications, such as verification codes and alerts, greatly simplifying the complexity of SMS sending.

metadata.name: horizon
metadata.description: Dashboard and code-driven configuration for Laravel queues.

summary.zh: Laravel Horizon 是一个为 Laravel 提供美观仪表盘和代码驱动配置的工具，专注于监控 Redis 队列的关键指标，如作业吞吐量、运行时间和作业失败。所有工作者配置存储在一个简单的配置文件中，便于团队协作和版本控制，提升了队列管理的效率和可视化体验。
summary.en: Laravel Horizon is a tool that provides a beautiful dashboard and code-driven configuration for Laravel, focusing on monitoring key metrics of Redis queues such as job throughput, runtime, and job failures. All worker configurations are stored in a single, simple configuration file, facilitating team collaboration and version control, enhancing the efficiency and visualization of queue management.

metadata.name: passport
metadata.description: Laravel Passport provides OAuth2 server support to Laravel.

summary.zh: Laravel Passport 是一个为 Laravel 提供 OAuth2 服务器支持的 API 认证包，旨在简化和优化开发者的认证流程。它适用于需要安全 API 认证的应用场景，能够轻松集成并提供强大的功能，提升开发效率与安全性。
summary.en: Laravel Passport is an API authentication package that provides OAuth2 server support for Laravel, designed to simplify and enhance the authentication process for developers. It is suitable for applications requiring secure API authentication, offering easy integration and robust features to improve development efficiency and security.

metadata.name: git
metadata.description: Git Source Code Mirror - This is a publish-only repository but pull requests can be turned into patches to the mailing list via GitGitGadget (https://gitgitgadget.github.io/). Please follow Documentation/SubmittingPatches procedure for any of your improvements.

summary.zh: Git是一个快速、可扩展的分布式版本控制系统，提供丰富的命令集，支持高层次操作和内部访问。作为一个开源项目，Git支持多种许可证，最初由Linus Torvalds开发。用户可以通过邮件列表参与讨论和提交补丁，适合需要高效版本管理的开发团队和个人。
summary.en: Git is a fast, scalable, distributed revision control system that offers a rich command set for high-level operations and full access to internals. As an open-source project originally developed by Linus Torvalds, Git supports multiple licenses. Users can engage in discussions and submit patches via mailing lists, making it ideal for development teams and individuals needing efficient version management.

metadata.name: uri
metadata.description: [READ-ONLY] URI manipulation Library

summary.zh: 该库提供了简单直观的类，用于在 PHP 中管理 URI，适用于需要处理复杂 URI 的应用场景。它支持 IDN 主机和 IPv4 转换，并依赖于 PSR-7 标准，确保与其他 PHP 组件的兼容性。适合开发者在构建 Web 应用时使用，提升 URI 处理的效率和准确性。
summary.en: This library offers simple and intuitive classes for managing URIs in PHP, suitable for applications that require handling complex URIs. It supports IDN hosts and IPv4 conversion, relying on the PSR-7 standard to ensure compatibility with other PHP components. Ideal for developers building web applications, enhancing the efficiency and accuracy of URI handling.

metadata.name: monday-shop
metadata.description: 网上在线商城、综合网上购物平台

summary.zh: monday-shop 是一个功能全面的在线商城系统，支持多种支付方式和秒杀活动，采用 Redis 缓存优化性能，确保高并发下的稳定性。项目集成了积分、优惠券、物流管理等功能，适合希望快速搭建电商平台的开发者。其响应式设计确保在各种设备上均有良好体验。
summary.en: monday-shop is a comprehensive online shopping system that supports various payment methods and flash sales, utilizing Redis caching to optimize performance and ensure stability under high concurrency. The project integrates features like points, coupons, and logistics management, making it suitable for developers looking to quickly set up an e-commerce platform. Its responsive design ensures a good experience across various devices.

metadata.name: laravel-nestedset
metadata.description: Effective tree structures in Laravel 4-8

summary.zh: laravel-nestedset 是一个 Laravel 包，旨在高效地处理关系数据库中的树形结构，支持 Laravel 4 至 12 的多个版本。该包采用嵌套集模型，适合于构建多层次菜单或分类，特别适合于树形数据更新较少的场景。其主要特点包括节点的插入、检索和删除功能，以及对节点关系的全面支持，确保高效的层次查询和操作。
summary.en: laravel-nestedset is a Laravel package designed for efficiently handling tree structures in relational databases, supporting multiple versions from Laravel 4 to 12. Utilizing the Nested Set Model, it is ideal for building multi-level menus or categories, particularly in scenarios where tree data is updated infrequently. Key features include node insertion, retrieval, and deletion, along with comprehensive support for node relationships, ensuring efficient hierarchical queries and operations.

metadata.name: jwt-auth
metadata.description: 🔐 JSON Web Token Authentication for Laravel & Lumen

summary.zh: jwt-auth 是一个为 Laravel 和 Lumen 提供 JSON Web Token 认证的库，旨在简化用户身份验证过程。它支持多种认证方式，具有良好的安全性和灵活性，适用于需要用户认证的 Web 应用程序。该库的文档详尽，易于集成，适合开发者快速实现安全的 API 认证。
summary.en: jwt-auth is a library that provides JSON Web Token authentication for Laravel and Lumen, aimed at simplifying user authentication processes. It supports various authentication methods with strong security and flexibility, suitable for web applications requiring user authentication. The comprehensive documentation makes it easy for developers to quickly implement secure API authentication.

metadata.name: laravel-excel-zip
metadata.description: download excels wrap in zip

summary.zh: laravel-excel-zip 是一个高效的解决方案，专为需要下载大型 Excel 文件的 Laravel 应用设计。它允许用户将 Excel 文件打包成 ZIP 格式，并支持按需分块下载，极大提升了下载体验和性能，尤其适合处理大量数据的场景。
summary.en: laravel-excel-zip is an efficient solution designed for Laravel applications that need to download large Excel files. It allows users to package Excel files into ZIP format and supports on-demand chunked downloads, significantly enhancing the download experience and performance, especially suitable for scenarios dealing with large datasets.

metadata.name: chinese-xinhua
metadata.description: :orange_book: 中华新华字典数据库。包括歇后语，成语，词语，汉字。

summary.zh: 中华新华字典数据库提供了丰富的中文语言资源，包括成语、汉字、词语和歇后语等，适用于语言学习、自然语言处理和文化研究等场景。该项目包含超过26万条词汇数据，方便开发者和研究者使用，具有良好的数据结构和API设计，便于集成和扩展。
summary.en: The Chinese Xinhua Dictionary Database offers a wealth of Chinese language resources, including idioms, characters, words, and riddles, suitable for language learning, natural language processing, and cultural research. With over 260,000 vocabulary entries, it provides developers and researchers with a well-structured data set and API design for easy integration and expansion.

metadata.name: laravel-log
metadata.description: Simple API to write logs for Laravel.

summary.zh: Laravel Log 是一个简单的 API，用于在 Laravel 应用中记录日志。它支持灵活的日志配置，包括日志路径、级别、标题和文件名等，适用于 Laravel 5.5 及以上版本。通过 Composer 安装后，用户可以快速配置并使用该包，方便开发者在应用中高效管理日志记录，提升调试和监控能力。
summary.en: Laravel Log is a simple API for logging in Laravel applications. It offers flexible log configuration options, including log path, level, title, and filename, suitable for Laravel 5.5 and above. After installation via Composer, users can quickly configure and utilize the package, enabling efficient log management for developers, enhancing debugging and monitoring capabilities.

metadata.name: flysystem-qcloud-cos-v5
metadata.description: 💾 Flysystem Adapter for Tencent Cloud COS V5

summary.zh: flysystem-qcloud-cos-v5 是一个针对腾讯云对象存储的 Flysystem 适配器，支持 Laravel 和 Lumen 框架。该项目提供了简单的 API 接口，便于开发者在 PHP 应用中集成腾讯云 COS 存储，支持文件的读写、更新、重命名和删除等操作，极大提升了云存储的使用效率和便捷性。
summary.en: flysystem-qcloud-cos-v5 is a Flysystem adapter for Tencent Cloud Object Storage, supporting Laravel and Lumen frameworks. This project provides a simple API for developers to integrate Tencent Cloud COS storage into PHP applications, supporting operations like file read, write, update, rename, and delete, significantly enhancing the efficiency and convenience of cloud storage usage.

metadata.name: Aliyun-oss-storage
metadata.description: 阿里云OSS laravel storage Filesystem adapter, 打造Laravel最好的OSS Storage扩展.

summary.zh: Aliyun-oss-storage是一个为Laravel 5及以上版本设计的阿里云OSS文件存储适配器，允许开发者像使用Laravel Storage一样轻松使用阿里云OSS。该扩展借鉴了优秀的代码并进行了优化，支持多种配置选项，旨在提供更好的OSS存储体验，适合需要高效文件存储的Laravel应用。
summary.en: Aliyun-oss-storage is an Aliyun OSS filesystem storage adapter designed for Laravel 5 and above, allowing developers to use Aliyun OSS just like Laravel Storage. This extension incorporates excellent code and optimizations, supporting various configuration options, aiming to enhance the OSS storage experience, suitable for Laravel applications requiring efficient file storage.

metadata.name: laravel-qcloud-cos
metadata.description: laravel-qcloud-cos

summary.zh: laravel-qcloud-cos 是一个为 Laravel 提供的腾讯云 V4 对象存储的 Composer 包，支持 Laravel 5 及以上版本。该包简化了与腾讯云 COS 的交互，提供了文件上传、目录管理等功能，适用于需要云存储解决方案的 Laravel 应用。其技术亮点包括自动判断文件大小进行上传和灵活的目录操作，帮助开发者高效管理云端资源。
summary.en: laravel-qcloud-cos is a Composer package for Tencent Cloud V4 Object Storage, designed for Laravel 5 and above. It simplifies interactions with Tencent Cloud COS, offering functionalities like file uploads and directory management, making it suitable for Laravel applications requiring cloud storage solutions. Key features include automatic file size detection for uploads and flexible directory operations, enabling developers to efficiently manage cloud resources.

metadata.name: laravel-geoip
metadata.description: Determine the geographical location of website visitors based on their IP addresses.

summary.zh: laravel-geoip 是一个用于 Laravel 框架的地理位置识别工具，能够根据用户的 IP 地址确定其地理位置和货币信息。该工具特别适用于需要根据用户位置提供个性化内容或服务的网站。其技术亮点在于简洁的集成方式和对多种地理数据源的支持，使得开发者能够快速实现地理定位功能。
summary.en: laravel-geoip is a geographical location detection tool for the Laravel framework, capable of determining users' geographical locations and currency information based on their IP addresses. This tool is particularly useful for websites that need to provide personalized content or services based on user location. Its technical highlights include a simple integration method and support for multiple geographical data sources, enabling developers to quickly implement geolocation features.

metadata.name: ip-location-zh
metadata.description: 获取 IP 地址的真实地理位置

summary.zh: Ip Location Zh 是一个简单易用的 PHP 库，旨在通过 IP 地址获取其真实地理位置。该库不需要配置数据库，使用 Composer 进行安装，适合预算有限的开发者。尽管提供的位置信息主要集中在中国，但也支持国外地址查询。该工具的核心价值在于其简洁性和高效性，适合快速集成到项目中。
summary.en: Ip Location Zh is a user-friendly PHP library designed to retrieve the real geographical location of an IP address. It requires no database configuration and is installed via Composer, making it ideal for budget-conscious developers. While the location data primarily focuses on China, it also supports foreign address queries. The core value of this tool lies in its simplicity and efficiency, making it suitable for quick integration into projects.

metadata.name: pay
metadata.description: 可能是我用过的最优雅的 Alipay/WeChat/Douyin/Unipay/江苏银行 的支付 SDK 扩展包了

summary.zh: yansongda/pay 是一个优雅的支付 SDK 扩展包，支持支付宝、微信、抖音、银联及江苏银行等多种支付方式。其设计注重扩展性和易用性，提供多租户支持、灵活的插件机制和清晰的文件结构，极大简化了支付集成的复杂性。符合多项 PSR 标准，适合与各种框架集成，适合开发者快速构建支付解决方案。
summary.en: yansongda/pay is an elegant payment SDK extension package that supports multiple payment methods including Alipay, WeChat, Douyin, UnionPay, and Jiangsu Bank. Its design emphasizes extensibility and usability, offering multi-tenant support, a flexible plugin mechanism, and a clear file structure, significantly simplifying payment integration complexity. Compliant with multiple PSR standards, it is suitable for developers to quickly build payment solutions.

metadata.name: AliyunOSS
metadata.description: 阿里云 OSS 官方 SDK 的 Composer 封装，支持任何 PHP 项目，包括 Laravel、Symfony、TinyLara 等等。

summary.zh: AliyunOSS 是阿里云 OSS 官方 SDK 的 Composer 封装，旨在为 PHP 项目提供便捷的云存储解决方案。该库支持多种框架，如 Laravel 和 Symfony，简化了文件上传、下载及管理操作。通过优化的 API 设计，用户可以轻松集成 OSS 功能，提升开发效率。
summary.en: AliyunOSS is a Composer wrapper for the official Alibaba Cloud OSS SDK, designed to provide a convenient cloud storage solution for PHP projects. This library supports various frameworks like Laravel and Symfony, simplifying file upload, download, and management operations. With an optimized API design, users can easily integrate OSS functionalities, enhancing development efficiency.

metadata.name: laravel-validator
metadata.description: Laravel Validation Service

summary.zh: Laravel Validator 是一个专为 Laravel 框架设计的验证服务，提供灵活的验证规则定义和自定义错误消息功能。开发者可以轻松创建和管理数据验证逻辑，确保输入数据的有效性，适用于各种表单提交场景。其核心亮点在于支持创建和更新规则的灵活配置，提升了开发效率和代码可维护性。
summary.en: Laravel Validator is a validation service designed specifically for the Laravel framework, offering flexible rule definitions and custom error messaging capabilities. Developers can easily create and manage data validation logic to ensure the validity of input data, suitable for various form submission scenarios. Its key highlight is the flexible configuration of create and update rules, enhancing development efficiency and code maintainability.

metadata.name: AetherUpload-Laravel
metadata.description: A Laravel package to upload large files  上传大文件的Laravel扩展包

summary.zh: AetherUpload-Laravel 是一个专为 Laravel 框架设计的大文件上传扩展包，支持分块上传、断线续传、秒传和分布式部署等功能。其无感知化设计使得开发者无需关注上传流程，极大地简化了大文件上传的实现，提升了用户体验。该包适用于需要处理大文件上传的应用场景，尤其在内存和带宽受限的环境中表现优异。
summary.en: AetherUpload-Laravel is a Laravel package designed for uploading large files, featuring chunked uploads, resumable uploads, instant uploads, and distributed deployment. Its seamless design allows developers to focus on business logic without worrying about the upload process, significantly simplifying the implementation of large file uploads and enhancing user experience. This package is ideal for applications that need to handle large file uploads, especially in memory and bandwidth-constrained environments.

metadata.name: swoole-src
metadata.description: 🚀 Coroutine-based concurrency library for PHP

summary.zh: Swoole 是一个基于协程的高性能 PHP 并发库，采用事件驱动和异步编程模型，极大地提升了 PHP 的并发处理能力。它适用于构建高性能的网络服务和实时应用，如 HTTP 服务器和 WebSocket 服务。Swoole 的核心亮点在于其高效的协程调度和对阻塞 I/O 的支持，使得开发者能够轻松实现并发任务。
summary.en: Swoole is a high-performance concurrency library for PHP, based on coroutines and employing an event-driven, asynchronous programming model that significantly enhances PHP's concurrency capabilities. It is ideal for building high-performance network services and real-time applications, such as HTTP servers and WebSocket services. The key features of Swoole include efficient coroutine scheduling and support for blocking I/O, enabling developers to easily implement concurrent tasks.

metadata.name: laravel-permission
metadata.description: Associate users with roles and permissions

summary.zh: Spatie 的 Laravel 权限包允许开发者在数据库中管理用户的角色和权限。通过简单的 API，用户可以轻松地分配和检查权限，确保灵活的访问控制。该包与 Laravel 的授权系统无缝集成，适用于需要精细化权限管理的应用场景，如内容管理系统和企业级应用。
summary.en: Spatie's Laravel Permission package enables developers to manage user roles and permissions in a database. With a simple API, users can easily assign and check permissions, ensuring flexible access control. The package integrates seamlessly with Laravel's authorization system, making it suitable for applications requiring fine-grained permission management, such as content management systems and enterprise applications.

metadata.name: laravel-middleware-cache-response
metadata.description: Laravel cache response middleware

summary.zh: 该Laravel中间件提供了响应缓存功能，支持缓存渲染后的数据并允许用户指定缓存过期时间，默认设置为10分钟。通过在HTTP头中输出缓存命中状态、缓存Key及过期时间，开发者可以轻松监控缓存效果。适用于需要提高响应速度和减少服务器负担的Web应用场景。
summary.en: This Laravel middleware offers response caching capabilities, allowing users to cache rendered data and specify an expiration time, defaulting to 10 minutes. By outputting cache hit status, cache key, and expiration time in HTTP headers, developers can easily monitor caching effectiveness. It is suitable for web applications that require improved response speed and reduced server load.

metadata.name: apicaptcha
metadata.description: php gd2 captcha for api;专属API接口开发使用的图形验证码，基于PHP的GD2扩展

summary.zh: apicaptcha 是一个基于 PHP GD2 扩展的图形验证码解决方案，专为 API 接口开发设计。它提供了简单易用的接口，能够有效防止恶意请求，提升 API 的安全性与可靠性，适用于需要身份验证的应用场景。
summary.en: apicaptcha is a graphical captcha solution based on PHP GD2 extension, specifically designed for API development. It offers an easy-to-use interface that effectively prevents malicious requests, enhancing the security and reliability of APIs, making it suitable for applications requiring authentication.

metadata.name: laravel-ide-helper
metadata.description: IDE Helper for Laravel

summary.zh: Laravel IDE Helper 是一个为 Laravel 项目生成 PHPDoc 的工具，旨在提高 IDE 的自动补全能力。通过自动生成的帮助文件，开发者可以获得准确的代码提示，提升开发效率。该工具支持 Laravel 10 及以上版本，适用于需要高效开发的 Laravel 应用场景。
summary.en: Laravel IDE Helper is a tool that generates PHPDocs for Laravel projects, enhancing IDE autocompletion capabilities. By creating automatically generated helper files, developers receive accurate code suggestions, boosting development efficiency. This tool supports Laravel 10 and later, making it ideal for efficient development in Laravel applications.

metadata.name: ThinkPHP5-alipay
metadata.description: ThinkPHP5 支付宝支付扩展库， 包括手机网站支付、电脑网站支付、支付查询、退款、退款查询、对账单等

summary.zh: ThinkPHP5 支付宝支付扩展库提供了全面的支付功能，包括手机和电脑网站支付、交易查询、退款及对账单下载等。该库通过简单的配置和调用，帮助开发者快速集成支付宝支付，支持异常处理和业务定制，适用于电商平台及各类在线支付场景。
summary.en: The ThinkPHP5 Alipay payment extension library offers comprehensive payment functionalities, including mobile and desktop website payments, transaction queries, refunds, and bill downloads. With simple configuration and calls, it enables developers to quickly integrate Alipay payments, supporting exception handling and business customization, suitable for e-commerce platforms and various online payment scenarios.

metadata.name: ThinkPHP5-wxpay
metadata.description: https://github.com/dream2023/ThinkPHP5-wxpay.git

summary.zh: ThinkPHP5-wxpay 是一个微信支付扩展库，旨在为使用 ThinkPHP5 框架的开发者提供便捷的微信支付解决方案。该库支持扫码支付、小程序支付、公众号支付和H5支付等多种支付方式，并提供退款及订单查询功能。通过简单的配置和调用，开发者可以快速集成微信支付功能，提升应用的支付体验。
summary.en: ThinkPHP5-wxpay is a WeChat payment extension library designed to provide a convenient payment solution for developers using the ThinkPHP5 framework. This library supports various payment methods including QR code payment, mini-program payment, public account payment, and H5 payment, along with refund and order query functionalities. With simple configuration and calls, developers can quickly integrate WeChat payment features to enhance the payment experience of their applications.

metadata.name: l5-repository
metadata.description: Laravel 5 - Repositories to abstract the database layer

summary.zh: Laravel 5 Repositories 是一个用于抽象数据层的库，使应用程序更具灵活性和可维护性。通过实现仓库模式，开发者可以更轻松地管理数据访问逻辑，支持多种查询和缓存策略，适用于需要高效数据处理的 Laravel 应用程序。
summary.en: Laravel 5 Repositories is a library designed to abstract the data layer, enhancing the flexibility and maintainability of applications. By implementing the repository pattern, developers can manage data access logic more easily, supporting various query and caching strategies, making it suitable for Laravel applications requiring efficient data handling.

metadata.name: simple-cache
metadata.description: An easy to use Caching trait for Laravel's Eloquent Models.

summary.zh: Simple Cache 是一个为 Laravel 的 Eloquent 模型提供简单易用的缓存特性。通过将 Cacheable 特性添加到模型中，开发者可以轻松实现数据缓存，默认缓存时间为 30 分钟，并支持自定义缓存时长和存储方式。该库还提供缓存失效机制，确保数据一致性，适合需要高效数据读取的应用场景。
summary.en: Simple Cache is an easy-to-use caching trait for Laravel's Eloquent models. By adding the Cacheable trait to a model, developers can effortlessly implement data caching with a default duration of 30 minutes, while also allowing customization of cache length and storage. The library includes cache busting mechanisms to ensure data consistency, making it ideal for applications requiring efficient data retrieval.

metadata.name: curl
metadata.description: Custom PHP curl library for the Laravel 5 framework - developed by Ixudra

summary.zh: ixudra/curl 是一个为 Laravel 5 框架开发的自定义 PHP cURL 库，提供了简洁流畅的接口，使得在 PHP 应用中发送 cURL 请求变得更加容易。该库支持框架独立使用，并提供了 Laravel 服务提供者，便于集成。其直观的配置方式和多种实用方法，使得代码更易于理解和维护，适合需要频繁进行 HTTP 请求的开发场景。
summary.en: ixudra/curl is a custom PHP cURL library developed for the Laravel 5 framework, offering a simple and fluent interface for sending cURL requests in PHP applications. The library is framework-independent and includes a Laravel service provider for easy integration. Its intuitive configuration and various utility methods enhance code readability and maintainability, making it ideal for scenarios requiring frequent HTTP requests.

metadata.name: laravel-boilerplate
metadata.description: The Laravel Boilerplate Project - https://laravel-boilerplate.com

summary.zh: Laravel Boilerplate 项目为开发者提供了一个强大的起点，适用于各种规模的 web 应用程序。它内置了多种功能，包括基于 CoreUI 的后台管理、Spatie/Permission 授权、Bootstrap 4 前端框架、双因素认证、用户/角色管理等。此外，还支持多语言、时区以及用户模拟等功能，极大地提升了开发效率和用户体验。
summary.en: The Laravel Boilerplate project offers developers a robust starting point for web applications of any size. It comes with built-in features like a CoreUI-based backend, Spatie/Permission authorization, Bootstrap 4 frontend, Two Factor Authentication, user/role management, and more. Additionally, it supports multilingual capabilities, timezone adjustments, and user impersonation, significantly enhancing development efficiency and user experience.

metadata.name: react-iztro
metadata.description: ⭐基于 iztro 实现的react组件，用于生成一张紫微斗数星盘，并集成了强大的 AI 解读功能。  react component of iztro used to generate an astrolabe of Zi Wei Dou Shu, now with powerful AI interpretation capabilities.

summary.zh: react-iztro 是一个基于 iztro 的 React 组件，专注于生成紫微斗数星盘，并集成了强大的 AI 解读功能。该组件支持智能命盘分析、多维度解读和流式响应体验，用户可自定义 DeepSeek API Key，确保数据安全。适合需要紫微斗数分析的用户，提供便捷的集成和使用体验。
summary.en: react-iztro is a React component based on iztro, designed to generate Zi Wei Dou Shu astrolabes with integrated powerful AI interpretation capabilities. It supports intelligent chart analysis, multi-dimensional interpretations, and streaming response experiences. Users can customize their DeepSeek API Key for data security, making it suitable for those in need of Zi Wei Dou Shu analysis with an easy integration and usage experience.

metadata.name: XiaohongshuSkills
metadata.description: 支持小红书自动发布、自动评论、自动检索的 Skill。支持 OpenClaw、Codex、CC 等

summary.zh: XiaohongshuSkills 是一个命令行工具，支持小红书内容的自动发布、评论和检索。它通过 Chrome DevTools Protocol 实现多账号管理、无头模式运行和内容数据抓取等功能，适合内容创作者和营销人员使用。该工具能够自动填写标题、正文、上传图片，并支持话题标签的自动写入，极大提高了小红书内容管理的效率。
summary.en: XiaohongshuSkills is a command-line tool for automating content publishing, commenting, and retrieval on Xiaohongshu. Utilizing the Chrome DevTools Protocol, it supports multi-account management, headless operation, and content data scraping, making it ideal for content creators and marketers. The tool automates title and body filling, image uploads, and hashtag insertion, significantly enhancing content management efficiency on Xiaohongshu.

metadata.name: CoPaw
metadata.description: Your Personal AI Assistant; easy to install, deploy on your own machine or on the cloud; supports multiple chat apps with easily extensible capabilities.

summary.zh: CoPaw 是一款个人 AI 助手，支持在本地或云端轻松部署，兼容多种聊天应用。其核心亮点包括全面的渠道支持、用户控制的个性化记忆、内置技能和自定义扩展能力，适用于社交、生产力等多种场景，帮助用户高效管理信息和任务。
summary.en: CoPaw is a personal AI assistant that can be easily deployed on local machines or in the cloud, supporting multiple chat applications. Its core features include comprehensive channel support, user-controlled memory personalization, built-in skills, and customizable extensions, making it suitable for various use cases such as social engagement and productivity management.

metadata.name: wechat-decrypt
metadata.description: WeChat 4.0 database decryptor - extract keys from memory, decrypt SQLCipher 4 databases, real-time message monitor

summary.zh: 微信4.0数据库解密工具，能够从运行中的微信进程内存中提取加密密钥，解密SQLCipher 4加密数据库，并提供实时消息监控功能。该工具支持Windows系统，使用Python编写，能够高效处理微信数据库，支持图片消息的内联预览，适合需要访问和分析微信数据的开发者和安全研究人员。
summary.en: WeChat 4.0 Database Decryptor extracts encryption keys from the memory of running WeChat processes, decrypts SQLCipher 4 encrypted databases, and provides real-time message monitoring. This tool, designed for Windows and implemented in Python, efficiently handles WeChat databases and supports inline preview of image messages, making it suitable for developers and security researchers needing access to and analysis of WeChat data.

metadata.name: golutra
metadata.description: Multi-agent AI orchestration platform for automation, workflows, and developer tools. Golutra transforms Codex, Claude Code, and OpenClaw into a unified agent system with parallel execution, task orchestration, long-running workflows, and AI productivity workspace.

summary.zh: golutra 是一个下一代多智能体工作空间，将现有的命令行工具转变为统一的 AI 协作中心。它支持无限的多智能体并行执行，自动化编排，从分析到部署，无需项目迁移或命令重学。golutra 兼容多种 CLI 工具，结合可视化界面与命令行的强大功能，提升工作效率，适用于 Windows 和 macOS 平台。
summary.en: golutra is a next-generation multi-agent workspace that transforms existing CLI tools into a unified AI collaboration hub. It supports unlimited multi-agent parallel execution and automated orchestration from analysis to deployment, without project migration or command relearning. golutra is compatible with various CLI tools, combining a visual interface with command-line power to enhance productivity, available on Windows and macOS.

metadata.name: PhoneDriver
metadata.description: Android Phone Control With Qwen3-VL

summary.zh: PhoneDriver 是一个基于 Python 的移动自动化代理，利用 Qwen3-VL 视觉语言模型，通过视觉分析和 ADB 命令与 Android 设备交互。其核心功能包括自然语言任务描述、实时反馈和内置的 Gradio 界面，适用于需要自动化操作的场景，如应用启动、设置调整等，极大提升了用户的操作效率。
summary.en: PhoneDriver is a Python-based mobile automation agent that leverages Qwen3-VL vision-language models to interact with Android devices through visual analysis and ADB commands. Key features include natural language task descriptions, real-time feedback, and a built-in Gradio interface, making it ideal for automating tasks like app launches and settings adjustments, significantly enhancing user efficiency.

metadata.name: gemini-watermark-remover
metadata.description: A high-performance, 100% client-side tool for removing Gemini AI watermarks. Built with pure JavaScript, it leverages a mathematically precise Reverse Alpha Blending algorithm rather than unpredictable AI inpainting. Tired of Gemini Watermark? GPT Image 2 ↓ / 基于 Javascript 的纯浏览器端 Gemini AI 图像无损去水印工具，使用数学精确的反向 Alpha 混合算法，对gemini水印疲了？推荐GPT-Image-2 ↓

summary.zh: Gemini 无损去水印工具是一个高性能的纯浏览器端应用，使用数学精确的反向 Alpha 混合算法，能够有效去除 Gemini AI 图像中的水印。该工具完全在客户端运行，确保用户隐私，支持智能识别多种水印变体，操作简单，适用于所有现代浏览器，适合需要处理水印图像的用户。
summary.en: The Gemini Lossless Watermark Remover is a high-performance, client-side tool that utilizes a mathematically precise Reverse Alpha Blending algorithm to effectively remove watermarks from Gemini AI images. Operating entirely in the browser, it ensures user privacy, supports intelligent detection of various watermark variants, and features a user-friendly interface, making it suitable for users needing to process watermarked images.

metadata.name: mlx-tune
metadata.description: Fine-tune LLMs on your Mac with Apple Silicon. SFT, DPO, GRPO, Vision, TTS, STT, Embedding, and OCR fine-tuning — natively on MLX. Unsloth-compatible API.

summary.zh: mlx-tune 是一个专为 Mac 用户设计的工具，利用苹果的 MLX 框架实现 LLM 的本地微调。它允许用户在 Apple Silicon 上原生运行代码，并与 Unsloth 兼容，确保代码的可移植性。用户可以在本地进行实验，随后无缝迁移到云端，解决了开发过程中的“上下文切换”问题，适合需要在不同环境中工作的开发者。
summary.en: mlx-tune is a tool designed for Mac users that enables local fine-tuning of LLMs using Apple's MLX framework. It allows native code execution on Apple Silicon while maintaining compatibility with Unsloth, ensuring code portability. Users can prototype locally and seamlessly transition to the cloud, addressing the 'context switch' problem in development, making it ideal for developers working across different environments.

metadata.name: openclaw-channel-dingtalk
metadata.description: Dingtalk channel plugin for OpenClaw

summary.zh: OpenClaw 钉钉频道插件为企业内部机器人提供了无公网 IP 的 Stream 模式支持，允许用户通过 WebSocket 长连接与钉钉进行交互。该插件支持私聊和群聊功能，能够处理多种消息类型，包括文本、图片和语音，并支持 Markdown 格式回复和互动卡片。适用于需要实时消息处理的 AI 应用场景，提升了消息的到达率和用户体验。
summary.en: The OpenClaw DingTalk channel plugin offers support for enterprise internal bots with a Stream mode that requires no public IP, allowing users to interact with DingTalk via WebSocket. It supports private and group chats, handles various message types including text, images, and voice, and allows Markdown replies and interactive cards. Ideal for AI applications needing real-time message processing, enhancing message delivery rates and user experience.

metadata.name: agent-skills
metadata.description: Collection of Apify Agent Skills

summary.zh: Apify Agent Skills 是一套官方的技能集合，专为网络爬虫、数据提取和自动化设计。它支持多种 AI 编码助手，如 Claude Code 和 Codex，提供多种技能，包括 Apify Actor 开发、品牌声誉监测和市场研究等，适用于电商、社交媒体分析和竞争情报等应用场景，帮助用户高效获取和分析数据。
summary.en: Apify Agent Skills is an official collection of skills designed for web scraping, data extraction, and automation. It supports various AI coding assistants like Claude Code and Codex, offering skills such as Apify Actor development, brand reputation monitoring, and market research. This toolkit is ideal for e-commerce, social media analysis, and competitive intelligence, enabling users to efficiently gather and analyze data.

metadata.name: Scrapling
metadata.description: 🕷️ An adaptive Web Scraping framework that handles everything from a single request to a full-scale crawl!

summary.zh: Scrapling 是一个自适应的网络爬虫框架，能够处理从单个请求到大规模爬取的所有任务。其解析器能够学习网站变化，并在页面更新时自动重新定位元素。框架内置的抓取器可轻松绕过 Cloudflare Turnstile 等反机器人系统，支持并发、多会话爬取，并具备暂停/恢复和自动代理轮换功能，使用简单的 Python 代码即可实现，极大提升了爬虫的灵活性和效率。
summary.en: Scrapling is an adaptive web scraping framework that manages everything from a single request to full-scale crawls. Its parser learns from website changes, automatically relocating elements when pages update. Built-in fetchers bypass anti-bot systems like Cloudflare Turnstile effortlessly. The spider framework supports concurrent, multi-session crawls with pause/resume and automatic proxy rotation, all achievable with minimal Python code, enhancing flexibility and efficiency in web scraping.

metadata.name: MPlus
metadata.description: 百万加 MPlus / AI驱动的自媒体选题和模拟预测智能体 助您打造爆款内容 / 基于 Ripple 预测引擎实现

summary.zh: MPlus 是一款基于 AI 的自媒体选题与模拟预测智能体，利用 Ripple 预测引擎提供内容传播效果的模拟分析。其核心功能包括实时 AI 对话、选题管理、模拟预测和平台账号管理，支持多种 LLM 模型配置，适用于自媒体创作者和内容营销人员，帮助他们优化选题策略与内容传播效果。
summary.en: MPlus is an AI-driven self-media topic selection and simulation prediction agent that utilizes the Ripple prediction engine for content dissemination analysis. Key features include real-time AI dialogue, topic management, simulation prediction, and platform account management, supporting various LLM model configurations. It is designed for self-media creators and content marketers to optimize topic strategies and content dissemination effectiveness.

metadata.name: edict
metadata.description: 🏛️ 三省六部制 · OpenClaw Multi-Agent Orchestration System — 9 specialized AI agents with real-time dashboard, model config, and full audit trails

summary.zh: 三省六部制 · Edict 是一个创新的多智能体协作系统，采用古代帝国的分权架构，设计了12个专用AI代理，结合实时看板和完整审计机制，确保任务执行的透明性与可控性。该系统适用于复杂任务的管理与执行，提供了制度性审核和实时干预功能，显著提升了AI协作的可靠性与效率。
summary.en: The Edict system is an innovative multi-agent orchestration framework inspired by ancient imperial governance, featuring 12 specialized AI agents. It integrates a real-time dashboard and comprehensive audit trails to ensure transparency and control in task execution. This system is ideal for managing complex tasks, offering institutional review and real-time intervention capabilities, significantly enhancing the reliability and efficiency of AI collaboration.

metadata.name: fastapi-best-architecture
metadata.description: Enterprise-level backend architecture solution with fastapi、sqlalchemy,、celery、pydantic、grafana、docker...

summary.zh: FastAPI最佳架构提供了一种企业级后端架构解决方案，结合了FastAPI、SQLAlchemy、Celery等技术，适用于构建高效的Web应用程序。该项目采用伪三层架构设计，简化了数据传输和业务逻辑处理，适合希望快速开发和维护的开发者。其文档详细，支持Docker容器化部署，适合各种规模的企业使用。
summary.en: FastAPI Best Architecture offers an enterprise-level backend architecture solution, integrating technologies like FastAPI, SQLAlchemy, and Celery, ideal for building efficient web applications. The project employs a pseudo three-tier architecture design, simplifying data transmission and business logic handling, making it suitable for developers seeking rapid development and maintenance. Its comprehensive documentation and Docker support cater to enterprises of all sizes.

metadata.name: xiaohongshu-ops-skill
metadata.description: 把Openclaw 变成小红书运营助手，帮你分析、选题、创作、复盘、复刻，甚至全面托管

summary.zh: xiaohongshu-ops 是一款基于浏览器自动化的工具，旨在帮助用户自动运营小红书账号。它支持自动发布笔记、回复评论以及复刻爆款笔记，降低了运营风险。通过简单的指令，用户可以轻松管理自媒体副业，提升内容创作效率，适合希望在小红书平台上快速增长粉丝的用户。
summary.en: xiaohongshu-ops is a browser automation tool designed to help users manage their Xiaohongshu accounts automatically. It supports automatic note publishing, comment replies, and replication of popular notes, minimizing operational risks. With simple commands, users can efficiently manage their media side hustles, making it ideal for those looking to rapidly grow their follower base on Xiaohongshu.

metadata.name: seedance-prompt-skill
metadata.description: Seedance 2.0 prompt skill，使用该Skill生成Seedance 2.0 视频提示词

summary.zh: Seedance 2.0 提示技能是一个为字节跳动的 Seedance 2.0 视频生成平台定制的 Claude Code 技能。该技能能够将自然语言创意转化为结构化的中文提示，支持多种视频生成能力，如纯文本生成、镜头复制、故事自动生成等，适用于电商、短剧、科普等场景，极大提升视频创作效率。
summary.en: The Seedance 2.0 prompt skill is a custom Claude Code skill designed for ByteDance's Seedance 2.0 video generation platform. It transforms creative ideas in natural language into structured Chinese prompts, supporting various video generation capabilities such as pure text generation, camera replication, and auto-story generation, making it ideal for e-commerce, short dramas, and educational content, significantly enhancing video creation efficiency.

metadata.name: claude-model-fingerprint
metadata.description: Claude Code Skills 合集：公众号文章、会议方法论提炼、多视角对话素材、文字稿润色等 8 个 Skill

summary.zh: Claude 模型指纹检测 Skill 通过自省式分析技术，验证 Claude API 的真实性及其封装层级，提供五大检测维度，包括身份声明、工具生态、元数据、知识能力和嵌套层级。该工具无需外部 API 调用，能够智能识别合法与可疑封装，并生成结构化的检测报告，适用于怀疑 API 真实性或需要分析提示词冲突的场景。
summary.en: The Claude Model Fingerprint Detection Skill utilizes introspective analysis to verify the authenticity of the Claude API and its encapsulation layers. It offers five detection dimensions: identity claims, tool ecology, metadata, knowledge capabilities, and nesting levels. This tool operates without external API calls, intelligently distinguishing between legitimate and suspicious encapsulations, and generates structured detection reports, making it suitable for scenarios where API authenticity is in question or prompt conflicts need analysis.

metadata.name: Qwen3.5-9B-ToolHub
metadata.description: Qwen3.5-9B ToolHub-v1.0.0

summary.zh: Qwen3.5-9B ToolHub 是一个基于 Qwen3.5-9B 多模态大模型的本地 AI 助手，支持联网搜索、图像理解、文件浏览和深度思考等功能。用户可以通过简单的命令行操作快速安装和启动服务，实时获取信息和进行复杂推理。该工具兼容 OpenAI API，适用于需要高效信息处理和分析的场景。
summary.en: Qwen3.5-9B ToolHub is a local AI assistant based on the Qwen3.5-9B multimodal model, offering functionalities like web search, image understanding, file browsing, and deep reasoning. Users can quickly install and start the service through simple command-line operations, enabling real-time information retrieval and complex reasoning. The tool is compatible with OpenAI API, suitable for scenarios requiring efficient information processing and analysis.

metadata.name: Auto-Redbook-Skills
metadata.description: 一个自动撰写小红书笔记，自动生成图片，自动发布的 Skills

summary.zh: Auto-Redbook-Skills 是一个自动撰写小红书笔记的工具，支持多主题卡片生成和自动发布。其重构版本提供了8种主题皮肤和4种分页模式，用户可以灵活选择，确保内容美观且适配小红书的格式。项目通过 Python 和 Node.js 实现，简化了用户的操作流程，适合内容创作者和营销人员使用。
summary.en: Auto-Redbook-Skills is a tool for automatically writing Xiaohongshu notes, supporting multi-theme card generation and automatic publishing. The restructured version offers 8 theme skins and 4 pagination modes, allowing users to flexibly choose and ensure content aesthetics fit Xiaohongshu's format. The project is implemented in Python and Node.js, simplifying user operations, ideal for content creators and marketers.

metadata.name: paperclip
metadata.description: Open-source orchestration for zero-human companies

summary.zh: Paperclip 是一个开源的自动化管理平台，旨在帮助企业实现零人力运营。通过 Node.js 服务器和 React UI，用户可以协调多种 AI 代理，设定目标并监控其工作与成本。该平台不仅具备任务管理功能，还涵盖组织结构、预算管理和目标对齐等特性，适合希望构建自主 AI 公司的用户。
summary.en: Paperclip is an open-source orchestration platform designed for zero-human operations in businesses. Utilizing a Node.js server and React UI, users can coordinate multiple AI agents, set goals, and monitor their work and costs. The platform offers task management alongside features like organizational charts, budget management, and goal alignment, making it ideal for those looking to build autonomous AI companies.

metadata.name: mco
metadata.description: Orchestrate AI coding agents. Any prompt. Any agent. Any IDE. Neutral orchestration layer for Claude Code, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI, OpenCode, Qwen Code — works from Cursor, Trae, Copilot, Windsurf, or plain shell.

summary.zh: MCO是一个中立的编排层，能够同时调度多个AI编码代理（如Claude、Codex、Gemini等），支持任意提示和IDE。开发者可以通过MCO将任务分配给多个代理并并行执行，从而比较输出结果，提升开发效率。适用于需要多视角分析的开发场景，尤其在代码审查和任务执行中表现突出。
summary.en: MCO is a neutral orchestration layer that enables the simultaneous dispatch of multiple AI coding agents (such as Claude, Codex, Gemini, etc.) with any prompt and IDE. Developers can assign tasks to multiple agents to execute in parallel, allowing for comparison of outputs and enhancing development efficiency. It is particularly useful in scenarios requiring multi-perspective analysis, especially in code reviews and task execution.

metadata.name: pinchtab
metadata.description: High-performance browser automation bridge and multi-instance orchestrator with advanced stealth injection and real-time dashboard.

summary.zh: PinchTab 是一个高性能的浏览器自动化桥接工具，专为 AI 代理提供直接的 Chrome 浏览器控制。它支持多实例并行运行，具有高级隐身注入和实时仪表板功能。该工具以 12MB 的 Go 二进制文件形式提供，支持命令行和 HTTP API 控制，适合需要高效网页操作的场景，如数据提取和自动化测试。
summary.en: PinchTab is a high-performance browser automation bridge that provides direct control over Chrome for AI agents. It supports multi-instance parallel execution, advanced stealth injection, and real-time dashboards. Offered as a 12MB Go binary, it allows control via CLI or HTTP API, making it ideal for scenarios requiring efficient web operations, such as data extraction and automated testing.

metadata.name: waoowaoo
metadata.description: 首家工业级全流程 AI 影视生产平台。Industry-first professional AI Agent platform for controllable film & video production. From shorts to live-action with Hollywood-standard workflows.

summary.zh: waoowaoo 是首个工业级全流程 AI 影视生产平台，支持从小说文本自动生成分镜、角色和场景，最终制作成完整视频。其核心技术包括 AI 剧本分析、角色与场景生成、分镜视频制作及多语言支持，旨在提升影视制作效率，适用于短剧、漫画视频等多种创作场景。
summary.en: waoowaoo is the first industry-grade AI film production platform that automates the generation of storyboards, characters, and scenes from novel texts, ultimately creating complete videos. Key features include AI script analysis, character and scene generation, storyboard video production, and multilingual support, aimed at enhancing the efficiency of film production for short films and comic videos.

metadata.name: TapAI
metadata.description: TapAI 面向中文互联网用户，提供“选场景 → 填表单 → 获取 AI 结果”的低门槛体验。当前版本聚焦文本场景，适合把 AI 能力包装成可直接上手的产品原型，也适合继续扩展成更完整的 AI 工具平台。

summary.zh: TapAI 是一个面向中文互联网用户的场景驱动 AI 应用，提供简单易用的文本生成服务。用户通过选择场景、填写表单即可获取 AI 结果，适合快速构建产品原型或作为 AI 工具平台的基础。其技术栈包括 Next.js、tRPC 和 SQLite，支持多种文本场景，具备个性化推荐和流式输出体验，旨在降低 AI 使用门槛。
summary.en: TapAI is a scenario-driven AI application designed for Chinese internet users, offering an easy-to-use text generation service. Users can obtain AI results by selecting scenarios and filling out forms, making it suitable for quickly building product prototypes or serving as a foundation for AI tool platforms. The tech stack includes Next.js, tRPC, and SQLite, supporting various text scenarios with personalized recommendations and streaming output, aiming to lower the barrier to AI usage.

metadata.name: Argus
metadata.description: Argus, A CAPTCHA Solver System Based on Computer Use Models.

summary.zh: Argus 是一个基于计算机使用模型的验证码识别系统，提供命令行和 HTTP API 两种调用方式。用户可以通过上传图片或本地文件进行验证码识别，系统支持多种验证码类型的处理，并返回结构化的 JSON 结果。其灵活的配置和高效的识别流程使其适用于自动化测试和安全验证等场景。
summary.en: Argus is a CAPTCHA recognition system based on computer usage models, offering both command-line and HTTP API interfaces. Users can recognize CAPTCHAs by uploading images or using local files, with support for various CAPTCHA types and structured JSON responses. Its flexible configuration and efficient recognition process make it suitable for automation testing and security validation scenarios.

metadata.name: zeroclaw
metadata.description: Fast, small, and fully autonomous AI personal assistant infrastructure, ANY OS, ANY PLATFORM — deploy anywhere, swap anything 🦀

summary.zh: ZeroClaw 是一个快速、小巧且完全自主的 AI 助手基础设施，支持在任何地方部署和灵活替换。它基于 Rust 构建，能够在低于 5MB 内存的设备上运行，显著降低了硬件成本。ZeroClaw 提供了一种运行时操作系统，抽象化模型、工具和执行，使得智能代理能够一次构建、随处运行，适合需要高效、低资源消耗的应用场景。
summary.en: ZeroClaw is a fast, small, and fully autonomous AI assistant infrastructure that supports deployment anywhere and flexible swapping. Built in Rust, it operates on devices with less than 5MB of RAM, significantly reducing hardware costs. ZeroClaw provides a runtime operating system that abstracts models, tools, and execution, enabling intelligent agents to be built once and run anywhere, ideal for applications requiring efficiency and low resource consumption.

metadata.name: AiToEarn
metadata.description: Let's use AI to Earn!

summary.zh: AiToEarn 是一个开源的 AI 驱动内容营销平台，旨在帮助创作者、品牌和企业通过自动化工具创建、发布和变现内容。支持多种社交媒体渠道，如抖音、微信、YouTube 等，具备一键多平台发布、智能导入历史内容等功能。该平台特别适合需要提升在线曝光和店内流量的实体业务，提供全面的内容增长与变现解决方案。
summary.en: AiToEarn is an open-source AI-driven content marketing platform designed to help creators, brands, and businesses create, publish, and monetize content through automation tools. It supports various social media channels like Douyin, WeChat, and YouTube, featuring one-click multi-platform publishing and smart historical content import. The platform is particularly suitable for physical businesses looking to enhance online exposure and in-store traffic, offering a comprehensive solution for content growth and monetization.

metadata.name: huobao-canvas
metadata.description: 火宝无限画布；支持文生图，图生图，图生视频，多模型切换。兼容 openai标准格式

summary.zh: 火宝无限画布是一个基于Vue Flow的可视化AI创作工具，支持文生图、图生图和图生视频等多种AI工作流。其核心特点包括节点式编排、AI提示词优化和多模型切换，适用于创意设计、视频制作等场景。该项目兼容OpenAI标准格式，提供本地项目存储和主题切换功能，提升用户体验。
summary.en: Huobao Canvas is a visual AI creation tool based on Vue Flow, supporting various AI workflows such as text-to-image, image-to-image, and image-to-video. Its core features include node-based orchestration, AI prompt optimization, and multi-model switching, making it suitable for creative design and video production. The project is compatible with OpenAI standard formats and offers local project storage and theme switching for enhanced user experience.

metadata.name: awesome-openclaw-tutorial
metadata.description: 从零开始玩转OpenClaw：最全面的中文教程，涵盖安装、配置、实战案例和避坑指南（github版）

summary.zh: 《从零开始玩转OpenClaw》是一本全面的中文教程，涵盖OpenClaw的安装、配置、实战案例和避坑指南。教程内容丰富，包含15章正文和70多个实战案例，适合希望构建AI工作助手的开发者。项目持续优化，提供详细的配置指导和常见问题解决方案，帮助用户快速上手并解决使用中的问题。
summary.en: The 'Awesome OpenClaw Tutorial' is a comprehensive Chinese guide covering installation, configuration, practical cases, and pitfalls of OpenClaw. With 15 chapters and over 70 practical examples, it is ideal for developers looking to build AI work assistants. The project is continuously optimized, offering detailed configuration guidance and solutions to common issues, facilitating quick onboarding and troubleshooting.

metadata.name: nexus-terminal
metadata.description: 一款现代化的 Web SSH / RDP / VNC 客户端，提供独立桌面端，支持人机验证、2FA、界面定制、操作审计等强大功能。

summary.zh: 星枢终端（Nexus Terminal）是一款现代化的Web SSH/RDP/VNC客户端，提供独立桌面端，支持多标签页管理、在线文件编辑及多重安全机制（如人机验证和双因素认证）。其高度可定制的界面和内置Docker容器管理面板，使得远程连接和运维操作更加便捷与安全，适用于开发者和运维人员。
summary.en: Nexus Terminal is a modern Web SSH/RDP/VNC client with a standalone desktop version, featuring multi-tab management, online file editing, and robust security mechanisms like CAPTCHA and 2FA. Its highly customizable interface and built-in Docker container management panel enhance the convenience and security of remote connections, making it ideal for developers and system administrators.

metadata.name: poco-claw
metadata.description: A more beautiful and easier-to-use alternative to OpenClaw. It features a nicer Web UI, built-in IM support, and a sandboxed runtime for improved safety. Under the hood, it is powered by a Claude Code–based agent.

summary.zh: Poco是OpenClaw的美观且易用的替代品，提供安全的沙盒运行环境和内置即时通讯支持。其核心特性包括项目管理、文件上传、智能记忆和多语言支持，旨在提升用户的工作效率和交互体验。Poco的Web界面友好，支持多种格式的预览与回放，适合需要高效任务管理和智能助手的用户。
summary.en: Poco is a beautiful and user-friendly alternative to OpenClaw, featuring a secure sandbox runtime and built-in instant messaging support. Its core features include project management, file uploads, smart memory, and multilingual support, aimed at enhancing user productivity and interaction experience. With a polished web interface, it supports preview and playback of various formats, making it ideal for users needing efficient task management and intelligent assistance.

metadata.name: CLIProxyAPI
metadata.description: Wrap Gemini CLI, Antigravity, ChatGPT Codex, Claude Code as an OpenAI/Gemini/Claude/Codex compatible API service, allowing you to enjoy the free Gemini 3.1 Pro, GPT 5.5, Claude model through API

summary.zh: CLIProxyAPI 是一个代理服务器，为 CLI 提供 OpenAI、Gemini、Claude 和 Codex 兼容的 API 接口。它支持多账户访问，允许开发者通过 OAuth 登录使用 OpenAI Codex 和 Claude Code。项目的技术亮点包括流式和非流式响应、多模态输入支持、简单的 CLI 身份验证流程以及可重用的 Go SDK，适合需要高效 AI 编程的开发者。
summary.en: CLIProxyAPI is a proxy server that provides OpenAI, Gemini, Claude, and Codex compatible API interfaces for CLI. It supports multi-account access, allowing developers to use OpenAI Codex and Claude Code via OAuth login. Key features include streaming and non-streaming responses, multimodal input support, simple CLI authentication flows, and a reusable Go SDK, making it ideal for developers seeking efficient AI coding solutions.

metadata.name: claude-skills
metadata.description: 232+ Claude Code skills & agent plugins for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, and 8 more coding agents — engineering, marketing, product, compliance, C-level advisory.

summary.zh: Claude Skills 提供超过 180 个针对 Claude Code、OpenAI Codex 和 OpenClaw 的生产就绪技能和插件，涵盖工程、市场营销、产品、合规及高层顾问等领域。通过模块化的技能包，AI 编码代理获得领域知识，提升其执行任务的能力，适用于多种 AI 编程工具，极大丰富了开发者的工具链。
summary.en: Claude Skills offers over 180 production-ready skills and plugins for Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, and OpenClaw, covering engineering, marketing, product, compliance, and C-level advisory. With modular skill packages, AI coding agents gain domain knowledge, enhancing their task execution capabilities, and significantly enriching the developer's toolkit across various AI programming tools.

metadata.name: awesome-llm-apps
metadata.description: 100+ AI Agent & RAG apps you can actually run — clone, customize, ship.

summary.zh: 该仓库汇集了众多基于大语言模型（LLM）的应用，涵盖了AI代理、RAG、多代理团队等技术，使用OpenAI、Anthropic、Gemini及开源模型。用户可以探索这些应用在不同领域的实际应用场景，学习如何将LLM与AI代理结合，推动开源生态的发展。
summary.en: This repository curates a collection of applications built on Large Language Models (LLMs), featuring technologies like AI Agents, RAG, and Multi-agent Teams, utilizing models from OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, and open-source alternatives. Users can explore practical applications across various domains and learn how to integrate LLMs with AI agents, contributing to the open-source ecosystem.

metadata.name: u-claw
metadata.description: 🦞 U-Claw 虾盘 - OpenClaw AI 助手离线安装 U 盘 | 提供远程维护·定制开发·企业私有化部署服务 | Remote support & custom AI development

summary.zh: U-Claw 是一款专为中国用户设计的 OpenClaw 离线安装 U 盘，支持免翻墙一键安装。用户可通过简单的命令行操作，将所需依赖快速补齐，并将完整的应用拷贝至 U 盘，方便在不同平台上运行。其功能包括免安装运行、功能菜单及多种聊天平台支持，适合需要便携式 AI 助手的用户。
summary.en: U-Claw is an offline installer USB for OpenClaw, specifically designed for Chinese users, allowing one-click installation without VPN. Users can quickly complete dependencies through simple command-line operations and copy the full application to a USB drive for use across different platforms. Features include portable execution, a functional menu, and support for various chat platforms, making it ideal for users needing a portable AI assistant.

metadata.name: DeepDiagram
metadata.description: An open-source AI visualization tool that transforms natural language into Mind Maps, Mermaid diagrams, and Echarts. Turn your ideas into structured visuals instantly.

summary.zh: DeepDiagram 是一个开源的智能可视化平台，利用 Agentic AI 将自然语言和多模态输入转化为专业图表，包括思维导图、流程图和数据图表。其独特的 LangGraph 架构通过多个专用代理处理不同的可视化领域，支持实时编辑和高质量导出，广泛应用于知识映射、商业流程和数据可视化等场景。
summary.en: DeepDiagram is an open-source intelligent visualization platform that utilizes Agentic AI to transform natural language and multimodal inputs into professional diagrams, including mind maps, flowcharts, and data charts. Its unique LangGraph architecture employs specialized agents for different visualization domains, supporting real-time editing and high-quality exports, applicable in knowledge mapping, business processes, and data visualization.

metadata.name: OpenClaw-Medical-Skills
metadata.description: The largest open-source medical AI skills library for OpenClaw🦞.

summary.zh: OpenClaw医疗技能库是一个开源的医学AI技能集合，包含869个经过精心策划的技能，覆盖生物医学和临床研究的各个领域。该库旨在为OpenClaw和NanoClaw框架提供支持，将通用AI代理转变为强大的医学和科学研究助手。每个技能模块提供专业知识、连接真实数据库和API，并生成结构化的临床或科学相关输出，极大提升AI在医学领域的应用能力。
summary.en: The OpenClaw Medical Skills library is an open-source collection of 869 curated AI skills that span the full spectrum of biomedical and clinical research. Designed for OpenClaw and NanoClaw frameworks, it transforms a general-purpose AI agent into a powerful medical and scientific research companion. Each skill module provides specialized knowledge, connects to real databases and APIs, and produces structured clinical or scientific outputs, significantly enhancing AI capabilities in the medical domain.

metadata.name: impeccable
metadata.description: The design language that makes your AI harness better at design.

summary.zh: Impeccable 是一款专为前端设计优化的工具，提供 17 个命令和精心策划的反模式，帮助 AI 更好地进行设计。它基于 Anthropic 的前端设计技能，扩展了设计知识，提供更深层次的控制，避免常见的设计错误。用户可以通过访问官方网站下载现成的工具包，提升用户界面的质量与美感。
summary.en: Impeccable is a tool optimized for frontend design, offering 17 commands and curated anti-patterns to help AI excel in design. Building on Anthropic's frontend design skill, it expands design knowledge and provides deeper control to avoid common design mistakes. Users can visit the official website to download ready-to-use bundles, enhancing the quality and aesthetics of user interfaces.

metadata.name: OpenMOSS
metadata.description: A self-organizing multi-agent collaboration platform for OpenClaw. Multiple AI agents work as an autonomous team — planning, executing, reviewing, and patrolling tasks with zero human intervention.

summary.zh: OpenMOSS 是一个自组织的多智能体协作平台，基于 OpenClaw 构建。多个 AI 代理能够自主协作，规划、执行、审查和巡检任务，完全无需人工干预。其核心亮点包括自组织协作、闭环质量控制和自动巡检恢复机制，适用于需要高效任务管理和质量保证的场景。
summary.en: OpenMOSS is a self-organizing multi-agent collaboration platform built on OpenClaw. Multiple AI agents collaborate autonomously to plan, execute, review, and patrol tasks with zero human intervention. Key features include self-organizing collaboration, closed-loop quality control, and auto patrol recovery, making it ideal for efficient task management and quality assurance.

metadata.name: OmniRoute
metadata.description: Never stop coding. The free AI gateway — one endpoint, 160+ providers, zero downtime. Smart 4-tier auto-fallback (Subscription → API → Cheap → Free), prompt compression (save 15-75% tokens), 3-level proxy for geo-blocks, MCP Server (29 tools), A2A Protocol, 10 multi-modal APIs, and Desktop/Android/PWA apps.

summary.zh: OmniRoute 是一个多提供商 LLM 的 AI 网关，提供与 OpenAI 兼容的端点，具备智能路由、负载均衡、重试和回退功能。它支持添加策略、速率限制、缓存和可观察性，确保高效、成本意识的推理，适用于开发者在多种 AI 模型之间进行无缝集成和调用。
summary.en: OmniRoute is an AI gateway for multi-provider LLMs, offering an OpenAI-compatible endpoint with smart routing, load balancing, retries, and fallbacks. It supports policies, rate limits, caching, and observability for reliable, cost-aware inference, making it ideal for developers to seamlessly integrate and invoke various AI models.

metadata.name: Crawler_Illegal_Cases_In_China
metadata.description: Collection of China illegal cases about web crawler 本项目用来整理所有中国大陆爬虫开发者涉诉与违规相关的新闻、资料与法律法规。致力于帮助在中国大陆工作的爬虫行业从业者了解我国相关法律，避免触碰数据合规红线。

summary.zh: 本项目汇总了中国大陆爬虫开发者涉及的违法违规案例及相关法律法规，旨在帮助从业者理解法律风险，避免触碰数据合规红线。涵盖了多种爬虫禁区，包括个人隐私数据抓取、商业数据盗取等，提供了丰富的案例分析和法律解读，助力爬虫行业的合规发展。
summary.en: This project compiles illegal cases involving web crawlers in mainland China and relevant laws and regulations, aiming to help practitioners understand legal risks and avoid data compliance violations. It covers various crawling prohibitions, including personal data scraping and commercial data theft, providing rich case analyses and legal interpretations to support compliant development in the web crawling industry.

metadata.name: web2api
metadata.description: 把网页AI转api，如claude2api

summary.zh: Web2API 是一个将网页 AI 服务（如 Claude Web）转化为标准 OpenAI / Anthropic 接口的桥接服务。用户可以无缝使用现有的 OpenAI SDK，而无需修改客户端代码或维护浏览器自动化脚本。该项目支持图片输入、流式输出、工具调用，并提供可视化配置界面，极大简化了 AI 服务的集成与使用。
summary.en: Web2API is a bridging service that transforms web-based AI services (like Claude Web) into standard OpenAI / Anthropic interfaces. Users can seamlessly utilize existing OpenAI SDKs without modifying client code or maintaining browser automation scripts. The project supports image input, streaming output, tool calls, and offers a visual configuration interface, greatly simplifying the integration and usage of AI services.

metadata.name: openrag
metadata.description: OpenRAG is a comprehensive, single package Retrieval-Augmented Generation platform built on Langflow, Docling, and Opensearch.

summary.zh: OpenRAG 是一个全面的检索增强生成平台，基于 Langflow、Docling 和 OpenSearch，支持智能文档搜索和 AI 驱动的对话。用户可以通过聊天界面上传、处理和查询文档，系统利用大型语言模型和语义搜索能力，提供无缝的 RAG 体验。其主要特点包括预打包、智能文档解析和可视化工作流构建，适用于企业级搜索和生产环境。
summary.en: OpenRAG is a comprehensive Retrieval-Augmented Generation platform built on Langflow, Docling, and OpenSearch, enabling intelligent document search and AI-powered conversations. Users can upload, process, and query documents through a chat interface backed by large language models and semantic search capabilities, offering a seamless RAG experience. Key features include pre-packaged tools, intelligent document parsing, and a visual workflow builder, suitable for enterprise-level search and production environments.

metadata.name: PptxGenJS
metadata.description: Build PowerPoint presentations with JavaScript. Works with Node, React, web browsers, and more.

summary.zh: PptxGenJS 是一个强大的 JavaScript 库，允许开发者在 Node、React、浏览器等环境中生成专业的 PowerPoint 演示文稿。它支持创建文本、表格、图表等多种幻灯片对象，并兼容多种办公软件，如 Microsoft PowerPoint 和 Google Slides。该库易于使用，提供 TypeScript 定义，且无需安装 PowerPoint，即可导出标准的 OOXML 文件，适合各种应用场景。
summary.en: PptxGenJS is a powerful JavaScript library that enables developers to create professional PowerPoint presentations in environments like Node, React, and browsers. It supports various slide objects such as text, tables, and charts, and is compatible with multiple office software like Microsoft PowerPoint and Google Slides. The library is easy to use, offers TypeScript definitions, and requires no PowerPoint installation, allowing for the export of standard OOXML files suitable for various applications.

metadata.name: hindsight
metadata.description: Hindsight: Agent Memory That  Learns

summary.zh: Hindsight 是一个智能代理记忆系统，旨在通过学习提升代理的智能水平，而不仅仅是记忆对话历史。它克服了传统技术的不足，提供了在长期记忆任务上的卓越性能，已被多家财富500强企业和新兴 AI 初创公司广泛应用。Hindsight 通过简单的 API 集成，能够轻松为现有代理添加记忆功能，极大地提升了对话 AI 的表现。
summary.en: Hindsight is an intelligent agent memory system designed to enhance agent intelligence through learning rather than just recalling conversation history. It overcomes the limitations of traditional techniques, delivering exceptional performance on long-term memory tasks and is widely adopted by Fortune 500 companies and emerging AI startups. Hindsight allows easy memory integration into existing agents via a simple API, significantly improving conversational AI performance.

metadata.name: openclaw-skills-security
metadata.description: Curated, security-first OpenClaw skills (Markdown-based). Security audit skills - detect prompt injection, supply chain attacks, credential leaks. Works with Codex CLI, Claude Code, any LLM.

summary.zh: openclaw-skills-security 是一个专注于安全的技能库，旨在为 OpenClaw 生态系统提供安全审计工具。该项目包含两个审计技能和 11 个可重用模块，能够检测提示注入、供应链攻击和凭证泄漏等安全隐患。用户可以通过 Codex CLI、Claude Code 或任何 LLM 加载这些模块，确保在安装和使用技能前进行全面的安全检查。
summary.en: openclaw-skills-security is a security-focused skill library designed to provide security auditing tools for the OpenClaw ecosystem. The project includes two auditing skills and 11 reusable modules that can detect security issues such as prompt injection, supply chain attacks, and credential leaks. Users can load these modules through Codex CLI, Claude Code, or any LLM to ensure comprehensive security checks before installing and using skills.

metadata.name: Jellyfish
metadata.description: An end-to-end production workspace for AI-generated short dramas. From script input to structured storyboarding, consistency management, shot preparation, video generation, and export.

summary.zh: Jellyfish 是一款一站式 AI 生成短剧的生产工具，涵盖从剧本输入到视频导出的全流程。其核心价值在于提供极致一致性和工业化生产流程，解决了 AI 生成中的人物和场景漂移问题。适用于短剧创作者、影视工作室及教育机构，具备可视化分镜编辑、资产管理和多供应商模型管理等技术亮点。
summary.en: Jellyfish is an all-in-one AI short drama production tool that covers the entire process from script input to video export. Its core value lies in providing extreme consistency and an industrialized production workflow, addressing character and scene drift issues in AI generation. Suitable for short drama creators, film studios, and educational institutions, it features visual storyboard editing, asset management, and multi-vendor model management.

metadata.name: get-shit-done
metadata.description: A light-weight and powerful meta-prompting, context engineering and spec-driven development system for Claude Code by TÂCHES.

summary.zh: GET SHIT DONE 是一个轻量级且强大的元提示、上下文工程和规范驱动开发系统，专为 Claude Code、OpenCode、Gemini CLI、Codex、Copilot 和 Antigravity 设计。它有效解决了上下文衰退问题，确保生成的代码质量稳定。该系统简化了开发流程，用户只需描述需求，系统便能提取必要信息并自动生成代码，适合希望高效开发的创意工作者。
summary.en: GET SHIT DONE is a lightweight yet powerful meta-prompting, context engineering, and spec-driven development system designed for Claude Code, OpenCode, Gemini CLI, Codex, Copilot, and Antigravity. It effectively addresses context rot, ensuring stable code quality. The system simplifies the development process, allowing users to describe their needs while automatically extracting necessary information to generate code, making it ideal for creative individuals seeking efficient development.

metadata.name: deepagents
metadata.description: Agent harness built with LangChain and LangGraph. Equipped with a planning tool, a filesystem backend, and the ability to spawn subagents - well-equipped to handle complex agentic tasks.

summary.zh: Deep Agents 是一个基于 LangChain 和 LangGraph 构建的智能代理框架，具备任务规划、文件系统后端和子代理生成能力，适用于复杂的代理任务。用户可以快速启动并自定义代理，支持文件读写、命令执行和上下文管理，极大简化了 AI 代理的开发与部署。
summary.en: Deep Agents is an intelligent agent harness built with LangChain and LangGraph, equipped with planning tools, filesystem backend, and the ability to spawn subagents, making it suitable for complex agentic tasks. Users can quickly start and customize agents, supporting file read/write, command execution, and context management, significantly simplifying the development and deployment of AI agents.

metadata.name: superpowers
metadata.description: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

summary.zh: Superpowers 是一个完整的软件开发工作流程框架，旨在通过一系列可组合的技能和初始指令，帮助编码代理有效地进行软件开发。它通过与用户对话提炼需求，生成易于理解的设计文档，并制定详细的实施计划，确保开发过程遵循 TDD、YAGNI 和 DRY 原则。该框架支持子代理驱动开发，能够在不偏离计划的情况下自动执行任务，提升开发效率。
summary.en: Superpowers is a comprehensive software development workflow framework designed to assist coding agents in effective software development through a set of composable skills and initial instructions. It extracts requirements through user conversations, generates digestible design documents, and creates detailed implementation plans that adhere to TDD, YAGNI, and DRY principles. The framework supports subagent-driven development, enabling autonomous task execution without deviating from the plan, enhancing development efficiency.

metadata.name: GitNexus
metadata.description: GitNexus: The Zero-Server Code Intelligence Engine -       GitNexus is a client-side knowledge graph creator that runs entirely in your browser. Drop in a GitHub repo or ZIP file, and get an interactive knowledge graph wit a built in Graph RAG Agent. Perfect for code exploration

summary.zh: GitNexus 是一个零服务器的代码智能引擎，能够在浏览器中创建客户端知识图谱。用户只需输入 GitHub 仓库或 ZIP 文件，即可生成交互式知识图谱，配备内置的图形 RAG 代理，适用于代码探索和分析。该工具通过智能工具展示代码依赖、调用链和执行流程，提升 AI 代理的代码理解能力，适合开发者进行日常开发和快速分析。
summary.en: GitNexus is a zero-server code intelligence engine that creates client-side knowledge graphs directly in your browser. By dropping in a GitHub repo or ZIP file, users can generate an interactive knowledge graph with a built-in Graph RAG Agent, ideal for code exploration and analysis. This tool enhances AI agents' understanding of code by exposing dependencies, call chains, and execution flows, making it suitable for developers for daily development and quick analysis.

metadata.name: llama.cpp
metadata.description: LLM inference in C/C++

summary.zh: llama.cpp 是一个高性能的 C/C++ 实现，旨在简化大语言模型（LLM）的推理过程，支持多种硬件架构。它提供了无依赖的实现，优化了苹果硅和多种 x86、RISC-V 架构，支持多种量化方式以提高推理速度和减少内存使用。该项目还支持 NVIDIA GPU 的自定义 CUDA 内核，并允许 CPU 和 GPU 混合推理，适合云端和本地部署。
summary.en: llama.cpp is a high-performance C/C++ implementation designed to simplify large language model (LLM) inference across various hardware architectures. It offers a dependency-free implementation optimized for Apple Silicon and multiple x86 and RISC-V architectures, supporting various quantization methods for faster inference and reduced memory usage. The project also includes custom CUDA kernels for NVIDIA GPUs and allows CPU+GPU hybrid inference, suitable for both cloud and local deployments.

metadata.name: AI-Account-Toolkit
metadata.description: ChatGPT 批量自动注册工具 - 支持 DuckMail + Codex + CPA 面板

summary.zh: AI-Account-Toolkit 是一个全面的 ChatGPT 账号管理工具集，支持批量注册、团队管理及临时邮箱服务。它集成了 Codex 账号管理、DuckMail 注册等功能，旨在提升账号管理效率，简化操作流程，适用于需要大规模管理 ChatGPT 账号的用户和团队。
summary.en: AI-Account-Toolkit is a comprehensive management toolset for ChatGPT accounts, supporting batch registration, team management, and temporary email services. It integrates Codex account management and DuckMail registration, aiming to enhance account management efficiency and simplify operations, suitable for users and teams requiring large-scale management of ChatGPT accounts.

metadata.name: antigravity-awesome-skills
metadata.description: Installable GitHub library of 1,400+ agentic skills for Claude Code, Cursor, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI, Antigravity, and more. Includes installer CLI, bundles, workflows, and official/community skill collections.

summary.zh: Antigravity Awesome Skills 是一个经过验证的高性能技能库，包含超过 1272 种适用于 Claude Code、Gemini CLI、Cursor 和 GitHub Copilot 等 AI 编程助手的通用技能。这些技能为开发者提供了可重用的操作手册，涵盖规划、编码、调试等多个领域，极大提升了 AI 助手的实用性和效率。
summary.en: Antigravity Awesome Skills is a battle-tested library featuring over 1,272 universal skills for AI coding assistants like Claude Code, Gemini CLI, Cursor, and GitHub Copilot. These skills provide reusable playbooks for various tasks, including planning, coding, and debugging, significantly enhancing the utility and efficiency of AI agents.

metadata.name: Meting-Agent
metadata.description: 🪐 面向 AI 的多音乐平台的 API 代理 • 网易云 • QQ音乐 • 酷狗 • 酷我 🎻 Multi-platform music API agent for AI • NetEase • QQ Music • KuGou • Kuwo

summary.zh: Meting-Agent 是一款面向 AI 的多音乐平台 API 代理，支持网易云、QQ音乐、酷狗、酷我和千千音乐等平台。它提供统一的接口，允许用户通过关键字搜索歌曲、专辑和歌手，获取歌曲详情、歌词及可播放链接，极大简化了多平台音乐数据的获取与应用。该项目基于 metowolf/Meting 构建，适用于音乐应用开发和 AI 工具集成。
summary.en: Meting-Agent is an AI-oriented multi-platform music API agent that supports platforms like NetEase, QQ Music, KuGou, Kuwo, and Qianqian. It offers a unified interface for users to search for songs, albums, and artists by keywords, retrieve song details, lyrics, and playable links, significantly simplifying the acquisition and application of music data across multiple platforms. This project is built on metowolf/Meting, suitable for music application development and AI tool integration.

metadata.name: OpenMAIC
metadata.description: Open Multi-Agent Interactive Classroom — Get an immersive, multi-agent learning experience in just one click

summary.zh: OpenMAIC（开放多智能体互动课堂）是一个开源AI平台，能够将任何主题或文档转化为丰富的互动课堂体验。该平台通过多智能体协作生成幻灯片、测验、互动模拟和基于项目的学习活动，AI教师和同学能够实时交流、绘图和讨论。集成的OpenClaw功能使得用户可以直接从消息应用（如飞书、Slack或Telegram）生成课堂内容，极大提升了学习的便捷性和互动性。
summary.en: OpenMAIC (Open Multi-Agent Interactive Classroom) is an open-source AI platform that transforms any topic or document into a rich, interactive classroom experience. Powered by multi-agent orchestration, it generates slides, quizzes, interactive simulations, and project-based learning activities, with AI teachers and classmates engaging in real-time discussions. The built-in OpenClaw integration allows users to generate classrooms directly from messaging apps like Feishu, Slack, or Telegram, enhancing convenience and interactivity in learning.

metadata.name: WeChatTweak
metadata.description: A command-line tool for tweaking WeChat - 首款微信 macOS 客户端撤回拦截与多开 🔨

summary.zh: WeChatTweak 是一款命令行工具，专为 macOS 微信客户端设计，提供消息撤回拦截、多开和阻止自动更新等功能。该工具适合开发者和技术爱好者进行学习与交流，支持多种版本的微信，旨在提升用户体验与灵活性。
summary.en: WeChatTweak is a command-line tool designed for the macOS WeChat client, offering features such as message recall interception, multi-instance support, and automatic update prevention. It is suitable for developers and tech enthusiasts for learning and communication, supporting various versions of WeChat to enhance user experience and flexibility.

metadata.name: X1a0HeWeChatPlugin
metadata.description: 一个随手写的插件 提供消息防撤回、多开、禁用更新和日志上报等功能。

summary.zh: X1a0HeWeChatPlugin 是一款针对 macOS 的微信插件，提供消息防撤回、多开、禁用更新和日志上报等实用功能。该插件专为 M1 Max 设备优化，支持特定版本的微信，旨在提升用户的使用体验和安全性。通过简单的安装步骤，用户可以快速集成这些功能，满足日常沟通需求。
summary.en: X1a0HeWeChatPlugin is a macOS plugin for WeChat that offers practical features such as message anti-recall, multi-instance support, update disabling, and log reporting. Optimized for M1 Max devices, it supports specific versions of WeChat, aiming to enhance user experience and security. Users can quickly integrate these features through straightforward installation steps to meet their daily communication needs.

metadata.name: gstack
metadata.description: Use Garry Tan's exact Claude Code setup: 23 opinionated tools that serve as CEO, Designer, Eng Manager, Release Manager, Doc Engineer, and QA

summary.zh: gstack 是 Garry Tan 开发的开源工具集，旨在通过 Claude Code 实现高效的软件开发。它提供了 15 种工具，模拟 CEO、设计师、工程经理等角色，帮助创始人和技术团队以更高效的方式进行产品开发。gstack 适合初学者和技术领导者，通过结构化的角色和自动化流程，显著提升开发效率，适合快速迭代和高质量交付。
summary.en: gstack is an open-source toolkit developed by Garry Tan, designed to enhance software development efficiency through Claude Code. It features 15 tools that simulate roles like CEO, Designer, and Engineering Manager, aiding founders and tech teams in product development. gstack is ideal for beginners and tech leads, providing structured roles and automation processes to significantly boost development efficiency, suitable for rapid iteration and high-quality delivery.

metadata.name: geo-seo-claude
metadata.description: GEO-first SEO skill for Claude Code. Comprehensive AI search optimization for any website — citability scoring, AI crawler analysis, brand authority, schema markup, platform-specific optimization, and PDF reports.  If you want learn how to sell this to real businesses, check out the skool community

summary.zh: GEO-SEO Claude 是一款面向 AI 搜索引擎的综合性 SEO 优化工具，专注于提升网站在 AI 驱动的搜索环境中的可见性。其核心功能包括 citability 评分、AI 爬虫分析、品牌权威性评估、架构化数据生成和平台特定优化，帮助企业适应未来的搜索趋势。该工具不仅支持传统 SEO 基础，还能生成专业的 PDF 报告，适合希望提升在线业务的企业使用。
summary.en: GEO-SEO Claude is a comprehensive SEO optimization tool designed for AI-powered search engines, focusing on enhancing website visibility in the evolving search landscape. Key features include citability scoring, AI crawler analysis, brand authority assessment, schema markup generation, and platform-specific optimization, helping businesses adapt to future search trends. This tool supports traditional SEO foundations and generates professional PDF reports, making it suitable for enterprises looking to boost their online presence.

summary.zh: InSpatio-World 是一个基于深度学习的视频生成与分析工具，主要用于视频到视频的推理（v2v inference）。该项目结合了多种模型，如 Florence-2 用于视频字幕生成，DA3 用于深度估计，以及 InSpatio-World 模型进行最终推理。适用于需要高质量视频合成和分析的应用场景，如影视制作和虚拟现实。
summary.en: InSpatio-World is a deep learning-based video generation and analysis tool primarily designed for video-to-video inference (v2v inference). The project integrates multiple models, including Florence-2 for video captioning, DA3 for depth estimation, and the InSpatio-World model for final inference. It is suitable for applications requiring high-quality video synthesis and analysis, such as film production and virtual reality.

metadata.name: AI-Search-Hub
metadata.description: One Query. All Search Skill. 聚合 Gemini、Grok、豆包、元宝等平台原生 AI 搜索能力，免费获取科技趋势、行业舆情、热点追踪、旅行规划、日常问题统一接进自己的 Agent 与工作流，指定链接免费爬取

summary.zh: AI Search Hub 是一个开源工具，聚合多个平台的 AI 搜索能力，用户可以通过简单的提问或链接获取微信公众号、抖音、微博等数据。它简化了数据抓取和处理流程，用户无需维护繁琐的爬虫和解析规则，直接利用大厂的成熟技术，提升工作效率，适用于科技趋势分析、行业舆情监测等场景。
summary.en: AI Search Hub is an open-source tool that aggregates AI search capabilities from multiple platforms, allowing users to obtain data from WeChat public accounts, Douyin, Weibo, etc., through simple queries or links. It simplifies data scraping and processing, eliminating the need for complex crawlers and parsing rules, leveraging established technologies from major companies to enhance efficiency, suitable for technology trend analysis and industry sentiment monitoring.

metadata.name: any-auto-register
metadata.description: Auto-register & manage accounts for ChatGPT, Cursor, Kiro, Grok, Windsurf, Trae & 13+ AI platforms · Protocol/browser dual-mode · Plugin-based · One-click Mac/Windows desktop app

summary.zh: Any Auto Register 是一个多平台账号自动注册与管理系统，支持插件化扩展和多种邮箱服务。它具备并发注册、验证码处理和代理池管理等功能，适合开发者进行账号管理和自动化测试。该项目采用 FastAPI 和 React 技术栈，提供灵活的配置和实时日志推送，适合需要高效注册和管理多个平台账号的场景。
summary.en: Any Auto Register is a multi-platform account automation and management system that supports plugin extensions and various email services. It features concurrent registration, CAPTCHA handling, and proxy pool management, making it suitable for developers managing accounts and conducting automated testing. Built with FastAPI and React, it offers flexible configurations and real-time log streaming, ideal for scenarios requiring efficient registration and management of multiple platform accounts.

metadata.name: deer-flow
metadata.description: An open-source long-horizon SuperAgent harness that researches, codes, and creates. With the help of sandboxes, memories, tools, skill, subagents and message gateway, it handles different levels of tasks that could take minutes to hours.

summary.zh: DeerFlow是一个开源的超级代理框架，旨在通过沙箱、记忆、工具和子代理的协作，处理从几分钟到几小时的各种任务。它的核心价值在于灵活的技能扩展和高效的任务管理，适用于深度研究和复杂项目的自动化执行。DeerFlow 2.0是全面重写的版本，具有更强的功能和更好的用户体验。
