summary.en: DeerFlow is an open-source super agent harness designed to manage various tasks ranging from minutes to hours through the collaboration of sandboxes, memories, tools, and sub-agents. Its core value lies in flexible skill extension and efficient task management, making it suitable for deep research and automation of complex projects. Version 2.0 is a complete rewrite, offering enhanced functionality and improved user experience.

metadata.name: Fanqie-novel-Downloader
metadata.description: 番茄小说下载器 - 支持多平台的番茄小说下载工具，提供TXT/EPUB格式，GUI界面下载功能

summary.zh: 番茄小说下载器是一款高效的多平台小说下载工具，支持TXT和EPUB格式，提供简洁的图形用户界面。用户可以快速搜索小说、查看书籍详情并进行批量下载，自动嵌入封面，适合需要整理小说文件的用户。该工具通过本地Web服务运行，支持Windows、Linux和macOS等操作系统，极大地方便了小说爱好者的使用体验。
summary.en: Fanqie Novel Downloader is an efficient multi-platform tool for downloading novels, supporting TXT and EPUB formats with a user-friendly GUI. Users can quickly search for novels, view book details, and perform batch downloads while automatically embedding covers. Ideal for users needing to organize novel files, the tool runs via a local web service and supports Windows, Linux, and macOS, greatly enhancing the experience for novel enthusiasts.

metadata.name: noScribe
metadata.description: Cutting edge AI technology for automated audio transcription. A nice GUI for OpenAIs Whisper and pyannote (speaker identification)

summary.zh: noScribe 是一款前沿的 AI 技术应用，专注于自动音频转录，特别适用于定性社会研究和新闻采访。它支持多种语言，能够区分不同说话者，并在本地运行，确保数据隐私。软件提供友好的编辑器，便于用户校对和修正转录结果，基于 OpenAI 的 Whisper 和 pyannote 技术，具有高效的转录能力。
summary.en: noScribe is a cutting-edge AI application focused on automated audio transcription, particularly for qualitative social research and journalistic interviews. It supports multiple languages, distinguishes between different speakers, and runs locally to ensure data privacy. The software includes a user-friendly editor for reviewing and correcting transcripts, leveraging OpenAI's Whisper and pyannote technologies for efficient transcription.

metadata.name: xiaoye-ai
metadata.description: 多模态 AI 内容创作平台，支持 Google Gemini、火山引擎 Seedream/Seedance 等模型进行图像和视频生成。

summary.zh: 小野AI是一个开源的多模态内容创作平台，支持Google Gemini和火山引擎等多种AI模型进行高质量图像和视频生成。平台提供丰富的功能，包括电商图片批量生成、提示词优化和社区灵感展示，适合创作者和企业使用，助力内容生产的高效化与多样化。
summary.en: Xiaoye AI is an open-source multimodal content creation platform that supports high-quality image and video generation using various AI models like Google Gemini and Volcano Engine. It offers features such as bulk e-commerce image generation, prompt optimization, and community inspiration display, making it ideal for creators and businesses to enhance content production efficiency and diversity.

metadata.name: Pilipili-AutoVideo
metadata.description: 🎬 全自动 AI 视频代理 · 一句话生成带字幕成片 · Fully Automated AI Video Agent · Local Deployment

summary.zh: Pilipili-AutoVideo 是一款全自动的本地 AI 视频代理，用户只需一句话描述视频，系统便能自动生成完整的带字幕视频。其核心亮点包括绝对音视频同步、4K 关键帧锁定策略和智能记忆系统，确保高质量输出和个性化风格。该工具适用于内容创作者和视频编辑者，极大地简化了视频制作流程。
summary.en: Pilipili-AutoVideo is a fully automated local AI video agent that generates complete subtitled videos from a single sentence description. Key highlights include absolute audio-video sync, 4K keyframe locking strategy, and an intelligent memory system for personalized style. This tool is ideal for content creators and video editors, significantly streamlining the video production process.

metadata.name: agency-agents-zh
metadata.description: 🎭 211 个即插即用的 AI 专家角色 — 支持 Hermes Agent/Claude Code/Cursor/Copilot 等 16 种工具，覆盖工程/设计/营销/金融等 18 个部门。含 46 个中国市场原创智能体（小红书/抖音/微信/飞书/钉钉等）

summary.zh: agency-agents 是一个涵盖186个AI专业角色的系统，提供即插即用的智能体，适用于产品、工程、设计、运营和数据等多个领域。每个角色具备独特的专业技能和可交付成果，支持多智能体协作，用户可通过简单的YAML配置实现角色间的高效协作，适合各类AI工具的集成与应用。
summary.en: agency-agents offers a library of 186 AI professional roles, providing plug-and-play agents applicable across product, engineering, design, operations, and data fields. Each role possesses unique expertise and deliverables, enabling efficient collaboration through simple YAML configurations. It supports integration with various AI tools, making it suitable for diverse applications.

metadata.name: daily_stock_analysis
metadata.description: LLM驱动的 A/H/美股智能分析器：多数据源行情 + 实时新闻 + LLM决策仪表盘 + 多渠道推送，零成本定时运行，纯白嫖. LLM-powered stock analysis system for A/H/US markets.

summary.zh: 该项目是一个基于大型语言模型（LLM）的智能股票分析系统，支持A股、港股和美股的多数据源行情分析。它能够实时推送决策仪表盘，提供多维度市场分析、策略建议和自动化运行，适合投资者进行市场决策。其技术亮点包括多渠道推送、AI驱动的决策支持和灵活的数据源整合，帮助用户实现零成本的股票分析和决策。
summary.en: This project is an AI-driven stock analysis system utilizing large language models (LLM) for A/H/US markets. It provides real-time decision dashboards, multi-dimensional market analysis, and automated operations, making it suitable for investors' decision-making. Key highlights include multi-channel notifications, AI-driven decision support, and flexible data source integration, enabling users to achieve cost-free stock analysis and decision-making.

metadata.name: OpenViking
metadata.description: OpenViking is an open-source context database designed specifically for AI Agents(such as openclaw). OpenViking unifies the management of context (memory, resources, and skills) that Agents need through a file system paradigm, enabling hierarchical context delivery and self-evolving.

summary.zh: OpenViking 是一款专为 AI 代理设计的开源上下文数据库，采用文件系统范式统一管理代理所需的上下文（记忆、资源和技能）。它通过分层上下文加载和目录递归检索等创新特性，解决了传统上下文管理中的碎片化问题，提高了信息检索的有效性，支持上下文的自动迭代，使代理在使用中不断智能化，适用于 AI 代理的开发和优化。
summary.en: OpenViking is an open-source context database specifically designed for AI Agents, utilizing a file system paradigm to unify the management of context (memory, resources, and skills) required by agents. It addresses fragmentation issues in traditional context management through innovative features like tiered context loading and directory recursive retrieval, enhancing retrieval effectiveness and supporting automatic context iteration, making agents smarter over time. Ideal for AI agent development and optimization.

summary.zh: PPT Agent 是一个多智能体的幻灯片生成工作流，支持跨平台运行，结合 LLM 生成与 Gemini 审查，输出高质量的 SVG 格式演示文稿。用户只需提供主题或需求描述，系统便能自动收集资料并生成结构化的幻灯片，适用于会议、发布会等场景，极大提高了内容制作的效率与质量。
summary.en: PPT Agent is a multi-agent slide generation workflow that supports cross-platform operation, combining LLM generation with Gemini review to produce high-quality SVG format presentations. Users simply provide a topic or requirement description, and the system automatically collects information and generates structured slides, making it ideal for meetings and launches, significantly enhancing content creation efficiency and quality.

metadata.name: so-novel
metadata.description: 小说下载｜网文下载 | 网络小说

summary.zh: So Novel 是一款高效的网页内容处理工具，旨在帮助用户从网络小说等网页中提取结构化信息，并导出为 EPUB、TXT、PDF 等多种电子文档格式。该工具适用于学习采集、格式转换和电子书制作等场景，支持多种安装方式，包括 Docker 和 Homebrew，具有友好的用户界面和灵活的使用方式。
summary.en: So Novel is an efficient web content processing tool designed to help users extract structured information from web novels and export it into various electronic document formats like EPUB, TXT, and PDF. It is suitable for scenarios such as learning collection, format conversion, and eBook creation. The tool supports multiple installation methods, including Docker and Homebrew, and features a user-friendly interface with flexible usage options.

metadata.name: Fanqie-Novel-Downloader-
metadata.description: 这是一个基于 Python 的番茄小说爬虫下载工具【仅供学习】，支持自动抓取整本书籍内容、处理字体解密映射，并合并为单个 TXT 文件。

summary.zh: Fanqie-Novel-Downloader 是一个基于 Python 的番茄小说下载工具，专为学习目的而设计。它能够自动抓取整本书籍内容，处理字体解密映射，并将内容合并为单个 TXT 文件，极大地方便了用户获取小说信息。该工具适合对网络爬虫和文本处理感兴趣的开发者。
summary.en: Fanqie-Novel-Downloader is a Python-based tool designed for educational purposes, enabling users to automatically scrape entire novels, handle font decryption mapping, and merge the content into a single TXT file. This tool is ideal for developers interested in web scraping and text processing.

metadata.name: geo-llms-toolkit
metadata.description: 自动化geo

summary.zh: geo-llms-toolkit 是一个开源的地理信息自动化工具集，支持独立命令行界面和 WordPress 插件两种交付方式。其核心功能包括 GEO 扫描、LLMS 生成、竞品监控及外联流程管理，适用于各种网站的自动化运维。通过简化操作流程和提供详细的监控报告，该工具集显著提升了网站的 SEO 和 GEO 效能。
summary.en: The geo-llms-toolkit is an open-source automation toolkit for geographic information, offering both a standalone CLI and a WordPress plugin. Its core functionalities include GEO scanning, LLMS generation, competitor monitoring, and outreach process management, making it suitable for automating operations across various websites. By streamlining workflows and providing detailed monitoring reports, this toolkit significantly enhances website SEO and GEO performance.

metadata.name: Yuxi
metadata.description: 结合知识库管理的 多租户 Agent Harness 平台。 An agent harness that integrates a LightRAG knowledge base and knowledge graphs. Build with LangChain + Vue + FastAPI, support DeepAgents、MinerU PDF、Neo4j 、MCP.

summary.zh: Yuxi 是一个基于大模型的智能体开发平台，结合了知识库管理与知识图谱，采用 LangChain v1、Vue 和 FastAPI 构建。其核心特性包括支持多格式文档上传、知识图谱构建与可视化、以及灵活的智能体开发机制，适用于构建面向真实业务的智能体系统，快速转化文档为可推理的知识库，提升知识管理效率。
summary.en: Yuxi is an agent development platform based on large models, integrating knowledge base management and knowledge graphs, built with LangChain v1, Vue, and FastAPI. Its core features include multi-format document uploads, knowledge graph construction and visualization, and a flexible agent development mechanism, suitable for building business-oriented agent systems and rapidly converting documents into inferable knowledge bases, enhancing knowledge management efficiency.

metadata.name: gemini-skill
metadata.description: gemini drawing MCP & skill through browser, can be used in openclaw or any agent that supports MCP. Gemini画图 MCP和sill，支持龙虾或任何agent使用٩(๑>◡<๑)۶

summary.zh: Gemini Skill 是一个通过浏览器操作 Gemini 的工具，支持 AI 生图、对话及图片提取等功能。该项目采用 MCP 协议，能够与任何支持 MCP 的客户端进行交互，适用于需要自动化图像生成和处理的场景。其核心技术包括独立的 Daemon 模式和多轮对话管理，提升了用户体验和操作效率。
summary.en: Gemini Skill is a tool for operating Gemini through the browser, supporting features like AI image generation, conversation, and image extraction. Utilizing the MCP protocol, it interacts with any MCP-compatible client, making it suitable for automated image generation and processing scenarios. Key technologies include an independent Daemon mode and multi-turn conversation management, enhancing user experience and operational efficiency.

metadata.name: AI-Scientist-v2
metadata.description: The AI Scientist-v2: Workshop-Level Automated Scientific Discovery via Agentic Tree Search

summary.zh: AI Scientist-v2 是一个全自动化的科学研究系统，能够自主生成假设、进行实验、分析数据并撰写科学论文。与其前身相比，AI Scientist-v2 采用了进阶的代理树搜索方法，消除了对人类模板的依赖，适用于更广泛的机器学习领域。该系统的核心价值在于其探索性和自主性，为科学探索提供了新的可能性。
summary.en: AI Scientist-v2 is a fully autonomous scientific research system capable of generating hypotheses, conducting experiments, analyzing data, and writing scientific manuscripts. Unlike its predecessor, it employs an advanced agentic tree search, removing reliance on human-authored templates and generalizing across various machine learning domains. Its core value lies in its exploratory and autonomous nature, offering new possibilities for scientific discovery.

summary.zh: Any Auto Register 是一个多平台账号自动注册与管理系统，支持插件化扩展和内置 Web UI，能够自动拉起本地 Turnstile Solver。项目基于原有代码进行二次开发，增加了多邮箱服务、并发注册、实时日志等功能，适用于需要快速注册多个账号的场景，特别是在使用 Kiro 等平台时，提供了高成功率的自建邮箱方案。
summary.en: Any Auto Register is a multi-platform account auto-registration and management system that supports plugin extensions and features a built-in Web UI, capable of automatically invoking the local Turnstile Solver. The project is a fork that enhances functionalities such as multiple email services, concurrent registration, and real-time logging, making it suitable for scenarios requiring rapid account creation, especially with platforms like Kiro, offering a high success rate with self-built email solutions.

metadata.name: opencow
metadata.description: One task, one agent, delivered. The open-source platform for task-driven autonomous AI agents.OpenCow assigns an autonomous AI agent to every task — features, campaigns,  reports, audits — and delivers them in parallel. Full context. Full control. Every department. 🐄

summary.zh: OpenCow是一个开源平台，旨在为每个任务分配一个自主AI代理，能够并行处理各种任务，如活动、报告和审计。该平台通过提供完整的上下文和控制，帮助团队高效交付成果，适用于各类组织，提升工作效率和协作能力。
summary.en: OpenCow is an open-source platform that assigns an autonomous AI agent to each task, enabling parallel processing of various tasks such as campaigns, reports, and audits. By providing full context and control, it enhances team efficiency and collaboration, making it suitable for diverse organizations.

metadata.name: yoyo-evolve
metadata.description: A Truman Show of a self-evolving AI coding agent. It writes its own code. Growing up in public.

summary.zh: yoyo是一个开源的编码代理，能够自主演化。它通过每日一次的提交，自动读取自身源代码，选择改进并实施，支持多文件编辑、测试管理和Git操作。yoyo具备流式输出、对话历史跟踪和多种工具集成，能够在不同提供者间切换，适用于各种编程语言项目，是开发者提升效率的强大助手。
summary.en: yoyo is an open-source coding agent that evolves itself through daily commits. It autonomously reads its own source code, selects improvements, and implements them while supporting multi-file edits, test management, and Git operations. With features like streaming output, conversation history tracking, and multi-provider support, yoyo serves as a powerful assistant for developers to enhance their productivity across various programming language projects.

metadata.name: awesome-autoresearch
metadata.description: Curated list of AutoResearch use cases with optimization traces and open source implementations

summary.zh: Awesome AutoResearch 是一个精心策划的 AutoResearch 用例列表，包含优化轨迹和开源实现。每个条目都提供了实际优化过程的链接，展示了智能体的尝试过程而非仅仅是最终结果。该项目的核心是一个优化工作流，通过迭代优化代码文件，广泛应用于语言模型训练、GPU 内核优化等多个领域，具有极高的实用价值和技术亮点。
summary.en: Awesome AutoResearch is a curated list of AutoResearch use cases featuring optimization traces and open-source implementations. Each entry includes a link to the actual optimization trajectory, showcasing the agent's attempts rather than just the final results. The core of the project is an optimization workflow that iteratively optimizes code files, widely applicable in areas like language model training and GPU kernel optimization, demonstrating high practical value and technical highlights.

metadata.name: trackers
metadata.description: Trackers gives you clean, modular re-implementations of leading multi-object tracking algorithms released under the permissive Apache 2.0 license. You combine them with any detection model you already use.

summary.zh: Trackers 提供了领先的多目标跟踪算法的干净、模块化重实现，允许用户与现有的检测模型无缝结合。该项目支持从命令行或 Python 集成，适用于视频、网络摄像头和 RTSP 流等多种输入源。其核心技术包括多种高效的跟踪算法，如 ByteTrack 和 SORT，适合实时应用场景，提升物体检测的准确性与效率。
summary.en: Trackers offers clean, modular re-implementations of leading multi-object tracking algorithms, allowing seamless integration with existing detection models. The project supports various input sources, including videos, webcams, and RTSP streams, and can be utilized via CLI or Python. Its core technologies include efficient tracking algorithms like ByteTrack and SORT, suitable for real-time applications, enhancing the accuracy and efficiency of object detection.

metadata.name: tentix
metadata.description: TenTix (10x Efficiency) - An AI native customer service platform with 10x accelerated resolution. Support MCP extension, and AI knowlage base system.

summary.zh: TenTix 是一款 AI 原生客服平台，提供 10 倍加速的客户问题解决方案。其核心功能包括智能工作流、模块化架构和多渠道通知，能够显著减少人工干预并提升客户满意度。该平台支持灵活的扩展，适用于各种客户服务场景，尤其适合需要高效响应的企业。通过结合 PostgreSQL 和 pgvector，TenTix 实现了强大的知识库管理与智能回复功能。
summary.en: TenTix is an AI-native customer service platform that offers 10x accelerated issue resolution. Its core features include intelligent workflows, a modular architecture, and multi-channel notifications, significantly reducing human intervention while enhancing customer satisfaction. The platform supports flexible extensions, making it ideal for various customer service scenarios, especially for enterprises requiring rapid responses. By integrating PostgreSQL and pgvector, TenTix achieves robust knowledge base management and intelligent reply capabilities.

metadata.name: xiaohongshuritter
metadata.description: 用于小红书的多账号多并发MCP

summary.zh: xiaohongshuritter 是一款专为企业设计的小红书多账号并发管理系统，支持多租户和多平台部署（Docker、源码、OpenClaw）。其核心功能包括账号状态管理、并发控制及自动化发布能力，适用于企业内部多个品牌的内容运营，提供高效的图文和视频发布、搜索与评论功能，助力企业实现内容管理的自动化与高效化。
summary.en: xiaohongshuritter is an enterprise-oriented multi-account concurrency management system for Xiaohongshu, supporting multi-tenancy and multi-platform deployment (Docker, source code, OpenClaw). Its core features include account status management, concurrency control, and automated publishing capabilities, suitable for internal brand content operations, providing efficient text and video publishing, search, and commenting functions to help enterprises achieve automation and efficiency in content management.

metadata.name: opentu
metadata.description: 开放的AI应用平台

summary.zh: Opentu是一个基于AI的图片和视频创作平台，提供思维导图、流程图和自由画等功能，适用于教育、设计和创意行业。其一体化白板支持多种AI生成模型，用户可以轻松生成高质量的图像和视频，具备丰富的编辑工具和自动保存功能，兼容移动设备，完全免费且开源，致力于提升创作效率与体验。
summary.en: Opentu is an AI-driven platform for image and video creation, offering features like mind mapping, flowcharting, and free drawing, suitable for education, design, and creative industries. Its integrated whiteboard supports various AI generation models, enabling users to easily create high-quality images and videos, with rich editing tools and auto-save functionality, mobile compatibility, and is completely free and open-source, aiming to enhance creative efficiency and experience.

metadata.name: openwechat-claw
metadata.description: AI-native WeChat for OpenClaw. Relay server + Skill — register, messaging, friends, inbox, discovery, block. .data persistence, optional SSE. HTTP + plain text, LLM-friendly.

summary.zh: OpenWeChat-Claw 是一款基于 AI 的微信即时通讯解决方案，集成了注册、好友管理、消息传递和本地数据持久化等功能。该项目支持实时消息推送和批量未读消息拉取，适用于需要高效沟通和数据管理的用户。其独特之处在于与 OpenClaw 的无缝集成，提供了简化的自然语言交互体验。
summary.en: OpenWeChat-Claw is an AI-native instant messaging solution for WeChat, featuring registration, friend management, messaging, and local data persistence. The project supports real-time message push and batch unread message retrieval, catering to users needing efficient communication and data management. Its uniqueness lies in seamless integration with OpenClaw, offering a simplified natural language interaction experience.

metadata.name: superpowers-zh
metadata.description: 🦸 AI 编程超能力 · 中文增强版 — superpowers（116k+ ⭐）完整汉化 + 6 个中国原创 skills，让 Claude Code / Copilot CLI / Hermes Agent / Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro / Gemini CLI 等 16 款 AI 编程工具真正会干活

summary.zh: superpowers-zh 是一款针对中国开发者的 AI 编程技能增强版，包含完整汉化及 6 个原创技能，支持 14 款主流 AI 编程工具。通过系统化的工作方法论，提升开发效率，从需求分析到代码审查，确保每个环节都经过验证，帮助开发者更好地与 AI 工具协作。
summary.en: superpowers-zh is an enhanced version of AI coding skills tailored for Chinese developers, featuring complete translations and 6 original skills, supporting 14 mainstream AI coding tools. By providing a systematic methodology, it enhances development efficiency from requirement analysis to code review, ensuring each step is validated for better collaboration with AI tools.

metadata.name: openclaw-control-center
metadata.description: Turn OpenClaw from a black box into a local control center you can see, trust, and control.

summary.zh: OpenClaw控制中心将OpenClaw从黑箱变为可视化的本地控制中心，旨在为非技术操作员提供可观察性和确定性。该平台提供健康状态、使用情况、任务和协作等功能，确保安全性和易用性，适合希望集中管理OpenClaw的用户和团队。
summary.en: The OpenClaw Control Center transforms OpenClaw from a black box into a visual local control hub, designed for non-technical operators seeking observability and certainty. It offers features like health status, usage tracking, task management, and collaboration, ensuring safety and usability for users and teams managing OpenClaw.

metadata.name: cursor-byok-server
metadata.description: Infinite BYOK in Cursor https://github.com/leookun/cursor-byok/releases

summary.zh: cursor-byok-server 是 Cursor 助手 Pro 模式的服务端，支持无限量的 Tab 和 BYOK（Bring Your Own Key）功能，允许用户自定义 API。该服务通过具有 BYOK 资格的 token 将 Cursor Tab 和 Agent 流量转发到官方服务，确保安全性和灵活性。此服务为 Cursor 助手的中期过渡方案，未来将被本地模式替代。
summary.en: The cursor-byok-server is the backend for the Pro mode of the Cursor Assistant, supporting unlimited Tabs and BYOK (Bring Your Own Key) functionality for custom API usage. It forwards Cursor Tab and Agent traffic to official services using a BYOK-qualified token, ensuring security and flexibility. This service serves as a transitional solution for the Cursor Assistant, which will eventually be replaced by a local mode.

summary.zh: TurboQuant+ 是对 TurboQuant 的实现，专注于通过 KV 缓存压缩提升本地 LLM 推理效率。该项目提供了实验性集成，允许在不同硬件和后端之间进行基准测试和质量验证。核心技术包括 PolarQuant 和 Walsh-Hadamard 旋转，能够实现 3.8-6.4 倍的 KV 缓存压缩，且在长上下文中保持接近的解码速度。该项目的发现表明，V 压缩对注意力质量影响微乎其微，而 K 压缩则是质量下降的主要原因。
summary.en: TurboQuant+ is an implementation of TurboQuant, focusing on enhancing local LLM inference efficiency through KV cache compression. The project offers experimental integrations that allow benchmarking and quality validation across different hardware and backends. Core technologies include PolarQuant and Walsh-Hadamard rotation, achieving 3.8-6.4x KV cache compression while maintaining near-equivalent decoding speeds in long contexts. Key findings indicate that V compression has negligible effects on attention quality, while K compression is the primary cause of quality degradation.

metadata.name: xiaohongshu-auto-operation
metadata.description: 小红书账号全自动运营系统 - OpenClaw Skill

summary.zh: 小红书自动化运营系统提供了从选题策划到数据分析的全流程自动化解决方案。核心功能包括每日自动选题、内容生成、封面制作、定时发布及数据分析，旨在显著提升运营效率，节省90%时间。该系统基于OpenClaw框架，结合Playwright实现浏览器自动化，适合希望优化小红书运营的用户。
summary.en: The Xiaohongshu Automation Operation System offers a comprehensive automated solution from topic planning to data analysis. Key features include daily automated topic selection, content generation, cover creation, scheduled publishing, and data analysis, aiming to significantly enhance operational efficiency and save 90% of time. Built on the OpenClaw framework and utilizing Playwright for browser automation, it is ideal for users looking to optimize their Xiaohongshu operations.

metadata.name: agent-framework
metadata.description: A framework for building, orchestrating and deploying AI agents and multi-agent workflows with support for Python and .NET.

summary.zh: Microsoft Agent Framework 是一个多语言框架，旨在构建、编排和部署 AI 代理及多代理工作流，支持 Python 和 .NET。该框架提供从简单聊天代理到复杂的图形化工作流编排的全面解决方案，具备数据流连接、实验性功能包和交互式开发者 UI，适合开发者在多种场景中快速构建智能应用。
summary.en: The Microsoft Agent Framework is a multi-language framework designed for building, orchestrating, and deploying AI agents and multi-agent workflows, supporting both Python and .NET. It offers a comprehensive solution ranging from simple chat agents to complex graph-based orchestration, featuring data flow connections, experimental packages, and an interactive developer UI, making it suitable for developers to quickly create intelligent applications in various scenarios.

metadata.name: django-vue-lyadmin
metadata.description: django vue3 python3 terminal ssh monitor crontab and other modules开箱即用后台管理系统，RABC权限控制、内置服务监控面板、终端服务webssh、微服务框架、支付第三方登录等

summary.zh: Django-Vue-LyAdmin 是一个基于 Python Django 和 Vue3 的现代化低代码中后台管理系统，提供开箱即用的企业级解决方案。其核心特色包括低代码开发、前后端分离、完善的权限体系和高性能支持，适用于服务监控、终端管理和多种业务场景。内置商城、支付和文件管理等模块，使其成为开发者的理想选择。
summary.en: Django-Vue-LyAdmin is a modern low-code backend management system based on Python Django and Vue3, offering out-of-the-box enterprise-level solutions. Key features include low-code development, front-end and back-end separation, a comprehensive permission system, and high-performance support, suitable for service monitoring, terminal management, and various business scenarios. Built-in modules for e-commerce, payment, and file management make it an ideal choice for developers.

metadata.name: claw-code
metadata.description: The repo is finally unlocked. enjoy the party! The fastest repo in history to surpass 100K stars ⭐. Join Discord: https://discord.gg/5TUQKqFWd Built in Rust using oh-my-codex.

summary.zh: Claw Code 项目是一个基于 Rust 的高效工具集，旨在提供更好的代码执行和管理能力。该项目在短时间内迅速获得了超过 100K 的星标，展示了其在开发者社区中的广泛认可。其核心特性包括 API 客户端、会话状态管理和插件模型，适用于需要高性能和内存安全的应用场景。
summary.en: Claw Code is an efficient toolset built in Rust, aimed at enhancing code execution and management capabilities. The project rapidly gained over 100K stars, showcasing its broad recognition within the developer community. Key features include an API client, session state management, and a plugin model, making it suitable for applications requiring high performance and memory safety.

metadata.name: PPT-AGENT
metadata.description: 一个基于 AI 的 PPT 自动生成工具，输入主题即可自动生成大纲、页面内容与视觉稿，并输出 .pptx 文件，支持 SVG 和 HTML 两种渲染链路。

summary.zh: PPT-AGENT 是一款基于 LLM 的 AI PPT 自动生成工具，用户只需输入主题即可自动生成大纲、页面内容和视觉稿，并输出为 .pptx 文件。该工具支持两种渲染链路：SVG 和 HTML，推荐使用 HTML 渲染以减少文本溢出问题。其核心特性包括自动扩写内容、生成视觉稿及支持 OpenAI 接口，适用于企业、教育等多种场景。
summary.en: PPT-AGENT is an AI-powered PPT automation tool based on LLM, allowing users to generate outlines, page content, and visual drafts by simply inputting a topic, outputting as .pptx files. It supports two rendering pipelines: SVG and HTML, with HTML recommended to minimize text overflow issues. Key features include automatic content expansion, visual draft generation, and OpenAI compatibility, making it suitable for various scenarios like business and education.

metadata.name: flygon-dahanghai
metadata.description: :books: 龙哥大航海

summary.zh: 龙哥大航海是一个基于Docker和NPM的文档项目，提供了在线阅读和本地部署的功能。该项目适合需要快速访问和管理文档的开发者，支持多种环境下的使用，具有良好的可扩展性和易用性。
summary.en: Long Ge's Great Voyage is a documentation project based on Docker and NPM, offering online reading and local deployment capabilities. It is suitable for developers needing quick access and management of documentation, featuring good scalability and usability across various environments.

metadata.name: spec_driven_develop
metadata.description: A cross-platform AI agent skill that turns "rewrite this in Rust" or "migrate to microservices" into a disciplined, document-driven workflow — analyze, decompose, track, execute. One SKILL.md, no framework, no runtime. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, or any agent that reads Markdown.

summary.zh: Spec-Driven Develop 是一个平台无关的 AI 代理技能，旨在自动化大规模复杂任务的预开发工作流程。它通过一个简单的 SKILL.md 文件，教会任何 AI 编码代理一种结构化的方法论，支持项目分析、任务分解、进度跟踪等功能，适合已有工作流程的团队和多平台用户，提供灵活的控制而非封闭的黑箱流程。
summary.en: Spec-Driven Develop is a platform-agnostic AI agent skill that automates the pre-development workflow for large-scale complex tasks. Using a single SKILL.md file, it teaches any AI coding agent a structured methodology, enabling project analysis, task decomposition, and progress tracking. It is ideal for teams with existing workflows and multi-platform users, offering flexibility and control rather than a closed black-box pipeline.

metadata.name: Mac-list
metadata.description: Mac软件清单、Mac使用技巧整理，正在不断完善中。努力做到最全。

summary.zh: 该项目提供了一份全面的Mac软件清单和使用技巧，旨在帮助用户高效利用Mac设备。涵盖了启动工具、截图、浏览器、护眼工具等多个类别，推荐了多款实用软件，适合各类Mac用户。项目持续更新，力求成为最全的Mac软件资源库。
summary.en: This project offers a comprehensive list of Mac software and usage tips, aimed at helping users maximize their Mac experience. It covers various categories including launch tools, screenshot utilities, browsers, and eye-care tools, recommending multiple practical applications suitable for all Mac users. The project is continuously updated to become the most complete resource for Mac software.

metadata.name: awesome-seedance-2-guide
metadata.description: Complete guide to Seedance 2.0 — multimodal AI video generation with image, video, audio & text input. Prompts, use cases & practical examples.

summary.zh: Seedance 2.0 是一款多模态 AI 视频生成工具，支持图像、视频、音频和文本四种输入形式。该指南提供了详细的使用案例和实用示例，展示了如何通过自然语言描述来实现可控的创作。适用于广告、叙事和复杂场景等多种应用场景，帮助用户轻松生成高质量视频内容。
summary.en: Seedance 2.0 is a multimodal AI video generation tool that supports image, video, audio, and text inputs. This guide offers detailed use cases and practical examples, showcasing how to achieve controllable creation through natural language descriptions. It is suitable for various applications such as advertising, narrative, and complex scenes, enabling users to easily generate high-quality video content.

metadata.name: iina
metadata.description: The modern video player for macOS.

summary.zh: IINA 是一款现代化的 macOS 视频播放器，基于 mpv 构建，具备卓越的解码能力。它支持多种功能，如字幕、播放列表、章节、Force Touch 和 Touch Bar，用户界面可自定义，适合各种视频和音频播放需求。IINA 还提供在线字幕搜索、无限播放历史和交互式设置，适合普通用户和高级用户使用。
summary.en: IINA is a modern video player for macOS, built on mpv, offering exceptional decoding capabilities. It supports features like subtitles, playlists, chapters, Force Touch, and Touch Bar, with a customizable user interface suitable for various video and audio playback needs. IINA also provides online subtitle searching, unlimited playback history, and interactive settings, catering to both casual and advanced users.

metadata.name: awesome-claude-skills
metadata.description: A curated list of awesome Claude Skills, resources, and tools for customizing Claude AI workflows

summary.zh: Awesome Claude Skills 是一个精心策划的资源列表，旨在提升 Claude AI 的工作流效率。该项目提供多种 Claude 技能，涵盖文档处理、开发工具、数据分析等领域，支持与 500 多个应用的连接，帮助用户实现自动化任务和个性化定制。通过这些技能，用户可以让 Claude 执行发送邮件、创建问题等实际操作，极大地提升工作效率。
summary.en: Awesome Claude Skills is a curated resource list aimed at enhancing the efficiency of Claude AI workflows. This project offers various Claude Skills across domains such as document processing, development tools, and data analysis, enabling connections to over 500 applications for task automation and customization. With these skills, users can have Claude perform real actions like sending emails and creating issues, significantly boosting productivity.

metadata.name: qiushi-skill
metadata.description: 求是Skill——从经典唯物辩证法与实践哲学中提炼出一条总原则和九大方法论工具武装AI大脑。Qiushi-Skill: Build agents that investigate first, focus on the main contradiction, validate in practice, and keep pushing until the work is actually done.

summary.zh: 求是Skill是一个AI技能集合，基于教员思想提炼出一条总原则和九大方法论工具，旨在系统性地提升AI的思维能力。该项目强调实事求是的原则，通过矛盾分析、调查研究等方法解决复杂问题，适用于任何需要分析和解决问题的场景，推动AI从单纯的工具转变为主动思考的行动者。
summary.en: Qiushi Skill is a collection of AI agent skills derived from the thoughts of educators, encapsulating a core principle and nine methodological tools to systematically enhance AI's cognitive abilities. Emphasizing the principle of seeking truth from facts, it employs methods like contradiction analysis and research to tackle complex issues, applicable in any scenario requiring problem analysis and resolution, transforming AI from a mere tool into an active thinker.

summary.zh: 本项目是一个开源的高考志愿填报决策知识库，旨在帮助来自普通家庭的学生和家长有效填报志愿。通过提供决策框架和AI时代的专业选择动态校正，用户可以在微信等平台上获取AI顾问服务，提升志愿填报的科学性和准确性。核心亮点在于其独特的决策顺序和全面的知识模块，帮助用户理清思路，做出明智选择。
summary.en: This project is an open-source decision-making knowledge base for college entrance examination volunteer applications, aimed at assisting students and parents from ordinary families in effectively filling out their applications. By providing a decision-making framework and dynamic corrections for professional choices in the AI era, users can access AI advisory services on platforms like WeChat, enhancing the scientific and accurate nature of their applications. Its unique decision-making sequence and comprehensive knowledge modules are key highlights that help users clarify their thoughts and make informed choices.

metadata.name: awesome-persona-skills
metadata.description: 同事.skill、老板.skill、前任.skill、自己.skill、永生.skill、女娲.skill……

summary.zh: 《Awesome Persona Skills》是一个创新的技能蒸馏项目，通过将不同人物角色转化为可交互的AI技能，帮助用户在职场、人际关系、自我成长等领域提升能力。项目涵盖从同事、老板到情感陪伴等多种角色，提供丰富的技能列表，旨在让用户主动掌握和应用这些技能，促进个人发展与人际互动。
summary.en: The 'Awesome Persona Skills' project is an innovative skill distillation initiative that transforms various character roles into interactive AI skills, aiding users in enhancing their capabilities in workplace, interpersonal relationships, and self-growth. Covering a wide range of roles from colleagues to emotional companions, it offers a rich list of skills aimed at empowering users to proactively master and apply these skills for personal development and social interaction.

metadata.name: nuwa-skill
metadata.description: 你想蒸馏的下一个员工，何必是同事。蒸馏任何人的思维方式——心智模型、决策启发式、表达DNA。Distill how anyone thinks.

summary.zh: 女娲技能是一款创新工具，旨在蒸馏名人的思维方式和决策框架，帮助用户获取乔布斯、马斯克等人的认知视角。用户只需输入名字，女娲便能自动调研并提炼出其核心思维模型、表达风格及决策启发式，适用于个人成长、职业规划和决策分析等场景。该项目通过提取深层认知操作系统，提升用户的思维能力和决策质量。
summary.en: Nuwa Skill is an innovative tool designed to distill the thinking processes and decision-making frameworks of renowned figures, helping users gain insights from the cognitive perspectives of individuals like Steve Jobs and Elon Musk. By simply inputting a name, Nuwa automatically researches and extracts core mental models, expression styles, and decision heuristics, applicable in personal development, career planning, and decision analysis. This project enhances users' thinking abilities and decision quality by extracting deeper cognitive operating systems.

summary.zh: baoyu-skills 是一个旨在提升日常工作效率的技能库，专为 Claude Code 设计。该项目提供多种内容生成和实用工具技能，用户可以通过 ClawHub 平台单独安装所需技能。其核心亮点在于支持多种内容样式和布局的生成，适用于内容创作者和需要高效工具的用户。
summary.en: baoyu-skills is a skill repository designed to enhance daily work efficiency for Claude Code users. It offers various content generation and utility skills, allowing users to install specific skills individually through the ClawHub platform. The key highlight is its support for generating diverse content styles and layouts, making it ideal for content creators and those needing efficient tools.

metadata.name: hermes-agent-orange-book
metadata.description: Hermes Agent 从入门到精通 · 橙皮书系列 · Nous Research 开源 AI Agent 框架实战指南

summary.zh: Hermes Agent 橙皮书是 Nous Research 开源 AI Agent 框架的实战指南，涵盖了从基础概念到高级应用的17章内容。该框架独特之处在于内置自我提升学习循环、三层记忆系统及自动技能创建与演化，适合开发者和 AI 爱好者深入理解和构建个人 AI Agent。
summary.en: The Hermes Agent Orange Book is a practical guide to the open-source AI Agent framework by Nous Research, covering 17 chapters from foundational concepts to advanced applications. Its unique features include a built-in self-improving learning loop, a three-layer memory system, and automatic skill creation and evolution, making it ideal for developers and AI enthusiasts looking to understand and build personal AI Agents.

metadata.name: hermes-agent
metadata.description: The agent that grows with you

summary.zh: Hermes Agent 是一款自我提升的 AI 代理，具备内置学习循环，能够从经验中创建和改进技能。它支持多种平台（如 Telegram、Discord、Slack 等），并可在云端运行，适应不同的基础设施需求。该代理通过独特的会话记忆和自动化调度功能，实现跨会话的知识回顾与技能自我提升，适合需要高效任务管理和智能助手的用户。
summary.en: Hermes Agent is a self-improving AI agent featuring a built-in learning loop that creates and enhances skills from experience. It supports multiple platforms (such as Telegram, Discord, Slack, etc.) and can run in the cloud, adapting to various infrastructure needs. With unique session memory and automated scheduling capabilities, it facilitates cross-session knowledge recall and skill self-improvement, making it ideal for users requiring efficient task management and intelligent assistance.

metadata.name: claude-video-kit
metadata.description: AI-powered short-form video pipeline: TTS + Whisper + Remotion. Write a JSON script, get a vertical video.

summary.zh: claude-video-kit 是一个基于 AI 的短视频制作工具，支持通过 JSON 脚本生成垂直视频。该工具集成了文本转语音（TTS）、Whisper 字幕对齐和 Remotion 渲染，旨在简化视频制作流程，适合开发者使用。用户只需一条命令即可完成从音频生成到视频渲染的全过程，且支持多种幻灯片类型和双 TTS 后端，极大提升了视频创作的效率与灵活性。
summary.en: claude-video-kit is an AI-powered short video creation tool that generates vertical videos from JSON scripts. It integrates TTS, Whisper caption alignment, and Remotion rendering, simplifying the video production process for developers. Users can execute a single command to complete the entire workflow from audio generation to video rendering, supporting various slide types and dual TTS backends, significantly enhancing the efficiency and flexibility of video creation.

metadata.name: php-jwt
metadata.description: PHP package for JWT

summary.zh: PHP-JWT 是一个简单的 PHP 库，用于编码和解码 JSON Web Tokens (JWT)，符合 RFC 7519 标准。它支持多种加密算法，方便开发者在 PHP 应用中实现安全的身份验证和信息传递。通过 Composer 安装，用户可以轻松集成到现有项目中，适用于需要用户认证和数据保护的场景。
summary.en: PHP-JWT is a simple PHP library for encoding and decoding JSON Web Tokens (JWT), conforming to RFC 7519 standards. It supports various encryption algorithms, making it easy for developers to implement secure authentication and information transmission in PHP applications. Easily integrated into existing projects via Composer, it is suitable for scenarios requiring user authentication and data protection.

metadata.name: rtk
metadata.description: CLI proxy that reduces LLM token consumption by 60-90% on common dev commands. Single Rust binary, zero dependencies

summary.zh: RTK是一个高性能的CLI代理，能够在常见开发命令中将大型语言模型（LLM）的令牌消耗降低60-90%。它以单个Rust二进制文件形式提供，支持100多个命令，且无任何依赖，适用于需要优化令牌使用的开发环境，显著提升开发效率。
summary.en: RTK is a high-performance CLI proxy that reduces token consumption of large language models (LLMs) by 60-90% on common development commands. Packaged as a single Rust binary with zero dependencies, it supports over 100 commands, making it ideal for development environments that require optimized token usage, significantly enhancing productivity.

metadata.name: pi-mono
metadata.description: AI agent toolkit: coding agent CLI, unified LLM API, TUI & web UI libraries, Slack bot, vLLM pods

summary.zh: Pi Monorepo 是一个用于构建 AI 代理和管理 LLM 部署的工具集，包含统一的 LLM API、交互式编码代理 CLI、Slack 机器人及 TUI 和 Web UI 库。该项目专注于提升开源编码代理的实用性，鼓励用户分享真实的编码会话数据，以便不断优化 AI 代理的性能和功能。
summary.en: Pi Monorepo is a toolkit for building AI agents and managing LLM deployments, featuring a unified LLM API, interactive coding agent CLI, Slack bot, and TUI & web UI libraries. The project focuses on enhancing the practicality of open-source coding agents, encouraging users to share real coding session data to continuously optimize the performance and capabilities of AI agents.

metadata.name: awesome-design-md
metadata.description: A collection of DESIGN.md files inspired by popular brand design systems. Drop one into your project and let coding agents generate a matching UI.

summary.zh: VoltAgent的awesome-design-md项目提供了一系列灵感来源于知名品牌设计系统的DESIGN.md文件。用户只需将这些文件放入项目中，便可利用AI代理生成匹配的用户界面。该项目简化了设计流程，允许开发者通过简单的Markdown文件定义UI外观，极大提升了开发效率和一致性。
summary.en: The awesome-design-md project by VoltAgent offers a curated collection of DESIGN.md files inspired by popular brand design systems. Users can drop these files into their projects and leverage AI agents to generate matching user interfaces. This project simplifies the design process, allowing developers to define UI appearance through straightforward Markdown files, significantly enhancing development efficiency and consistency.

metadata.name: awesome-persona-distill-skills
metadata.description: Curated list of Agent Skills centered on people, relationships, commemorative scenes, and methodological perspectives

summary.zh: 《Awesome Persona Distill Skills》是一个围绕人物、关系和纪念场景的代理技能汇总，旨在提炼个体的表达风格和决策框架。该项目通过多种技能工具，帮助用户从对话和数字痕迹中构建个性化的数字人格，适用于个人成长、职场沟通和情感整理等场景。其技术亮点在于对复杂人际关系的深度挖掘与应用。
summary.en: The 'Awesome Persona Distill Skills' repository curates a collection of agent skills focused on individuals, relationships, and commemorative scenes, aimed at distilling personal expression styles and decision frameworks. This project offers various skill tools to help users build personalized digital personas from dialogues and digital traces, applicable in personal development, workplace communication, and emotional reflection. Its technical highlight lies in the deep exploration and application of complex interpersonal relationships.

metadata.name: talk-normal
metadata.description: Make any LLM talk like a normal person. A system prompt that removes AI slop.

summary.zh: talk-normal 是一个系统提示工具，旨在使任何大型语言模型（LLM）以更自然的方式进行交流，消除冗余和无关信息。该工具经过测试，能够显著减少输出字符数，同时保留关键信息，适用于多种模型（如 GPT、Gemini、LLaMA 等）。其核心价值在于提高信息传递的效率，适用于需要简洁明了回答的场景。
summary.en: talk-normal is a system prompt tool designed to make any large language model (LLM) communicate more naturally by eliminating fluff and filler. It has been tested to significantly reduce output character count while preserving key information, working with various models (e.g., GPT, Gemini, LLaMA). Its core value lies in enhancing the efficiency of information delivery, suitable for scenarios requiring concise and clear answers.

metadata.name: VoxCPM
metadata.description: VoxCPM2: Tokenizer-Free TTS for Multilingual Speech Generation, Creative Voice Design, and True-to-Life Cloning

summary.zh: VoxCPM2 是一个无分词的文本到语音系统，采用端到端的扩散自回归架构，能够直接生成连续的语音表示。该系统支持30种语言，具备创造性声音设计和可控的声音克隆功能，输出高达48kHz的音质。其最新版本模型参数达到20亿，经过200万小时的多语言语音数据训练，能够根据自然语言描述生成全新声音，且支持实时流式合成，适用于多种创意语音生成场景。
summary.en: VoxCPM2 is a tokenizer-free Text-to-Speech system that utilizes an end-to-end diffusion autoregressive architecture to generate continuous speech representations. Supporting 30 languages, it features creative voice design and controllable voice cloning, producing audio at up to 48kHz quality. The latest version boasts 2 billion parameters trained on over 2 million hours of multilingual speech data, capable of generating entirely new voices from natural language descriptions and supporting real-time streaming, making it suitable for various creative speech generation applications.

metadata.name: QwenPaw
metadata.description: Your Personal AI Assistant; easy to install, deploy on your own machine or on the cloud; supports multiple chat apps with easily extensible capabilities.

summary.zh: QwenPaw 是一款个人 AI 助手，支持本地和云端部署，易于安装，能够与多个聊天应用连接。其核心价值在于用户对记忆和个性化的完全控制，数据安全性高，且具备内置的调度、文档处理等多种功能，支持自定义技能扩展，适合希望在不同场景中使用 AI 助手的用户。
summary.en: QwenPaw is a personal AI assistant that is easy to install and deploy either locally or in the cloud, connecting across multiple chat applications. Its core value lies in the user's complete control over memory and personalization, ensuring high data security. With built-in scheduling, document processing, and customizable skill extensions, it is ideal for users looking to utilize an AI assistant in various scenarios.

metadata.name: CowAgent
metadata.description: CowAgent (chatgpt-on-wechat) 是基于大模型的超级AI助理，能主动思考和任务规划、访问操作系统和外部资源、创造和执行Skills、通过长期记忆和知识库不断成长，比OpenClaw更轻量和便捷。同时支持微信、飞书、钉钉、企微、QQ、公众号、网页等接入，可选择DeepSeek/OpenAI/Claude/Gemini/ MiniMax/Qwen/GLM/LinkAI，能处理文本、语音、图片和文件，可快速搭建个人AI助理和企业数字员工。

summary.zh: CowAgent 是一款基于大模型的超级AI助理，具备主动思考、任务规划和多模态处理能力，支持微信、飞书、钉钉等多种接入方式。其核心技术包括长期记忆、个人知识库和技能系统，能够灵活切换多种AI模型，适用于个人和企业的智能助手需求。相比于OpenClaw，CowAgent更加轻量便捷，适合快速搭建个性化AI解决方案。
summary.en: CowAgent is a super AI assistant based on large models, featuring proactive thinking, task planning, and multimodal processing capabilities. It supports integration with various platforms like WeChat, Feishu, and DingTalk. Key technologies include long-term memory, personal knowledge base, and skill systems, allowing flexible switching of AI models. Compared to OpenClaw, CowAgent is lighter and more convenient, suitable for quickly building personalized AI solutions for individuals and enterprises.

metadata.name: LightRAG
metadata.description: [EMNLP2025] "LightRAG: Simple and Fast Retrieval-Augmented Generation"

summary.zh: LightRAG 是一个简单快速的检索增强生成框架，旨在提升自然语言处理任务的效率。它支持多种存储后端，并通过集成 OpenSearch 提供统一的数据存储解决方案。该项目特别适合需要快速生成和检索文本的应用场景，如对话系统和内容生成。其技术亮点包括易于部署的 Docker 支持和灵活的评估工具。
summary.en: LightRAG is a simple and fast retrieval-augmented generation framework designed to enhance the efficiency of natural language processing tasks. It supports multiple storage backends and provides a unified data storage solution through OpenSearch integration. This project is particularly suitable for applications requiring rapid text generation and retrieval, such as dialogue systems and content generation. Key highlights include easy deployment with Docker support and flexible evaluation tools.

metadata.name: agency-agents
metadata.description: A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.

summary.zh: 该项目提供了一整套AI代理，旨在提升工作流程效率。每个代理都是特定领域的专家，具备独特的个性和交付能力，涵盖前端开发、后端架构、移动应用等多个领域。用户可以通过简单的命令激活所需的代理，快速集成到现有工具中，适合需要高效、专业化AI支持的团队和个人。
summary.en: This project offers a complete suite of AI agents designed to enhance workflow efficiency. Each agent is a specialized expert with a unique personality and deliverables, covering areas like frontend development, backend architecture, and mobile applications. Users can activate the desired agents with simple commands, enabling quick integration into existing tools, making it ideal for teams and individuals seeking efficient, specialized AI support.

metadata.name: html-ppt-skill
metadata.description: HTML PPT Studio — AgentSkill with 24 themes, 31 layouts, 20+ animations for building professional HTML presentations

summary.zh: HTML PPT Studio 是一个专业的 HTML 演示文稿生成工具，提供 36 种主题、31 种布局和 47 种动画（包括 27 种 CSS 动画和 20 种 Canvas 特效）。用户可以通过简单的命令安装并使用这些资源，快速创建技术分享、产品发布等多种场景的演示文稿，适合需要高效、专业展示的用户。
summary.en: HTML PPT Studio is a professional HTML presentation generation tool that offers 36 themes, 31 layouts, and 47 animations (including 27 CSS animations and 20 canvas effects). Users can easily install and utilize these resources through a simple command to quickly create presentations for various scenarios such as tech sharing and product launches, making it ideal for users needing efficient and professional displays.

summary.zh: FateCat 是一个将专业命理排盘结果转化为 AI 可消费的结构化输入的工具，结合成熟算法与命理分析内核，提供统一的 CLI、Telegram、FastAPI 和 Agent 交付层。它解决了 AI 自排盘的不稳定性、外部命理仓库的分散性以及多样化交付场景的问题，确保命盘结果的可靠性和一致性。
summary.en: FateCat is a tool that transforms professional astrology chart results into AI-consumable structured inputs, combining mature algorithms with a pure astrology analysis core, offering a unified delivery layer through CLI, Telegram, FastAPI, and Agent. It addresses issues of instability in AI-generated charts, fragmentation of external astrology repositories, and diverse delivery scenarios, ensuring reliability and consistency of chart results.

metadata.name: android-reverse-engineering-skill
metadata.description: Claude Code skill to support Android app's reverse engineering

summary.zh: 该项目是一个Claude Code技能，旨在支持Android应用的逆向工程与API提取。它能够反编译APK、XAPK、JAR和AAR文件，提取应用使用的HTTP API，包括Retrofit端点和OkHttp调用，帮助开发者在没有原始源代码的情况下记录和重现这些API。项目还提供了对混淆代码的处理策略，适合安全研究和应用分析等场景。
summary.en: This project is a Claude Code skill designed for reverse engineering Android applications and extracting APIs. It decompiles APK, XAPK, JAR, and AAR files, extracting HTTP APIs used by the app, including Retrofit endpoints and OkHttp calls, enabling developers to document and reproduce them without the original source code. The project also offers strategies for handling obfuscated code, making it suitable for security research and application analysis.

metadata.name: GEOFlow
metadata.description: Open-source GEO content production system with AI tasks, review workflow, and publishing.

summary.zh: GEOFlow 是一个开源的 GEO/SEO 内容生产系统，集成了 AI 任务、审核工作流和发布功能。它支持多模型内容生成、批量任务调度和素材统一管理，适合快速搭建自动化内容站点或内部运营后台。通过 Docker 部署，用户可轻松管理文章和优化 SEO 元信息，提升内容运营效率。
summary.en: GEOFlow is an open-source GEO/SEO content production system that integrates AI tasks, review workflows, and publishing features. It supports multi-model content generation, batch task scheduling, and unified material management, making it suitable for quickly building automated content sites or internal operation backends. With Docker deployment, users can easily manage articles and optimize SEO metadata, enhancing content operation efficiency.

metadata.name: Mano-P
metadata.description: Mano-P: Open-source GUI-VLA agent for edge devices. #1 on OSWorld (specialized, 58.2%). Runs locally on Apple M4 Mac mini/MacBook — no data leaves your device.Mano-P 是一个开源 GUI-VLA 项目，支持在 Mac mini/MacBook 上或通过算力棒本地运行推理，实现纯视觉驱动的跨平台 GUI 自动化操作。数据完全本地处理，支持复杂多步骤任务规划与执行。

summary.zh: Mano-P是一个开源的GUI-VLA代理项目，专为边缘设备设计，支持在Apple M4 Mac mini和MacBook上本地运行推理。该项目实现了复杂的GUI自动化操作，支持多步骤任务规划，确保所有数据处理完全在本地进行，保护用户隐私。Mano-P适合开发者和企业用户，能够帮助他们构建个性化的AI解决方案，提升工作效率。
summary.en: Mano-P is an open-source GUI-VLA agent project designed for edge devices, enabling local inference on Apple M4 Mac mini and MacBook. It facilitates complex GUI automation and multi-step task planning while ensuring all data processing occurs locally, safeguarding user privacy. Mano-P is ideal for developers and enterprises looking to create personalized AI solutions to enhance productivity.

metadata.name: mobilerun
metadata.description: Automate your mobile devices with natural language commands - an LLM agnostic mobile Agent 🤖

summary.zh: Mobilerun 是一个强大的框架，支持通过自然语言命令自动化控制 Android 和 iOS 设备。它兼容多种大型语言模型（LLM）提供者，具备复杂任务的规划能力，易于使用的命令行界面，以及可扩展的 Python API，适合开发自定义自动化应用。该项目特别适合需要高效设备交互的开发者和技术爱好者。
summary.en: Mobilerun is a powerful framework for automating Android and iOS device control using natural language commands. It supports multiple LLM providers and features planning capabilities for complex tasks, an easy-to-use CLI, and an extensible Python API for custom automations. This project is ideal for developers and tech enthusiasts seeking efficient device interactions.

metadata.name: dbskill
metadata.description: dontbesilent 的商业诊断 Skills for Claude Code

summary.zh: dbskill 是 dontbesilent 提供的商业诊断工具箱，基于 12,307 条推文提炼出 13 个 Claude Code 技能，涵盖商业模式诊断、对标分析、内容创作等多方面应用。用户可灵活选择所需知识包，支持快速安装与更新，适用于各类商业决策与内容优化场景。其开放的知识库结构化信息，便于用户根据需求提取和应用。
summary.en: dbskill is a business diagnostic toolbox provided by dontbesilent, extracting 13 Claude Code skills from 12,307 tweets, covering areas like business model diagnosis, benchmarking, and content creation. Users can flexibly select the knowledge packages they need, supporting quick installation and updates, suitable for various business decision-making and content optimization scenarios. Its open knowledge base structures information for easy extraction and application based on user needs.

metadata.name: graphify
metadata.description: AI coding assistant skill (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Cursor, Gemini CLI, and more). Turn any folder of code, SQL schemas, R scripts, shell scripts, docs, papers, images, or videos into a queryable knowledge graph. App code + database schema + infrastructure in one graph.

summary.zh: Graphify 是一款 AI 编码助手技能，能够将任何代码、文档、图片或视频文件转化为可查询的知识图谱。通过多模态处理，Graphify 提取文件中的概念和关系，帮助用户快速理解代码库及其架构决策。支持多种编程语言和文件格式，提供交互式图形和详细报告，显著提高信息检索效率。
summary.en: Graphify is an AI coding assistant skill that transforms any folder of code, documents, images, or videos into a queryable knowledge graph. By employing multimodal processing, Graphify extracts concepts and relationships from files, enabling users to quickly understand codebases and architectural decisions. It supports multiple programming languages and file formats, offering interactive graphs and detailed reports to significantly enhance information retrieval efficiency.

metadata.name: openai-agents-python
metadata.description: A lightweight, powerful framework for multi-agent workflows

summary.zh: OpenAI Agents SDK 是一个轻量级且强大的框架，专为构建多智能体工作流而设计。它支持多种大型语言模型（LLM），包括 OpenAI 的响应和聊天完成 API，具有高度的灵活性和可扩展性。该框架提供了安全检查、会话管理和实时代理等功能，适用于需要长时间任务处理和人机协作的场景。
summary.en: The OpenAI Agents SDK is a lightweight yet powerful framework designed for building multi-agent workflows. It supports various large language models (LLMs), including OpenAI's Responses and Chat Completions APIs, offering high flexibility and scalability. The framework features safety checks, session management, and real-time agents, making it suitable for scenarios requiring long-duration task handling and human-in-the-loop collaboration.

metadata.name: omi
metadata.description: AI that sees your screen, listens to your conversations and tells you what to do

summary.zh: Omi 是一个开源的 AI 助手，能够实时捕捉用户的屏幕和对话，生成摘要和行动项，帮助用户更高效地管理信息。它支持桌面、手机和可穿戴设备，已被超过 30 万专业人士信赖。Omi 的核心技术包括语音识别、自然语言处理和云端服务，适合需要高效信息管理和决策支持的用户。
summary.en: Omi is an open-source AI assistant that captures your screen and conversations in real-time, generating summaries and action items to help users manage information more efficiently. It supports desktop, mobile, and wearable devices, trusted by over 300,000 professionals. Core technologies include speech recognition, natural language processing, and cloud services, suitable for users needing efficient information management and decision support.

metadata.name: paseo
metadata.description: Orchestrate coding agents remotely from your phone, desktop and CLI

summary.zh: Paseo 是一个强大的工具，允许用户通过手机、桌面和命令行界面远程协调多个编码代理。它支持自托管，确保用户可以在自己的开发环境中运行代理，并提供多种模型选择，如 Claude Code 和 Codex。该工具还具备语音控制功能，支持跨设备操作，注重隐私保护，确保无追踪和强制登录。适合开发者在不同场景下高效管理编码任务。
summary.en: Paseo is a powerful tool that allows users to orchestrate multiple coding agents remotely via phone, desktop, and CLI. It supports self-hosting, enabling users to run agents in their own development environments, and offers a variety of model options like Claude Code and Codex. The tool also features voice control, cross-device operation, and a privacy-first approach with no tracking or forced logins, making it ideal for developers to efficiently manage coding tasks in various scenarios.

metadata.name: voicebox
metadata.description: The open-source AI voice studio. Clone, dictate, create.

summary.zh: Voicebox 是一个开源的本地语音合成工作室，提供语音克隆、语音生成和效果应用等功能。用户可以在本地机器上处理多种语言的语音，支持多种 TTS 引擎和后处理效果，确保数据隐私。它适用于创建对话、播客和叙事项目，具有 API 接口，方便集成到其他应用中，适合开发者和创作者使用。
summary.en: Voicebox is an open-source local voice synthesis studio that offers voice cloning, speech generation, and effects application. Users can process speech in multiple languages on their local machines, supporting various TTS engines and post-processing effects while ensuring data privacy. It is suitable for creating conversations, podcasts, and narrative projects, featuring an API for easy integration into other applications, making it ideal for developers and creators.

metadata.name: cockpit-tools
metadata.description: 🚀 通用 AI IDE 账号管理工具：支持 Antigravity / Codex / GitHub Copilot / Windsurf / Kiro / Cursor / Gemini-cli / CodeBuddy，多账号切换、配额监控、自动唤醒与多开实例管理。 🚀 Universal AI IDE account manager for Antigravity / Codex / GitHub Copilot / Windsurf / Kiro / Cursor / Gemini-cli / CodeBuddy, with multi-account switching, quota monitoring, wake-up automation, and multi-insta

summary.zh: Cockpit Tools 是一款通用的 AI IDE 账号管理工具，支持多种平台如 Antigravity、Codex 和 GitHub Copilot。它提供多账号切换、配额监控、自动唤醒及多开实例管理等功能，帮助用户高效管理和利用不同 AI 账号的资源，提升开发效率。
summary.en: Cockpit Tools is a universal AI IDE account management tool that supports multiple platforms such as Antigravity, Codex, and GitHub Copilot. It offers features like multi-account switching, quota monitoring, wake-up automation, and multi-instance management, enabling users to efficiently manage and leverage resources from different AI accounts to enhance development productivity.

metadata.name: awesome-gpt-image-2-prompts
metadata.description: Curated GPT-Image-2 prompts fot the Openai API：image examples across portraits, posters, UI mockups, character sheets, and community experiments.

summary.zh: awesome-gpt-image-2-prompts 仓库汇集了高质量的 GPT-Image-2 提示和图像示例，涵盖肖像、海报、UI 设计、角色表和社区实验等多个领域。该项目旨在为用户提供可重用的提示模式和任务特定的案例，帮助创作者更有效地利用 GPT-Image-2 生成图像。适合设计师、开发者及AI爱好者。
summary.en: The awesome-gpt-image-2-prompts repository curates high-quality GPT-Image-2 prompts and image examples across various domains, including portraits, posters, UI mockups, character sheets, and community experiments. This project aims to provide reusable prompt patterns and task-specific cases, assisting creators in effectively utilizing GPT-Image-2 for image generation. Ideal for designers, developers, and AI enthusiasts.

metadata.name: ppt-master
metadata.description: AI generates natively editable PPTX from any document — real PowerPoint shapes with native animations, not images · by Hugo He

summary.zh: PPT Master 是一款利用 AI 技术从任何文档生成可编辑 PPTX 的工具，输出的内容为真实的 PowerPoint 形状和文本框，而非图像。用户只需将 PDF、DOCX、URL 或 Markdown 文件输入，便可获得可直接编辑的演示文稿，适用于需要快速制作演示的专业人士。该工具支持多种 AI IDE，确保数据本地处理，避免平台锁定。
summary.en: PPT Master is an AI-powered tool that generates natively editable PPTX files from any document, providing real PowerPoint shapes and text boxes instead of images. Users can input PDF, DOCX, URL, or Markdown files to obtain directly editable presentations, making it ideal for professionals needing quick presentations. The tool supports various AI IDEs, ensuring local data processing and avoiding platform lock-in.

metadata.name: gpt2api
metadata.description: 基于 chatgpt.com 逆向的 OpenAI 兼容 SaaS 网关 · GPT-IMAGE-2 稳定 · 批量出图 · 多账号池 · 高并发调度 · 积分计费 · 技术交流QQ 群 382446

summary.zh: gpt2api 是一个基于 chatgpt.com 逆向开发的 OpenAI 兼容 SaaS 网关，支持多账号池和高并发调度，提供批量出图和高清放大功能。该项目适用于希望将 ChatGPT 的能力以 API 形式提供给下游用户的开发者，具备积分计费和管理后台，适合 C 端和 B 端应用场景。
summary.en: gpt2api is an OpenAI-compatible SaaS gateway developed by reverse engineering chatgpt.com, featuring multi-account pools and high-concurrency scheduling. It offers batch image generation and high-definition upscaling. This project is suitable for developers looking to provide ChatGPT capabilities as an API to downstream users, with a points-based billing system and management backend, ideal for both C-end and B-end applications.

metadata.name: prompt-lens
metadata.description: 反推出AI视频的提示词，并配有音频分析功能，可提取视频中的台词文案，并且一句话就可剪辑出你要的视频

summary.zh: PromptLens 是一款AI视频提示词分析工具，能够自动提取视频中的关键帧和台词文案，并支持音频分析和视频剪辑功能。用户可通过简单的操作上传视频，获取生成的提示词，适用于内容创作者和视频编辑者，提升视频制作效率。
summary.en: PromptLens is an AI video prompt analysis tool that automatically extracts key frames and dialogue from videos, featuring audio analysis and video editing capabilities. Users can easily upload videos to obtain generated prompts, making it ideal for content creators and video editors to enhance production efficiency.

metadata.name: FastAPI-Template
metadata.description: A production-ready FastAPI backend template with clean architecture. 一个功能完整、架构清晰的企业级FastAPI后端模板，专为团队开发设计，开箱即用。

summary.zh: 该项目是一个企业级的FastAPI后端模板，采用清晰的三层架构，旨在为团队开发提供开箱即用的解决方案。它集成了JWT身份认证、RBAC权限控制和全面的安全防护措施，支持高并发和异步处理，适合构建高性能的Web应用。模板包含丰富的功能模块，如用户管理、API管理和文件管理，极大地提升了开发效率。
summary.en: This project is a production-ready FastAPI backend template designed for team development with a clear three-layer architecture. It integrates JWT authentication, RBAC access control, and comprehensive security measures, supporting high concurrency and asynchronous processing, making it suitable for building high-performance web applications. The template includes rich functional modules such as user management, API management, and file management, significantly enhancing development efficiency.

metadata.name: F5-TTS
metadata.description: Official code for "F5-TTS: A Fairytaler that Fakes Fluent and Faithful Speech with Flow Matching"

summary.zh: F5-TTS是一个基于Diffusion Transformer和ConvNeXt V2的文本到语音（TTS）系统，旨在生成流畅且忠实的语音。其创新的Sway Sampling推理策略显著提升了性能，适用于各种语音合成应用，如虚拟助手和有声书制作。该项目提供了易于使用的安装指南和多种模型支持，适合研究和开发者使用。
summary.en: F5-TTS is a text-to-speech (TTS) system based on Diffusion Transformer and ConvNeXt V2, designed to generate fluent and faithful speech. Its innovative Sway Sampling inference strategy significantly enhances performance, making it suitable for various speech synthesis applications, such as virtual assistants and audiobook production. The project offers easy installation guidelines and supports multiple models, making it ideal for researchers and developers.

metadata.name: hapi
metadata.description: App for Claude Code / Codex / Gemini / OpenCode, vibe coding anytime, anywhere

summary.zh: HAPI 是一个本地优先的应用，支持 Claude Code、Codex、Gemini 和 OpenCode 的本地运行与远程控制。它的核心价值在于无缝切换本地与远程工作，确保上下文不丢失，并提供手机远程操作功能。HAPI 允许用户在不同 AI 模型之间统一工作流，支持语音控制，提升了编码的灵活性与便捷性，适合需要随时随地进行编码的开发者。
summary.en: HAPI is a local-first application that enables running and remotely controlling Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, and OpenCode sessions. Its core value lies in seamless transitions between local and remote work, ensuring no context loss and providing mobile remote operation capabilities. HAPI allows users to maintain a unified workflow across different AI models and supports voice control, enhancing flexibility and convenience for developers who need to code anytime, anywhere.

metadata.name: openai-cs-agents-demo
metadata.description: Demo of a customer service use case implemented with the OpenAI Agents SDK

summary.zh: 该仓库展示了基于OpenAI Agents SDK构建的客户服务接口示例，包含Python后端和Next.js前端。后端负责代理协调逻辑，前端提供高质量的聊天界面。项目支持多种代理功能，如航班信息查询、座位变更和退款处理，适用于客户服务场景，便于定制和扩展。
summary.en: This repository showcases a customer service interface demo built on the OpenAI Agents SDK, featuring a Python backend and a Next.js frontend. The backend manages agent orchestration logic, while the frontend offers a high-quality chat interface. The project supports various agent functionalities such as flight information inquiries, seat changes, and refund processing, making it suitable for customer service scenarios and easy to customize and extend.

metadata.name: interview-guide
metadata.description: An opinionated, actionable guide for software engineering interviews.

summary.zh: 这是一本针对软件工程面试的实用指南，作者Nick是一位资深软件工程师，拥有丰富的面试经验。该指南总结了他在大公司和初创企业面试中的见解，旨在帮助软件开发者更好地准备面试，提升求职成功率。内容涵盖了面试流程、技巧和策略，适合希望在技术领域取得成功的求职者。
summary.en: This is a practical guide for software engineering interviews, authored by Nick, a senior software engineer with extensive interview experience. The guide encapsulates his insights from interviews at both large tech companies and startups, aiming to assist software developers in better preparing for interviews and enhancing their chances of success. It covers interview processes, techniques, and strategies, making it suitable for job seekers in the tech field.

metadata.name: grok2api
metadata.description: Grok2API 是一个基于 FastAPI 构建的 Grok 网关，支持将 Grok Web 能力以 OpenAI 兼容 API 的方式转换。

summary.zh: Grok2API 是一个基于 FastAPI 构建的 Grok 网关，旨在将 Grok Web 能力以 OpenAI 兼容 API 的形式提供。其核心特性包括支持多种 API 接口、流式对话、函数工具结构透传及多账号管理等。项目适用于需要集成 OpenAI 和 Anthropic API 的开发者，提供灵活的本地部署和云服务选项，助力快速构建智能应用。
summary.en: Grok2API is a Grok gateway built on FastAPI, designed to provide Grok Web capabilities in an OpenAI-compatible API format. Key features include support for various API endpoints, streaming conversations, function tool passthrough, and multi-account management. The project is suitable for developers looking to integrate OpenAI and Anthropic APIs, offering flexible local deployment and cloud service options to facilitate rapid intelligent application development.

metadata.name: ppt-image-first
metadata.description: PPT image-first skill for Codex/Claude Code/Opencode CLI

summary.zh: ppt-image-first 是一个创新的 PPT 工作流工具，采用 conversation-first 和 image-first 的设计理念，旨在将模糊的 PPT 需求逐步转化为高质量的视觉演示稿。该工具通过轻量化的需求确认、内容基底生成和风格预览，避免了传统 PPT 制作中的模板化和内容浅薄问题，适合用于答辩、汇报和产品介绍等场景。
summary.en: ppt-image-first is an innovative PPT workflow tool that employs a conversation-first and image-first design philosophy to transform vague PPT requirements into high-quality visual presentations. By streamlining the demand confirmation, generating content baselines, and providing style previews, it avoids the pitfalls of template-driven and shallow content in traditional PPT creation, making it suitable for defense presentations, reports, and product introductions.

metadata.name: Recordly
metadata.description: Create polished screen recordings without editing. Mac/Windows/Linux

summary.zh: Recordly 是一个开源的屏幕录制和编辑工具，适用于制作演示、产品视频等。它集成了自动缩放、光标美化和动态摄像头覆盖等功能，用户可以在一个平台上完成录制和编辑，省去繁琐的后期处理。支持 macOS、Windows 和 Linux 系统，鼓励社区贡献扩展功能，提升用户体验。
summary.en: Recordly is an open-source screen recording and editing tool designed for creating walkthroughs, product videos, and more. It features automatic zooms, cursor polish, and dynamic webcam overlays, allowing users to record and edit in one place without the need for extensive post-production. Compatible with macOS, Windows, and Linux, it encourages community contributions for enhanced functionality.

summary.zh: MuMuAI小说创作工具是一个专为中文小说创作设计的AI驱动平台，提供角色管理、剧情规划和章节生成等全流程创作支持。用户无需编程基础，通过简单的双击操作即可启动，支持多种AI模型，具备智能角色设定和剧情可视化功能，适合希望轻松创作小说的用户。
summary.en: MuMuAI Novel Creation Tool is an AI-driven platform designed for Chinese novel writing, offering comprehensive support for character management, plot planning, and chapter generation. Users can easily start the tool with a simple double-click, and it supports multiple AI models, featuring intelligent character settings and plot visualization, making it ideal for aspiring novelists.

metadata.name: drawio-skill
metadata.description: drawio-skill — From Text to Professional Diagrams. An Agent Skill (SKILL.md) that generates draw.io diagrams from natural language and exports to PNG/SVG/PDF. Works with Claude Code, OpenClaw, Hermes Agent, OpenAI Codex, and SkillsMP.

summary.zh: drawio-skill 是一个强大的工具，能够将自然语言描述转换为专业的 draw.io 图表，并支持导出为 PNG、SVG 或 PDF 格式。它提供六种图表类型预设，支持自动触发和迭代设计，适合用于复杂系统的可视化。该技能兼容多种 AI 编程代理，具有自检功能和风格预设，适合 CI/CD 流程中的图表生成。
summary.en: drawio-skill is a powerful tool that converts natural language descriptions into professional draw.io diagrams, supporting exports to PNG, SVG, or PDF formats. It offers six diagram type presets, supports proactive triggers and iterative design, making it ideal for visualizing complex systems. This skill is compatible with various AI coding agents, featuring self-check capabilities and style presets, suitable for diagram generation in CI/CD workflows.

metadata.name: CordysCRM
metadata.description: 🔥 Cordys CRM 是新一代开源 AI CRM 系统，融合信息化、数字化与智能化，支持私有化部署，Skills 技能现已上线，全面驱动 OpenClaw AI 助理。

summary.zh: Cordys CRM 是一款新一代开源 AI 客户关系管理系统，集信息化、数字化与智能化于一体，支持私有化部署。该系统实现从线索到回款的全流程管理，具备灵活配置、高效协同、安全自主和智能决策等核心优势。通过开放的 API 接口，Cordys CRM 能够与 OpenClaw AI 助理深度集成，提升销售效率，适用于各类企业的客户管理需求。
summary.en: Cordys CRM is a next-generation open-source AI customer relationship management system that integrates informatization, digitalization, and intelligence, supporting private deployment. It enables comprehensive management from lead to cash, featuring flexible configuration, efficient collaboration, autonomous security, and intelligent decision-making. With open API interfaces, Cordys CRM can deeply integrate with the OpenClaw AI assistant, enhancing sales efficiency and catering to various enterprise customer management needs.

metadata.name: skyvern
metadata.description: Automate browser based workflows with AI

summary.zh: Skyvern 是一个基于大型语言模型和计算机视觉的自动化工具，旨在简化浏览器工作流程的自动化。它提供了兼容 Playwright 的 SDK 和无代码工作流构建器，使技术和非技术用户都能轻松自动化网站操作。Skyvern 的视觉学习能力使其能够在未见过的网站上进行操作，并有效应对网站布局变化，显著提升了自动化的可靠性和灵活性。
summary.en: Skyvern is an automation tool that leverages large language models and computer vision to simplify browser-based workflows. It offers a Playwright-compatible SDK and a no-code workflow builder, enabling both technical and non-technical users to automate website interactions easily. Skyvern's visual learning capabilities allow it to operate on unseen websites and effectively handle layout changes, significantly enhancing automation reliability and flexibility.

metadata.name: CyberVerse
metadata.description: CyberVerse is an open-source digital human agent platform with real-time video calling. Create an AI agent you can see and talk to, face to face, just like a video call.

summary.zh: CyberVerse是一个开源数字人代理平台，支持实时视频通话。用户只需上传一张照片，即可创建一个可以面对面交流的AI代理，具备实时面部动画和自然的语音同步。该平台基于WebRTC技术，提供低延迟、无限时长的视频通话，适用于虚拟助手、娱乐角色重现等多种场景。
summary.en: CyberVerse is an open-source digital human agent platform that enables real-time video calling. Users can create an AI agent that can interact face-to-face by simply uploading a photo, featuring real-time facial animation and natural lip-sync. Built on WebRTC technology, it offers low-latency, unlimited-duration video calls, suitable for virtual assistants, entertainment character recreation, and more.

summary.zh: 《Agentic Design Patterns》是一本关于构建智能系统的实用指南，涵盖21章和7个附录，内容包括基础模式、先进技术、记忆与学习、生产模式及优化等。书中提供了丰富的代码笔记，便于读者进行实践学习，适合希望深入了解AI代理系统设计的开发者和研究人员。所有作者版税将捐赠给儿童救助组织。
summary.en: The book 'Agentic Design Patterns' is a practical guide to building intelligent systems, covering 21 chapters and 7 appendices on foundational patterns, advanced techniques, memory and learning, production patterns, and optimization. It includes extensive code notebooks for hands-on learning, making it suitable for developers and researchers looking to deepen their understanding of AI agent system design. All author royalties are donated to Save the Children.

metadata.name: awesome-gpt-image-2-API-and-Prompts
metadata.description: GPT-Image-2 API and Prompts

summary.zh: 该仓库提供了GPT-Image-2 API及其相关提示模式，旨在为图像生成、提示探索和可重用视觉工作流提供参考案例。内容主要来源于社交媒体、创作者社区和公共演示，适合需要图像生成的开发者和创作者使用。用户可以在Evolink平台上尝试这些提示，获取灵感和实用的示例。
summary.en: This repository offers the GPT-Image-2 API and related prompt patterns, aimed at providing reference cases for image generation, prompt exploration, and reusable visual workflows. The content is curated from social media, creator communities, and public demos, making it suitable for developers and creators in need of image generation. Users can try these prompts on the Evolink platform for inspiration and practical examples.
